title: Notice: Ver. 1.102.0 Known Issues
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

We would like to inform you about the known issues identified after the Apr. 2nd, 2026 Scheduled Update.

Please continue reading for more information.

[ Issues identified after the Apr. 2nd Scheduled Update ]

▶ An issue where the game becomes unresponsive when using a Skill while equipped with "The Princess of La Manchaland Rodion" Façade

▶ (KR Only) Fixed an issue where a Hidden Mirror Dungeon Theme Pack's name appears as "UNKNOWN"

▶ An issue where, under specific conditions, the effects of the E.G.O Gift "Sharp Needle & Thread" do not properly activate

※ The above issues will be resolved with the Apr. 9th Scheduled Update.
※ Please refrain from projecting "The Princess of La Manchaland Rodion" Façade until this issue is resolved with the Apr. 9th Scheduled Update.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: 2026, Apr. 2nd Scheduled Update Notice
content:
--------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on Apr. 2nd, 2026 (KST).

Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.

Please refer below for details about the update.

New Content
-----------

1. New Identity Target Extraction - [The House of Spiders: The Ring Nursefather Hong Lu & Apprentice Faust] (4/2 12:00 ~ 4/16 10:00 (KST))
The following Identities will have increased odds of extraction:
- 3★ : The House of Spiders: The Ring Nursefather Hong Lu, The House of Spiders: The Ring Apprentice Faust

※ The House of Spiders: The Ring Nursefather Hong Lu and The House of Spiders: The Ring Apprentice Faust are Season 7 Identities.

2. Target Extraction [Yi Sang] (4/2 12:00 ~ 4/16 10:00 (KST))
Extraction rate increases for the following Identities and E.G.O
- E.G.O [HE] : Fell Bullet Yi Sang, Dimension Shredder Yi Sang
- E.G.O [TETH] : Wishing Cairn Yi Sang
- 3★ : The House of Spiders: The Index Nursefather Yi Sang, Heishou Pack - Wu Branch Adept Yi Sang, N Corp. E.G.O::Fell Bullet Yi Sang, Liu South Section 3 Yi Sang, The Ring Pointillist Student Yi Sang, W Corp. L3 Cleanup Agent Yi Sang, Effloresced E.G.O::Spicebush Yi Sang, Blade Lineage Salsu Yi Sang
- 2★ : LCE E.G.O::Lantern Yi Sang, Dieci South Section 4 Yi Sang, The Pequod First Mate Yi Sang, Molar Office Fixer Yi Sang, Seven South Section 6 Yi Sang
- 1★ : LCB Sinner Yi Sang

3. New Packages
2 new limited packages will be added to the game with the Apr. 2nd, 2026 (KST) Scheduled Update.

► Target Extraction Pack
- Contents : Decaextraction Ticket x 4
- Price : ₩33,000 / $21.99 / ¥3,000
- Can be purchased once
- Purchasable Period : 26. 4. 2 12:00 ~ 4. 16 10:00 (KST)

► Identity Growth Pack
- Contents : Takeoff Module - ID Uptie x 1, Identity Training Ticket IV x 80, Identity Training Ticket III x 20
- Price : ₩33,000 / $21.99 / ¥3,000
- Can be purchased twice
- Purchasable Period : 26. 4. 2 12:00 ~ 4. 16 10:00 (KST)

Façade Projection Improvements
------------------------------

The following improvements to the Façade Projection system will be added with the Apr. 2nd Scheduled Update.

1. Façades will no longer repeat the same animation if the underlying Identity has more Coins than the Projected Identity.
※ If the underlying Identity has more Skill Coin animations than the Projected Identity, it will now play random animations pulled from the Projected Identity's animation pool to cover for the Coin disparity, then play the Projected Identity's corresponding Skill animation to end the Skill sequence.
The randomized animations will be pulled from the Projected Identity's Skill 1 or Skill 2 Coin animations. However, if the underlying Identity's Coin animation is shorter than 1 second, and if the randomly selected animation's length is double or longer than that of the underlying Identity, the game will play a Clash animation instead.

► Example - When using Skill 3 with "The Manager of La Manchaland Don Quixote" Façade over "W Corp. L2 Cleanup Agent Don Quixote":
Pre-update, Coin Animation sequence played as follows: 1, 2, 2, 2, 3
Post-update, Coin Animation sequence will play as follows: Random, Random, 1, 2, 3

2. The issue where Projecting Façades of or on certain Identities could cause the resultant animation length to vary will be fixed.
※ Affected Identities (7 total)
Lobotomy E.G.O::Solemn Lament Yi Sang, Lobotomy E.G.O::Lantern Don Quixote, Edgar Family Chief Butler Ryōshū, District 20 Yurodivy Hong Lu, Dawn Office Fixer Sinclair, Lobotomy E.G.O::Magic Bullet Outis, Kurokumo Clan Captain Gregor

3. The issue where using certain Skills 2 or more times could cause the resultant animation length to vary will be fixed.
► Example - When using "Magnificent End" Skill with "N Corp. E.G.O::Contempt, Awe Ryōshū" Façade over "Lobotomy E.G.O::Faint Aroma & Solitude Ryōshū"
- Before : Animation speed begins to vary after using the Skill 2 or more times
- After : Animation speed will remain constant no matter how many times the Skill is used

4. The issue where using Skill 3 while Projecting Façades of certain Identities could cause similar animations to play twice will be fixed.
※ Affected Identities (3 total)
Cinq South Section 5 Director Don Quixote, Liu South Section 4 Ishmael, Liu South Section 4 Director Rodion

5. An issue where some of "The Prince of La Manchaland Meursault" voicelines would play even when Projected with "Lobotomy E.G.O::Hornet Meursault" Façade will be fixed.

6. In the Façade Projection menu, UI icon clarity will be improved to show which Façades are currently "Projected".

Mirror of Names and Spiders Updates
----------------------------------

With the Apr. 2nd Scheduled Update, the following content will be added to Mirror of Names and Spiders.

1. "Mirror of Names and Spiders - Mirror Projection / Achievements" update Part 3 will be added.
- Combat Category
- Completionist Category

2. Additional Mirror Dungeon Quality-of-Life Updates will be deployed.
(1) The game will now alert the user when proceeding without selecting all selectable E.G.O Gifts.
- This alert will appear in the Starting E.G.O Gifts menu if the number of selected E.G.O Gifts is below the maximum selectable number.
- This function can be disabled by checking the "Don't show this message again" option in the alert pop-up window or toggling this option off in the Settings menu.
(2) In the Choice Event UI, the "SKIP" button's location will be moved and will have improved visibility.
- The "SKIP" button to skip the Choice Event story will be placed at the same location as where the "Return" button is, making it more convenient to reach.
- Once the user has read or skipped the full script, the "SKIP" button will then be replaced with "Return".

3. Hidden Theme Packs exclusive to Mirror Dungeon HARD difficulty will be added.
※ Hidden Theme Packs have a very small chance to spawn in Floor 3 ~ Floor 10 of Mirror of Names and Spiders HARD.
※ Hidden Theme Packs have their exclusive Choice Events. Clearing them will yield exclusive E.G.O Gifts.
※ Hidden Theme Packs and their E.G.O Gifts will not be recorded in their respective compendiums, and will not affect the "Collection" category of Achievements:
- Unlock X E.G.O Gifts in the E.G.O Gift Compendium
- Unlock 70 or more HARD Difficulty Theme Packs
※ Hidden Theme Packs and their exclusive E.G.O Gifts cannot be found using "Pack Search" or "Gift Search" functions.

Bug Fixes & Improvements
-----------------------

► Fixed an issue where the Passive of a boss unit in LCB Regular Check-up behaved differently from its description
※ Relevant Passives: Adaptation, Maladaptation
- Before : Both Adaptation and Maladaptation effects behaved according to the Maladaptation text, while the maximum Poise Potency and Count obtainable per turn had differing caps for each effect
- After : Both Adaptation and Maladaptation will now function according to their respective descriptions

► Fixed an issue where some combat patterns and effects would not activate during the first wave of multi-wave Encounters in the Mirror of Names and Spiders EXTREME Theme Pack
[ Cause of the Issue ]
- During wave data updates in certain Encounters, the validation of scripts applied to the Encounter occurred at an unintended timing
[ Issue Fix ]
- Adjusted the script validation timing to function as intended

► Fixed an issue where the event currency "Amassed Data" obtainable from "LCB Regular Check-up BokGak" would accumulate up to the maximum exchangeable amount even if one-time exchange rewards had already been obtained
※ This was an issue where "Amassed Data" would accumulate additionally based on the amount previously used for exchanges in the past event.
※ You can still obtain the maximum amount of "Amassed Data" required to claim all currently available rewards after the fix.

► Fixed an issue where interacting with the UI would cause redirection to unintended screens upon returning to the LCB Regular Check-up BokGak event UI after viewing its story content

► Fixed an issue where certain Clash animations (Guard, Evade) would not display during combat

► Fixed an issue where the Classification number display format would not change even after viewing the "Risk Levels & Classifications" mini-story while progressing between Chapter 5.5 and 7.5

► Fixed an issue where the effects of certain E.G.O Skills would not display properly
※ Relevant E.G.O (3 total): Hex Nail Faust, Ardor Blossom Star Ishmael, Legerdemain Gregor

► (EN Only) Fixed an issue where keyword highlights were missing in the Threadspinning UI for certain E.G.O
※ Relevant E.G.O (7 total): 4th Match Flame Yi Sang, Hex Nail Faust, Regret Meursault, Ya Śūnyatā Tad Rūpam Heathcliff, Lantern Sinclair, Sunshower Outis, Legerdemain Gregor

► Fixed an issue where Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Eyes & Penitence Ryōshū's unique keywords "Red Eyes" and "Penitence" were displayed twice each
[ Cause of the Issue ]
- Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Eyes & Penitence Ryōshū is designed so that, through the passive "E.G.O Assimilation," gaining Charge Count grants either Red Eyes or Penitence instead.
This issue was caused by an error where, when the effect "Gain Charge Count next turn" was triggered, the buff stage maintained this turn and the stage to be gained the next turn were not added together if their levels differed.
[ Issue Fix ]
- When gaining Charge Count this turn changes the buff stage of "Red Eyes" or "Penitence," the corresponding buffs gained via "Gain Charge Count next turn" will now also change and stack accordingly.

► Fixed an issue where E.G.O Gifts that activate based on the sum of "Charge Count and Unique Charge on self" would incorrectly use the sum of Unique Charge Count and Unique Charge Potency for Identities with Unique Charge
※ Relevant E.G.O Gifts : Imitative Generator, Fragment of Friction, Biogenerative Battery, Perpetual Generator Servos
※ Relevant Identity : Lobotomy E.G.O::In the Name of Love and Hate Don Quixote
[ Cause of the Issue ]
- The Unique Charge included in trigger calculations for these E.G.O Gifts refers to Stack-only Unique Charge with fixed Potency (e.g., Deep Tears).
- For Unique Charge types that include both Potency and Count such as "Love/Hate", the intention was to include only the Count in trigger calculations, just like in the case of Charge.
- However, as these Gifts were created before such Unique Charge types existed, their text description was not updated to specify "Unique Charge (fixed Potency)".
- Additionally, an exception logic in calculating Unique Charge Potency was missing, causing the Potency of "Love/Hate" (which shares specs with Charge) to be included in the computation.
[ Issue Fix ]
- The issue has been fixed so that only the sum of Charge Count (including Unique Charge Count) and Unique Charge (fixed Potency) is taken into account.
- To avoid confusion, the phrasing for Unique Charge in these Gifts has been updated to "Unique Charge (fixed Potency)".
We apologize for any confusion caused by this issue.

► Fixed an issue where The House of Spiders: The Index Nursefather Yi Sang could not use E.G.O Skills under certain conditions during battle
( Issue Details )
1. Proceeding to the next turn without using an E.G.O Skill equipped in the previous turn
2. Procuration [Hermes] reaches 9 Stacks after changing an equipped E.G.O Skill to a Defense Skill
3. If the Combat Passive "Imitation of a Life" changes the bottom-leftmost Skill to Skill 3, the E.G.O can no longer be used

► (EN Only) Improved phrasing consistency for certain E.G.O Skills and Passives to match the latest text
1. Skill Phrasing (10 total)
Hex Nail Faust, Ardor Blossom Star Faust, 4th Match Flame Ryōshū, Electric Screaming Meursault, Ya Śūnyatā Tad Rūpam Heathcliff, Bygone Days Ishmael, What is Cast Rodion, To Páthos Máthos Outis, Magic Bullet Outis, Lantern Gregor

2. Passives Phrasing (43 total)
Crow's Eye View Yi Sang, 4th Match Flame Yi Sang, Wishing Cairn Yi Sang, Dimension Shredder Yi Sang, Sunshower Yi Sang
Representation Emitter Faust, Hex Nail Faust, Fluid Sac Faust, Telepole Faust
La Sangre de Sancho Don Quixote, Fluid Sac Don Quixote, Lifetime Stew Don Quixote, Telepole Don Quixote
Forest for the Flames Ryōshū, 4th Match Flame Ryōshū, Red Eyes Ryōshū
Chains of Others Meursault, Screwloose Wallop Meursault, Regret Meursault, Capote Meursault
Land of Illusion Hong Lu, Roseate Desire Hong Lu, Dimension Shredder Hong Lu, Soda Hong Lu
Bodysack Heathcliff, Telepole Heathcliff, Ya Śūnyatā Tad Rūpam Heathcliff, AEDD Heathcliff
Snaghapoon Ishmael, Roseate Desire Ishmael, Capote Ishmael
4th Match Flame Rodion, Indicant's Trial Rodion
Branch of Knowledge Sinclair, Lifetime Stew Sinclair, Lantern Sinclair
To Páthos Máthos Outis, Ebony Stem Outis, Ya Śūnyatā Tad Rūpam Outis
Suddenly, One Day Gregor, Legerdemain Gregor, Lantern Gregor, AEDD Gregor

3. E.G.O Keyword Phrasing (2 total)
Tears of the Tarnished Blood [污血泣涙] Sinclair's "Flower-burying Pin [埋花針]", Hundred-Footed Death Maggot [蜈蚣殺] Ishmael's "Centipede Venom"

※ Please note that text standardization updates will be gradually implemented to match the latest text.

Known Issues
------------

► An issue where, when activating the effect "In this Encounter, when an ally takes damage that would kill them, consume all Charge Count and 'Unique Charge' on self; then, immediately heal (10 + sum of Charge Count and 'Unique Charge' consumed)% HP" of the E.G.O Gift "Perpetual Generator Servos", the effect would consume the Potency of unfixed Unique Charge, as opposed to the design intention of consuming Charge Count and Unique Charge (fixed Potency) only

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before Apr. 9th, 2026, 10:00 AM (KST)
- When : After Apr. 2nd (Thu), 2026, 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Apr. 9th (Thu), 2026, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.
- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change depending on the status of maintenance. If such a change occurs, we will let you know in a follow-up notice.
- A resource download may be prompted after the build update. If you're using a mobile device, it is recommended to proceed with a Wi-Fi connection.
- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account. Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: Notice: Ver. 1.101.1 Known Issues and Hotfix ETA
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

We would like to inform you about the known issues identified after the Mar. 26th, 2026 Scheduled Update, and the ETA for a Hotfix that addresses some of them.

Please continue reading for more information.

[ Issues to be fixed with the Mar. 27th Hotfix ]

▶ An Issue where, under specific circumstances, completion of certain 'Mirror Projection / Achievement - Loadout' Achievements are abnormally affected

※ Affected Achievements (9 total)
1. Defeat the 4 'Charm, Wander, Doubt,' 'Textbook,' 'Blade and Artwork,' and 'The Unsevering' Theme Pack bosses with 3 or more The House of Spiders Identities, with 'LCB Sinner Ryōshū', in your Loadout (Not counting Backup Units; incompletable by Rental Teams)
2. Defeat the 'The Heartbreaking' Theme Pack boss with 3 or more Wuthering Heights Identities, including 'Wild Hunt Heathcliff', in your Loadout (Not counting Backup Units; incompletable by Rental Teams)
3. Defeat the 'The Infinite Procession' Theme Pack boss with 'Cinq West Section 3 Meursault,' 'Zwei West Section 3 Sinclair,' 'Fanghunt Office Fixer Hong Lu,' and 'Firefist Office Survivor Gregor' Identities in your Loadout (Not counting Backup Units; incompletable by Rental Teams)
4. Defeat the 'Murder on the WARP Express BokGak' Theme Pack boss with 4 or more Bloodfiend Identities in your Loadout (Not counting Backup Units; incompletable by Rental Teams)
5. Defeat the 'The Unconfronting' Theme Pack boss with 2 or more Mechanical Amalgam Identities in your Loadout (Not counting Backup Units; incompletable by Rental Teams)
6. Defeat the 'Miracle in District 20 BokGak' Theme Pack boss with only Heathcliff and Don Quixote Identities on the field (Not counting Backup Units; incompletable by Rental Teams)
7. Defeat the 'Timekilling Time BokGak' Theme Pack boss with 2 or more T Corp. Identities in your Loadout (Not counting Backup Units; incompletable by Rental Teams)
8. Defeat the 'A Beautiful Voice' Theme Pack boss with 'Wild Hunt Heathcliff' Identity on the field (Not counting Backup Units; incompletable by Rental Teams)
9. Defeat the 5 'Murder on the WARP Express,' 'Murder on the WARP Express BokGak,' 'La Manchaland Re-opening,' 'The Infinite Procession,' and 'The Dream Ending' Theme Pack bosses with 'The Manager of La Manchaland Don Quixote' Identity on the field (Not counting Backup Units; incompletable by Rental Teams)

( Issue Details )
- This issue can be caused by forfeiting immediately after entering the Boss Encounter, then re-entering with a different Team loadout
1. Even after re-entering with a different loadout, because the game reads the previous Team loadout instead, Achievements that should be (or shouldn't be) completable with the current loadout are not completed (or completed)
2. Loadout Achievements with "Not counting Backup Units" condition count Backup Units for the purpose of completing them

( Issue Cause )
- When re-entering an Encounter after forfeiting it, the in-game data used for Achievement tracking does not properly update with the user's current Team loadout, causing this issue to occur.

( Issue Solution )
- Additional code was inserted to update the in-game data used for Achievement tracking. This solution will be deployed via a hotfix.

[ Hotfix ETA ]
- 3.27(Fri) 16:00(KST)
- There may be a 10 minute delay.

※ The Hotfix will be deployed upon restarting the game, and does not require a separate client update. However, please note that additional in-game downloads may occur.

[ Issues to be resolved with a Scheduled Update ]

▶ An issue where certain Encounters are missing BGM and connected lyrics

▶ An issue where the Mirror Dungeon EXTREME Theme Pack 'Bridle of Infinity' enemy unit's "Surgery" Keyword does not work

※ The above issues will be resolved with the April 2nd Scheduled Update.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: 2026, Mar. 26th Scheduled Update Notice
content:
---------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on Mar. 26th, 2026 (KST).

Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.

Please refer below for details about the update.

New Content
-----------

1. Mirror of Names and Spiders - Mirror Projection / Achievements Part 2 will be updated.

2. Voices will be added to The 4th Walpurgis Night & The 5th Walpurgis Nights Mini Episodes.

3. Façade Projection System implementation will be improved.
- Skill-triggered voice playback frequency will be adjusted.

※ Please understand that the update to address the "Unnatural Skill motion display due to differences in each Identity's number of Skills" issue, which was previously announced to be deployed with the Mar. 26th Scheduled Update, will be updated on Apr. 2nd instead, as it requires further stability testing.

4. New Dante's Notes entries will be added.
New entries will be added to Dante's Notes after the Mar. 26th (KST) Scheduled Update.
► Unlock Conditions: Clear Main Story Canto 9

Mirror of Names and Spiders Quality-of-Life Updates
---------------------------------------------------

With the Mar. 26th Scheduled Update, the following QoL features will be deployed to Mirror of Names and Spiders.

► Mirror Dungeon "Theme Pack Compendium" will now list information regarding each Theme Pack's featured Floors.
- Theme Pack information from the "Theme Pack Compendium" will now contain their featured Floors.
- Floor-based search filter will be added to the "Theme Pack Compendium", allowing users to view which Floor has which Theme Packs.

► Featured bosses' portraits can now be previewed in the Mirror Dungeon "Select Floor Theme Pack" menu.
- Select the magnifier icon on the top right corner of each Theme Pack to view the portraits of featured bosses.
- Featured boss preview for Theme Packs is unlocked only after selecting the said Theme Pack at least once.

► (STEAM) Keyboard input for Mirror Dungeon Stage selection is now available.
- Press the Up, Right, or Down directional keys to select the next node.
If you haven't yet entered the selected node, you can press the Left directional key to cancel your selection and return to the previous node.
- After selecting a node, press Enter or Space Bar to enter the selected node.
- In the Choice Event menu, press Enter or Space Bar to proceed to the next paragraph.
- Please view "Settings" - "PC Keyboard Shortcuts" in the game for more information.
※ Any keyboard controls for various functions not included in the Mar. 26th Scheduled Update, such as Choice Events or Hidden Boss entry, will be updated at a later date.

► Certain functionalities will be improved for the ease of viewing your currently owned E.G.O Gifts in the Mirror Dungeon.
- A total of 4 categories have been added for the sake of viewing more information, in addition to your currently owned E.G.O Gifts.

1. Owned: View all E.G.O Gifts you have obtained during the current Mirror Dungeon run.

2. Clear Rewards: View the list of E.G.O Gift rewards that become selectable upon clearing the Theme Pack.
- Any E.G.O Gifts exclusive to your current Theme Pack will be listed under the "Theme Pack-Exclusive" section.

3. Current Theme Pack-Exclusive: View the list of E.G.O Gifts exclusive to your current Theme Pack (both normal and Fusion).

4. Featured: View the list of all obtainable E.G.O Gifts in your current Theme Pack.

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► (EN only) Fixed typo of LCE E.G.O::AEDD Gregor's Uptie IV Skill 1
- Before : [On Use] At less than 10 Charge, gain +2 Charge Count
- After : [On Use] At less than 10 Charge Count, gain +2 Charge Count
※ The effect is behaving per the "After" text. Only the English version of the text will be fixed.

► Fixed an issue where Identities with the "Attack Power Up" effect were incorrectly treated as "Charge" Identities and received related effects
[ Cause of the Issue ]
- This issue occurred because a keyword from a deleted Unique Charge code, which was removed due to a design change, was replaced with "Power Up".

[ Issue Fix ]
Adjusted the code so that data with invalid keywords is properly recognized as invalid

[ Affected Identities (10 total) ]
LCB Sinner Don Quixote, Seven Assoc. South Section 6 Ryōshū, The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu, LCB Sinner Heathcliff, Jeong's Office Rep Ishmael, The Princess of La Manchaland Rodion, LCB Sinner Sinclair, Blade Lineage Salsu Sinclair, G Corp. Head Manager Outis, Liu Assoc. South Section 6 Gregor

► Fixed an issue where the game would not respond when certain Heishou Identities under Façade Projection use Heishou follow-up attacks
※ Affected Identities: Heishou Pack - Wu Branch Adept Yi Sang (when equipped with N Corp. E.G.O::Fell Bullet Yi Sang's Façade), Heishou Pack - You Branch Adept Heathcliff (when equipped with Full-Stop Office Fixer Heathcliff's Façade)

► Fixed an issue where battles would not proceed when entering the tutorial stage with "Dawn Office Fixer Sinclair" in the team loadout

► Fixed an issue where some voice lines would not play when "Dawn Office Fixer Sinclair" uses Skill 3

► Fixed an issue where the description of the Passive "Unwithering Flower" did not display at Uptie Tier IV for "Lobotomy E.G.O::Faint Aroma & Solitude Ryōshū"

► Fixed an issue where the E.G.O Gift "Uniform - Liu Assoc." effect would activate even when the team loadout prerequisite is not met
[ Cause of the Issue ]
The requirement check logic for team loadout was missing, and the issue was not properly flagged during cross-checking.

[ Issue Fix ]
Updated the logic so that the effect only activates when team loadout requirements are met

► Fixed an issue where certain Coin motions and special dialogue for a Skill used by an enemy in Main Story 8-30 were partially missing

► Fixed an issue where a Skill used by an enemy in Main Story 9-44 functioned differently from intended
- Before: Coin 4 Effect - [On Hit] Inflict 10 Burn
- After: Coin 4 Effect - [On Hit without Cracking] Inflict 10 Burn
※ To align with our Managers' gameplay experience, the textual description has been updated to match the actual behavior.

► Fixed a text error in the Skill "Conduct Analysis" used by a boss unit in LCB Regular Check-up BokGak
- Before: [On Use] At 10+ Poise Potency, consume Poise Potency to gain +2 Final Power for every 3 Poise Potency consumed (max 4)
- After: [On Use] At 10+ Poise Potency, consume Poise Potency to gain +2 Final Power for every 3 Poise Potency consumed (max 4). Consume 3 additional Poise for every Final Power gained due to this effect
※ The effect is behaving as intended; only the text will be fixed.

► Fixed an issue where, when "The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu" uses a Heishou follow-up Skill, the dedicated follow-up attack animation would display even when the follow-up unit is equipping a Façade

► Fixed an issue where certain motions would not display when the Façade of "Shi Assoc. East Section 3 Faust" is projected onto another Identity

► Fixed an issue where the illustration position of "Los Mariachis Jefe Sinclair" would appear incorrectly on the Façade Projection screen

► Fixed an issue where the Keyword icon of the Passive "Hunger" would display incorrectly for a boss unit in the Mirror Dungeon Theme Pack "Into a Certain Library's Book"

► (EN only) Adjusted the translation for an activation timing for phrasing consistency
- Before : After Current Coin Attack
- After : Current Coin Attack End

► Fixed an issue where the background image of the text for activated Passives would display abnormally in the Skill Info UI during combat

► Fixed an issue where a red dot notification would appear on the 3rd Anniversary Nominable Identity Ticket's UI

► Fixed an issue where the topmost UI image would not display when progressing through the Refraction Railway with the Dark Mode UI

► Fixed an issue where certain keyword sound effects would play even when the sound effects setting is turned OFF

► Applied auto-scroll feature to Team Loadout name and title texts in the Team Loadout screen

► Improved visuals so that when projecting a Façade in the Team Loadout screen, illustrations of projected Identities would display periodically instead of displaying only once

► Improved Façade Projection list so that illustrations display according to the Identity's Uptie Tier

► Fixed an issue where certain areas in the Identity/E.G.O list on the Team Loadout screen could not be interacted with

► Removed certain effects displayed on Sinners during cutscenes in Chapter 7's boss battle
※ Additional effects that appear under certain situations will be fixed in the next update.

► Fixed an issue where, under certain conditions, Combat SD may linger in Stage 7.5-11

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before Apr. 2nd, 2026, 10:00 AM (KST)
- When : After Mar. 26th (Thu.), 2026, 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Apr. 2nd (Thu.), 2026, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.
- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change depending on the status of maintenance. If such a change occurs, we will let you know in a follow-up notice.
- A resource download may be prompted after the build update. If you're using a mobile device, it is recommended to proceed with a Wi-Fi connection.
- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account. Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: New Content - 3rd Anniversary Event
content:
-----------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

With the Feb. 26th, 2026 (KST) Scheduled Update, new content [The 3rd Anniversary Event] will be added to the game.

- Duration : 2026/2/26 12:00 (KST) ~ Before 3/26 Scheduled Update
- Requirements : Clear Main Story 0-4

Event Description
-----------------

- During the 3rd Anniversary Event, you can earn more rewards the more attendance checks you collect.  
  The rewards may vary by your cumulative attendance.
- Log in at least once after our 3rd Anniversary date and before the Event ends to receive a special reward.
- Once the server recognizes that you’ve logged in after the daily reset period (KST: 6 AM), you will receive your daily attendance check.

The 3rd Anniversary Login Event
-------------------------------

<Event Period>  
2026/2/27 00:00 (KST) ~ Before 3/26 (KST) Scheduled Update

<Description>

- Log in at least once after our 3rd Anniversary date (Feb. 27th) and before the Event ends to receive a 3★ Guarantee Decaextraction Ticket

The 3rd Anniversary Attendance Check Event
------------------------------------------

<Event Period>  
2026/2/26 12:00 (KST) ~ Before 3/26 (KST) Scheduled Update

<Description>

- You can pick up 1 Extraction Ticket every day you log in during the Event Period. Some of those attendance checks yield certain special rewards instead of Extraction Tickets.

- Up to 14 cumulative days of Attendance Check Rewards can be collected.

- If you receive a duplicate of an Announcer, you will receive 50 Thread crates instead.

<Special Rewards>

1st Login : Limbus Company 3rd Anniversary Commemorative Banner & Nominable Season 1 Identity Ticket  
4th Login : Takeoff Module - ID Uptie  
7th Login : 3rd Anniversary Commemorative Ticket Deco

※ Please note that the existing Angela Announcer has been renamed to “Angela (Lobotomy Corporation AI)”.

※ Use the 3rd Anniversary Nominable Identity Ticket to select and obtain an Identity among those released up to Season 6.  
Please refer to the below for selectable/non-selectable Identities.

※ Obtaining a duplicate of an Identity you already own will yield the respective Sinner’s Egoshards instead.  
- 2★ Identity : Egoshard x15  
- 3★ Identity : Egoshard x50

About New Packs
---------------

- Contents : 3★ Identity Guarantee Decaextraction Ticket x1, Identity Takeoff Ticket - ver.3 x1, Angela (Library Director - Early Days) Announcer (immediate access)

- Purchasable Period : 26. 2. 26 12:00 ~ 3. 26 10:00 (KST)

※ If you already have the Angela (Library Director - Early Days) Announcer, gain x50 Thread Crates instead.

※ Use the Identity Takeoff Ticket - ver.3 to select an Identity to Level up to 60 & Uptie to Tier 4. However, if you use this item before your level cap is expanded to 60 with story progression, please note that it will raise your Identity’s level only up to your current cap, meaning that any excess EXP will be lost.

※ Identity Takeoff Ticket - ver.3 can be used in both the Level-up window and in your inventory. However, Identities that are already at Level 60 have their Level-up button disabled, so please use this item via the inventory in such cases.

► 3rd Anniversary Pack II

About New Packs
---------------

title: Notice: The 8th Walpurgis Night Mission Issue Fixed
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

Following the Mar. 19th, 2026 Scheduled Update, we identified an issue in the 8th Walpurgis Night where a certain mission was not being counted properly, preventing players from claiming rewards.

This issue has now been resolved and deployed to the server.
Please refer to the details below for more information.

[ Issue Details ]
- Following the Mar. 19th Scheduled Update, a mission under the "Hard" Difficulty in the 8th Walpurgis Night mission list was not counted properly, making it impossible to obtain its reward.
※ Affected mission: Complete all Missions in both Easy and Hard Difficulties

[ Cause of the Issue ]
- The mission's end date was incorrectly set during validation process, preventing mission progress even when all conditions were met.

[ Fix Details ]
- Corrected the valid period for the mission "Complete all Missions in both Easy and Hard Difficulties"
- Improved and deployed server logic to ensure mission progress is properly reflected

[ Fix Schedule ]
- Fix applied on Mar. 20th (Fri), 21:50 (KST)

※ The fix has been automatically applied as of Mar. 20th, 21:50. No additional update is required.

※ After the time listed above, mission progress will now be properly counted. We have confirmed that rewards can now be claimed.
For Managers who were unable to complete the mission due to this issue, please fully restart the game and reconnect.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Notice: Missing Items from the Mar. 19th, 2026 Scheduled Update Notice
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

We previously shared this week's Scheduled Update details on Monday, Mar. 16th, 2026. However, we have confirmed that some newly applied updates and known issues were unintentionally omitted and not communicated to our Managers.

Please note below for the details.

[ Additional Changes Applied in the Mar. 19th Scheduled Update ]

1. New Entries for Dante's Notes
After the Mar. 19th (KST) Scheduled Update, new entries will be added to Dante's Notes.
► Unlock Condition : Clear all Stages of Main Story Chapter 8.5

2. E.G.O Gift "The End of all Evil" Fusion Recipe Change
- Before : Imposed Weight + Cetacean Heart + Town-protecting Harpoon
- After : Cetacean Heart + Town-protecting Harpoon

※ Fusing these E.G.O Gifts together meant that the player could no longer gain the benefits of the E.G.O Gift "Imposed Weight". Also, we have determined that, compared to other Fusion Gifts, fusing "The End of all Evil" with its relatively rare E.G.O Gift recipe was more difficult and expensive, while providing less benefit in return.

With this in mind, we will be lowering the Fusion difficulty and cost of this E.G.O Gift by removing the E.G.O Gift "Imposed Weight" from its recipe.

[ Known Issues in Mar. 19th Scheduled Update ]

► An issue where the new Target Extraction [LCB Regular Check-up BokGak] banner has an incorrect Extraction end-date
※ Please note that the actual end-date of this Extraction is, as previously shared,
2026/04/02 10:00(KST).
※ This issue will be resolved by a hotfix today.

► An issue where voices have not been added to The 4th Walpurgis Night & The 5th Walpurgis Night Mini-episodes
※ This issue will be resolved with the Mar. 26th Scheduled Update.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused by the missing update content and the known issues.

title: 2026, Mar. 19th Scheduled Update Notice
content:
---------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on Mar. 19th, 2026 (KST).

Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.

Please refer below for details about the update.

New Content
-----------

1. New Target Extraction - LCB Regular Check-up BokGak (3/19 12:00 ~ 4/2 10:00 (KST))
The following Identity and E.G.O will have increased odds of extraction:
- E.G.O [HE] : Ardor Blossom Star Faust
- 3★ : LCE E.G.O::AEDD Gregor
※ LCE E.G.O::AEDD Gregor is a Season 7 Event Identity.
※ Ardor Blossom Star Faust is a Season 7 Event E.G.O.

2. Target Extraction - Heathcliff (3/19 12:00 ~ 4/2 10:00 (KST))
The following Identities and E.G.O will have increased odds of extraction:
- E.G.O [HE] : Asymmetrical Inertia Heathcliff, Ya Śūnyatā Tad Rūpam Heathcliff
- E.G.O [TETH] : Fell Bullet Heathcliff
- E.G.O [ZAYIN] : Holiday Heathcliff
- 3★ : Heishou Pack - You Branch Adept Heathcliff, W Corp. L4 Cleanup Agent - CCA Heathcliff, Kurokumo Clan Wakashu Heathcliff, Wild Hunt Heathcliff, Öufi South Section 3 Heathcliff, The Pequod Harpooneer Heathcliff, Lobotomy E.G.O::Sunshower Heathcliff, R Corp. 4th Pack Rabbit Heathcliff
- 2★ : MultiCrack Office Fixer Heathcliff, Seven South Section 4 Heathcliff, N Corp. Kleinhammer Heathcliff, Shi South Section 5 Heathcliff
- 1★ : LCB Sinner Heathcliff

3. New Content - LCB Regular Check-up BokGak
※ Please refer to the relevant Steam announcement for details.

4. New Packages
3 new limited packages will be added to the game with the Mar. 19th, 2026 (KST) Scheduled Update.

► Target Extraction Pack
- Contents : Decaextraction Ticket x 4
- Price : ₩33,000 / $21.99 / ¥3,000
- Can be purchased once
- Purchasable Period : 26. 3. 19 12:00 ~ 4. 2 10:00 (KST)

► Identity Growth Pack
- Contents : Takeoff Module - ID Uptie x 1, Identity Training Ticket IV x 80, Identity Training Ticket III x 20
- Price : ₩33,000 / $21.99 / ¥3,000
- Can be purchased once
- Purchasable Period : 26. 3. 19 12:00 ~ 4. 2 10:00 (KST)

► E.G.O Upgrade Pack
- Content : Takeoff Module - E.G.O Spinning [HE] x1
- Price : ₩23,000 / $15.99 / ¥2,200
- Can be purchased once
- Purchasable Period : 26. 3. 19 12:00 ~ 4. 2 10:00 (KST)

Details on Mirror Dungeon E.G.O Gifts
-------------------------------------

2 New Fusion E.G.O Gifts will be added to the Mirror Dungeon, and 3 existing E.G.O Gifts will have their effects adjusted.

[Adjustment of Existing E.G.O Gift]
※ The adjustment details shared below are based on base tier.
※ Please note that any effect not listed here will remain unadjusted.

► Cetacean Heart
- Before: On Crit, 50% chance to not consume Poise Count (once per turn for each character; including E.G.O Skills and Counter Skills)
- After: On Crit, 50% chance to gain 1 Pierce Power Up next turn (2 times per turn per Identity; including E.G.O Skills and Counter Skills)

► The End of All Evil
- Before :
On Crit: 80% chance to not consume Poise Count (once per turn for each character; including E.G.O Skills and Counter Skills) If #1 Deployed Identity kills an enemy, The Pequod-faction Identities gain 1 Pierce Power Up, 1 Protection, and 1 Crit DMG Up each turn for the rest of this Encounter (max 3 times per Encounter)
- After :
On Crit: 80% chance to gain 1 Pierce Power Up next turn (2 times per turn Identity; including E.G.O Skills and Counter Skills)
- The Pequod-faction Identities gain 1 Plus Coin Boost next turn as well (once per turn per Identity)
On enemy or ally death, The Pequod-faction Identities gain 1 Pierce Power Up, 1 Protection, and 1 Crit DMG Up each turn for the rest of this Encounter (3 times per Encounter)

► Embers
- Before : Turn Start: All enemies(for Abnormalities, all Parts) with 2~7 Burn Count gain 1~2 Burn Count
- After : Turn Start: All enemies(for Abnormalities, all Parts) gain 1~2 Burn Count

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Fixed an issue where an enemy unit in Stage 9-44 has certain Skills that did not work as intended
※ Relevant Effect : [After Attack] At 2+ I Got Praised!, gain 1 Envy DMG Up next turn
- Before : The "Gain 1 Envy DMG Up" effect activated even when not meeting the conditions
- After : Now, the "Gain 1 Envy DMG Up" effect will activate only when its conditions are met, as described

► Fixed an issue where the Rupture Potency & Count-inflicting effects of the E.G.O Gift 'Unmailed Letter' applied to allied units as well

► Re-phrased unclear parts of the E.G.O Gift 'Unmailed Letter' description
- Before : When winning a Clash against an enemy with Offense Level Up buff, gain 3 Offense Level Up for the next turn, and inflict 3 Offense Level Down on the enemy that lost the Clash (absolute value 9)
- After : When winning a Clash against an enemy with Offense Level Up buff, gain 3 Offense Level Up for the next turn, and inflict 3 Offense Level Down on the enemy that lost the Clash (3 times per Identity per turn)
※ The actual effects of the E.G.O Gift were triggering up to 3 times per turn for both #1 and #2 Deployed Identities. However, as the previous description could be interpreted to imply that only a maximum of 9 Offense Level Down could be inflicted per turn with this effect, the text will be adjusted.

► Adjusted the E.G.O Gift 'Cetacean Heart' and 'The End of All Evil' effect so that "On Crit Heads Hit with a Base Skill: Inflict +1 more of the negative effect" activates only for the first instance of inflicting a negative effect.

► Added a description regarding 'Unique Bleed' for E.G.O Gifts 'Cetacean Heart' and 'The End of All Evil'
- Before : ~against enemies with Bleed
- After : ~against enemies with Bleed or 'Unique Bleed'
※ This is a description-only change; these E.G.O Gifts' effects were activating against enemies with 'Unique Bleed' as well.

► Fixed an issue where certain effects of 'Cetacean Heart' E.G.O Gift did not trigger for E.G.O Skills
※ Relevant Effect : On Hit against enemies with Bleed with an Attack Skill, gain 1 Poise (3 times per turn for each character)
- Before : Did not gain Poise when hitting Bleed-inflicted enemies with E.G.O Skills
- After : Hitting Bleed-inflicted enemies with E.G.O Skills will now yield Poise, as described

► Re-phrased unclear parts of the E.G.O Gift 'The End of All Evil' description
- Before : On Hit with an Attack Skill against enemies with Bleed: 50% chance to gain 3 Poise or +2 Poise Count (3 times per turn for each character)
- After : On Hit with an Attack Skill against enemies with Bleed: Gain 3 Poise or +2 Poise Count (3 times per turn for each character)
※ This effect actually triggers with 100% certainty, with a 50-50 chance to give either Poise or Poise Count. However, as the previous description implied that there was only 50% chance for this effect itself to trigger, the text will be re-phrased to reflect the intention.

► Adjusted the E.G.O Gift 'Ragged Umbrella' E.G.O Gift to trigger only for Attack Skills

► (Mobile Only) Fixed an issue where Uptie 2 -> Uptie 3 cutscene plays incorrectly

► Fixed an issue where certain 'Lobotomy E.G.O::Faint Aroma & Solitude Ryōshū' combat voicelines did not play

► Addressed the issue where the game would become unresponsive when projecting 'The Middle Apprentice Ishmael' Façade onto Ishmael's Identities, and vice versa

► (Mobile Only) Fixed an issue where the game would become unresponsive when an enemy unit uses 'Imperfect Imitation' or 'Looting' Skills

► (STEAM Only) Fixed an issue where, in the Mirror Dungeon, loading into the Floor Theme Pack selection menu that appears after E.G.O Gift Search menu would load a black screen instead

► Fixed incorrect descriptions for an LCB Regular Check-up Boss enemy unit
※ We have identified various cases in which the said boss's Skills and Passive effects do not match their descriptions. In order to maintain our Managers' gameplay experience, we will be adjusting their descriptions to match the effects. Please refer below for more information.
※ Please note that the following description error fixes apply only to the Boss unit appearing in the LCB Regular Check-up Theme Pack (non-BokGak) and the Normal difficulty of Chapter 7.5.

(1) 'Dismantle' Skill
- Before : [On Crit] Trigger Tremor Burst; then, reduce target's Tremor Count by 1
- After : [On Crit] Trigger Tremor Burst. When Tremor Burst is triggered on the target, reduce target's Tremor Count by 1

(2) 'Conduct Analysis' Skill
- Before : [On Use] At 10+ Poise Potency, consume Poise Potency to gain +2 Final Power for every 3 Poise Potency consumed (max 4)
- After : [On Use] At 10+ Poise Potency, consume Poise Potency to gain +2 Final Power for every 3 Poise Potency consumed (max 4). Consume 3 additional Poise for every Final Power gained due to this effect
- Before : [On Hit] If target has 5+ Tremor Count, trigger Tremor Burst twice; then, reduce target's Tremor Count by 1
- After : [On Hit] If target has 5+ Tremor Count, trigger Tremor Burst twice. When Tremor Burst is triggered on the target, reduce target's Tremor Count by 1
- Before : [On Crit] Trigger Tremor Burst twice; then, reduce target's Tremor Count by 2
- After : [On Crit] Trigger Tremor Burst twice. When Tremor Burst is triggered on the target, reduce target's Tremor Count by 1 (nullify 1 instance of Tremor Count reduction if this unit won the Clash)

(3) 'Trigger Extinction Sequence' Skill
- Before : [On Crit] Trigger Tremor Burst thrice; then, reduce target's Tremor Count by 3
- After : [On Crit] Trigger Tremor Burst thrice. When Tremor Burst is triggered on the target, reduce target's Tremor Count by 3 (max 9 Tremor Count reduction)

(4) 'Inadequate Defense Mechanism' Passive
※ As this Passive's effect itself is bugged, it will be adjusted entirely to the "After" version of the effect.
※ Relevant Effect : Shield takes +60% damage from Rupture effects, and does not lose Rupture Count when under 3 Rupture Count
- Before : This unit's Shield was taking +2% damage from Rupture effects, instead of +60% as per its description
- After : The effect and description of this effect will be changed to 'Shield takes +150% damage from Rupture effects'

► Fixed a rare issue where, when using the 'Claim All' button to claim all rewards for The 8th Walpurgis Night Event at once, a network error could occur and prevent the user from claiming their rewards

► Fixed an issue where combat motion speed would vary inconsistently when applying Façade Projection on "The House of Spiders: The Index Nursefather Yi Sang"

► Fixed an issue where camera displays and cinematics display abnormally when using a Skill that "Targets Indiscriminately" with Identities under Façade Projection

► Fixed an issue where Skill 2 and Skill 3 are reversed in appearance when using Seven Assoc. South Section 6 Yi Sang's Façade Projection

► Fixed an issue where sprite resources would intermittently become transparent during Clashes in battle

► Fixed an issue where unit sprites would occasionally display their idle-motion versions when hit mid-battle

► Fixed an issue where the Façade Projection icon button would not function when viewing an Identity story after Uptying an Identity from Tier 2 to Tier 3

► Fixed an issue where a passive in the boss stage of the Mirror Dungeon Theme Pack "The Unsevering" would be shown in duplicates

► Fixed an issue where a "Under Construction" button would appear on the Mirror Dungeon tutorial page

► Increased the font size of "Skills Owned" texts in the Skill replacement UI of the Mirror Dungeon shop

► (Mobile Only) Fixed an issue where the image of Heishou Identities that launch follow-up attacks following The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu's Skill would appear darkened during combat

► Fixed an issue where some Sinner numbers appear incorrectly in the Façade Projection UI

► Fixed an issue where the scroll-masking would not apply properly on the Announcer UI on some low-spec devices

► (Mobile Only) Fixed an issue where, when setting a Support Identity of a Sinner on the Company screen, another Sinner's Façade is projected under certain conditions

► Added a button to reset the selected currency on the Weave Projection screen of the Façade Projection UI

► Addressed an issue in the 3rd Anniversary Ticket Deco where some resources were placed awkwardly

Known Issues
------------

► An issue with the description of "Conduct Analysis" Skill from a Boss unit in LCB Regular Check-up BokGak will be fixed
- Before : [On Use] At 10+ Poise Potency, consume Poise Potency to gain +2 Final Power for every 3 Poise Potency consumed (max 4)
- After : [On Use] At 10+ Poise Potency, consume Poise Potency to gain +2 Final Power for every 3 Poise Potency consumed (max 4). Consume 3 additional Poise for every Final Power gained due to this effect
※ As this effect has already been functioning per the "after" text description, only the text will be changed to reflect its current behavior.

► An issue where the game would not respond when Heishou Pack - You Branch Adept Heathcliff equipped with Full-Stop Office Fixer Heathcliff's Façade uses a Heishou follow-up attack

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Mar. 26th, 2026 (KST)
- When : After Mar. 19th, 2026 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Mar. 26th (Thu) 2026, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.
- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change depending on the status of maintenance. If such a change occurs, we will let you know in a follow-up notice.
- A resource download may be prompted after the build update. If you're using a mobile device, it is recommended to proceed with a Wi-Fi connection.
- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account. Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: New Content - Ch.7.5 LCB Regular Check-up BokGak
content:
------------------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

With the March 19th, 2026 (KST) Update, new content [Ch.7.5 LCB Regular Check-up BokGak] will be added to the game.

► Event Duration
2026/3/19 12:00 (KST) ~ Before 4/16 (KST) Scheduled Update
► Event Rewards Exchange
2026/3/19 12:00 (KST) ~ Before 4/23 (KST) Scheduled Update
► Unlock Requirements
- LCB Regular Check-up Event Banner: Clear Main Story 0-4 (Tutorial)
- LCB Regular Check-up (Normal Difficulty): Clear Main Story 7-36
- LCB Regular Check-up (Hard Difficulty): Clear Main Story 8-33

Description
-----------

- When the event starts, the [Ch. 7.5 - LCB Regular Check-up BokGak] Event Page will open.
- During the event period, you can earn [Amassed Data] by clearing the LCB Regular Check-up Event Stages & the Mirror Dungeons.
- Voices will be added to the LCB Regular Check-up story, and you can access the LCB Regular Check-up Hard Difficulty Stages during the event period.
- You can redeem various rewards from the [Reward Exchange] by spending the event currency that you have collected.

Event Gameplay
--------------

► LCB Regular Check-up Story
Voices will be added to the story of LCB Regular Check-up.

► LCB Regular Check-up Combat Stages
You can obtain [Amassed Data] every time you complete a combat Encounter of LCB Regular Check-up.
Each Encounter has a first-time reward, and with it, you can obtain even more [Amassed Data].
However, if you had previously cleared the LCB Regular Check-up Stages, you cannot obtain additional first-time rewards.

The final Stage of LCB Regular Check-up is a repeatable Combat Encounter that costs Enkephalin Modules.
That final Stage will have a higher Enkephalin-to-[Amassed Data] ratio, so it will be much more effective as a means of collecting [Amassed Data].

► LCB Regular Check-up Combat Stages (Hard Difficulty)
LCB Regular Check-up Hard Difficulty will become available during the Event period.
Clearing Main Story Stage 8-33 will unlock the Hard Difficulty.
Earn even more [Amassed Data] by playing through the Hard Difficulty. You can earn first-time Clear rewards (including the Event currency), EX-Clear rewards, and Chapter Progression rewards by clearing the Hard Difficulty Stages as well.

► Mirror Dungeon
During the Event Period, [LCB Regular Check-up BokGak Theme Pack] will have a fixed appearance on Floor 4~5 of the Mirror Dungeon Hard Difficulty. The said Theme Pack features exclusive Choice Events and E.G.O Gifts.
※ The preexisting [LCB Regular Check-up Theme Pack] will not be changed.
※ The same Theme Pack will not appear twice in the same run once completed.
※ LCB Regular Check-up BokGak Theme Pack will no longer have a fixed appearance once the Event ends, and may appear on different floors.

Clearing a Mirror Dungeon run will yield [Amassed Data]. Selecting the [LCB Regular Check-up] or [LCB Regular Check-up BokGak] Theme Packs will yield even more [Amassed Data]. The Theme Pack in the Hard Difficulty yields more Event currency than the Normal Difficulty.
※ Please note that Weekly Bonuses do not affect the amount of Event currency gained.
※ Please note that, if you have started a Mirror Dungeon run before the Event started, you will not gain Event currency from that run.

► Main Story
Managers who have not met the Event unlock conditions can obtain [Amassed Data] as a first-time reward from Main Story Combat Encounters. Upon your first time clearing an Encounter, you can obtain [Amassed Data] proportional to the amount of Enkephalin Spent, regardless of whether you’ve met the EX Clear Conditions or not.
※ You cannot obtain the event currency from stages that have already been completed.
※ You cannot obtain [Amassed Data] from Luxcavations or the Refraction Railway.

Event Currency
--------------

In rare cases, clearing the LCB Regular Check-up Stages, the Mirror Dungeon, and the Main Story Stages will also yield [Classified Data].

[Classified Data] has the highest chance of dropping from the final Stage of the LCB Regular Check-up BokGak Event. However, the drop chance is the same across all other Encounters.

[Classified Data] is automatically converted to 20 [Amassed Data] in the Results or the Rewards screen upon acquisition.

Event Bonus Units
-----------------

Obtain more [Amassed Data] by completing Event Encounters or the Mirror Dungeon while equipped with Event Bonus units.

<Event Bonus Units>
► 40% Bonus
- E.G.O [HE] : Ardor Blossom Star Faust, Thoracalgia Ryōshū
- 3★ : LCE E.G.O::AEDD Gregor, LCE E.G.O::Ardor Blossom Star Faust
- 2★ : LCE E.G.O::Lantern Yi Sang

※ The Event Currency Bonus from each Event Identity and E.G.O is additive (rounded up).
※ Event Currency Bonus maxes out at 120% Bonus.
※ Event Bonus Units don’t actually have to participate in a battle; you can earn the bonus currency simply by having them in your Team loadout.
※ Event Currency Bonus applies to first-time clear rewards and Mirror Dungeon clear rewards as well.

Event Rewards
-------------

At the [Rewards Exchange], you can spend [Amassed Data] you have collected to purchase various rewards.

※ You can no longer obtain [Amassed Data] after you obtain enough [Amassed Data] to purchase every item in the [Reward Exchange].
※ [Amassed Data] will no longer be obtainable once the Event closes after the 2026/04/16 (KST) Scheduled Update.
※ [Reward Exchange] will be open for 5 weeks, from 2026/3/19 12:00 (KST) ~ 2026/4/23 (KST) Scheduled Update.
※ Even after the event fully ends, you will be able to experience the LCB Regular Check-up Combat Encounters or view its story anytime at Drive and Theater - [Detour Tales].

title: New Content - Ch.7.5: LCB Regular Check-up
content:
------------------------------------------

2025/1/23 12:00 (KST) ~ Before 2/20 (KST) Scheduled Update

The final combat Stage of ‘LCB Regular Check-up’ costs Enkephalin Modules. That final Stage will have a higher Enkephalin-to-[Amassed Data] ratio, so it will be much more effective as a means of collecting [Amassed Data].

If you have not fulfilled the event unlock requirements, you can obtain [Amassed Data] as a first-time reward from Main Story Combat Encounters. Upon first-time-completion of an Encounter, you can obtain [Amassed Data] proportional to the amount of Enkephalin Spent regardless of whether you’ve met the EX Clear Conditions or not.

Event Currency
--------------

If you have cleared the ‘LCB Regular Check-up’ Stages, Mirror Dungeons, and the Main Story, you have a small chance to obtain [Classified Data]

[Classified Data] has the highest chance of dropping from the final Encounter of the event. However, the chance for it to drop is the same across all other Encounters.

[Classified Data] is automatically converted to 20 [Amassed Data] in the Results or the Rewards screen upon acquisition.

Event Bonus Identities & E.G.O
------------------------------

※ Event Bonus Identities don’t actually have to participate in a battle; you can earn the bonus currency simply by having them in your Team loadout.
※ Event Currency Bonus applies to first-time clear rewards and Mirror Dungeon clear rewards as well.

Event Rewards
-------------

At the [Rewards Exchange], you can spend [Amassed Data] you’ve collected to purchase various rewards.

title: Notice: Refraction Railway Line 5 Buff Error Measures
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

We have completed the gameplay log investigation for the clear records rollback regarding the Refraction Railway Line 5 Buff error we had shared in our previous notice.

Clear records rollback and Banner updates will be carried out during the Apr. 2nd (Thu) Scheduled Maintenance. Please continue reading for more information.

[ Issue ]
- An issue where the RR5 buff effect "The Lone Gunman" applies to all Identities
※ Relevant Effect : Raise Min & Max Speed values for the #1 Deployed Identity by 1. The said unit loses a Skill 1, but gains a Skill 3

[ Refraction Railway Line 5 Error Measures ]
: Affected Managers & Affected Period
Managers who have cleared up to Section 3 after selecting "The Lone Gunman" buff effect in Refraction Railway between Mar. 12th (Thu) 12:00 (KST) ~ Mar. 19th (Thu) 10:00 (KST)

: Measure Details
(1) Rollback of records of runs cleared within the above period and a resetting of clear counts
(2) Restoration of Refraction Railway Line 5 progress to the point immediately after selecting the "The Lone Gunman" buff
(3) Update of the Refraction Railway Line 5 banner based on the record with the fewest turns taken to clear among the remaining records after rollback and reset

※ Please note that rewards already claimed from the Lost & Found after clearing Refraction Railway Line 5 within the affected period will not be rolled back.
※ For measure step (2), data will be restored to the run where Section 2 was cleared in the fewest turns.
※ Please note that step (2) will not be applied if you are currently progressing through Refraction Railway Line 5. If you wish for step (2) to be applied, you must fully clear Refraction Railway Line 5 or forfeit your run to delete the current progress data before the Scheduled Maintenance on Apr. 2nd (Thu).
※ If no remaining records exist for the application of measure step (3), your Refraction Railway Line 5 banner will be removed from your account.

[ Follow-up Measure Deployment Schedule ]
Apr. 2nd (Thu), 2026 Scheduled Maintenance

Once again, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Notice: Refraction Railway Line 5 Buff Error & Temp. Closure
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

We have identified an issue where a certain buff effect in Refraction Railway Line 5 began to work differently from its description after Mar. 12th (Thu) 12:00 (KST) Scheduled Update.

To address this issue, we will be temporarily closing Refraction Railway Line 5(RR5 henceforth), reverting certain clear records, and taking appropriate future measures.
Please continue reading for more information.

We sincerely apologize for the Inconvenience.

[ Issue ]
- An issue where the RR5 buff effect "The Lone Gunman" applies to all Identities
※ Relevant Effect : Raise Min & Max Speed values for the #1 Deployed Identity by 1. The said unit loses a Skill 1, but gains a Skill 3

[ Cause ]
- This issue is a side effect of addressing an issue where, when certain buffs that increase or reduce per-rank Skill reserve are applied, certain Identities' unique Skills could be shown to have more than 0 copies

※ We have identified an issue regarding buff effects that change the per-rank Skill reserve.
This issue affects 4 following effects: "Training Team Captain", "Ready to Fire", "Welfare Team Captain" and "The Lone Gunman".

These buffs all have an effect that increases or decreases the number of copies for each Skill rank. Initially, the Skill reserve changing effects were applied based on the "order" of Skills owned by each Identity, not by the "rank" of each Skill.

This caused certain Skills that become available only upon meeting certain conditions, which are supposed to show "0 copies" in the UI, to show more than 0 copies while this effect is active.

With the Mar. 12th, 2026 Scheduled Update, we have deployed the fix so that the Skill reserve changing buff effect would apply based on the "rank" of each Skill, instead of the "order" of Skills owned by each Identity.

However, in the process of addressing this issue, the following issues were also identified.

1. Omission from "Bug Fixes & Improvements" List
: We failed to notify our Managers through the update notice about how this issue is to be fixed.
: The cause of this omission was that, due to a misstep, the list containing this particular update specification was not included in the announcement specification. As a result, the QA process was not properly undertaken for this change.

We sincerely apologize for the confusion this has caused to our Managers.

2. Error in the Application Scope of the "The Lone Gunman" Buff
: An error occurred in the effect application scope of "The Lone Gunman" buff while fixing the issue.

< Before the Mar. 12th, 2026 Update >
- Effect applied only to the #1 Deployed Identity

< After the Mar. 12th, 2026 update >
- Effect applied to all allies

: Although cross-verification was carried out between our developers during the process of fixing the "The Lone Gunman" buff effect, we failed to identify that the Deployment order-checking logic, which was previously applied, was omitted. We mistakenly determined that the fix was functioning correctly, which led to this issue.

: This issue will be addressed so that the buff functions as it did prior to the Mar. 12th Update.

[Future Measures]

To prevent similar issues, we will strengthen the following 3 procedures:

1. When modifying preexisting specifications already released in the live version of the game, we will ensure that changes are shared with the person-in-charge of each team and keep the changes recorded in the update log.

2. We will perform cross-checks to ensure update logs are properly recorded.

3. When modifying existing code, we will use tools that allow comparison with the unchanged version to further verify any changes applied.

[Refraction Railway Line 5 Temp. Closure]
- When : After 2026.03.16 21:40(KST)
- Re-opening : After 2026.03.19 Scheduled Update

[ Refraction Railway Line 5 Clear Records to be Rolled Back ]

- When : With 2026.03.19 Scheduled Update
- Rollback Users : Users who have cleared Refraction Railway Line 5 after selecting "The Lone Gunman" buff after the 2026.03.12 Scheduled Update.

※ We are currently investigating the clear records to verify the scope of affected users.
※ Even if it takes time, we promise an accurate investigation, and will share a detailed rollback plan with a future notice.

Once again, we apologize for the inconvenience.
We will take greater care so that no same issue occurs again.

[Refraction Railway Line 5 Error Compensation]
Content: Lunacy x500
Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Mar. 26th, 2026 (KST)
When : After Mar. 16th, 2026 (Thu) 22:00 (KST)
Can be claimed once per account

Error Compensation can be claimed until Mar. 26th (Thu) 2026, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

title: Notice: An issue where a different Sinner's Event ID may appear in Target Extraction - Ishmael
content:
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Hello, this is Project Moon.

Currently, there is an issue where 'R.B. Sous-chef Gregor' Identity can be obtained from Target Extraction: Ishmael.

Because the Identity is a 'Season 1 Event Identity', he was supposed to appear only in Gregor's Target Extractions. However, there was a mistake in the process of creating and proofreading Ishmael's Target Extraction Table, causing him to appear in Ishmael's Target Extraction.

Because the internal Extraction rate data and the chart visible in the "Probabilities → Detailed Rates" menu are synced, you can see that the Identity is a part of the Extractable Identities list.

We sincerely apologize to all managers who have Extracted from Ishmael's Target Extraction, and we apologize for causing this inconvenience in the Extractions.

We attempted to fix this issue as soon as possible via a hotfix, but we are currently unable to deploy a hotfix due to the work of updating the game engine version as per the Google Play Store's policies. Please refer to the explanation below for more information.

Notice : An issue where the Target Extraction issue cannot be hotfixed
----------------------------------------------------------------------

Proceeding with the hotfix, which involves rolling back the current version update progress, may cause the following issues:

- Client Build & Review Submission issues caused by engine version rollback
- An issue where the game resources do not download properly on the current live version of the game
- An issue where an unintended full resource redownload (approx. 8GB) may occur

Therefore, while we can attempt to finish the version update via this week's Build and deploy the corrected version after the Sep. 5th (KST) Scheduled Update, the Target Extraction in question ends on Sep. 5th, 10:00 (KST), which means that the issue will not be fixed in time.

Please note that this issue where 'R.B. Sous-chef Gregor's Identity appears in Target Extraction: Ishmael will not be corrected for the above reasons. Managers planning to Extract from the said Extraction, please note the above information.

We once again deeply apologize to all users who have extracted from Target Extraction: Ishmael.

Plans to improve Target Extraction list verification process
------------------------------------------------------------

We intend to improve the Target Extraction list verification process to prevent the same issue from occurring again in the Extractions. Our previous monitoring system could automatically catch cases in which the internal data causes a game progression error, but we did not have a separate system prepared in case there were no progression errors.

We will develop a monitoring system that can not only catch progression errors but also issues in the contents of the internal data so that no similar issue occurs again.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Notice on Upcoming Improvements to the "Façade Projection" Feature
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

The "Façade Projection" feature was added to the game with the Mar. 12th Version Update.
We offer our sincerest gratitude to Managers who have used this feature and shared their inquiries and suggestions with us.

We plan to deploy additional improvements to the "Façade Projection" feature in the future.
Please refer to the details below for the improvement schedule and planned changes.

[ Improvements Scheduled for the Mar. 26th Scheduled Update ]
► Voice playback frequency
- We have identified an issue where identical voicelines may play repeatedly when using a Skill. To address this issue, we will be implementing a minimum playback interval to the Façade system.

► Skill motion display between the base Identity and the projected Identity
- Some Skill motion displays appear unnatural due to differences in each Identity's number of Skills. To address this issue, we will improve the Façade system so that motions from other Skills of the projected Identity may also be displayed.

[ Improvements Planned for April ]
► We will identify and address further cases where Skill motion speeds vary inconsistently between the base Identity and the projected Identity when using the "Façade Projection" feature.

► Sorting and filtering functions will be added to the "Façade Projection" UI.

[ Other Improvements Under Development ]
► We will improve camera-related displays and cinematics to play more naturally when using the "Façade Projection" feature.

► A feature to select pre- or post-transformation Façade for Identities with transforming appearance is under development.

Other issues that have occurred or may occur due to Façade Projection will continue to be addressed and detailed through future Scheduled Update notices.

Thank you.

title: Notice: Hotfix and STEAM-Version Update Schedule for Known Issues (Mar. 12)
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

We have identified several known issues following the Version 1.100.1 update on Mar. 12, and would like to inform you about a hotfix that will temporarily address some of these issues, as well as the Version 1.100.2 update scheduled for STEAM.

The hotfix will be applied simultaneously to both STEAM and mobile platforms, however, the version update will be applied to the STEAM version first.

For mobile platforms (AOS, iOS), updates must first go through each market's review process, making it difficult to apply the fixes immediately.

Managers currently playing on mobile platforms are advised to play on the STEAM version until the AOS and iOS updates are implemented.

Please refer to the details below for the schedule.

[ Issue Temporarily Adjusted via Hotfix ]
► Temporary Deactivation of Façade for The House of Spiders: The Middle Apprentice Ishmael

※ This measure is intended to only temporarily disable the Façade Projection for and of the Identity concerned. Managers who have already crafted this Façade will be able to use it normally after the next Scheduled Update.

[ Hotfix Schedule ]
- Mar. 12 (Thu) 19:00 (KST)
- A delay of approximately 10 minutes may occur.

※ The hotfix will be applied when reconnecting to the game without requiring a version update.
※ Please note that additional download data may occur when the hotfix is applied.

[ (STEAM) Issues Addressed via Version Update ]
► Fixed an issue where game progression is blocked when an enemy unit uses the "Imperfect Imitation" Skill
► Fixed an issue where sprite resources would intermittently become transparent during Clashes in battle
► Fixed an issue where, when setting a Support Identity of a Sinner on the Company screen, another Sinner's Façade is projected under certain conditions

[Version Update Schedule]
- After Mar. 12 (Thu) 19:00 (KST)
- A delay of approximately 10 minutes may occur.

※ Successful application of the update will show the version number 1.100.2 on the bottom-right of the title screen.

[ Known Issues Fixes to be Deployed in the Next Scheduled Update ]
► Fixed an issue where battle progression is blocked when The House of Spiders: The Middle Apprentice Ishmael's Façade is projected onto another Ishmael Identity, and vice versa

► (Mobile) Fixed an issue where game progression is blocked when an enemy unit uses the "Imperfect Imitation" Skill

► (Mobile) Fixed an issue where the image of Heishou Identities that launch follow-up attacks following The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu's Skill appears darkened during combat

► (Mobile) Fixed an issue where the Uptie animation is displayed abnormally when Uptying an Identity to Tier III

► Fixed an issue where some combat voicelines of "Lobotomy E.G.O::Faint Aroma & Solitude Ryōshū" would not play

► Fixed an issue where some Sinner numbers appear incorrectly in the Façade Projection UI

► Fixed an issue where combat motion speed would vary inconsistently when applying Façade Projection on "The House of Spiders: The Index Nursefather Yi Sang"

[ Details on Known Issues ]

► An issue where battle progression is blocked when The House of Spiders: The Middle Apprentice Ishmael's Façade is projected onto another Ishmael Identity and vice versa

[ Cause of the Issue ]
- This issue occurred because The House of Spiders: The Middle Apprentice Ishmael's skill motion data was missing during the Façade data creation process.

[ Issue Fix ]
- We have added The House of Spiders: The Middle Apprentice Ishmael's skill motion data to the Façade data.

[ Future Measures ]
- To prevent similar issues from occurring, we will implement a process that automatically constructs skill data during Identity creation and add a verification process to check whether the required data for Façade Projection has been omitted.

► An issue where game progression is blocked when an enemy unit uses the "Imperfect Imitation" Skill

[ Cause of the Issue ]
- This issue occurred because the skill motion data logic for each Coin was insufficiently processed during the creation of skill effects related to Façade.
The "Imperfect Imitation" Skill copies the opponent's number of Coins. Freezing occurred when the number of Coins exceeded the predefined limit for motion data entries.

[ Issue Fix ]
- The skill motion data logic for each Coin has been improved with stronger exception handling code based on the number of motions involved.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

[ Compensation for Known Issues After the Mar. 12 Update ]
- Content : Lunacy x500
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Mar. 19th, 2026 (KST)
- When : After Mar. 12th, 2026 (Thu) 22:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Mar. 19th (Thu) 2026, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)
