title: 2026, Mar. 12th Scheduled Update Notice
content:
---------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on Mar. 12th, 2026 (KST).

Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.

Please refer below for details about the update.

"Façade Projection" Update
--------------------------

A new "Façade Projection" feature will be added, allowing you to project the appearance of a chosen Identity onto another Identity of each Sinner.

[Obtaining Façade Projection]

You can weave (craft) the Façade of an Identity whose appearance you wish to project by Uptieing the Identity to Tier 4. Weaving a Façade requires 125 Threadskien. Using the Egoshards of the Sinner whose Façade you wish to craft will allow weaving at a lower cost.

[Ratio Example: Weaving LCB Sinner Yi Sang's Façade]

Yi Sang Egoshards : Threadskien
1 : 1

Other Sinners' Egoshards : Threadskien
2 : 1

Threads : Threadskien
2 : 1

"Façade Projection" Update
--------------------------

[Applying Façade Projection]

You may apply crafted Façade via the Façade Projection menu within the Team loadout screen.

When a Façade is projected, you can confirm the projected Façade directly from the Team loadout screen.

※ Threadskeins are not accumulated in the Inventory as a separate currency.
※ After completing Façade Projection, the projection animation in the Team loadout screen will be displayed only once.
※ Projecting a Façade does not change animation speed. It will follow the animation speed of the Identity currently selected in the loadout.
※ For certain Identities, animations may not be fully compatible when Façade Projection is applied. Additionally, Façade Projection may not be supported for some Identities. Please keep this in mind when weaving your Façade.

[List of Identities with Incomplete Animation Compatibility]

Example : Lobotomy E.G.O::In the Name of Love and Hate Don Quixote, Lobotomy E.G.O::The Sword Sharpened with Tears Rodion, The Index Proxy - Effloresced E.G.O::Procuration Don Quixote, Wild Hunt Heathcliff, Dawn Office Fixer Sinclair
Details : Façade Projection is limited to pre-transformation appearance (applies to both projecting this Identity's Façade and projecting onto this Identity). When projected, no appearance change occurs upon transformation (transformation can be tracked via the buff icon displayed in the Identity's buff list)

Example : The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu
Details : When using "I Carve the Path of a Lord" (Skill 3-2), the animation will show a solo attack instead of the follow up attack animation with other Heishou Identities

Example : The Thumb East Capo IIII Meursault – Savage Tigerslay's Perfected Flurry of Blades 超絶疾風破斬嵐斬 (Skill 3-2) and similar empowerable Skills
Details : The "empowered" animation triggered under specific conditions will not be displayed

New Content
-----------

1. New Content - Mirror of Names and Spiders EXTREME Mode · Mirror Projection / Achievements

※ For more information, please refer to the relevant notice on Steam.

※ For the Mirror of Names and Spiders EXTREME Mode and Achievements implementation, Mirror Dungeon entry will be blocked for the following period: 2026. 03. 12 06:00 ~ 10:00 (KST). Please note this information for your gameplay plans.

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Adjusted the applicable scope of 'Support Passive' for Lobotomy E.G.O::Hornet [Alteration] Meursault due to potential ambiguity in the description text

- Before : This Skill was supposed to activate only when, for this turn, Pierce Base Attack Skills are equipped on "all" allied Skill Slots

- After : This Skill will now activate when, for this turn, all equipped Base Attack Skills are Pierce Skills (will trigger even when E.G.O or Defense Skills are equipped as well, as long as all equipped Base Attack Skills are Pierce Skills)

※ The Support Passive's description will not be changed; only its behavior will be adjusted.
※ For further details, please refer to the previous notice.

► Fixed an issue where, when Lobotomy E.G.O::Hornet [Alteration] Meursault uses a Skill, certain voicelines that are supposed to trigger would not play

► Fixed an issue where the level of killed Sinners would not refresh when switching to Mirror Dungeon Hard Mode after progressing Mirror Dungeon Normal Mode

► Fixed an issue where the names of E.G.O Gifts listed under E.G.O Gift acquisition conditions were displayed incorrectly

► Fixed an issue where the number of available Gift placement slots displayed in the Fuse E.G.O Gift pop-up would change inconsistently

► Fixed an issue where the Gift Tier indicator would appear as "-" when a Keywordless E.G.O Gift is shown as the predicted result of an E.G.O Gift Fusion

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Fixed an issue where abnormal resources would appear on the Boss under certain conditions in Stage 6.5-15

► Fixed an issue in Stage 7-36 battle cinematic where, when a certain Identity is included in the Team, Skill Slot effects related to that Identity would remain on the screen

► Improved optimization codes to reduce frame drops that would occur when using Takeoff Module - ID Uptie and Identity Takeoff Ticket (including ver.2 and ver.3).

► Improved the Masking applied to certain areas of Skill icons equipped in enemy Skill Slots on the Focused Encounter screen

► Fixed an issue in the team loadout screen of The 8th Walpurgis Night - The Dusk of Amber, where features and buttons unlocked at Uptie Tier 3 or higher would appear active when viewing the details of an Identity whose Uptie Tier is 2 or lower

► Fixed an issue where newly added Identities were displayed in an unintended order when using Takeoff Module - ID Uptie and Identity Takeoff Ticket (including ver.2 and ver.3).

► Fixed an issue during combat in The 8th Walpurgis Night - The Dusk of Amber, where certain Skill visuals would display abnormally under certain conditions

※ The Skills are functioning as intended; only the visuals have been corrected.

► (EN, JP) Addressed typo issues in the 2026.03.06 update

► Fixed an issue where the Starlight and Cost UI would appear on the team loadout screen before entering Encounters when progressing Mirror Dungeon Floor 6 or higher

► Fixed an issue where the 'Retry Stage' button would appear during Tutorial Battle

► Fixed an issue where the tutorial would not skip properly after using the Skip button during Tutorial Battle

► Fixed an issue where the SKIP pop-up text had low visibility during Tutorial Battle when the UI mode was set to Dark Mode

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

Content : Lunacy x300

Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Mar. 19th, 2026 (KST)

When : After Mar. 12th, 2026 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)

- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Mar. 19th (Thu) 2026, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.
- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change depending on the status of maintenance. If such a change occurs, we will let you know in a follow-up notice.
- A resource download may be prompted after the build update. If you're using a mobile device, it is recommended to proceed with a Wi-Fi connection.
- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account. Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: Notice: Changes to Restoration Measures Regarding an Upgrade Item Error
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

Following up on the notice posted on Mar. 4th titled [Notice: Details & Measures Regarding an Upgrade Item Error], we would like to inform you that the resources to be restored during the restoration process have been changed.

In the previous notice, we informed you that restoring resources would also result in a rollback of the Identity for which those resources were used to "Uptie Tier 1 and Level 1."
At present, however, LCB Sinner Identities are automatically Uptied to Uptie Tier III depending on the story progression.

As such, we have determined that there would be potential issues if the restoration of used resources were to proceed based on the previous criteria.
Accordingly, the restoration will instead revert the Identities that used these items to their state before "Takeoff Module – ID Uptie" or "Identity Takeoff Ticket" was used.

Please refer to the details below regarding the updated subsequent measures.

[ Subsequent Measures ]
► If you have encountered this upgrade item issue between Feb. 19th and Mar. 5th, 10:00 (KST; issue fix date), please send the details of your issue to our customer service email with your UID, and we will assist with restoring your affected items and Identities.

* Restoration Period : All Managers who have submitted a customer service email before Mar. 31st (Tue), 18:00 (KST)
* Restoration Recipients : All Managers who have used Takeoff Module - ID Uptie or Identity Takeoff Ticket between Feb. 19th 12:00 (KST) ~ Mar. 5th 10:00 (KST), but have had the upgrade applied to a different Identity than the one selected

* Restorable Resources (Before changes on subsequent measures)
1. Takeoff Module - ID Uptie or Identity Takeoff Ticket
2. Identity (The Identity will be restored to Uptie Tier 1 and Level 1)~~
3. Any resources used on the Identity from #2 for Uptying and Leveling prior to using Takeoff Module - ID Uptie or Identity Takeoff Tickets

* Restorable Resources (After changes on subsequent measures)
1. Takeoff Module - ID Uptie or Identity Takeoff Ticket
2. Identity that used the items from #1

※ The restored items will be delivered via in-game mail.
※ The Identity on which the items were mistakenly used will be restored to its original Uptie Tier, Level, and EXP state prior to usage.
※ If the Identity on which the items were mistakenly used has been further upgraded, any resources spent on its growth will also be restored via in-game mail.

* Customer Service Email : limbussupport@projmoon.com
* Please submit your request with your UID, and be sure to include details regarding which Identity incorrectly received the effects of the affected items.
* Please understand that it may be difficult for us to provide assistance when contacted outside the designated restoration period listed above.

We have successfully analyzed and collected information on Managers who submitted inquiries to our Customer Support. Restoration will begin sequentially starting on Mar. 12th, and response emails will be sent simultaneously for each restoration.

※ Please note that the restoration process may take slightly longer if the item was used on an LCB Sinner Identity.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience this issue has caused during your gameplay.

title: Notice:Hotfix - Missing Lobotomy E.G.O::Hornet 【Alteration】 Meursault Voicelines
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

We have identified an issue where certain voicelines of Lobotomy E.G.O::Hornet 【Alteration】 Meursault, added with Mar. 5th Scheduled Update, are not playing.

Please continue reading for more information.

[ Issue Details ]
- An issue where, when Lobotomy E.G.O::Hornet 【Alteration】 Meursault uses a Skill, certain voicelines that are supposed to trigger do not play

[ Issue Cause ]
- This issue occurred during the Lobotomy E.G.O::Hornet 【Alteration】 Meursault's combat animation development, due to certain animations not being connected to their corresponding voicelines.

[ Issue Fix ETA ]
- Mar. 12th Scheduled Update

※ We had initially intended to deploy this bug fix as a hotfix, but it has additionally been identified that certain conditional voices require making modifications to the game's code. Therefore, we ask for your understanding that this issue will be addressed via the Mar. 12th Scheduled Update.

We sincerely apologize for the prevalence of mistakes in this update.

title: Notice: ID Error Fix, Known Issues in Ver. 1.100.0, Hotfix ETA
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

We have deployed a hotfix to address certain issues identified in ver. 1.100.0, updated Mar. 5th.
Furthermore, we have identified a part of Lobotomy E.G.O::Hornet 【Alteration】 Meursault's Support Passive text that could be interpreted differently from our intent. We will update the passive effect's behavior to match its description, making it easier to activate.

Please continue reading for more information.

[Lobotomy E.G.O::Hornet 【Alteration】 Meursault Support Passive Fix]
※ Relevant Effect : - For this turn, if all Base Attack Skills equipped on allied Skill Slots are Pierce Skills, all allies heal 10 SP at Turn End
- Before : This Skill was supposed to activate only when, for this turn, Pierce Base Skills are equipped on "all" allied Skill Slots
- After : This Skill will now activate when, for this turn, all equipped Base Attack Skills are Pierce Skills (will trigger even when E.G.O or Defense Skills are equipped as well, as long as all equipped Base Attack Skills are Pierce Skills)
※ The Support Passive's description will not be changed; only its behavior will be adjusted.

※ Support Passive adjustment ETA : Mar. 12th, 2026 Scheduled Update

► The Support Passive Description in Question
Ally Pierce Base Attack Skill End: The said ally heals HP equal to 10% of HP damage dealt with the attack (2 times per Encounter)
- For this turn, if all Base Attack Skills equipped on allied Skill Slots are Pierce Skills, all allies heal 10 SP at Turn End

※ Among the above effects, the "heal 10 SP at Turn End" effect was supposed to trigger only when <Pierce Base Attack Skills are equipped on all allied Skill Slots>.

However, the current in-game description may lead to the interpretation that the effect triggers when <all equipped Base Attack Skills are Pierce Skills>, <even if there are Defense or E.G.O Skills in other Skill Slots>.

※ Taking into consideration that this Identity is a Walpurgis Night Identity, and that the description has room for different interpretations, we will be updating the Support Passive's behavior to match its current description, which allows for an easier activation of the effect.

However, as applying changes to the Support Passive requires a Client Build & review from the respective marketplaces, please understand that these changes will be applied via our next Scheduled Update.

We sincerely apologize for the unclear phrasing in the passive description.

[Hotfix List]

► Fixed an issue where the 8th Walpurgis Night Identities and E.G.O would not appear when the main illustration filter is set as "Walpurgis Night" in the Ticket Decoration screen

► Fixed an issue where some Sinners' standing CGs in the Mini Story "The 8th Walpurgis Night" were not updated to reflect the latest story versions

► Fixed an issue where a specific mission in the 8th Walpurgis Night – Hard Difficulty mission list could not be completed
※ Affected mission: Complete Suppression after defeating 3+ enemies with a single Attack Skill

► Fixed an issue where game progression would be blocked in The 8th Walpurgis Night Encounters under certain conditions

[Hotfix Schedule]

- Mar. 5 (Thu) 19:00 (KST)
- Please note that there may be a delay of approximately 10 minutes

※ The hotfix will be applied without a version update upon reconnecting to the game. Please note that additional download may occur when the hotfix is deployed.

[Other Known Issues]

► An issue where, in The 8th Walpurgis Night Encounters, The House of Spiders: The Index Nursefather Yi Sang's Skill 3 may function differently than intended
※ This issue is currently under investigation and may take additional time to resolve.

► An issue where, in The 8th Walpurgis Night Encounters (Easy), the post-Uptie Illustration toggle appears in the detailed view screen when Identity Uptie level is synchronized for the Encounter

[Lobotomy E.G.O::Hornet 【Alteration】 Meursault Support Passive Fix Compensation]
- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Mar. 12th, 2026 (KST)
- When : After Mar. 5th, 2026 (Thu) 21:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account
Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Mar. 12th (Thu) 2026, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

[Known Issues in ver. 1.100.0 Compensation]
- Content : Lunacy x500
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Mar. 12th, 2026 (KST)
- When : After Mar. 5th, 2026 (Thu) 21:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

title: New Content - The 8th Walpurgis Night
content:
--------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

On Mar. 5th, 2026 (KST), new content 「The 8th Walpurgis Night」 will be added to the game.

※ Notice: Extraction Rate Changes during the Event Period
During the Walpurgis Night Event, Extractable Announcers will be added to the game.

Due to this addition, the Extraction rates for certain Extractions will be changed while the Walpurgis Night event is active.

In compliance with the 「Voluntary Restraint Guidelines for Probabilistic Items」 of Korea Association of Game Industry, the exact Extraction rates are disclosed in the in-game menu "Detailed Rates."

Please note this information as you play the game.

Extractions
-----------

1. The 8th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction
「The 8th Walpurgis Night」 Target Extraction will be featured over the Event period. 「The 8th Walpurgis Night」 Target Extraction features increased Extraction rates for the following new Identities and Announcer.

※ Please note that [The 8th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction] and [The 3rd & 4th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction BokGak] are separate Extractions, and feature different improved rates. Please confirm each Banner's featured units and Probabilities menu prior to extracting.

2. The 3rd & 4th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction BokGak
「The 3rd & 4th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction BokGak」 will be featured over the Event period. 「The 3rd & 4th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction BokGak」 features increased Extraction rates for the Identities, E.G.O, and Announcers added during the 3rd and the 4th Walpurgis Night.

► Identities & E.G.O
During the Event period, all current and previous 「Walpurgis Night」 event Identities and E.G.O will be Extractable from the following Extractions.

- The 3rd & 4th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction BokGak

- Assured Extraction: 3★ Identity Extraction (※ Does not include E.G.Os)
- Standard Extraction

3★ : <New> Lobotomy E.G.O::Hornet [Alteration] Meursault, <New> Lobotomy E.G.O::Faint Aroma & Solitude Ryōshū, Jeong's Office Rep. Ishmael, Night Awls Capitano Gregor, Lobotomy E.G.O::In the Name of Love and Hate Don Quixote, Lobotomy E.G.O::The Sword Sharpened with Tears Rodion, Full-Stop Office Rep Hong Lu, Full-Stop Office Fixer Heathcliff, Lobotomy E.G.O::Solemn Lament Yi Sang, Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Eyes & Penitence Ryōshū, Dawn Office Fixer Sinclair, Lobotomy E.G.O::Magic Bullet Outis, Lobotomy E.G.O::Regret Faust
2★ : Lobotomy E.G.O::Lantern Don Quixote, Hook Office Fixer Hong Lu

「The 8th Walpurgis Night」 Identities and E.G.O receive increased Extraction rates for 「The 8th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction」 during the event period.

E.G.O [HE] : Harmony Sinclair
3★ : Lobotomy E.G.O::Hornet [Alteration] Meursault, Lobotomy E.G.O::Faint Aroma & Solitude Ryōshū

The 3rd & 4th Walpurgis Night Identities and E.G.O receive increased Extraction rates for 「The 3rd & 4th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction BokGak」 during the event period.

Dispenser
---------

<Available from the Dispenser>

E.G.O [HE] : Magic Bullet Outis, Solemn Lament Gregor, Wingbeat Ishmael

3★ : Jeong's Office Rep Ishmael, Night Awls Capitano Gregor, Lobotomy E.G.O::In the Name of Love and Hate Don Quixote, Lobotomy E.G.O::The Sword Sharpened with Tears Rodion, Full-Stop Office Rep Hong Lu, Full-Stop Office Fixer Heathcliff, Lobotomy E.G.O::Solemn Lament Yi Sang, Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Eyes & Penitence Ryōshū, Dawn Office Fixer Sinclair, Lobotomy E.G.O::Magic Bullet Outis, Lobotomy E.G.O::Regret Faust
2★ : Lobotomy E.G.O::Lantern Don Quixote, Hook Office Fixer Hong Lu

3★ : Lobotomy E.G.O::Hornet [Alteration] Meursault, Lobotomy E.G.O::Faint Aroma & Solitude Ryōshū

3/5 Linked Content - Mini Episode
---------------------------------

With the start of the Event, a new Mini Episode 「The 8th Walpurgis Night」 will be introduced to the game.

- Unlock Condition : Clear Stage 9-51
※ Upon first entry, Managers who have not completed Stage 9-51 will be asked to confirm if they want to view the story before proceeding to the "Event Encounter - The Dusk of Amber."

3/5 Linked Content - The Dusk of Amber
--------------------------------------

During the Event period, linked content 「The Dusk of Amber」 will be introduced to the game.

- Event Period : 2026/3/5 12:00 ~ 3/19 10:00 (KST)
- Event Reward Exchange Period : 2026/3/5 12:00 ~ 3/26 10:00 (KST)
- Unlock Condition : None

<Description>
- With the start of the Event, 「The Dusk of Amber」 Event page will be added to the game.
- Complete special Missions (challenges) in the Easy and Hard difficulty Encounters to receive Mission Rewards.

<Event Progression>
► During the Event period, 「The 8th Walpurgis Night - The Dusk of Amber」 Event can be accessed regardless of the Main Story progress.
※ Once the Event closes, however, the unlock condition will change to Clear Stage 9-51.
► The Dusk of Amber Event has two difficulties: Easy and Hard.
► Completing these Encounters will consume an Enkephalin Module each. Clear the Easy difficulty to unlock the Hard difficulty.
► The following effects will be active in the Easy difficulty:
- If the Identity's level is lower than 60, raise their level to 60
- If Identities' Uptie Tiers or equipped E.G.O's Threadspinning Tiers are lower than Tier 3, raise them to Tier 3
► During the Event Period, fulfill Missions (challenges) in each of the Easy and Hard difficulties to obtain their Rewards from the 'Missions' menu.

<Event Combat Encounter>
► The Dusk of Amber Encounter is a Suppression effort of Ordeal entities within a limited number of turns.
► The Encounter is entered with a 5-Identity Team Loadout, and the #1 Sinner in the Deployment Order will be imbued with the "Welfare Team Captain" effect.
- Welfare Team Captain: Increased Skill Slots, changes to Skill composition, and various beneficial effects
► The Encounter will feature a fixed, special Announcer.
► You can view the current Turn and the Turn Limit in the top-left corner of the UI.
► You can view the number of enemies currently defeated and the maximum number of enemies on the top right corner of the UI.
► The Encounter ends once you reach the turn limit.

<Missions>
- View Missions (challenges) to complete in the [Missions] menu. Every mission provides a reward upon completion.
- There are Easy and Hard Missions, which can be completed in Easy and Hard difficulties, respectively.
- Once the Event closes on 2026/3/19 10:00 (KST), you can no longer complete your Missions.
- [Rewards Claim] will remain open for 3 weeks from 2026/3/5 12:00 ~ 2026/3/26 10:00 (KST).
- Even after the event fully ends, you will be able to experience “The 8th Walpurgis Night - The Dusk of Amber” combat Encounters and view its story any time on the Drive tab and Theater - [Detour Tales].
- From 2026/3/5 12:00 ~ 2026/3/26 10:00 (KST), you can revisit the story but not the Encounter. The Combat Encounter will become available again after 2026/3/26 12:00 (KST) via the Driver side menu.

Mirror Dungeon Floor Theme Pack - The Dusk of Amber Pack Added
--------------------------------------------------------------

After the Mar. 5th Scheduled Update, the Dusk of Amber Theme Pack will be added to the Mirror Dungeon.
Walpurgis Night Choice Events and E.G.O Gifts will be added to the featured floors.

<Spawn Location>
- Mirror Dungeon Normal Difficulty Floors 4 and 5
- Mirror Dungeon Hard Difficulty Floors 4 and 5

※ Please note that this Theme Pack will appear as a fixed spawn during the Walpurgis Night Event Period, and will be added to the randomized pool of the floors above once the Event is over. Please note that playing through the Walpurgis Night Theme Pack has no effect on your Event Mission progress.

title: 2026, Mar. 5th Scheduled Update Notice
content:
--------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on Mar. 5th, 2026 (KST).

Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.

Please refer below for details about the update.

New Content
-----------

1. New Target Extraction - [The 8th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction] (3/5 12:00 ~ 3/19 10:00 (KST))

The following Identities, E.G.O, and Announcer will have increased odds of extraction:

- E.G.O [HE] : Harmony Sinclair
- 3★ : Lobotomy E.G.O::Hornet [Alteration] Meursault, Lobotomy E.G.O::Faint Aroma & Solitude Ryōshū
- Announcer : Chesed Announcer

※ Please note that [The 8th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction] and [The 3rd & 4th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction BokGak] are separate Extractions, and feature different improved rates.  
Please confirm each Banner’s featured units and Probabilities menu prior to extracting.

3. Walpurgis Night Identities and E.G.O Added

During the Event period, all current and previous 「Walpurgis Night」 event Identities and E.G.O will be added to the Extractable list.

※ The Event will last from Mar. 5th 12:00 ~ Mar. 19th 10:00.  
※ Please note that Walpurgis Night Identities and E.G.O will no longer be available for Extraction once the Event period ends.

4. New Event [The 8th Walpurgis Night]

※ Please refer to the Steam notice for more information.

5. New Packages

3 new limited packages will be added to the game with the Mar. 5th, 2026 (KST) Scheduled Update.

► Target Extraction Pack
- Contents : Decaextraction Ticket x 4
- Price : ₩33,000 / $21.99 / ¥3,000
- Can be purchased once
- Purchasable Period : 26. 3. 5 12:00 ~ 3. 19 10:00 (KST)

► Identity Growth Pack

- Price : ₩33,000 / $21.99 / ¥3,000

► E.G.O Upgrade Pack
- Content : Takeoff Module - E.G.O Spinning [HE] x1

- Can be purchased once
- Purchasable Period : 26. 3. 5 12:00 ~ 3. 19 10:00 (KST)

Mirror of Names and Spiders Mode Update
---------------------------------------

The Parallel Superposition Mode will be unlocked, allowing Mirror Dungeon runs up to Floor 10.

※ Please note for your gameplay plans that the Mirror Dungeon will be closed from 2026. 03. 05 06:00 ~ 10:00 to process the Mirror of Names and Spiders Parallel Superposition Mode Update.

※ This update unlocks only the Parallel Superposition Mode. EXTREME Mode and Quality-of-Life improvements will be scheduled at a later date. We will inform you via a separate notice once they become available.

► Parallel Superposition Mode Details

- You can progress the Mirror of Names and Spiders up to Floor 10 by applying the Parallel Superposition Mode.
- Parallel Superposition shares the same unlock requirements with the Mirror Dungeon Hard Difficulty—Clear Main Story Chapter 8.
- Parallel Superposition is a high-difficulty content, and exists solely for personal challenges or upcoming Achievements.
- Clearing higher Floors in Parallel Superposition Mode will yield more Starlight.
- You can enable the Parallel Superposition Mode by clicking the Parallel Superposition mode button on the entry screen or the toggle button on the right side of the Mirror Dungeon settings pop-up.
- To apply the Parallel Superposition Mode, you must finish every chosen Theme Pack up to Floor 5 on Hard Difficulty with the Parallel Superposition Mode toggled on.

※ Please note that the Pass EXP or Lunacy rewards for clearing Floors above Floor 6 or higher are no different from clearing Floor 5.  
※ Entering the Mirror of Names and Spiders with a Rental Team will only allow you to progress up to Floor 5.

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Fixed an issue where the effects of Cursed E.G.O Gifts do not work properly

► Fixed an issue where, when the player has acquired the Omni-tool E.G.O Gift in a Mirror Dungeon run, the game could freeze when battling certain enemy units

► Fixed an issue where the effect activation typography UI would load for the first Coin of every Skill, regardless of their conditions

※ This issue occurred with the optimization update in the Feb. 12th Scheduled Update. During optimization, the settings were accidentally set to trigger all typography UI to appear when resetting the activation checker.  
To address this issue, we have adjusted the logic to disable all typography UI triggers when resetting the activation checker.

► Fixed an issue in Stage 9-41 where, for a certain Skill, the clash forecast UI shows "Unopposed Attack" even when it can be clashed

※ This is a UI-only issue; if the Skill can be clashed, the "Unopposed Attack" effects do not activate.

► Fixed an issue where the fade-to-black effect loads unnaturally when entering the Team loadout menu from the following: Mirror Dungeon, Dungeon of the Fathoms, and Refraction Railway

► (AOS, iOS) Fixed an issue where, on mobile devices, viewing detailed info about Identities or E.G.O in the selector UI fails to load the corresponding illustrations

► Fixed an issue where flavor texts in the enemy effects window were hard to read when using the Default Mode UI

► Fixed an issue where, in the E.G.O Gift Compendium, certain E.G.O Gift acquisition conditions were not listed

► Fixed an issue where, in the Window tab, the notification icon did not go away even after reading the notice

► Fixed an issue where post-Mirror Dungeon run obtained items UI shows Starlight as well

► (JP Only) Improved readability of the 3rd Anniversary Nominable Identity Ticket

► Fixed an issue where the "Cancel" button showed an incorrect icon when selecting a Sinner in the Nominable Egoshard usage UI

► Improved UI interaction to allow users to access Egoshard Crates or Nominable Egoshard Crates directly from Identity Uptie and E.G.O Threadspinning UI without having to move to the Inventory menu

► Fixed an issue where the battle statistics background was incorrectly applied when using the "Default Mode" UI

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Mar. 12th, 2026 (KST)
- When : After Mar. 5th, 2026 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Mar. 12th (Thu) 2026, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.
- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change depending on the status of maintenance. If such a change occurs, we will let you know in a follow-up notice.
- A resource download may be prompted after the build update. If you're using a mobile device, it is recommended to proceed with a Wi-Fi connection.
- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account. Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: Notice: Details & Measures Regarding an Upgrade Item Error
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

An issue was identified where, after the Feb. 19th Scheduled Update, using Takeoff Module - ID Uptie or Identity Takeoff Ticket (including ver. 2 and ver. 3) could cause the game to enhance an Identity that the user did not select.

Please continue reading for more information regarding the issue and the recovery process for those affected.

[ Issue ]
► An issue where, when using a Takeoff Module - ID Uptie or Identity Takeoff Ticket (including ver. 2 and ver. 3), there were rare cases where a different Identity than the selected Identity would be upgraded

[ Issue Occurrence Date & Affected Areas ]
► We have identified that the deployment of Feb. 19th, 2026's Bug Fixes & Improvements, which included the implementation of "optimization code to prevent lagging issues when using Identity Takeoff Ticket," causes the issue to trigger when using Takeoff Module - ID Uptie and Identity Takeoff Ticket (including ver.2 and ver.3).

[ Cause ]
► In order to alleviate the inconvenience caused by framerate drops that occurred when loading a full list of Identities to the in-game UI, we implemented an optimization code so that any slots that weren't visible to the user were asynchronously loaded to the game.
However, once that optimization was implemented, selecting certain Identities could cause incorrect Identity data to be relayed, causing the game to select a different Identity than the one the user selected.

[ Issue Fix ]
► As a temporary fix, we will roll back this optimization code deployment and prevent issues with selecting Identities. However, please note that frame rate drops may occur in the selection menu due to this rollback.
► An issue-free version of the optimization code will be deployed with the Mar. 12th (Thu) Scheduled Update.

[ Fix Deployment ETA ]
- 2026. 03. 05 12:00(KST)
- This issue will be resolved via the Mar. 5th Scheduled Maintenance.

[ Subsequent Measures ]
► If you have encountered this issue between Feb. 19th and Mar. 5th 10:00 (KST; issue fix date), please send the details of your issue to our customer service email with your UID, and we will assist with restoring your affected items and Identities.

* Restoration Period : All Managers who have submitted a customer service email before Mar. 31st (Tue), 18:00 (KST)
* Restoration Recipients : All Managers who have used Takeoff Module - ID Uptie or Identity Takeoff Ticket between Feb. 19th 12:00 (KST) ~ Mar. 5th 10:00 (KST), but have had the upgrade applied to a different Identity than the one selected
* Restorable Resources
1. Takeoff Module - ID Uptie or Identity Takeoff Ticket
2. Identity (The Identity will be restored to Uptie Tier 1 and Level 1)
3. Any resources used on the Identity from #2 for Uptying and Leveling prior to using Takeoff Module - ID Uptie or Identity Takeoff Tickets

* Customer Service Email : limbussupport@projmoon.com
* Please submit your request with your UID, and be sure to include details regarding which Identity incorrectly received the effects of the affected items.
* Please understand that it may be difficult for us to provide assistance when contacted outside the designated restoration period listed above.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: [Notice: The Index Nursefather Yi Sang Identity Growth Pack Sales Period Error]
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

We have identified an issue where the sales period for "The Index Nursefather Yi Sang Identity Growth Pack" is mislabeled.

1. Issue

Although the actual end date of "The Index Nursefather Yi Sang Identity Growth Pack" is Mar. 5th, we have identified an issue where the in-game data lists "Mar. 26th" as the actual end date of the package's availability.

This means that the in-game text for this package lists a period of availability that extends beyond its actual end date.

(※ The Target Extraction Pack is unaffected by this issue, and lists the accurate end date.)

2. Cause

After a review, we have discovered that the package's end-date was labeled correctly upon its release.

However, it has been identified that, in the process of preparing for the release of 3rd Anniversary Packs, which were released with the Feb. 26th Scheduled Update, the end period of this pre-existing package was mistakenly adjusted.

3. Solution

As the in-game text lists "The Index Nursefather Yi Sang Identity Growth Pack" to be available until Mar. 26th, we will be maintaining its availability through to the labeled date (Mar. 26th).

(Please note that, though its availability date has been extended, its per-account purchase limit will remain "once-per-account" and will not be reset.)

Though this extended availability was not our intention, we determined that the disparity between in-game information and the actual availability date could cause confusion; therefore, we have decided to extend the availability to match the text that is shown in-game.

We sincerely apologize for the confusion caused by this sales period mislabeling error.

4. Future measures

We will further reinforce our review process for preexisting packages' sales period when adding new packages to the game, so that no similar issue occurs again in the future.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Notice: Cursed E.G.O Non-functionality Issue
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

Cursed E.G.O Gifts were added with the Feb. 26, 2026 Scheduled Update.
However, we have identified that the Cursed E.G.O Gifts' various functions are not working correctly at the moment.

As addressing these issues requires changes to the game's internal logic, they cannot be fixed today via a hotfix.

We ask for your understanding that this issue will be fixed with the next Scheduled Update.

Please continue reading for more information.

[ Issue ]
► An issue where the effects of Cursed E.G.O Gifts do not activate
※ There are two issues: 1) Cursed E.G.O Gift effects are not activating, and 2) the condition to convert Cursed E.G.O Gifts into Blessed E.G.O Gifts cannot be fulfilled.

[ Cause ]
► In the process of separating game logics based on update content, Cursed E.G.O Gift logic that should have been included were not reflected in the game build

[ Issue Fix ]
► Include the Cursed E.G.O Gift logic that was missing in our previous build

[ Issue Fix ETA ]
► Mar. 5th Scheduled Update

[ Future Measures ]
- Reinforce testing scenarios to prevent this issue from occurring again
- Set up more rigid categorizations for logics that should and should not be included in each update
- Set up clearer standards for what constitutes a playtesting environment

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Notice: Hotfix for Cursed E.G.O Gifts Not Appearing
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

Following the Feb. 26th, 2026 Scheduled Update, we have identified an issue in the Mirror Dungeon where Cursed E.G.O Gift Choice Events would not appear. We would like to provide details regarding the hotfix schedule and the issue.

Please see below for more information.

[Issue Details]
► Cursed E.G.O Gift Choice Events, which were added with the Feb. 26th Scheduled Update, would not appear

[Cause of the Issue]
► While implementing an exception logic so that Choice Events featuring Cursed E.G.O Gifts would appear only on Hard Difficulty, an error occurred that prevented them from appearing on both Normal and Hard Difficulties

[Issue Fix]
► The issue has been corrected so that the relevant Choice Events will properly appear on Hard difficulty

[Post-Fix Impact]
► Once the hotfix is applied, Cursed E.G.O Gift Choice Events will appear at a set probability in Mirror Dungeon Hard after selecting a Floor Theme Pack.

[Hotfix Schedule]
- Feb. 27th (Fri) 11:30 (KST)
- The timing may vary by approximately 10 minutes.

※ The hotfix will be applied upon reconnecting to the game and will not require a version update.
Please note that additional data will be downloaded when the hotfix is applied.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: 2026, Feb. 26th Scheduled Update Notice
content:
----------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on Feb. 26th, 2026 (KST).

Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.

Please refer below for details about the update.

New Content
-----------

1. User Interface Design Update Part 1

Part 1 of the update that enables "Dark Mode" UI option will be applied to the game. Certain UI elements will be changed as well.

※ Select the UI change icon to enter the menu to switch between Default Mode and Dark Mode.

※ Any UI changes that were not applied with Update Part 1 will be applied gradually in parts.

2. New Content [Mirror of Names and Spiders HARD]

※ Please refer to the Steam Announcements Page for more information.

※ Please note that the Mirror Dungeon will be closed from 2026. 02. 26 06:00 ~ 12:00 (KST) to process the Mirror of Names and Spiders Hard Difficulty Update.

3. Special 3rd Anniversary Event

※ Please refer to the Steam Announcements Page for more information.

4. 3rd Anniversary Commemorative Packages

4 new limited packages will be added to the game with the Feb. 26th, 2026 (KST) Scheduled Update to commemorate our 3rd Anniversary.

► 3rd Anniversary Pack I

- Contents : 3★ Identity Guarantee Decaextraction Ticket x1, Identity Takeoff Ticket - ver.3 x1, Angela (Library Director - Early Days) Announcer (immediate access)
- Price : 2,500 Paid Lunacy
- Purchase : Can be purchased only once
- Purchasable Period : 26. 2. 26 12:00 ~ 3. 26 10:00 (KST)

※ If you already have the Angela (Library Director - Early Days) Announcer, gain x50 Thread Crates instead.

※ Use the Identity Takeoff Ticket - ver.3 to select an Identity to Level up to 60 & Uptie to Tier 4. However, if you use this item before your level cap is expanded to 60 with story progression, please note that it will raise your Identity’s level only up to your current cap, meaning that any excess EXP will be lost.

※ Identity Takeoff Ticket - ver.3 can be used in both the Level-up window and in your inventory. However, Identities that are already at Level 60 have their Level-up button disabled, so please use this item via the inventory in such cases.

► 3rd Anniversary Pack II

- Contents : 3rd Anniversary Nominable Identity Ticket x1
- Price : 2,500 Paid Lunacy
- Purchase : Can be purchased only once
- Purchasable Period : 26. 2. 26 12:00 ~ 3. 26 10:00 (KST)

※ Use the 3rd Anniversary Nominable Identity Ticket to select and obtain an Identity among those released up to Season 6. Please refer to the below for selectable/non-selectable Identities.

- Selectable : Identities released prior to Season 7 commencement (including Standard Fare Identities, Season 1~6 Identities, and Season 1~6 Event Identities)
- Non-selectable : Identities released after Season 7 commencement (including Standard Fare Identities and Event Identities), Walpurgis Night Identities

※ Obtaining a duplicate of an Identity you already own will yield the respective Sinner’s Egoshards instead.

- 2★ Identity : Egoshard x15
- 3★ Identity : Egoshard x50

► 3rd Anniversary Commemorative Extraction Pack

- Contents : Decaextraction Ticket x5
- Price : ₩33,000 / $21.99 / ¥3,000
- Purchase : Can be purchased only once
- Purchasable Period : 26. 2. 26 12:00 ~ 3. 26 10:00 (KST)

► 3rd Anniversary Commemorative ID Growth Pack

- Contents : Identity Training Ticket IV x200, Takeoff Module - ID Uptie x2
- Price : ₩55,000 / $41.99 / ¥6,000
- Purchase : Can be purchased only once
- Purchasable Period : 26. 2. 26 12:00 ~ 3. 26 10:00 (KST)

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Fixed an issue where 'The House of Spiders: The Index Nursefather Yi Sang' did not affect ally positioning even when the Identity's Speed increased via the 'Indulgence in Prescripts' effect.

► Fixed certain effect errors related to the keyword 'Charge Barrier'

※ Relevant Effect: Gain (Charge Barrier # x n) Shield

- Before: Upon activation of 'Gain Charge Barrier next turn' effect, the Shield-gaining effect would apply in both the current turn and the next turn
- After: Upon activation of 'Gain Charge Barrier next turn' effect, the Shield-gaining effect will now apply only in the next turn

[Cause of the Issue]

With the Nov. 13th, 2025 Update, we had deployed an optimization that improves how in-battle effect summary UI is displayed.

However, an error occurred in the process of deploying that optimization, where some of the logic that refers to the pre- and post-keyword applications mid-battle erroneously used the information of the next turn instead of the current turn.

[Areas Affected by the Issue]

The issue may arise when the effect-gaining activation timing for "a certain effect activates when gaining/losing a status effect keyword" triggers "next turn".

So far, the only confirmed case of this issue is the 'Gain Charge Barrier next turn' effect for 'W Corp. L2 Cleanup Agent Hong Lu'.

[Issue Fix]

We have made adjustments so that the logic that refers to the pre- and post-keyword application uses the information of the current turn in battle.

► Fixed an issue where the Coin effect of Uptie 4 Defense Skill for 'The Middle Little Brother Meursault' functioned differently from its description

※ Relevant Effect: [On Hit] Inflict 1 Bleed

- Before: The Bleed effect would be inflicted On Heads Hit
- After: The Bleed effect will now be inflicted On Hit, matching its text description

► Fixed an issue where game progression could be blocked under specific conditions in certain Stages of the Mirror Dungeon Theme Pack 'Charm, Wander, Doubt'

► Fixed an issue where the typography image did not display when the Support Passives of 'Lobotomy E.G.O::Solemn Lament Yi Sang' and 'The House of Spiders: The Index Nursefather Yi Sang' were activated

※ The actual effects were functioning normally; only the typography display issue has been corrected.

► Fixed an issue where the Sapling of Light ability 'IRA' would behave abnormally when used under certain conditions

► Fixed an issue where certain keywords and Skill animations used by 'The House of Spiders: The Index Nursefather Yi Sang' were applied incorrectly

※ The same issue was also identified for the enemy unit sharing the same keywords and will be corrected.

► Fixed an issue where the effect summary text of certain E.G.O Gifts displayed during battle did not match their actual effects

※ Relevant E.G.O Gifts: Purloined Flame, Dry-to-the-Bone Breast, Hot Tears, The Unchosen

※ The actual effects were functioning correctly according to their descriptions; only the summarized in-battle text has been corrected.

► Improved the Mirror Dungeon so that when obtaining Vestiges via the effect 'Grace of Stars – Perfected Possibility', an informational side pop-up will now be displayed upon entering the Mirror Dungeon

► Fixed an issue where, when the average Sinner level was below the recommended level, the informational pop-up text displayed at the final node of Refraction Railway Line 1 Bokgak was inconsistent with the texts of the other nodes

► (EN Only) Improved localization consistency of certain effect texts

※ [Attack End]

- Before: "Attack End" and "After Attack" were used interchangeably
- After: The text will now be standardized into "Attack End"

※ [Excluding forced Staggers]

- Before: "unless it's a forced Stagger" and "excluding forced Staggers" were used interchangeably
- After: The text will now be standardized into "excluding forced Staggers"

Known Issue
-----------

► An issue where the Charge Barrier effect visual briefly appears upon the third Coin hit of Skill 3 for 'W Corp. L2 Cleanup Agent Hong Lu'

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Mar. 5th, 2026 (KST)
- When : After Feb. 26th, 2026 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Mar. 5th (Thu) 2026, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.
- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change depending on the status of maintenance. If such a change occurs, we will let you know in a follow-up notice.
- A resource download may be prompted after the build update. If you're using a mobile device, it is recommended to proceed with a Wi-Fi connection.
- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account. Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: Feb. 26th New Content - Mirror of Names and Spiders Hard Difficulty
content:
-------------------------------------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The New Content Mirror Dungeon #7 「Mirror of Names and Spiders - Hard Difficulty」 will be added with the Feb. 26th, 2026 (KST) Update.

► When : After 26/2/26 (KST) Scheduled Update

※ Please note for your gameplay plans that the Mirror Dungeon will be closed from 2026. 02. 26 06:00 ~ 10:00 to process the Mirror of Names and Spiders Hard Difficulty Update.

► Unlock Conditions : Clear Main Story 8-33

► How to enable Hard Difficulty : Toggle the Hard Difficulty in the Theme Pack selection UI

Notes
-----

1. 「Mirror of Names and Spiders」 Hard Difficulty will be updated.

2. 3 new Theme Packs will be added.

※ These Theme Packs are exclusive to the Hard difficulty.

3. 12 new E.G.O Gifts and 4 new Fusion-only E.G.O Gifts will be added.

4. 3 Cursed E.G.O Gifts and 3 Blessed E.G.O Gifts will be added.

5. 4 new Choice Events will be added.

6. Super Shop changes: Super Shop UI will be updated to allow users to view both Identities for the Skill Replacement function.
   Also, the “ID Skill Search” function will be added.

7. Certain QoL improvements will be applied to the Mirror Dungeon.

- Please refer to the [QoL Improvements] section for more information.

Mirror Dungeon #7 Hard Major Changes
------------------------------------

The following changes will be coming to Mirror Dungeon #7 Hard Difficulty.

► Theme Pack Difficulty Selection

Select the Difficulty Toggle button on the top right side of the Theme Pack menu to switch between two difficulties.

Hard Difficulty features Theme Packs of greater challenge compared to Normal Difficulty.

Hard Difficulty displays a total of 4 E.G.O Gifts.

Major Changes
-------------

1. New Theme Packs Added

3 New Hard Difficulty-exclusive Theme Packs will be added.

2. Theme Pack Spawn Locations Adjusted

We have adjusted the number of featured Floors for Floor-exclusive Theme Packs to allow for a more diverse experience than before.

※ This change is applied only to the Hard Difficulty; Normal Difficulty runs will not be affected.

[Affected Theme Packs]

S.E.A., Falling Flowers  
Before : Floor 2  
After : Floor 2, 3

The Unconfronting  
Before : Floor 3  
After : Floor 2, 3

The Noon of Violet, Full-Stopped by a Bullet, Miracle in District 20  
Before : Floor 3  
After : Floor 3, 4

Line 2

Before : Floor 4  
After : Floor 4, 5

※ Featured Boss enemy difficulty will be boosted with the changes to its spawn Floors.

Sign of Roses unit will gain a new effect - “Bridle”

[Bridle]

- At Encounter Start, all allies gain max HP and Offense Level based on the current Floor

- All allies gain (current Floor - 4) x 10% max HP (max 60%)

- All allies gain Offense Level + (current Floor - 4) (max 5)

Line 1

Before : Floor 4, 5  
After : Floor 5

3. New E.G.O Gifts Added

12 new Hard Difficulty-exclusive E.G.O Gifts will be added.

4 new Fusion-only E.G.O Gifts will be added.

※ New E.G.O Gifts are available only from the Hard Difficulty.

E.G.O Gifts of Tier 3 or lower can be obtained via the E.G.O Gift Search function.

4. New Cursed & Blessed E.G.O Gifts Added

A total of 6 New Blessed & Cursed E.G.O Gifts, 3 in each category, will be added.

These E.G.O Gifts can be obtained only from Choice Events that have chances to spawn in Mirror Dungeon Hard Difficulty.

“Cursed” versions of these E.G.O Gifts will be obtained upon initial acquisition in your run.

However, upon meeting certain conditions, they will be converted to “Blessed” E.G.O Gifts.

Cursed and Blessed E.G.O Gifts cannot be used as Fusion ingredients, and cannot be sold or enhanced.

※ Please note that “Cursed” E.G.O Gifts may raise the difficulty of your Mirror Dungeon run. Moving on without acquiring them may be a valid strategy as well.

5. New Choice Events Added

4 new Choice Events are added, from which you can acquire new E.G.O Gifts.

※ The new Choice Events are available only from the Hard Difficulty.

Major Changes
-------------

► Identity Level Upon Entry

Upon entry, Hard Difficulty reflects your Identities’ current levels.

- Mirror Dungeon #7 Hard : Reflects your Identities’ current levels.

Does not reflect levels beyond 60 (however, in the Mirror Dungeon, there may be ways to raise your Identities’ levels beyond that limit).

- Mirror Dungeon #7 Normal : Identity levels fixed to 60.

※ Just like in previous Mirror Dungeons, Uptie & Threadspinning Tiers reflect your Identities & E.G.O’s actual Tiers.

► Encounter Reward Cost

Hard Difficulty Encounters yield much more Cost compared to Normal Difficulty Encounters.

The harder the Encounter, the greater the Cost reward.

► Unpredictable Future

In the Hard difficulty, you can only view up to 2 more nodes from your current position.

► Mounting Trials & Floor Clear Rewards

You can select 2 Reward E.G.O Gifts upon clearing a Hard Difficulty Theme Pack.

However, please note that you will be gaining 2 Mounting Trials linked to each E.G.O Gift as well.

Should you refuse to select any E.G.O Gifts, 2 of the given Mounting Trials will be randomly selected.

► Super Shop

There is a chance for Super Shops to appear in Hard Difficulty Theme Packs.

The more Cost you spend in a Shop, the greater the chance for a Super Shop to spawn on the next Floor.

The following are the benefits provided by Super Shops.

- E.G.O Gift Shop Selection +3

- Skill Replacement Opportunity +1
(cannot replace the Skill of the same Identity again)

- Can fuse up to 5 E.G.O Gifts in Fusion

- Greater chance for higher Tier E.G.O Gifts to appear when Fusing
(Fusion Point Modifier)

<Major Changes>

The following functions will be added to Hard Difficulty-exclusive Super Shops:

1. Skill Replacement for both Identities will be visible at once.

2. The “ID Skill Search” function will be added. Using this function, you can select which Identity you would like to replace Skills for.

To use this function, select the ID Skill Search option, select an Identity from the bottom of the screen, and enter their Skill Replacement UI.

※ Skill Replacement can only replace Skills within the same Identity, even when using the ID Skill Search function.

※ Using ID Skill Search to replace Skills is more expensive than standard Skill Replacement.

※ ID Skill Search cost is fixed, and is not affected by modifiers from Grace of Stars or E.G.O Gifts.

※ In a future update, an option to pay for ID Skill Search with Starlight will be added.

► Exploration Complete

Mirror Dungeon Hard Difficulty with Weekly Bonuses yields more Battle Pass EXP compared to Mirror Dungeon Normal.

Your reward will be based on the number of your cleared Floors and the Difficulties you selected for each Floor.

※ However, without Weekly Bonuses, the clear reward between Hard and Normal is identical, just as it had been in the previous Mirror Dungeons.

If you have selected the Hard Difficulty for every floor, you can use two or more Weekly Bonuses at once.

The maximum obtainable Reward per week is identical to the amount obtained from clearing Mirror Dungeon #6 (Mirror of Immortality) Hard Difficulty Floor 5.

- Using 3 Weekly Bonuses all at once: Lunacy x750, Battle Pass EXP x225

- Using 3 Weekly Bonuses 3 times, one at a time: Lunacy x750, Battle Pass EXP 250

Upon clearing the Mirror Dungeon, based on the number of Theme Packs cleared in the Hard Difficulty, your Starlight reward will be greatly increased.

Also, clearing Refraction Railway Theme Packs, which are exclusive to Hard Difficulty runs, will each yield bonus Starlight as well.

QoL Improvements
----------------

The following Quality of Life Improvements will be implemented with the Mirror of Names and Spiders Hard Difficulty update.

- A UI element asking if the user would like to apply additional healing when healing Sinners in Shops

- Improved transition when entering a Super Shop

Other Quality of Life improvement goals we have shared in our previous update notice are currently being worked on as well.

We will inform you in their respective update notices when they are implemented.

title: 2026, Feb. 19th Scheduled Update Notice
content:
----------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on Feb. 19th, 2026 (KST).

Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.

Please refer below for details about the update.

New Content
-----------

1. New Identity Target Extraction - [The House of Spiders: The Index Nursefather Yi Sang] (2/19 12:00 ~ 3/5 10:00 (KST))

The following Identities will have increased odds of extraction:

- 3★ : The House of Spiders: The Index Nursefather Yi Sang

※ The House of Spiders: The Index Nursefather Yi Sang is Season 7 Identity.

2. Target Extraction [Hong Lu] (2/19 12:00 ~ 3/5 10:00 (KST))

Extraction rate increases for the following Identities and E.G.O

- E.G.O [HE] : Dimension Shredder Hong Lu
- E.G.O [TETH] : Cavernous Wailing Hong Lu, Soda Hong Lu
- 3★ : The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu, R Corp. 4th Pack Reindeer Hong Lu, District 20 Yurodivy Hong Lu, Dieci South Section 4 Hong Lu, K Corp. Class 3 Excision Staff Hong Lu, Tingtang Gang Gangleader Hong Lu
- 2★ : Fanghunt Office Fixer Hong Lu, W Corp. L2 Cleanup Agent Hong Lu, Liu South Section 5 Hong Lu, Kurokumo Clan Wakashu Hong Lu
- 1★ : LCB Sinner Hong Lu

3. Target Extraction [Hongyuan] (2/19 12:00 ~ 3/5 10:00 (KST))

Extraction rate increases for the following Identities

- 3★ : The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu, Drifting Blade of Hongyuan Ryōshū, Family Hierarch Candidate Ishmael, Heishou Pack - You Branch Adept Heathcliff, Heishou Pack - Wu Branch Adept Yi Sang, Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Adept Faust, Heishou Pack - Wei Branch Don Quixote, Heishou Pack - You Branch Sinclair, Heishou Pack - Si Branch Rodion, Heishou Pack - Si Branch Gregor, Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Ryōshū, Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Outis

※ The 3rd-Anniversary Event starts from Feb. 26th, during which Nominable Identity Ticket will be available via both Attendance Event Reward and Purchase. "Target Extraction: [Hongyuan]" Identities are obtainable by using the Nominable Identity Ticket. Please note the above for your Extraction plans.

4. New Identity Added

The following Identity will be added to the list of extractable Identities.

- 3★ : The House of Spiders: The Index Nursefather Yi Sang

5. New Packages

2 new limited packages will be added to the game with the Feb. 19th, 2026 (KST) Scheduled Update.

► Target Extraction Pack
- Contents : Decaextraction Ticket x4
- Price : ₩33,000 / $21.99 / ¥3,000
- Can be purchased once
- Purchasable Period : 26. 2. 19 12:00 ~ 3. 5 10:00 (KST)

► Identity Growth Pack
- Contents : Takeoff Module - ID Uptie x1, Identity Training Ticket IV x80, Identity Training Ticket III x20
- Price : ₩33,000 / $21.99 / ¥3,000
- Can be purchased once
- Purchasable Period : 26. 2. 19 12:00 ~ 3. 5 10:00 (KST)

6. New Content - Mirror of Names and Spiders

※ Please refer to the Steam Announcements page for more information.

※ Once Mirror of Names and Spiders updates, Mirror of Immortality's Mirror Projection Rate / Achievements and reward claim will become unavailable. Please note this information and claim your rewards before the Feb. 19th Scheduled Update.

※ Once Mirror of Names and Spiders updates, any Starlight acquired in Mirror of Immortality will be removed and will not carry over. However, as was the case in Mirror of Immortality, because the amount of Starlight obtainable from the Normal difficulty may feel comparatively small, a certain amount of starting Starlight will be given by default so that all Managers can start using the Starlight system immediately.

Ryōshū's Post-Canto 9 In-game Illustration(Font) Survey Results Infographic
----------------------------------------------------------------------------

The following is the infographic on the results of the survey that was conducted from Jan. 30th, 2026 to Feb. 6th, and how the in-game illustration(font) will be changed to reflect them. We thank all of our Managers for the care and appreciation you have put into answering the survey.

1. Notes regarding the survey results

※ 20 survey entries, which include those with duplicate UIDs, nonexistent UIDs, and incorrect inputting of languages, have been excluded from the survey.

※ All featured percentages are rounded up from the 2nd decimal place.

[ Survey Sample Size ]

Sample Size : 17,742 Participants

[ Language Distribution ]

KR : 4,647
EN : 7,118
JP : 5,094
ETC : 863

[ Current Font Intent Impressions ]

1 : 14.8%
2 : 26.0%
3 : 16.2%
4 : 29.3%
5 : 13.7%

[ Per-language Percentages for Current Font Intent Impressions ]

        1       2       3       4       5
KR    22.3%   28%    17.8%   21.4%   10.5%
EN    3.6%    14.5%  17.3%   43.8%   20.8%
JP    21.7%   39.4%  12.7%   19.2%   7%
ETC   25.5%   29.9%  16.9%   16.9%   10.8%

Despite the relatively brief survey period, a total of 17,742 managers have participated in the survey.

Languages are divided into 4 categories: Korean, English, Japanese, and Other.
The first three are Limbus Company's officially-supported languages, and the last is for users playing with Custom Language mods.

The following is a result breakdown of the "Does the font used in this image convey a rectilinear and futuristic intent?" question.

"Somewhat Agree" answers were approximately 29.3%, and "Somewhat Disagree" answers were approximately 26.0%.

After a per-language review of the survey results, we confirmed that the answers to this survey varied depending on the language each Manager used.

[ Font Change Direction ]

1. Use a different font that maintains the futuristic intent — 12.7%
2. Use a different brush calligraphy font, similar to the previous version used by Ryōshū — 40.6%
3. Use a different font that does not adhere to either of the above — 6.7%
4. Leave it to the director to decide after viewing the results of this survey — 28.9%
5. Maintain the font as-is — 11.1%

[ Per-language Font Change Direction Percentages ]

        Option 1   Option 2   Option 3   Option 4   Option 5
KR      7.1%       50%        7.8%       25.6%      9.5%
EN      14.8%      27.3%      3.4%       38%        16.5%
JP      14.8%      48.4%      9.5%       21.3%      6%
ETC     12.9%      49.2%      12.1%      17.3%      8.5%

The following is a breakdown of the "If we are to change the font on the scabbard, which direction would you prefer?" question.

"Use a different brush calligraphy font, similar to the previous version used by Ryōshū," at 40.6%, had the most votes, and the "Leave it to the director to decide," at 28.9%, was the second.

Once we broke it down language-by-language, approximately 50% of our managers preferred Direction #2 (brush calligraphy font).

Among English-using Managers, "Leave it to the director to decide," at 38%, was the most-voted option, but the brush calligraphy font option had significant weight as well, at 27.3%.

2. Font Improvement Direction

According to the survey results, preferences regarding the current version of the font were roughly split down the middle, but it also led us to conclude that the current font may not come across as appropriate for a portion of our managers.

Also, as the words that are carved into Ryōshū's sword are written in Chinese characters, we would like to proceed in a direction that looks the most natural and appropriate for users who are primarily familiar with them.

Based on your responses, with the Feb. 19th Scheduled Update, we will be updating the current font to something similar to Ryōshū's previous brush calligraphy font.

JP Localization Text Issue Fixes
--------------------------------

We have identified numerous instances where the JP version of text description is different from the KR and EN versions.

The issues listed below will be fixed in the Feb. 19th Scheduled Update.

Please continue reading for the details.

Furthermore, in order to prevent any future mistranslation issues for the parts concerned, we have added to our localization process an additional proofreading stage based on a compiled list of in-game string tags, official skill phrases, and important terminology.

Through this measure, we will strengthen our screening process to identify and prevent missing texts, mistranslations, and misplaced tags.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Known Issues after the Feb. 12th Scheduled Update
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

Following the Feb. 12th Scheduled Update, we have identified an issue where game progression may be blocked under certain conditions when progressing through Stage 3-22.

Please continue reading for more details.

[ Issue Details ]
► When the E.G.O Gift "Sniggering Tongue", which can be obtained in Stage 3-22, is in the inventory, Attacks may fail to trigger following a Clash, blocking game progression

[ Cause of the Issue ]
► In the process of implementing optimization for game logic related to effect typography, "Sniggering Tongue" E.G.O Gift, which was programmed with an exception logic, caused this issue.

[ Issue Fix ]
► To make changes to the game's code, we must go through reviews and updates from each respective store; this makes deploying an immediate fix to the issue difficult.

► Instead, we will be deploying a hotfix to temporarily prevent this E.G.O Gift from being obtained.
If you have already acquired this E.G.O Gift, we will remove it from your inventory of E.G.O Gifts upon restarting the game after the Hotfix deployment.

► Later, with the Feb. 19th Scheduled Update, we will be implementing additional corrections to the code to ensure this E.G.O Gift behaves correctly.

[ Hotfix Schedule ]
- 2026. 02. 12 17:45(KST)
- This fix was deployed without a Hotfix download or a new version update.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Notice: An issue where game progression is blocked when using "Continue"
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

Following the Feb. 5th Scheduled Update, we have identified an issue where, if the Stage Continue function is used when Lobotomy E.G.O::Lamp Gregor is on the battlefield, the battle may not proceed normally afterward.

Please continue reading for more information.

[Issue Details]
► If the Stage Continue function is used when Lobotomy E.G.O::Lamp Gregor is on the battlefield and all allies are defeated, the battle may fail to proceed normally afterward

[Cause of the Issue]
► This issue occurs due to an exception logic not applying during the processing of certain Identity effect animations

[Issue Fix]
► The exception logic process will be improved so that battles can proceed normally after using Stage Continue function

[Issue Fix Schedule]
► This issue is scheduled to be fixed with the Feb. 19 update.

We kindly ask for your understanding that, until the issue is resolved with the Feb. 19 update, Managers refrain from using the Stage Continue function when the Identity concerned is on the battlefield if possible.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Notice: User Survey on Ryōshū's Post-Canto 9 In-game Illustration
content:
Greetings, Dear Manager.

We are conducting this survey to gather our Managers' feedback on the font used on Ryōshū’s scabbard.

The font was implemented to illustrate Chinese characters with rectilinear and futuristic feel, designed to look as though the characters were engraved onto a surface. With the Jan. 29th Scheduled Update, a Ryōshū-related image was edited to reinforce its engraving visuals.

However, as Korea does not use Chinese characters in everyday written language, the visual appeal or intention behind the font might not have been clearly communicated and could be perceived as unsuitable for use in the specific context of the story.

We seek your feedback on whether the font on Ryōshū’s scabbard is perceived in accordance with the original design intent.
We would appreciate if our Managers could provide us input via the link below.

[Survey Link]

- Please be warned that this survey contains spoilers for Post-Canto 9 in-game content.
- Please note that this survey will be open for responses until Feb. 6th (Fri), 18:00 (KST)

Thank you.
