title: Notice: The House of Spiders: The Middle Apprentice Ishmael Def. Skill Error
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

We would like to inform you about a Shield-gaining effect error with The House of Spiders: The Middle Apprentice Ishmael that was identified after the Jan. 29th, 2026 Scheduled Update.

Please continue reading for more information.

[ The House of Spiders: The Middle Apprentice Ishmael's Defense Skill Error ]

- Relevant Effect:
[Combat Start] At 6+ sum of Envy A-Reson., use "Violet~ Breaking Slam" as Counter (activates 2 times per turn)
[Combat Start] Gain N% of missing HP as Shield (once per turn)

- Before: The Identity did not gain Shield when the Defense Skill was switched with "Violet~ Breaking Slam" Counter
- After: The Identity will now gain Shield even when the Defense Skill switches with "Violet~ Breaking Slam" Counter

The House of Spiders: The Middle Apprentice Ishmael's Defense Skill, "I'll Get You Back for This, Man", comes with a mechanism that switches the Skill with "Violet~ Breaking Slam" at Combat Start.

Although the above Skill-switching mechanism is an intended spec for this Identity, the Shield-gaining effect at Combat Start was not applied due to the following process:
- The Skill-changing effect and the Combat Start effect both trigger at the same timing, however, because the Skill-changing effect takes precedence, it overrides the "[Combat Start] Gain N% of missing HP as Shield" effect of "I'll Get You Back for This, Man".
- The "Violet~ Breaking Slam" Skill-switching Counter does not include a separate Shield-gaining effect. Thus, when this Skill triggers as a counter, the Identity gains no Shield

The Middle Little Brother Sinclair Identity, which shares a similar mechanism with this Identity, activates its base Counter Skill's Shield-gaining ability simultaneously with the switched Counter Skill in case its Skill-switch ability is activated.

Therefore, for the sake of consistency between Identities with similar mechanisms, we will be adjusting The House of Spiders: The Middle Apprentice Ishmael as follows:
- When The House of Spiders: The Middle Apprentice Ishmael's Counter Skill "I'll Get You Back for This, Man" is replaced with "Violet~ Breaking Slam" at Combat Start, the switched Skill still gains the "[Combat Start] Gain N% of missing HP as Shield" effect from the base Counter Skill

With this change, this Identity will gain Shield at Combat Start even when using "Violet~ Breaking Slam" as Counter, maintaining consistency between Identities with similar mechanisms.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused by this error, especially as this Identity's Extraction period is still ongoing.

[The House of Spiders: The Middle Apprentice Ishmael Defense Skill Error Compensation]
- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Feb. 5th, 2026 (KST)
- When : After Jan. 29th, 2026 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account
- Error Compensation can be claimed until Feb. 5th (Thu) 2026, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

title: Notice: Jan. 22nd Mobile Platform Deployment Delay
content:
Greetings, dear Manager.

The scheduled maintenance for Jan. 22nd update ver. 1.97.0, previously announced in our Scheduled Update Notice, has been delayed longer than expected, delaying mobile platform deployment by approximately 30 minutes compared to our usual time.

Cause : Database inspection and migration

As the Maintenance has been completed, the game is now accessible; however, please note that version 1.97.0 mobile store deployment may be slightly delayed.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused by the unexpected maintenance delay.

title: 2026, Jan. 22nd Scheduled Update Notice
content:
---------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from
10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on Jan. 22nd, 2026 (KST).

Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend
that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app
purchases and close the application before maintenance
begins so that no data is lost.

Please refer below for details about the update.

New Content
-----------

1. New Identity Target Extraction - [The House of Spiders:
The Middle Apprentice Ishmael] (1/22 12:00 ~ 2/5 10:00 (KST))
The following Identity will have increased odds of extraction:
- 3★ : The House of Spiders: The Middle Apprentice Ishmael
※ The House of Spiders: The Middle Apprentice
Ishmael is a Season 7 Identity.

2. New Identity Added
The following Identity will be added to the list of extractable Identities.
- 3★ : The House of Spiders: The Middle Apprentice Ishmael

3. New Packages
2 new limited packages will be added to the game with the
Jan. 22nd, 2026 (KST) Scheduled Update.

► Target Extraction Pack
- Contents : Decaextraction Ticket x 4
- Price : ₩33,000 / $21.99 / ¥3,000
- Can be purchased once
- Purchasable Period : 26. 1. 22 12:00 ~ 2. 5 10:00 (KST)

► Identity Growth Pack
- Contents : Takeoff Module - ID Uptie x 1, Identity Training
Ticket IV x 80, Identity Training Ticket III x 20
- Price : ₩33,000 / $21.99 / ¥3,000
- Can be purchased once
- Purchasable Period : 26. 1. 22 12:00 ~ 2. 5 10:00 (KST)

Major Changes
-------------

1. A "Skip" function will be added to allow forced progression
if controls become unresponsive during certain cutscenes
while progressing through Main Story Chapter 9.
※ Please note that the "Skip" button will appear in the
top-right corner of the screen if no input is detected
for a certain period of time.

2. The Stage Node images for
Main Story 9-4 and 9-18 will be changed.

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Fixed an issue where the HP recovery conditional of The Priest of
La Manchaland Gregor's 'Ailing Heart' effect did not match its description
- Before: All Skills, including Base Skills, healed HP On Hit
- After: HP will be healed On Hit with Base Skills matching the text description

► Fixed an issue where the calculation formula for Dieci Assoc. South Section 4
Yi Sang's Support Passive was incorrectly applied
※ Relevant effect : Gain (5 x Discarded Skill rank)% of Max HP as Shield
- Before: Gained (5 + Discarded Skill rank)% Shield
- After: Gain (5 x Discarded Skill rank)% Shield, matching the text description

► Fixed an issue where, when the main target of Skills with 2+ Attack Weight uses
Clashable Guard to defend, the damage reduction effect was also applied to sub-targets
※ Please note that, while this issue was fixed with the
Jan. 15th Ver. 1.96.0 Update, it was missing from its Scheduled Update notice.

► Fixed an issue where, when Pride damage is triggered due to certain Skill effect in
Main Story Chapter 9 battle, the Final Power modifier did not change damage values
※ Relevant Skill: You Have Failed to Stop the Future - Scartrail Slash [殘痕斬]

► Fixed an issue in Stage 9-50 where a certain Skill effect used by
an enemy during a certain phase did not function properly
※ Relevant Effect: Can Clash with this Skill regardless of Speed
※ We have identified that this effect functions normally before the phase transition
but fails to activate afterward. The effect will be adjusted to
function as per its text description.

► Improved game mechanic for a specific enemy Skill encountered in Stage 9-50
- Before: Only Ryōshū can Clash against this Skill
- After: Only Ryōshū can Clash against this Skill;
Ryōshū can Clash with this Skill regardless of Speed

► Elaborated "K Corp. Emergency Ampule" description
※ Added Text: This effect activates before the "X does not reduce HP below 1"
effects from Identities & E.G.O Passives
※ This is a textual elaboration for the sake of clarity; the
actual effect is functioning as intended.

► Fixed an issue where certain voicelines of Lei Heng Announcer
activated on incorrect triggers
※ "Starting Turn after dealing Devastating Damage[1]" and "Starting Turn after
taking Devastating Damage[2]" will now trigger on "Dealing Devastating Damage"
and "Taking Devastating Damage," respectively
※ "Starting Turn after dealing Devastating Damage[2]" and "Starting Turn after taking
Devastating Damage[2]" will now trigger on "Starting Turn after dealing Devastating
Damage" and "Starting Turn after taking Devastating Damage," respectively

► Fixed an issue where Peccatula Invidiae would sometimes
speak the voicelines of the original Identities

► Fixed an issue where activating a combo attack with The Lord of
Hongyuan Hong Lu's Skill 3 and Heishou Pack - Si Branch Rodion could
sometimes cause Skill effects to linger

► Fixed an issue where Lobotomy E.G.O::Solemn Lament
Yi Sang would use his Skill at an incorrect location

► Fixed an issue where, when in-combat text deletion effect would activate
in certain Encounters, the said effect would not apply to certain texts

► Fixed an issue where, in the Cultivation & battle scenes, attempting to view
Jia Xichun's detailed info in Chapter 8.5 Spring Cultivation locks all
of the unit's Skills and Passives

► Fixed an issue where, in certain combat Encounters of Canto 9,
defeated assist units may overlap with other allied units

► Fixed an issue where, in Stage 9-49, certain VFX loads in unintended locations

► Fixed an issue where, in a certain combat Encounter of Canto 9,
a Sinner's E.G.O animation would play at an incorrect timing

► Fixed an issue where a certain unit would not
stop using the same Skill in Stage 9-50

► (JP Only) Fixed an issue where, in Stage 9-37,
a certain character was labeled with an incorrect name

► Fixed an issue where combat Sprites would load
incorrectly in the post-clear animation in Stage 9-48

► Fixed an issue where, in Stage 9-39,
a certain character used an incorrect story sprite

► (KR Only) Fixed a typo in a flavor text present in Stage 9-44
※ Relevant effect: Lævateinn

► Fixed an issue where, in Stage 9-45, certain animations
played incorrectly in the Encounter's clear cutscene

► Fixed an issue where rapidly tapping "Give Up" or "Retry Stage"
could cause those buttons to be interacted with more than twice

► Fixed an issue where a VFX tied to a certain
Announcer continued to play even when not viewing the Announcer

► (JP Only) Updated lyric subtitles in Canto 9's Mili song

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before
10:00 Jan. 29th, 2026 (KST)
- When : After Jan. 22nd, 2026 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Jan. 29th (Thu) 2026,
10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.
- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change depending on the status of maintenance. If such a change occurs, we will let you know in a follow-up notice.
- A resource download may be prompted after the build update. If you're using a mobile device, it is recommended to proceed with a Wi-Fi connection.
- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account. Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: (Steam) Additional Notice: Repeated Update Popup for Version 1.96.0
content:
※ It was an urgent matter, so We proceeded with machine translation, and we will replace it as soon as the translation is completed.

Hello, This is Project Moon.

We have identified an issue at approximately 02:10 on January 17, where certain sound-related resource files did not match the server version.
The files have since been updated, and redistribution has been carried out for the Steam version.

As a result, an update prompt may appear on the Steam platform.
However, if the repeated download popup does not occur, you do not need to proceed with the update.

There are no gameplay or content changes, and the client version will remain at 1.96.0.

If the download popup continues to appear repeatedly, please contact our support team at limbussupport@projmoon.com.

Thank you.

title: Notice: Improvements, Known Issues, and Hotfix for Ver. 1.96.0
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

We would like to inform you about the additional fixes deployed with the Jan. 15th, 2026 Scheduled Update, as well as some of the known issues that will be addressed via a hotfix.

Please continue reading for more information.

[ Additional Fixes Deployed with the 1/15 Update ]

※ The following changes were applied through the Jan. 15th Scheduled Update.

► Fixed an issue where, if the game's FPS was set to 60 or Auto, the voiceline of certain Main Story Chapters did not automatically proceed after the credit roll.
Affected Main Story chapters: Chapter 3, Chapter 4, Chapter 7, and Chapter 8

► Fixed an issue where certain touch input areas did not function properly when The Index Proxy - Effloresced E.G.O::Procuration Don Quixote's Uptie illustration was set on the lobby screen

► Fixed an issue where certain background images were not displayed in Main Story 4-2

► Fixed an issue where, under certain conditions while progressing the Main Story, the story could be manually skipped when the Golden Bough Resonance animation played

► Adjusted the UI so that Chapter 9's banner is highlighted after Chapter 8.5 - Spring Cultivation is cleared for the first time

► Fixed an issue where a sepia-toned background was displayed instead of black-and-white in The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu's Identity Uptie Story

[ To-be Hotfixed ]

► (EN Only) Fixed an issue where, under certain circumstances, the translations for Yi Sang and Ryōshū's "Great Trichiliocosm" E.G.O Passives did not load

► (JP Only) Fixed an issue where, in Main Story Stage 9-42, the voicelines and scenes did not match

► (EN Only) Shortened the new Keyword in Ryōshū's new E.G.O "Great Trichiliocosm" E.G.O
- Before : Deal more damage on Critical Hit
- After : Crit DMG Up

► (JP Only) An issue where an unintended Keyword highlight occurs for a certain enemy's Skill description
※ Relevant Skill : Grueling Battle

[ Hotfix ETA ]
- 1.15(THU) 19:30(KST)
- There may be a 10-minute delay from the ETA.

※ Hotfixes are applied upon restarting the game without a separate client update.
Please note that additional downloads may occur.

[ Post-Jan. 15th Scheduled Update Known Issues ]

※ We are currently investigating the following issues, and will inform you via a separate update notice once they are resolved.

► An issue where, in a certain Encounter, if Sinners are all killed at the same time as the enemies are, the Sinners' corpse sprites are used in the following victory cutscene

► An issue where, for Ryōshū's "Great Trichiliocosm" E.G.O, damage dealt against Shield HP does not count toward gaining the effect "Entangled Life"

► An issue where, in Main Story Stage 9-39, a certain character's story sprite is incorrectly assigned

► An issue where, in "Spring Cultivation," the assist unit Jia Xichun's Skills & Passives become invisible

Thank you.

title: Notice: Details on Difficulty Adjustment for Thread Luxcavation #5
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.
With the Jan. 15th Scheduled Update, the difficulty of Thread Luxcavation #5 will be adjusted.

Please refer below for details about the adjustment.

- Monday [Lust] : Faelantern
► The Abnormality's HP will be lowered.
The HP for its Parts(Body, Fairy) will be lowered accordingly.
► Skills, Attack patterns, and Passives have been reconfigured to match the Mirror Dungeon variant.

- Tuesday [Sloth] : Shock Centipede
► HP of the Parts (Body, Head) will be lowered.
► The effect that gives 10 Self-charge upon death will be removed.
► The Passive Skill, 'Living Nerves', will be removed.
※ Effect: Upon death, all Skills are cancelled for the turn. Doubles currently owned Self-charge.

- Wednesday [Gluttony] : Wayward Passenger
► The Abnormality's HP will be lowered.
The HP for its Parts(Left Blade, Right Blade) will be lowered accordingly.
► The HP of each Dimension's Core and Part(Body) will be lowered.
► Gluttony Affinity will now have Advantage in its Choice Event check.

- Thursday [Gloom] : Ardor Blossom Moth
► The Abnormality's HP will be lowered.
The HP for its Parts(Body, Wings) will be lowered accordingly.
► The Abnormality's Part (Body) will gain an additional Stagger Threshold.
► The Skill "Ardor Blossom Star" will have lowered Base and Coin Powers.
► The Abnormality will gain a new Passive 'Supply Resources'.
※ Effect : When the Wings Part is broken, gain 2 E.G.O Resource of all Affinity and heal all Sinners' SP by 15
► Non-Wrath Affinities, instead of Wrath, will gain Advantages in this Abnormality's Choice Event.

- Friday [Pride] : Ebony Queen's Apple
► The Abnormality's HP will be lowered.
The HP for its Parts(Root, Left Arm, Right Arm) will be lowered accordingly.
► The Abnormality's Parts (Root, Left Arm, Right Arm) will gain an additional Stagger Threshold, and will now have lowered Speed.
► The Skill "Envying Roots" will no longer inflict additional Bleed and Rupture Counts.
► The Abnormality will no longer have the Passive "One Sole Root"

► Envy Affinity will now have Advantage in its Choice Event check.

- Sunday [Wrath] : Rose Hunter
► The Abnormality's Part (Body) will gain an additional Stagger Threshold.
► Wrath Affinity will now have Advantage in its Choice Event check.

title: Preliminary Notice: Difficulty Adjustment for Thread Luxcavation #5
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

We have identified that the difficulty of the new Thread Luxcavation added with the Jan. 8th update was set higher than intended.

As Luxcavations are designed as daily challenges, we are currently reviewing tests and live gameplay data to prepare difficulty adjustments so that our Managers can engage the content more comfortably.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused by the unoptimized difficulty setting of the Thread Luxcavation.

However, immediate deployment of the adjustments is difficult, as it may affect the system stability of Canto 9 <Part 3> development and requires that we conduct a more thorough testing for proper adjustment of values. For this reason, the difficulty adjustment for Thread Luxcavation is scheduled to be implemented in the Jan. 15 Scheduled Update.

We kindly ask for your patience and understanding.

Further details will be announced via a separate notice.

title: (Steam) Notice: Game Update Following Crashing Issue in ver. 1.95.0
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

An issue was identified that could block game progression following the ver. 1.95.0 update on Jan. 8.
To address this issue, the game will be updated to ver. 1.95.1.

This update will be applied first to the Steam version.

For mobile platforms (AOS, iOS), updates must undergo each store's review process, making it difficult to deploy the fixes immediately.

For Managers playing the game on mobile platform, we recommend playing on Steam until AOS and iOS version updates are deployed.

We will announce via a separate notice once the update becomes available on these platforms.

Please refer to the details below for more information.

[ Issue Details ]

1. An issue where the game may crash when combat cinematics are played in certain combat Stages
※ Affected Combat Stages:
- Main Story Chapter 7 Final Combat Stage
- Main Story Chapter 8 Final Combat Stage

2. An issue where special battle cinematics do not play
※ Affected Combat Stage:
Main Story Chapter 9 (Part 1) – Final Combat Stage
※ For Main Story Chapter 9 (Part 1)'s Final Combat Stage, the game may skip the battle cinematics instead of crashing.

[ Cause of the Issue ]

- We have identified an error in the logic design during the implementation of new special battle cinematics specifications, which resulted in excessive system resource usage, causing the client to close unexpectedly.

[ Issue Fix ]

- We have reverted the logic that caused the issue to the previous stable version. In order to prevent errors in game content and systems, the new battle cinematics have been separated from the existing logic and redesigned under a dedicated structure.

[ Future Measures ]
- Going forward, we will improve stability by introducing cross-checking procedures when implementing new specifications, involving not only the developer-in-charge but also other participating staff.
- We will also strengthen verification and testing procedures to ensure that changes applied to existing content do not introduce new issues.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused to your battle progression and story immersion, and will endeavor to provide a more stable service environment.

[ Version Update Schedule ]
- Date: After Jan. 9th (Fri), 00:30 (KST)
- There may be a delay of approximately 10 minutes.

※ Please note that following a successful update installation, the version number displayed at the bottom-right of the title screen will show 1.95.1.

[ Compensation for the Jan. 8th Update Issue ]
- Content: Lunacy ×1,000
- Recipients: All users whose game accounts were created before Jan. 15th, 2026, 10:00 (KST)
- When: After Jan. 9th (Fri), 2026, 00:30 (KST)

Error Compensation can be claimed until 2026, Jan. 15th (Thu) 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

- Contents : Takeoff Module - ID Uptie x 1, Identity Training
Ticket IV x 80, Identity Training Ticket III x 20
- Price : ₩33,000 / $21.99 / ¥3,000
- Can be purchased once
- Purchasable Period : 26. 1. 8 12:00 ~ 1. 22 10:00 (KST)

Season Update: Part 2 Changes
-----------------------------

1. Gradual Main Story & Battle Pass Updates
Main Story Canto 9 - <Part 2>, Season 7 Limbus Pass - 蜘蛛ノ糸ノ赤
[Kumo no ito • oti on akA] <Part 2> Unlocked

2. New Thread Luxcavation Added
Clear a certain Stage of Canto 9 - <Part 2> to
unlock Thread Luxcavation #5.

※ Things to Note
Thread Luxcavation #5 has separate, rotating Stages based on
Sin Affinities. They each open on the following days:
- Lust: Mon
- Sloth: Tue
- Gluttony: Wed
- Gloom: Thu
- Pride: Fri
- Envy: Sat
- Wrath: Sun

Each Sin Affinity has first-time clear rewards. Clear the stage to
unlock the skip functionality for that specific Sin Affinity.

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Adjusted application so that when additional downloads such as hotfixes are
deployed, the game would first shut down before proceeding with the
additional in-game download to ensure data and application stability
※ We have identified an issue where additional in-game downloads
could sometimes be improperly disabled or loaded. To prevent this issue,
we have made it so that, after an additional download
has been deployed, the game will shut down after a pop-up notice.
※ This adjustment is a temporary preventative measure against the issue.
We will inform you via a notice when this issue has been resolved.

► Fixed an issue where the effect "Your Will Guides My Blade.",
which The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu applies to other allies with his
Defense Skill, could be stacked multiple times under certain conditions
※ As this buff's effectiveness does not change with its
Stack, this change does not affect its actual behavior.

► Fixed an issue where, in a certain Stage and under certain conditions,
using Lobotomy E.G.O::Magic Bullet Outis's Skill 3 could cause the game to crash

► Adjusted the Max Stack for a certain Canto 9 enemy's effect
※ Relevant effect : The Duel Escalates
- Before : Max Stack: 99
- After : Max Stack: 20

► Fixed an issue where, in a certain Canto 9 Stage, Severing an
enemy's Part does not change the enemy's Sprite resource

► Fixed an issue where clearing a Main Story combat encounter after using the
"Retry Stage" function would cause the post-battle story cutscene to be skipped
※ This was the issue we had temporarily addressed by deploying a hotfix to
disable the Retry Stage function. After the Jan. 8th Scheduled Update,
using the Retry Stage function to clear an encounter
does not cause the post-battle cutscene to be skipped.

► Fixed an issue where, under certain conditions,
Main Story Stage 7-36 final boss battle could be softlocked

► Fixed an issue where the actual value of Skill 2 damage boost provided by
E.G.O Gift “High-risk Operation Gear” does not match its description
※ Relevant effect : Limbus Company Identities:
Skill 2 gains Offense Level +2 and deals +20% damage
- Before : The damage boost value was 25%, not 20% as written in the description
- After : Adjusted the damage boost value to 20%, as written in the description

► Fixed an issue where certain effects of the E.G.O Gift
"Sanguine Fragrance Descends" did not work as described
※ Relevant effect : The ally with the least HP before Combat Start heals 3% HP
On Hit with Attack Skills that apply Bleed or Unique Bleed (2 times per turn)
- Before : The "2 times per turn" effect activated "2 times per Encounter" instead
- After : Adjusted the behavior so that it activates 2
times per turn, as written in the description

► Fixed an issue where, if the player used the Skip Combat function in
Canto 4, the story remained inaccessible via the "Theater" window

► Fixed an issue where, if enemy Parts are either Severed,
untargetable, or hidden, the Skill Slot UI would show an Aggro value
※ While they may appear to be labeled with Aggro values,
they do not actually have any actual Aggro; this issue is purely visual.

► (EN, JP Only) Fixed an issue where, if the enemy's Panic Type
was changed into "Blue Sand," the new Panic Type description
visible in their Sanity tabs appeared untranslated

► Addressed the issue where certain story illustrations
did not match their counterparts in the Theater window

► Fixed an issue where "Blunt" Attack Type in EXP
Luxcavation #9 did not have a thumbnail image

► Fixed an issue where, when viewing separate windows such as the
Identity Detailed Info UI, the Prescript-related effects would linger

► Standardized the texts for a certain Keyword
※ Affected units : Vergilius, Lei Heng, The Thumb East Capo IIII Meursault

► Disabled Settings window interactivity if the player is defeated
while the Settings window is open in an Encounter
with the Stage Continue function activated.

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before
10:00 Jan. 15th, 2026 (KST)
- When : After Jan. 8th, 2026 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Jan 15th (Thu) 2026,
10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.
- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change depending on the status of maintenance. If such a change occurs, we will let you know in a follow-up notice.
- A resource download may be prompted after the build update. If you're using a mobile device, it is recommended to proceed with a Wi-Fi connection.
- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account. Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: Notice: Known Issues After Ver. 1.94.0 Hotfix
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

After deploying a Hotfix on Dec. 31st, 2025, 16:10 (KST) to address some of the previously identified issues in Dec. 31st Scheduled Update,
We have identified additional issues regarding game progression.

[ The Issue]
► The game becomes inaccessible after the 16:10 Hotfix

[ Sequence of actions that may trigger this issue ]
1. While playing the game, the download pop-up appears and the player is returned to the title screen.
2. The player downloads the update from the title screen.
3. The player is returned to the "Window" tab.
4. Various in-game resources such as "Team Loadout," "Combat" become glitched, causing the game to become softlocked

[Temporary Workaround]
The game can be played normally upon closing the application completely and restarting.
Please restart the game if you have experienced the issues above.

We are currently in the middle of identifying the causes of the issue and resolving them.
Details will be shared via a separate notice.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Notice: Known Issues in Ver. 1.94.0 & Hotfix Deployment ETA
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

We would like to inform you about the issues that were identified after the Dec. 31st, 2025 Scheduled Update and the relevant Hotfix deployment ETA.

Please continue reading for more information.

[ Issues that will be resolved with the Hotfix ]

► "Retry Stage" function disabled in Main Story combat Encounters
※ We have identified an issue where, when progressing through the combat Encounters of the Main Story, using the "Retry Stage' function to clear a Stage causes the game to skip the post-battle story.
To prevent story content from being accidentally skipped, we will be deploying a Hotfix to temporarily disable the "Retry Stage" function in Main Story combat Encounters.
※ Please note that the "Retry Stage" function in the Refraction Railway or the Mirror Dungeon will not be disabled.

► Fixed the typo in Limbus Pass Package purchase confirmation pop-up window concerning the Identity Level Boost ticket
- Before : Identity Level Boost Ticket V
- After : Identity Level Boost Ticket VI
※ This is a text-only correction; purchasing this package will yield "Identity Level Boost Ticket VI" as intended.

► (EN Only) Fixed an issue where, in The Index Proselyte:【Paper Slip】Faust's Skill description, a certain instance of "Poise" was mislabeled as "Breath"
- Before : Breath
- After : Poise

[Hotfix ETA]
- Dec. 31st (Wed) 16:10(KST)
- There may be a 10-minute margin of time difference.

※ The Hotfix will be deployed upon restarting the game, and does not require a separate client update. However, please note that additional in-game downloads may occur.

[Issues that will be resolved via Scheduled Update]

► Reapplication of the "Retry Stage" function in Main Story Combat Encounters
※ In addition to this, we will also address the issue where post-battle story is skipped upon clearing a Stage using this function.

(Cause of the Issue)
- When re-entering a Main Story combat Encounter using the "Retry Stage" feature, the system fails to properly play the post-clear cutscene.
(Issue Fix)
- The system will be adjusted to reference the initial Stage entry data when re-entering a Stage so that using the "Retry Stage" function will allow the post-clear cutscene to play correctly.

► An issue where, in a certain Stage and under certain conditions, using Lobotomy E.G.O::Magic Bullet Outis's Skill 3 causes the game to softlock

(Cause of the Issue)
- This issue occurs due to an error in the skill animation logic when Lobotomy E.G.O::Magic Bullet Outis's Skill 3, 'Magic Bullet Fire', changes to attack indiscriminately after winning a Clash against an enemy equipped with Clashable Guard, and said enemy is selected as the main target
(Issue Fix)
- The skill animation for 'Magic Bullet Fire' will be fixed to include all attack targets and function properly as intended.

Issues Currently Under Investigation

► An issue where, on certain devices, Stage 9-3 appears blurry
※ We are currently investigating this issue. Should we identify the cause and resolve this issue, we will announce it via a separate notice.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

Season Update <Part 1> Changes
------------------------------

Refraction Railway Line 5 will be carried over to Season 7 upon claiming.
The rest will be automatically converted to Thread-related currencies (rounded up).

2. Gradual Main Story & Battle Pass Updates
Main Story Canto 9 - <Part 1> and Season 7 Limbus Pass - 蜘蛛ノ糸ノ赤
[Kumo no ito • oti on akA] <Part 1> will be unlocked.

Major Changes
-------------

1. Story Combat Encounters - Even if the player exits the Encounter
via options such as “Forfeit Stage”, the Enkephalin spent to enter
that Stage will be fully refunded, instead of refunding 1 less.
- Before : If the player forfeits a 20-Enkephalin
Encounter, 19 Enkephalin was refunded
- After : If the player forfeits a 20-Enkephalin
Encounter, 20 Enkephalin will be refunded

2. Story Combat Encounters - “Retry Stage” option has been added.
※ This is the same “Retry Stage’ function in Refraction Railways
and Mirror Dungeons, now available when playing through
Story Combat Encounters as well.
※ Please note that choosing the “Retry Stage” option will
bring you back to the first turn of the first wave in that Encounter.

3. “Stage Continue” function will be expanded to
Canto 9’s Combat Encounters.
※ The “Stage Continue” function, which was previously available
only in Stage 8-30 and 8-33, will be available from all Combat
Encounters of Canto 9 as well.
※ For more detailed information regarding the Stage Continue
function, please review our previous Scheduled Update Notice.
[Post 25/12/08 - 2025, Dec. 11th Scheduled Update Notice]

Bug Fixes and Improvements
--------------------------

► (JP only) Fixed the description of the enemy’s Skill effect in Stage 8-30
- Before : 対象の火傷と振動の合計6につき、コインダメージ量 +1 (最大3)
- After : 対象の火傷と振動の合計6につき、コイン威力 +1 (最大3)
※ The effect concerned is functioning normally matching the “After”
version of the text. Only the Japanese text display will be corrected.

► Fixed a UI issue occurring when using ‘Level Boost Ticket’
on “LCB Sinner” Identities below Uptie Tier 2

► Fixed an issue where, when ‘Season N Uptie & Threadspinning only Shard
(Universal)’ currency is converted to ‘Thread’ on Season change currency carryover
pop-up, the displayed number did not properly show as the number reduced
※ The actual quantity reduced and converted is functioning
normally. Only the displayed text will be corrected.

► (iOS) Fixed an issue where App Store redirection failed to function
when the version update notice pop-up appears on the login screen

► (EN only) Fixed an issue where the highlighting of enhancement change
for the ‘Perfected Possibility’ under Grace of the Immortal Star in
Mirror Dungeon was not applied to the text concerned
※ The displayed text and actual behavior is
functioning properly. Only the highlight issue will be corrected.

► Number of effect icons displayed under the enemy sprite
during Focused Encounters has been increased from 5 to 6 per row.

Known Issues
------------

► An issue where the actual value of Skill 2 damage boost provided by
E.G.O Gift “High-risk Operational Gear” does not match its description
※ Relevant Effect : Limbus Company Identities:
Skill 2 gains Offense Level +2 and deals +20% damage
※ We identified an issue where the aforementioned E.G.O Gift’s Skill 2 damage
boost was applied as +25% instead of +20% as written. In the next update,
the damage boost provided by this effect will be
adjusted to accurately reflect the description.
※ The Skill 2 & Skill 3 damage boosting effects from the E.G.O Gift
“Regular Operational Gear” and Skill 3 damage boosting effect from
“High-risk Operational Gear” are all working as written in their descriptions.

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created
before Jan. 8th, 2026, 10:00 (KST)
- When : After Dec. 31st, 2025 (Wed) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes

- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.
- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change depending on the status of maintenance. If such a change occurs, we will let you know in a follow-up notice.
- A resource download may be prompted after the build update. If you're using a mobile device, it is recommended to proceed with a Wi-Fi connection.
- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account. Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: Guide on Season 7: Kumo no Ito • otI on akA
content:
-------------------------------------------

Greetings, dear Manager.

[Season 7: 蜘蛛ノ糸ノ赤] will commence on
Dec. 31, 2025, at 12:00 PM (KST).
This notice will provide information on
Season 7 and its new or adjusted systems.

Please note that the contents shown here are subject to change.
We will notify you again as each update is deployed.

Index
-----

1. Season 6 Egoshard Carryover
2. Gradual Main Story & Battle Pass Updates
3. Packages
4. Identity Level Cap Increased & Luxcavations
5. Season 7 Extractions
6. Season 7 Dispenser
7. Mirror Dungeon #7 In Development

1. Season 6 Egoshard Carryover
------------------------------

Guide on Season Changes - Egoshards
-----------------------------------
- When a new Season begins, half of the previous Season’s
Egoshards will be carried over (rounded up).
- The carryover rates for unconverted Egoshards from
multiple seasons past will be halved for each following Season.
- The remaining Egoshards are converted into Thread.
- Egoshard Crates (both random and nominable)
will be carried over in the same way.

As per the information above,
half of the currencies listed below will be converted to Season 7’s.

- Season 6 [Sinner]’s Egoshards
- Season 6 Uptie & Threadspinning only Shards (Universal)
- Season 6 Egoshard Crate
- Season 6 Nominable Egoshard Crate

The carryover of currencies to Season 7 will automatically
occur the first time you log into the game during Season 7.
A popup will show how much previous Season’s Egoshard relevant
currency you owned, and how they have been converted.

※ Previous Season’s Identity Egoshard currencies that are
still in the Mailbox or in the Lost & Found will be carried over
when they are claimed. Carryover to Season 7 currency will occur
as soon as they are claimed, and currencies that were not
carried over will be converted to Thread-related currencies.

※ If the Season 5 currency obtainable from Refraction Railway Line 5
is claimed in Season 7, 1/4 of that currency will be carried over to
Season 7. (rounded up) Currencies that were not carried
over will be converted to Thread-related currencies.

2. Gradual Main Story & Battle Pass Updates
-------------------------------------------

Chapter 9 of the main story and the
Season 7 Pass will be updated in 3 parts.

► 12/31
- Main Story Ch. 9 《Part 1》
- Season 7 Pass Rewards 《Lv. 1 ~ Lv. 20》

► 1/8
- Main Story Ch. 9 《Part 2》
- Season 7 Pass Rewards 《Lv. 21 ~ Lv. 40》

► 1/15
- Main Story Ch. 9 《Part 3》
- Season 7 Pass Rewards 《Lv. 41 ~ Lv. 120 (Max Pass Level)》
- Season 7 Pass Max Pass Level+ Rewards

Accumulated Pass Levels are continuously tracked
regardless of the gradual updates.
When the subsequent updates unlock the rewards for higher
Pass Levels, you can immediately claim them up to your
accumulated Pass Level.

Max Pass Level rewards earned for leveling up the Pass past
the max Pass Level are also kept track of even when they aren’t
unlocked, and you can claim the accumulated Season 7 Nominable
Egoshard Crates immediately once they are made available.

Chapter 9 stage progression rewards and Max Pass Level rewards
will become available to claim with the Jan. 15th update,
when 《Part 3》 of this chapter is added.

► Notice : Scheduled Update Date
Changes & Weekly Rewards (Time in KST)

Due to New Year's holidays on 2026, Jan. 1st, the Scheduled Update
will not be deployed on Thursdays for that week.
Instead, the Scheduled Update will be deployed on Wednesday,
Dec. 31st, a day earlier than our usual time.

※ Scheduled Update Date Changes
- Before : 2026, Jan. 1st (Thu) 06:00
- After : 2025, Dec. 31st (Wed) 06:00

While Season 7 Update and Season 7 Limbus Pass will be deployed
on Dec. 31st (Wed), Weekly Missions & Mirror Dungeon
Weekly Bonus resets will occur on
Jan. 1st (Thu) 06:00 (KST), the same time as usual.

In order to minimize confusion, we have prepared the
following chart to determine which Season’s Pass
EXP will be obtainable between Dec. 25th 12:00 ~ Jan. 8th 06:00
via Weekly Missions and Mirror Dungeon Weekly Bonuses.

► 2025/12/25 12:00 ~ 2026/1/8 06:00
Weekly Missions & Weekly Bonus Pass EXP Distribution

[ 12/25 12:00 ~ 12/31 05:59(KST) ]
- Weekly Missions : Clearing Weekly Missions grants Season 6 Pass EXP
- Mirror Dungeon Weekly Bonuses : Using Weekly Bonuses grants extra Season 6 Pass EXP

[ 12/31 12:00 ~ 1/1 05:59(KST) ]
- Weekly Missions : Weekly Mission Reset - Yes. Clearing Weekly Missions grants Season 7 Pass EXP
- Mirror Dungeon Weekly Bonuses : Weekly Bonus Reset - No. Using Weekly Bonuses grants extra Season 7 Pass EXP

[ 1/1 06:00 ~ 1/8 05:59(KST) ]
- Weekly Missions : Weekly Mission Reset - Yes. Clearing Weekly Missions grants Season 7 Pass EXP
- Mirror Dungeon Weekly Bonuses : Weekly Bonus Reset - Yes. Using Weekly Bonuses grants extra Season 7 Pass EXP

3. Packages
-----------

With the Season 7 Update, the following 2
new packages will be added to the game.

- Season 7 Commencement Lunacy Pack
[ Package Title ] Season 7 Commencement Lunacy Pack
[ Contents ] Paid Lunacy 1300
[ Price ] ₩15,000 / $10.99 / ¥1,500

※ We recommend this Package for Managers who seek to purchase only the Battle Pass.
(Battle Pass Price : Paid Lunacy x1300)

- Season 7 Settler Supplies
[ Package Title ] Season 7 Settler Supplies
[ Contents ] Lunacy (Paid) x5040, Decaextraction Ticket x3, Identity Training Ticket IV x80, Identity Training Ticket III x20, Thread x80, Season 7 Nominable Egoshard Crate x 40
[ Price ] ₩99,000 / $69.99 / ¥10,000

The following are the prices for the Battle Pass & Battle Pass Package.

- Battle Pass
[ Package Title ] Limbus Pass
[ Contents ] Battle Pass Rewards (maxes out at Lv. 120), Battle Pass Max Pass Level EX Rewards
[ Price ] Paid Lunacy x 1300

[ Package Title ] Limbus Pass Package (when purchased separately)
[ Contents ] Special Banner x1, Level Boost Ticket VI x1, +10 Battle Pass Level
[ Price ] Paid Lunacy x 1700

[ Package Title ] Limbus Pass Package (when purchased together)
[ Contents ] Battle Pass Rewards (maxes out at Lv. 120), Battle Pass Max Pass Level EX Rewards, Special Banner x1, Level Boost Ticket VI x1, +10 Battle Pass Level
[ Price ] Paid Lunacy x 2700

※ When purchased separately, the total cost of
Limbus Pass and Limbus Pass Package is 3,000 Paid Lunacy.
※ However, when purchased together, the total cost of Limbus Pass and Limbus Pass
Package is 2,700 Paid Lunacy, making it a cheaper option
if you intend to purchase them both.

► EXP-related Pack Adjustment Early Notice
With the increased Identity Level Cap, the required EXP for Identities has also
been increased. In accordance with this change, with Season 7 Update,
contents of the Packs with Identity EXP resources will be adjusted.

More detailed information will be shared via
the Dec. 31st Scheduled Update Notice.

---------------------------------------------

<New EXP Luxcavation>

EXP Luxcavation #9 has separate, rotating Slash, Pierce,
and Blunt Stages. They each open on the following days:
- Slash : Mon, Tue, Sun
- Pierce : Wed, Thu, Sun
- Blunt : Fri, Sat, Sun

Each Attack Type Stage has first-time clear rewards, and clearing

[ Without Daily Bonuses ] Thread x9

5. Season 7 Extractions
-----------------------

Guide on Season Changes - Extractions
-------------------------------------

title: Known Issues after the Dec. 18th Scheduled Update and Hotfix for ver. 1.93.0
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

In Ver. 1.93.0, updated Dec. 18th, 2025, we have identified an issue with R Corp. 4th Pack Reindeer Rodion's Passive Skill description.
Please refer to the below regarding details of the issue and the scheduled hotfix.

[Known Issues]

► (KR only) Fixed the description of R Corp. 4th Pack Reindeer Rodion's Passive Skill 'Jolly Antlers'
- Before : 기본 공격 스킬 사용시 대상에게 침잠이 없으면
- After : 기본 공격 스킬 사용시 메인 타겟에게 침잠이 없으면

※ As previously announced, the effect applies to the "main target" in actual behavior.
The text adjustment is intended to clarify the behavior of the skill more accurately.

However, after the notice was made public and the Scheduled Update was deployed, we found out that the correction for the Korean text was not implemented in the Build version, which means that the Korean text adjustment was omitted from the Live version of the game.

As they are correctly labeled as 'Main Target', in both English and Japanese versions of the game, it is difficult for us to adjust the Passive's behavior to match the Korean version of the text.

We decided to explain in detail how we came to the decision to adjust a Standard Fare Identity's Passive behavior to match the description, as it may appear as though we are going against our immediately preceding notice in which we explained that we would adjust the behavior to match the description going forward.

We sincerely apologize for this repeated mistake, and will pay closer attention to ensuring that the information we share in our announcement is not missing from the game.

[Hotfix ETA]
- Dec. 18th (Thu) 15:10 (KST)
- There may be a 10-minute margin of time difference.

※ The Hotfix will be deployed upon restarting the game, and does not require a separate client update. However, please note that additional in-game downloads may occur.

Thank you.

title: Dec. 15th New Identity & Error Fix Additional Notice
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

Along with an updated Skill set preview for R Corp. 4th Pack Reindeer Rodion, we would like to share some additional information regarding the Heishou Pack - Wei Branch Don Quixote issue fix.

Please continue reading for more information.

► Adjusted description for R Corp. 4th Pack "Jolly Antlers"
※ Relevant Effect : When using a Base Attack Skill that inflicts Sinking Potency, if the target does not have Sinking, this unit gains Sinking and multiplies the amount of Sinking Potency the Skill applies by X

- Before : if the target does not have Sinking
- After : if the "main" target does not have Sinking

※ The effect behaves as per the "After" description; however, the older description could make it unclear as to who the "target" is. Therefore, we have updated the Identity's Passive description to better explain who the condition is referring to.

► Fixed an issue with Heishou Pack - Wei Branch Don Quixote: Skill 3's 4th Coin
※ Relevant Effect: If target has any of the Panic type changing effects, inflict +3 Sinking Count (once per turn)
- Before : The additional effect of the 4th Coin activated even when no Panic type changing effect was on the target in the current turn
- After : Fixed the behavior of the effect to match the text so that the aforementioned effect activates when target has Panic type changing effect in the current turn

※ As we shared on the Scheduled Update Notice today, we fixed the issue where the unit inflicts Sinking Count even when the target does not have a "Panic type changing" effect in this turn, because it incorrectly counted the "Inflict 3 Shattermark next turn" as meeting the condition for this effect to activate.

※ Our general policy regarding Identity or E.G.O ability issues was to change the behavior to match the text as much as possible.
This was because we determined that players' expectations for acquiring them would be based on their actual descriptions.
If we were to change the description after you have already obtained the Identity or E.G.O, it would blur the point of reference, potentially becoming a cause for confusion.

Also, the descriptions were based on each Identity/E.G.O's intended behavior from the design phase; meaning that, if the description were to be changed to fit the behavior, it would cause a potential conflict with the design intent.

Considering this, if similar discrepancies between Identity or E.G.O's actual behaviors and descriptions occur again, we intend to prioritize adhering to the description first unless there are specific reasons to do otherwise.

However, for special cases such as Walpurgis Night or Collaboration Limited Extractions Identities or E.G.O, we have been considering their unique nature as limited Extractions, and have made exceptions to correct the descriptions to match the behaviors.

Due to the frequency of our error notices, we understand that we have repeatedly let down our Managers and have reduced your faith in our development and review process.
We feel a deep sense of regret that, despite our apologies in every announcement, we have been constantly making these mistakes.
Currently, we are once again reviewing our design-implementation-review process, and we have conducted an internal meeting regarding where and how these mistakes can occur.
We will continue to strive to improve our processes and rebuild your faith in our results.
Once again, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience and disappointment caused by our repeated errors.

For these repeated errors and corrections, we would like to send a compensation to our Managers as a token of our apology.
It will be distributed on December 18th, 12:00 (KST), simultaneously with the end of our Scheduled Update.
Please continue reading for more information.

[Heishou Pack - Wei Branch Don Quixote Error Fix Compensation]
- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before Dec. 24th, 2025 10:00 (KST)
- When : After Dec. 18th, 2025 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account
Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Dec. 24th (Wed), 2025 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

title: Lobotomy E.G.O::In the Name of Love and Hate Don Quixote & Don Quixote Electric Screaming E.G.O Error & Subsequent Measures
content:
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Hello, this is Project Moon.

We have identified an issue regarding Love/Hate Potency for 'Lobotomy E.G.O::In the Name of Love and Hate Don Quixote' & 'Don Quixote Electric Screaming E.G.O'. The following are the details of the error and our subsequent measures to address it.

We initially intended to maintain the current state as is without correcting the issue, because we wanted to avoid making it appear like a nerf. However, we have realized that the more Skills that consume Love/Hate and Charge Count are used, the Potency could grow excessively fast, so we intend to correct this issue.

By fixing the bug and changing the Skill to work as written, we understand that the players' weeklong experience with this unit will be negatively affected; therefore, we intend to buff the unit's Skills so that the experience is largely similar.

As fixing the above issue could slow down the ramp-up speed for Lobotomy E.G.O::In the Name of Love and Hate Don Quixote, we decided to buff certain parts of the Identity by ensuring that effects that are proportional to its Love/Hate Potency can be ramped up as before, and by raising the unit's damage cap.

We sincerely apologize for this issue that can heavily affect a Walpurgis Night Identity. Also, we would like to express our sincerest apologies for causing confusion and disappointment in our managers due to these issues.

Please continue reading for more information.

Error Details
-------------

※ In this announcement, for the sake of readability, we will be calling Love/Hate "Charge".

1) Lobotomy E.G.O::In the Name of Love and Hate Don Quixote

※ Relevant Effect : Gain 1 Love/Hate every time this unit consumes 10 cumulative Love/Hate Count in this Encounter

► Fixed an issue where, regardless of the amount of Charge Potency gained, the "Cumulatively Consumed Charge Count" was spent only 10 at a time

The issue with this passive was that the "Cumulatively Consumed Charge Count" reset that needs to occur upon gaining Charge Potency was missing. ("Cumulatively Consumed Charge Count" is an internally tracked value that is exclusively used to calculate the Charge Potency gain based on Charge Count.)

This means that, when gaining 2 or more Charge Potency at once, which is supposed to spend 20 of the "Cumulatively Consumed Charge Count" (because it needs to be Charge Potency gained x 10), it spends only 10 of it. In other words, the remaining "Cumulatively Consumed Charge Count" was carried over to the next instance of Charge Potency gain.

Maintaining this error without fixing it means that, in more extreme examples, some instances of gaining Charge Potency could cause the game to read "31 Cumulatively Consumed Charge Count" instead of "1 Cumulatively Consumed Charge Count" when only a single Charge Count has been consumed, thereby granting 3 Charge Potency despite spending only 1 Charge Count. This could excessively increase the speed at which Charge Potency is gained, which is why we intend to fix this issue.

<Issue Example>

Consumes 20 Charge Count
------------------------------------------------------------
Cumulatively Consumed Charge Count : 20
Charge Potency gained              : 2
Remaining Consumed Charge Count    : 10
Resulting Charge Potency           : 3

Consumes 20 Charge Count
------------------------------------------------------------
Cumulatively Consumed Charge Count : 10 + 20 = 30
Charge Potency gained              : 3
Remaining Consumed Charge Count    : 20
Resulting Charge Potency           : 6

Consumes 10 Charge Count
------------------------------------------------------------
Cumulatively Consumed Charge Count : 20 + 10 = 30
Charge Potency gained              : 3
Remaining Consumed Charge Count    : 20
Resulting Charge Potency           : 9

Consumes 1 Charge Count
------------------------------------------------------------
Cumulatively Consumed Charge Count : 20 + 1 = 21
Charge Potency gained              : 2
Remaining Consumed Charge Count    : 11
Resulting Charge Potency           : 11

► Fixed an issue where Charge Potency can be gained only by Charge Count consumed by Skills

There is an issue here where only Charge Count consumed by Skills can be used to raise one's Charge Potency, which means that other Charge Count-consuming effects, such as E.G.O Gifts or Buffs (such as Near-light Superbattery), did not raise the Charge Potency, so we intend to fix it.

2) Don Quixote Electric Screaming E.G.O Corrosion Skill

※ Relevant Effects : Spend up to 20 Charge Count to deal +5% damage for every spent Charge Count (max 100%)

► Fixed an issue where, upon activating the above effect, the effect that activates when consuming Charge Count triggers twice at once

The Charge Count consuming or damage-raising effects were working as intended. However, the issue was that this E.G.O could consume Charge Counts twice at once when used in conjunction with the other Identities & E.G.O Gifts.

This means that, when Lobotomy E.G.O::In the Name of Love and Hate Don Quixote was used alongside this E.G.O, this E.G.O could be used to raise double the amount of Charge Potency as it triggered twice in a row. Maintaining this error also means that it has the potential to affect the upcoming Identities or E.G.O, so we intend to correct this issue.

Once again, we sincerely apologize for the confusion and inconvenience caused by these errors with Identities and E.G.O.

Skill Changes
-------------

1) Skill 2 - With Love! Hyah!

- Before

UT2 : [On Use] Deal +6% damage for every Love/Hate (max 30%)
UT4 : [On Use] Deal +10% damage for every Love/Hate (max 50%)

- After

UT2 : [On Use] Deal +7.5% damage for every Love/Hate (max 30%)
UT4 : [On Use] Deal +12.5% damage for every Love/Hate (max 75%)

2) Skill 3 - Arcana Beats!! / Minor Arcana Slave!!!

- Before

UT3
[On Use] At 3+ Love/Hate, deal +(Love/Hate x 15)% damage (max 75%)
[On Use] At 3+ Love/Hate, Base Power +1

UT4
[On Use] At 3+ Love/Hate, deal +(Love/Hate x 20)% damage (max 100%)
[On Use] At 3+ Love/Hate, Base Power +2

- After

UT3
[On Use] At 2+ Love/Hate, deal +(Love/Hate x 20)% damage (max 80%)
[On Use] At 2+ Love/Hate, Base Power +1

UT4
[On Use] At 2+ Love/Hate, deal +(Love/Hate x 25)% damage (max 125%)
[On Use] At 2+ Love/Hate, Base Power +2

3) Skill 3 - Reversed Beats / Reversed Arcana Slave

- Before

UT3 : [On Use] Deal +12% damage for every Love/Hate on self (max 60%)
UT4 : [On Use] Deal +24% damage for every Love/Hate on self (max 120%)

- After

UT3 : [On Use] Deal +15% damage for every Love/Hate on self (max 60%)
UT4 : [On Use] Deal +30% damage for every Love/Hate on self (max 150%)

Future Preventative Measures
----------------------------

- Improve the internal, mutual confirmation & communication process between relevant personnel

We will improve the communication process between the implementation personnel and other relevant individuals to ensure that we can identify any missing functions or unexpected issues that may occur when used in conjunction with other parts of the game.

Lobotomy E.G.O::In the Name of Love and Hate Don Quixote Error Compensation
---------------------------------------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x1300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Aug. 7th, 2025 (KST)
- When : After July 28th, 2025 (Mon) 21:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Error Compensation can be claimed until Aug. 7th, (Thu) 2025, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

title: Scheduled Update Notice
content:
-----------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter maintenance from 06:00 [AM] through 08:00 [AM] on March 9th, 2023 (KST) for system optimizations and content updates. Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost. Refer to below for details about the update.

Update Contents
---------------

1. New Identity Target Extraction (Mar 9 08:00 ~ Mar 23 05:59)

- N Corp. Großhammer Meursault
- N Corp. Mittelhammer Rodion

※ The earlier announcement we made on our official Twitter which said that it would be available from 6 o'clock failed to take the maintenance into consideration. We apologize for the confusion.

2. Major Changes

[Combat System]
- Skill slots can be added on the Dashboard between waves.
- Staggered units no longer have 0 speed.
- When a status effect that occurs next turn is first applied, the added Potency and Count will now be maintained after the effect is applied additional times.

[UI]
- Fixed an issue where Support Identities (from the Friend System) who were not selected to participate on the deployment screen could still join battle.
- Added a Keyword Highlight and tooltip display feature for Skills, Passives, and E.G.O Gift descriptions.
- Pressing and holding a button for adding or subtracting a number on the interface will now continue increasing or decreasing the number while it's held.
- You can now check the details of another user's support Identity in their Company Menu.
- Voicelines can now play after a while of idling on the Window (Main Menu).
- Fixed an incorrect description for New Manager’s Welcome Extraction (3★ Identity assured in 20 Extractions) → (3★ Identity or E.G.O assured in 20 Extractions)

3. Bug Fixes and Improvements

- Fixed an issue where the contents of a purchased in-game item were not being provided
This issue was fixed with version 1.1.0 on Android and iOS platforms.
If you experience the same issue on the version, please close and restart the game.
If you experience related issues, please contact [limbussupport@projmoon.com].

- Fixed an issue where mail rewards may be given multiple times or not at all
Test mail will be sent out before providing the update gifts.
If you experience related issues, please contact [limbussupport@projmoon.com].

- Fixed an issue with multiple clicks or taps in quick succession during Extraction
- Fixed an issue where certain Battle Pass missions could not be completed
- Fixed an issue where <R Corp. 4th Pack Rabbit> Heathcliff's Combat Passive [Raring to Graze] gave Charge Potency instead of Charge Count
- Fixed an issue where the third Coin on <Blade Lineage Salsu> Yi Sang's skill [Flank Thrust] always activated its effect regardless of whether it landed a critical hit
- Fixed an issue where <Zwei Section 6> Sinclair's skill [Strong Strike] did not properly apply Protection
- Fixed an issue with target discrimination for the following E.G.O skills: Hex Nail, Pursuance, Ardor Blossom Star, 4th Match Flame (Rodion), Ya Śūnyatā Tad Rūpam, Legerdemain
- Fixed an issue where bursting Tremor did not work properly
- Fixed an issue with the tooltip for Poise
- Fixed an issue where attacking with insufficient Ammo occasionally caused the game to freeze
- Win rate prediction now takes base power and Coin power modifiers into account
- Fixed an issue where status effects were not being properly removed
- Fixed an issue where status effect parameters were sometimes being added incorrectly
- Fixed an issue where the Potency or Count of certain status effects could go beyond their set limits
- When an unbreakable part's HP reaches 0 and it is Staggered, it no longer recovers health and Stagger Threshold
- Fixed an issue where the same story scene would play twice while progressing to the next floor in main story dungeons
- Fixed an issue where the game would not progress when using the autoplay mode in certain story scenes
- Fixed an issue where defense skill info was not being displayed on the Identity info screen
- Fixed an issue where the scroll bar for the text box in checks did not work
- Fixed an issue where certain checks took effect on the wrong targets
- Fixed an issue where the visual effects for <R Corp. 4th Pack Rabbit> Heathcliff's Max Uptie artwork were not being shown properly
- Improvements for a number of framedrop issues
- Fixed an issue with the effects of certain E.G.O Gifts
- Fixed an issue with the conditional HP recovery Passives of certain Abnormalities
- Fixed an issue where a certain Abnormality that was forcibly Staggered would be Staggered again after it took enough damage for its HP to fall below a Stagger Threshold
- Fixed an issue where some text were being displayed in Korean while the language was set to English or Japanese
- Fixes and improvements for a number of UI display errors
- Various adjustments to English text

Update Gifts
------------

- Maintenance and Application Update Compensation: 300 Lunacy
- Recipients: All users whose game account was created before 06:00 March 9th, 2023 (KST)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.
- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change depending on the status of maintenance.
If such a change occurs, we will let you know in a follow-up notice.
- A resource download may be prompted after the build update.
If you're using a mobile device,
it is recommended to proceed with a Wi-Fi connection.
- If you're playing with a guest account,
we recommend that you link your account
with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account.
Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days.
Please redeem them within this timeframe.

title: Apology and Compensation for Incorrect Description in [New Manager’s Welcome Extraction]
content:
--------------------------------------------------

Hello.
This is Kim Jihoon, Director at Project Moon.

We have been made aware of the issue where the New Manager’s Welcome Extraction says "a 3★ Identity is assured in 20 Extractions", but the assured item can in fact be either a 3★ Identity or E.G.O.

The extraction was configured as such because we considered the value of E.G.O to be equivalent to or greater than that of a 3★ Identity as both cost 400 Egoshards to redeem, but we failed to correctly inform the player of the details, causing much confusion and inconvenience. We will quickly adjust the text to show as [3★ Identity/E.G.O assured in 20 Extractions] to prevent further confusion.

We will be more aware of clarity in descriptions so that they won't create confusion in the future. We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

Though we understand that it's not sufficient to make up for the discontent, we are planning to provide all players with a [3★ Guarantee Decaextraction Ticket].

Our staff is currently working hard to fix the issue with duplicate mail rewards as well.

Once again, we wish to make admissions and amends for our failings.

The issue with the description will be addressed by the March 9th update. Additionally, we will send out the gift ticket as soon as the issue with the mail system has been resolved.

Thank you.

- 1★ : LCB Sinner Outis
※ Please note that Target Extraction [Outis]
will end on Dec. 31st, 06:00 (KST).

3. New Identity Added
The following Identity will be added to the list of extractable Identities.
- 3★ : R Corp. 4th Pack Reindeer Rodion

4. New Packages
1 new limited package will be added to the game with the
Dec. 18th, 2025 (KST) Scheduled Update.

► Identity Growth Pack
- Contents : Takeoff Module - ID Uptie x 1, Identity Training
Ticket IV x 60, Identity Training Ticket III x 30
- Price : ₩33,000 / $21.99 / ¥3,000
- Can be purchased once
- Purchasable Period : 25. 12. 18 12:00 ~ 12. 31 10:00 (KST)

Major Changes
-------------

1. Clash forecast UI will be improved for when allies use Defense
Skills (Guard, Evade, Counter, Clashable Guard, Clashable Counter)
against enemy Counter, Clashable Guard, and Clashable Counter Skills
- Before : Forecast would say "Offset"
- After : Forecast now says "One-sided Guard"
※ The actual mechanisms regarding Offset have not been changed.
We sincerely apologize for the delayed fix to this forecast
UI issue regarding certain Defense Skills, and for the
gameplay inconveniences it has caused.

Bug Fixes and Improvements
--------------------------

► Fixed an issue with Heishou Pack -
Wei Branch Don Quixote: Skill 3's 4th Coin
※ Relevant Effect: If target has any of the Panic type
changing effects, inflict +3 Sinking Count (once per turn)
- Before : The additional effect of the 4th Coin activated even when
no Panic type changing effect was on the target in the current turn
- After : Fixed the behavior of the effect to match the text so
that the aforementioned effect activates when target has Panic
type changing effect in the current turn
※ Issue detail: Sinking Count on target increased due to the
"Inflict 3 Shattermark next turn" check even when no Panic type
changing effect was on the target in the current turn. The behavior
of the Skill has been fixed so that Sinking Count increases only
when the target has Panic type changing effect in the current turn.
We sincerely apologize for any confusion caused by this issue.
Going forward, we will improve our verification process of
buff/debuff application effects to prevent similar issues.

► (EN Only) Fixed a mistranslation in the description
of Molar Office Fixer Yi Sang's Support Passive
- Before : When 1 ally with the lowest Max HP triggers Tremor Burst
on an enemy, inflict 1 Defense Level Down per 4 Stagger Threshold
raised (Max 3 per 1 enemy every turn)
- After : When 1 ally with the lowest Max HP triggers Tremor Burst
on an enemy, inflict 1 Defense Level Down next turn per 4 Stagger
Threshold raised (Max 3 per 1 enemy every turn)
※ This is a text-only fix. The effect of the Support
Passive was functioning as intended.

Bug Fixes and Improvements
--------------------------

► Fixed an issue where E.G.O Gift 'W Corp. Standard Issue Cap'
did not apply its effect under certain conditions
※ Relevant Effect : After using a Skill that gains Charge Count or
Unique Charge, gain Emergency Barrier Battery equal to
the Count gained (max 7 per Identity)
※ Relevant Condition : When an Identity uses a Skill with the effect
'[Clash Lose] Gain Charge Count' and a Defense Skill with the effect
'Gain Charge Count' in the same turn
- Before : The Charge Count gained after losing a Clash was not
checked for W Corp. Standard Issue Cap's effect.
(Only the Charge Count gained via Defense Skill was checked)
- After : W Corp. Standard Issue Cap now checks the Charge
Count gained after losing a Clash

► Updated resources for certain Identities
that have the LCE logo image
※ Relevant Identities : LCE E.G.O::Lantern Yi Sang,
LCE E.G.O::Ardor Blossom Star Faust
※ The LCE logo on the armband illustration has now been
updated to match the version used in SD assets.

► Fixed an issue where Spine illustration effects did not play when
returning to the Manager Profile screen after switching to
Company/Friend List on the Manager Ticket screen

► Fixed an issue where, when replaying the ID acquisition footage by
pressing and holding the image set as your lobby illustration,
if the acquisition audio is longer than the length
of the acquisition video, it would get cut off mid-speech

► (EN Only) Addressed the issue where dialogue text did not
fully display before advancing when auto-playing story cutscenes

► Fixed an issue where, when enhancing the E.G.O Gift
"Broken Violin," its changes were not highlighted

► Fixed an issue so that the "New!" tag for Identity Acquisition would
not display when viewing the Mirror Dungeon Rental Team loadout

► Fixed an issue where the previous lobby Identity voicelines
continued playing and overlapped with the voiceline of the
changed lobby Identity under certain conditions

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before
Dec.24th, 2025 10:00 (KST)
- When : After Dec. 18th, 2025 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Dec.24th (Wed), 2025
10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.
- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change depending on the status of maintenance. If such a change occurs, we will let you know in a follow-up notice.
