- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account. Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: 2025, Dec. 11th Scheduled Update Notice
content:
----------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on Dec. 11th, 2025 (KST).

Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.

Please refer below for details about the update.

Stage Continue Function Added
-----------------------------

► Stage Continue function will be added for Main Story Stages 8-30 and 8-33.

[ Implementation Intent ]
- The Continue function will be added to address the story progression blockage issue caused by these battles' high level of difficulty, and to alleviate the fatigue caused by repeated attempts. Once the maintenance period ends, you may use the Continue function in high-difficulty Stages and avoid potential interruptions to the enjoyment of the story.

[ Continue Function Information ]
- Upon defeat, a pop-up window will appear, asking if you would like to use the Continue function by spending a certain amount of Lunacy. (The Continue option will be available only when the Continue function is toggled "On" in "Settings - General")

- The amount of Lunacy spent to continue the battle will remain the same and not scale with the number of Continues used in the Stage.

- Choosing to continue will revive all Sinners at max HP and SP and restore their Stagger Thresholds. The enemies' state will not be affected.

- Minus Coin-only Identities will be revived at -30 SP.

- Upon revival, all effects (such as buffs, debuffs, E.G.O Passives, etc) on the Identities will be reset, save for a few exceptions that are essential to each respective Stage.

- Upon revival, you will gain a certain amount of E.G.O resources added to the amount you had at the point Of defeat.

[ Notes ]
※ The Continue function spends Free Lunacy first. Paid Lunacy will be spent only when you do not have enough Free Lunacy to continue.

※ If, after using the Continue function, the player forfeits the Stage or if the game closes due to unexpected circumstances, any Lunacy spent to continue the battle will be restored. However, Lunacy spent to continue the battle will not be restored if the player completes the Stage after using the Continue function.

※ If 99 turns pass in a single Stage, or if the player does not have enough Lunacy to continue upon defeat, the Continue function will not be activated, and the battle will immediately end in defeat.

※ Clearing the Stage with the Continue function will not be counted as "Extra Conditions Fulfilled". Please clear the Stage without using the Continue function if you would like to complete the "Extra Conditions Fulfilled" challenge.

※ The Continue option is available only in Stages 8-30 and 8-33 at this moment; please note that its functions may be improved or expanded in the future.

Major Changes
-------------

1. Manager Level Cap Increase
The Manager Level Cap will be increased from 200 to 300.
※ Please note that Managers who have already reached Lv. 200 can receive all accumulated excess EXP by clearing any EXP-granting Stage after the Dec. 11th Scheduled Maintenance.

2. Extraction Notifications Improved
During periods when an Announcer is added to the list of Extractable items, the game will now show relevant notices in the Extraction rates and Extraction guide pop-ups.

3. Battle Announcer Voiceline Volume Adjustment
- Relevant Announcers: Jun, Lei Heng

※ Although the previous notice only included Lei Heng's voiceline volume adjustment, we have confirmed an identical issue with Jun as well. Both Announcers' voiceline volume will be adjusted.

Bug Fixes and Improvements
--------------------------

► Fixed an issue where a certain effect of W Corp. L4 Cleanup Agent - CCA Heathcliff's Skill 2 did not activate under specific situations.
※ Relevant Effect: [Combat Start] Gain Charge Barrier equal to (2 + Charge Potency on self) (max 6, 1 per turn)
- Before: When the Skill is used without Charge Potency on self, the Identity did not gain Charge Barrier
- After: Using Skill 2 without Charge Potency on self will now grant 2 Charge Barrier

► Fixed an issue where incorrect damage forecasts were displayed when enemies (inflicted with damage-lowering E.G.O or Skill effects such as Power Down or Paralyze) used Skills with the effect "fix damage dealt to 0 / deal 0 damage"
※ This issue did not affect the actual damage calculations. Only the displayed text will be fixed.

► Fixed an issue where Clash targeting in Focused Encounters would not function properly under certain conditions

► Fixed an issue where the Encounter would end in defeat if all allies except a certain Sinner died in Stage 8-33

► Fixed an issue where the story sequence would continue immediately after all allies are killed, preventing game progression in 7-36 Boss Stage

► Fixed an incorrect description for a certain effect in Main Story Canto 6
※ Relevant Effect: Superthermogenesis
※ The effect itself will not be changed; only the text displayed will be fixed to match the behavior.

► (JP Only) Improved the translation of Ricardo (Announcer)'s voiceline where a term could be misunderstood as story-related official terminology
- Before : 大姉貴
- After : 上の姉貴

► (JP Only) Fixed a typo for a certain effect in Main Story Chapter 8
※ Relevant Effect : Mutilated Memory

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before Dec. 18th, 2025 10:00 (KST)
- When : After Dec. 11th, 2025 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Dec. 18th (Thu), 2025 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.
- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change depending on the status of maintenance. If such a change occurs, we will let you know in a follow-up notice.
- A resource download may be prompted after the build update. If you're using a mobile device, it is recommended to proceed with a Wi-Fi connection.
- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account. Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: Notice: Lei Heng Announcer Voiceline Volume Adjustment
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

The following is an issue that has been identified after the 2025.12.04 Scheduled Update.

Please refer below for more information.

[Identified Issue]
- An issue where Lei Heng Announcer's voice plays at a noticeably lower volume than the other Announcers

[Cause of the Issue]
- We have found that lower-mid frequency voices may play quieter when overlapped with other in-game sound effects.

[Fixes]
- Lei Heng Announcer's voice volume has been slightly increased.

[Patch Deployment Schedule]
- The adjustment will be implemented with the 2025.12.11 Scheduled Update.

[Subsequent Measures]
- Going forward, we will be adjusting Announcer voice levels on a per-character basis so that they may be perceived at a consistent volume during playback.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

A new extractable Announcer will be added to the following extractions:

※ Please note that Announcer Extraction rate does not affect the Extraction rates of 3★ Identities or E.G.O.

※ 2★ and 1★ Identities have lower Extraction rates to make room for Announcer Extraction rates.

※ The Announcer above will no longer be extractable once the Extraction Period ends. However, you may acquire it via Yisang exchange available in subsequent Target Extractions (Does not apply to Standard Extraction as it does not allow Yisang Exchanges).

5. New Packages
2 new limited packages will be added to the game with the Dec. 4th, 2025 (KST) Scheduled Update.

- Contents : Decaextraction Ticket x4

- Can be purchased once

Identity Growth Pack
- Contents : Takeoff Module - ID Uptie x 1, Identity Training Ticket IV x 60, Identity Training Ticket III x 30
- Price : ₩33,000 / $21.99 / ¥3,000
- Can be purchased once
- Purchasable Period : 25. 12. 4 12:00 ~ 12. 18 10:00 (KST)

Bug Fixes and Improvements
---
► Fixed an issue where Skills that apply effects "when hit" were not affected by external value modifiers such as Support Passives or E.G.O Gifts
※ As there was no specific sequence in place to collect instances of effects triggered "when hit", we wrote a separate sequence for the "when hit" timing. However, in the process of doing so, we neglected to have their Potency/Count gains or losses be affected by external modifiers, which is what caused this issue. We have resolved this issue by adjusting the aforementioned separate sequence to also be affected by external effects "when hit".

※ Affected Identities (6 total)
- N Corp. E.G.O::Contempt,Awe Ryōshū : Defense Skill
- T Corp. Class 3 Collection Staff Don Quixote : Defense Skill
- R Corp. 4th Pack Rhino Meursault : Defense Skill
- Öufi South Section 3 Heathcliff : Defense Skill
- T Corp. Class 2 Collection Staff Rodion : Defense Skill
- The Thumb East Soldato II Sinclair : Defense Skill

※ This applies to enemy Skills that apply effects "when hit" as well.

► Fixed an issue where Don Quixote E.G.O Fluid Sac's Passive "Wave of Depression" effect dealt Gloom damage against targets with SP values as well in Focused Encounters
※This issue occurred because, in the process of adding this Passive, we set incorrect values for determining whether targets have SP or not in Focused Encounters. We have corrected the values for determining whether the targets have SP or not in Focused Encounters; now, targets with SP will lose SP even in Focused Encounters.

► Fixed an issue where, when certain Skills failed to hit due to enemies' 'Evade', the Skill would not trigger despite fulfilling its activation requirements

※ Affected Skills: Night Awls Capitano Gregor's 'Mercé", Fluid Sac Don Quixote's Passive 'Wave of Depression'

※ The above effects were functioning as intended. Only the issue where the effects would fail to trigger due to enemies' 'Evade' will be fixed.

※ This issue occurred because, in the process of developing the above effects, an implementation error left an unnecessary [On Hit] condition. Going forward, we will add a step to verify the presence of preexisting specifications when updating the units based on changes to their design during the implementation phase, reinforcing our process.

► Fixed an incorrect description in Rodion E.G.O Rime Shank's Passive "Coldness"
- Before : On hit, if the target has 5+ Sinking, inflict 1 Bind and Attack Power Down (3 times per unit)
- After : On Hit, if the target has 5+ Sinking, inflict 1 Bind and Attack Power Down next turn (3 times per unit)

※ We have identified an issue where this Passive applies its effects next turn instead of in the same turn. However, as a considerable amount of time has passed since this E.G.O was released, we believe that its current behavior has come to be accepted as the default.

Also, if we were to follow our usual policy (of changing the behavior to match the description) and make this Passive apply its effects in the same turn, inflicting "Bind" same turn would not do anything as enemy Speed values would be left unchanged, and inflicting "Attack Power Down" would depend heavily on Rodion's own Speed relative to that of the other Sinners, making the effect much trickier to utilize.

With the above factors in consideration, we will be adjusting the in-game description of the effect by adding the phrase "next turn" to match the behavior, so that "Bind" and "Attack Power Down" infliction would still remain in a usable state.

We sincerely apologize for the delayed adjustment of this issue, especially since it has been so long after its release. We will exercise additional care and attention to prevent relevant issues from occurring again.

► Fixed an issue where, when the turn in which a unit's Charge effect expires, the Charge effect that was to be gained next turn disappears as well

► Fixed an issue where Minus Coin Identities didn't show portrait cut-ins even when they flip Tails on their Skill 3 attacks
※ Affected Identities : Lobotomy E.G.O::ln the Name of Love and Hate Don Quixote, Lobotomy E.G.O::Sunshower Heathcliff, Lobotomy E.G.O::The Sword Sharpened with Tears Rodion, The One Who Shall Grip Sinclair

► Fixed an issue where the pop-up window would occasionally not close when selling E.G.O Gifts in Mirror Dungeon "Shop" nodes

► (iOS) Fixed an issue where, in certain combat situations, Sinner Icons on the Dashboards couldn't be interacted with

► (STEAM) Fixed an issue where, upon starting the game, the game becomes unresponsive at the "Connecting..." screen

► (KR Only) Fixed a typo in Ishmael's "Very High" Choice Event dialogue
- Before : 되나고요? 당연한 걸 굳이 묻지 마세요
- After : 되냐고요? 당연한 걸 굳이 묻지 마세요

► Fixed an issue where, in the "Season 6 3★ Guarantee Decaextraction" Extraction, the pre-Uptie illustration of "Heishou Pack - You Branch Adept Heathcliff" was used

title: 2025, Nov. 27th Scheduled Update Notice
content:
----------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on Dec. 27th, 2025 (KST). 

Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost. 

Please refer below for details about the update.

Major Changes
-------------

1. Main Story Chapter 4's stage progression will be simplified.
- In order to minimize repetitive combat Encounters that might potentially break immersion, the stage progression structure of Chapter 4 will be optimized. Once this update is deployed, you will be able to enjoy the narrative by progressing through only the story-relevant stages.

※ Once you clear a stage that has a story narrative, you may skip other stages prior to the next story-relevant stage.

※ Skipped stages will not count for Chapter Progression and EX Clear. Players who wish to receive Chapter Progression and EX-Clear rewards must clear the skipped stages.

2. Main Story Stage Clear Statistics Function will be added.
- When you fail to clear an Encounter, you will be able to browse the clear statistics data of other Managers as a reference to help clear the Encounter. The statistics data will provide you the information about effective Team Configuration for a specific stage. Players who wish to minimize unnecessary retries may use this information as a reference to progress through the chapter more easily.

※ A maximum of 10 clear statistics records will be displayed, and you may choose to input team loadout codes and match your team configuration to the clear record displayed.

※ You may also browse additional information such as Clear Turns, EX-Clears, Deployed Identities, and E.G.O Threadspinning.

※ Clear Statistics will be gathered from Stages cleared following the November 27 Scheduled Update.

An issue where, when an action is ended prior to using an Enhanced Skill, the Enhanced Skill may be used more than twice on the next turn under certain conditions
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

※ Affected Identities and Skills (9 Identities in total)

- Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Adept Faust : Skill 3
- Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Eyes & Penitence Ryōshū : Skill 3
- N Corp. E.G.O::Contempt, Awe Ryōshū : Skill 3; N Corp. E.G.O::Fell Bullet Yi Sang Combo Skill
- The Prince of La Manchaland Meursault : Skill 3
- Full-Stop Office Rep Hong Lu : Skill 2 and Skill 3
- Full-Stop Office Fixer Heathcliff : Skill 3
- Heishou Pack - You Branch Adept Heathcliff : Skill 3
- The Princess of La Manchaland Rodion : Skill 3
- Night Awls Capitano Gregor : Skill 3

※ Issue Description

Example: The Princess of La Manchaland Rodion

When the combat phase begins with The Princess of La Manchaland Rodion's Skill "The Festival Will End" equipped and with the
condition "[Before Use] At 25+ Blooming Thorn, activate 'Ascendant Don Quixote Hardblood Arts - The Finale' instead" fulfilled, the following issue occurs:

If an ally who acts before this Identity defeats an enemy and ends the wave, the Empowered Skill 'Ascendant Don Quixote Hardblood Arts - The Finale' carries overto the next turn, instead of 'The Festival Will End'.

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

Fixed an issue where, if Jeong's Office Rep Ishmael activated the "Discard" effect with its Defense Skill, certain Identities' Support Passives would not trigger
* Relevant Identities : Dieci South Section 4 Yi Sang, Dieci South Section 4 Director Meursault

► Fixed an issue where The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu's Assist Attack voiceline would play when Night Awls Capitano Gregor's Mercé Skill activated

► Fixed an issue where, in Jeong's Office Rep Ishmael's Passive description, the "Hand - Susuki Grass Suit" and "Hand - Blue Sakura Suit" had switched icon images

► Fixed an issue where an enemy featured in Refraction Railway Line 1 BokGak Station 9 - Serum, "K Corp. Class 3 Empowered Staff," had a Passive "Overloaded HP Bullet" that had an incorrect description
- Before : Turn Start: Gain 2 Protection and 2 Fragile
- After: Turn Start: Gain 2 Damage Up and 2 Fragile
※ In order to maintain the preexisting gameplay experience, we are adjusting the text to fit the behavior.

► (EN Only) Fixed an issue where the Abnormality "kqe-1j-23" Skill "Processing Transfer Regt' had an incorrect targeting description
- Before : Targets the unit with the least HP
- After : Targets the unit with the most HP
※ In order to maintain the preexisting gameplay experience, we are adjusting the English text to fit the behavior.

► Fixed an issue where the gameplay visuals didn't load correctly when an ally inflicted with the Abnormality "kqe-1j-23" effect " Captivity" recovered from that effect due to the Abnormality getting Staggered
※ The description of the "Captivity" effect will be changed to match its behavior.
- Before: Turn Start: If kqe-1j-23 is Staggered, remove this effect
- After: When kqe-1j-23 becomes Staggered, remove this effect

► Fixed an issue where Sapling of Light Ul malfunctions when the ability is unlocked for the first time

► Fixed an issue where, when the player enters an Identity's Detailed Info Ul from the "View all Identities" scene in the Refraction Railway Line 1 BokGak's Team Loadout menu, any equipped E.G.O on that Identity does not load

► Fixed an issue where background resources of the Ticket Deco "Line 1 BokGak : Madness" loads incorrectly

► Adjusted the font color of the remaining Starlight stock in the Mirror Dungeon's E.G.O Gift Search menu if an E.G.O Gift is selected
- Before : Shade of White
- After : Shade of Red

► Improved the positioning of Heishou Pack - Wei Branch Don Quixote's pre-Uptie 3 Portrait

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before Dec. 18th, 2025 10:00 (KST)
- When : After Nov. 27th, 2025 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Dec. 4th (Thu), 2025 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes

title: Known Issues after the 2025.11.20 Scheduled Update
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

The following are issues that have been identified after the 2025.11.20 Scheduled Update.
We will inform you via a separate notice once fixes for each issue are deployed through future updates.
Please refer below for more information.

[Known Issues List]

► An issue where a specific effect of To Remain Oneself [宁作吾] Hong Lu visually appears as if it's not triggered although functioning normally
※ Relevant Effect: [Before Attack] If this unit does not have Thunderer or Higher Thunderer, recuperate half of E.G.O resources and SP consumed by this Skill
※ This issue was previously fixed as announced.
- Please refer to "Notice : To Remain Oneself [宁作吾] Hong Lu Adjustment Details"

※ In actuality, the SP Recovery Effect is already applied prior to the attack, and Coin is Tossed without any issues. This only appears otherwise due to a UI visual refresh error.

► An issue where, when certain Identities including Heishou Pack - You Branch Adept Heathcliff ends their action prior to using their Enhanced Skill, they may use the Enhanced Skill more than twice on the next turn under certain conditions

► Description changes in enemies appearing in "Refraction Railway Line 1 BokGak Station #9 - Serum"
Fixed the description of K Corp. Class 3 Empowered Staff's Passive "Overloaded HP Bullet":
- Before : Turn Start: Gain 2 Protection and 2 Fragile
- After : Turn Start: Gain 2 Damage Up and 2 Fragile
※ The effect is already functioning as intended; only the text will be updated to correctly reflect the behavior.

► (EN Only) Fixed the skill description of Abnormality kqe-1j-23's Skill "Processing Transfer Reg"
- Before : Targets the unit with the least HP
- After : Targets the unit with the most HP
※ The effect is already functioning as intended; only the English text will be updated to correctly reflect the behavior.

► An issue where Heishou Identities Staggered due the "Captivity" effect inflicted by kqe-1j-23 can still activate a combo attack with The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu
※ This issue occurs because the "Captivity" effect can be removed during combat.
※ In order to reflect the current behavior, the description of the "Captivity" effect will be updated so that The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu's combo attack with Heishou Identities can activate normally with the correct sprite animation.

► An issue where the E.G.O list does not properly update in the Selected Identity window when progressing through Refraction Railway Line 1 BokGak

► An issue where the E.G.O Background of the "Line 1 BokGak: Madness" does not correctly display on Profile Customization

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Notice : To Remain Oneself [宁作吾] Hong Lu Adjustment Details
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

Below are the specifications of Hong Lu's E.G.O To Remain Oneself [宁作吾], and the forthcoming update schedule.
This notice provides a more detailed explanation of the changes that will occur once the previously announced fixes are implemented.

Please continue reading for more details.

[ To Remain Oneself [宁作吾] Hong Lu Adjustments ]

- "Effect in Question" : [Before Attack] If this unit does not have Thunderer or Higher Thunderer, recuperate half of E.G.O resources and SP consumed by this Skill (rounded down)
(The effect above will be referred to as "Effect in Question" in this notice)

- Before
1) The "Effect in Question" activated before the E.G.O Skill's SP cost is consumed
- This means that, if the unit uses the E.G.O at 45 SP, it will not be able to benefit from the SP recuperation effect.

2) The "Effect in Question", which is an effect in the Awakening Skill, activated for the Corrosion Skill as well if the Corrosion Skill activated due to the "To Corrode" probability
- This is because the "Effect in Question" triggered before the game determines whether the Skill would activate as a Corrosion Skill or not
- Therefore, even if the Corrosion Skill activates due to Corrosion chance when trying to use the Awakening Skill, the E.G.O resource and SP recuperation effect would still activate

3) The E.G.O's Awakening Skill had a guaranteed chance to activate as a Corrosion Skill when used below -34 SP
- This is because the "Effect in Question" triggered before the game determines whether the Skill would activate as a Corrosion Skill or not, healing the unit's SP

- After
1) The "Effect in Question" now activates after the E.G.O Skill's SP cost is consumed
- Which means that the unit will now benefit from the SP recuperation effect even if it uses the E.G.O at 45 SP.

2) The "Effect in Question" that applies on the Corrosion Skill as well if the Corrosion Skill activated due to the "To Corrode" chance will be maintained, and the description will be changed to include this effect
- Before: [Before Attack] If this unit does not have Thunderer or Higher Thunderer, recuperate half of E.G.O resources and SP consumed by this Skill (rounded down)
- After: [Before Attack] If this unit does not have Thunderer or Higher Thunderer, recuperate half of E.G.O resources and SP consumed by this Skill (rounded down; this effect applies to Corrosion Skill as well if it activated due to the "To Corrode" chance)

※ As the "Effect in Question" activation has been moved to the timing after the game determines whether the unit will use a Corrosion Skill or not, this issue was supposed to be fixed alongside it; however, doing so would prevent E.G.O resource-and-SP recuperation effects from triggering when the Awakening Skill corrodes due to the "To Corrode" probability (thus changing the preexisting gameplay experience). With this in mind, the following effect will be maintained: The "Effect in Question" triggers as well if the Awakening Skill activates as a Corrosion Skill due to the "To Corrode" probability, recuperating E.G.O resources and SP spent.

3) This E.G.O's Awakening Skill now has a guaranteed chance to activate as a Corrosion Skill when used below -24 SP

※ As the "Effect in Question" activation timing has been moved to the timing after the game determines whether the unit will use a Corrosion Skill or not, the unit will now heal SP after the game determines whether the Awakening Skill will activate as a Corrosion Skill or not.
However, if the E.G.O Skill is used when the unit is already under -24 SP, it will bring the unit's SP down to -45 SP, which locks the unit out of any SP healing effects.
Please note that the guaranteed Corrosion will now occur at -24 SP instead of -34 SP once the adjustment is implemented; please take greater care when using this E.G.O Skill once the changes are deployed.

[ Update Schedule ]

As we have announced in the previous notice, the next update is set on November 20th (Thu), when the new version of the application is scheduled to be deployed.

While a resubmission and review process is required in the case of mobile platforms, we still expect to be able to release the update in line with the previously announced update schedule.

Should any scheduling issues arise in regards to the update, we will promptly notify you via an additional notice.

Once again, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Notice : To Remain Oneself [宁作吾] Hong Lu Adjustments
content:
Hello, this is Kim Jihoon, director at Project Moon.
I would like to begin by apologizing for yesterday's adjustment notice that came across as a downgrade of the E.G.O to our users.

I am writing to inform you that the "To Remain Oneself [宁作吾] Hong Lu" adjustments we shared yesterday will be changed.

As opposed to what we shared in the Nov. 17th Scheduled Update Notice, To Remain Oneself [宁作吾] Hong Lu's behavior will be adjusted to match the description, rather than the other way around.

[ To Remain Oneself [宁作吾] Hong Lu Adjustments ]
- Before : The "[Before Attack] Recuperate SP" effect activated before the unit lost SP from using the E.G.O Skill.
This meant that, if the E.G.O Skill was used at 45 SP, the unit could not gain the benefits of the SP recuperation effect.

- After : We adjusted the "[Before Attack] Recuperate SP" effect to activate after the unit loses SP from using the E.G.O Skill.
With this change, the unit will now receive the benefits of the SP recuperation effect, even if the E.G.O Skill was used at 45 SP.

This is how we reached the decision we shared previously with the Nov. 17th Scheduled Update Notice:
We believed fixing the issue would function as both a downgrade and an upgrade at the same time.
As we believed that the downsides and upsides of such a change (whether the behavior was adjusted to fit the description or vice versa) were roughly on the same scale, we decided to fix the description to match the behavior so that the current player experience could be maintained as much as possible.

However, we now realize that the benefits of adjusting the behavior to match the description outweigh the downsides of doing so, which we failed to see because we neglected to conduct a detailed review to see in which situations this change would feel like an upgrade or a downgrade.
Also, after the announcement, we had the opportunity to receive various input from our users who gave examples of upgrades and downgrades. Consequently, we realized that the downsides of maintaining the behavior as-is and changing the description to match it would come across as a more tangible downgrade than an upgrade.

To conclude, we decided that adjusting the behavior of To Remain Oneself [宁作吾] to match the description would be a greater upgrade to our users than maintaining the current gameplay experience, and will be applying that change accordingly.

We offer our sincerest apology to our users for previously having made a decision that could feel like a downgrade in a matter as important and sensitive as the performance of Identities and E.G.Os.

In similar situations going forward, we will work more closely with the relevant teams to assess in greater detail how the applicable changes, whether implemented or not, might affect the gameplay experience of our users, as well as any inconveniences that might arise.

We understand there may be concerns that future updates might be handled in a similar way, in a manner detrimental to the positive gameplay experience of our users.
Because of this, we felt it was important to explain the reasoning behind our patch direction in correcting the behavior-related issue of the "To Remain Oneself" E.G.O itself by engaging our users through this specific notice.

We are preparing to apply Hong Lu's "To Remain Oneself" E.G.O fix with the November 20th update, when the new version of the application is scheduled to be deployed.
While a resubmission and review process is required in the case of mobile platforms, we still expect to be able to release the update in line with the previously announced update schedule.

Should any scheduling issues arise in regards to the update, we will promptly notify you via an additional notice.

Once again, we sincerely apologize to all our users who may have been inconvenienced and disappointed by the previous announcement regarding Hong Lu's E.G.O "To Remain Oneself [宁作吾]".

title: 2025, Nov. 20th Scheduled Update Notice
content:
----------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on Nov. 20th, 2025 (KST). 

Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost. 

Please refer below for details about the update.

New Content
-----------

1. New Target Extraction [Heishou Pack - You Branch Adept Heathcliff & Wei Branch Don Quixote] (11/20 12:00 ~ 12/4 10:00 (KST))

2. Target Extraction [Hong Lul (25/11/20 12:00 ~ 12/04 10:00 (KST))
The following Identities and E.G.O will have increased odds of extraction.

- 3★ : The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu, R Corp. 4th Pack Reindeer Hong Lu, District 20 Yurodivy Hong Lu, Dieci South Section 4 Hong Lu, K Corp. Class 3 Excision Staff Hong Lu, Tingtang Gang Gangleader Hong Lu
- 2★ : Fanghunt Office Fixer Hong Lu, W Corp. L2 Cleanup Agent Hong Lu, Liu South Section 5 Hong Lu, Kurokumo Clan Wakashu Hong Lu
-1★ : LCB Sinner Hong Lu

3. New Identities Added
The following Identities will be added to the list of extractable Identities.

4. New Content [Refraction Railway Line 1 BokGak]

5. New Packages

► Target Extraction Pack
- Contents : Decaextraction Ticket x4
- Price : ₩33,000 / $21.99 / ¥3,000
- Can be purchased once
- Purchasable Period : 25. 11. 20 12:00 ~ 12. 4 10:00 (KST)

Identity Growth Pack
- Contents : Takeoff Module - ID Uptie x 1, Identity Training Ticket IV x 60, Identity Training Ticket III x 30
- Price : ₩33,000 / $21.99 / ¥3,000
- Can be purchased once
- Purchasable Period : 25. 11. 20 12:00 ~ 12. 4 10:00 (KST)

Notice : An issue where a certain effect of Hong Lu E.G.O "To Remain Oneself [宁作吾]" was activating at the wrong timing
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

► An issue where the "[Before Attack] Recuperate SP" effect from Hong Lu E.G.O "To Remain Oneself [宁作吾]" was activating at an incorrect timing

- Effect with the issue : [Before Attack] If this unit does not have Thunderer or Higher Thunderer, recuperate half of E.G.O resources and SP consumed by this Skill (rounded down)

- The Issue : This effect activates before this unit loses SP by using the E.G.O Skill.

- Measures:
In order to maintain the current gameplay experience, change the text to match the behavior (therefore, the E.G.O Skill's actual behavior will not be adjusted)
- Before : [Before Attack] If this unit does not have Thunderer or Higher Thunderer, recuperate half of E.G.O resources and SP consumed by this Skill (rounded down)
- After : [Before Action] If this unit does not have Thunderer or Higher Thunderer, recuperate half of E.G.O resources and SP consumed by this Skill (rounded down)

※ This issue occurred because this effect activated on a different timing from what
[Before Attack] indicates in other E.G.O Skills and what it indicates in other effects of
this E.G.O Skill. In essence, this activates before the [Before Attack] timing.

※ While fixing this error might improve certain aspects of this E.G.O Skill, it may also feel like a downgrade in certain other conditions. As this E.G.O is a rare Collaboration E.G.O obtained by our managers, and as a rerun of this E.G.O may be difficult, we would like to address this error by maintaining the gameplay experience it currently provides without downgrading the E.G.O. Therefore, the description will be adjusted to match the behavior instead.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience and confusion caused by this Collaboration E.G.O error.

[Error Details]
- We have identified that when SP is at 45, using the E.G.O triggers its effects before SP is reduced due to using the E.G.O. As a result, SP restoration effect of the E.G.O does not activate properly.

- Because the trigger timing is situated prior to the SP reduction of E.G.O usage, the Awakening skill's "[Before Attack] Recuperate SP consumed by this Skill"
effect is also being applied even in cases where the Corrosion skill is triggered by chance (E.G.O Corrosion checks are computed at the same timing as the E.G.O skill's SP reduction).

- Since SP recovery is being applied before the Corrosion check, Corrosion becomes guaranteed at below -34 SP. Fixing this issue will result in SP being recovered after the Corrosion check. For example, using this E.G.O at below -24 SP will reduce SP to -45 and guarantee Corrosion.

[Subsequent Measures]
- Going forward, we will implement additional cross-check procedures to maintain consistency in how effect-activation timing logic is handled.

- To prevent recurrence of similar issues, we will document the history and cause of this issue for ongoing tracking.

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------
► Fixed an issue where, in Focused Encounters, when using Don Quixote E.G.O - "Fluid Sac", some of its effects did not activate even when the target was in either Low Morale or Panic states
※ Relevant Effect: If target is Staggered, in Low Morale, or in Panic, deal 30% of damage dealt as bonus damage

► An issue where Don Quixote E.G.O - "Fluid Sac" Corrosion Skill works in the opposite way as described
※ Relevant Effect: Iftarget is NOT Staggered, in Low Morale, nor in Panic, deal 50% of damage dealt as bonus damage
- Before : This effect activated only when the target is Staggered, in Low Morale, or in Panic
- After : Now, this effect activates if the target is NOT Staggered, in Low Morale, nor in Panic, as written

► Fixed an issue where Meursault's E.G.O "Screwloose Wallop" effect "Surgery" did not activate under certain circumstances
※ Relevant Effect: Die when Count reaches 5
- Before: If this unit had an effect that raises its max HP, it did not die even when the Count reached 5
- After: Now, this unit dies when the Count reaches 5, as written

► Updated description formatting for the "Heishou Bolus Contamination [黑獣丸染]" effect

► Fixed an issue where the status effect damage number did not appear when the hit that triggered it brings the status effect's Count to O
※ This was a visual-only issue; the damages were working as intended. It only addresses the issue where the damage number did not appear.

► Fixed an issue where "Blue Starshard" E.G.O Gift did not work in Focused Encounters

► Added further clarification to E.G.O Gifts "Torn Bloodbag" and "Hemorrhagic Shock" descriptions
- Before : On ally Clash Win: activate the enemy's Bleed once
- After : On ally Clash Win: activate the enemy's Bleedonce and reduce Bleed Count by 1
※ The effect was working as intended; this change is only to clarify the behavior of this effect

► Adjusted the "Auto-Restore MD Deployment Order" option (the function that restores Deployment Order when reviving dead Sinners in Mirror Dungeons) to work even when not all 12 Sinners are alive.

► Blocked any Retreat-related abilities from activating when an Identity has become Staggered due to the "Captivity" effect & adjusted description of that effect to reflect this change
- Before: Become Staggered for 3 turns.
- After: Become Staggered for 3 turns; disable any Retreat-related abilities
※ The description has been adjusted as well to clarify this effect's interaction with the Retreat ability

► Fixed an issue where, in Canto 8 <Part 2> Story Dungeon, the "Trait Keyword - Jia Family" gets added to "The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu" Identity as well

► Fixed an issue where a Canto 8 <Part Story Dungeon's allied NPC unit's Defense Skill does not activate in certain circumstances

► Fixed an issue where certain dialogue lines in Canto 8 <Part 2> does not load in the Story scenes

► (EN Only) Minor adjustment to Mirror Dungeon banner in the Drive tab
- Before : Mirror of 'the' Immortality
- After: Mirror of Immortality

► (EN Only) Updated and polished English translation for Canto 1

► (iOS) Fixed an issue where selecting in-game hyperlinks did not lead to external websites

► Further polished the "Purchase Projection Rate" pop-up window in the Mirror Dungeon - Mirror Projection / Achievements menu

► Fixed an issue where, when Uptying Lobotomy E.G.O:: Solemn Lament Yi Sang from Tier 3 to Tier 4, certain changes to this Identity were not highlighted

► Fixed an issue where, in certain Mirror Dungeons of the Fathoms, loading back into the dungeon map would show an overly zoomed-in image
※ Relevant Mirror Dungeons of the Fathoms: Ch. 5.5 Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones HARD, Ch. 6.5 Timekilling Time HARD

► Improved the UI interaction with the tutorial pop-up that appears when engaging Stage 4-47 for the first time
- Before: The only way to close the tutorial pop-up was to press the "Back" button on the top left corner
- After: Now, pressing anywhere on the screen will close the tutorial pop-up window

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

title: New Content - Refraction Railway
content:
--------------------------------

[Details]
1. 13 difficult combat stages will be open for a limited period of time. You may enter and challenge an active line to enter it at no cost.
2. Upon entering, you will choose a number of Identities and E.G.O to begin the expedition with. Unlike other combat-based content, the level-ups and tier-ups done to your Identities and E.G.O while an expedition is in-progress will not be immediately reflected on your team's status. The upgrades will only apply after starting a new run from the beginning.
3. Each stage will give you rewards after clearing it for the first time during the event period.
4. Clearing every stage while fulfilling given requirements will reward you with a special decorated banner.

[Period]
Apr 6 12:00 ~ May 4 09:59 (KST)

[Unlock Requirements]
Clear Main Story 3-22

[Claiming Rewards]
- When you clear a stage, the station will record the number of turns taken to clear it Clear Turns and the cumulative amount of turns taken throughout the current expedition Total Turns.
- After clearing a stage in the line for the first time during the event period, the rewards will be sent to the Lost & Found. To gain access to the Lost & Found, a number of Enkephalin Modules will be required. Afterwards, you may freely access it and claim the rewards you've earned without any additional cost.

[Combat Details]
- Every battle on the line adopts the Abnormality method of directly matching ally skills against enemy skills.
- The health and Sanity of the Sinners will carry over between stages. However, after clearing a stage, those who did not participate in the battle will fully recover their health and Sanity when entering the next stage.
- When a Sinner dies, they will remain unavailable for the rest of the expedition.
- E.G.O resources will carry over between stages.
- When you lose a battle, you will be taken back to the point right before entering the stage.
- During an expedition, you can choose to start over from any previous stage. When you do, the battle will start with the Sinners' lives and E.G.O resources reverted to that point, and any progress made for the stages after it will be lost.
- You may not change your team in the middle of an expedition. If you wish to modify your setup, you must start a new expedition.

[Record]
- Upon clearing the final stage, the records for the expedition will be saved in the Logs, which can be viewed at any time during the event.
- The records in the Logs will include the expedition date, total turns taken, Identities and E.G.O used, and damage statistics.
- The Logs will only show your own records.
- Expeditions with fewer total turns will be ranked higher.
- Expeditions whose total turns go over 999 will not be recorded.

[Special Decorative Banner]
- Upon clearing the final stage, you can earn the Refraction Railway-themed [LINE 1 MADNESS].
※ You are only eligible for this reward if the total number of turns taken for the clear does not exceed 999.
- If a finished expedition's total turns are within a certain amount, you can earn a decorated version of the banner.
- If you acquire the banner within the first half of the event (Apr 6 12:00 ~ Apr 20 09:59) while fulfilling the total turn threshold, you can earn a further embellished version of the banner.
- When Refraction Railway Line 1 closes, the best total turn record will be etched on the lower side of the banner.

title: 2025, Nov. 13th Scheduled Update Notice
content:
----------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on Nov. 13th, 2025 (KST). 

Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost. 

Please refer below for details about the update.

Major Changes
-------------

1. An option will be added where, once all 12 Sinners are revived in the Mirror Dungeon, the game will automatically revert the Deployment order to its original setup from when all Sinners were alive.

※ This applies to Sinner revival cases, such as Shop revivals or revivals that occur upon moving up a floor.

※ This function will be activated only when the "Auto-Restore Mirror Dungeon Combat Deployment Order" option is toggled "On". You can find this setting here: Settings - General.

※ As the Deployment order data is saved locally to your devices, please understand that your Deployment order will not be carried over when switching to a different device mid-Mirror Dungeon.

2. Custom Language Mod Improvement: When a new update with text differences is deployed, instead of loading UNKNOWN for those new strings, the game will load in the English text instead.

Main Story - Mirror Dungeon of the Fathoms Improvements
-------------------------------------------------------

[ Explanation ]
Currently, certain features of Mirror Dungeon of the Fathoms present in the Main Story share behaviors with the actual Mirror Dungeon. This has caused several unintended side effects in the past whenever changes were made to the Mirror Dungeon. To prevent similar issues from occurring in the future, we decided to update the previous dungeons.

With the Nov. 13th Scheduled Update, any Mirror Dungeon of the Fathoms in progress will be reset, and any Enkephalin module consumed to enter them will be returned.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused by this change.

[ Changes ]
- Location of Encounters within Mirror Dungeon of the Fathoms will now be fixed.

- The function to choose E.G.O Gifts upon entering Mirror Dungeon of the Fathoms will be removed. Instead, they will now behave like the LCB Regular Check-up Dungeon, where you can choose your starting E.G.O Gifts via Choice Events.

- Mirror Dungeon of the Fathoms will no longer use "Cost," and Shop and Rest nodes where you spend "Cost" will be removed. However, in Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones & Timekilling Time dungeons, a Choice Event for E.G.O Gift Fusion will be added immediately before the boss fight.

- Choice Event outcomes that yield Cost will be adjusted. These changes will not affect their behavior in the Mirror Dungeon.

[ Affected Stages ]
- Hell's Chicken 3.5-9 and 3.5-10 Mirror Dungeon of the Fathoms, Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones 5.5-24 Mirror Dungeon of the Fathoms, Timekilling Time 6.5-15 Mirror Dungeon of the Fathoms
※ This will change both Normal & Hard difficulties of each stage.

Fixed an issue where "Deal X% of damage dealt as bonus [Affinity/Attack Type] damage" did not work properly
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

※ We will use N Corp. Kleinhammer Heathcliff's Skill 3, "Infirm Retribution" to demonstrate this issue. The text is "Deal bonus damage by 10% of damage dealt."

When dealing 100 damage against a target with 50 Shield HP & 200 HP: Before, the "damage dealt" did not take damage dealt against Shield HP into account, only using 50 damage dealt against HP instead of the 100 damage to calculate. Therefore, the bonus damage was "5" instead of "10" it should have been. This issue is fixed so that damage dealt against Shield HP will now count as well; therefore, the bonus damage upon dealing 100 damage will now be "10," regardless of whether it hit the Shield HP or not. Any enemy Skills or Passives with the same effects will be adjusted accordingly as well.

- Before : When calculating bonus damage, the formula did not take any damage dealt against Shield HP into account
- After : When calculating bonus damage, the formula now takes any damage dealt against Shield HP into account as well

[ Affected Identities & Skills ]
N Corp. Kleinhammer Heathcliff : Skill 3
W Corp. L4 Cleanup Agent - CCA Heathcliff : Skill 3
Rosespanner Workshop Rep. Rodion : Skill 3
Heishou Pack - You Branch Sinclair : Skill 3
Seven South Section 6 Director Outis : Skill 2, 3
Twinhook Pirates First Mate Gregor : Combat Passive

[ Affected E.G.O Skills ]
Yi Sang E.G.O - "Dimension Shredder" : Awakening & Corrosion Skills
Don Quixote E.G.O - "Fluid Sac" : Awakening & Corrosion Skills
Heathcliff E.G.O - "AEDD" : Corrosion Skill

[ Affected E.G.O Gifts ]
Sharp Needle & Thread, Hearts-powered Jewel

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Fixed an issue where, in certain combat stages relevant to specific Sinners, an Identity's voiceline that should not play plays anyway
※ Affected Identity : W Corp. L4 Cleanup Agent - CCA Heathcliff

► Fixed an issue where, in a battle against a certain boss enemy with a "Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu" Identity, if all other allies leave the battle after completing the boss gimmick, the battle will end in defeat even if the said Identity is alive

► Fixed an issue where a certain enemy effect from Canto 6 behaves incorrectly
※ Relevant effect : Marked Prey
- Before : (1) "With every hit this unit takes, take bonus Slash damage equal to 10% of the HP damage taken." effect did not work (2) "If this unit does not take damage during this turn, inflict 1 Inferiority Complex after attack, then expires" effect activated only when taking damage from the effect in "(1)."
- After: (1) Text removed 
(2) "If this unit does not take damage during this turn, inflict 1 Inferiority Complex after attack, then expires" now works properly
※ To maintain the preexisting gameplay experience, we decided to remove the description of an effect that did not work and fix the effect that does not work as intended.

► Fixed an issue where certain effects of the E.G.O Gift "Embers" did not work in Focused Encounters
※ Relevant effect : When enemies take 5 hits from ally Attack Skills(including E.G.O Skills) that inflict Burn Potency, Count, or 'Unique Burn': trigger Burn once, then reduce Burn Count by 1 (2 times per turn per enemy; for Abnormalities, for each Part)

► Fixed an issue where status effect damage numbers' visual typography from this turn's combat phase did not load until next turn due to "inflict/gain next turn" effects

► Fixed an issue where the Abnormality kqe-1j-23's "Atk Weight" value was missing from its Defense Skill

► Reduced the performance issue in the internal system that occur at Combat Start

► Fixed an issue where certain Canto 6 enemies' Skill texts had incorrect descriptions
- Before : [On Hit] If target has 10+ Bleed, deal +30% damage
- After : [On Hit] If target has 10+ Bleed, deal 30% of damage dealt as Blunt damage
※ The actual effects were working as written in the "After" version of the text; to maintain the preexisting gameplay experience, we will be changing the description to match the behavior.

► Fixed an issue where, in Main Story Stage 4-54 boss fight, the boss enemy's damage checkpoint did not occur
- Before : Instead of playing the in-game cutscene at the damage checkpoint, every in-game cutscene played all at once at the final damage checkpoint
- After : Now, the damage checkpoint and the paired cutscene occur simultaneously as intended

► Fixed an issue where, in certain circumstances, interacting with "Add a Friend -> Discover w/ ID" could cause a server error

► Added a scrollable function in the Uptie menu for Identities with 4 or more Skills, so that each Skill's Offense/Defense Level adjustments can be checked

► Fixed an issue where the "Active E.G.O Passives" Icon disappears when Returning to Stage after Retreating
※ The activated E.G.O Passives did not disappear; the only issue addressed by this fix is the issue where the Icon disappears upon Returning

► Addressed the text sizing issue(on the left side of the screen while in combat) for Backup Units with locked Support Passives

► Fixed an issue where the Hard Difficulty unlock condition text appeared as UNKNOWN in Ch. 6.5 - "Murder on the Warp Express" Stage select screen

► Fixed an issue where, if there were 10 or more Stacks of "Affinity / Attack Type Resist Down," the UI would malfunction
※ This was a visual-only issue; only the UI text issue will be addressed

► Fixed an issue where, under certain circumstances, "Enkephalin Spent" gauge for the "Enkephalin Spending Event" would load incorrectly

► (JP Only) Fixed an issue where the "Enkephalin Spent" text for the "Enkephalin Spending Event" loaded in English

► (EN Only) Fixed the typo in "The 2nd & 3rd Walpurgis Night Target Extraction BokGak" banner typography

► (KR Only) Standardized descriptions that were written as "대미지" or "데미지" into "피해"

Known Issues
------------

► An issue where, in Focused Encounters, when using Don Quixote E.G.O - "Fluid Sac", the "deal 30% of damage dealt as bonus damage" effect does not activate even when the target was in either Low Morale or Panic states

► An issue where Don Quixote E.G.O - "Fluid Sac" Corrosion Skill does not work as described
※ Affected Effect : If target is NOT Staggered, in Low Morale, nor in Panic, deal 50% of damage dealt as bonus damage
※ Currently, the above effect is activating with the same conditionals as its Awakening Skill(in that it activates when the target is Staggered, Low Morale, or Panicked). This will be adjusted with a future update.

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Nov. 20th, 2025 (KST)
- When : After Nov. 13th, 2025 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Nov. 20th, (Thu) 2025, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.
- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change depending on the status of maintenance. If such a change occurs, we will let you know in a follow-up notice.
- A resource download may be prompted after the build update. If you're using a mobile device, it is recommended to proceed with a Wi-Fi connection.
- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account. Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: Notice: Ver. 1.90.0 - Download Pop-up Issue Identified
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

Over the weekend, we identified an issue where access to the game could be interrupted due to the issue where the download pop-up window appears repeatedly.

This issue has been resolved now; please continue reading for more information.

[ Issue ]
- An issue where the pop-up window requiring the player to download the game kept appearing

[ Cause ]
- An unintended file adjustment occurred to Ver. 1.90.0 resource management review process while preparing for next week's update

[ Resolution ]
- Reverted the file in question in the resource management review process

For managers still experiencing this issue, please attempt the following:
1. Run Limbus Company
2. Proceed with 8.1kb resource download
※ If the game won't proceed even after the download has completed in the download screen, please try closing and restarting the game.

We sincerely apologize for causing this issue over the weekend.

title: Notice: An issue where in-game text loads in as "Unknown" after updates
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

We have recently identified an issue where, after updates, texts in the in-game content load in as "Unknown."

Please continue reading to view further information regarding this issue and our future measures regarding it.

[ Issue ]
- An issue where, after updates, texts in the newly updated content load in placeholder texts such as "Unknown" or "RawDesc 없음".

[ Cause & Solution ]
- We have so far identified two issues that may cause this to happen.

1. (PC) If you are using the Custom Language Mod function, any text not present in the custom mod folder will load in as "Unknown" or "RawDesc 없음"(for new Identities or E.G.O descriptions).
: In this case, if the new content update texts are not yet present in your game folder, please disable the Custom Language mod and try again.

2. (PC, Mobile) A resource download error could cause the text to load incorrectly.
: In this case, please close the game completely and start again. Click(or touch) the title screen to see if there are any remaining resources to be downloaded.

[ Future Measures ]
- We will improve the in-game functionality so that, even if players are using the Custom Translation Mod, and even if the said mod does not yet have the updated text files, the in-game text would load in properly.
- We will review the resource download logic with greater detail to reduce the frequency of this issue.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Notice: Known Issues after Oct. 30th, 2025 Scheduled Update
content:

title: Additional Notice on certain Skills with "Damage +M% for every N Keyword" effect
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

Following up on the Notice released on Oct. 27 2025, we have identified another issue regarding Skills used by Identities and enemies where "Damage +M% for every N Keyword" is applied real-time.

To fix this error, the Skill tag "On Use" will be deleted for the affected Skill effect as we have detailed in the previous Notice to correctly reflect its current behavior.

Please continue reading for more information.

[Additional Skill Affected by the Error]
※ Identity: Lobotomy E.G.O::In the Name of Love and Hate Don Quixote
※ Skill: Reversed Beats / Reversed Arcana Slave

Currently, the additional damage of this Skill is calculated based on Love/Hate (Charge) Potency on self upon use.
Although there are no follow-up effects that cause this Skill to consume Love/Hate, the Charge count on self may be consumed due to other outside reasons and trigger the passive effect where damage output increases due to gaining Love/Hate Potency every time this unit consumes cumulative Love/Hate Count in the Encounter.

[Bug Fix]
- Before : [On Use] Deal +30% damage for every Love/Hate on self (max 150%)
- After : Deal +30% damage for every Love/Hate on self (max 150%)

[Issue Fix Date]
- October 30th (Thu), 2025 Scheduled Update

Once again, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: 2025, Oct. 30th Scheduled Update Notice
content:
---------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on Oct. 30th, 2025 (KST).

Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.

Please refer below for details about the update.

The Time-Limited Content [Pilgrimage of Compassion] Reward Exchange Closure Early Notice
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

1. The Time-Limited Content [Pilgrimage of Compassion] Event Page will be closed after the Oct. 30th Scheduled Maintenance.

Please note that any [Pilgrimage of Compassion] rewards cannot be exchanged after the maintenance; make sure to use your Sea Terror Samples in the Reward Exchange menu before the Oct. 30th Scheduled Maintenance begins.

2. The loading screen featuring the [Pilgrimage of Compassion] Story CG will be reset after the maintenance and replaced with the default loading image.

3. Managers who do not own the Announcer and E.G.O listed below will no longer be able to view them in the Announcer and E.G.O list after the maintenance.

※ Affected Announcer: Amiya Announcer

※ Affected E.G.O: Unbrilliant Glory Gregor, Command: Meltdown Faust, To Remain Oneself [宁作吾] Hong Lu, Tidal Elegy Ishmael

Optimizations
-------------

1. Download speed will now be displayed on the Resources Download screen, and general stabilization improvements will be applied.

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Fixed an issue where, when W Corp. L4 Cleanup Agent - CCA Heathcliff uses a Defense Skill, the location in which "Rip Space - CCA Overdrive" is generated varies depending on whether he Clashed with it or not.
※ This was an issue with the Skill generation timing. " Rip Space - CCA Overdrive" will now become usable after the turn in which he gains Overcharge, whether he Clashed with his Defense Skill or not.

► Fixed an issue where, when W Corp. L4 Cleanup Agent - CCA Heathcliff uses a Defense Skill, "Rip Space - CCA Overdrive" becomes added to the list of upcoming Skills next turn regardless of the Charge Count conditional.

► Fixed an issue where, when W Corp. L4 Cleanup Agent - CCA Heathcliff uses a Defense Skill and gains Overcharge, the unit could gain up to a maximum of 9 Aggro.
※ The value of Aggro gained will be adjusted to a maximum of 5 to match the text description.
※ Text Description: Gain Aggro to this unit's leftmost Slot based on Charge Potency on self (max 5)

► Fixed an issue where some effects of Wild Hunt Heathcliff's Passive "Call of the Erlking" did not activate.
※ Affected Effects:
- Apply 2 Damage Up next turn to an ally with Wild Hunt
- If the said ally is from Wuthering Heights or Edgar Family, apply 1 Attack Power Up next turn as well

※ Although "Call of the Erlking" functioned correctly when Wild Hunt Heathcliff was released on Aug. 22nd, 2024, the issue above was introduced during the code adjustment made on Sep. 5th, 2024, which was intended to prevent killed units from gaining buff effects.

The "Wild Hunt" status is treated as a kind of "near-death" state, where affected allies are considered killed but remain active while awaiting resurrection under the Wild Hunt effect. However, the system had been mistakenly recognizing allies awaiting resurrection as fully dead during Encounters, preventing buffs from being applied to them. 
To address this issue, we have made additional adjustments so that the Wild Hunt passive now forcibly applies buffs to allies in the "near-death" state. (Allies already revived by the Wild Hunt passive have been receiving buffs and debuffs as normal, regardless of the "near-death" condition described above)

► Fixed an issue with the timing of E.G.O Gift Kaleidoscope's effect "Turn Start: units accompanied by other Identities from the same faction as
themselves gain Offense Level Up equal to the number of other Identities from the same faction".
- Before: The effect's trigger condition was previously checked at Turn End, which could result in check failures in certain situations
- After: The effect's trigger condition will now be checked at Turn Start to prevent errors

► Fixed an issue where certain voicelines for the Amiya Announcer did not play at the intended timing.
※ Affected lines: "This should be able to take them down soon!" and "Your skills are just like those of Elite Operators!"
- Before: The voiceline intended to play upon "Dealing Devastating Damage" instead played at the "Starting Turn after dealing Devastating Damage"
- After: Adjusted the timing so that the voiceline will now play upon "Dealing Devastating Damage" as intended

► Fixed an issue where the UI element meant to preview certain voicelines for the Amiya Announcer did not appear in the "Announcer Details" screen.
※ Affected Voiceline: Dealing Devastating Damage [3] - "Your skills are just like those of Elite Operators!"

► Fixed an issue where, in the Murder on the WARP Express BokGak Reward Exchange screen, the event currency amount showed as greater than 0 even after all rewards had been exchanged.

► Fixed an issue where text highlight effects were not correctly applied on changed or added effects when enhancing E.G.O Gifts.
※ Affected E.G.O Gift: Discarded Dimensional Gauntlet, Blue Starshard

► Adjusted a certain enemy in Stage 6.5-28 so that their "When Hit"
voiceline triggers no more than once per turn.

► Fixed an issue where effects were displayed when enemies absorbed certain buffs and gained their effects.
※ Affected Effect: Zwei Assoc. West Section 3 Ishmael's "Defensive Stance"

► (EN Only) Fixed an issue where certain texts were missing in the Main Story Prologue: Selva Obscura

► (EN Only) Fixed an issue where unnecessary texts appeared in certain skill effect descriptions in Stage 6.5-28.

► (EN Only) Fixed an issue where, upon obtaining the Identities The Prince of La Manchaland Meursault and Kurokumo Clan Wakashu Heathcliff, duplicate words could appear in the profile customization setting.
To resolve this issue, Kurokumo Clan Wakashu Heathcliff's profile word has been changed as follows:
※ Changed Text: Family → Clan

► (JP Only) Fixed an issue where certain texts were missing in the Main Story Episode 6.5 "Murder on the WARP Express".

► Fixed an issue where certain dialogue texts were missing in Stage 4-54.

► Fixed an issue where, under certain conditions, enemy dialogue text in Stage 6.5-28 did not display.

title: Notice: An issue with certain skills with "Damage +M% for every N Keyword" effect
content:
---------------------------------------

Hello, this is Project Moon.

We have identified an issue regarding Skills used by Identities and enemies where "Damage +M% for every N Keyword" is applied real-time as opposed to the intended design.

Please continue reading for more information and subsequent measures.

Error Details
-------------

An issue where the damage of Skills with the effect "[On Use] Damage +M% for every N Keyword" is not determined at the intended timing, but instead increases or decreases in real-time depending on changes in the value of Keywords gained or lost after using the Skills

Bug Fixes
---------

- The Skill tag "[On Use]" will be deleted for the affected Skill effects to maintain and correctly reflect their current behavior

Before: [On Use] Damage +M% for every N Keyword
After: Damage +M% for every N Keyword

※ As a considerable amount of time has passed since the release of the affected Identities, users may perceive the Identities' current performance as the intended design. We are aware that altering the performance of Identities to match their textual description would change how those Identities are used in Encounters, and under certain conditions, this would be a downward balance adjustment from the Identities' current performance.

As such, for this issue, we plan to make an exception to our standard bugfix guideline (fixing issues to match textual descriptions) and instead, adjust the text to match the Identities' current performance. We sincerely apologize for the confusion and inconvenience caused by this issue.

Issue Fix Date
--------------

October 30th (Thu), 2025 Scheduled Update

Causes of the Issue
-------------------

When Skills are used, the system only determined the application of the damage modifiers, while the actual damage increase or decrease was calculated real-time according to Keyword values.

This conditional damage modifier effect was first developed during the designing of the Wayward Passenger Encounter of Refraction Railway Line 2, which was then used as a blueprint of Seven Assoc. South Section 4 Faust's skill effects, resulting in the error detailed above.

Subsequent Measures
-------------------

Going forward, we will further analyze sections where identical errors may recur during production and in-house reviews of Identities.
We will also develop and implement additional programs and tools to further stabilize our content-production process.

Skills Affected by the Error
----------------------------

In-game description: Strengthens damage output based on Keyword on target only at the On Use timing
Actual effect: Damage output increases or decreases in real-time when the target gains or loses the Keyword

In-game description: Strengthens damage output based on Keyword on self only at the On Use timing
Actual effect: Damage output increases or decreases in real-time when the affected unit gains or loses the Keyword on self

※ This issue has been affecting the following Identities' Skills.
Please continue reading for more case-by-case information.

· Seven South Section 4 Faust
· Dieci South Section 4 Hong Lu
· Wild Hunt Heathcliff
· The Princess of La Manchaland Rodion
· The Manager of La Manchaland Don Quixote
· LCE E.G.O::Ardor Blossom Star Faust
· N Corp. E.G.O::Fell Bullet Yi Sang
· Lobotomy E.G.O::In the Name of Love and Hate Don Quixote

1. Identities whose Skills and/or Passives are
independently affected by this bug

※ The actual damage calculation formula will remain unchanged and exactly as it is written below.

1) Seven South Section 4 Faust

[ Profiling ]
Strengthens damage output based on the target's Rupture Potency at the On Use timing. If the target gains Rupture Potency due to either this Skill's On Hit effects or other outside reasons, the damage output is further increased; if the target loses Rupture Potency, this Skill's damage output decreases.

2) Wild Hunt Heathcliff

[ Requiem ]
Strengths damage output based on Coffin Stack on self. When, after the On Use timing, this unit gains more Coffin Stack due to Coffin-gaining effects on this Skill, the damage output is further increased.

[ Lament, Mourn, and Despair ]
Strengthens damage output based on Coffin and Dullahan Stack on self at the On Use timing. While Dullahan Stack does not change in the combat phase, this Skill has Coffin-gaining effects On Use, which will further increase the damage output.

3) N Corp. E.G.O::Fell Bullet Yi Sang

[ See Through Defenses ] 
Strengthens damage output based on Torn Memory Stack on self at the On Use timing. As this Skill gains more Torn Memory Stack On Use, the damage output is further increased.

4) Lobotomy E.G.O::In the Name of Love and Hate Don Quixote

[ With Love! Hyah! ]
Strengthens damage output based on Love/Hate Potency on self at the On Use timing. As this Skill has an effect that consumes Charge Count On Use, if the Charge Potency is increased due to consuming Charge Count, the damage output is further increased.

2. Identities whose Skills and/or Passives can be affected by this bug due to outside reasons, such as E.G.O Gift effects

※ The actual damage calculation formula will remain unchanged and exactly as it is written below.

1) Dieci South Section 4 Hong Lu

[ Cyclical Knowledge ]
Strengthens damage output based on the target's Sinking Potency at the On Use timing. While this Skill does not inflict further Sinking Potency On Hit afterward, if the target's Sinking Potency is increased due to external effects, this Skill's damage output is further increased; if the target loses Sinking Potency due to external effects, the damage output is decreased.

2) The Princess of La Manchaland Rodion

[ Ascendant Don Quixote Hardblood Arts - The Finale ]
Strengthens damage output based on Bloodfeast Consumed by this unit at the On Use timing.
While this Skill does not consume further Bloodfeast afterward, if Bloodfeast is consumed due to external effects, the damage output may be further increased.

3) The Manager of La Manchaland Don Quixote

[ I Shall Impale ]
Strengthens damage output based on Bloodfeast Consumed by this unit and the target's Bleed Potency at the On Use timing. While this Skill does not consume further Bloodfeast or inflict Bleed Potency afterward, if the target gains Bleed Potency or if Bloodfeast is consumed due to external effects, the damage output may be further increased.

[ Ascendant Sancho Hardblood Arts - La Sangre ]
Strengthens damage output based on the target's Bleed Potency at the On Use timing. While this Skill does not inflict Bleed Potency afterward, if the target gains Bleed Potency due to external effects, the damage output may be further increased.

4) LCE E.G.O::Ardor Blossom Star Faust

[ E.G.O - A.B.S Activation ]
Strengthens damage output based on Burn Potency on self at the On Use timing. While this Skill does not have effects that gain Burn Potency afterward, if this unit gains Burn Potency due to external effects, the damage output may be further increased.

[ Drawn by Flame ]
Strengthens damage output based on Burn Potency on self at the On Use timing. While this Skill does not have effects that gain Burn Potency afterward, if this unit gains Burn Potency due to external effects, the damage output may be further increased.

Once again, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

"[On Use] Deal more damage" Effect Error Compensation
----------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x500
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Nov. 6th, 2025 (KST)
- When : After Oct. 30th, 2025 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Nov. 6th, (Thu) 2025, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

title: Notice: Known Issues after Oct. 23rd, 2025 Scheduled Update
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

We have identified the following issues in the Oct .23rd, 2025 Scheduled Update.

Once each of the following issues has been fixed, we will inform you via a future notice.

Please continue reading for more information.

[ Known Issues ]
► An issue where, when W Corp. L4 Cleanup Agent - CCA Heathcliff uses a Defense Skill, the location in which "Rip Space - CCA Overdrive" is generated varies depending on whether he Clashed with it or not
※ This is an issue with the Skill generation timing. Once this issue has been fixed, "Rip Space - CCA Overdrive" will become usable after the turn in which he gains Overcharge, whether he Clashed with his Defense Skill or not.

► An issue where, when W Corp. L4 Cleanup Agent - CCA Heathcliff uses a Defense Skill, "Rip Space - CCA Overdrive" becomes added to the list of upcoming Skills next turn regardless of the Charge Count conditional

► An issue where Skills that gain Coin Power at [Coin Start] reflect those values for Clash forecasts as well
※ As [Coin Start] effects activate when the affected Coin begins its attack, they're not supposed to affect the unit's Clash Power.
However, these were unintentionally taken into account for Clash Power forecasts, so we intend to fix them.
We sincerely apologize for the confusion our unclear wording and error caused in identifying the affected units' exact Clash Power.

► (EN Only) An issue where, in Main Story Chapter 0, certain texts are missing

► (EN Only) An issue where, in Stage 6.5-28, certain unnecessary texts are visible in Skill descriptions

► (JP Only) An issue where, in Ch. 6.5 Murder on the WARP Express, certain texts were missing

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

Thank you.

title: (Steam) Oct. 9th Ver. 1.88.1 Update Notice
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

We would like to inform you about the Ver. 1.88.1 Update, the version with the frame drop issue from Ver. 1.88.0 fixed.

As we shared earlier, please understand that mobile versions of the game cannot be updated immediately,
as this fix requires changes to the in-game logic and needs to go through market reviews.

Please continue reading for more information.

[ Cause ]
A side effect of fixing the issue where damage numbers from effects occurred in abnormally high frequencies

[ Solution ]
Reverted the adjusted logic to fix the issue

[ Future Measures ]
Over our review, it was identified that the issue in which several unnecessary text updates occur at the start of the Combat Phase and cause performance issues was not directly related to the issues in this version. Therefore, we have not included that fix to Ver. 1.88.1.

We will more carefully review the possible side effects and ensure that the issue is completely resolved before applying it to a future update.
Going forward, we will be periodically conducting game performance reviews to ensure that we can catch any changes that may potentially affect the game progression & performance.

[ Version Update ETA ]
- After 10.09(THU) 19:30(KST)
- Please note that there may be a 10-minute margin of error to the ETA.

We once again sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

[10/9 Scheduled Update Error Compensation]
- Content : Lunacy x500
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Oct. 16th, 2025 (KST)
- When : After Oct. 9th, 2025 (Thu) 21:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Error Compensation can be claimed until Oct. 16th, (Thu) 2025, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

title: Known issues in Ver. 1.88.0, updated Oct. 9th
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

We have identified an issue where the game lags for several seconds when the player presses the button to enter the combat phase from the chaining phase.

The following are what we have learned thus far:

[Cause]
Numerous unnecessary text updates occurred simultaneously with the beginning of the Combat Phase, causing the lag.

[Solution]
Adjusted the in-game logic to eliminate unnecessary text updates.

Also, as there are heavy frame drops occurring in the version updated today(1.88.0),

we are currently reviewing and analyzing the adjusted logics and added content in ver. 1.88.0.

We will fix them as soon as the reviews are completed and deploy a new version of the application.

However, as these fixes require the respective market reviews on AOS, iOS,
please understand that the fixes will be deployed on Steam first.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Fixed an issue where, among Unbrilliant Glory Gregor's Awakening Skill effects, "[After Attack] Heal 5 SP for every target that was Staggered or killed due to this Skill's damage (max 25)" only detected a single target at the "After Attack" activation timing
