title: Notice: Unbrilliant Glory Gregor Description Changes & Error
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

In this post, we would like to inform you about errors that have been identified in Unbrilliant Glory Gregor's effects and descriptions.

We sincerely apologize for this ability & description error.

Please continue reading for more information.

[Changes]

► An issue where "Man in Scabbard" gain conditional "Gain X Man in Scabbard for every Y HP/Shield HP damage taken from getting hit" activated whenever this unit took enough HP/Shield HP damage regardless of whether this unit was hit or not
- Issue: Despite the description, "Man in Scabbard" can be gained from any damage to HP/Shield HP, even when this unit was not hit
- Solution: Remove the "from getting hit" conditional (applied with Oct. 2nd Scheduled Update)
※ New Descriptions:
- Gain 1 for every 3 HP damage taken
- Gain 1 for every 5 Shield HP damage taken

※ So far, whenever an Identity or E.G.O ability error was identified, it was generally our direction to adjust the ability to fit the description,
because the descriptions are what players reference before acquiring Identities & E.G.O; changing the description after the fact would remove that expectation and risk causing further confusion.

However, if we were to change the ability to fit the description (so that Man in Scabbard is gained only when Gregor is hit, as opposed to whenever he takes enough damage), it would lower the E.G.O ramp-up speed in certain conditions, possibly making this E.G.O feel worse to use than it is now.

Therefore, considering the unique circumstances of this being a Collaboration Limited Extraction E.G.O, and considering that some managers may have extracted this E.G.O based on the expectation that its current behavior will not be changed,
we would like to make an exception this time, choosing to maintain its abilities as-is and instead adjusting the description to fit its current behavior(by removing the "from getting hit" conditional).

This judgment was also based on the fact that the buff in question already has a per-turn cap;
therefore, while this would make it easier to stack the buff effect, it would be okay to maintain its abilities as-is.

Another reason is that this was a Limited Collaboration Extraction, which means that it would be a particularly significant and sensitive subject for managers who have extracted.
Considering all of the above, we decided to make an exception this time and change the description to match the ability.

We once again sincerely apologize for the confusion and inconvenience this error caused to all managers who have acquired Unbrilliant Glory Gregor.

<Cause>
1. Differences in internal interpretation of what exactly "getting hit" means
The description was designed with the following conditional in mind: "when this unit takes damage from getting hit by a Skill". However, in the process of implementing and testing the ability, this phrase was interpreted to mean "when this unit takes damage from any source".

<Future Measures>
We will renew our internal guideline on in-game phrases and create a checklist for the QA process to assist in the testing phase.
Also, we will improve our development process by holding internal meetings to ensure that all of these definitions are consistently understood and applied throughout the design, implementation, and testing phases.

► An issue where, among the Awakening Skill's effects, "[After Attack] Heal 5 SP for every target that was Staggered or killed due to this Skill's damage (max 25)" only detected a single target at the "After Attack" activation timing

※ As this error requires a Client build and review, it will be corrected on the next Scheduled Update.
We sincerely apologize for this ability issue that caused inconvenience in E.G.O Skill usage.

[Unbrilliant Glory Gregor Error Compensation]
- Compensation : Lunacy x500
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Oct. 9th, 2025 (KST)
- When : After Oct. 1st, 2025 (Wed) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Error Compensation can be claimed until Oct. 9th, (Thu) 2025, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

title: Notice: ProjectMoon Fanwork Guidelines will be Updated
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

As we at Project Moon always wish for our passionate fans to enjoy creating art and other derivative works,
we have previously published the Project Moon Fanwork Guidelines to maintain a healthy creative environment.

However, recently, there have been an increased number of cases of crossing the established Fanwork Guidelines, including but not limited to game client modifications, unauthorized sharing of relevant resources, private servers, AI training, and the use of voice actor performances for purposes of AI training.

Therefore, in the near future, we will be updating our Fanwork Guidelines to provide clearer guidance on the previously mentioned cases.

We are collecting cases of overt copyright infringements,
and after reviewing them, have first reported the cases that have already been reported multiple times by external sources.

Please note that any future confirmed cases may be reported, starting from Oct. 13th(MON), 2025.

We will share more detailed information as soon as the updated Guidelines are prepared.

Thank you.

title: Notice : Pilgrimage of Compassion Stage Difficulty Adjustment Hotfix
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

Difficulties for Stages LC-PC-11 and LC-PC-14 will be changed with enemy adjustments.

We determined that the Normal difficulty may be presenting too significant a challenge when it comes to defeating the enemies in those stages, even with Identity & E.G.O Level/Upgrade Tier adjustments.

Therefore, we are making adjustments to the Normal difficulty of the Pilgrimage of Compassion to allow for an easier experience when enjoying the story.

※ The Hotfix will be deployed without a separate client update, but please note that additional in-game downloads may occur.

Please continue reading for more information.

[Pilgrimage of Compassion Stage Difficulty Adjustments]
1. Stage LC-PC-11 enemy difficulty will be adjusted.

[In Normal, Hard difficulties both]
► Mid-battle Choice Event check requirements will be lowered.

[In Normal difficulty only]
► Enemies featured in this Stage will lose 5 levels.
※ Naturally, with this level adjustment, their Offense/Defense Levels and HP will be decreased.

2. Stage LC-PC-14 enemy difficulty will be adjusted.

[In Normal, Hard difficulties both]
► Reading priority marker will be added to one of the enemy Passives.
※ Affected Passive : Nethersea Brand Utopia

[In Normal difficulty only]
► The enemy will lose Defense Levels.
- Before : Level -0
- After : Level -5

► 'Tidal Arc' Skill effects will be adjusted.
(1) Power gain conditional adjusted
- Before : [On Use] For every 5 Nervous Impairment on target, consume 1 Abyssal Vitality to gain Clash Power +1 (max 5)
- After : [On Use] For every 10 Nervous Impairment on target, consume 1 Abyssal Vitality to gain Clash Power +1 (max 2)

(2) Coin 2 effect adjusted
- Before : Unbreakable Coin, [On Hit] Inflict 4 Nervous Impairment
- After : [On Hit] Inflict 2 Nervous Impairment

► 'Fierce Currents' Skill effects will be adjusted.
(1) Base Power adjusted
- Before : 4
- After : 3

(2) Coin 2 effect adjusted
- Before : [On Hit] Inflict 4 Nervous Impairment
- After : [On Hit] Inflict 2 Nervous Impairment

► 'Undulating Waves' Skill effects will be adjusted.
(1) Power gain conditional adjusted
- Before : [On Use] Coin Power +1 for every 3 Nervous Impairment on the main target (max 9)
- After : [On Use] Coin Power +1 for every 5 Nervous Impairment on the main target (max 5)

(2) Coin 1 effect adjusted
- Before : [On Hit] Inflict 6 Nervous Impairment
- After : [On Hit] Inflict 4 Nervous Impairment

[Hotfix Deployment ETA]
- 09.26(Fri) 16:30(KST)
- There may be a 10-minute margin of error from the ETA.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

Thank you.

[Pilgrimage of Compassion Stage Difficulty Adjustment Compensation]
- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Oct. 9th, 2025 (KST)
- When : After Sep. 26th, 2025 (Fri) 16:30 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Oct. 9th (Thu) 2025, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

title: Notice on iOS Package Sales Suspension and Follow-up Measures
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

It has been confirmed that among the packages sold since September 25th, the “E.G.O [HE] Upgrade Pack” was sold at an incorrect price on the iOS platform.
To prevent further purchases, we have temporarily suspended sales of this package on iOS.

We sincerely apologize for the confusion caused by this pricing error.
Please refer to the details and follow-up measures below.

[Sales Suspension Notice]

Affected Product: “E.G.O [HE] Upgrade Pack” (sold since 9/25)

Suspension Time: October 2nd (Thu), 21:30 (KST)

※ The suspension may take effect at different times depending on the device.
If the package still appears available for purchase after the suspension time, please refrain from purchasing it.

The package will be re-released once the price has been corrected.

[Cause]

The price of the “E.G.O [HE] Upgrade Pack” was incorrectly set only on iOS.

iOS Price: $21.99 / ₩33,000 / ¥3,000

AOS & Steam Price (Correct Price): $15.99 / ₩23,000 / ¥2,200

[Follow-up Measures]

For Managers who purchased the mispriced package, for each mispriced package that you purchased, we will provide Paid Lunacy equivalent to the price difference (~10,000 KRW), along with additional compensation.

Eligible Users: Managers who purchased the mispriced “E.G.O [HE] Upgrade Pack” (376 users)

Compensation: 1,758 Paid Lunacy (per purchase, total of 688 purchases)

Distribution Date: October 9th, during the regular update

Our initial intent was to refund all mispriced Pack purchases;
However, as refunds cannot be processed directly by the game company due to Apple’s platform policies,
we will instead provide the equivalent Paid Lunacy for the price difference,
and as an apology, give an additional 1,000 Paid Lunacy to express our regret.

※ The difference amount (~10,000 KRW) was calculated based on the most cost-effective Lunacy bundle, and is equal to approximately 758 Paid Lunacy.
This will be granted to all affected users regardless of currency or region.

If you would prefer a refund, please request it directly via Apple Customer Support:

iOS Customer Support
https://reportaproblem.apple.com/

We deeply apologize for the inconvenience caused by this issue.

[Future Measures]

We will strengthen our verification procedures to ensure that package prices and displays remain consistent across all platforms,
to prevent such issues from recurring.

Once again, we sincerely apologize for the confusion and inconvenience this error has caused.

[ Full Moon 2025 Complete Commemorative Upgrade Package ]
- Contents: Decaextraction Ticket x4, Takeoff Module - ID Uptie x1, Takeoff Module - E.G.O Spinning [WAW] x1, Identity Training Ticket IV x140, Threads x100

※ Please note that Package contents may be changed prior to release. In such a case, we will inform you of the changes via the Oct. 2nd(KST) Scheduled Update Notice.

Major Changes
-------------

1. The ability to view the list of E.G.O Gifts activated
by Deployment Conditionals has been improved.

- Your "Currently owned E.G.O Gifts" UI will now be split to 2 categories: "Deployment" and "Always Active".

- When an E.G.O Gift is activated due to meeting the Deployment conditions, they will be marked as "Activated".

[ List of Affected E.G.O Gifts (35 Gifts) ]
Soothe the Dead, Secret Cookbook, Purloined Flame, Bloody Mist, Devotion, Hemorrhagic Shock, A Drop, Coupled Oscillation, Interlocked Cogs, Epicenter, Omnivibro-octoveti-bell, Pocket Watch : Type L, E, Y, P, Enrapturing Trance, Thorny Rope, Cut-works Bric-à-brac, Dulim, Stained Glass Shards, Black Sheet Music, Tangled Bones, Surgius Clog, Impending Wave, Lucky Pouch, Reminiscence, Cask Spirits, T-1 Perpetual Motion Machine, T-1B Octagonal Bolt, Insulator, T-5 Perpetual Motion Machine, Automated Joints, Overcharged Battery, Perpetual Generator Servos, Hearts-powered Jewel

- The following E.G.O will soon be added to the "Deployment" category with a future update, and will be marked with the "Activated" label once the conditions are met.

[ List of to-be updated E.G.O Gifts (8 Gifts) ]
Sublimity, Unbending, Ragged Bamboo Hat, Old Dopo Robe, Resplendence, Cultivation, Swarmcloud, Everlasting Chains of Bond

2. Mirror Dungeon Theme Pack "Hatred and Despair" will be featured on both Floor 3 and 4 on the Normal difficulty as well.

※ In our previous Scheduled Update notice of Sep. 18th, we shared that the change will be limited only to the Hard difficulty. However, after the update, we identified that the 'Hatred and Despair' Theme Pack is appearing on Floors 3 and 4 of the Normal difficulty as well. We would like to ask all Managers who are seeking this Theme Pack in the Normal difficulty to take note of this information.

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Fixed an issue where Heishou Pack - Wu Branch Adept Yi Sang's Passive "The Steed's Houndlike Loyalty [狗馬之心]" effect "After this unit uses the Skill "Obsidian Stormrider's Crescent Decapitator", Family Hierarch Candidate Ishmael uses "Crimson Spring" as Assist Attack (once per turn)" does not activate if the enemy is either killed or became untargetable

► Fixed an issue where, under specific circumstances, The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu's Skill "Answer Me, Heishou Packs" could combo with Heishou Identities when they shouldn't
- Before : When a Heishou Identity with the "Wild Hunt" effect is the combo partner, The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu used the "I Carve the Path of a Lord" Skill.
- After : When a Heishou Identity with the "Wild Hunt" effect is the combo partner, The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu uses the "Lonesome Stand: Sacrifice to Claim The Garden [孑子單身, 捨生取固]" Skill instead.

► Fixed an issue where, after using a Skill with 2+ Atk Weight against a target with an Unbreakable Coin Skill and winning the Clash, the sub-targets' Counter Skills wouldn't activate after getting hit

► Fixed an issue where a certain Hidden Boss enemy's Panic effect did not activate in the Mirror Dungeon Parallel Superposition EXTREME mode

► Fixed an issue where, in the Stage Select Menu of a chapter whose first Stage is yet to be completed, the camera movement would sometimes malfunction

► Fixed an issue where "Reuse" conditional Coins would load in at awkward positions

► Fixed an incorrect Panic icon image for one of the enemies featured in Canto 7
※ Relevant Panic Icon : Guilt
※ The Panic effect is working as intended; this only fixes the panic icon.

Known Issues
------------

► An issue where, in a certain Stage of Chapter 8.5-2 Pilgrimage of Compassion, an incorrect music would briefly play in the Defeat results screen

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Oct. 2nd, 2025 (KST)
- When : After Sep. 25th, 2025 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Oct. 2nd, (Thu) 2025, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.
- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change depending on the status of maintenance. If such a change occurs, we will let you know in a follow-up notice.
- A resource download may be prompted after the build update. If you're using a mobile device, it is recommended to proceed with a Wi-Fi connection.
- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account. Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: 2025, Sep. 18th Scheduled Update Notice
content:
---------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on Sep. 18th, 2025 (KST).

Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.

Please refer below for details about the update.

Major Changes
-------------

1. Certain E.G.O Gifts with activation conditionals will now be easier to activate.
- Before: This Gift activates when X or more Identities have Attack Skills that apply or gain [Keyword]. (except E.G.O Skills, only counts Identities on the field)
- After: This Gift activates for the whole Encounter when X or more Identities have Attack Skills that apply or gain [Keyword]. (except E.G.O Skills)
※ Please note that the text above was written for the notice only; review the description of each E.G.O Gift to see the exact changes.

※ Currently, E.G.O Gift activation condition only counts the Identities on the field, which meant that ally deaths in Chain Battles could disable the E.G.O Gift.

※ Therefore, to promote multi-Keyword usage in battle, and to reduce the penalties of ally deaths, we are making it easier to maintain the E.G.O Gift effects for the duration of the whole battle even when allies are killed.

※ List of affected E.G.O Gifts (35 Gifts)
Soothe the Dead, Secret Cookbook, Purloined Flame, Bloody Mist, Devotion, Hemorrhagic Shock, A Drop, Coupled Oscillation, Interlocked Cogs, Epicenter, Omnivibro-octoveti-bell, Pocket Watch : Type L, E, Y, P, Enrapturing Trance, Thorny Rope Cuffs, Eerie Effigy, Ruin, Glyph of Glass Shards, Black Sheet Music, Tangled Bones, Surging Globe, Impending Wave, Lucky Pouch, Reminiscence, Cask Spirits, T-1 Perpetual Motion Machine, T-1B Octagonal Bolt, Insulator, T-5 Perpetual Motion Machine, Automated Joints, Overcharged Battery, Perpetual Generator Servos, Hearts-powered Jewel

2. A new in-battle UI element to view the full list of E.G.O Gifts that activate at Turn Start will be added.

- Activated E.G.O Gift names will be shown on top of each Identity at the same start of the turn in which each E.G.O Gift is activated.
- You can now check the number of activated E.G.O Gifts on the top right corner icon (which, when clicked, leads to the list of currently owned E.G.O Gifts)

※ List of E.G.O Gifts that appear in the UI (35 Gifts)
Soothe the Dead, Secret Cookbook, Purloined Flame, Bloody Mist, Devotion, Hemorrhagic Shock, A Drop, Coupled Oscillation, Interlocked Cogs, Epicenter, Omnivibro-octoveti-bell, Pocket Watch : Type L, E, Y, P, Enrapturing Trance, Thorny Rope Cuffs, Eerie Effigy, Ruin, Glyph of Glass Shards, Black Sheet Music, Tangled Bones, Surging Globe, Impending Wave, Lucky Pouch, Reminiscence, Cask Spirits, T-1 Perpetual Motion Machine, T-1B Octagonal Bolt, Insulator, T-5 Perpetual Motion Machine, Automated Joints, Overcharged Battery, Perpetual Generator Servos, Hearts-powered Jewel

3. Mirror Dungeon Theme Pack "Hatred and Despair" will now appear from different floors in the Hard Difficulty.
- Before: Floor 3
- After: Floor 3, 4

※ This does not change its spawn Floor in the Normal difficulty; this only affects the Hard difficulty.

4. Mirror Projection / Achievements' "Hidden" Category Achievement text will be changed
- Before: Obtain EX-Tier E.G.O Gift "Wealth/A Certain Philosophy"
- After: Unlock the EX-Tier E.G.O Gift "Wealth/A Certain Philosophy" in the E.G.O Gift Compendium

※ As the exact conditions to unlock that Achievement are functioning as written in the "After" description as of the Sep. 11th Scheduled Update, we are updating the description to provide more accurate information.

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Retrieved Starlight that were calculated as "0" in the issue where, in Ver. 1.81.0 and 1.81.1, any Starlight used in the Mirror Dungeon was not calculated post-clear
※ Affected managers will be informed via a separate message.
※ Please refer to our previous Steam Announcemnt for more information

► Fixed issues with N Corp. E.G.O::Contempt, Awe Ryōshū Passive "Let me show you something very interesting" functionality
※ Issue 1: An issue where "I Shall Fire / Anytime" could be used even when N Corp. E.G.O::Contempt, Awe Ryōshū was staggered and unable to use her Base Skills
※ Issue 2: An issue where, if all Skills were swapped out for other Skills in the Mirror Dungeon, N Corp. E.G.O::Contempt, Awe Ryōshū's Skill 1 Unopposed Attack did not trigger

► Fixed issues with N Corp. E.G.O::Contempt, Awe Ryōshū Skill "I Shall Fire / Anytime" functionality
※ Issue 1: Fixed an issue where "[Combat Start] Gain +1 Atk Weight for every 3 Torn Memory on self (max 2)" effect did not activate
※ Issue 2: Fixed an issue where, if N Corp. E.G.O::Contempt, Awe Ryōshū is still alive, the "[After Attack] If this unit has 7 Torn Memory at Combat Start, lose them all and heal 20 SP on self" effect did not activate

► Fixed an issue where, after Meursault E.G.O - Crushbound Past Corrosion Skill activated due to Corrosion choice, using the Corrosion E.G.O Skill would cause certain Skill effects to no longer activate
※ Relevant effect 1: [Before Attack] If the main target has 30+ (sum of Tremor Potency and Tremor Count), gain +2 Atk Weight
※ Relevant effect 2: [Before Attack] When activating even-numbered (Sloth Reson.) in odd-numbered turns, or when activating odd-numbered (Sloth Reson.) in even-numbered turns, deal +12% damage

► Improved the functionality of the E.G.O Gift Soothe the Dead's effect "Turn Start: Inflict 3 Burn Count to all enemies and randomly inflict a total of 15 Burn Potency between all enemies (or all Abnormality Parts; once per wave)."
- Before: The game inflicted both Burn Count and Potency at the same time, which meant that Burn Potency could sometimes not apply
- After: Separated two actions so that Burn Count is inflicted first before Burn Potency is inflicted, which means that 15 Burn Potency will now inflict more consistently

► Fixed an issue where the E.G.O Gift Reminiscence's effect "Prioritizes allies with Gloom Affinity Attack Skills; then, if a Party's Potency is 12+, lose Count" would not activate when there aren't any Identities who gain Poise Count

► Fixed an issue where the E.G.O Gift Epicenter's effect "When winning a Clash with a Skill that consumed Tremor Count on self: If the target does not have Tremor, inflict +3 Tremor Count" does not work as written
- Before: Was inflicting 5 Tremor Potency.
- After: Inflicts +3 Tremor Count, as written.

► Fixed an issue where the E.G.O Gift Hemorrhagic Shock's effect "If all enemies have Bleed, they lose 2 Defense Level. At Turn End, inflict (# of Bleed Activations x 2) Defense Level Down (max 20)" does not activate in Focused Encounters

► Fixed an issue where the E.G.O Gift A Drop's effect "For Identities with Skills that consume Bloodieas, apply 1 Power Up and 1 Damage Up next turn for every 10 Bloodieas consumed with the above effect (max 4)" gained "Attack Power Up" instead of "Power Up"

► Fixed an issue where, in Mirror Dungeon Parallel Superposition EXTREME, certain gimmicks in wave-based Encounters in certain Theme Packs would stop working when choosing the "Retry Stage" option
※ Relevant Theme Packs: Bridle of Infinity, Line 3 - Terminus

► Fixed an issue where, after swapping N Corp. E.G.O::Fell Bullet Yi Sang's Skill 3 with a Defense Skill, removing the Defense Skill and then using his Skill 3 would cause the targeting system to malfunction

► Fixed an issue where the Panic effect of an enemy in Stage 8-32, "On Hit, inflict Sinking" did not activate

► Fixed an issue where chaining against Clashable Counter/Clashable Guard Skill with a 2+ Atk Weight Skill would show the "Unopposed Attack" UI instead of "Clash UI"

► Fixed an issue where, under certain circumstances, progressing past Mirror Dungeon Floor 6 and getting wiped out, leading into the Exploration Complete menu, would prevent the player from obtaining their progression rewards

► Fixed an issue where the "Warning" text resource was missing from certain nodes such as Mirror Dungeon Elite Encounters

► Fixed an issue where, in Mirror Dungeon Theme Pack "N Corp. New League of Nine Littérateurs", the 2nd wave battle would trigger a Choice Event

► Fixed an issue where using N Corp. E.G.O::Contempt, Awe Ryōshū while having her illustration set as the base(pre-Uptie 3) illustration caused the Skill 3 image cut-in to load an incorrect area of the image

► Improved the readability of the "Purchase Projection Rate" pop-up window

► Fixed an issue where, in the pop-up window that appears after using either "Takeoff Module - ID Uptie" or "Takeoff Module - E.G.O Spinning", could cause certain UI elements to work incorrectly

► Fixed an issue where the pre-battle information window that appears before entering a battle node had incorrect Stage title placements

► Fixed an issue where a certain effect icon resource featured in Spring Cultivation was not replaced with the newest image

► Fixed an issue where certain E.G.O Gift buff icons from E.G.O Gifts added with the Sep. 11th Scheduled Update would not appear

► Fixed an issue where sending a request to delete the account and restarting the game could sometimes cause Error Code 40102 to appear

► (EN Only) Fixed an issue where N Corp. E.G.O::Contempt, Awe Ryōshū's Skill "Awe, Contempt" description listed an incorrect name for the Empowered Skill

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Sep. 25th, 2025 (KST)
- When : After Sep. 18th, 2025 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Sep. 25th, (Thu) 2025, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.
- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change depending on the status of maintenance. If such a change occurs, we will let you know in a follow-up notice.
- A resource download may be prompted after the build update. If you're using a mobile device, it is recommended to proceed with a Wi-Fi connection.
- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend
that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account. Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: Notice: Partial Connection Issue After Sep. 4th Resolved
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

After the Sep. 4th Scheduled Update, we have identified an issue where certain managers encountered download pop-ups, or had their "Drive" or "Extract" buttons on the bottom right corner of the screen malfunction.

[ Issues Identified ]
- After the Sep. 4th Scheduled Update, 22byte update would occur repeatedly
- After the Sep. 4th Scheduled Update, clicking the bottom right corner of the screen (Drive, Extract, etc) would cause the download pop-up to occur repeatedly

[ Identified Cause ]
- Our network service system malfunctioned after the deployment of the Scheduled Update (Sep. 4th 14:00~14:15 (KST))
- This issue occurred for users who accessed the game during the network service system malfunction

[ Solution ]
- This issue was resolved by resetting the cache data of the network service system (Sep. 8th (MON) 10:30 (KST))

This issue occurred after the network service malfunction post-update, and we were informed by the service provider representative that the service malfunction has been resolved.

Then, we reset the resource data of all managers who were unable to access the game, and resolved the issue where the download pop-up appeared repeatedly.

We sincerely apologize for the delayed identification and resolution of the issue, and will try our best to resolve this issue as soon as possible, should the same issue occur in the future.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused by this connection issue.

[Post-Sep. 4th Scheduled Update Error Compensation]
- Content : Lunacy x500
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Sep. 18th, 2025 (KST)
- When : After Sep. 8th, 2025 (Thu) 20:30 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Error Compensation can be claimed until Sep. 18th, (Thu) 2025, 06:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

title: 2025, Sep. 11th Scheduled Update Notice
content:
---------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on Sep. 11th, 2025 (KST).

Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.

Please refer below for details about the update.

New Content
-----------

1. New Target Extraction [N Corp. E.G.O::Contempt, Awe Ryōshū]
(9/11 12:00 ~ 9/25 10:00 (KST))
The following Identity will have increased odds of extraction.
- 3★ : N Corp. E.G.O::Contempt, Awe Ryōshū

※ N Corp. E.G.O::Contempt, Awe Ryōshū is a Season 6 Identity.

2. New Identity
The following Identity is added to the list of extractable Identities.
- 3★ : N Corp. E.G.O::Contempt, Awe Ryōshū

3. Target Extraction [Meursault] ((25/9/11 12:00 ~ 9/25 10:00 (KST))
The following Identities and E.G.O will have increased odds of extraction.
- E.G.O [WAW] : Crushbound Past Meursault
- E.G.O [HE] : Pursuance Meursault
- 3★ : The Thumb East Capo III Meursault, Cinq West Section 3 Meursault, Dieci South Section 4 Director Meursault, Blade Lineage Mentor Meursault, R Corp. 4th Pack Rhino Meursault, N Corp. Großhammer Meursault, W Corp. L2 Cleanup Agent Meursault
- 2★ : Dead Rabbits Boss Meursault, The Middle Little Brother Meursault, Rosespanner Workshop Fixer Meursault, Liu South Section 6 Meursault
- 1★ : LCB Sinner Meursault

4. New Packages
2 new limited packages will be added to the game
with the 2025. 9. 11(KST) Scheduled Update.

► Target Extraction Pack
- Contents : Decaextraction Ticket x 4
- Price : ₩33,000 / $21.99 / ¥3,000
- Can be purchased once
- Purchasable Period : 25. 9. 11 12:00 ~ 9. 25 10:00 (KST)

► Identity Growth Pack
- Contents : Takeoff Module - ID Uptie x 1, Identity Training Ticket IV x 60, Identity Training Ticket III x 30
- Price : ₩33,000 / $21.99 / ¥3,000
- Can be purchased once
- Purchasable Period : 25. 9. 11 12:00 ~ 9. 25 10:00 (KST)

Mirror Dungeon Parallel Superposition EXTREME Updated
-----------------------------------------------------

※ For additional Mirror of Immortality Parallel Superposition EXTREME implementation, Mirror Dungeon entry will be blocked for the following period: 2025. 09. 11 06:00 ~ 10:00 (KST)

1. EXTREME Adversity 'Ego Interference' will be added to the game.
- 'Ego Interference' : Multiply E.G.O resources consumed when using E.G.O

※ After the Sep. 11th Scheduled Update, the following Achievements will be made completable.
- Select 1 or more 'Ego Interference' Adversity and clear the Mirror Dungeon
- Clear Mirror Dungeon at 50+ Adversity Score
- Clear all Achievements

2. Hidden Boss enemies exclusive to the EXTREME Mode will be added.
- Hidden Boss enemies have a small chance to invade every EXTREME mode in the Mirror Dungeon, save for Shops and Boss nodes.
- You can choose between challenging the Hidden Boss enemy or escaping the fight.
- Escaping the fight will move you to the next Node without having to battle.

※ Clearing a Hidden Boss in Floor 11 does not remove the chance for other Hidden Bosses to appear in the subsequent Floors.
However, no more than 1 Hidden Boss can spawn in each floor.
※ Please note that, as progression is unavailable until the Hidden Boss is dealt with, it may be a good way to escape the fight entirely instead of challenging the Hidden Boss.

3. 4 new EXTREME-exclusive E.G.O Gifts have been added.
- These are 100% guaranteed rewards for defeating a Hidden Boss.

4. New Mirror Dungeon Achievement category "Hidden" has been added.
- Please note that this category does not affect your Achievement completion rate or count towards the "Complete All Achievements" Achievement.

5. The Theme Pack composition Floor 11 onward will be changed.
- Before: Floor 5+ Packs and EXTREME Mode exclusive Packs are featured
- After: EXTREME Mode exclusive Packs and certain Refraction Railway Packs are featured

Featured Theme Packs
N Corp. New League of Nine Littérateurs, Efflorescing Greenery, Line 3 - Terminus, Bridle of Infinity, S.E.A. C.R., Impenetrable Path, Who Couldn't be Bloodfiends, Line 3, Line 4 Section 3, Line 4 Section 4, Line 5

※ In the EXTREME mode, to give players time to reach each Identity, E.G.O, and E.G.O Gifts' ramped-up states and utilize them for as long as possible, we removed Theme Packs that feature several nodes with short battles and replaced them with EXTREME Exclusive Packs and Packs that primarily feature Long Battles.

6. We are working on making certain E.G.O Gifts' Deployment/team composition-based conditionals to be more generous, making it easier to activate them.
- E.G.O Gifts with "Activates when X+ Identities have/with~" conditionals will be given easier activation conditionals.
- We will share a more detailed changelog prior to the actual update in the future.

Major Changes
-------------

1. We have updated The Sign on Sinclair &
"Those who will be sovereigns of a Star".
※ We realized that the previously-used
image of "The Sign" was inaccurate.
※ The following images featuring The Sign will be changed:
Illustrations, Icons, Story Sprites, and more.

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Fixed an incorrect description text in Heishou Pack -
Wu Branch Adept Yi Sang's Skill 2 in Uptie Tier 2
- Before : If target has Deathrite, inflict 1 Concussion
- After : If target doesn't have Deathrite, inflict 1 Concussion

※ This issue was caused by inadequate review
in the process of proofreading the text.
※ Changing the function to match the text as we have in the past will cause this aspect of the Identity to become weaker when Uptied; therefore, we intend to change the function to fit the description.
We sincerely apologize for the confusion caused by this description error.

► Fixed an issue where MultiCrack Office Fixer Heathcliff's
Support Passive effects don't work as intended
※ Relevant effect: #1 Deployed ally: Max Charge Count +5
(When conditions are met, this effect will remain
activated until the start of the next turn)
- Before : The increased Max Charge Count effect from the Support Passive lasted even when Heathcliff Substituted or Returned.
- After : As per the description, the effect lasts only until the next Turn Start if Heathcliff Substitutes or Returns.

► Fixed an issue where Base Skills used due to The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu's Passive "The Heishou Lord" effects did not trigger their [Combat Start] effects

► Fixed an issue where using The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu's Empowered Skill 3 "Carve the Path of a Lord" would trigger the Empowered Skill animation even when not meeting the conditions.

► Fixed an issue where E.G.O equipped via the Sapling of Light ability SUPERBIA cannot be equipped again once unequipped

► Fixed an issue where 'Efflorescing Greenery' Mirror Dungeon Theme Pack's final wave boss pattern does not work properly

► Fixed an issue where Shops in "Mirror Dungeon of the Fathoms" shows 0 Cost

title: MD Parallel Superposition EXTREME Changes & Update Schedule
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

We would like to share some additional information regarding changes and upcoming new content to the Mirror Dungeon Parallel Superposition EXTREME mode, which will be updated Sep. 4th, 2025 12:00 (KST).

Please continue reading for more information.

[ Planned Changes ]
Certain aspects of "Adversity" will be adjusted at a later date.

[ Adversity with Planned Changes ]
Multiplies the amount of E.G.O Resources consumed when using E.G.O Skills

This Adversity's sole purpose was to increase the difficulty within Mirror Dungeons.
However, we realized that this Adversity would affect certain E.G.O Gifts' functions, causing them to work in unintended ways.

Therefore, this Adversity will be disabled for the Sep. 4th update,
and will be added back to the game after its logic is adjusted to affect only the E.G.O Resource consumption multiplication and nothing else.

※ The other Adversities are working as intended.

[ Planned Content ]
After the Parallel Superposition EXTREME Mode release, new bosses will be added to the mode.

[ Content ]
Several powerful enemies whom the manager had clashed with in the past will now spawn as new boss enemies.
Starting from Floor 11, there will be a small chance for them to invade a preexisting dungeon node to activate a battle encounter.

However, as it takes time to customize those boss enemies for the environments of the Mirror Dungeon, and applying all of them to the Mirror Dungeon at the same time could cause delays, we are planning to update the preexisting enemies first with the Sep. 4th update, with the new bosses coming with a future update.

We will share a more detailed information via a notice when the new bosses are updated.

To all users who have been looking forward to fighting the new bosses in the EXTREME mode, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

We will apply these changes and complete the update as soon as possible to provide a better gameplay experience.

Thank you.

title: Notice: FAQ Error Correction
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

On September 4th 2025, 14:00 (KST), we identified an error in one of our FAQ categories.

Please continue reading for more information.

[ FAQ Error Corrections Category ]
How can I cancel / cancel my purchase / get a refund?

[ Original Text ]
- If it has been within 14 days since your purchase, and if you have not claimed the product(s) from your Inbox, we can assist you with your cancellation request.
However, we will be unable to process your cancellation in the following circumstances.
(1) 14 days have passed since the purchase
(2) If the product has been claimed from the inbox
(3) If the product is an item that is used immediately upon purchase (e.g. Season Pass)

[ Corrected Text ]
- If it has been within 7 days since your purchase, and if you have not claimed the product(s) from your Inbox, we can assist you with your cancellation request.
However, we will be unable to process your cancellation in the following circumstances.
(1) 7 days have passed since the purchase
(2) If the product has been claimed from the inbox
(3) If the product is an item that is used immediately upon purchase (e.g. Season Pass)

[ Cause for Correction ]
We realized that, according to the actual terms of service, cancellation is possible only within 7 days of your purchase, whereas the FAQ incorrectly labeled it as 14 days. Therefore, we have updated the FAQ to align with the actual terms of service.

[ Exceptions Notice ]
For the managers who have sent in a cancellation request prior to this correction notice, but haven't yet had their purchase refunded: if their purchase was made 7~14 days ago, we will make an exception by withdrawing the items from their Inbox and processing the refund.
※ Please note that, just as it was before, items that immediately go into effect after purchase, or the items that have been claimed from the Inbox, cannot be refunded.

Please take note of this and submit your cancellation request within 7 days of your purchase.

We sincerely apologize for this unintended confusion, and we promise to continue to strive to improve ourselves so that we can provide more accurate information going forward.

title: 2025, Sep. 4th Scheduled Update Notice
content:
--------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.

Please refer below for details about the update.

New Content
-----------

1. New Mirror Dungeon Content [Parallel Superposition EXTREME]
※ Please refer to the Steam Announcements page for more information.

※ For the Mirror of Immortality Parallel Superposition EXTREME implementation, Mirror Dungeon entry will be blocked for the following period: 2025. 09. 04 06:00 ~ 10:00 (KST)

Please note this information for your gameplay plans.

2. Mirror of Immortality Achievement Update #4
The name for Achievements will be changed.
- Achievements → Mirror Projection / Achievements
- Achievement Progress → Projection Rate

"Adversity - EXTREME" and "Completionist" categories will be added to the list of Achievements, and Projection Rate Rewards will be expanded to Level 100.

※ Up to 60 levels' worth of Projection Rate can be obtained via completing Achievements.

※ Up to 1000 Projection Rate can be obtained every week by playing through the Mirror Dungeon.

※ The Weekly Projection Rate Cap's reset period is the same as the reset period for Weekly Bonuses.

※ Please note that playing through the Mirror Dungeon prior to Sep. 4th Scheduled Update and claiming the rewards after the Sep. 4th Scheduled Update will not yield any Weekly Projection Rewards.

Notice: Mirror Dungeon Achievement Projection Rate Adjustments
---------------------------------------------------------------

As shared in an earlier notice, Ver. 1.84.0, updated Aug. 14th (THU), had an issue where certain Achievements were counted double.
To address the issue, the following Achievement Progress & Achievement Reward (Projection Rate) adjustments will be deployed.

[Records Under Adjustment]
- Any progress made between 8/14(THU) 12:00 ~ 8/18(MON) 21:00 (KST)

[Adjusted Achievements]
- Clear Mirror Dungeon at Floor 5 or higher X time(s)
- Clear Mirror Dungeon at Floor 5 or higher X time(s) - every floor has to be in Hard Difficulty

[Adjustments]
- Progresses that were double-counted during the above period will be adjusted to count just once.
- If this issue caused an Achievement to be completed, it may be reverted to an incomplete state after the adjustment and have its clear rewards (Achievement Projection Rate) withdrawn.

※ With this adjustment, only the Achievement completion check & Clear Rewards (Achievement Projection Rate) will be adjusted.

※ Projection Rate Rewards will be withdrawn at a later date. We will share a more detailed schedule via a future notice.

► Fixed an issue where, if the player first viewed Identity Details before viewing "Cultivation Records" for Jia Xichun in Ch. 8.5, it would show the illustration for the previously-viewed Identity's illustration

title: New Content - Mirror of Immortality Parallel Superposition EXTREME
content:
------------------------------------------------------------------

Greetings, dear Manager.

New Content <Mirror of Immortality Parallel Superposition EXTREME> will be added to the game with the Sep. 4th, 2025 (KST) Scheduled Update.

※ For the Mirror of Immortality Parallel Superposition EXTREME implementation, Mirror Dungeon entry will be blocked for the following period: 2025. 09. 04 06:00 ~ 10:00 (KST)
Please note this information for your gameplay plans.

<Description>

- The preexisting names have been changed.
Achievements → Mirror Projection / Achievements,
Achievement Progress → Projection Rate

- Projection Rate can now be gained weekly.
Clear the Mirror Dungeon, gain Projection Rate, and earn rewards.

- Once you reach Floor 10 via the Parallel Superposition Mode (Infinity Mirror) in Mirror of Immortality, the “EXTREME” mode, which unlocks Floors up to 15, will be unlocked.

- Mounting Trials and Adversities will greatly empower the enemies; the higher your Floor, the more Starlight and Projection you will obtain.

- With the addition of the “Adversity” option, you can increase the difficulty further; the more Adversity Score you gain, the more Starlight and Projection you will obtain.

- 7 new Theme Packs exclusive to the Parallel Superposition EXTREME mode will be added.

Parallel Superposition EXTREME
------------------------------

- You will be given an option to enter the Parallel Superposition EXTREME mode after clearing the 10th floor of the Parallel Superposition mode.

- Entering the EXTREME mode expands the Mirror Dungeon to Floor 15.

- Parallel Superposition EXTREME mode is even more difficult than Parallel Superposition mode, and exists solely for personal challenges or Achievements.

- Clearing higher Floors in Parallel Superposition EXTREME mode will yield more Starlight and Projection.

- Please note that the Pass EXP or Lunacy rewards for clearing Floors above Floor 11 or higher are no different from clearing Floor 5, just like in Parallel Superposition mode.

- In order to enter the Parallel Superposition EXTREME mode after clearing Floor 10, you had to have finished every Theme Pack up to Floor 10 of that run in Hard difficulty.

- Just like in the Parallel Superposition Mode, please note that you will still be able to yield Floor 5 Clear Rewards even after failing or forfeiting at any point after clearing Floor 11.

Mounting Trials & Adversity
---------------------------

- Any Mounting Trials added after Parallel Superposition EXTREME mode will become more powerful with each completed Floor.

- Please note that Parallel Superposition EXTREME is significantly more difficult than Parallel Superposition mode. Enemies will become empowered by various compounding Trials and Adversities, and the players may gain various negative restrictions.

- In Parallel Superposition EXTREME mode, you can activate “Adversities”, which increases the difficulty even further.

- If continuing appears to be difficult, it may be a good idea to try again with a different combination of Mounting Trials, easier Adversities, E.G.O Gifts, Grace of the Immortal Star, or use the E.G.O Gift Search function.

Adversities
-----------

- In Parallel Superposition EXTREME, in addition to Mounting Trials, you will have an option to set “Adversities” for yourself.

- Starting from Floor 11, up to 5 Adversities can be selected with each Floor. Just like Mounting Trials, Adversities will continue to compound instead of going away.

- Selecting more Adversities will net more Adversity rewards: you will gain additional Starlight & Projection based on your cumulative Adversity Score.

- Please note that Mirror of Immortality Achievement EXP can be gained only until the Mirror Dungeon #7 update.

※ Adversities aren’t mandatory; you can reach Floor 15 without setting any Adversities, which may still be a good way to experience the dungeon.

Selecting Theme Packs
---------------------

- 7 new Theme Packs unique to Parallel Superposition EXTREME will be added.

- Mounting Trials & Floor Clear Rewards are the same as it is in HARD mode: 2 Reward E.G.O Gifts and 2 Mounting Trials attached to each Gift.

※ Please note that Theme Pack Search will be disabled past Floor 11.

Weekly Projection Cap
---------------------

- Clearing Mirror Dungeon Exploration will now yield additional Projection Rate.

- Clearing higher Floors with higher Adversity Scores will yield more Starlight and Projection Rate.

- You can earn up to 1000 Projection Rate per week; any Projection Rate gained past 1000 will be lost.

- The Weekly Projection Rate Cap's reset period is the same as the reset period for Weekly Bonuses.

※ Up to 60 levels' worth of Projection Rate can be obtained via completing Achievements.
Any Projection Rate obtained via completing Achievements do not count toward the Weekly Projection Cap.

※ If you find it difficult to clear the Achievements, you can gain weekly Projection Rate to obtain Projection Rate rewards instead.

※ Please note that playing through the Mirror Dungeon prior to Sep. 4th Scheduled Update and claiming the rewards after the Sep. 4th Scheduled Update will not yield any Weekly Projection Rate Rewards.

title: (AOS) Version Update for 1.85.0 Issue Fix
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

We would like to inform you that some of the issues mentioned in our previous notice will be applied to the AOS version of the game.

As for the iOS version of the game, as it requires a separate submission for market review after correcting the internal logic that caused the issue, it cannot be fixed immediately with this hotfix.

If you are playing on iOS, please use the PC(STEAM) version of the game until this issue is resolved.

[ Hotfix List]

► An issue where Kurokumo Clan Wakashu Ryoshu's Skill 3 "Lenticular Swirl" Skill animation causes an issue where the combat phase no longer progresses

► An issue where Cultivation Stage 8.5-4 cannot be progressed properly on certain devices due to visual glitches

[1.85.1 Hotfix ETA]
- AOS : 8.30(SAT) 16:30(KST)
- iOS : Next Scheduled Update Ver. 1.85.2

※ Please download the 1.85.1 Version Update on your respective AOS Play Store.
If the update has been properly deployed, version info displayed on the bottom right corner of the screen in the title menu will show "Ver. 1.85.1."

※ Please note that it may take up to 10 minutes for the Store Update button to activate.

[ Details Regarding the Hotfix List ]

We have identified an issue where, on certain AOS devices, progressing in the 8.5-4 Cultivation minigame would cause the game to only show a black screen or show various graphical glitches.

It has been identified that certain image effects were incompatible with the hardware settings on certain devices; we have adjusted the image effect loading settings to allow them to be more compatible. This game mode will become properly accessible after the update.

If the issue continues to occur after Ver. 1.85.1 Update, please share your device and OS info to the Customer Service email here: limbussupport@projmoon.com.

Once again, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

Thank you.

► New Announcer
- Jia Xichun/Wei Announcer

► Featured Extractions
- Standard Fare
- New Target Extraction [Spring Cultivation]
- Target Extraction [Ishmael]

► Featured Period : 25/08/28 12:00 ~ 09/11 10:00 (KST)

※ Please note that, while this Announcer will no longer be obtainable via Extraction after the featured period is over, it can be obtained via Yisang Exchange in future Target Extractions. (Not from Standard Fare extractions, as Yisang Exchange is not available from Standard Fare)

4. New Identity
The following Identity is added to the list of extractable Identities.

- 3★ : Heishou Pack - Wu Branch Adept Yi Sang

5. New Content [Spring Cultivation]
※ Please refer to the Steam Announcements page for more information.

6. New Packages
2 new limited packages will be added to the game with the 2025. 8. 28 (KST) Scheduled Update.

► Target Extraction Pack

- Can be purchased once
- Purchasable Period : 25. 8. 28 12:00 ~ 9. 11 10:00 (KST)

► Identity Growth Pack
- Contents : Takeoff Module - ID Uptie x 1, Identity Training Ticket IV x 60, Identity Training Ticket III x 30
- Price : ₩33,000 / $21.99 / ¥3,000
- Can be purchased twice
- Purchasable Period : 25. 8. 28 12:00 ~ 9. 11 10:00 (KST)

Ally Unit "Jia Xichun" Skills & Passives descriptions & effects adjusted
-------------------------------------------------------------------------

In the process of producing Ch. 8.5 'Spring Cultivation', we have identified several issues in which in-game text does not match the actual behaviors of the unit. As much time has passed since this NPC unit was released, we decided to make an exception and change the texts to fit this unit's current behavior, while enhancing it by changing the effects to fit the descriptions.

1. Crimson Phoenix Coin 2 Effects (Effects adjusted)
- Before : [On Hit] Gain Offense Level Up next turn
- After : [Heads Hit] Gain Offense Level Up next turn

2. Crimson Phoenix Coin 3 Effects (1) (Description adjusted)
- Before : [On Hit] Gain Poise equal to Rupture on target
- After : [On Hit] Gain Poise equal to Rupture on target and gain +1 Poise Count

3. Crimson Phoenix Coin 3 Effects (2) (Description adjusted)
- Before : [Heads Hit] Gain Poise Count equal to Rupture Count on target
- After : [Heads Hit] Gain Poise Count equal to Rupture Count on target next turn; gain 3 Poise next turn (max 2)

4. Adept Evasion Effects (Description adjusted)
- Before : [On Evade] Gain 1 Poise next turn (3 times per turn)
- After : [On Evade] Gain 1 Poise next turn (3 times per Skill)

5. Ba Jiao Banana Bolus Effects (Description adjusted)
- Before : If this unit's Offense Level is higher than the target's, gain Clash Power +1, and inflict +1 more Rupture Potency and Count (2 times per turn)
- After : Inflict +1 more Rupture Potency and Count (2 times per turn). If this unit's Offense Level is higher than the target's, Clash Power +1

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Fixed an issue where The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu's Combat Passive effect "When activating the E.G.O Skill "Tears of the Tarnished Blood - The End", nullify the death effect in its After Attack effects; instead, heal 60% HP." does not work as intended

- Before : If the unit's HP was healed beyond 60% of its max HP due to E.G.O Gift effects, the unit's HP would reset to 60% regardless after using the Skill "Tears of the Tarnished Blood - The End"

- After : If the unit's HP heals beyond 60% of its max HP due to E.G.O Gift effects, the unit's HP will not reset to 60%

※ Before this fix, when healing E.G.O Gift effects activated while using "Tears of the Tarnished Blood - The End", the HP would reset to 1, then heal back to 60%. This fix ensure that E.G.O Gifts such as "Grey Coat" or "Lithograph" would still be usable to their fullest potential.

► Fixed an issue where certain Identities' "On Hit" Coin effects would work only for "Clash Win"

※ Affected Identities
- 4th Coin effect on MultiCrack Office Rep. Faust's UT4 Skill 3
- 1st Coin effect on Liu South Section 5 Hong Lu's Skill 2

※ This conditional changing issue occurred in the process of making adjustments to certain logs in Oct. 2024.

► The Middle Little Sister Don Quixote's Skill 1 text adjusted

- Before : Coin 2 - [On Hit] Inflict 1 Bleed
- After : Coin 2 - [On Hit] Inflict 2 Bleed

※ We have identified an issue where this Skill effect inflicts more Bleed than written. However, as much time has passed since this unit's release, we decided that its current behavior has already been accepted as this unit's actual behavior. Also, making an adjustment according to our policy (as in, changing the texts to fit the effects) will reduce the Identity's ability. Therefore, we would like to make an exception and change the texts to fit this unit's current behavior.

► Fixed an issue where
Fixed an issue where Family Hierarch Candidate's "Crimson Strike - Launcher [始]" Skill, which is activated via the Passive "Launching Maneuver [始動]", activates later than the Skill activated via The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu's Passive "The Heishou Lord"

► (EN Only) Fixed a translation mistake in the "Combat" category of Mirror of Immortality Achievements

- Before : In an Encounter, have N Sinners Hit the main target Critically with all of their remaining Coins
- After : In an Encounter, have N Sinners Hit the main target Critically with all of their remaining Coins "in the first turn"

► Fixed various issues that occurred in battles against a certain boss enemy that appears in MD Theme Pack - "The Surrendered Witnessing"

※ Issue 1 : An issue where sub-units were not summoned in a certain phase
※ Issue 2 : An issue where choosing to give up in the middle of a certain in-combat cutscene causes the game to register that as victory
※ Issue 3 : Added a preventative logic for cases in which the player may become softlocked

► Fixed an issue where the game becomes softlocked when an E.G.O Corroded unit Retreats at Turn End

► Fixed an issue where Season 5 EVENT Identities & E.G.O were not visible in the Dispenser List

※ As before, Season 5 & Season 5 EVENT Identities/E.G.O cannot be obtained from the Dispenser during Season 6.

※ Starting from this update, free Season 6 EVENT Identities will be visible from the Dispenser as well, but they cannot be obtained from the Dispenser until a certain future Season.

► Fixed a line break issue for the "Blooming Sin" effect, which the Abnormality "Sign of Roses" uses.

► Fixed an issue where players were stopped from progressing through the Mirror Dungeon when quitting re-joining the game in the middle of a Choice Event cutscene

► An issue where Event Theme Packs would become visible among Theme Packs when using the "Pack Search" function in a Mirror Dungeon Run that started before the update

► Fixed an issue where Tails images for the first Coin were swapped between Wrath and Lust Skills

► (JP Only) In the Mirror of Immortality Achievements, erased certain unnecessary letters and adjusted the translation to be less vague

※ Affected Achievements 1
- Before : 鏡ダンジョン5階層以上のボス戦闘にて、2ターン以降に "強要された" ギフト・強要された重荷の効果を発動させてクリア
- After : 鏡ダンジョン5階層以上のボス戦闘にて、2ターン以降にギフト・強要された重荷の効果を発動させてクリア

※ Affected Achievements 2
- Before : 1回の戦闘で、最初のターンに[0]名の囚人が"マッチ後に残った"全てのコインで、メインターゲットにクリティカルヒットさせる
- After : 1回の戦闘で、最初のターンに[0]名の囚人が"全てのコイン（マッチで減ったコインを除く）"で、メインターゲットにクリティカルヒットさせる

► Fixed an issue where, for certain Identities' Skill animations, target's current list of effects appear abnormally

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation

Thank you.

title: New Content - Ch.8.5: Spring Cultivation
content:
----------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

With the Aug. 28th, 2025 (KST) Update, new content [Ch.8.5: Spring Cultivation] will be added to the game.

► Duration
2025/8/28 12:00 (KST) ~ Before 9/25 (KST) Scheduled Update

► Event Rewards Exchange
2025/8/28 12:00 (KST) ~ Before 10/2 (KST) Scheduled Update

► Requirements
- Event Unlock Conditions: Clear Main Story 0-4
- Event Stage Unlock Conditions: Clear Main Story 8-33
- Cultivation Minigame Unlock Conditions:
  Unlocked when progressing through 8.5-4

Event Description
-----------------

- When the event starts, the [Ch. 8.5 - Spring Cultivation] Event Page will open.

- During the event period, you can earn [Intro to Zhi, Yong, Ren] by clearing the Spring Cultivation Event Stages & the Mirror Dungeons.

- You can redeem [Intro to Zhi, Yong, Ren] in the [Achievements] section of the Event window.

- You can redeem various rewards from the [Reward Exchange] by spending the [Intro to Zhi, Yong, Ren] that you have collected.

Event Gameplay
--------------

► Combat Encounters of ‘Spring Cultivation’

You can obtain [Intro to Zhi, Yong, Ren] every time you complete a combat Encounter of ‘Spring Cultivation’.
Each Encounter has a first-time reward, and with it, you can obtain even more [Intro to Zhi, Yong, Ren].

The final combat Stage of ‘Spring Cultivation’ costs Enkephalin Modules.
That final Stage will have a higher Enkephalin-to-[Intro to Zhi, Yong, Ren] ratio, so it will be much more effective as a means of collecting [Intro to Zhi, Yong, Ren].

► Achievements

Complete various Achievements via taking Classes during the Event period to obtain [Intro to Zhi, Yong, Ren].

※ Achievements will become inaccessible and [Intro to Zhi, Yong, Ren] will no longer be obtainable after Sep. 25th, the Event end date.

※ If you have already completed but haven’t claimed your Achievement rewards prior to Sep. 25th, you can obtain [Intro to Zhi, Yong, Ren] by claiming them.

Event Gameplay
--------------

► Mirror Dungeons

During the Event Period, ‘Spring Cultivation’ Floor Theme Pack will have a fixed appearance on the final floor of both Mirror Dungeon Normal & Hard.

The Theme Pack features exclusive choice events and E.G.O Gifts.

※ Once the event is over, your Spring Cultivation Theme Pack will no longer be a fixed appearance, and Spring Cultivation Theme Pack spawn location may be adjusted.

Clearing a Mirror Dungeon run will net you [Intro to Zhi, Yong, Ren].
Selecting the Spring Cultivation Theme Pack as the final floor theme will net you even more [Intro to Zhi, Yong, Ren].

Mirror Dungeon Hard Difficulty rewards contain much more [Intro to Zhi, Yong, Ren] than Mirror Dungeon Normal.

※ However, please note that using the Weekly Bonuses does not increase the event currency yield.

※ Please note that, if you have started a Mirror Dungeon run before the event started, you will not gain event currency from that run.

► Main Story

If you have not fulfilled the event unlock requirements, you can obtain [Intro to Zhi, Yong, Ren] as a first-time reward from Main Story Combat Encounters.

Upon first-time-completion of an Encounter, you can obtain [Intro to Zhi, Yong, Ren] proportional to the amount of Enkephalin Spent regardless of whether you’ve met the EX Clear Conditions or not.

※ You cannot obtain event currencies from stages that have already been completed.

※ You cannot obtain [Intro to Zhi, Yong, Ren] from Refraction Railway or Luxcavation.

Cultivation Minigame
--------------------

The “Cultivation” minigame will be unlocked while progressing through Stage 8.5-4. In this minigame, you can cultivate Jia Xichun and Sinclair’s capabilities by making them take classes.

You can take up to 3 classes a day, and you have a total of 30 Class Days to play the game.

Taking Classes will enhance Jia Xichun and Sinclair’s Zhi, Yong, Ren stats, and Skills may gain new effects or become enhanced the higher their Zhi, Yong, Ren stats get.

“Class Outcome” determines the amount of stat gained.
Remember: the higher their Morale, the higher their chance to have a successful Class.

Taking certain classes together in the same day may unlock “Class Combos”. Class Combos give various extra effects that may affect the “Class Outcome”.

Every few days in the Cultivation Minigame, Jia Xichun will be made to take Midterms, or Sparring matches. Jia Xichun will independently take and choose her own actions for those Midterm combat Encounters.

Once 30 days of school are over, any Cultivation history from your previous minigame runs will be deleted.

You can replay Stage 8.5-4 to replay the Cultivation minigame for Jia Xichun and Sinclair.

※ Failing a Midterm does not affect their Cultivation rate; you can retry the Midterms.

※ If you have started a new Cultivation minigame run, any Ch. 8.5 - Spring Cultivation Combat Encounters featuring Jia Xichun will use her previous run’s Cultivation progress.

※ You can always select [Restart] option to restart the Cultivation minigame from Day 1. Or, choose the “To Window” button to save your progress and exit the minigame.

Event Currency
--------------

If you have cleared the Spring Cultivation’ Stages, Mirror Dungeons, and the Main Story, you have a small chance to obtain [Definitely Not A Secret Scroll].

[Definitely Not A Secret Scroll] has the highest chance of dropping from the final Encounter of the event.
However, the chance for it to drop is the same across all other Encounters.

[Definitely Not A Secret Scroll] is automatically converted to 20 [Intro to Zhi, Yong, Ren] in the Results or the Rewards screen upon acquisition.

Event Bonus Units
-----------------

Obtain more [Intro to Zhi, Yong, Ren] by completing Event Encounters or Mirror Dungeons while equipped with Event Bonus Identities.

<Event Bonus Identities>

► 40% Bonus
3★ : Heishou Pack - Wu Branch Adept Yi Sang, Heishou Pack - You Branch Sinclair, Family Hierarch Candidate Ishmael

► 20% Bonus
3★ : Blade Lineage Salsu Sinclair, The One Who Shall Grip Sinclair, Cinq South Section 4 Director Sinclair, Dawn Office Fixer Sinclair, Devyat’ North Section 3 Sinclair, The Middle Little Brother Sinclair, The Thumb Fast Soldato II Sinclair
2★ : Zwei South Section 6 Sinclair, Los Mariachis Jefe Sinclair, Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Sheet Sinclair, Molar Boatworks Fixer Sinclair, Zwei West Section 3 Sinclair
1★ : LCB Sinner Sinclair

※ The Event Currency Bonus from each Identity is additive. (Rounded up)

※ Event Currency Bonus maxes out at 120% Bonus.

※ Event Bonus Identities don’t actually have to participate in a battle; you can earn the bonus currency simply by having them in your Team loadout.

※ Event Currency Bonus applies to first-time clear rewards and Mirror Dungeon clear rewards as well.

Event Rewards
-------------

At the [Rewards Exchange], you can spend [Intro to Zhi, Yong, Ren] you’ve collected to purchase various rewards.

※ You can no longer obtain [Intro to Zhi, Yong, Ren] after you obtain enough [Intro to Zhi, Yong, Ren] to purchase every item in the [Reward Exchange].

※ [Intro to Zhi, Yong, Ren] will no longer be obtainable once the Event closes after the 2025/09/25 (KST) Scheduled Update.

※ [Reward Exchange] will be open for 5 weeks,
from 2025/8/28 12:00 (KST) ~ Before 2025/10/2 (KST) Scheduled Update.

※ Even after the event fully ends, you will be able to experience the Spring Cultivation combat Encounters and view its story anytime at the Drive tab and Theater - [Detour Tales].

title: Notice: MD Achievement Counting Error, Hotfix, and Currency Recovery
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

We have identified an issue in Version 1.84.0, updated Aug. 14th, where certain Mirror Dungeon Achievement clear counts was counting twice when it should count only once. The hotfix for this issue has been distributed.

Please continue reading for more information.

[ Hotfix ETA ]
- 8.18(MON) 21:00(KST)

[ Issue ]
- An issue where, after the Aug. 14th Scheduled Update's second round of updates for Mirror of Immortality Achievements, the Mirror Dungeon Clear counts were being counted twice

[ Affected Achievement Missions ]
- Clear Mirror Dungeon at Floor 5 or higher X times
- Clear Mirror Dungeon at Floor 5 or higher X times - every floor has to be in Hard Difficulty

[ Cause ]
- This issue was caused by a duplicate id data that was added in the process of updating new Achievements

[ Solution ]
- Removal of the duplicate id data

[ Future Measures ]
- Adjust the data load logic to prevent duplicate data from being entered twice

The solution to the above issue has been identified,
and a Hotfix has been deployed to correct it.

Also, any Mirror Dungeon clear records affected by this errors will be reverted to their correct values, and if the affected record is in a cleared state, it may be reverted to an uncleared state as the clear record is re-adjusted to the correct value. In such a case, any Achievement points and achievement rewards may be withdrawn from your accounts.

We will inform you of a more detailed deployment date with a future update notice.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

[Notice: Mirror of Immortality Achievement Error Compensation]
Compensation: Lunacy x500
Recipients: All users whose accounts were created before Aug. 28th, 2025, 10:00
When: After Aug. 18th (MON), 2025, 22:30 (KST)
Can be claimed once per account

Error Compensation can be claimed until Aug. 28th, (Thu) 2025, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

title: 2025, Aug. 21st Scheduled Update Notice
content:
----------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on Aug. 21st, 2025 (KST).

Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.

Please refer below for details about the update.

New Content
-----------

1. Mirror of Immortality Achievements Update Part 3
"Combat" category will be added to the list of Achievements, and Achievement Reward levels will be expanded to level 55.

"Loadout" category Achievement conditionals adjusted
----------------------------------------------------

Achievement condition descriptions for certain "Loadout" category Achievements will be adjusted.

※ Relevant texts: Defeat the "A Certain Theme Pack" boss with X or more of "A Certain Keyword" units, including "A Certain Unit", in your Loadout (Not counting Backup Units; incompletable by Rental Teams)

- Before : "Not counting Backup Units"
- After : "Counting Backup Units"

※ Relevant Missions

- Defeat the 'The Unconfronting' Theme Pack boss with 4 or more N Corp. Fanatic Identities, including 'The One Who Shall Grip Sinclair', in your Loadout (incompletable by Rental Teams)

- Defeat the 'The Unchanging' Theme Pack boss with 4 or more Technology Liberation Alliance Identities, including 'Effloresced E.G.O::Spicebush Yi Sang', in your Loadout (incompletable by Rental Teams)

- Defeat the 'The Evil Defining' Theme Pack boss with 3 or more of The Pequod Identities, including 'The Pequod Captain Ishmael', in your Loadout (incompletable by Rental Teams)

- Defeat the 'The Surrendered Witnessing' Theme Pack boss with 6 or more Identities Deployed. (Team must include 'The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu', 'Family Hierarch Candidate Ishmael', and at least 4 Heishou Pack Identities; counting Backup Units; incompletable by Rental Teams)

※ The affected Achievement Missions were designed to be thematically appropriate for each Seasonal highlight Identity. However, we have identified an issue post-release that these achievements could be completed even when they were Deployed as Backup Units.

If we were to correct the mission conditionals to fit the text as we had been doing thus far, it may cause a fairness issue between managers who completed the above achievement prior to adjustment and those who did not. Therefore, we intend to keep the actual conditionals as-is and change the description to fit it instead.

We sincerely apologize for the confusion, and we will continue to improve ourselves to prepare a better testing procedure going forward.

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Fixed various issues in the Mirror Dungeon 'Fusion' menu

1. An issue where an error message appears when attempting to use the Wishmaking option without enough Starlight for it
2. An issue where the option to sort by Keyword does not work properly
3. An issue where the game freezes when Fusing E.G.O Gifts under specific conditions

► (EN Only) Fixed an incorrect description in Hong Lu E.G.O 'Tears of the Tarnished Blood [污血泣泪]' effect 'Flower-burying Wedge [埋花楔]'

- Before : Turn Start: gain 2 Offense Level Up and 2 Defense Level Down
- After : Turn Start: gain 2 Offense Level Up and 2 Defense Level Down "for every Stack"

※ This is a translation text-only change; the actual effects of this buff isn't changed.

► Fixed an issue where The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu's animated illustration did not play as intended

► Fixed an issue where The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu's Post Uptie 3 illustration had a few missing finishing touches

► Fixed an issue where certain visual effects appearing around The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu sprite would load in incorrect sizes

► Fixed an issue where the Mirror Dungeon Theme Pack "Pitiful Envy" had an incorrect image for a boss enemy

Known Issues
------------

► An issue regarding Sprite images in Stage 8-20 Boss fight story cutscene phase changes

1. An issue where, when the animation of a unit teleporting away coincides with a story cutscene, the unit's Sprite disappears
2. An issue where, when a unit Retreating coincides with a story cutscene, the Retreated unit's Sprite remains

► An issue where, under certain circumstances, the Mirror Dungeon 'The Surrendered Witnessing' Theme Pack boss enemy becomes invincible, softlocking the player's progress.

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Aug. 28th, 2025 (KST)
- When : After Aug. 21st, 2025 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Aug. 28th, (Thu) 2025, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).

- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.

- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.

- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change depending on the status of maintenance. If such a change occurs, we will let you know in a follow-up notice.

- A resource download may be prompted after the build update. If you're using a mobile device, it is recommended to proceed with a Wi-Fi connection.

- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.

- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account. Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.

- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: Notice: Known Issues in Ver. 1.84.0 Updated Aug. 14th
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

We would like to inform you about the issues that occurred in Version 1.84.0, updated Aug. 14th.

Please continue reading for more information.

[ Known Issues ]
- An issue where Identity Sprites don't load properly when a story cutscene plays after the phase change for the boss enemy featured in Stage 8-20
1) An issue where Identity Sprites can disappear when the animation where the Identity teleports away coincides with the story cutscene
2) An issue where, when an Identity's Retreat coincides with the story cutscene, the Identity's Sprite lingers on the stage

- An issue where, under certain circumstances, the boss enemy from the Mirror Dungeon Theme Pack "The Surrendered Witnessing" becomes invincible, softlocking he player

We are currently investigating the above issues,
and we are working hard to fix them as soon as possible.

Therefore, we would like to recommend that our users refrain from accessing "The Surrendered Witnessing" Mirror Dungeon Theme Pack until this issue is resolved.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: 2025, Aug. 14th Scheduled Update Notice
content:
----------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on Aug. 14th, 2025 (KST).

Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.

New Content
-----------

1. New Target Extraction [The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu]
(25/08/14 12:00 ~ 08/28 10:00 (KST))

The following Identities and E.G.O will have increased odds of extraction.

2. Target Extraction [Heishou Pack]
(25/08/14 12:00 ~ 08/28 10:00 (KST))

- 3★ : Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Adept Faust, Heishou Pack - Si Branch Rodion, Heishou Pack - Si Branch Gregor, Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Ryōshū, Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Outis

3. New Identity

The following Identity is added to the list of extractable Identities.

- 3★ : The Lord of Hongyuan Hong Lu

4. Mirror Of Immortality Update Part 2

"Loadout" and "Shop" categories will be added to the list of Achievements, and Achievement Reward levels will be expanded to level 40.

5. New Packages

2 new limited packages will be added to the game with the 2025. 8. 14(KST) Scheduled Update.

► Target Extraction Pack
- Contents : Decaextraction Ticket x 4
- Price : ₩33,000 / $21.99 / ¥3,000
- Can be purchased once
- Purchasable Period : 25. 8. 14 12:00 ~ 8. 28 10:00 (KST)

► Identity Growth Pack
- Contents : Takeoff Module - ID Uptie x 1, Identity Training Ticket IV x 60, Identity Training Ticket III x 30
- Price : ₩33,000 / $21.99 / ¥3,000
- Can be purchased once
- Purchasable Period : 25. 8. 14 12:00 ~ 8. 28 10:00 (KST)

Major Changes
-------------

1. "H Corp." Trait Keyword added to certain Identities and enemies.

2. "Heishou Pack Adept" Trait Keyword added to certain Identities.

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► (EN Only) Fixed a translation mistake in Mirror Dungeon Achievements - 'Collection' category

- Before : Clear Mirror Dungeon at Floor 5 or higher with [N]+ "Tier 4 or higher" E.G.O Gifts
- After : Clear Mirror Dungeon at Floor 5 or higher with [N]+ "Tier 4" E.G.O Gifts

► (JP Only) Fixed a translation mistake in Mirror Dungeon Achievements - 'Clears' category

- Before : プレイ1回で、チャプター"メイド"と同じストーリー関連テーマパックを8種クリア
- After : プレイ1回で、チャプター"名"と同じストーリー関連テーマパックを8種クリア

► Fixed an issue where values in Stage 5-36 Boss's Passive & relevant Keyword description did not match
(Keyword name was hidden as it may be a spoiler)

※ Relevant Passive Description : Turn Start: Gain 1 Protection for every 5 (Keyword Name).
※ Relevant Keyword Description : Gain 1 Protection for every 6 (Keyword Name).

※ The effect incorrectly activated for every 5 (Keyword Name).
However, as the difficulty tests were conducted based on that value, and as much time has passed since it was released based on that number, we will be changing the text to match the effects to maintain the current gameplay experience for that boss.

► An issue where, when Fusing E.G.O Gifts in Mirror Dungeon Shops with duplicate E.G.O Gifts such as Vestiges, canceling Fusion Ingredient selection did not work properly in the list of owned E.G.O Gifts on the right side of the screen

► Fixed an issue where Peccatula Invidia featured in Stage 7.5-10 were equipped with lower E.G.O Threadspinning Tiers than intended

► Fixed an issue where T Corp. Class 3 VDCU Staff Outis' Identity Story was missing an illustration

► Fixed an issue where the coloring for Skill animation for Full-Stop Office Fixer Heathcliff's Empowered Skill 3 was missing a spot

※ Relevant E.G.O Gifts : Emergency Investigator Badge, Microprecision Time Accelerator

► Fixed an issue where, when viewing a list of buffs, if a buff's name was too long, it would overlap with its description

► Fixed an issue where Threadspinning Don Quixote E.G.O 'Red Sheet' to Tier 4, highlights that show changes would appear on parts that do not change as well

Known Issues
------------

► An issue where, when playing past Floor 5 in Mirror Dungeons with the Parallel Superposition mode, reward indication UI for clearing the boss enemy node loads incorrectly

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Aug. 21st, 2025 (KST)
