title: Notice: July 31st Ver 1.83.0 Known Issues & Subsequent Measures
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

In this notice, we would like to inform you about the causes and our measures toward issues that have been identified, in addition to the softlocking issue in our previous notice. With it, we would also like to inform you regarding our new client update.

► An issue where the game softlocks in certain Encounters

[ Cause ]
This issue was a side effect of fixing the issue where the targeting mechanism for Skills with the [Indiscriminate] trait did not work properly, the fix for which was deployed with today's Scheduled Update.

The side effect was that, when an enemy target uses a [Indiscriminate] Skill in Focused Encounters, we observed an abnormal legnthening of the targeting time, which caused the game to softlock.

[ Solution ]
We have identified the exact logic that was causing the issue,
and have tracked and corrected the cause of the error to properly address it.

[ Subsequent Measures ]
We will be adding a logic to preemptively detect other logics that are taking abnormally long to calculate.

► An issue where certain effects of the E.G.O Gift Omnivibro-octovecti-bell did not work properly
※ Relevant effect : extend the Tremor - Superposition on target at Turn End to the next turn

[ Cause ]
In Focused Encounters, the E.G.O Gift should have applied to each part of enemies, but it was applying Tremor - Superposition to the enemies themselves, which caused the relevant effects to not trigger.

[ Solution ]
We have adjusted the code so that the E.G.O Gift's effects apply to each part instead of the enemy itself in Focused Encounters.

[ Subsequent Measures ]
Going forward, we will be including an additional testing step to ensure that E.G.O Gift effects are applying to each Part in Focused Encounters, so that this issue won't occur again.

► New Client Deployment ETA

A new Client version(1.83.1) with fixes for the above issues will be deployed.

STEAM: The update will be deployed around 19:00 (KST).
iOS, Android: As Client updates need to go through the review process of each respective marketplaces, we will inform you again of the update schedule once the reviews are complete.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

[7/31 Scheduled Update Error Compensation]
- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Aug. 7th, 2025 (KST)
- When : After July 31st, 2025 (Thu) 20:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

title: Known Issues & Addtn. Bug Fixes in July 31th Scheduled Update, Ver 1.83.0
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

We have identified certain issues in Ver. 1.83.0, updated July 31st, and bug fixes that were missing from this week's Scheduled Update Notice.

Please continue reading for more information.

[Known Issues]
► An issue where playing through certain stages could cause the game to softlock
※ Relevant Encounters: My Form Empties, Trash Crabs

► Fixed an issue where a Choice Event(in Chapter 6.5-15 (Hard difficulty)) choice that needs a certain E.G.O Gift to access doesn't become accessible even when the player has the relevant E.G.O Gift

[Bug Fixes & Improvements]
► Fixed the incorrect description for the E.G.O Gift 'The Unchosen', where the text did not match our intentions
- Before : Whenever an ally is killed, all allies gain 2 Attack Power Up next turn
- After : When an ally is killed, all allies gain 2 Attack Power Up next turn (once per turn)

※ This issue was caused by failing to update the description to match the E.G.O Gift effect changes that were made in the pre-release phase of the Walpurgis Night event, which caused the outdated version of the description to be applied to the live version of the game.

Normally, our policy is to change the effects to match the texts. However, if we were to change the effects to match the text in this case, it could cause a balancing issue in which ally death could give up to 12 Attack Power Up to all allies, so we intend to change the text instead.

We sincerely apologize for the confusion caused by the incorrect text description.

We are currently investigating these known issues,
and we will fix them as soon as the exact issue is identified.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Early Notice: July 31st Update Change - Announcer Settings
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

We would like to inform you ahead of the July 31st Scheduled Update about the improvement regarding announcers.

[ Deployment Date ]
July 31st Scheduled Update

[ List ]
► Addedd a function to automatically skip victory and defeat announcer voicelines.
※ A new in-game setting to toggle automatic skip for victory and defeat announcer voicelines will be added.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused by us sharing an incorrect announcement with our previous notice.

The said change was to be a part of the new announcer testing phase, but the exact discussions regarding the change began only after the Build for 'Walpurgis Night' update was submitted, which means that it could not be added to the update itself. Moreover, working on other materials took precedence, which delayed it even further.

Also, there was an internal communication issue while we were composing our previous update notice, which caused an incorrect deployment date to be shared, and to be incorrectly worded as if a change that hasn't been made yet was to be deployed.

Therefore, earlier, we decided to upload a correction notice before additional internal discussion regarding the exact deployment schedule for this change was completed, as we believed it would be best to share a correct information with our managers as soon as possible.

However, in that process, we failed to see the degree of inconvenience the lack of this change caused to our managers, and for that we sincerely apologize.

In future update notices, we will add a process to re-confirm every change that is listed, and hold internal meetings and verifications to ensure their veracity.
Also, we will strive to be faster in addressing our managers' inconveniences going forward.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

Thank you.

title: July 17th Scheduled Update Notice Error Correction
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

We have identified that incorrect information was included in the July 17th Scheduled Update notice, and we would like to correct this error.

[ List ]
- Original Notice
► Added unique Announcer voiceline conditions for Tiphereth and Magical Girl (The Queen of Hatred)
※ Please note that these can be skipped by tapping/selecting the screen after the combat Encounter ends; we are planning on adding an option in the settings menu to skip these automatically.

- Corrected Notice
► Added unique Announcer voiceline conditions for Tiphereth and Magical Girl (The Queen of Hatred)
※ Please note that these can be skipped by tapping/selecting the screen after the combat Encounter ends.

While these lines can be skipped post-update by touching or clicking on the screen after the encounter is over,
it has been confirmed internally that nothing has been decided regarding
adding an option to automatically skip these lines or other kinds of adjustments regarding this change.

There was a human error in the process of discussing these changes and writing the notice; internally, there was a misunderstanding that the option to automatically skip the dialogue would be added, which made it into the notice itself.

If any additional adjustments regarding the said Announcers will be added in the future,
we will inform you again via a Scheduled Update notice.

We sincerely apologize to all users who have been waiting to see this adjustment.

We will put further care into writing our update notices so that no similar mistake will occur again in the future.

Thank you.

-------------------------------------------

title: 2025, July 24th Scheduled Update Notice
content:
---------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on July 24th, 2025 (KST).

Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.

Please refer below for details about the update.

Mirror Dungeon Functionality Updates
------------------------------------

"E.G.O Gift Search" function, which allows the players to select additional E.G.O Gifts to start the Mirror Dungeon run with, is now added.

E.G.O Gift Search menu appears once you've selected the Starting E.G.O Gifts.
Consume "Starlight" to select "up to 3 additional" Gifts.
Every Tier 3 or lower E.G.O Gifts can be selected, save for Fusion & Sale Only E.G.O Gifts.
All E.G.O Gifts obtained via E.G.O Gift Search can be used or used for Fusion regardless of the Difficulty.

※ "Starlight" cost increases with each E.G.O Gift selected.
※ Fusion only, Fusion & Sale Only E.G.O Gifts, and Tier 4 or higher E.G.O Gifts cannot be obtained via E.G.O Gift Search function.
※ A new UI element that allows users to toggle E.G.O Gift Search will be added to the Starting E.G.O Gift selection menu.

Major Changes
-------------

1. Skills, Passives, Buffs Priority Hint UI Added

A new UI element that shows hints for enemies' or allied units' Skills, Passives, and Buffs reading priorities is added. It is classified into three tiers of importance, and they can be viewed in their detailed info menu or the in-combat Skill Slots.

※ Priority Hints can be toggled ON/OFF either in your Settings or in Detailed Info menu while in combat.
※ Once updated on July 24th, this system will be applied only to "Hatred and Despair" Encounter.
※ The priority Hints UI will not be applied retroactively, and will only apply to new enemies in the future.

Bug Fixes & Changes
-------------------

► Fixed an issue where Lobotomy E.G.O::The Sword Sharpened with Tears Rodion's Passive 'Break, Tear, and Pierce' effects do not work properly
※ Relevant Effect: - If this unit has 2+ Piercing Sword before this turn's final Base Attack Skill's final Coin hits, consume all of it instead to inflict it as Sinking
- Before : the effect applied to this turn's first Base Attack Skill
- After : the effect now applies to this turn's final Base Attack Skill, as written

► Fixed an issue where Lobotomy E.G.O::The Sword Sharpened with Tears Rodion's 'Despair' Keyword does not work properly
※ Relevant Effect : - On Hit with the first Coin of a Base Attack Skill, inflict +1 Sinking Count (once per turn). For every -20 SP, inflict +1 more Sinking Count with above effects (max 2)
- Before : the effect did not inflict Sinking Count with the first Coin of a Base Attack Skill
- After : the effect now inflicts Sinking Count with the first Coin of a Base Attack Skill, as written

► (JP Only) Fixed typos in 'Base Factors Decreasing Sanity' for Lobotomy E.G.O::In the Name of Love and Hate Don Quixote
- Before : マッチ敗北時、マッチ回数に比例して増加 (減少量:基本値6、2マッチ目から1マッチ20%ずつ減少)
- After : マッチ敗北時、マッチ回数に比例して減少 (減少量:基本値6、2マッチ目から1マッチ20%ずつ増加)

► Fixed an issue where the E.G.O Gift 'T-5 Perpetual Motion Machine' does not work as intended
※ Relevant Effect : After Attack with a Skill 3 that consumes or gains Charge Count on self: if the target is defeated, or if the ally who used the Skill is at 3+ Charge, they add 1 Skill 3 to the list of Skills for the next upcoming turn.
- Before : When this effect activated with an Empowered Skill 3, the effect added an Empowered Skill 3 to the list of Skills for the next upcoming turn
- After : When the effect activates with the Empowered Skill 3, the effect adds a normal Skill 3 to the list of Skills for the next upcoming turn

► Fixed an issue where the effects of 'Near-light Superbattery' from 'Charge-type Gloves' adds +10 more Max Charge Count than written to a certain Identity
※ Relevant Identity : Lobotomy E.G.O::In the Name of Love and Hate Don Quixote

► Fixed an issue where Lobotomy E.G.O::The Sword Sharpened with Tears Rodion's animated illustration had an error

► Fixed an issue where, when an Identity who is supposed to use a Minus Coin Skill for this turn is affected by "Assist Attack" uses a Plus Coin Skill instead

► Fixed an issue where, when a combat Encounter begins, the enemy Passive does not unlock

► Fixed an issue where clearing a Theme Pack of a Mirror Dungeon does not unlock the featured bosses list
※ Relevant Theme Pack : Hatred and Despair

► Fixed an issue where, when the Abnormality 'The Knight of Despair' is defeated at the same time with its summoned swords, an additional gimmick animation plays after it has already played the defeat animation

► Fixed an issue where Don Quixote E.G.O - In the Name of Love and Hate Skill animation is sped up, the visual effects used in that Skill does not load properly

► Fixed an issue where Don Quixote E.G.O - In the Name of Love and Hate Skill shows an incorrect damage sum from each coin under certain circumstances
※ This is a visual-only issue; the damage is working as intended and will not be adjusted.

► Fixed an issue where, in Yisang Exchange list, "Vergilius Announcer" was not labeled with a [Limited] tag

► Addressed the issue where the names of certain Identities would overlap with "Support Identity" tags

► (EN Only) Fixed an issue where Wild Hunt Heathcliff's Defense Skill description showed a Keyword tag when it shouldn't

► (EN Only) Fixed minor typos and incorrect word choices in stories related to The 6th Walpurgis Night

► Fixed an issue where units appearing in the first turn of Focused Encounters briefly show their Aggro UI

► Fixed an issue where the BGM subtitles don't show when entering a certain boss enemy's Encounter for the first time
※ Relevant Theme Pack : The Surrendered Witnessing

► Fixed an issue where a certain boss enemy's Skill animations' background resources load incorrectly
※ Relevant Theme Pack : The Surrendered Witnessing

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 July 31st, 2025 (KST)
- When : After July 24th, 2025 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until July 31st, (Thu) 2025, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.
- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change depending on its status. If such a change occurs, we will let you know in a follow-up notice.
- A resource download may be prompted after the build update. If you're using a mobile device, it is recommended to proceed with a Wi-Fi connection.
- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account. Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: Notice: Steam Payment 'Restore Purchase' Button Error
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

In Version 1.82.0, updated July 17th, we have identified an issue where the 'Restore Purchase' button does not work under certain circumstances, and have addressed it.

[Issue]
When attempting a purchase through Steam, upon failing to communicate with Steam servers, the 'Restore Purchase' button does not work

[Cause]
Upon communication failure with Steam, due to the response value being changed, the error flagging function did not work

[Solution]
Fixed the logic that was causing the issue

This issue has been resolved without a separate client update or an in-game resource download.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

---------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on July 10th, 2025 (KST).

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► (EN Only) Fixed an incorrect translation for N Corp. Mittelhammer Rodion's Passive
- Before : After an enemy is defeated, apply 1 Haste and 1 Damage Up to the ally with the most SP. (Once per turn.)
- After : After an enemy is defeated, apply 1 Haste and 1 Damage Up "next turn" to the ally with the most SP. (Once per turn.)
※ This was a text-only issue; the incorrect translation will be fixed, but the Passive's functions will not change.

► Fixed an issue where N Corp. E.G.O::Fell Bullet Yi Sang's Skills 3 effect "At 7+ Torn Memory, primarily targets among allies as the main target" targets allies even when the conditions aren't met if there are no more enemies to target(because they're all dead)

► Fixed an issue where, in a Stage with a fixed Sinner and Fixed Identity or E.G.O, the Support Identities were still selectable

► Fixed an issue where, in Regular Encounters, activating the Sapling of Light ability MOROSITAS could cause the Dashboard to appear as though it's been unchanined

► Elaborated description text in Chain Battles regarding "Fixed Units"

► Fixed an issue where the Aggro value does not interact with the Combat UI Detail adjustment
- MIN, MID : Does not display Aggro values, but shows Skill Slot UI that Aggro values are active
- MAX : Displays Aggro values and shows Skill Slot UI that Aggro values are active

► (EN, JP Only) Fixed an issue where "Exploration Complete" UI's tooltip texts for Mirror of Immortality does not use the designated Font files

► (EN Only) Adjusted the translation for Identities that haven't yet been obtained in the Identity list UI
- Before : Unowned
- After : Not Owned
※ With the above change, the translation text visible in the tutorial images will be adjusted as well.

► (EN Only) Fixed various typos and translation issues in Rosespanner Workshop Rep Rodion's Identity Story

► (EN Only) Fixed an issue where Yi Sang's Dimension Shredder E.G.O Uptie 4 Corrosion Skill did not highlight the 'Rupture' tag

title: Notice: MD Starlight Calculation Issue Identified
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

We have identified an issue where, in Version 1.81.0 and 1.81.1, updated July 3rd, the Starlight summary post Mirror Dungeon completion would sometimes show "0 Starlight used".

[Issue]
- An issue where, sometimes, Starlight that was used does not count as used Starlight

[Cause]
- An issue with the Starlight acquisition & spending formula in certain circumstances

[Solution]
- Addressed the problematic logic

This issue has been resolved without a separate client or in-game download;
we verified the player logs to identify the affected cases.

Starlight will soon be withdrawn from affected accounts in the near future.
Please note that, in that process, you may lose the sum of Starlight that was mistakenly calculated as zero.

We will inform you via an additional update regarding a more detailed schedule of when this will take place.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Notice: Game Progression Issue Fix Ver. 1.81.1 Update
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

After the 1.81.0 Scheduled Update on July 3rd, we have identified an issue where some managers are unable to play the newly updated Mirror Dungeon - Mirror of Immortality.

We have identified the cause of this issue. We are currently working on fixing this issue, and the update to Version 1.81.1 with the fix will be deployed at 2025.07.03 18:00 (KST).

Fortunately, the respective market reviews of the update were completed early this time. Please update the game on Steam or your choice of mobile device to play the game normally.

If your respective store does not display the button to update the game,
please note that there may be a margin of error based on your device settings, and try again at a later time.

We sincerely apologize for this progression issue.

[Issue]
- An issue where, after the 2025.07.03 Scheduled Update, starting Mirror of Immortality in Version 1.81.0 fixes its difficulty to "Hard difficulty" making it impossible to progress past that point

[Cause]
- This issue can be caused if, in their final playthrough of Mirror of the Dreaming, 1) the player activated the "Parallel Superposition(Infinite) mode", and 2) progressed past Floor 6.
- To be more specific, this is a logic error that occurred while processing data that was carried over from the previous Mirror Dungeon.

[Solution]
- Address the problem logic

[Future Measures]
- In future Mirror Dungeon updates, we will add more specific test cases to test if newly updated functions interfere with preexisting functions

Once again, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

[7/3 Scheduled Update Error Compensation]
- Content : Lunacy x750
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 July 10th, 2025 (KST)
- When : After July 3rd, 2025 (Thu) 18:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

ErrorCompensation can be claimed until July 10th, (Thu) 2025, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

title: Notice: MD - Mirror of Immortality Progression Issue Additional Information
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

The following are more detailed information regarding the Mirror of Immortality Progression Issue identified in Version 1.81.0.

[Issue]
After the July 3rd Scheduled Update, entering the Mirror Dungeon does not show the Theme Packs, preventing players from progressing through the Mirror Dungeon

[Cause]
This issue can be caused if, in their final playthrough of Mirror of the Dreaming, 1) the player activated the "Parallel Superposition(Infinite) mode", and 2) progressed past Floor 6.

We have identified the exact logic of the issue, and we are currently making adjustments and running tests to fix the issue.

We will share the exact deployment ETA of the fix with an additional update.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Notice: Mirror Dungeon - Mirror of Immortality Progression Issue
content:

title: Notice: 2025.07.03 (KST) Scheduled Update Additional Fixes
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

There was a missing bug fix from our last Scheduled Update notice.

Please continue reading for more information.

1. Fixed an issue where The Thumb East Soldato II Sinclair does not count toward meeting certain Achievements & E.G.O Gift conditions
※ Relevant Achievement: Clear Mirror Dungeon at Floor 5 or higher with 5+ Identities that use certain Keywords
※ Relevant E.G.O Gift Conditions: Encounter Start: Activates when there are 5 or more Identities with Attack Skills that inflict certain Keywords

※ - Mirror Dungeon Keyword checker data was missing for The Thumb East Soldato II Sinclair's Identity Data, and we failed to catch the issue where this caused the Identity's Keywords to not count toward meeting certain Achievements and E.G.O Gift conditions.

We identified this issue as we were writing the Scheduled Update notice on June 30th,
and sought to deploy a Hotfix immediately.

However, as our market submission was already complete, the client build is currently in standby; this means that this issue cannot be corrected via a hotfix, and can only be fixed with a Scheduled Update on July 3rd.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

The following Identities will have increased odds of extraction.
- 3★ : The Manager of La Manchaland Don Quixote, The Princess of La Manchaland Rodion, The Priest of La Manchaland Gregor, The Barber of La Manchaland Outis

4. New Packages
2 new limited packages will be added to the game with the 2025. 7. 3(KST) Scheduled Update.

► Target Extraction Pack
- Contents : Decaextraction Ticket x 4

- Can be purchased once
- Purchasable Period : 25. 7. 3 12:00 ~ 7. 17 10:00 (KST)

► Identity Growth Pack

- Price : ￦33,000 / $21.99 / ¥3,000
- Can be purchased once
- Purchasable Period : 25. 7. 3 12:00 ~ 7. 17 10:00 (KST)

5. New Content - Mirror of Immortality
※ Please refer to the Steam Announcements page for more information.
※ Mirror of the Dreaming Achievements progress and rewards will become unavailable when Mirror of Immortality is updated. Please take note of this information to claim your rewards BEFORE the July 3rd Scheduled Maintenance.

Team Loadout Improvements
-------------------------

► Several improvements to the Team Loadout UI has been added.
- A menu to view and deploy from the full list of Identities and E.G.O has been added.
- The ability to view unobtained Identities and E.G.O has been added.
- The "Reset" button to revert your current Team loadout to Base Identities & E.G.O has been added.
- "Team Loadout Code" function to save and load your equipped Identities, E.G.O, and Deployment order by copying and pasting team codes has been added.
- An overview menu for the total amount of obtainable E.G.O resources from Identities and the total amount of E.G.O expenditure from E.G.O has been added.
- Announcer voicelines can now be viewed from the list of Announcers.
- Now, each E.G.O's rarity can be viewed from their icons.
※ Please note that additional changes and improvements Team Loadout will be deployed in the future.

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Fixed an issue where Dead Rabbits Boss Meursault's Support Passive's "Offense Level Down" effect was applied at an incorrect timing
- Before: The "inflict Offense Level Down" part of "When 1 ally with the fastest Speed hits an enemy with X+ Rupture, inflict Offense Level Down" was inflicted next turn.
- After: Inflicts the above effect this turn, as written
※ The effect will be adjusted to fit the text and inflict this turn instead of next turn, as we have done thus far.

► Fixed an issue where Lobotomy E.G.O::Magic Bullet Outis's Combat Passive does not activate
※ This issue started with the May 29th Scheduled Update; it was caused by adjustments made to the in-game system to add the new Sapling of Light mechanism.

► Fixed an issue where Skills with "[Tails Hit] Inflict (status effect)" conditionals did not count toward "This Gift activates when X or more Identities have Attack Skills that apply (status effect)" E.G.O Gift conditionals
※ This issue started with the Jan. 30th Scheduled Update; it was caused by adjustments made to certain status effect infliction conditionals.
※ The "[Tails Hit] Inflict (status effect)" conditional was working properly; this fix only concerns their inclusion in E.G.O Gift conditionals.

► Fixed an issue where the "Misaligned Transistor" effect activates incorrectly for a certain Identity
※ Relevant Effect: Base Attack Skills that consume Charge Count or 'Unique Charge' consume 1.5x more
※ Relevant Identity: Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Eyes & Penitence Ryōshū's Empowered Skill 3
- Before: "Coin Power +1 for every 5 Red Eyes consumed (max 4)" and "Base Power +1 for every 5 Penitence consumed (max 4)" checked up to "(max 6)" instead, due to the effects of the E.G.O Gift that made it count 1.5 times more
- After: Caps the effect at max 4, even if additional Unique Charge was consumed, to fit the text

► Fixed an issue where the E.G.O Gift "T-1B Octagonal Bolt" would activate even when the Identity conditionals weren't met
※ Relevant Effect: Each Identity gains 1 Charge Potency every time they consume 20 Charge Count. (2 times per Identity per Encounter; Unique Charge does not interact with this effect)

► Fixed an issue where, if the units' max HP were increased due to the effects of the E.G.O Gift "Bridle", the E.G.O Gift "Resolution" max HP cap does not work properly

► Fixed an issue where the E.G.O Gift "Devil's Share" effect "(both effects can apply on the same Identity)" does not activate
※ Relevant effect: Apply 1 Haste next turn to 1 ally with the highest Poise Potency and 1 ally with the highest Poise Count. (both effects can apply on the same Identity)

► Fixed incorrect changes highlights applied to certain E.G.O Gift Enhancements
※ Relevant E.G.O Gifts: Compression Bandage, Butler Style Binding Arts

► Fixed an issue where Clash Forecast UI in the middle-top part and the bottom of the screen for specific Skills with "Prioritize..." conditionals do not work properly when clashing against enemy Skill S

► Fixed an issue where, if an Uptie 2 or lower Identity is Deployed as a Backup Unit, their Support Passive Tooltip loads a dummy text

► Improved Dispenser E.G.O UI for the list of E.G.O

title: 2025, June 19th Scheduled Update Notice
content:
---------------------------------------

title: Notice: An issue where the game may softlock with certain animation triggers
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

We have identified an additional issue in version 1.79.1, which is the version of the game that was updated June 12th, 2025.

Please continue reading for more information.

[Issue]
- An issue where, in certain Stages, some Skills or Stage clear animations won't play and the game softlocks

[Identified Stages with the Issue]
- Skill animation used by a certain enemy in Stage 4-48
- Stage clear animation in Stage 5-36

※ Please note that there may be more Stages affected by this issue.

[Cause]
- The issue occurs when Deploying "R Corp. 4th Pack Rabbit Heathcliff" as an active unit.

We have identified the cause of this issue, but as fixing it requires a logic adjustment to the Identity's animation, it is difficult for us to resolve this issue via a hotfix.

Therefore, please understand that this issue will be fixed with the June 19th Scheduled Update.

We apologize for the inconvenience, but until we resolve this issue next week,
if a progression blocker issue occurs while "R Corp. 4th Pack Rabbit Heathcliff" is an active unit, please remove him from your loadout and try again.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Notice: June 12th Ver. 1.79.1 Known Issue& UI Improvement Rolled Back
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

We would like to inform you about the issue identified in Version 1.79.1 and the UI Improvement Update, both updated June 12th.

[Known Issue]
- An issue where, even when Wild Hunt Heathcliff has met the conditions to activate Empowered Skill 3 with his Defense Skill, the Defense Skill would not activate due to certain issues
- An issue where, when choosing an enemy to Clash with using a Clashable Defense Skill, if the enemy becomes Staggered before the Clashable Defense Skill can activate, the Clashable Defense Skill would activate

We have identified that this issue was caused by partial adjustments made in the Combat Systems logic in the process of making UI improvements to the Clash Forecast function.

Resolving this issue requires the game's code to be changed, and for the UI improvement work to be rolled back, which means that it cannot be resolved via a Hotfix.

This needs to be resolved via a Client Update next week. As for the UI Improvements that were updated this week, we will take more time to review how it affects the current system, re-organize our schedule, and inform you via an future Scheduled Update notice.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

[Version 1.79.1 Error Compensation]
- Compensation: Lunacy x500
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 June 19th, 2025 (KST)
- When : After June 12th, 2025 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Error Compensation can be claimed until June 19th (Thu) 2025, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

content:
---------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

Major Changes
-------------

1. Improved the UI indicator when targeting enemy Counter, Clashable Guard, Clashable Counter Skills
1) When using a Defense Skill against the enemy's Counter Skills:
- Before: Clash forecast indicator showed 'Offset'
- After: Clash forecast indicator now shows 'One-sided Guard'

2) When using an allied unit's Skill to target the enemy's Clashable Guard and Clashable Counter Skills:
- Before: Among the Skills with Speeds faster than the target's Speed, showed the last Skill to target as the Clashing Skill
- After: When using Skills with slower Speeds than the targeted Slot's, or when using a Defense Skill with a faster Speed than the targeted Slot, the game will now show the fastest Attack Skill as the Clashing Skill

※ Clashable Defense Skill interaction example
Ally Units: Attack Skill 1 (Speed 7), Attack Skill 2 (Speed 5), Defense Skill 1 (Speed 10), Defense Skill 2 (Speed 5)
► When targeting an enemy's Clashable Defense Skill using an allied unit's 'Defense Skill 1', which is faster than an allied unit's 'Attack Skill 1'...
- Attack Skill 1: Shows the 'Clash Forecast'
- Defense Skill 1: Shows 'One-sided Guard'
► When targeting an enemy's Clashable Defense Skill using an allied unit's 'Attack Skill 2' or 'Defense Skill 2', which are slower than an allied unit's 'Attack Skill 1'...
- Attack Skill 1: Shows the 'Clash Forecast',
- Attack Skill 2: Shows 'Unopposed Attack'
- Defense Skill 2: Shows 'One-sided Guard'

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Fixed an issue where the 'Battlefield Retreat' effect can activate on Fixed Unit Sinners in certain Stages as well, due to Family Hierarch Ishmael's Support Passive effect

► (EN Only) Fixed an incorrect translation in Blade Lineage Mentor Meursault's Support Passive description
- Before: Combat Start: 1 ally with the most Poise deals +15% damage on Critical Hit
- After: Combat Start: 1 ally with the most Poise deals +15% damage on Critical Hit with Slash Skills
※ This is a text-only fix; the Support Passive's functions are untouched.

► Fixed an issue where LCCB Assistant Manager Ishmael did not spend any Ammo at Uptie Tier 1

► Fixed an issue where, even after Family Hierarch Candidate Ishmael Retreats, the camera kept focusing on the unit's last location upon retreat

► Fixed an issue where the vfx from Family Hierarch Candidate Ishmael's Skill that activates upon Return lingered

► Fixed certain unintended dialogues and texts in Family Hierarch Ishmael's voicelines
※ Affected texts: Chatter #1, Post-uptie Chat 2

► (EN Only) Addressed the vagueness present in Rosespanner Workshop Fixer Gregor's Skill 3 Coin effects
- Before : [On Hit] Trigger Tremor Burst, then reduce Tremor Count by 2. Spend up to 4 Charge Count to inflict Rupture Count equal to Charge Count spent
- After : [On Hit] Trigger Tremor Burst, then reduce Tremor Count by 2 and consume up to 4 Charge Count on self to inflict Rupture Count equal to Charge Count consumed
※ This is a text-only change; the Skill's functions are untouched.

► Fixed an issue where, when an allied unit's Skill effect causes it to 'randomly target and use an unopposed attack' against an ally, the 'Assist Defense' effect would activate

► Fixed an issue where certain Skill descriptions were missing from an enemy appearing in Stage 8-33
※ Affected Skills: Completed Hebelon Bolus - You [無]-Defense, Nothing But a Meaningless Struggle...! , An offering of Extreme Extracted Immortality [極純粹滴提供]

► Fixed an issue where the music and music-related effects do not function properly after a certain turn in Stage 6-44

► Fixed an issue where, if the player Deploys 'R Corp. 4th Pack Rabbit Heathcliff' to the final Encounter of Story Dungeon Stage 5-36, the stage clear cutscene does not play, soflocking the player

► Fixed an issue where, if an enemy appearing in Stage 4-48 dies from a status effect damage while using a specific Skill in Stage 4-48, the game softlocks

► Fixed an issue where, in Story Dungeon Stage 3-22, Floor 1, the player cannot enter a certain node that is supposed to be open

► Fixed an issue where a certain effect description was missing when an allied unit has the enemy-inflicted effect "Marked"
- Before: Will be primarily targeted.
- After: Will be primarily targeted. Gain additional (2 x the amount of Burn Potency and Burn Count gained from getting hit) Burn Potency and Burn Count
※ This is a text-only change; the effect's functions are untouched.

► Fixed an issue where certain enemy Skills' descriptions were different from their actual effects
※ Affected enemy Skills
- Swamped K Corp. Checkpoint Security 'Kieeh'
- Hazed K Corp. Checkpoint Security 'Kieeeeek!'
- Stunned K Corp. Checkpoint Security 'Kigigik'
- Complete Sawblade Bot - 'Carving out.'
- Complete Wrecking Ball Bot - 'Pressing down.'

► (EN Only) Fixed an issue where an enemy Skill in Stage 4-47, 'Stinging Memories', has an incorrect Coin effect description
- Before: Inflict 2 Sinking and 2 Rupture next turn
- After: Inflict 2 Sinking and 2 Rupture

► Fixed an issue where, if the player uses the Skip function in the middle of an in-game combat cutscene and leads into the end credits scene, the combat scene lingers even after the end credits play

► Fixed an issue where, if a Sinner dies due to a self-inflicted effect, the death trigger for the visual indicator changing does not match the design intent

► Fixed an issue where the Abnormality 'Spiral of Contempt' has certain Parts not displayed in the UI

► (En Only) slightly adjusted the wording of a Canto 3 Boss Skill 'The Gripping' to avoid incorrect Keyword tagging
- Before: [Combat Start] Gazes into the target for the next turn
- After: [Combat Start] Gazes into the target for the next turn

Known Issues

title: Notice: Known Issues in June 5th Scheduled Update, Ver. 1.79.0
content:
----------------------------------------------------------------

Hello, this is Project Moon.

In version 1.79.0, which is the version of the game that will be updated June 5th, 2025, we have identified an issue where, under certain circumstances, the new Identity Family Hierarch Candidate Ishmael's Support Passive effect could cause the game to softlock.

Please refer to the explanation below for more information.

Known Issue
-----------

► An issue where activating 'Battlefield Retreat' via 'Family Hierarch Candidate Ishmael' Identity's Support Passive effect could retreat a Fixed Unit Sinner for certain stages, softlocking the game

Affected Stages
---------------

- The final Stage of Story Dungeon 7-36
- Stage 8-17
- The final Stage of Story Dungeon 8-20
- Stage 8-33

We have identified the cause and the fix for this issue, and we are in the process of making adjustments to address it.

However, as the fix to this issue requires us to go through a client build and a market review, it is difficult for us to apply it immediately to the June 5th Scheduled Update.

Please note that this known issue will be resolved with next week's update on June 12th.
If you have obtained the 'Family Hierarch Candidate Ishmael' Identity after June 5th Scheduled Update, we recommend reviewing the above issue and the list of affected Stages beforehand and avoid using 'Family Hierarch Candidate Ishmael' for those Stages.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

Stage 8-30 Additional Adjustment Survey Results
-----------------------------------------------

From May 30th 19:50(KST) to June 2nd 10:00(KST), we conducted a survey on whether additional adjustments for Stage 8-30 would be necessary or not.

A total of 8,682 managers have partook in the survey, and 5,267 managers among them have cleared Stage 8-30, which is 16.3% higher than our previous survey results, which was at 69.8%.

When we verified the in-game data, we confirmed that there were 267,798 managers who have cleared 8-29, and 245,673 managers among them have cleared Stage 8-30. This is 12% higher than the data prior to the difficulty adjustment.

Regarding the question of whether Stage 8-30 should be reverted to the previous difficulty or not, 63.3% of the managers have expressed the wish to revert the difficulty to the previous levels, and 30.1% of the managers have expressed the wish to maintain the current difficulty.

There was a high percentage of managers who wished to revert the difficulty back to the pre-adjustment state, but we will not be making an immediate adjustment at this moment; we intend to maintain the current difficulty and continue to monitor the situation with the survey results in mind.

We once again would like to express our deepest gratitude for the managers who have taken their time to share your feedbacks.

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

title: Notice: Stage 8-30 Difficulty Survey Results
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

At 5.30 18:00 (KST), the hotfix for 8-30 was deployed.
We would like to share an explanation with you as to how we reached that conclusion, alongside the survey results.

Please review the information and the chart below for more information.

Stage 8-30 Survey Results
-------------------------

Survey Sample Size: 28845
Clear Rate of Participants: 20135 (70%)

Ingame Data
cleared 8-29: 180,711
cleared 8-30: 142,071 (78%)

Number of Retries
-----------------
- First Try: 22.1%
- 2: 20.7%
- 3~4: 21.1%
- 5 or more: 10.8%
- not cleared: 25.2%

Retry Strategy
--------------
- Retry Immediately: 11762
- Upgrade ID & E.G.O: 6505

- Search for Info Online: 6626

- Uptie Tier 3, Level 55
- Uptie Tier 3, Level 50
- not applicable

--------------------------

Difficulty Experience based on Turn Count

- Reduce DMG on Player Clash Win: 20504
- No Adjustment Needed: 4666
- Adjustment Needed(Other): 3843

Tremor, Burn Difficulty
-----------------------
- Very Easy: 13.6%
- Somewhat Easy: 23.7%
- Adequate: 36.9%
- Somewhat Hard: 17.7%
- Very Hard: 8.2%

(Adjustment Opinion)
- Reduce Potency & Count Inflicted: 3777
- Inflict Less on Player Clash Win: 13696
- No Adjustment Needed: 13201
- Adjustment Needed(Other): 1565

Gimmick Difficulty
------------------
- Very Easy: 6.8%
- Somewhat Easy: 15.5%
- Adequate: 35.0%
- Somewhat Hard: 28.2%
- Very Hard: 14.4%

(Adjustment Opinion)
- More Intuitive Gimmick Description: 6679
- Reduce Penalty upon Gimmick Solve: 8090
- Increase Advantage upon Gimmick Solve: 9367
- Reduce Penalty of Failing to Solve Gimmick: 6341
- No Adjustment Needed: 9868
- Adjustment Needed(Other): 1904

[Cleared Stage 8-30]

28,845 managers have participated in the survey.
Among them, 20,135 managers have cleared Stage 8-30,
which makes up about 70% of the managers who have responded to the survey.

Comparing this to the in-game results,
180,711 managers have cleared up to Stage 8-29,
and 142,071 managers have cleared Stage 8-30.
That is approximately 78% of the sample, which we believe is not a significant difference from the in-game data.

[The Managers' Clear Loadouts]

Most managers challenged the battle with the following upgrade levels: ID Uptie 4, Level 55,
and E.G.O Threadspinning Tier 3.

We also identified that most of the teams used to clear the stage were Rupture or Bleed Teams,
which employed the Full-Stop Office Identities, Heishou Pack Identities, and/or La Manchaland Identities.

[Turn-based Gameplay Experience & Difficulty Adjustments]

According to the turn-based difficulty results, most of our users have replied that
the battle becomes increasingly difficult the later into the fight they progress.

We believe that this was due to the following reasons: The Sinners continuously deploy E.G.O,
and constantly lose SP due to ally deaths.
This leads to harder, lower Clash Win chances,
and difficulties with constantly rising amount of damage taken.

Therefore, we decided to add a SP loss effect and adjusted the SP heal effect on the boss,
so that the fight will not become too difficult.

► Blasting Shatterslash [爆碎斬]: Added "[Clash Lose] Lose 10 SP on self"
► Reloading Tiantui Star's Blade: Removed "[On Use] Heal 10 SP.; - At less than 0 SP, heal 5 additional SP"

[Unbreakable Coin Damages Lowered]

The Unbreakable Coin difficulty survey results were the following:
Very hard - 40.5%, and Somewhat hard - 32.1%.

We decided that this was due to the fact that winning the Clash still resulted in the player team receiving significant damage
from the Unbreakable Coins of Savage Tigerslayer's Perfected Flurry of Blades [超絕猛虎殺擊亂斬] Skill.

Therefore, we added a Power Down & Paralyze effects to the Unbreakable Coin effects
to minimize the amount of damage taken on Clash Win,
and adjusted the value for Unrelenting Spirit - Shin [剛氣-心] so that the difficulty is more appropriate.

► Tanglecleaver [快刀亂麻]: Added "[Clash Lose] Gain 4 Power Down" and "[Clash Lose] Gain 1 Paralyze"
► Savage Tigerslayer's Perfected Flurry of Blades [超絕猛虎殺擊亂斬]: "Added [Clash Lose] Gain 2 Power Down" and "[Clash Lose] Gain 6 Paralyze"
► Unrelenting Spirit - Shin [剛氣-心]: Reduced the cap for "damage modifier gained from Speed difference if this unit is faster than the target by 3 or more" from 40% to 20%.

[Tremor & Burn Gameplay & Gimmick Difficulty Experience]

Most of the managers have said that they were appropriate as-is,
and many of the proposed adjustments from the managers say that they do not wish any drastic adjustments in this regard.

However, as many managers have also spoken that they would like for this aspect to be addressed,
we would like to state that further adjustments are not completely off the table,
in case additional adjustments regarding keyword debuffs and gimmicks are needed.

We would like to once again share our deepest appreciation for the managers who have given their input
via the survey so that we could pinpoint the specific area of difficulty in the said Encounter.
