title: Notice: Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Sheet Sinclair Adjustment
content:
Hello. This is Kim Jihoon, Director at Project Moon.

I would like to inform you of upcoming adjustments to Red Sheet Sinclair’s Passive & Talisman effects.

The Identity theme for this Season was intended to focus on the Rupture Keyword, and have been released based on that idea. However, due to the severe balancing issues that are closely tied to the overtuned abilities of Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Sheet Sinclair's Passive and Talisman buff, we have reached a decision that adjustments must be made.

We sincerely wished to avoid making any adjustments to Identities that have already been released.
However, the existence of the Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Sheet Sinclair's Passive and Talisman buff has severely affected our game design not only in regards to Rupture Identities, but the Keyword itself.

We have worked diligently to find various possible adjustments to avoid Rupture Identities overly synergizing with Red Sheet Sinclair,
but our attempts to do so has forced us to place several awkward limitations on the Rupture Keyword itself.
And this problem has only become increasingly apparent with the current Season.

We will put further care into our Identity and E.G.O designs going forward, in effort to prevent similar issues from occurring again.

After the May 29th (KST) Scheduled Update, Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Sheet Sinclair's levels and Uptie Tiers will be reset.
Any Identity Training Tickets, Threads, or Identity Shards used to upgrade this unit will be refunded to your Inbox.
Refunded Identity Shards will be 'Season 6 Sinclair Identity Shards', regardless of the Season the Identity was Uptied in.

Also, as an expression of our sincere regret and apology,
we would like to give you additional compensation for Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Sheet Sinclair's negative adjustments.

[Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Sheet Sinclair Adjustments]

1) Support Passive Activation Condition
- Before: 4 Gluttony Resonance
- After: 4 Gluttony Resource Owned

2) Support Passives
- Before: At the start of the combat phase, give (highest Reson. x 2) Talisman to the ally with the most HP
- After: 1 ally currently with the most HP inflicts +1 more Rupture Potency with Attack and Counter Skills

3) Talisman
- Before
On hit, inflict Rupture by the Count; When hit, gain Rupture by the Count.
Turn End: At 6+ Count, remove all Talisman and take fixed damage by its Count.

- After
Max Stack : 6
On Hit, consume 1 Rupture Count on target to inflict (Stack / 2) Rupture (inflicts at least 1 Rupture if Rupture Count was consumed; rounded down)
When hit, gain (Stack / 2) Rupture and lose 1 Stack (gain at least 1; rounded down)
Turn End: at 6+ Stack, remove all Talisman and take fixed damage by its Stack

[Notice: Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Sheet Sinclair Reset]
- When: May 29th (Thu), 2025, 12:00 (KST)
- Changes: Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Sheet Sinclair Identity Level & Uptie Tier reset
※ Upon reset, all resources used to upgrade this Identity will be refunded to your Inboxes.
※ Refunded Identity Shards will be 'Season 6 Sinclair Identity Shards', regardless of when you Uptied this unit.

[Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Sheet Sinclair Adjustment Compensation]
- Compensation: Lunacy x1300, 3★ Guarantee Decaextraction Ticket x1
- Recipients: All users whose game accounts were created before 09:59 May 29th, 2025 (KST)
- When: After May 29th (Thu) 2025, 12:00 (KST)
Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until June 26th (Thu) 2025, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 30 days)

title: Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Adept Faust Nerf Cancellation Notice
content:
Hello, this is Kim Jihoon, CEO at Project Moon.

I am canceling the nerf plans for Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Adept Faust.

I apologize for making the exact same mistake and the exact same manner of cancellation I made back during the case with The Ring Yi Sang.

I understand that, even if it may have been necessary to make adjustments to an Identity that has already been released, making an adjustment this quick and early would have been more understandable had we been consistently making quick adjustments to other aspects of the game like E.G.O Gifts and such as well.

However, now I see how making such quick and rash adjustments to an Identity that has already been released, while making only slow adjustments to other balancing aspects of the game such as the Mirror Dungeon or E.G.O Gifts, can come across as disgraceful to our players.

As I have shared earlier, given that I was unable to prevent my own incompetence prior to release, it would have been a better approach to make indirect adjustments to the game instead of adjusting the Identity itself for the sake of maintaining trust between us as developers and the players, and I very much regret not being able to think of this ahead of time.

It is with great shame to constantly go back on my word that was already shared via our notices.

However, I greatly regret that the adjustments made for Red Sheet Sinclair must remain in place, as it would affect every Rupture Identity and E.G.O that are to be released going forward. I would appreciate your understanding regarding this matter.

Once again, I apologize for going back on my word that I shared during the The Ring Yi Sang incident.

I have forgotten why I promised to never touch an already-released Identity; I am sorry for breaking the trust to our players and thereby disappointing them.

I must have foolishly fallen into a lapse in judgment.

I'm sorry.

Going forward, unless it is due to a glitch or a bug, I will not directly nerf an Identity. Even if an Identity is released due to a terrible mistake on our end, I will not make immediate adjustments as I did today; instead, I will first gather our players' opinions via user surveys and livestreams, and prioritize listening to our players ahead of time.

Please note that any compensation or extraction resource returns for Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Adept Faust will be canceled alongside the nerf.
As for Red Sheet Sinclair, as the adjustments will remain in place, please understand that its upgrades will still be reset and have its upgrade resources returned to your Inboxes.

Due to the several issues that have occurred today, and with the adjustments regarding Red Sheet Sinclair, we will be sharing a compensation of 1300 Lunacy and one 3★ Guarantee Decaextraction Ticket.

We will be sharing a more proper notice once these changes have been properly organized.

Once again, I sincerely apologize.

title: Notice: Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Adept Faust Extraction Resource Returns
content:
Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Adept Faust Nerf Cancellation Notice

Hello, this is Kim Jihoon, CEO at Project Moon.

I would like to once again deeply apologize to all users who have Extracted this Faust unit.

It was a rash decision of me to provide 3★ Guarantee Decaextraction Ticket and Season 6 Nominable Egoshard Crates as compensation for this situation.

As we shared in our last notice, 3★ Guarantee Decaextraction Ticket x1 and Season 6 Nominable Egoshard Crate x300 will be given out with the May 29th Scheduled Update.

In addition, we will be fully refunding all tickets, Paid Lunacy, and Free Lunacy used for your extraction up until the nerf announcement was posted to your Inboxes as well.

Because we have never had to use this function before, and because this kind of situation hasn't occurred in the past, I wasn't certain whether that form of compensation would be possible. However, I was just informed that it was indeed possible, though not by this Thursday.

Therefore, we will be returning all resources used to Extract this Faust unit prior to her adjustments, even if it takes time.

If you have used a 3★ Guarantee Decaextraction Ticket to obtain Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Adept Faust, we will be returning it to your account as well.

However, please note that, I would deeply appreciate your understanding that the above case may take longer to process than the others. I apologize.

Learning from this incident, given that it was a Special Extraction with a set deadline, we will also be establishing a new system to be able to return your resources as soon as possible if a similar incident occurs in the future.

I once again apologize to all users who have Extracted this unit for her good capabilities and character.

More than anything, I am terribly sorry that, due to these changes and the subsequent distress for our users who have played through both <Part 1> and <Part 2> of Canto 8, I was unable to give you an experience fully focused on the story.

Going forward, I will remember this incident with my heart, and continue to hold internal meetings with our team and improve our system so that it does not happen again in the future.

I sincerely apologize for this incident.

[Compensation Information]
- When: After May 29th (THU) 2025, 12:00 (KST) (additional notice will be posted once they have all been processed)
- Recipients and content
(1) For all users who extracted from [Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Adept Faust] Target Extraction in the following period: 2025.05.22(THU) 12:00 ~ 2025.05.26(MON) 19:10 (KST)
- Compensation: All resources(Paid Lunacy, Free Lunacy, Extraction Tickets, Decaextraction Tickets) used to extract from the [Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Adept Faust] Target Extraction in the following period: 2025.05.22(THU) 12:00 ~ 2025.05.26(MON) 19:10 (KST) returned via Inbox

(2) For all users who obtained "Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Adept Faust" from the "Assured Extraction: 3★ Identity" in the following period: 2025.05.22(THU) 12:00 ~ 2025.05.26(MON) 19:10 (KST)
- Compensation: Resources(3★ Guarantee Decaextraction Ticket) used to extract from the said extraction in the extraction [Assured Extraction: 3★ Identity]

title: 2025, May 29th Scheduled Update Notice
content:
---------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on May 29th, 2024 (KST).

Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.

Please refer below for details about the update.

About the New Season
--------------------

※ Please refer to the Steam Announcements page for more information regarding Season 6.
- [Posted May 5th, 2025] Guide on Season 6 : Zàng Huā Yīn

Season Update <Part 3> Changes
-------------------------------

1. Gradual Main Story & Battle Pass Updates
Main Story Canto 8 - <Part 3>, Season 6 Limbus Pass - Zàng Huā Yīn <Part 3> Unlocked

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Fixed an issue where, when using an E.G.O Skill via E.G.O Overclock, the chance to Corrode based on SP value does not activate

► Fixed an issue where, in Stage 8-20, losing, retrying, then winning a Fixed Member Encounter causes the equipped E.G.O information to appear empty in the next Encounter

► Adjustments made to a certain enemy Skill & pattern in Stage 8-20
- Made a specific effect applied via a Skill applicable only to a specific Sinner
- Made the relevant Skill pattern appear repeatedly until the specific Sinner gains enough of the said effect

► Fixed an issue where, in Stage 8-20, the player was able to enter the next Encounter node even when a certain Encounter node was incomplete

► Fixed an issue where, in Stage 8-20, an enemy Skill "Charge Fist Style - Destroy" effect did not work as described
- Relevant effects: (first Coin) [On Hit] If this unit consumed Charge Count, inflict 10 Omen Talisman

► Fixed an issue where, in Stage 8-20, a certain enemy using the Skill 'Jump In' could cause the Skill animation to not play out properly

► Fixed an issue where the Panic Type 'Charge Circuitry Countercurrent' could trigger without a cap, despite the description stating that it triggers 2 times per turn

► Fixed an issue where, under a specific circumstance, activating the Clashable Guard did not trigger the effects that were supposed to trigger when losing a Clash and getting hit

► Adjusted the settings so that, when assist units exit the field, the allied units' "Base factors decreasing Sanity - When an ally is defeated, lose SP based on the level difference" does not activate

► Fixed an issue where Coins activating with specific Artifact effects would load incorrect images

► Fixed an issue where, if the player entered a specific cutscene in Stage 5-36 with Ishmael E.G.O Hundred-footed Death Maggot (蚰蜒殺), the cutscene UI would load incorrectly

► Fixed an issue where, in certain mobile devices or settings, the tutorial would highlight an incorrect or awkward area of the screen

► Fixed an issue where, in Stage 1-4 Tutorial, attempting to use a Defense or an E.G.O Skill by interacting with the Sinner portraits would not activate

► (EN Only) Fixed an issue where certain CN-EN transliterated terminologies were incorrectly transliterated
- Relevant text: Niaojia-ren, Pao

► (EN, JP Only) Fixed an issue where a certain character's name was shown when it shouldn't be

► (JP Only) Fixed an issue where the description for a certain character was awkwardly described

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 June 5th, 2025 (KST)
- When : After May 29th, 2025 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until June 5th (Thu) 2025, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.
- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change depending on the status of maintenance. If such a change occurs, we will let you know in a follow-up notice.
- A resource download may be prompted after the build update. If you're using a mobile device, it is recommended to proceed with a Wi-Fi connection.
- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account. Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: New Content - Mirror of Names and Spiders EXTREME Mode · Mirror Projection / Achievements
content:
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

New Content <Mirror of Names and Spiders EXTREME Mode · Achievements> will be added to the game with the Mar. 12th, 2026 (KST) Scheduled Update.

※ For the Mirror of Names and Spiders EXTREME Mode and Achievements implementation, Mirror Dungeon entry will be blocked for the following period: 2026. 03. 12 06:00 ~ 10:00 (KST). Please note this information for your gameplay plans.

<Description>

- Once you reach Floor 10 via the Parallel Superposition Mode in Mirror of Names and Spiders, the “EXTREME” mode, which unlocks Floors up to 15, will be unlocked.

- Mounting Trials and Adversities will greatly empower the enemies compared to Parallel Superposition; the higher your Floor, the more Starlight and Projection you will obtain.

- You can increase your Projection rate by attaining Mirror Dungeon Achievements. Every time your Mirror Dungeon Projection levels up, you will be able to obtain Projection Level rewards.

- Several Quality-of-Life improvements have been applied to the Mirror Dungeon content.

- For more information, please refer to the [QoL Improvements] section on the last page of this notice.

※ With the Mar. 12th EXTREME Mode update, 14 Theme Packs, which were selectable in the Mirror of Immortality EXTREME Mode, will be made available. Additional updates to the new EXTREME Mode will include its own new selectable Theme Packs.

※ The Mar. 12th EXTREME Mode update also brings 4 Hidden Bosses encountered in the Mirror of Immortality EXTREME Mode. Additional updates on new Hidden Bosses will convert existing Hidden Bosses into EXTREME-exclusive Theme Pack Encounters.

※ The 4 E.G.O Gifts obtainable from existing Hidden Bosses will remain obtainable by winning those Encounters. However, please note that they will not be added to the E.G.O Gift Compendium, and will not count towards the tally of certain “collection” Achievements.

Adversities
-----------

- For Parallel Superposition EXTREME, in addition to Mounting Trials applicable when entering Floor 11, you will have an option to set “Adversities” for yourself.

- Starting from Floor 11, up to 5 Adversities can be selected on each Floor. Just like Mounting Trials, Adversities will continue to compound instead of going away.

- Selecting more Adversities will net more Adversity rewards; you will gain additional Starlight & Projection based on your cumulative Adversity Score.

- Please note that Mirror of Immortality Achievement EXP can be gained only until the update of the next Mirror Dungeon.

※ Adversities aren’t mandatory; you can reach Floor 15 without setting any Adversities, which may still be a good way to experience the dungeon.

Selecting Theme Packs
---------------------

- You can select among 14 Theme Packs unique to Parallel Superposition EXTREME for your progression.

- Mounting Trials & Floor Clear Rewards are the same as they are in HARD mode: 2 Reward E.G.O Gifts and 2 Mounting Trials attached to each Gift.

※ Please note that Theme Pack Search will be disabled past Floor 11.

※ With the Mar. 12th EXTREME Mode update, 14 Theme Packs, which were selectable in the Mirror of Immortality EXTREME Mode, will be made available. Additional updates to the new EXTREME Mode will include its own new selectable Theme Packs.

Hidden Bosses
-------------

- From Floor 11 onward, there is a set probability that a Hidden Boss will appear before entering any node, excluding Shop and Boss nodes.

- You may choose to either engage the intruding Hidden Boss or withdraw from the encounter.

- If you withdraw from the Encounter, the Hidden Boss Battle will not take place, and you may proceed to the next node.

- Upon defeating the Hidden Boss, you may obtain the corresponding E.G.O Gift.

※ Even if a Hidden Boss is defeated on Floor 11, another Hidden Boss may appear again on Floor 12.

※ Mirror Dungeon cannot be progressed until the Hidden Boss Encounter is resolved. If the battle becomes too difficult due to accumulated Mounting Trials and Adversities, withdrawing from the Encounter may be a viable strategy.

※ The Mar. 12th EXTREME Mode update brings 4 Hidden Bosses encountered in the Mirror of Immortality EXTREME Mode. Additional updates on new Hidden Bosses will convert existing Hidden Bosses into EXTREME-exclusive Theme Pack Encounters.

※ The 4 E.G.O Gifts obtainable from existing Hidden Bosses will remain obtainable by winning those Encounters. However, please note that they will not be added to the E.G.O Gift Compendium, and will not count towards the tally of certain “collection” Achievements.

Weekly Projection Cap
---------------------

- Clearing Mirror Dungeon Exploration will yield additional Projection Rate.

- Clearing higher Floors with higher Adversity Scores will yield more Starlight and Projection Rate.

- You can earn up to 1,000 Projection Rate per week; any Projection Rate gained past 1,000 will be lost.

- The Weekly Projection Rate Cap's reset period is the same as the reset period for Weekly Bonuses.

※ Up to 60 levels' worth of Projection Rate can be obtained via completing Achievements. Any Projection Rate obtained via completing Achievements does not count toward the Weekly Projection Rate Cap.

※ If you find it difficult to clear the Achievements, you can gain weekly Projection Rate to obtain Projection Rate rewards instead.

※ Please note that playing through the Mirror Dungeon prior to the Mar. 12th Scheduled Update and claiming the rewards after the Mar. 12th Scheduled Update will not yield any Weekly Projection Rate Rewards.

Mirror Projection / Achievements
--------------------------------

- You can gain Mirror Projection by clearing Mirror Dungeon achievements.

- Mirror Dungeon floors are counted as 'cleared' only when the player consumes Enkephalin Modules in the Reward Claim window. Please note this information before attempting to complete an Achievement tied to clearing the Mirror Dungeon.

- Please note that future updates will bring even more Achievements to the game.

- Please note that Mirror of Names and Spiders Achievements & Achievement Reward claims are available only until the update for the next new Mirror Dungeon.

- By meeting the Achievement conditions, you can still attain Achievements and increase Projection even if you clear the Mirror Dungeon with Rental Teams.

※ Please note that Rental Teams will be unable to attain forthcoming Team-related Achievements.

- Obtain various rewards based on your Mirror Projection level.

- Achievements to be added in the future will bring additional rewards.

QoL Improvements
----------------

With the Mirror of Names and Spiders EXTREME Mode update, the following improvements will be added to the game.

- A feature will be added to the “Fuse E.G.O Gift” screen, allowing you to immediately select all lower-tier E.G.O Gift materials owned for an E.G.O Gift Fusion.

- A feature will be added to allow E.G.O Gifts to be directly enhanced to “++” level.

- A filter function will be added to the E.G.O Gift Compendium to allow sorting by keywords, acquisition status, and other criteria.

- The sorting of E.G.O Gifts displayed in the Theme Pack Compendium will be improved.

title: Feb. 19th New Content - Mirror of Names and Spiders
content:
---------------------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The New Content Mirror Dungeon #7 「Mirror of Names and Spiders」 will be added with the Feb. 19th, 2026 (KST) Update.

► Date : After 26/2/19 (KST) Scheduled Update

► Requirements
Clear Main Story 2-19

Notes
-----

1. With the introduction of Mirror Dungeon #7 「Mirror of Names and Spiders」, Mirror Dungeon #6 [Mirror of Immortality] will be closed.
※ Theme Pack Compendium recorded from Mirror Dungeon #6 will not be reset.
※ Hidden Boss enemy E.G.O Gifts recorded from Mirror Dungeon #6 EXTREME will be removed from the E.G.O Gift Compendium.

2. Only the Normal difficulty will be added with the Scheduled Update.
Once Mirror of Names and Spiders updates, any Starlight acquired in Mirror of Immortality will be removed and will not carry over.
However, as was the case in Mirror of Immortality, because the amount of Starlight obtainable from the Normal difficulty may feel comparatively small, a certain amount of starting Starlight will be given by default so that all Managers can start using the Starlight system immediately.

3. The Hard Difficulty will be updated at a later date.
Please note that the difficulty & balancing for certain enemies or E.G.O Gifts may be adjusted in the process.
More detailed information about the Hard Difficulty will be released via a separate notice in the future.

4. 26/2/19 (KST) Scheduled Update
Maintenance will last from 10:00 ~ 12:00.
Major changes to Mirror Dungeon systems will be deployed after the Scheduled Update. Therefore, with the end of Scheduled Maintenance at 12:00, your Mirror Dungeon Weekly Bonus eligibilities and your current Mirror Dungeon run progress will be reset.
Rewards for Mirror Dungeon runs that remain incomplete before Feb. 19th, 10:00 will become inaccessible with the progress reset, so please claim your rewards BEFORE the Scheduled Maintenance begins.

5. 「Mirror of Immortality」 Achievements progress and rewards will become unavailable when 「Mirror of Names and Spiders」 is updated. Please take note of this information to claim your rewards BEFORE the Feb. 19th Scheduled Maintenance.

Progression
-----------

Entering the dungeon, as it has been previously, does not cost any resources. However, you can spend Enkephalin modules at the end of your exploration to receive rewards.

<Major Changes>

1. Enemy levels will be raised to Level 60.

2. Certain Graces of Stars' effects will be updated.

3. Added function to one-click select all Grace of Stars & one-click enhance them all at once.

4. 1 new Theme Pack and 4 new E.G.O Gifts will be added.
※ With the Hard Difficulty update, new Hard Difficulty-exclusive Theme Packs and E.G.O Gifts will be added.

5. Certain E.G.O Gifts will be adjusted.

6. New quality-of-life UI elements will be added to Mirror Dungeon Shops.

7. E.G.O Gift sorting will be improved.

Creating your TEAM
------------------

In Normal Difficulty, your Identity Levels will be fixed to 60.
※ In Hard Difficulty, which will arrive at a later update, your actual Identity Levels will be reflected.
※ Your current Uptie & E.G.O Threadspinning Tiers will be reflected in the Mirror Dungeon, just as it was in the previous Mirror Dungeons.

Grace of the Star of Names and Spiders
--------------------------------------

The 「Grace of the Immortal Star」 will be replaced with 「Grace of the Star of Names and Spiders」.
From 「Grace of the Star of Names and Spiders」, you can obtain Grace of Stars with special effects by spending Starlight.

※ If you don't purchase the Grace of Stars, you can obtain the remaining sum of Starlight, either from the Starlight Bonus of your Team or the base sum, as a reward upon clearing the Mirror Dungeon run.

※ Selecting Grace of Stars consumes your starting Starlight & Starlight Bonuses first, and will tap into your Starlight reserve only when you've exceeded that amount.

※ You may not be able to select Grace of Stars if you have insufficient Starlight & Starlight Bonuses.

<Major Changes>

1. Certain effects of "Interstellar Travel" and "Perfected Possibility" will be changed.

► Interstellar Travel
※ As this Grace's effect became increasingly less usable the longer the game is played, we have adjusted its effects to ensure its long-term usability for the Mirror Dungeon.

- Interstellar Travel+
(Before) When choosing a new Theme Pack for the first time(in Floor 5 or lower only), gain 1 Clash Power Up in its combat Encounters
(After) If 45+ Theme Packs are unlocked in the Theme Pack Compendium, Clash Power +1

- Interstellar Travel++
(Before) When choosing a new Theme Pack for the first time(in Floor 5 or lower only), gain 3 Clash Power Up in its combat Encounters
(After) If 45+ Theme Packs are unlocked in the Theme Pack Compendium, Clash Power +2

► Perfected Possibility
※ As this Grace's effect of obtaining additional E.G.O Gifts felt less cost-effective compared to the other Graces, we added a new effect that gives "Vestige" type E.G.O Gifts.

- Perfected Possibility (New): Upon entry, gain 1 Dark Vestige
- Perfected Possibility+ (New): Upon entry, gain 1 Dark Vestige, 1 Faint Vestige each
- Perfected Possibility++ (New): Upon entry, gain 1 Dark Vestige, 1 Faint Vestige, and 1 Twinkling Vestige each

2. When using the Grace of Stars "Perfected Possibility," you can now refresh the list of its E.G.O Gifts.
When "Perfected Possibility" is activated, you can spend Starlight to refresh the choice of Tier 3 E.G.O Gifts that are given upon entering the Mirror Dungeon. However, no other E.G.O Gifts apart from those that may appear from that specific pool will appear.

※ If there are only 3 selectable Tier 3 E.G.O Gifts in the said Keyword category, the refresh function will not be available.
※ If there are 2 or fewer selectable Tier 3 E.G.O Gifts in the said Keyword category, Tier 2 E.G.O Gifts may appear upon refreshing.
※ Please note that E.G.O Gift Refresh function will not ask you to confirm if you would like to refresh, and will immediately apply upon pressing the button.

3. A new option to select or enhance all Grace of Stars at once will be added.
Press the "Select All Graces" button on the bottom right corner of the "Grace of the Star of Names and Spiders" to select all Grace of Stars.
Press the "Enhance All +" or "Enhance All ++" button to enhance all Graces at once.
※ Please note that "Enhance All" button does *not* select the Graces. Please either pick and choose which Graces you would like to activate for the run, or press the "Select All Graces" button.

Starting E.G.O Gifts
--------------------

Upon entering the Mirror Dungeon, the players will be presented with E.G.O Gift Keyword categories to choose from. Starting E.G.O Gifts are fixed for each Keyword, and you can select as many E.G.O Gifts as you are allowed to select within each category.
Also, the E.G.O Gift of the Keyword category you select here will appear more frequently during the Mirror Dungeon run.

E.G.O Gift Search
-----------------

After selecting your Starting E.G.O Gifts, you will be brought to the "E.G.O Gift Search" screen, where you can obtain up to 3 additional E.G.O Gifts of your choice.
Each E.G.O Gift selection will increase the price of the next choice.

※ E.G.O Gift Search becomes available only when the "Activate Gift Search" option is toggled ON in your Starting E.G.O Gift selection menu.

Selecting Theme Packs
---------------------

Select a Dungeon Theme to explore upon entering a new floor.
Choose a Theme Pack by selecting the pack of your choice and dragging it downward.

<Major Changes>

1. 1 new Theme Pack has been added to Mirror Dungeon #7 Normal Difficulty.

Theme Pack Search
-----------------

This is the "Theme Pack Search" function accessible by pressing the "Search" button. Using this function, you can spend Starlight to search for and select a Theme Pack of your choice. However, please note that the selectable Theme Pack pool is limited to what is available from your current Floor and Difficulty.

※ Theme Pack Observation fee rises with every use.
※ Searching and selecting a new, previously not accessed, Theme Pack costs 50% more Starlight.

Encounters
----------

After selecting the Theme Pack of your choice, select a Stage node to begin Combat Encounters or Choice Events.

Shops
-----

You can spend your Cost at the Shops to purchase E.G.O Gifts or use one of its many useful services for progressing through the Mirror Dungeon.

<Major Changes>

1. A new UI element has been added to the top right corner of the Shop UI so that you can view your current Identity loadout.

2. E.G.O Gift sorting will be improved for Enhancing, selling, and fusing of E.G.O Gifts.
In "Sell" and "Fuse," Vestige Gifts will be sorted to the top of the list, and in "Enhance Gifts," they will be sorted at the bottom of the list.
In "Enhance," "Sell," and "Fuse," the game will now sort them by Tiers by default. A new sorting category, "Recent," will be added.

3. When an E.G.O Gift has been purchased, it will automatically be moved to the bottom of the list of E.G.O Gifts in the Shop.
※ The location of Vestige Gifts will not be affected by your Sort order. In "Sell" and "Fuse," they will be fixed to the top, and in "Enhance," they will be fixed to the bottom.
※ The list of owned E.G.O Gifts will retain the previous sort order, which is by "Recent."

Replacing Skills
----------------

You can spend a certain amount of Cost to replace the Skills of Identities in your loadout.
However, if you have completely removed a Skill in favor of another in previous Shops, that Skill can no longer be replaced.
※ In "Super Shops" that may spawn in Hard Difficulty, Skill Replacement for 2 Identities will now be shown at once instead of appearing one after another. Also, "Identity Skill Search," a new function to pick and choose which Identity's Skill you would like to replace, will be added. We will share more information in the Hard Difficulty Notice.

<Major Changes>

1. Now, you can view the current number of copies each Skill has in the Skill Replacement menu.

Wishmaking
----------

Through "Wishmaking," you can spend Starlight to improve your Fusion chances.
※ Each instance of Wishmaking uses the same amount of Starlight regardless of how many times it has been activated.
※ Depending on the number of E.G.O Gifts used, the forecast maxes out at 99.99%.

Encounter Reward Cards
----------------------

Each Encounter has a certain chance to provide you with a selection of "Encounter Reward Cards".
Higher-difficulty Mirror Dungeons, higher Floors, and higher-difficulty Encounters will yield higher-value rewards.

Select E.G.O Gifts and Mounting Trials upon each Floor Completion
----------------------------------------------------------------

Clear the Floor to gain an E.G.O Gift of your choice.
Selecting an E.G.O Gift will give you its linked "Mounting Trials" and Enemy level-up effects.
※ Select the "Refuse Gift" option to proceed without selecting any E.G.O Gifts. However, please note that a random Mounting Trial will be added regardless.

E.G.O Gifts
-----------

1. 4 new E.G.O Gifts will be added to the game.
※ The new E.G.O Gifts will appear starting from the Normal Difficulty. 2 Blunt, 1 Keywordless, and 1 Bleed E.G.O Gifts will be added.
※ With the Hard Difficulty update, 12 new E.G.O Gifts and 4 new Fusion E.G.O Gifts will be added.

2. Certain E.G.O Gifts will be adjusted.
※ Please read the [E.G.O Gift Adjustments] section of this Notice for more information.

3. Purchase cost for certain E.G.O Gifts will be adjusted.
- Combustion Gloves: Cost changed from 151 to 251
- Spiked Combat Boots: Cost changed from 149 to 249
※ With the purchase costs adjustment, sale costs will be adjusted accordingly as well.

Exploration Complete and Starlight Reward
-----------------------------------------

Upon completion, you can view your statistics and progress of the relevant Mirror Dungeon run.

※ Starlight Rewards
The following are ways to increase the amount of Starlight gained upon clearing a Mirror Dungeon run.
- Clearing at higher Floors gives more Starlight.
- Clearing in Hard difficulty gives more Starlight.
- Clearing Refraction Railway Theme Pack gives more Starlight.
- Select Starlight Encounter Reward Cards to gain additional Starlight.
- Higher Starlight Bonus in Team loadout window gives better Starlight multiplier.

<Major Changes>

1. Any Starlight acquired in Mirror of Immortality will be removed and will not carry over.
As was the case in Mirror of Immortality, because the amount of Starlight obtainable from the Normal difficulty may feel comparatively small, a certain amount of starting Starlight will be given by default so that all Managers can start using the Starlight system immediately.

[Other Sources of Starlight]
Starlight, which is a Mirror Dungeon resource, can be obtained via Extractions and Yisang Exchanges as well.

※ Other sources of Starlight (There is a single, first-time opportunity to gain Starlight from one of the following conditions):
- Obtain a newly released 3★ Identity or E.G.O from New Target Extractions.
- Within a certain period of time, obtain a newly released 3★ Identity or E.G.O from Extractions.
- Within a certain period of time, obtain a newly released 3★ Identity or E.G.O from Yisang Exchange.
- Within a certain period of time, obtain a newly released 3★ Identity or E.G.O from Extraction or Yisang Exchange after obtaining it from the Dispenser.

※ What are not Starlight acquisition conditions:
- Obtaining a newly released Identity or E.G.O from the Dispenser.
- Extracting or obtaining from Yisang Exchange the same, newly released Identity or E.G.O for the second time or more.
- Obtaining the said Identity or E.G.O outside the certain period of time.

E.G.O Gift Adjustments
----------------------

1) Please note that the following changelog was written based on each Gift's base, un-enhanced versions.
2) Any effects not specified below have not been changed.
3) We will be constantly adjusting ineffective E.G.O Gifts in the upcoming updates.

► Wholeness
- Before: 'N Corp. Fanatic' Identities deal +25% damage against targets with Bleed. If the said ally's SP is maxed, 'N Corp. Fanatic' Identities gain Final Power +1
- After: 'N Corp. Fanatic' Identities deal +25% damage against enemies. If the said ally's SP is maxed, or if a 3+ Lust Reson. was formed last turn, 'N Corp. Fanatic' Identities gain Final Power +2
- New: 'N Corp. Fanatic' Identities deal +50% damage against <Mechanical Amalgam> enemies with Base Skills

► Coveting Thorn
- New: Encounter Start: Increase Bloodfeast by 100
- Before: Every 3 turns, inflict 2 Gluttonous Thorn (貪食棘) against enemies(or Parts) with Bleed. If all enemies(or all Parts) have Bleed, inflict 4 Gluttonous Thorn (貪食棘)
- After: Turn Start: inflict 2 Gluttonous Thorn (貪食棘) against enemies(or Parts) with Bleed. If all enemies(or all Parts) have Bleed, inflict 4 Gluttonous Thorn (貪食棘)

► Artistic Sense
- New: If the Skill inflicts Sinking Potency or Count(including Unique Sinking), deal +10% damage in addition to the above.

► Refraction Glass Pod
- Before: If the target is at -45 SP, deal (Sinking Potency on target / 5) Gloom damage (3 times per Skill). Deal (Sinking Potency on target / 10) Gloom damage (3 times per Skill)
- After: If the target is at -45 SP, deal (Sinking Potency on target / 2) Gloom damage (once per Skill). Deal (Sinking Potency on target / 2) Gloom damage (once per Skill)
- New: If the Skill that hit an enemy inflicts Sinking(including Sinking Count and Unique Sinking) instead of dealing (Sinking Potency on target / 2) Gloom damage, deal (Sinking Potency on target) Gloom damage (Each turn, this applies only to the first Sinking-inflicting Skill that hits)

► Old Dopo Robe
- Before: 'Yield My Flesh' Skill Final Clash Power -12
- After: 'Yield My Flesh' Skill Final Clash Power -24

► Shatterbound Cannon
- Before: Turn Start: Gain 2 Damage Up and 2 Fragile every turn
- After: Turn Start: Gain 2 Firepower and 2 Delicateness every turn
※ The effect itself has not changed. While these new keywords effectively have the same effect as the previous "Damage Up" and "Fragile" effects, these effects can now overlap as they count as different sources of increased damage.

► Pinpoint Logic Circuit
- New: [Cannot Stack] When Move-in Reg. Heathcliff E.G.O Passive 「Circuit Wiring」 activates, this effect does not activate. On Hit, if target has 99 Burn Potency, inflict 1 Resident Reg. Microchip (once per enemy, 3 times per turn)

► Pain of Stifled Rage
- Removed: [Effects apply only to #1, #2 Deployed Identities]
- Before: When inflicting Burn or Unique Burn with a Skill effect to an enemy that has Burn or Unique Burn
- After: When inflicting Burn Potency, Count, or Unique Burn
※ When enhanced, this effect will activate up to 3 times per turn.

► Ardent Flower
- New: At 3+ Wrath Reson., Skills that inflict Burn Potency, Count, or Unique Burn gain Clash Power +1
- At 3+ Wrath A-Reson., or at 6+ Wrath Reson., gain +2 Clash Power instead

► WB Flask
- Adjusted: On enemy kill, increase Bloodfeast by the killed enemy's (max HP / 10) (max 50). Turn End: If an ally has been defeated this turn, all allies gain 2 Attack Power Up next turn
※ We have updated the effect that used to activate only on ally death. Now, on enemy kill, it grants Bloodfeast, and on ally death, grants Offense Level Up.

► Respite
- Removed: [Effects apply only to #1, #2 Deployed Identities]

► Contained Maggots
- Before: When using a Gluttony Attack Skill(except E.G.O Skills) against an enemy
- After: On Hit with a Lust or Gluttony Attack Skill(except E.G.O Skills) against an enemy

► Bloody Mist
- Before: Coin Power +1 to all Skills that inflict Bleed Potency, Count, or Unique Bleed
- After: Plus Coin Skills that inflict Bleed Potency, Count, or Unique Bleed: Coin Power +1, deal +30% damage

[Certain E.G.O Gifts will now have Final Power Up effects to accommodate for Minus Coin Skills]

1) For these Skills, the preexisting "Coin Power" will be re-written to "Plus Coin Power." Now, these effects will grant "Base Power" or "Final Power" for Minus Coin Skills.

2) "Bloody Mist" now gives "Base Power +(8 / # of Coins)" to the Identity earliest in the Deployment order.

3) "Imitative Generator" now also gives "Base Power +(4 / # of Coins)" if the Base Power is below 5.

► E.G.O Gifts that now give "Base Power +(4 / # of Coins) (min 1, rounded down)" effects for "Minus Coin Skills"
Soothe the Dead, Devotion, Bloody Mist, Eerie Effigy, Reminiscence, Imitative Generator, Automated Joints, Overcharged Battery, Perpetual Generator Servos, Hearts-powered Jewel

► E.G.O Gifts that now give "Base Power +(8 / # of Coins) (min 1, rounded down)" effects for "Minus Coin Skills"
Pocket Watch : Type L, E, Y, P

► E.G.O Gifts that now give "Final Power +(12 / # of Coins) (min 1, rounded down)" effects for "Minus Coin Skills"
Lucky Pouch

Upcoming Additions & Improvements
---------------------------------

We will inform you with a more detailed notice when each of the following content is updated.

► 3 New Theme Packs
3 new Theme Packs will be added with the Hard Difficulty update.

► New E.G.O Gifts
- 12 new E.G.O Gifts will be added with the Hard Difficulty update.
- 4 new Hard Difficulty-exclusive Fusion E.G.O Gifts will be added.

► "Cursed" and "Blessed" E.G.O Gifts added
※ The current names for these Gifts, "Cursed" and "Blessed," are placeholders for the ease of understanding. The names will be changed with the future update.
- 3 Cursed E.G.O Gifts and 3 Blessed E.G.O Gifts will be added with the Hard Difficulty update.
- Cursed Gifts provide only negative effects; however, upon meeting certain conditions, they will be replaced by Blessed Gifts that provide positive effects.
- Cursed Gifts are obtainable only via Choice Events with a set chance to appear.

► New Choice Events
- New Choice Events that give new E.G.O Gifts will be added with the Hard Difficulty update.

► Quality of Life Improvements
We are planning to gradually update the following improvements.
Please note that the update period for each improvement may vary.
- Add a UI element to alert the user that all E.G.O Gifts required for a Fusion recipe have been obtained, as well as a function to Fuse them right away
- Add a UI element asking if the user would like to deploy additional healing when healing Sinners in Shops
- Add a UI element that adds more sorting options such as filters to review specific E.G.O Gifts
- Add a UI element in Theme Pack Selection menu to view detailed info for their featured bosses
- Add a UI element to highlight Theme Pack exclusive E.G.O Gifts
- Add a UI element to maximize an E.G.O Gift's Enhancement level with the press of a button
- Add a UI element in the Theme Pack Compendium to show which Floor each Theme Pack is featured in
- Adjust the location of the "SKIP" button when entering Choice Events
- Add the ability to move between Mirror Dungeon nodes by using the direction keys and the Enter key on Steam version
- Add a warning pop-up window when not all available E.G.O Gifts have been selected

► Parallel Superposition & Mirror Projection / Achievements
- The Parallel Superposition mode will be added, unlocking Mirror Dungeon Floors 6 to 10.
- Mirror Projection / Achievements will be added gradually.

► New EXTREME Packs & EXTREME-exclusive E.G.O Gifts
- The EXTREME Mode will be added, unlocking Mirror Dungeon Floors 11 to 15.
- EXTREME-exclusive Theme Packs and E.G.O Gifts will be added.

► New Hidden Boss & Hidden Boss-exclusive
- New EXTREME-exclusive Hidden Bosses E.G.O Gift rewards for defeating them will be added.

title: November 20th New Content - Refraction Railway Line 1 BokGak
content:
-------------------------------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

New Content <Refraction Railway Line 1 BokGak> will be added to the game with the Nov. 20th, 2025 (KST) Scheduled Update.

<Unlock Conditions>
Clear Main Story 8-33

<Event Description>

- Refraction Railway Line 1 is composed of 13 total Stations, and you will face highly difficult encounters in all of them. More rewards can be claimed the further you progress into the Refraction Railway.

- Upon clearing the Terminus, you will be rewarded with a Refraction Railway Line 1 BokGak cosmetic banner.

- If you have achieved certain conditions before clearing the final Station, you will be rewarded with a special cosmetic banner.

- Refraction Railway Line 1 BokGak does not have a specified end date, and will be a permanent addition to the game.

※ Please note that Refraction Railway Line 5 does not close with the introduction of Refraction Railway Line 1 BokGak.

※ Refraction Railway Line 1 BokGak does not keep track of nor display your past run records.

Content Details
---------------

- Enter the Refraction Railway menu to select between <Refraction Railway Line 1 BokGak> or <Refraction Railway Line 5>.

- <Refraction Railway Line 1 BokGak> unlocks upon clearing Main Story Stage 8-33, and can be accessed via the Drive tab.

- The Line can be accessed anytime without spending any resources.

- You can spend a certain number of Modules (only for the first time) at the Lost & Found to claim your Refraction Railway rewards.

- Upon entry, make a Team by Deploying your loadout of Identities and E.G.O. Unlike in previous Refraction Railways, even if you are in the middle of this Refraction Railway run, any changes (such as Level changes, Upties, or Threadspinning) made to currently Deployed units will be reflected in your current run as well.

- The Refraction Railway presents a very difficult series of battles; we strongly recommend that you enter the Railway after meeting the recommended Level & Tier conditions.

<Major Changes>
- The Refraction Railway Line 1 BokGak will have a new Recommended Upgrade Level: Uptie Tier 4 and Level 55 for Identities and Threadspinning Tier 4 for E.G.O.

- Identity Level in Refraction Railway Line 1 BokGak will be capped at Level 55.

- Refraction Railway Line 1 BokGak enemy stats and Skills will be adjusted to reflect this change.

About Line 1 BokGak
-------------------

- Line 1 BokGak comprises 13 Stations, each of which features highly difficult challenges.

- "Clear Turns", which is the number of turns it took for you to clear the Station, and "Total Turns", which is the cumulative number of turns it took for you from the first Station to the current Station,
will be displayed above each Station.

- Any remaining E.G.O Resource after the Station can be used in the subsequent Station.

- Please check the bottom of the screen to view your Deployed Identities' HP and SP statuses.

<Major Changes>
- Once a Station is cleared, Sinners will now recover HP, and dead Sinners will be revived.
- SP values will carry over from one Station to another; revived Sinners will retain their pre-death SP values as well.

<Loadouts>
- Refraction Railway Line 1 BokGak uses the "Chain Battle" system. In Chain Battles, when a Deployed unit is defeated, the Backup Units will fill their spot according to the Deployment order.

- Backup Units receive Starting SP buffs, and Backup Units further back in the Deployment order receive greater Starting SP buffs. Minus Coin Identities receive negative Starting SP buffs.

- Please note that Lobotomy E.G.O::ln the Name of Love and Hate Don Quixote and Lobotomy E.G.O::The Sword Sharpened with Tears Rodion will receive positive Starting SP buffs.

<Major Changes>
- In Line 1 BokGak, you can enter the Station only when you have selected both your Deployment and Backup units: 5 and 7 units, respectively.

- You can change your Team Loadout between every Station—change your Team's Identities, E.G.O, or Deployment orders as you see fit.

Focused Encounters
------------------

- Only up to 5 Identities can be fielded at once in each Encounter.
- Every battle in the Refraction Railway will allow you to directly match ally skills against enemy skills, just like in Focused Encounters.

<Buffs>
- A defeated ally Identity will give E.G.O resources that correspond with the Sin Affinities and the Rank of each Attack Skill on the defeated Ally.

Combat Progression
------------------

- You may choose to retry or give up on a stage.
- Selecting either of those options will reset the Stage, and will put you back at the beginning of the first wave should you attempt it again.

<Defeat>
- If all of your allies are defeated, you can choose between returning to the Team Loadout menu to change your Deployment orders or immediately retrying the battle from wave 1.

- Giving up brings you to the state immediately before entering the said Station.

- Retrying the Stage retains your Deployment Order from when you first entered the Station, and will return you to the start of the first wave.

- You may restart from a previously cleared Station.

- Restarting from a previously cleared Station will revert the state of your Identities' statuses and your E.G.O resource reserves to that point as well, and delete any Stage Clear records made since entering that Station.

- Reaching 100 Turns in a single Station will count as defeat.

Observation Logs
----------------

- In Line 1 BokGak, all enemy info will be unlocked for viewing from the start. Prepare the appropriate strategy, Identity, and E.G.O loadout based on this information.

- In Line 1 BokGak, damage bonus based on Observation Levels does not apply in the Refraction Railway.

- In Line 1 BokGak, the updated Observation Level will be saved even if you give up or retry mid-Encounter.

<Major Changes>
- You now have the option to display Battle Hints (gimmick reading priority) on certain enemy Skills.

Clear Info
----------

- After clearing each Station, you can view statistics such as participating Identities and damage contributions in the Clear Info menu.

<Records>
- Your Refraction Railway Line 1 BokGak stats will be recorded upon clearing the Terminus.
- View the Total Turns and Clear Turns by Station here; click the "Details" button to view the damage contribution statistics.

<Major Changes>
- Refraction Railway Line 1 BokGak does not maintain a record for all of your previous attempts.
- Please note that the Refraction Railway menu will not show any records for your previous attempts or Turn Counts.

Claiming Rewards
----------------

- Once a Station is cleared for the first time, its rewards will be sent to the "Lost & Found".

- To access the "Lost & Found" for the first time, a certain number of Enkephalin Modules will be required. Rewards that can be claimed afterward are free of charge.

- You can earn various level-up and extraction currencies here. Special rewards include 「Takeoff Module - ID Uptie」, 「Season 1 - 3★ Guarantee Decaextraction Ticket」, and 「Refraction Railway Line 1 BokGak Themed Ticket Deco」.

<Special Cosmetic Banners>
- Here, you can view the acquisition conditions for the Refraction Railway Line 1 BokGak Banner.

※ Refraction Railway Line 1 BokGak Banner does not display your Turn Count.

title: October 23rd New Content -
content:
Ch.6.5 Murder on the WARP Express BokGak
----------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

With the October 23rd 2025 (KST) Update, new content [Ch 6.5 - Murder on the WARP Express BokGak] will be added to the game.

- Duration : 2025/10/23 12:00 (KST) ~ Before 11/20 (KST) Scheduled Update
- Event Rewards Exchange : 2025/10/23 12:00 (KST) ~ Before 11/27 (KST) Scheduled Update

Requirements
------------

- Murder on the WARP Express Event Banner: Clear Main Story 0-4 (Tutorial)

- Murder on the WARP Express (Normal Difficulty): Clear Main Story 6.5-15

- Murder on the WARP Express (Hard Difficulty): Clear Main Story 7-36

Description
-----------

- When the event starts, the [Ch. 6.5 - Murder on the WARP Express BokGak] Event Page will open.

- During the event period, you can earn [Civilian Recov. Pack] by clearing the Murder on the WARP Express Event Stages & the Mirror Dungeons.

- Voices will be added to the Murder on the WARP Express story, and you can access the Murder on the WARP Express Hard Difficulty Stages during the event period.

- You can redeem various rewards from the [Reward Exchange] by spending the event currency that you have collected.

Event Gameplay
--------------

► Murder on the WARP Express Story
Voices will be added to the story of Murder on the WARP Express.

► Murder on the WARP Express Combat Stages
You can obtain [Civilian Recov. Pack] every time you complete a combat Encounter of Murder on the WARP Express. 
Each Encounter has a first-time reward, and with it, you can obtain even more [Civilian Recov. Pack].
However, if you had previously cleared the Murder on the WARP Express Stages, you cannot obtain additional first-time rewards.

The final Stage of Murder on the WARP Express is a repeatable Combat Encounter that costs Enkephalin Modules. That final Stage will have a higher Enkephalin-to-[Civilian Recov. Pack] ratio, so it will be much more effective as a means of collecting [Civilian Recov. Pack].

► Murder on the WARP Express Combat Stages (Hard Difficulty)
Murder on the WARP Express Hard Difficulty will become available during the Event period. Clearing Main Story Stage 7-36 will unlock the Hard Difficulty. 

Earn even more [Civilian Recov. Pack] by playing through the Hard Difficulty. You can earn first-time Clear rewards (including the Event currency), EX-Clear rewards, and Chapter Progression by clearing the Hard Difficulty Stages as well.

Event Gameplay
--------------

► Mirror Dungeon
During the Event Period, [Murder on the WARP Express BokGak Theme Pack] will have a fixed appearance on Floor 4~5 of the Mirror Dungeon Hard Difficulty. The said Theme Pack features exclusive Choice Events and E.G.O Gifts.

※ The Preexisting [Murder on the WARP Express Theme Pack] will not be changed.

※ The same Theme Pack will not appear twice in the same run once completed.

※ Murder on the WARP Express BokGak Theme Pack will no longer have a fixed appearance once the Event ends, and may appear on different floors.

Clearing a Mirror Dungeon run will net you [Civilian Recov. Pack]. Selecting the [Murder on the WARP Express] or [Murder on the WARP Express BokGak] Theme Packs will net you even more [Civilian Recov. Pack]. The Theme Pack in the Hard Difficulty yields much more Event currency than the Normal Difficulty.

※ Please note that the Weekly Bonus does not affect the amount of Event currency gained.

※ Please note that, if you have started a Mirror Dungeon run before the event started, you will not gain event currency from that run.

► Main Story
Managers who have not met the Event unlock conditions can obtain [Civilian Recov. Pack] as a first-time reward from Main Story Combat Encounters. Upon your first time clearing an Encounter, you can obtain [Civilian Recov. Pack] proportional to the amount of Enkephalin Spent, regardless of whether you’ve met the EX Clear Conditions or not.

※ You cannot obtain the event currency from stages that have already been completed.

※ You cannot obtain [Civilian Recov. Pack] from Luxcavations or the Refraction Railway.

Event Currency
--------------

In rare cases, clearing the Murder on the WARP Express Stages, the Mirror Dungeon, and the Main Story Stages will also yield [Fixer Recov. Pack].

[Fixer Recov. Pack] has the highest chance of dropping from the final Stage of the Murder on the WARP Express BokGak Event. However, the drop chance is the same across all other Encounters.

[Fixer Recov. Pack] is automatically converted to 20 [Civilian Recov. Pack] in the Results or the Rewards screen upon acquisition.

Event Bonus Units
-----------------

Obtain more [Civilian Recov. Pack] by completing Event Encounters or the Mirror Dungeon while equipped with Event Bonus E.G.Os.

<Event Bonus Units>
► 40% Bonus
- E.G.O [HE] : Dimension Shredder Outis
- 3★ : The Prince of La Manchaland Meursault, W Corp. L4 Cleanup Agent - CCA Heathcliff, MultiCrack Office Rep Faust

► 20% Bonus
- E.G.O [HE] : Dimension Shredder Yi Sang, Dimension Shredder Hong Lu
- 3★ : W Corp. L3 Cleanup Agent Yi Sang, W Corp. L3 Cleanup Agent Don Quixote, W Corp. L3 Cleanup Agent Ryōshū, W Corp. L2 Cleanup Agent Meursault, W Corp. L3 Cleanup Captain Outis
- 2★ : MultiCrack Office Fixer Heathcliff, W Corp. L2 Cleanup Agent Faust, W Corp. L2 Cleanup Agent Hong Lu

※ The Event Currency Bonus from each Unit is additive. (Rounded up)

※ Event Currency Bonus maxes out at 120% Bonus.

※ Event Bonus Units don’t actually have to participate in a battle; you can earn the bonus currency simply by having them in your Team loadout.

※ Event Currency Bonus applies to first-time clear rewards and Mirror Dungeon clear rewards as well.

Event Rewards
-------------

At the [Rewards Exchange], you can spend [Civilian Recov. Pack] you’ve collected to purchase various rewards. 
You may find the rewards from the previous Murder on the WARP Express (Ticket Deco, cosmetic Banners, 1 Event Reward Identity) here. In addition, a new Murder on the WARP Express Announcer will be added to the list of redeemable rewards.

※ You can no longer obtain [Civilian Recov. Pack] after you obtain enough [Civilian Recov. Pack] to purchase every item in the [Reward Exchange].

※ You cannot obtain duplicates of special rewards(Ticket Deco, cosmetic Banners, 1 Event Reward Identity) if you already own them.

※ [Civilian Recov. Pack] will no longer be obtainable once the Event closes after the 2025/11/20 (KST) Scheduled Update.

※ [Reward Exchange] will be open for 5 weeks, from 2025/10/23 12:00 (KST) ~ 2025/11/27 (KST) Scheduled Update.

※ Even after the event fully ends, you will be able to experience the Murder on the WARP Express Combat Encounters or view its story anytime at Drive and Theater - [Detour Tales].

title: New Time Limited Content - Ch.8.5 EX: Pilgrimage of Compassion
content:
--------------------------------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

With the Sep. 25th, 2025 (KST) Update, new time-limited content [Ch.8.5 EX: Pilgrimage of Compassion] will be added to the game.

► Duration
2025/9/25 12:00 (KST) ~ Before 10/23 (KST) Scheduled Update

► Event Rewards Exchange
2025/9/25 12:00 (KST) ~ Before 10/30 (KST) Scheduled Update

► Requirements
- Event Unlock Conditions: Clear Main Story 0-4
- Event Stage unlock conditions: Clear Main Story 0-4

※ While there are no special unlock conditions, the event story takes place after Ch. 8.5: Spring Cultivation. Please note that parts of the event story may contain spoilers up to this point in the story for managers who have not completed Ch. 8.5: Spring Cultivation yet.

Event Description
-----------------

- When the event starts, the [Ch.8.5 EX - Pilgrimage of Compassion] Event Page will open.
- During the event period, you can earn [Sea Terror Sample] by clearing the Pilgrimage of Compassion Event Stages & the Mirror Dungeons.
- You can redeem various rewards from the [Reward Exchange] by spending the [Sea Terror Sample] that you have collected.

※ Notes
- Pilgrimage of Compassion event Encounters and
story can be played only during the event period.

- Pilgrimage of Compassion event ends on 10/23 06:00 (KST).

- After 2025/10/23 06:00, once the event is over, its combat Encounters and story cannot be viewed in the in-game Theater.

- Tidal Elegy Ishmael can only be obtained as a [Pilgrimage of Compassion Event Reward].

- Once the event is over, Tidal Elegy Ishmael cannot be obtained via Extraction, Dispenser, or Yisang [理想] Exchange.

- Unbrilliant Glory Gregor, Command : Meltdown Faust, and To Remain Oneself [宁作吾] Hong Lu can be obtained only via the [Pilgrimage of Compassion New E.G.O Extraction].

- Once the [Pilgrimage of Compassion New E.G.O Extraction] period is over, Unbrilliant Glory Gregor, Command : Meltdown Faust, and To Remain Oneself [宁作吾] Hong Lu cannot be obtained via other Extractions, Dispenser, or Yisang [理想] Exchange.

- Amiya Announcer can be obtained only by purchasing the Amiya Announcer Pack while it is available.

- Once the purchasable period is over, [Amiya Announcer Pack] will no longer be available.

- Once the purchasable period is over, Amiya Announcer cannot be obtained via Extraction, Dispenser, Yisang [理想] Exchange, or purchase of other Packs.

Event Gameplay
--------------

► Combat Encounters of Pilgrimage of Compassion
You can obtain [Sea Terror Sample] every time you complete a combat Encounter of ‘Pilgrimage of Compassion’.
Each Encounter has a first-time reward, and with it, you can obtain even more [Sea Terror Sample].

The final combat Stage of ‘Pilgrimage of Compassion’ costs Enkephalin Modules.
That final Stage will have a higher Enkephalin-to-[Sea Terror Sample] ratio, so it will be much more effective as a means of collecting [Sea Terror Sample].

※ [Pilgrimage of Compassion] is accessible only during the event period. Once the event is over, Pilgrimage of Compassion Encounters and story will no longer be accessible.

► Normal / Hard Difficulties
During the Pilgrimage of Compassion event, both Normal and Hard Difficulties will be unlocked at once.
- Stage unlock conditions : Clear Main Story 0-4

In Normal difficulty, the following modifiers will be active:
- If an Identity’s level is lower than 55, raise their level to 55
- If an Identity’s Uptie Tier or E.G.O’s Threadspinning
Tier is lower than Tier 4, raise them to Tier 4

Hard difficulty reflects your current Identity & E.G.O upgrade levels.

Clearing a Hard difficulty Stage will clear the Normal difficulty counterpart of that Stage as well.
Clearing the Normal difficulty Stage by clearing the Hard difficulty Stage will yield Normal Difficulty Extra Conditions Fulfilled Reward(Lunacy) and first-time event currency rewards as well. (However, this does not apply to Account EXP, identity EXP, or repeat event currency rewards)

※ Notes
※ Once the [Pilgrimage of Compassion] event is over, you will no longer be able to receive the Extra Conditions Fulfilled rewards from these Stages.

※ Once the [Pilgrimage of Compassion] event is over, you will no longer be able to receive its Chapter Progress Rewards and Chapter Extra Conditions Fulfilled rewards.

► Mirror Dungeons
During the Event Period, the [Pilgrimage of Compassion] Floor Theme Pack will have a fixed appearance on the 4th and 5th floors of both Mirror Dungeon Normal & Hard. 
Clearing a Mirror Dungeon run will net you [Sea Terror Sample].

Selecting the Pilgrimage of Compassion Theme Pack will net you even more [Sea Terror Sample]. 
Mirror Dungeon Hard Difficulty rewards contain much more [Sea Terror Sample] than Mirror Dungeon Normal.

※ Notes
※ Pilgrimage of Compassion Theme Pack and its featured exclusive E.G.O Gifts cannot be obtained via Gift Search, and will not be logged in the Gift Compendium.

※ This Theme Pack and its exclusive E.G.O Gifts will not count toward the following Mirror Projection Achievements - Collections category achievements

- Unlock 40 or more Normal Difficulty Theme Packs
- Unlock 70 or more Hard Difficulty Theme Packs
- Unlock 20 [Keyword] E.G.O Gifts in the E.G.O Gift Compendium
- Unlock 300 E.G.O Gifts in the E.G.O Gift Compendium

※ Once the event is over, [Pilgrimage of Compassion] Theme Pack, its exclusive Choice Events, and E.G.O Gifts will be removed from the game.

※ However, please note that using the Weekly Bonuses does not increase the event currency yield.

※ Please note that, if you have started a Mirror Dungeon run before the event started, you will not gain event currency from that run.

► Main Story
You can obtain [Sea Terror Sample] as a first-time reward from Main Story Combat Encounters as well.
Upon first-time completion of an Encounter, you can obtain [Sea Terror Sample] proportional to the amount of Enkephalin Spent, regardless of whether you’ve met the EX Clear Conditions or not.

※ You cannot obtain event currencies from stages that have already been completed.

※ You cannot obtain [Sea Terror Sample] from Refraction Railway or Luxcavation.

Event Currency
--------------

If you have cleared the ‘Pilgrimage of Compassions’ Stages, Mirror Dungeons, and the Main Story, you have a small chance to obtain [Luminous Sea Terror Sample]

[Luminous Sea Terror Sample] has the highest chance of dropping from the final Encounter of the event. However, the chance for it to drop is the same across all other Encounters.

[Luminous Sea Terror Sample] is automatically converted to 20 [Sea Terror Sample] in the Results or the Rewards screen upon acquisition.

Event Bonus Units
-----------------

Obtain more [Sea Terror Sample] by completing Event Encounters or Mirror Dungeons while equipped with Event Bonus Identities.

<Event Bonus Identities>

► 40% Bonus
- E.G.O [WAW] : Unbrilliant Glory Gregor
- E.G.O [HE] : Command : Meltdown Faust,
To Remain Oneself Hong Lu, Tidal Elegy Ishmael

※ The Event Currency Bonus from each Identity & E.G.O is additive. (Rounded up)

※ Event Currency Bonus maxes out at 120% Bonus.

※ Event Bonus Units don’t actually have to participate in a battle; you can earn the bonus currency simply by having them in your Team loadout.

※ Event Currency Bonus applies to first-time clear rewards and Mirror Dungeon clear rewards as well.

Event Rewards
-------------

At the [Rewards Exchange], you can spend [Sea Terror Sample] you’ve collected to purchase various rewards.

※ You can no longer obtain [Sea Terror Sample] after you obtain enough [Sea Terror Sample] to purchase every item in the [Reward Exchange].

※ [Sea Terror Sample] will no longer be obtainable once the Event closes after the 2025/10/23 (KST) Scheduled Update.

※ [Reward Exchange] will be open for 5 weeks, from 2025/9/25 12:00 (KST) ~ Before 2025/10/30 (KST) Scheduled Update.

※ Notes
※ Tidal Elegy Ishmael can only be obtained as a [Pilgrimage of Compassion Event Reward].

※ Please note that Tidal Elegy Ishmael will not be present in the Dispenser, and cannot be Dispensed.

※ Once the event is over, Tidal Elegy Ishmael cannot be obtained via Extraction, Dispenser, or Yisang [理想]Exchange.

Extraction
----------

Unlike other Extractions(which run for 2 weeks), the New E.G.O Extraction [Pilgrimage of Compassion] will run for 4 weeks.

► Extraction Period : 2025/09/25 12:00 ~ 10/23 06:00 (KST)

Special Collaboration E.G.O, which are available only during the Pilgrimage of Compassion Extraction Period, will be labeled with a separate [EVENT LIMITED] tag.

※ Notes
※ Unbrilliant Glory Gregor, Command : Meltdown Faust, and To Remain Oneself Hong Lu are available only from the [Pilgrimage of Compassion New E.G.O Extraction]

※ Please note that Unbrilliant Glory Gregor, Command : Meltdown Faust, and To Remain Oneself [宁作吾] Hong Lu are not featured inother Extractions or Yisang [理想] Exchanges of other Extractions.

※ Each Extraction on the [Pilgrimage of Compassion New E.G.O Extraction] yields Yisang [理想]. Once you’ve gathered 200 Yisang [理想], it can be used to exchange for one of the following E.G.O: Unbrilliant Glory Gregor, Command : Meltdown Faust, or To Remain Oneself Hong Lu.

※ E.G.O, once Extracted, are removed from the Extraction and Yisang [理想] Exchange list. This means that, once an E.G.O is obtained(either via Extraction or Yisang [理想] Exchange), you cannot Extract or Yisang [理想] Exchange a duplicate of it.

※ Once the [Pilgrimage of Compassion New E.G.O Extraction]’s Extraction period is over, any unexchanged Yisang [理想] will be converted to Threads.

※ Please note that, once the [Pilgrimage of Compassion New E.G.O Extraction]’s Extraction period is over, Unbrilliant Glory Gregor, Command : Meltdown Faust, and To Remain Oneself [宁作吾] Hong Lu cannot be exchanged using the Yisang [理想] Exchange, and will be removed from the Yisang [理想] exchange list.

※ Unbrilliant Glory Gregor, Command : Meltdown Faust, and To Remain Oneself Hong Lu cannot be Dispensed from the Dispenser.

※ Once the [Pilgrimage of Compassion New E.G.O Extraction] period is over, Unbrilliant Glory Gregor, Command : Meltdown Faust, and To Remain Oneself Hong Lu cannot be obtained via other Extractions, Dispenser, or Yisang [理想] Exchange.

Pilgrimage of Compassion Limited Announcer Pack
-----------------------------------------------

To commemorate the Limbus Company X Arknights Collaboration, a new limited Announcer Pack will be added to the shop.

<Amiya Announcer Pack>
- Amiya Announcer
- Decaextraction Ticket x2
- Price: Paid Lunacy x2500
- Purchasable Period: 25/09/25 12:00 ~ 25/10/23 06:00 (KST)
- Can be purchased once per account

※ Notes
※ Amiya Announcer can be obtained only by purchasing the Amiya Announcer Pack while it is available.

※ Please note that Amiya Announcer will be featured neither in the Dispenser nor any Extractions or Yisang [理想] Exchanges.

※ Once the sale period is over, [Amiya Announcer Pack] will no longer be available.

※ Once the sale period is over, Amiya Announcer cannot be obtained via Extraction, Dispenser, purchase of other Packs, or Yisang [理想] Exchange.

title: New Content - Mirror of Immortality Parallel Superposition Mode & Achievements
content:
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Greetings, dear Manager.

New Content <Mirror of Immortality Parallel Superposition Mode & Achievements>
will be added to the game with the
Aug. 7th, 2025 (KST) Scheduled Update.

※ For the Mirror of Immortality Parallel Superposition mode and
Achievements implementation, Mirror Dungeon entry will
be blocked for the following period: 2025.08.07 06:00 ~ 12:00
Please note this information for your gameplay plans.

<Description>

- Engage the “Mirror of the Dreaming -
Parallel Superposition Mode” to expand the dungeon to 10 Floors.

- Mirror Dungeon Achievements have been added to the game.
Complete Achievements to advance on the Achievements Progress
bar and receive respective rewards based on your progress.

Parallel Superposition Mode
---------------------------

- Just like the Mirror Dungeon Hard Difficulty,
Parallel Superposition Mode is unlocked upon clearing Canto 7.

- Engage the Parallel Superposition Mode to expand the
Mirror Dungeon to 10 Floors.

- Parallel Superposition mode presents a difficult level of challenge
and exists only for challenge runs or completing Achievements.

- Clearing higher floors in the Parallel Superposition mode
awards more Starlight rewards.

- Please note that the Pass EXP or Lunacy rewards for clearing
Floors above Floor 6 or higher are no different from clearing Floor 5.

- You may engage the Parallel Superposition Mode by toggling on
the Infinity Mirror button at the entrance of the
Mirror Dungeon or by using the toggle button on the right side
of the Dungeon Progress(Settings) pop-up window.

- In order to enter the Parallel Superposition Mode after
clearing Floor 5, you had to have finished every Floor Theme Pack
up to Floor 5 of that run in Hard difficulty.

- Please note that Mirror of Immortality runs that were started
using Rental Teams will only have 5 floors available.

Mounting Trials
---------------

- The trials will get increasingly stronger the higher you rise.

- Parallel Superposition Mode is a challenging content.
Enemies may become incredibly powerful or sturdy once they’ve
gained just the right combination of Trials.

- If continuing appears to be difficult, it may be a good idea to
forfeit the dungeon for now and try again with a different
combination of Mounting Trials and E.G.O Gifts,
Grace of the Immortal Star, or use the E.G.O Gift Search function.

Achievements
------------

- You can gain Achievements Progress by
clearing Mirror Dungeon achievements.

- Mirror Dungeon floors are counted as 'cleared' only when the player
consumed Enkephalin Modules in the Reward Claim window.
Please note this information before attempting to
complete an Achievement tied to clearing the Mirror Dungeon.

- Please note that future updates
will bring even more Achievements to the game.

- Please note that Mirror of Immortality
Achievements & Achievement Reward claims are available
only until the Mirror Dungeon #7 Update.

- As long as you meet the conditions, you can gain Mirror Dungeon
Achievements progress or complete Achievements even
when clearing the Mirror Dungeon with Rental Teams.

- Obtain various rewards based on your Achievements Progress.

- Achievements added in the future
will bring additional rewards as well.

title: July 31st New Content - Ch.6.5 Timekilling Time BokGak
content:
-----------------------------------------------------

Event Bonus Units

<Event Bonus E.G.Os>

► 40% Bonus
- E.G.O [WAW] : Crushbound Past Meursault, Everlasting Faust
- 3★ : T Corp. Class 3 VDCU Staff Outis, District 20 Yurodivy Hong Lu, T Corp. Class 3 Collection Staff Don Quixote

※ Event Bonus Units don’t actually have to participate in a battle; you can earn the bonus currency simply by having them in your Team loadout.

※ Event Currency Bonus applies to first-time clear rewards and Mirror Dungeon clear rewards as well.

Event Rewards
-------------

At the [Rewards Exchange], you can spend [Pocket Watch] you’ve collected to purchase various rewards.

You may find the rewards from the previous Timekilling Time (Ticket Deco, cosmetic Banners, 1 Event Reward Identity) here.

In addition, a new Timekilling Time Announcer will be added to the list of redeemable rewards.

※ You cannot obtain duplicates of special rewards (Ticket Deco, cosmetic Banners, 1 Event Reward Identity) if you already own them.

※ [Pocket Watch] will no longer be obtainable once the Event closes after the 2025/08/26 (KST) Scheduled Update.
