title: 2025, July 31st Scheduled Update Notice
content:
---------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on July 31st, 2025 (KST).

Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.

Please refer below for details about the update.

New Content
-----------

1. New Target Extraction [Timekilling Time BokGak] (25/07/31 12:00 ~ 08/14 10:00 (KST))

The following Identities and E.G.O will have increased odds of extraction.

- E.G.O [WAW] : Crushbound Past Meursault
- 3★ : T Corp. Class 3 VDCU Staff Outis

※ Crushbound Past Meursault is a Season 6 Event Identity.
※ T Corp. Class 3 VDCU Staff Outis is a Season 6 Event Identity.

2. Target Extraction [Yi Sang] (25/07/31 12:00 ~ 08/14 10:00 (KST))

The following Identities, E.G.O, and Announcers will have increased odds of extraction.

- E.G.O [HE] : Fell Bullet Yi Sang, Dimension Shredder Yi Sang
- E.G.O [TETH] : Wishing Cairn Yi Sang
- 3★ : N Corp. E.G.O::Fell Bullet Yi Sang, Liu South Section 3 Yi Sang, The Ring Pointillist Student Yi Sang, W Corp. L3 Cleanup Agent Yi Sang, Effloresced E.G.O::Spicebush Yi Sang, Blade Lineage Salsu Yi Sang
- 2★ : LCE E.G.O::Lantern Yi Sang, Dieci South Section 4 Yi Sang, The Pequod First Mate Yi Sang, Molar Office Fixer Yi Sang, Seven South Section 6 Yi Sang
- 1★ : LCB Sinner Yi Sang

3. New Extraction Announcer

1 new Extractable Announcer will be available from the following Extractions.

► New Announcer
- T Corp. Temp Special Investigators

► Featured Extractions
- Standard Fare Extraction
- New Target Extraction [Timekilling Time BokGak]
- Target Extraction [Yi Sang]

► Featured Period : 25/07/31 12:00 ~ 08/14 10:00 (KST)

※ Please note that, while this Announcer will no longer be obtainable via Extraction after the featured period is over, it can be obtained via Yisang Exchange in future Target Extractions. (Not from Standard Fare extractions, as Yisang Exchange is not available from Standard Fare)

4. New Identity & E.G.O

The following Identity and E.G.O are added to the list of extractable Identities.

- E.G.O [WAW] : Crushbound Past Meursault
- 3★ : T Corp. Class 3 VDCU Staff Outis

5. New Content [Timekilling Time BokGak]

※ Please refer to the Steam Announcements Page for more information

6. New Packages

3 new limited packages will be added to the game with the 2025. 7. 31 (KST) Scheduled Update.

► Target Extraction Pack
- Contents : Decaextraction Ticket x 4
- Price : ₩33,000 / $21.99 / ¥3,000
- Can be purchased once
- Purchasable Period : 25. 7. 31 12:00 ~ 8. 14 10:00 (KST)

► Identity Growth Pack
- Contents : Takeoff Module - ID Uptie x 1, Identity Training Ticket IV x 60, Identity Training Ticket III x 30
- Price : ₩33,000 / $21.99 / ¥3,000
- Can be purchased once
- Purchasable Period : 25. 7. 31 12:00 ~ 8. 14 10:00 (KST)

► E.G.O Upgrade Pack
- Contents : Takeoff Module - E.G.O Spinning [WAW] x 1
- Price : ₩33,000 / $21.99 / ¥3,000
- Purchase : Can be purchased once
- Purchasable Period : 25. 7. 31 12:00 ~ 8. 14 10:00 (KST)

Major Changes
-------------

1. Mirror Dungeon Team Rental System Added

Team Rental System, in which players can rent a preset Team loadout to play through the Mirror Dungeon, will be added to the game.

※ Players have one Rental chance to rent the Team over the rental period.

※ When using a rental Team, the Mirror Dungeon Identity & E.G.O swap function and the Parallel Superposition Mode (Infinity Mode), which will be unlocked at a later date, will not be accessible.

※ You can obtain Mirror Dungeon clear rewards and Event currencies by clearing the Mirror Dungeon using the Rental team.

※ Only one out of three Weekly Bonuses can be consumed when clearing a Mirror Dungeon with a Rental Team.

※ Claiming the Mirror Dungeon Clear Reward will consume your Rental chance.

2. A new option to toggle between waiting for the Victory & Defeat Announcer lines to be completed and skipping them immediately has been added.

※ When toggled [ON], the victory/defeat screen will persist until the voiceline is completed.

※ When toggled [OFF], the victory/defeat screen will be skipped immediately, even as the voiceline continues to play.

3. The list of selected Grace of the Immortal Star will now be visible in the Mirror Dungeon Exploration Complete screen.

E.G.O Gift Adjustments, Keyword Changes, and Text Corrections
--------------------------------------------------------------

※ Certain E.G.O Gifts will have their effects, texts, and Keywords adjusted.

※ The following adjustment descriptions are all base-level, un-enhanced versions of E.G.O Gifts.

※ We have only noted the parts of the E.G.O Gifts that are changed or added; any unlisted effects have not been adjusted.

1. Keyword Changes

※ A certain E.G.O Gift will have its Keyword category changed.

► Warning Notice
- Before : Tremor Keyword Category
- After : "Keywordless" Category

2. Effect Adjusted

※ Certain E.G.O Gifts will have their effects adjusted or expanded.

► Blood, Sweat, and Tears
- Before : If the Skill’s Affinity was Sloth, deal +20% damage instead.
- After : When using a Sloth Skill, or a Skill that inflicts Tremor Potency or Tremor Count or triggers Amplitude Conversion, Tremor Burst, or Amplitude Entanglement, deal +20% damage instead.

► Omnivibro-octovecti-bell

- Before

1. When winning a Clash with a Skill that inflicts Tremor Potency or Count, or consumes Tremor Count on self: inflict (# of remaining Coins) Tremor Potency against the target; if the target does not have Tremor, inflict +3 Tremor Count.

2. Skills that consume Tremor Count on self deal +(Tremor Count consumed by self + Tremor Potency on target + 5)% damage (except E.G.O Skills; max 50%).

- After

1. When winning a Clash with a Skill that inflicts Tremor Potency or Count, or consumes Tremor Count on self: inflict (# of remaining Coins) Tremor Potency against the target and gain (# of remaining Coins) Tremor Count (max +3 Tremor Count gained per Skill). If the target does not have Tremor, inflict +3 Tremor Count.

2. Skills deal +(Tremor consumed on self + Tremor Potency on the enemy + 5)% damage (except E.G.O Skills; max 50%).

- New

When the target has Tremor - Superposition, when triggering either Tremor Burst or Amplitude Conversion against the enemy with a type of Tremor they don't have in their Tremor - Superposition, extend the Tremor - Superposition on target at Turn End to the next turn.

3. Text Corrections

※ These are E.G.O Gifts with descriptions that are getting changed to match the actual effects.

► Pocket Watch : Type L
- Before : When an ally that inflicts Tremor Potency, Count, or 'Unique Tremor' triggers Amplitude Conversion on an enemy with Attack Skills (Including E.G.O Skills)...
- After : When an ally that inflicts Tremor Potency, Count, or 'Unique Tremor' triggers Amplitude Conversion or Amplitude Entanglement on an enemy with Attack Skills (Including E.G.O Skills).

Bug Fixes and Improvements
--------------------------

► Fixed an issue where Full-stop Office Rep Hong Lu and Full-stop Office Fixer Heathcliff did not play the relevant voices when using 'Melee Support', 'Target Spotted' and their Empowered Skills.

► Fixed an issue where the image for the Mirror Dungeon Theme Pack 'The Surrendered Witnessing' was missing the "Warning" text.

► Fixed an issue where UI elements for a certain Announcer voiceline activation condition that does not exist appeared for a certain Announcer when viewing their list of lines.
※ Relevant Announcer : Zilu/Zigong - Multiple Ally Deaths

► Added an explanation of the E.G.O Gift Search function in the Mirror Dungeon Tutorials.

► (EN Only) Made minor typo and grammar corrections to Ch. 6.5 - Timekilling Time story.

► Adjusted the name of a certain character featured in the main story & Dante's Notes.
※ The name has been adjusted to match the original intent.

► Fixed an issue where Skills with "[Indiscriminate] Targets randomly" effect would make the unit's targeting malfunction.
- Before : Prioritized allies first, then targeted enemies with the remaining Atk Weight.
- After : Targets randomly, as written.

► Fixed an issue where the E.G.O Gift 'Moon in the Water' caused Combo Skill to malfunction.
※ Affected Identities : Full-stop Office Rep Hong Lu

► Fixed an issue where, in one of the Choice Events present in the 'Love and Hate' Mirror Dungeon Theme Pack, the Sin Affinity advantage text for the answer 'We don't live in a binary world defined only by good and evil.' did not match the actual advantages.
- Before : Run a Gloom, Gluttony & Envy Advantage check to gain a Charge E.G.O Gift.
- After : Run a Wrath, Pride & Envy Advantage check to gain a Charge E.G.O Gift.

► Fixed an issue where, in the Starting E.G.O Gift selection screen before entering the Mirror Dungeon of the Fathoms, an unnecessary UI element was present, which prevented the players from using the Refresh function.

► Fixed an issue where, because the Mirror Dungeons' Select Grace of Stars menu wasn't able to adjust itself based on the resolution certain buttons could not be interacted with.

► Fixed an issue where Lobotomy E.G.O::The Sword Sharpened with Tears Rodion's objects lingered in certain Boss cutscenes.

► Fixed an issue where, in certain circumstances, repeatedly using E.G.O Skills could cause the cutscene camera to slowly slide out of position.

► Fixed an issue where the 'Hints' button would appear in the detailed info windows for units unaffected by it as well.

► Fixed an issue where the Walpurgis Night-exclusive visual effects were missing from Don Quixote E.G.O - In the Name of Love and Hate.

► Fixed an issue where The Thumb East Soldato II Sinclair's Skill 3 did not cause the portrait cut-in to appear.

► Fixed an issue where, in the Team loadout menu, the selected Identity list on the left side of the screen didn't immediately update their information depending on the changes to their Levels, Uptie Tiers, and selected Illustrations.

► Fixed an issue where viewing certain identities' Identity Stories did not cause some of their illustrations to be used as loading screen images.
※ Relevant Identities : Lobotomy E.G.O::In the Name of Love and Hate Don Quixote, Lobotomy E.G.O::The Sword Sharpened with Tears Rodion

Known Issues
------------

► An issue where, even if the player has the "Wait for Announcer Lines to end after Battle" option toggled OFF, the relevant victory/defeat Announcer Voiceline would continue to play until the next voiceline plays.

※ The Announcer victory/defeat screen skip function works properly; however, the issue is that the Announcer Lines play in the subsequent gameplay anyway despite skipping the victory/defeat screen.

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Aug. 7th, 2025 (KST)
- When : After July 31st, 2025 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.
- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change depending on its status. If such a change occurs, we will let you know in a follow-up notice.
- A resource download may be prompted after the build update. If you're using a mobile device, it is recommended to proceed with a Wi-Fi connection.
- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account. Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: New Content - The 6th Walpurgis Night
content:
-------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

On July 17th, 2025 (KST), new content 「The 6th Walpurgis Night」 will be added to the game.

- Event Period: 2025/7/17 12:00 ~ 7/31 10:00 (KST)

New Content
-----------

- Announcers : Tiphereth Announcer, Magical Girl(The Queen of Hatred) Announcer
- E.G.O [WAW] : In the Name of Love and Hate Don Quixote
- 3★ : Lobotomy E.G.O::In the Name of Love and Hate Don Quixote, Lobotomy E.G.O::The Sword Sharpened with Tears Rodion

※ Notice: Extraction Rate Changes during the Event Period
During the Walpurgis Night Event, Extractable Announcers will be added to the game.

Due to this addition, the Extraction rates for certain Extractions will be changed while the Walpurgis Night event is active.

In compliance with the 「Voluntary Restraint Guidelines for Probabilistic Items」 of Korea Association of Game Industry, the exact Extraction rates are disclosed in the in-game menu "Detailed Rates"

Please note this information as you play the game.

Extractions
-----------

1. The 6th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction
「The 6th Walpurgis Night」 Target Extraction will be featured over the Event period. 「The 6th Walpurgis Night」 Target Extraction features increased Extraction rates for the following new Identities, E.G.O, and Announcers.

► List

3★ : Lobotomy E.G.O::In the Name of Love and Hate Don Quixote, Lobotomy E.G.O::The Sword Sharpened with Tears Rodion
E.G.O [WAW] : In the Name of Love and Hate Don Quixote
Announcer : Tiphereth Announcer, Magical Girl(The Queen of Hatred) Announcer

2. The 1st & 2nd Walpurgis Night Target Extraction BokGak
「The 1st & 2nd Walpurgis Night Target Extraction BokGak」 will be featured over the Event period. 「The 1st & 2nd Walpurgis Night Target Extraction BokGak」 features increased Extraction rates for the Identities, E.G.O, and Announcers added during the 1st and the 2nd Walpurgis Night.

► Better Odds

3★ : Lobotomy E.G.O::Regret Faust, Lobotomy E.G.O::Magic Bullet Outis
2★ : Hook Office Fixer Hong Lu, Lobotomy E.G.O::Lantern Don Quixote
E.G.O [TETH] : Regret Meursault
Announcer : Malkuth Announcer, Pierre & Jack Announcer

► Identities & E.G.O
During the Event period, all current and previous 「Walpurgis Night」 event Identities and E.G.O will be Extractable from the following Extractions.

► Walpurgis Night ID & E.G.O Extractions
- The 6th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction
- The 1st & 2nd Walpurgis Night Target Extraction BokGak
- New Manager’s Welcome Extraction
- Assured Extraction: 3★ Identity Extraction (※ Does not include E.G.Os)
- Standard Extraction

<Featured>

3★ : <New> Lobotomy E.G.O::In the Name of Love and Hate Don Quixote, <New> Lobotomy E.G.O::The Sword Sharpened with Tears Rodion, Full-Stop Office Rep Hong Lu, Full-Stop Office Fixer Heathcliff, Lobotomy E.G.O::Solemn Lament Yi Sang, Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Eyes & Penitence Ryōshū, Dawn Office Fixer Sinclair, Lobotomy E.G.O::Magic Bullet Outis, Lobotomy E.G.O::Regret Faust
2★ : Lobotomy E.G.O::Lantern Don Quixote, Hook Office Fixer Hong Lu
E.G.O [WAW] : <New> In the Name of Love and Hate Don Quixote, Sanguine Desire Rodion
E.G.O [HE] : Magic Bullet Outis, Solemn Lament Gregor, Wingbeat Ishmael
E.G.O [TETH] : Regret Meursault

<Increased Extraction Rates>
「The 6th Walpurgis Night」 Identities and E.G.O receive increased Extraction rates for 「The 6th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction」 during the event period.

- Affected Extractions: The 6th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction
- Identities & E.G.O with increased rates

3★ : Lobotomy E.G.O::In the Name of Love and Hate Don Quixote, Lobotomy E.G.O::The Sword Sharpened with Tears Rodion
E.G.O [WAW] : In the Name of Love and Hate Don Quixote

The 1st & 2nd Walpurgis Night Identities and E.G.O receive increased Extraction rates for 「The 1st & 2nd Walpurgis Night Target Extraction BokGak」 during the event period.

- Affected Extractions: The 1st & 2nd Walpurgis Night Target Extraction BokGak
- Identities & E.G.O with increased rates

3★ : Lobotomy E.G.O::Regret Faust, Lobotomy E.G.O::Magic Bullet Outis
2★ : Hook Office Fixer Hong Lu, Lobotomy E.G.O::Lantern Don Quixote
E.G.O [TETH] : Regret Meursault

During the event period, all Walpurgis Night Identities & E.G.O can appear from New Manager's Welcome Extraction, Assured Extraction: 3★ Identity Extraction (※ Does not include E.G.Os), and Standard Fare Extractions as well.

However, please note that those Extractions do not provide specific increased Extraction rates.

► Announcers
During the Event period, all current and previous 「Walpurgis Night」 event Announcers will be Extractable from the following Extractions.

► Walpurgis Night Announcer Extractions
- The 6th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction
- The 1st & 2nd Walpurgis Night Target Extraction BokGak

<Featured Announcers>
Announcer : <New> Tiphereth Announcer, <New> Magical Girl(The Queen of Hatred) Announcer, Netzach Announcer, Full-Stop Office Announcer, Hod Announcer, Dawn Office Announcer, Yesod Announcer, Molar Office Announcer, Malkuth Announcer, Pierre/Jack Announcer, Angela Announcer

<Increased Extraction Rates>
「The 6th Walpurgis Night」 Announcers receive increased Extraction rates for 「The 6th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction」 during the event period.

- Affected Extractions: The 6th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction
- Announcers with increased rates

Announcer : Tiphereth Announcer, Magical Girl(The Queen of Hatred) Announcer

The 1st & 2nd Walpurgis Night Announcers receive increased Extraction rates for 「The 1st & 2nd Walpurgis Night Target Extraction BokGak」 during the event period.

- Affected Extractions: The 1st & 2nd Walpurgis Night Target Extraction BokGak
- Announcers with increased rates

Announcer : Malkuth Announcer, Pierre & Jack Announcer

The Announcers’ Extraction rate does not affect the Extraction rates of 3★ Identities. However, 2★ and 1★ units have lower Extraction rates to make room for the Announcers’ Extraction rates.
A duplicate of an already-owned Announcer will be automatically converted to 50 Thread Crates.

Please note that the Walpurgis Night Announcers are featured only in 「The 6th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction」 and 「The 1st & 2nd Walpurgis Night Target Extraction BokGak」 and will not appear in other Extractions.

Extractions - Yisang Exchange
-----------------------------

The following Identities, E.G.O, and Announcers will be available from 「The 6th Walpurgis Night」 Target Extraction Yisang Exchange.

<List>
3★ : <New> Lobotomy E.G.O::In the Name of Love and Hate Don Quixote, <New> Lobotomy E.G.O::The Sword Sharpened with Tears Rodion
E.G.O [WAW] : <New> In the Name of Love and Hate Don Quixote
Announcer : <New> Tiphereth Announcer, <New> Magical Girl(The Queen of Hatred) Announcer, Netzach Announcer, Full-Stop Office Announcer, Hod Announcer, Dawn Office Announcer, Yesod Announcer, Molar Office Announcer, Malkuth Announcer, Pierre/Jack Announcer, Angela Announcer

The following Identities, E.G.O, and Announcers will be available from 「The 1st & 2nd Walpurgis Night Target Extraction BokGak」 Target Extraction Yisang Exchange.

<List>
3★ : Lobotomy E.G.O::Regret Faust, Lobotomy E.G.O::Magic Bullet Outis
E.G.O [TETH] : Regret Meursault
Announcer : <New> Tiphereth Announcer, <New> Magical Girl(The Queen of Hatred) Announcer, Netzach Announcer, Full-Stop Office Announcer, Hod Announcer, Dawn Office Announcer, Yesod Announcer, Molar Office Announcer, Malkuth Announcer, Pierre/Jack Announcer, Angela Announcer

※ Walpurgis Night Announcers are featured in both 「The 6th Walpurgis Night」 and 「The 1st & 2nd Walpurgis Night Target Extraction BokGak」 Yisang Exchange lists.

Please note that any exchanged duplicates of Identities that have already been obtained will be converted to 50 Egoshards of the respective Sinner. Please note that any exchanged duplicates of Announcers that have already been obtained will be immediately converted to 50 Thread Crates.

Dispenser
---------

During 「The 6th Walpurgis Night」 Event period, you can purchase all Identities and E.G.Os featured in the previous 「Walpurgis Night」 Events.

However, Identities featured in the ongoing 「The 6th Walpurgis Night」 event cannot be purchased from the Dispenser.
Please note that 「Walpurgis Night」 Event Announcers will not be featured in the Dispenser.

<Available from the Dispenser>
E.G.O [WAW] : Sanguine Desire Rodion
E.G.O [HE] : Magic Bullet Outis, Solemn Lament Gregor, Wingbeat Ishmael
E.G.O [TETH] : Regret Meursault
3★ : Full-Stop Office Rep Hong Lu, Full-Stop Office Fixer Heathcliff, Lobotomy E.G.O::Solemn Lament Yi Sang, Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Eyes & Penitence Ryōshū, Dawn Office Fixer Sinclair, Lobotomy E.G.O::Magic Bullet Outis, Lobotomy E.G.O::Regret Faust
2★ : Lobotomy E.G.O::Lantern Don Quixote, Hook Office Fixer Hong Lu

<Unavailable from the Dispenser>
E.G.O [WAW] : <New> In the Name of Love and Hate Don Quixote
3★ : <New> Lobotomy E.G.O::In the Name of Love and Hate Don Quixote, <New> Lobotomy E.G.O::The Sword Sharpened with Tears Rodion

7/17 Linked Content - Mini Episode
----------------------------------

With the start of the Event, a new Mini Episode 「The 6th Walpurgis Night」 will be introduced to the game.

- Unlock Conditions : Clear Stage 8-33

※ Upon first entry, Managers who have not completed Stage 8-33 will be asked to confirm if they want to view the story before proceeding to the “Event Encounter - Hatred and Despair”

7/17 Linked Content - Hatred and Despair
----------------------------------------

During the Event period, linked content 「Hatred and Despair」 will be introduced to the game.

- Event Period : 2025/7/17 12:00 ~ 7/31 10:00 (KST)
- Event Reward Exchange Period : 2025/7/17 12:00 ~ 8/7 10:00 (KST)
- Unlock Conditions : None

<Description>
- With the start of the Event, the 「Hatred and Despair」 Event page will be added to the game.
- Complete special Missions(challenges) in the Easy and Hard difficulty Encounters to receive Mission Rewards.

<Event Progression>
► During the Event period, 「The 6th Walpurgis Night - Hatred and Despair」 Event can be accessed regardless of the Main Story progress.
※ Once the Event closes, however, the unlock condition will change to Clear Stage 8-33
► Hatred and Despair Event has two difficulties: Easy and Hard.
► Completing the Hatred and Despair Encounters will consume an Enkephalin Module. Clear the Easy difficulty to unlock the Hard difficulty.
► The following effects will be active in the Easy difficulty:
- If the Identity’s level is lower than 55, raise their level to 55
- If Identities’ Uptie Tiers or equipped E.G.O’s Threadspinning Tiers are lower than Tier 3, raise it to Tier 3
► During the Event Period, fulfill Missions(challenges) in each of the Easy and Hard difficulties to obtain their Rewards from the ‘Missions’ menu.

<Event Team Loadout>
► There will be a special, fixed Announcer for the Hatred and Despair Encounter. Therefore, you cannot select your own Announcers for this Event Encounter.
► The #1 and the #2 Sinner in the Deployment Order will be imbued with the 'Central Command Team Captain', and ‘Welfare Team Model Employee’ effects, respectively.
- Central Command Team Captain: gains Skill Slots, changes to Skill composition, and various beneficial effects.
- Welfare Team Model Employee: gains various beneficial effects.

<Event Combat Encounter>
- The Hatred and Despair Encounter is a Suppression effort of ‘The Knight of Despair’ Abnormality.
- Suppress the Abnormality, complete various missions, and earn your rewards.
- However, once you go past the 99 turns, the Encounter will end in defeat.

<Missions>
► View Missions(challenges) to complete in the [Missions] menu. Every mission provides a reward upon completion.
► There are Easy and Hard Missions, which can be completed in Easy and Hard difficulties, respectively.
► Once the Event closes on 2025/7/31 10:00 (KST), you can no longer complete your Missions.
► [Rewards Claim] will remain open for 3 weeks from 2025/7/17 12:00 ~ 2025/8/7 10:00 (KST).
► Even after the event fully ends, you will be able to experience the 'The 6th Walpurgis Night - Hatred and Despair' combat Encounters and view its story any time on the Drive tab and Theater - [Detour Tales].
► From 2025/7/31 12:00 ~ 2025/8/7 10:00 (KST), you can revisit the story but not the Encounter. The Combat Encounter will become available again after 2025/8/7 12:00 (KST) via the Driverside menu.

Mirror Dungeon Floor Theme Pack - Hatred and Despair Pack Added
---------------------------------------------------------------

After the July 11th Scheduled Update, the Hatred and Despair Theme Pack will be added to the Mirror Dungeon.
Walpurgis Night Choice Events and E.G.O Gifts will be added to the said floor.

<Spawn Location>
- Mirror Dungeon Normal Difficulty Floor 4
- Mirror Dungeon Hard Difficulty Floor 3

※ Please note that this Floor Theme Pack will appear as a fixed spawn during the Walpurgis Night Event Period, and will be added to the randomized pool of the said floor once the Event is over.

Please note that playing through the Walpurgis Night Theme Pack has no effect on your Event Mission progress.

title: July 3rd New Content - Mirror of Immortality
content:
--------------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The New Content Mirror Dungeon #6 「Mirror of Immortality」 will be added with the July 3rd, 2025 (KST) Update.

► Date : After 25/7/3 (KST) Scheduled Update

► Requirements
Clear Main Story 2-19

Notes
-----

1. With the introduction of Mirror Dungeon #6 「Mirror of Immortality」, Mirror Dungeon #5 [Mirror of the Dreaming] will be closed.
※ E.G.O Gift & Theme Pack Compendium recorded from Mirror Dungeon #5 will not be reset.

2. Only the Normal difficulty will be added with the Scheduled Update.

3. The Hard Difficulty will be updated at a later date.
Please note that the difficulty & balancing for certain enemies or E.G.O Gifts may be adjusted in the process. More detailed information about the Hard Difficulty will be released via a separate notice in the future.

4. 25/7/3 (KST) Scheduled Update Maintenance will last from 10:00 ~ 12:00.
Major changes to Mirror Dungeon systems will be deployed after the Scheduled Update.
Therefore, with the end of Scheduled Maintenance at 12:00, your Mirror Dungeon Weekly Bonus eligibilities and your current Mirror Dungeon run progress will be reset.
Rewards for Mirror Dungeon runs that remain incomplete before July 3rd, 10:00 will become inaccessible with the progress reset, so please claim your rewards BEFORE the Scheduled Maintenance begins.

5. 「Mirror of the Dreaming」 Achievements progress and rewards will become unavailable when 「Mirror of Immortality」 is updated.
Please take note of this information to claim your rewards BEFORE the July 3rd Scheduled Maintenance.

Progression
-----------

Entering the dungeon, as it has been previously, does not cost any resources. However, you can spend Enkephalin modules at the end of your exploration to receive rewards.

<Major Changes>

1. Mirror Dungeon battles are now, by default, 7-Sinner Battles, increased from the previous 6.

2. Enemy levels will be raised to Level 55.

3. Starlight Bonuses will now replace the Rest Bonuses.
You can gain Starlight from the following sources:
(1) Mirror Dungeons
- Spending Enkephalin Modules to claim Mirror Dungeon Rewards yields Starlight.
(2) Extractions
- Extracting a newly released Identity or E.G.O for the first time within a certain time period yields Starlight. Obtaining them via Yisang Exchange also yields the same amount of Starlight.
※ Obtaining the newly released Identity or E.G.O from the Dispenser does not yield Starlight.
※ However, obtaining the Identity or E.G.O in question from Extractions or Yisang Exchange for the first time after obtaining them from the Dispenser will yield Starlight, just as described above.

4. Additional content to spend Starlight on will be added.
(1) Theme Pack Observation (Search)
- Search and select a Theme Pack of your choice by spending Starlight.
However, please note that the selectable Theme Pack pool is limited to what is available from your current Floor and Difficulty.
※ Theme Pack Observation fee rises with every use.
※ Searching and selecting a new, previously not accessed, Theme Pack costs 50% more Starlight.
(2) Wishmaking
- Spend Starlight to improve your Fusion chance.
※ Wishmaking fee does not rise with each use.
※ Depending on the number of E.G.O Gifts used for the Fusion, the Fusion chance can rise up to 99.99%.
※ E.G.O Gift Observation function will be added with a future update. We will inform you with an additional notice when it is added.

Creating your TEAM
------------------

In Normal Difficulty, your Identity Levels will be fixed to 55.

※ In Hard Difficulty, which will arrive at a later update, your actual Identity Levels will be reflected.

※ Your current Uptie & E.G.O Threadspinning Tiers will be reflected in the Mirror Dungeon, just as it was in the previous Mirror Dungeons.

<Major Changes>

1. Starlight Bonus system replaces the Rest Bonus system.
Starlight Bonus can be gained the same way as Rest Bonuses.

- Upon clearing a Mirror Dungeon run, the Starlight Bonus for all Identities slotted in at the start of the Dungeon will be reset to 0.
- All Identities that were not a part of the Team will gain 1 Starlight Bonus Bar.
- Identities swapped into the Team during the Mirror Dungeon Run will not lose nor gain Starlight Bonuses.

Unlike Mirror of the Dreaming, in which only the current Team’s Rest Bonus could be used to purchase Grace of Stars, in Mirror of Immortality, you can use any Starlight obtained from Mirror Dungeon runs or Extractions as well, in addition to Starlight Bonuses.

Creating your TEAM
------------------

<Major Changes>

With the addition of the Starlight system, the following changes will be added:
- Various in-game UI, including the Mirror Dungeon entrance, now includes a view of your Starlight reserve.
- Every Identity will gain maximum Starlight Bonus with the Mirror of Immortality update. (max 5 per Identity)
- Newly added Identities will become “Starlight Retention Units”, which means that they won’t spend any Starlight Bonus when clearing Mirror Dungeons. (unchanged)

※ Starlight Rewards
The following are ways to increase the amount of Starlight gained upon clearing a Mirror Dungeon run.
- Clearing at higher Floors give more Starlight.
- Clearing in Hard difficulty gives more Starlight.
- Clearing Refraction Railway Theme Pack gives more Starlight.
- Select Starlight Encounter Reward Cards to gain additional Starlight.
- Higher Starlight Bonus in Team loadout window gives better Starlight multiplier.

Therefore, it may feel as though the amount of Starlight obtainable in Normal Difficulty is relatively small.

2. Because the amount of Starlight obtainable in Normal Difficulties may feel relatively small, and to allow for every Manager to make use of the Starlight system, a certain sum of starting Starlight will be given out to all managers.
※ New Managers will also gain a sum of starting Starlight upon unlocking the Mirror of Immortality.

<Intent>
In the previous Mirror Dungeon, the player’s option was limited by the fact that the only way to use a full set of Grace of Stars was to slot an entire team of Identities with fully-charged Rest Bonuses, which means that they were forced to run a rotation of different teams. This means that, even upon gaining a new Rest Bonus Retention Identity, they could not run the same team multiple times because the rest of the team’s Rest Bonus would be reset to 0.

Therefore, we will be adding the ‘Starlight’ system with the Mirror of Immortality update, to reduce the importance and pressure of the Rest Bonus system. Starlight can be gained every time a Mirror Dungeon is completed. Even more Starlight can be gained if the player maxes out their Starlight Bonuses, chooses a Hard Difficulty run, and progresses to a high Floor. With this new system, as the player gains more and more Starlight Bonuses and Starlight from Mirror Dungeon runs, subsequent Mirror Dungeon runs will become increasingly accessible. Also, if a large amount of Starlight has been amassed, players can now run multiple runs with the same Team loadout.

Grace of the Immortal Star
--------------------------

The 「Grace of the Dreaming Star」 will be replaced with 「Grace of the Immortal Star」. From 「Grace of the Immortal Star」, you can obtain Grace of Stars with special effects by spending Starlight.

<Major Changes>

1. When purchasing Grace of Stars, you can choose to spend beyond the Starlight Bonus provided by your Team, from your reserve of owned Starlight.
If you have remaining Starlight after purchasing Grace of Stars, you will be given an option to covert them to “Cost” to be used in the Mirror Dungeon run, or obtain it as a reward after clearing the Mirror Dungeon.

※ If you don’t purchase the Grace of Stars, you can obtain the remaining sum of Starlight, either from Starlight Bonus of your Team or the base sum, as reward upon clearing the Mirror Dungeon run.
※ We are currently working to add Grace of Stars’ Starlight spending cap removal and Grace of Stars Boost with the July 10th (KST) Scheduled Update. We will inform you via a notice when it is added.

Starting E.G.O Gifts
--------------------

Upon entering the Mirror Dungeon, the players will be presented with E.G.O Gift Keyword categories to choose from. Starting E.G.O Gifts are fixed for each Keyword, and you can select as many E.G.O Gifts as you are allowed to select within each category. Also, the E.G.O Gift of the Keyword category you select here will appear more frequently during the Mirror Dungeon run.

Selecting Theme Packs
---------------------

Select a Dungeon Theme to explore upon entering a new floor.
Choose a Theme Pack by selecting the pack of your choice and dragging them downward.

<Major Changes>

1. “Theme Pack Observation” or “Search” function will be added. Using this function, you can spend Starlight to search for and select a Theme Pack of your choice.
However, please note that the selectable Theme Pack pool is limited to what is available from your current Floor and Difficulty.

※ Theme Pack Observation fee rises with every use.
※ Searching and selecting a new, previously not accessed, Theme Pack costs 50% more Starlight.

Encounters
----------

<Major Changes>

1. Cost obtained from combat Encounters will be increased across the board.

2. Required Coin values for certain Choice Events will be adjusted.
► Heavenly Commander’s Scribe
- I command death: Sloth/Envy Advantage, 14 or higher → Sloth/Envy Advantage, 11 or higher
- I command life: Lust/Gluttony Advantage, 14 or higher → Lust/Gluttony Advantage, 11 or higher
- Don’t command anything: Gloom/Pride Advantage, 14 or higher → Gloom/Pride Advantage, 12 or higher

Shops
-----

You can spend your Cost at the Shops to purchase E.G.O Gifts or use one of its many useful services for progressing through the Mirror Dungeon.

<Major Changes>

1. “Wishmaking” option has been added. Spend Starlight to improve your Fusion chances.

※ Wishmaking fee does not rise with every use.
※ Depending on the number of E.G.O Gifts used for the Fusion, the Fusion chance can rise up to 99.99%.

Encounter Reward Cards
----------------------

Each Encounter has a certain chance to provide you with a selection of ‘Encounter Reward Cards’. Higher difficulty Mirror Dungeons, higher Floors, and higher difficulty Encounters will yield higher value rewards.

<Major Changes>
1. With the addition of the Starlight system, Encounter Reward Cards that give out Starlight returns to the pool. Considering the changes to the Starlight system, those cards will now yield more Starlight than it did before.

Select E.G.O Gifts and Mounting Trials upon Each Floor Completion
-----------------------------------------------------------------

Clear the Floor to gain an E.G.O Gift of your choice.
Selecting an E.G.O Gift will give you its linked ‘Mounting Trials’ and Enemy level-up effects.

※ In Hard Difficulty, you will gain 2 E.G.O Gifts at once, but this means that you will also have to select two Mounting Trials and Enemy level-up effects as well.

E.G.O Gifts
-----------

<Major Changes>
1. 2 new EX-Grade E.G.O Gifts have been added. They require special steps to obtain.
※ They can be obtained by meeting specific conditions or certain Choice Events.

2. Keywords have been added to certain Keywordless E.G.O Gifts
- Bleed: Layered Bandages, Crystallized Blood
- Tremor: Blood, Sweat, and Tears, Made-to-Order, Warning Notice, Snuffed Lantern, Shadow Monster
- Sinking: Haunted Shoes
- Slash: Worn Hilt

※ Certain E.G.O Gifts will be adjusted further with the July 10th (KST) Scheduled Update. More detailed information about those changes will be released via a separate notice.

Choice Events
-------------

<Major Changes>
1. A new Choice Event to obtain an EX-Grade E.G.O Gift will be added.

Exploration Complete
--------------------

<Major Changes>

1. With the addition of the Starlight system, new information regarding Starlight will be added to the “Exploration Complete” menu.

※ Starlight Rewards
The following are ways to increase the amount of Starlight gained upon clearing a Mirror Dungeon run.
- Clearing at higher Floors give more Starlight.
- Clearing in Hard difficulty gives more Starlight.
- Clearing Refraction Railway Theme Pack gives more Starlight.
- Select Starlight Encounter Reward Cards to gain additional Starlight.
- Higher Starlight Bonus in Team loadout window gives better Starlight multiplier.

Therefore, it may feel as though the amount of Starlight obtainable in Normal Difficulty is relatively small.
Because the amount of Starlight obtainable in Normal Difficulties may feel relatively small, and to allow for every Manager to make use of the Starlight system, a certain sum of starting Starlight will be given out to all managers. New Managers will also gain a sum of starting Starlight upon unlocking the Mirror of Immortality.

Extractions
-----------

<Major Changes>

1. After July 3rd Mirror of Immortality update, extracting a newly released Identity or E.G.O for the first time within a certain time period will yield Starlight.
Obtaining them for the first time via Yisang Exchange within the certain time period also yields the same amount of Starlight.

※ What are Starlight acquisition conditions (There is a single, first-time opportunity to gain Starlight from one of the following conditions.) :
- When obtaining a newly released 3★ Identity or E.G.O from the New Target Extraction.
- When, within a certain period of time, obtaining a newly released 3★ Identity or E.G.O from an Extraction.
- When, within a certain period of time, obtaining a newly released 3★ Identity or E.G.O from Yisang Exchange.
- When, within a certain period of time, obtaining a newly released 3★ Identity or E.G.O from Extraction or Yisang Exchange after obtaining it from the Dispenser.

※ What are not Starlight acquisition conditions :
- When obtaining a newly released Identity or E.G.O from the Dispenser.
- When Extracting or obtaining from Yisang Exchange the same, newly released Identity or E.G.O for the second time or more
- When obtaining the said Identity or E.G.O outside the certain period of time.

title: 2025, June 26th Scheduled Update Notice
content:
---------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on June 26th, 2025 (KST).

Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.

Please refer below for details about the update.

Major Changes
-------------

1. Optimization for the Win-rate forecast
1) Made improvements in the Win-rate forecast to improve performance
2) Fixed an issue where certain Clash Power effects do not always reflect in the Win-rate forecast

Early Notice: 'Mirror of the Dreaming' Closure - Achievements & Rewards To Be Closed
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

'Mirror of the Dreaming' Mirror Dungeon will be closed with the end of July 3rd, 2025 Scheduled Maintenance, and the new Mirror Dungeon 'Mirror of Immortality' will be added to the game.

When the Mirror Dungeon 'Mirror of Immortality' begins, Mirror Dungeon Achievement Progress & Reward claim will no longer be available. Please note this information, and claim your rewards before the July 3rd, 2025 Scheduled Maintenance begins.

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Fixed several issues related to The Thumb East Soldato II Sinclair's Support Passive
1. An issue where, in certain circumstnaces, when 1 ally with the fastest Deployment order finishes their attack, the effect applies to a different unit
2. An issue where, when the player activates the Support Passive then deactivates it, it remains active
3. An issue where, in certain circumstances, the Support Passive could activate twice or more

► Fixed an issue where Passive effects that are supposed to activate when dealing status effect damage against an enemy do not activate in Focused Encounters
※ Affected Identities & E.G.O with the said Passive
- Identities: Heishou Pack - Si Branch Rodion, Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Faust
- E.G.O: Yearning - Mircalla Meursault

► (EN Only) Fixed incorrect translations for Skills and Passives of certain Identities
1. The Thumb East Capo IIII Meursault Uptie 4 'Passive'
- Before: Skill Coins that spend Tigermark Round gain +2 Power, ....
- After: Skill Coins that spend Savage Tigermark Round gain +2 Power, ....
2. Dieci South Section 4 Director Meursault Uptie 1 'Skill 1'
- Before: [On Use] Discard 1 Skill of the highest rank in all of this unit's Skill Slots
- After: [On Use] Discard 1 Skill of the lowest rank in all of this unit's Skill Slots
※ These are text-only changes; only the incorrect translations into English will be changed.

► (JP Only) Fixed incorrect translations for Skills and Passives of certain Identities
1. W Corp. L2 Cleanup Agent Faust 'Support Passive'
- Before: 体力最大値の最も低い味方1名の、充電 獲得数 +1
- After: 体力最大値の最も低い味方1名の、充電 回数 獲得数 +1
2. Heishou Pack - Si Branch Rodion Uptie 3 'Skill 3'
- Before: [使用時] 全対象の呼吸回数が1増加
- After: [マッチ勝利時] 全対象の破裂回数が1増加
3. Molar Office Fixer Outis 'Support Passive'
- Before: 振動 回数が最も高い味方1名がスキル効果で得る振動 +1
- After: 振動 回数が最も高い味方1名がスキル効果で得る振動 回数 +1
※ These are text-only changes; only the incorrect translations into Japanese will be changed.

► Fixed an issue where, if The Thumb East Capo IIII Meursault dies while a certain effect is active, the relevant VFX lingers

► Fixed an issue where, in certain circumstances, Skills with 'Prioritize X(such as "unit with the least Core HP")' conditionals could activate more times than it is supposed to

► Deleted an unnecessary text description in Scorch Propellant Ammo
※ Unnecessary text : Counts as "Ammo"

► Fixed an issue where the E.G.O Gift 'Standard Issue Mag' does not activate for The Thumb East Capo IIII Meursault

► Fixed an issue where using a Sapling of Light ability in Stage 4-48 could cause the Skill Slot UI to load incorrectly

► (JP Only) Fixed an issue where the Panic Type 'Impurity' text loads as UNKNOWN

► (JP Only) Fixed an issue where UI Text related to Walpurgis Night Content loads incorrectly

► (KR Only) Fixed typos in The Thumb East Soldato II Sinclair's Identity Story

► (KR Only) Fixed typos in The Thumb East Capo IIII Meursault's Identity Story

► Fixed an issue where, in certain content, particle effects appearing in animated illustrations would load in incorrect positions

► (JP Only) Fixed various typos

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 July 3rd, 2025 (KST)
- When : After June 26th, 2025 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until July 3rd (Thu) 2025, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.
- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change depending on the status of maintenance. If such a change occurs, we will let you know in a follow-up notice.
- A resource download may be prompted after the build update. If you're using a mobile device, it is recommended to proceed with a Wi-Fi connection.
- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account. Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: Notice: Balancing Adjustments for Certain Identities
content:
Hello, this is Kim Jihoon, director at Project Moon.

I would like to inform you of upcoming adjustments to Red Sheet Sinclair’s Passive & Talisman effects,
and Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Adept Faust's Identity effects.

1. Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Sheet Sinclair

The Identity theme for this Season was intended to focus on the Rupture Keyword, and the Identities have been released based on that idea. However, due to the severe balancing issues that are closely tied to the overtuned abilities of Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Sheet Sinclair's Passive and Talisman effect, we have reached the conclusion that adjustments must be made.

We sincerely wished to avoid making any adjustments to Identities that have already been released.
However, the existence of the Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Sheet Sinclair's Passive and Talisman buff has severely affected our game design not only in regards to Rupture Identities, but the Keyword itself.

We have worked diligently to find various possible adjustments to avoid Rupture Identities overly synergizing with Red Sheet Sinclair,
but our attempts to do so has forced us to place several awkward limitations on the Rupture Keyword itself.
And this problem has become far more apparent with the current Season.

2. Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Adept Faust

We realized that this unit's damage output was far too high compared to that of other units, which was not our initial design intent;
therefore, we mean to make adjustments to address this issue.

Our initial intent was to have this unit use its Empowered Skill every 3~5 turns,
similar to the other units who have Empowered Skills.
However, due to the mistake in the design process and the lack of testing, we ended up setting the values incorrectly.

This mistake has made the Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Faust's Empowered Skill 3 Activation conditional far too low,
which means that it can use a Skill that was intended to be used every 3-5 turns, every single turn in Focused Encounters.

Therefore, in order to address this issue, we will be raising the required amount of 'Tianjiu Star's Blade' Stack to use the Empowered Skill 3, and the amount consumed when using it.
It will be adjusted so that it can be used every 2~3 turns, considering the unit's current capabilities.

3. In Conclusion

In the process of testing and prioritizing the combat encounters and cutscenes of Canto 8,
I as the director made requests for several urgent additions in terms of story cutscenes and gameplay elements.

Due to this, our combat design team was preoccupied with adding and testing these new additions,
which means that they physically did not have enough time to sufficiently test this Identity.
That is what has led to this current situation where we have the Rupture Keyword synergy and Identity's powers breaking the game's balancing.

I am terribly sorry for having to frequently make these negative adjustments to these Identities and E.G.O that our users have been using for their powerful capabilities.

I made an announcement to never change the texts and values of already-released Identities
back when The Ring Student Yi Sang was released.
However, regretfully and shamefully, I will have to go against what I had said earlier.

This decision was made with the belief that proper game balancing increases the players' immersion,
which leads to immersion with the game's story itself.
However, I would like to express that I am terribly regretful that this change may hurt the immersion and expectation of many of our users who have been looking forward to and enjoying Canto 8.

It is especially unfortunate, as this mistake was made in the same vein as the case with The Ring Student Yi Sang.

We will put further care into our Identity and E.G.O designs going forward, in effort to prevent similar issues from occurring again.

With the May 29th (KST) Scheduled Update, Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Sheet Sinclair and Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Adept Faust's levels and Uptie Tiers will be reset for all managers.

Upon reset, any Identity Training Tickets, Threads, or Egoshards used to upgrade these units will be refunded to your Inbox.
Refunded Egoshards will be 'Season 6 Sinclair Egosards' and 'Season 6 Faust Egoshards', regardless of the Season the Identities were Uptied in.

Also, as an expression of our sincere regret and apology, we would like to give you additional compensation for these negative adjustments.

Once again, I sincerely apologize for this mistake.

[Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Sheet Sinclair, Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Adept Faust Adjustments]
► Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Sheet Sinclair
1) Support Passive Conditionals
- Before: 4 Gluttony Resonance
- After: 4 Gluttony Resource Owned

2) Support Passive
- Before: At the start of the combat phase, give (highest Reson. x 2) Talisman to the ally with the most HP
- After: 1 ally currently with the most HP inflicts +1 more Rupture Potency with Attack and Counter Skills

3) Talisman
- Before
On hit, inflict Rupture by the Count; When hit, gain Rupture by the Count.
Turn End: At 6+ Count, remove all Talisman and take fixed damage by its Count.

- After
Max Stack : 6
On Hit, consume 1 Rupture Count on target to inflict (Stack / 2) Rupture (inflicts at least 1 Rupture if Rupture Count was consumed; rounded down)
When hit, gain (Stack / 2) Rupture and lose 1 Stack (gain at least 1; rounded down)
Turn End: at 6+ Stack, remove all Talisman and take fixed damage by its Stack

► Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Adept Faust
1) Skill 3 - Traceless to Sight and Sound Alike.
- Before: [Before Use] At 10+ Tianjiu Star's Blade, activate 'Ascendant Heishou - Mao Technique: Cloudsplitting Manifestation' instead
- After: [Before Use] At 20+ Tianjiu Star's Blade, activate 'Ascendant Heishou - Mao Technique: Cloudsplitting Manifestation' instead

2) Defense Skill - Swiftfeet Protection
- Before: [Before Use] At 10+ Tianjiu Star's Blade, activate 'Ascendant Heishou - Mao Technique: Cloudsplitting Manifestation' instead
- After: [Before Use] At 20+ Tianjiu Star's Blade, activate 'Ascendant Heishou - Mao Technique: Cloudsplitting Manifestation' instead

3) Empowered Skill 3 - Ascendant Heishou - Mao Technique: Cloudsplitting Manifestation
- Before: [After Attack] Consume 10 Tianjiu Star's Blade
- After: [After Attack] Consume 20 Tianjiu Star's Blade

[Notice: Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Sheet Sinclair, Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Adept Faust Reset]
- When: May 29th (Thu), 2025, 12:00 (KST)
- Changes: Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Sheet Sinclair, Heishou Pack -Mao Branch Adept Faust Identity Level & Uptie Tier reset
※ Upon reset, all resources used to upgrade these Identities will be refunded to your Inboxes.
※ Refunded Egoshards will be 'Season 6 Sinclair/Faust Egoshards', regardless of when you Uptied these units.

[Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Sheet Sinclair Adjustment Compensation]
- Compensation: Lunacy x1300
- Recipients: All users whose game accounts were created before May 29th, 2025, 09:59 (KST)
- When: After May 29th (Thu) 2025, 12:00 (KST)
Can be claimed once per account

Compensation can be claimed until June 26th (Thu) 2025, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 30 days)

[Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Adept Faust Adjustment Compensation]
- Compensation: 3★ Guarantee Decaextraction Ticket x1, Season 6 Nominable Egoshard Crate x300
- Recipients: All users who obtained Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Adept Faust before May 29th, 2025, 09:59 (KST)
- When: After May 29th (Thu) 2025, 12:00 (KST)
Can be claimed once per account

Compensation can be claimed until June 26th (Thu) 2025, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 30 days)

title: New Content - 2nd Anniversary Event
content:
-----------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

With the Feb. 27th, 2025 (KST) Scheduled Update, new content [The 2nd Anniversary Event] will be added to the game.

- Duration : 2025/2/27 12:00 (KST) ~ Before Mar. 27th Scheduled Update
- Requirements : Clear Main Story 0-4

Event Description
-----------------

- During the 2nd Anniversary Event, you can earn more rewards the more attendance checks you collect. The rewards may vary by your cumulative attendance.

- Log in at least once after our 2nd Anniversary date and before the Event ends to receive a special reward.

- Once the server recognizes that you’ve logged in after the daily reset period (KST : 6AM), you will receive your daily attendance check.

The 2nd Login Event
-------------------

<Event Period>
2025/2/27 00:00 (KST) ~ Before 3/27 (KST) Scheduled Update

<Description>
Log in at least once after our 2nd Anniversary date (Feb. 27th) and before the Event ends to receive a
3★ Guarantee Decaextraction Ticket

The 2nd Anniversary Attendance Check Event
------------------------------------------

<Event Period>
2025/2/27 00:00 (KST) ~ Before 3/27 (KST) Scheduled Update

<Description>
- You can pick up 1 Extraction Ticket every day you log in during the Event Period. Some of those attendance checks reward certain special rewards instead of Extraction Tickets.

- Up to 14 cumulative days of Attendance Check Rewards can be collected.

- If you receive a duplicate of an Announcer, you will receive 50 Thread crates instead.

<Special Rewards>

- 4th Login : Takeoff Module - ID Uptie
- 7th Login : 2nd Anniversary Commemorative Ticket Deco

- 14th Login : Vergilius Announcer, Limbus Company 2nd Anniversary Special Banner, 2nd Anniversary Special Ticket Deco

About New Packs
---------------

<2nd Anniversary Commemorative Packs>
3 Event Packs will be sold during the Event period.

► 2nd Anniversary Pack
- Contents : 3★ Identity Guarantee Decaextraction Ticket x1, Identity Takeoff Ticket - ver.2 x1, Vergilius Announcer (immediate access)
- Price : 2500 Paid Lunacy

※ Use the Identity Takeoff Ticket - ver.2 to select an Identity to Level up to 50 & Uptie to Tier 4. However, if you use this item before your level cap is expanded to 50 with story progression, please note that it will raise your Identity’s level only up to your current cap, meaning that any excess exp will be lost.

※ Identity Takeoff Ticket - ver.2 can be used in both the Level-up window and in your inventory. However, Identities that are already at Level 50 have their Level-up button disabled, so please use this item via the inventory in such cases.

About New Packs
---------------

- Purchase : Can be purchased only once
- Purchasable Period : 25. 2. 27 12:00 ~ 3. 27 10:00 (KST)

- Contents : Identity Training Ticket IV x 125, Thread x 400
- Price : ₩55,000 / $41.99 / ¥6,000
- Purchase : Can be purchased only once
- Purchasable Period : 25. 2. 27 12:00 ~ 3. 27 10:00 (KST)

<Lunacy Shop [First-time Offer] Reset>
With the start of the event, the [First-time Offer] purchase chance will be reset.

► 2nd Anniversary Commemorative Pack
- Lunacy : Lunacy (Paid) 70 + Lunacy (Paid) 70
- Lunacy Bundle : Lunacy (Paid) 294 + Lunacy (Paid) 294
- Lunacy Bouquet : Lunacy (Paid) 1014 + Lunacy (Paid) 1014
- Lunacy Crate : Lunacy (Paid) 2147 + Lunacy (Paid) 2147
- Lunacy Mound : Lunacy (Paid) 4103 + Lunacy (Paid) 4103
- Lunacy Hoard : Lunacy (Paid) 8336 + Lunacy (Paid) 8336

title: New Content - Mirror of the Dreaming Parallel Superposition Mode & Achievements
content:
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Greetings, dear Manager.

New Content <Mirror of the Dreaming Parallel Superposition Mode & Achievements> will be added to the game with the Feb. 27th, 2024 (KST) Scheduled Update.

<Description>

- Engage the “Mirror of the Dreaming - Parallel Superposition Mode” to expand the dungeon to 10 Floors.

- Mirror Dungeon Achievements have been added to the game. Complete Achievements to advance on the Achievements Progress bar and receive respective rewards based on your progress.

Parallel Superposition Mode
---------------------------

- Just like the Mirror Dungeon Hard Difficulty, Parallel Superposition Mode is unlocked upon clearing Canto 6.

- Engage the Parallel Superposition Mode to expand the Mirror Dungeon to 10 Floors.

- Parallel Superposition mode presents a difficult level of challenge and exists only for challenge runs or completing Achievements. Please note that the Mirror Dungeon rewards alone for clearing Floors above Floor 5 is no different from clearing Floor 5.

- You may engage the Parallel Superposition Mode by toggling on the Infinity Mirror button at the entrance of the Mirror Dungeon or by using the toggle button on the right side of the Dungeon Progress(Settings) pop-up window.

- In order to enter the Parallel Superposition Mode after clearing Floor 5, you had to have finished every Floor Theme Pack up to Floor 5 of that run in Hard difficulty.

- Once you clear Floor 5 while the Parallel Superposition Mode is engaged, the game will ask if you would like to enter the Parallel Superposition Mode. Confirm to enter the Parallel Superposition mode and ascend to Floor 6. Cancel to end your run at ‘Floor 5 Cleared’ state. Please note that, once you’ve cleared Floor 5 and moved on to higher floors, failing or giving up midway through the run will still yield the same rewards as clearing Floor 5.

Mounting Trials
---------------

- The trials will get increasingly stronger the higher you rise.

- Parallel Superposition Mode is a challenging content. Enemies may become incredibly powerful or sturdy once they’ve gained just the right combination of Trials. If continuing appears to be difficult, it may be a good idea to forfeit the dungeon for now and try again with a different combination of Mounting Trials and E.G.O Gifts.

Achievements
------------

- You can gain Achievements Progress by clearing Mirror Dungeon achievements.

- Mirror Dungeon floors are counted as 'cleared' only when the player consumed Enkephalin Modules in the Reward Claim window. Please note this information before attempting to complete an Achievement tied to clearing the Mirror Dungeon.

- Please note that future updates will bring even more Achievements to the game.

- Please note that Mirror of the Dreaming Achievements & Achievement Reward claims are available only until the Mirror Dungeon #6 Update.

- Obtain various rewards based on your Achievements Progress.

- Achievements added in the future will bring additional rewards as well.

title: New Content - The 5th Walpurgis Night
content:
-------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

On Jan. 9th, 2025 (KST), new content 「The 5th Walpurgis Night」 will be added to the game.

- Event Period: 2025/1/9 12:00 ~ 2025/1/23 10:00 (KST)

New Content
-----------

- Announcers : Netzach Announcer, Full-Stop Office Announcer
- E.G.O [HE] : Magic Bullet Outis
- 3★ : Full-Stop Office Rep. Hong Lu, Full-Stop Office Fixer Heathcliff

※ Notice: Extraction Rate Changes during the Event Period
During the Walpurgis Night Event, Extractable Announcers will be added to the game.

Due to this addition, the Extraction rates for certain Extractions will be changed while the Walpurgis Night event is active.

In compliance with the 「Voluntary Restraint Guidelines for Probabilistic Items」 of Korea Association of Game Industry, the exact Extraction rates are disclosed in the in-game menu "Detailed Rates".

Please note this information as you play the game.

Extractions
-----------

► Identities & E.G.O
During the Event period, all current and previous 「Walpurgis Night」 event Identities and E.G.O will be Extractable from the following Extractions.
The 「The 1st~4th Walpurgis Night」 Identities and E.G.O do not receive increased Extraction rates.

「The 5th Walpurgis Night」 Identities and E.G.O receive increased Extraction rates for ‘The 5th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction’.
「The 5th Walpurgis Night」 Identities receive increased Extraction rates only for ‘The 5th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction’, and not other Extractions.

► Walpurgis Night ID & E.G.O Extractions
- The 5th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction
- Target Extraction : Sinclair
- New Manager’s Welcome Extraction
- Assured Extraction: 3★ Identity Extraction (※ Does not include E.G.Os)
- Standard Extraction

► Featured Identities & E.G.O

E.G.O [WAW] : Sanguine Desire Rodion
E.G.O [HE] : <New> Magic Bullet Outis, Solemn Lament Gregor, Wingbeat Ishmael
E.G.O [TETH] : Regret Meursault
3★ : <New> Full-Stop Office Rep. Hong Lu, <New> Full-Stop Office Fixer Heathcliff, Lobotomy E.G.O::Solemn Lament Yi Sang, Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Eyes & Penitence Ryōshū, Dawn Office Fixer Sinclair, Lobotomy E.G.O::Magic Bullet Outis, Lobotomy E.G.O::Regret Faust
2★ : Lobotomy E.G.O::Lantern Don Quixote, Hook Office Fixer Hong Lu

Extractions
-----------

► Announcers
During the Event period, all current and previous 「Walpurgis Night」 event Announcers will be Extractable from the following Extractions.
The Announcers’ Extraction rate does not affect the Extraction rates of 3★ Identities. However, 2★ and 1★ units have lower Extraction rates to make room for the Announcers’ Extraction rates.
A duplicate of an already-owned Announcer will be automatically converted to 50 Thread Crates.

In 「The 5th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction」, the 5th Walpurgis Night Announcers receive increased rates.
「The 1st~4th Walpurgis Night」 Announcers do not receive additionally increased rates for 「The 5th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction」
Please note that the Announcers are featured only in 「The 5th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction」 and will not appear in other Extractions.

<Walpurgis Night Announcer Extractions>
- The 5th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction

► Featured Announcers
Announcers : <New> Netzach Announcer, <New> Full-Stop Office Announcer, Hod Announcer, Dawn Office Announcer, Yesod Announcer, Molar Office Announcer, Malkuth Announcer, Jack/Pierre Announcer, Angela Announcer

Extractions - Yisang Exchange
-----------------------------

Yisang Exchange popup is separated into two categories: Identities/E.G.O and Announcers.
The following Identities & E.G.O will be available from 「The 5th Walpurgis Night」 Target Extraction Yisang Exchange.

E.G.O [HE] : <New> Magic Bullet Outis
3★ : <New> Full-Stop Office Rep. Hong Lu, <New> Full-Stop Office Fixer Heathcliff

Announcers from the previous Walpurgis Nights will be added to the Yisang Exchange list of 「The 5th Walpurgis Night」.
The following Announcers will be available from 「The 5th Walpurgis Night」 Extraction Yisang Exchange.

Announcers : <New> Netzach Announcer, <New> Full-Stop Office Announcer, Hod Announcer, Dawn Office Announcer, Yesod Announcer, Molar Office Announcer, Malkuth Announcer, Jack/Pierre Announcer, Angela Announcer

Please note that any exchanged duplicates of Identities that have already been obtained will be converted to 50 Egoshards of the respective Sinner. Please note that any exchanged duplicates of Announcers that have already been obtained will be immediately converted to 50 Thread Crates.

Dispenser
---------

During 「The 5th Walpurgis Night」 Event period, you can purchase all Identities and E.G.Os featured in the previous 「Walpurgis Night」 Events.

However, Identities featured in the ongoing 「The 5th Walpurgis Night」 event cannot be purchased from the Dispenser.

Please note that 「Walpurgis Night」 Event Announcers will not be featured in the Dispenser.

<Available from the Dispenser>

E.G.O [WAW] : Sanguine Desire Rodion
E.G.O [HE] : Solemn Lament Gregor, Wingbeat Ishmael

3★ : Lobotomy E.G.O::Solemn Lament Yi Sang, Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Eyes & Penitence Ryōshū, Dawn Office Fixer Sinclair, Lobotomy E.G.O::Magic Bullet Outis, Lobotomy E.G.O::Regret Faust
2★ : Lobotomy E.G.O::Lantern Don Quixote, Hook Office Fixer Hong Lu
