3★ : <New> Full-Stop Office Rep. Hong Lu, <New> Full-Stop Office Fixer Heathcliff

1/9 Linked Content - Mini Episode
---------------------------------

With the start of the Event, a new Mini Episode 「The 5th Walpurgis Night」 will be introduced to the game.

- Unlock Conditions : Clear Stage 7-36

※ Upon first entry, Managers who have not completed Stage 7-36 will be asked to confirm if they want to view the story before proceeding to the “Event Encounter - Full-Stopped by a Bullet”

1/9 Linked Content - Full-Stopped by a Bullet
---------------------------------------------

During the Event period, linked content 「Full-Stopped by a Bullet」 will be introduced to the game.

- Event Period : 2025/1/9 12:00 ~ 1/23 10:00 (KST)
- Event Reward Exchange Period : 2025/1/9 12:00 ~ 1/30 10:00 (KST)
- Unlock Conditions : None

<Description>
- With the start of the Event, the 「Full-Stopped by a Bullet」 Event page will be added to the game.
- Complete special Missions(challenges) in the Normal and Hard difficulty Encounters to receive Mission Rewards.

<Event Progression>
► During the Event period, 「The 5th Walpurgis Night - Full-Stopped by a Bullet」 Event can be accessed regardless of the Main Story progress.
※ Once the Event closes, however, the unlock condition will change to Clear Stage 7-36
► Full-Stopped by a Bullet has two difficulties: Easy and Hard.
► Completing the Full-Stopped by a Bullet Encounters will consume an Enkephalin Module. Clear the Easy difficulty to unlock the Hard difficulty.
► The following effects will be active in the Easy difficulty:
- If the Identity’s level is lower than 50, raise their level to 50
- If Identities’ Uptie Tiers or equipped E.G.O’s Threadspinning Tiers are lower than Tier 3, raise it to Tier 3
► During the Event Period, fulfill Missions(challenges) in each of the Easy and Hard difficulties to obtain their Rewards from the ‘Missions’ menu.

<Event Team Loadout>
- There will be a special, fixed Announcer for the Full-Stopped by a Bullet Encounter. Therefore, you cannot select your own Announcers for this Event Encounter.

- The #1 Sinner in the Deployment Order will be imbued with the 'Ready to Fire' effect, which will grant them various beneficial effects such as increased Skill Slots and changes to their Skill composition.

<Event Combat Encounter>
- Full-Stopped by a Bullet Encounter requires you to defeat as many enemies as possible within the Turn limit.

- Verify the Turn limit and your current turn on the top left corner of the in-game UI.

- Verify the maximum number of enemies and your current kill count on the top right corner of the in-game UI.

- The Encounter ends once you reach the Turn limit. However, once you go past the 99 turns, the Encounter will end in defeat.

<Missions>
- View Missions(challenges) to complete in the [Missions] menu. Every mission provides a reward upon completion.

- There are Easy and Hard Missions, which can be completed in Easy and Hard difficulties, respectively.

- Once the Event closes on 2025/1/23 10:00 (KST), you can no longer complete your Missions.

- [Rewards Claim] will remain open for 3 weeks from 2025/1/9 12:00 ~ 2025/1/30 10:00 (KST).

- Even after the event fully ends, you will be able to experience the 'The 5th Walpurgis Night - Full-Stopped by a Bullet' combat Encounters and view its story any time on the Drive tab and Theater - [Detour Tales].

- From 2025/1/23 12:00 ~ 2025/1/30 10:00 (KST), you can revisit the story but not the Encounter. The Combat Encounter will become available again after 2025/1/30 12:00 (KST) via the Driverside menu.

Mirror Dungeon Floor Theme Pack - Full-Stopped by a Bullet Pack Added
---------------------------------------------------------------------

After the Jan. 9th Scheduled Update, the Full-Stopped by a Bullet Theme Pack will be added to the Mirror Dungeon.
Walpurgis Night Choice Events and E.G.O Gifts will be added to the said floor.

<Spawn Location>
- Mirror Dungeon Normal Difficulty Floor 4
- Mirror Dungeon Hard Difficulty Floor 3

※ Please note that this Floor Theme Pack will appear as a fixed spawn during the Walpurgis Night Event Period, and will be added to the randomized pool of the said floor once the Event is over.

Please note that completing the Walpurgis Night Floor Theme Pack will not affect your Event Mission progress.

title: Notice: The Ring Pointillist Student Yi Sang & Outis E.G.O Gift Application Adjustments
content:
----------------------------------------------------

Hello, this is Project Moon.

The Ring Pointillist Student Yi Sang & Outis' interaction with E.G.O Gifts will be adjusted.
The following changes will be applied with the May 23rd (KST) Scheduled Update.

► Before
- Skills that randomly inflict Burn, Bleed, Tremor, Rupture, and Sinking count as Skills that inflict all of the above Keywords.
- The Identity counts as an Identity that inflicts all of the above Keywords.

► After
- Skills that randomly inflict Burn, Bleed, Tremor, Rupture, and Sinking no longer count as Skills that inflict all of the above Keywords due to the said effect.
- The Identity counts only as an Identity that inflicts Bleed.
- For E.G.O Gifts that activate on the conditional that this unit inflicts Burn, Bleed, Tremor, Rupture, or Sinking: these E.G.O Gifts' effects activate ONLY when each of those respective status effects are inflicted after a random selection.

[Examples]

1) E.G.O Gifts that no longer activate for these units after the changes

► Soothe the Dead
- Effect : Encounter Start : This Gift activates when 5 or more Identities have Attack Skills that apply Burn Potency, Count, or 'Unique Burn' effects. (Not counting E.G.O Skills)
→ Does not count - Because these Identities count only as Identities that inflict Bleed, they do not count toward activating this E.G.O Gift's effects.

► Melted Paraffin
- Effect : When winning a Clash with a Skill that inflicts Burn Potency, Count, or 'Unique Burn', inflict (# of remaining Coins/2) Burn Potency on the target.
→ Does not count - Because these Identities do not have a Skill effect that is solely dedicated to inflicting Burn, they do not activate this E.G.O Gift's effects.

2) E.G.O Gifts that activate for these units after the changes

► Bloody Mist
- Effect : Encounter Start : This Gift Activates when 5 or more Identities have Attack Skills that inflict Bleed Potency, Count, or 'Unique Bleed' effects. (Not counting E.G.O Skills).
→ Counts - Because these Identities count as Identities that inflict Bleed, they do count toward activating this E.G.O Gift's effects.

► Wound Clerid
- Effect : When hitting an enemy with a Skill that inflicts Bleed Potency or 'Unique Bleed', inflict 4 Bleed Potency.
→ Counts - Because these Identities' Skills inflict Bleed outside the random conditionals, they do activate this E.G.O Gift's effects.

► Thunderbranch
- Effect : When inflicting Rupture Potency with Skill effects, Inflict 1 Rupture Potency and +1 Rupture Count on the target.
→ Counts, with a condition - When these Identities inflict Rupture after the random selection, they will activate this E.G.O Gift's effects. However, they will not activate when not inflicting Rupture.

The Ring Pointillist Student Yi Sang & Outis will both gain a new Passive entry to clarify the above changes.

- Passive Name : Bleed Identity
- Passive Effect : This Identity only counts as an 'Identity that inflicts Bleed'. This Identity's Skills that randomly inflict Burn, Bleed, Tremor, Rupture, and Sinking do not count as Skills that inflict each respective Keyword.

With these changes deploying with the May 23rd (KST) Scheduled Update, The Ring Pointillist Student Yi Sang & Outis Identities will have their Identity Levels & Uptie Tiers reset. Any resources spent to upgrade those Identities will be refunded to your account via the in-game Inbox.

Please refer to the text below for more detailed information.
We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

The Ring Pointillist Student Yi Sang & Outis
Level & Uptie Reset Information
----------------------------------------------------

When you log in after the May 23rd (Thu) Scheduled Update, The Ring Pointillist Student Yi Sang & Outis' Levels and Uptie Tiers will be reset as follows.

- Identity Uptie Tiers: Reset to Uptie Tier 1
- Identity Levels: Reset to Level 1

With this reset, the following resources will be refunded to your account. They will be refunded to your account via the in-game Inbox.

- Threads and Egoshards used to Uptie the Identities
- Identity Training Tickets equal to the amount of Identity EXP gained

E.g.)

- For The Ring Pointillist Yi Sang at Uptie 4 :
250(20+80+150) Thread refunded; 50 Egoshards refunded

- For The Ring Pointillist Yi Sang at Level 42 :
Identity Training Tickets equal to the amount of EXP required to reach Level 42 + current amount of EXP gained since reaching Level 42 compensated (Rounded up)

If you have already acquired your Identity Uptie Story Lunacy before the reset, then you cannot obtain additional Lunacy when you Uptie them and view the story again after the reset.

The Ring Pointillist Student Yi Sang & Outis E.G.O Gift Application Adjustment Compensation
----------------------------------------------------

Compensation : Lunacy x1300
Recipients : All users whose accounts were created before May 30th 2024, 10:00
Can be claimed once per account
When : After May 23rd 2024 (KST) 12:00

title: [ Ring Student Yi Sang / Ring Student Outis Performance Adjustment Cancellation ]
content:
[ Ring Student Yi Sang / Ring Student Outis Performance Adjustment Cancellation ]

As many players have mentioned, I deeply acknowledge that setting a precedent of nerfing identities that have already been released undermines trust in future identities and E.G.O, and that the dissatisfaction caused by having to use identities with good performance at a lower level than before is a serious issue. Therefore, we will cancel the proposed skill value adjustments for these identities.

For the sake of long-term operation as well, once an Identity or E.G.O has been released with a certain level of performance, we will ensure that nerfs will not be carried out unless it is to fix a bug.

1. We will adjust it so that it only does not receive the effects of E.G.O Gifts, excluding the Bleed keyword.

2. Other skills will not be modified.

Compensation for this will be provided as follows.

- 1300 Free Lunacy

- The growth materials used for raising Ring Student Yi Sang / Ring Student Outis (EXP Tickets / Shards / Thread) will be compensated in the amount that was consumed.

We apologize for the confusion caused by the revised announcement.

title: [ Notice of Partial Adjustment to the Performance of Ring Student Yi Sang / Ring Student Outis Identity ]
content:
*As this is an urgent notice, we apologize that we were unable to translate it into Japanese and English. We will officially translate and post the notice in Japanese and English tomorrow.

-----------

Compensation plan due to this emergency patch

- 1300 Free Lunacy

- Growth materials used for raising Ring Student Yi Sang / Ring Student Outis (EXP Tickets / Shards / Thread) will be compensated according to the amount consumed.

- 250 Shard Boxes will be provided to those who possess 'Ring Student Yi Sang'.

-----------------------------------
Additionally, as compensation for players who performed extraction or crafted shards while expecting the performance of Ring Student Yi Sang, we will provide 250 Shard Boxes to those who possess 'Ring Student Yi Sang'.

I believe the biggest mistake was that the concept and performance I had in mind were not properly conveyed to the planning and testing teams.

Once again, I sincerely apologize.

-------------------------------------------

*As this is an urgent notice, we apologize that we were unable to translate it into Japanese and English. We will officially translate and post the notice in Japanese and English tomorrow.

[ Notice of Partial Adjustment to the Performance of Ring Student Yi Sang / Ring Student Outis Identity ]

Hello. This is Project Moon Director Kim Jihoon.

Once again, due to shortcomings in planning and implementation, Ring Student Yi Sang and Ring Student Outis ended up receiving the effects of all keyword gifts in Mirror Dungeon in a way that was not intended.

The fact that these identities receive the effects of all keyword gifts in Mirror Dungeon was an unexpected planning mistake.

It was intended that Ring Yi Sang and Outis would only be affected by Bleed keyword gifts.

Additionally, the concept of the Ring was that while each faction specializes somewhat in one keyword, multiple keywords would be applied simultaneously so that in the end many keywords would be painted onto a single canvas, producing various and unique effects later when completed together with the effects of multiple Ring identities through the Docent and Maestro identities.

However, the currently implemented Ring Student Yi Sang receives the effects of various keyword gifts in addition to Bleed, the main keyword of the Pointillism faction, resulting in overpowered performance that places it among the top tiers regardless of what combination it is placed into.

Additionally, this greatly conflicts with the gameplay experience in Mirror Dungeon, which aims to create deck diversity based on identities and EGOs specialized by keyword.

Furthermore, while the Ring concept was intended to grow stronger based on the number and potency conditions of the various debuffs applied to enemies, the condition for the number of debuffs applied to enemies was set much easier to achieve compared to other identities, which also resulted in the character reaching maximum performance far too easily.

I should have discussed this part one more time with the planning team lead and planner on the final day of the build and confirmed right before the build whether it had been implemented as intended, but I failed to do so this time.

As a result, it ended up being implemented and reflected differently from the Ring concept that was originally intended.

The reason this situation occurred is that I failed to clearly convey my intended concept to the planning team, and I also failed to continuously check it during the intermediate and final stages.

Due to the frequent specification changes recently, I did not want to change the performance of an identity this time as well. However, I judged that an identity that can outperform identities specialized for specific keywords regardless of what combination it is placed into should not be left as it is.

I feel extremely sorry.

As performance adjustments will be made to Ring Yi Sang and Outis, those who have performed synchronization will have their synchronization reset and the corresponding synchronization materials returned.

The goal of the balance adjustment is to target performance around that of '3-Star Edgar Family Chief Butler Ryoshu', and we will adjust it so that you do not experience a sudden sharp drop in performance.

For Ring Yi Sang, the balance will be adjusted as follows.

1. Change the display method of the keywords randomly granted by Ring Yi Sang (so that gift effects corresponding to those randomly granted keywords will not be applied) --> Unlike the EGO Suddenly, One Day and Holiday

2. Nerf the reuse condition of Ring Yi Sang's Skill 2 - Blood Pointillism --> In the case of Skill 2, the damage from reuse is high and the clash power is also high, which made it an all-purpose skill. We will be more careful when assigning values to coin reuse effects. While keeping the power the same, we will strengthen the conditions so that you feel as little performance loss as possible.

3. Ring Yi Sang's Skill 3 - Instead of having a fixed threshold number of negative effects, performance will be adjusted proportionally to the number of negative effects. The intended concept of the Ring was to paint enemies with various negative effects and grow stronger or grant effects based on that number, but currently it produces fixed maximum performance as long as a predetermined number of negative effects is exceeded, which does not align with the Ring's concept.

The detailed adjustment plan will be organized with the planning team tomorrow and announced again.

- Those who have synchronized Ring Student Yi Sang / Ring Student Outis will receive the same materials corresponding to the reset synchronization.

- As compensation for the frequent identity specification changes, we will provide 1300 Lunacy.

Looking back multiple times, since I was the one who set the concept and intention, I believe the greatest responsibility lies with me for not taking the time to check it even once until the end, and for neglectfully allowing the process to pass without proper verification.

Regardless of the reason, I know the sense of loss and anger players feel when a character with good performance they were using gets nerfed, which makes me feel even more apologetic.

As the scale of the project grows and more fans enjoy it, we will organize and systematize the planning and implementation processes.

I feel deeply sorry toward the players, and due to the frequent recent notices of specification changes, I as the director also feel that I have many shortcomings.

Once again, I sincerely apologize.

title: Hello, this is Kim Jihoon, director at Project Moon.
content:
I'm afraid I have unfortunate news to share about this year's April Fools' Day event, especially since so many people were looking forward to it.

My wish is that we could provide you with an entertaining April Fools' Day event every year. However, I made a decision to fully focus on our upcoming content, considering the tone of the ongoing Main Story and our development schedule.

Because we were fully focused on developing and realizing the Main Story and the Mirror Dungeon, we could not prepare a separate in-game event for the April Fools' Day this year.

Therefore, we will try our utmost to prepare a plentiful and entertaining Season 4: Clear All Cathy.

Thank you.

title: Feb. 22nd New Content - The 1st Anniversary Event
content:
-------------------------------------------------

Before Mar. 21st Scheduled Update

title: Intro to Upcoming Dec. 28th Content - Ch.5.5: Miracle In District 20
content:
--------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

With the Dec. 28th, 2023 (KST) Update, new content [Ch. 5.5 - Miracle in District 20] will be added to the game.

- Duration : 2023/12/28 12:00 ~ 2024/1/25 10:00 (KST)

- Event Rewards Exchange :
2023/12/28 12:00 ~ 2024/2/1 10:00 (KST)

- Requirements : Clear Main Story 5-36

Event Description
-----------------

- When the event starts, the [Ch. 5.5: Miracle in District 20] Event Page will open.

- During the event period, you can earn [Trinkets Sack] by clearing stages and dungeons in the event and the Main Story.

- You can redeem various rewards from the [Gift Exchange] based on the number of [Trinkets Sack] you have.

Event Gameplay
--------------

<Trinkets Sack>

For four weeks, from Dec. 28th 12:00 to Jan. 25th 10:00 (KST), you can earn [Trinkets Sack] by clearing stages and dungeons in the event and main story.

► Combat Encounters of ‘Miracle in District 20’
You can obtain [Trinkets Sack] every time you complete a combat Encounter of ‘Miracle in District 20’. Each Encounter has a first-time reward, and with it you can obtain even more [Trinkets Sack].

The final Encounter of ‘Miracle in District 20’ is a repeatable Encounter, and requires Enkephalin Modules to enter. That final Encounter will have a higher Enkephalin-to-[Trinkets Sack] ratio, so it will be much more effective as a means of collecting [Trinkets Sack].

※ The Encounter will no longer be available after the Event, and clearing that Encounter does not count toward the Chapter Completion rewards progress.

► Mirror Dungeons
In this event, you can obtain [Trinkets Sack] every time you complete a Mirror Dungeon run. The higher you rise through the Floors, the more [Trinkets Sack] you will obtain.

If you clear the final Floor of Mirror Dungeon #3 ‘Hard’, you can earn 200 [Trinkets Sack]. If you clear the final Floor of Mirror Dungeon #3 ‘Normal’, you can earn 100 [Trinkets Sack].

※ If you have already spent your Hard Difficulty Rewards chance for the week, your ‘Hard’ Difficulty [Trinkets Sack] rewards will be the same as the Normal Difficulty Rewards.

Event Gameplay
--------------

► Main Story (Canto 1 ~ Canto 5)
If you have not fulfilled the event unlock requirements, you can obtain [Trinkets Sack] as a first-time reward from Main Story Combat Encounters. Upon first-time-completion of an Encounter, you can obtain [Trinkets Sack] proportional to the amount of Enkephalin Spent regardless of whether you’ve met the EX Clear Conditions or not.

※ You cannot obtain [Trinkets Sack] from stages that have already been completed.

※ You cannot obtain [Trinkets Sack] from Luxcavations.

<Huge Trinkets Sack>

Rarely, you may obtain [Huge Trinkets Sack] from clearing Event Stages, Main Story Stages, or Story Dungeons. [Huge Trinkets Sack] is converted to 20 [Trinkets Sack].

‘Miracle in District 20’ Stages where you can gain [Trinkets Sack] also has a small chance to drop [Huge Trinkets Sack].

[Huge Trinkets Sack] has the highest chance to drop from the final Encounter of the event. The chance for it to drop in other Encounters is the same across all Encounters.

[Huge Trinkets Sack] is automatically converted to 20 [Trinkets Sack] in the Results or the Rewards screen upon acquisition.

Event E.G.O
-----------

Obtain more [Trinkets Sack] by completing Event Encounters or Mirror Dungeons while equipped with Event E.G.O from ‘Miracle in District 20’:

► Extraction
- E.G.O : Holiday Outis

► Event Reward
- E.G.O : Holiday Heathcliff

<Notes>

- Event Reward E.G.O can be obtained from [Gift Exchange].

- The acquisition boosts for [Trinkets Sack] from event E.G.O are applied additively. (Decimals are rounded up)

- Event E.G.O provide their boost simply by being on the team, and do not have to directly deployed in battle or be used.

- In this Event, [Trinkets Sack] earning-boosts do apply to the first-time Clear rewards.

Event Rewards
-------------

- The more [Trinkets Sack] you collect, the more rewards you can receive from the [Gift Exchange].

- [Trinkets Sack] will no longer be obtainable once the Event closes on Jan. 25th 2024, 10:00 (KST)

- [Gift Exchange] will be open for 5 weeks, from Dec. 28th 2023 12:00 ~ Feb. 1st 2023 10:00 (KST)

- Even after the event fully ends, you will be able to experience Miracle in District 20’s combat encounters and view its story anytime at Driverside - [Deviazione] and Theater - [Detour Tales].

title: Hello, this is Project Moon Director Kim Ji-hoon.
content:
I would like to share our official stance on the in-game issues identified so far.

----------------------------------------------------------------------

Hello, this is Project Moon Director Kim Ji-hoon.

As we have from the company’s early days, Project Moon has never engaged in the fact-checking of an employee’s personal ideology, SNS activity, personal side projects, questions, or speculations.

However, there has been one request that the company has made to all of its employees. That is, even if an individual’s posts or activities on SNS are unrelated to the company, we have asked that their personal SNS accounts do not leave any room for speculation or possibility of being linked to the company. This is because on social media, where many people hold their own diverse thoughts, an individual’s expression on their personal SNS can be perceived as the stance of the entire company. Should a social controversy arise from this, it could cause harm to other colleagues within our company and to the company's operations.

We have provided notice of this precaution to our team members on several occasions through our internal messenger and have also stated it verbally with low frequency.

The illustrator who is currently the subject of controversy had their personal SNS nickname listed in the game credits. The company has requested their understanding and confirmation, asking them to ensure that no harm comes to the company and its employees due to the controversy. During this process, we did not take additional steps to confirm whether there were any related matters on their social media that would correspond to an act of fact-checking that demands more concrete confirmation. Consequently, we were in a position where we could only respond after the controversy erupted, which delayed our follow-up measures.

As a result, from Chapter 5, which is scheduled for a future update, the works of the illustrator in question will not be included in the game.

Separately from this, the illustrator's existing works are official company assets created jointly with myself, the director, and the story team to express the world of Project Moon. In a situation where a social controversy has become an element of these works, we have judged that it is better to dedicate time and effort to new works rather than redoing the existing ones considering the time needed for replacement. The works related to the story will remain, but the artwork of the main illustrator on the main UI will be replaced over time.

As this was a case where a violation of the internal rules, which we had repeatedly cautioned about, occurred, the contract with the employee who became the subject of controversy will be terminated. We ask that you please refrain from directing verbal abuse or threats towards the illustrator in question online or offline.

We apologize for causing great concern and disappointment to our users who only wished to enjoy Project Moon’s content, not issues external to the game. We have once again urged our team members to refrain from any personal SNS activities that could be linked to the company, and we will proceed with caution.

Attack and Defense Level Adjustments
------------------------------------

We apologize for our clumsy response in the 7/13 update, which made the Attack Level change feel like a significant nerf to many.

In the process of adjusting the stats of a large number of units, an issue occurred where characters with the same Attack Level as powerful Identities and E.G.O, such as Faust's, were input with relatively low values.

Furthermore, in the process of calculating the changed levels, we used a uniform calculation that did not consider the future growth potential of characters with high stat growth. In this process, the Attack and E.G.O stats of certain Identities and E.G.O that Managers had acquired were unintentionally adjusted downwards. This was not an intentional downward adjustment of the values; it was a result of the lack of skill and carelessness of the people in charge.

Identities and E.G.O with lower Attack and Defense Levels than before will have their stats restored to normal values through the 7/27 update.

We are also truly sorry for the lateness of this notice. The delay in the notice created a situation where no follow-up measures could be taken, causing great concern for many Managers.

We will do our best to prevent such an incident from recurring in the future. When we change stats, we will carefully check whether the changes affect previous values. If a stat change is necessary, we will first provide a detailed notice of the changes. We will also provide notice as quickly as possible when an in-game balance issue arises.

Once again, we offer our apologies.

Regarding Heathcliff's E.G.O 'Bodysack' Text Error
-------------------------------------------------

Regarding the fact that the Uptie IV effect of Heathcliff's E.G.O 'Bodysack' had a different function than described due to a text error, and that we have identified this text error, we apologize for the delayed notice.

Even if it was actually a text error, from the player's perspective, it is difficult to discern whether it is a text error or a functional bug without a basis for judgment, and we believe you must have felt frustrated by the delayed response.

We are truly sorry that there are many cases where the in-game text and performance are different, not just for Bodysack. Our lack of thorough inspection has led to many such errors in the game. This has made it difficult for our Managers to trust the game's performance and text.

We will conduct inspections more meticulously and thoroughly so that text errors and new character bugs do not recur, and if a text or character bug is found, we will notify you quickly.

The issue with Bodysack's E.G.O at Uptie IV was a matter of interpretation, and we are once again sorry that we could not provide compensation to all Managers. Henceforth, even if it may take time, we will provide compensation for errors only to the Managers who have personally experienced the issue.

We are sorry to have to say such things due to the many errors. However, we will strive to show gradual improvement in future updates, not just with words.

Regarding Faust's E.G.O 'Representation Emitter'
------------------------------------------------

Due to an initial design error, Faust's E.G.O, Representation Emitter, had a very strong performance compared to the base E.G.O of other Sinners. Therefore, we made performance adjustments to align it with the performance of other base E.G.O.

The performance adjustment for the E.G.O that was released due to the initial design mistake is an issue that arose from our lack of development capability. We are truly sorry.

Furthermore, in the adjustment process, the performance of the existing E.G.O became too low. As a result, we have caused discomfort to the Managers who were using the Representation Emitter.

We will readjust Representation Emitter's Sanity healing ability by increasing the number of allied targets to 1, and by making Faust herself a target for the Sanity heal. We will also consider making additional adjustments by continuously monitoring the situation afterward.

Regarding Unbalanced Rotation
-----------------------------

We recognize that there is a problem with the imbalanced Identity and E.G.O rotation for the 12 Sinners.

We apologize that due to overlapping new Identities and E.G.O being added for certain Sinners, the number of Identities and E.G.O for other Sinners has decreased.

We had judged that the rotation issue would not be a problem since we were looking at a long-term roadmap, but we failed to consider the imbalance and inconvenience felt by players who are playing with a long-term roadmap in mind.

From the point of the next Identity and E.G.O release, we will create a new rotation plan that more deeply considers the players' perspective.

Notice on Identifying and Restricting the Use of Hacks
------------------------------------------------------

We have identified a phenomenon where it is possible to play the game at an extremely fast speed by using a speed hack.

As this is determined to be abnormal gameplay, the account in question will be suspended, and we will fix the bug so that this function is no longer available. We are also planning to block cheat devices on rooted devices in conjunction with mail address verification.

Please do not use any kind of hack, as it will be subject to sanctions without warning, even if used out of curiosity.

We are truly sorry for causing great disappointment to our Managers over a long period due to the frequent occurrence of in-game bugs and our lack of planning and clumsy responses. We will do our best to prevent the recurrence of the issues mentioned in this notice.

Regarding the Skill Error of the Chapter 4.5 Event Welfare Sinclair Identity
-------------------------------------------------------------------------

We have confirmed an issue with the 'To a T' skill of the Chapter 4.5 event welfare Sinclair Identity, where the effect 'If own Tremor Count is less than 10, gain 6 Tremor and inflict Tremor Burst on self' was being applied regardless of the condition.

This issue was identified on today's test server. Since correcting the problem requires a client build revision, it is expected to be fixed in the 8/3 update.

We feel a deep sense of shame for the various text issues with the newly released Identities in this notice and for our lack of thoroughness.

We recognize that performance bugs in characters that can be easily missed are occurring continuously, and we are aware that we need to go through a more thorough inspection process in the future. We will improve our process to reduce the recurrence of errors, and we will do our best to prevent errors from occurring with new characters in the game.

We are truly sorry for causing our Managers great disappointment due to the frequent in-game bugs and our lack of planning and clumsy responses. We will do our best to prevent the recurrence of the issues mentioned in this notice.

We acknowledge the issues reported outside of what is mentioned in this notice, and we are identifying the causes and preparing countermeasures.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Greetings, this is Project Moon.

We have identified several issues with the capabilities of several
Identities and E.G.Os that arose after the Offense & Defense Level
changes and Uptie 4 & Tier 4 Threadspinning update.
The issue will be addressed with the July 27th Scheduled Update.

We sincerely apologize for causing inconveniences
regarding the Identities and E.G.O capabilities.

From now on, we will make sure to more carefully review our
update contents regarding character capabilities so that no
similar incident will occur again in the future.
And if there are any further statistical adjustments in the future,
we will be sure to inform you of the details before the update.

Update Contents
---------------

1. Adjustments to Identities and E.G.O Offense and Defense Level
After this update, Identities and E.G.Os that had their Offense &
Defense Levels reduced in the last update will be re-adjusted.
We apologize for causing confusion and disappointment
from their reduced Offense & Defense Levels.

The Offense & Defense Levels have been adjusted to match
the values of the previous version at Level 35.
And Identities & E.G.O Skills with growth stats of

The following issues in Skills & Passives of
Uptie 4 and Tier 4 Threadspinning will be fixed.

► Don Quixote - La Sangre De Sancho

the “Heal by X% of damage dealt” did not activate;
fixed an issue where the activation condition for

► Heathcliff - Bodysack

next turn” was labeled incorrectly as [After Attack] and not [On Kill]

► R Corp. 4th Pack Reindeer - Brainwave Focus

not at the start of the battle but at the start of the next turn

► G Corp. Manager Corporal Gregor
Fixed an issue where “Heal by X%
of damage dealt” effects did not activate

► Liu Association South Section 6 Meursault
Friction Point : Fixed an issue where the
Support Passive sometimes did not activate

We again sincerely apologize for causing trouble to your
enjoyment of the game with the issues regarding
Offense & Defense Level and Tier 4 Uptie & Threadspinning.
By way of our apology, please accept the following compensation.
Please refer to the information below for further details.

Compensation
------------

Compensation : Lunacy x1300
Date : After July 27th (KST) Scheduled Update
- Can be redeemed once per account
- You can claim the item through the in-game mail system until
2023 Aug 03 09:59(KST). (Mail Validity Period: 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the
respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may
cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to
close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company>
during maintenance. Please understand.
- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change
depending on the status of maintenance. If such a change occurs,
we will let you know in a follow-up notice.
- A resource download may be prompted after the build
update. If you're using a mobile device, it is recommended
to proceed with a Wi-Fi connection.
- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend
that you link your account with other platforms to
prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided
once per account. Please note that the distribution may be
slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem
them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: July 13 New Content - Mirror of Mirrors Hard Difficulty 2nd Notice
content:
--------------------------------------------------------------------

Greetings, dear manager.

With the July 13th, 2023 (KST) update, new content <Mirror of Mirrors Hard Difficulty(Mirror Dungeon 2 Hard)>, will be added to the game. In this post, we will describe the changes and additions that have been made since our last notice.

- Period: After July 13 12:00 (KST) Update
- Requirements: Clear Mirror of Mirrors (Mirror Dungeon 2) on Normal Difficulty
- Description: Play Mirror Dungeon 2 Hard to earn a large amount of Battle Pass XP!

NOTE
Please note that the Weekly Bonus is not reset upon this update. Managers seeking to apply the Weekly Bonus to "Mirror Dungeon Hard Rewards", please take care to not use up their Weekly Bonus between July 13th 6:00~9:59(KST)

New Additions and Major Changes
-------------------------------

► Starting Cost Adjusted
Starting Cost will be adjusted from 400 to 200.

► Deployment Cost Adjusted
At the start, at Shops, and at Rest Stops, Costs of all Identities under 3 stars will now be adjusted to 0.

<Intent>
Our goal was to encourage experimentation to enhance synergy between the current loadout, E.G.O Gifts, and Skill changes, while reducing anxiety caused by adjusting or rearranging the starting composition in the middle of a run.

New Additions and Major Changes
-------------------------------

► Unpredictable Future - Fixed Encounters
Shops and Rest Stops will now appear at fixed locations.

- Shops : First room of F2, First room of F4, First room of F5, and the room immediately before the Boss fight
- Rest Stop : First room of F3

<Intent>
There were instances in which Unpredictable Future prevented players from visiting a Shop, therefore making them unable to use their saved up Cost. This change was made to prevent such an occasion.

► Floor Buffs Adjusted
Buff effects applied to each floor will be adjusted based on difficulty.

► Floor-based Gift Rarity categorization
The Floor-based range of Gift Rarities will be adjusted.
- F1 ~ F3 : Rarity 1 ~ Rarity 2 E.G.O Gifts
- F4 ~ F5 : Rarity 3 ~ Rarity 5 E.G.O Gifts

New Additions and Major Changes
-------------------------------
※ The following changes are applied to Mirror Dungeon 1, 2, and 2 Hard.

► Added an option to refuse an E.G.O Gift
An option to refuse an E.G.O Gift has been added.

► Cost gained and E.G.O Gift spawn rate upon battle completion
Cost gained and E.G.O Gift spawn rate upon battle completion will be adjusted as follows

Normal Encounter: Cost gained 25, E.G.O Gift spawn rate 5%
Focused Encounter: Cost gained 30, E.G.O Gift spawn rate 75%
Risky Encounter: Cost gained 50, E.G.O Gift spawn rate 35%
Floor Boss: Cost gained (Depends on Floor) 50~100, E.G.O Gift spawn rate 100%

► E.G.O Gifts adjusted
The following E.G.O Gifts' tiers and effects will be adjusted as follows.

<Milepost of Survival>
- Rarity : 3 → 2
- Effect : When moving to the next floor, all Identities heal by 12.5% of Max HP, and gain 100 Cost. → When moving to the next floor, all Identities heal by 8% of Max HP, and gain 87 Cost.
- Reason : If this Gift spawned on the 4th floor onward, it would activate only once. Thus, its Rarity was lowered and its effects adjusted accordingly.

<Lunar Memory>
- Rarity : 4 → 5
- Effect : All type and affinity resistances of enemies (for Abnormalities, all Parts) change to 'Fatal'. → (Unchanged)
- Explanation : The gift's Rarity will now reflect its powerful effects, and will now spawn less frequently.

title: Season 2 <Reminiscence> Notice
content:
------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

Season 2: Reminiscence will commence on June 1st, 2023, at 12:00 pm (KST).
This notice will provide information on Season 2 <Reminiscence> and its new systems.
Please understand that what we show here is both conceptual and in-development, and is subject to change before the date.
To properly prepare for this update, scheduled maintenance will take place on Jun 1 2023 06:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] (KST).

Content
-------

1. Season 1 Egoshard Carryover
2. Gradual Main Story & Battle Pass Updates
3. New Tiers for Uptying and Threadspinning
4. Identity Level Cap Increase
5. Target Extraction Pity
6. Season 2 Extractions & Dispenser
7. Upcoming Mirror Dungeon #2
8. Mirror Dungeon #2 (Hard) Preview
9. Profile Ticket Customization
10. UI/UX Adjustments, Quality of Life, and Optimization

1. Season 1 Egoshard Carryover
------------------------------

Guide on Season Changes - Egoshards

- When a new Season begins, half of the previous Season’s Egoshards will be carried over (and rounded up).
- The carryover rates for unconverted Egoshards from multiple seasons past will be halved for each following Season.
- The remaining Egoshards are converted into Thread.
- Egoshard Crates (both random and nominable) will be carried over in the same way.

As described above, half of the currencies listed below will be converted to Season 2’s.

- Season 1 [Sinner]’s Egoshard
- Season 1 Egoshard Crate
- Season 1 Nominable Egoshard Crate

The carryover of currencies to Season 2 will automatically occur the first time you log into the game during Season 2.
A popup will show how much Season 1 currency you owned, and how they have been converted.

Season 1 currencies still in the mailbox will only be converted after they are claimed.
If you receive Season 1 currencies through the mailbox during Season 2, automatically converted upon redemption into Season 2 currency.

2. Gradual Main Story & Battle Pass Updates
-------------------------------------------

Chapter 4 of the main story and the Season 2 pass will be updated in three parts.

► 6/1
- Main Story Ch. 4 《Part 1》
- Season 2 Pass Rewards 《Lv. 1 ~ Lv. 20》

► 6/8
- Main Story Ch. 4 《Part 2》
- Season 2 Pass Rewards 《Lv. 21 ~ Lv. 40》

► 6/15
- Main Story Ch. 4 《Part 3》
- Season 2 Pass Rewards 《Lv. 41 ~ Lv. 60 (+Max Pass Level)》

The Pass Level will be tracked normally regardless of the gradual updates. When the rewards for higher levels are unlocked with subsequent updates, you can immediately claim them up to your current Pass Level.
Max Pass level rewards earned for leveling up the pass beyond Level 60 are also kept track of even while they aren’t unlocked, and you can claim the accumulated rewards of Season 2 Nominable Egoshard Crates immediately once they are.
Chapter 4 stage progress rewards and Max Pass level rewards will become available to claim on the June 15th update, when Part 3 of the chapter is added.

3. New Tier for Uptying and Threadspinning
------------------------------------------

Refraction Railway Line 2 is planned to be added in mid-July**, along with it, Identity Uptie Tier 4 and E.G.O Threadspin Tier 4 will be added.
The new tier will make Identities and E.G.O more powerful.
Uptying and Threadspinning an Identity or E.G.O to Tier 4 will cost the Sinner’s Egoshards as well as Thread.

[Uptie · Threadspin Tier]
Tier 1 ⇒ Tier 2
Tier 2 ⇒ Tier 3
Currencies Required : Thread

Tier 3 ⇒ Tier 4
Currencies Required : Thread + [Sinner]’s Egoshards

4. Identity Level Cap Increase
------------------------------

With the Season 2 update, the max level of Identities will increase from 30 to 35.

5. <Ideality Exchange> for Extractions
--------------------------------------

With the Season 2 update, the Ideality Exchange system will be added for target extractions.
During an extraction banner, you can gain Isang [Ideality] [理想이상] based on the number of extractions you’ve performed.

After collecting a certain amount of Ideality, you can exchange it for a 3★ Identity or E.G.O represented in the target extraction.

Ideality is not shared between target extraction banners; Ideality in each target extraction is considered as its own currency.

After the target extraction is over, the remaining Ideality is converted to Thread.

6. Season 2 Extractions & Dispenser
-----------------------------------

Guide on Season Changes - Extractions

- A new Season’s Identities and E.G.O will be added to the list of Extractable items.
- Identities from previous Seasons remain in the pool, so you can still acquire them from Extraction.

[Season 1]
Added : [Regular] IDs · E.G.O, [Season 1] IDs, [Season 1 Event] IDs · E.G.O
Removed : -

[Season 2]
Added : [Regular] IDs · E.G.O, [Season 1] IDs, [Season 2] IDs, [Season 2 Event] IDs · E.G.O
Removed : [Season 1 Event] IDs · E.G.O

[Season 3]
Added : [Regular] IDs · E.G.O, [Season 1] IDs, [Season 2] IDs, [Season 3] IDs, [Season 2 Event] IDs · E.G.O
Removed : [Season 2 Event] IDs · E.G.O

※ We supplemented the guide with the information above as the previously provided table had room for confusion.

As shown in the image above, the following Identities and E.G.O will be removed from all Extractable item lists with the beginning of Season 2 (Excluding [Season 1] Assured Extraction: 3★ Identity).

- Season 1 Event Identities
3★ : R.B. Chef de Cuisine Ryōshū

- Season 1 Event E.G.O
E.G.O [TETH] : Lifetime Stew Sinclair

※ [Season 1] Assured Extraction: 3★ Identity is based on Identities from the season, so you will still be able to acquire 3★ R.B. Chef de Cuisine Ryōshū from it.

Guide on Season Changes - Dispenser

- Identities and E.G.O from the new Season will be available at the Dispenser.
- In addition, you will be able to exchange for Identities and E.G.O from the Battle Passes of past Seasons.
- Please note that Extraction IDs belonging to the Season immediately before will be inaccessible until 2 Seasons have passed.

[Season 3]
Added : [Regular] IDs · E.G.O, [Season 3] IDs, [Season 3 Event] IDs · E.G.O, [Season 1 Pass] E.G.O, [Season 2 Pass] E.G.O, [Season 1] IDs, [Season 1 Event] IDs · E.G.O
Removed : [Season 2] IDs, [Season 2 Event] IDs · E.G.O

※ We supplemented the guide with the information above as the previously provided table had room for confusion.

E.G.O [TETH] : 4th Match Flame Yi Sang, Screwloose Wallop Meursault, Roseate Desire Hong Lu, Roseate Desire Ishmael, Rime Shank Rodion, Impending Day Sinclair
E.G.O [ZAYIN] : Legerdemain Gregor

7. Mirror Dungeon #2 Preview
----------------------------

After the Chapter 4 Updates, Mirror Dungeon #2 will be added on June 22nd.

You may enter Mirror Dungeon #2 after meeting the following requirements:
- Clear Mirror Dungeon #1
- Clear Main Story Chapter 4

With the addition of Mirror Dungeon #2, several changes will be made to related systems.

► Systems

1. New resource Cost introduced to Mirror Dungeons
- When entering a Mirror Dungeon, you will be given a set amount of Cost to build a team of Identities and E.G.O with.
- Cost can be obtained through combat encounters and events, allowing you to deploy additional Identities and E.G.O, or partake of shop events.

2. Shop Events added to Mirror Dungeons
- Shop events may appear in certain nodes of Mirror Dungeons.
- In shop events, you can spend Cost to purchase E.G.O Gifts, heal up, or recruit Sinners.

3. Starter buffs introduced to Mirror Dungeons
- When activated, starter buffs can help with Mirror Dungeon expedition upon entry.
- Starter buffs apply individually to each Mirror Dungeon.
- They can be activated using a currency obtained by clearing each Mirror Dungeon. (Mirror Dungeon #1 does not have starter buffs.)

4. Identity levels are fixed at a certain value upon entry.
As such, Identity power-up event choices will be removed.

- In Mirror Dungeon #1, all Identities are fixed at Lv. 30
- In Mirror Dungeon #2, all Identities are fixed at Lv. 35
- Mirror Dungeon #2 (Hard) reflects the Identities’ original levels, which can go up to Lv. 35

► Contents

- 45 new E.G.O Gifts
- 25 new events
- New Abnormalities and enemies

► Quality-of-life Features

- Preset function implemented
- E.G.O Threadspin tier shown during deployment
- E.G.O Gift effects and event choice results are easier to check
- Event choices that have been selected before will show their outcomes in advance in subsequent encounters
- Direction to progress displayed
- E.G.O resources fully carried over

► Entry Cost and Reward Reception

[Old]
Entry Cost : Enkephalin Module required for entry
Reward Reception : When an expedition is over, rewards are provided based on the number of floors and nodes reached

[New]
Entry Cost : Enkephalin Module NOT required for entry
Reward Reception : When an expedition is over, rewards are shown based on the number of floors and nodes reached; the player may choose whether to use Enkephalin Modules to claim them

※ Please note that daily free entry and the simulation functions for Mirror Dungeons will be removed with the Mirror Dungeon #2 update.

► Weekly Bonus Changes

Weekly bonuses can be received 3 times per week like before, the rewards for clearing the final floor are as follows:

[With Bonus]

[Old]
<Mirror Dungeon #1>
- Lunacy x250
- Egoshard Crate x8 or Nominable Egoshard Crate x5
- Battle Pass EXP 20

[New]
<Mirror Dungeon #1>
- Lunacy x250
- Battle Pass EXP 15

<Mirror Dungeon #2>
- Lunacy x250
- Battle Pass EXP 45

<Mirror Dungeon #2 - Hard>
- Lunacy x250
- Battle Pass EXP 75

[Without Bonus]

[Old]
<Mirror Dungeon #1>
- Battle Pass EXP 7

[New]
<Mirror Dungeon #1>
- Battle Pass EXP 10

<Mirror Dungeon #2>
- Battle Pass EXP 30

<Mirror Dungeon #2 - Hard>
- Battle Pass EXP 50

※ Egoshard-related items that were previously part of weekly bonus rewards for Mirror Dungeons have been moved to free rewards for the Battle Pass. With this change, the amount of Nominable Egoshard Crates available as free rewards for the Battle Pass has increased by 285 compared to Season 1.

► Comparison with Mirror Dungeon #1

[Mirror Dungeon #1]
Enkephalin Modules Cost : 3
Pass EXP : 10
With Bonus : 20
Without Bonus : 7
Floors : 3
Max Identities On First Entry : 3
Nodes : 20 (5⇒7⇒8)

[Mirror Dungeon #2]
Enkephalin Modules Cost : 5
Pass EXP : 30
Floors : 5
Max Identities On First Entry : 5
Nodes : 30 (5⇒5⇒6⇒6⇒8)

[Mirror Dungeon #2 - Hard]
Enkephalin Modules Cost : 6
Pass EXP : 50
Floors : 5
Max Identities On First Entry : 5
Nodes : 30 (5⇒5⇒6⇒6⇒8)

[Mirror Dungeon #2 - Hard] Notes
- Reflects Identities’ real levels
- Rewards can be claimed 3 times per week (Independent of weekly bonuses)

8. Mirror Dungeon #2 (Hard) Preview
-----------------------------------

Following the Mirror Dungeon #2 update, Mirror Dungeon #2 (Hard) will be added on June 29th.

You may enter Mirror Dungeon #2 (Hard) after meeting the following requirements:

- Clear Mirror Dungeon #2

The hard difficulty Mirror Dungeons have a weekly reward limit of 3 times.
This limit works independently of Mirror Dungeon weekly bonuses.

You can apply the weekly bonus (3 times per week) when claiming clear rewards for Mirror Dungeon #2 (Hard) (3 times per week) to optimize the Battle Pass EXP gain in the fewest number of expeditions.

Below is a comparison between Mirror Dungeon #2 and Mirror Dungeon #2 (Hard).

[Mirror Dungeon #2]
Identity Lv. : 35
Modules Required for Claiming Rewards : 5
Pass EXP on Clear [With Weekly Bonus] : 45
Pass EXP on Clear [Without Weekly Bonus] : 30
No. of Times Rewards can be Claimed : No limits

[Mirror Dungeon #2 - Hard]
Identity Lv. : Max 35 (Reflects player’s Identity levels)
Modules Required for Claiming Rewards : 6
Pass EXP on Clear [With Weekly Bonus] : 75
Pass EXP on Clear [Without Weekly Bonus] : 50
No. of Times Rewards can be Claimed : 3 per week

9. Profile Ticket Customization
-------------------------------

With the Season 2 update, the ability to customize your profile ticket will be added.

Seven colors are provided by default, and you can earn various decorations from Battle Passes, events, and more.

10. UI/UX Adjustments, Quality of Life, and Optimization
--------------------------------------------------------

We are in the process of preparing a UI/UX overhaul to improve ease of use and optimization for both mobile and PC platforms.

Our goal is to implement the overhaul around the time of Chapter 5 updates.

We continuously work on optimization as well, and we will do our best to repay the players’ love and patience.

title: Hello. This is Kim Jihoon, the Director of Project Moon.
content:
To start off, we would like to apologize to our users playing <Limbus Company> for allowing frequent bugs and errors to seriously hinder the experience.

Our insufficient preparation caused disappointment to many players.

We will take responsibility for our shortcomings and make sure that every user who was unable to receive the items they paid for gets proper compensation, and we will make sure to take care of all refund requests even if the process takes time.

We understand that we have much to reflect on as our insufficient capabilities in terms of development and post-release response let many users down, especially since the interest people showed in <Limbus Company> far exceeded our expectations.

Learning from this experience, we will do our best to improve the customer service environment and design reasonable systems so that users may comfortably enjoy <Limbus Company>.

We are currently in the process of handling cases of transaction errors and refund requests reported via the customer service inquiries in order.
Unfortunately, it will inevitably take some time to process everything and provide the necessary measures to all users.

We will do our best to address these issues for our users as soon as possible.

Once again, allow us to formally apologize to our users for the significant inconvenience.
We would like to thank all our users for their continued attention and love, and we will do everything in our power to provide a stable service.

Thank you very much.

title: Notice: About Unbreakable Coins and Difficulty Adjustments
content:
Hello. This is Kim Jihoon, Director at Project Moon.

Unbreakable Coins were added to the game to show off enemy animations
and to add further density to the combat visuals.

However, I realized that the behavior of Unbreakable Coins in Canto 8 - <Part 2> was solely focused on
raising the game difficulty, as opposed to giving a more visually entertaining experience. Therefore, we intend to alleviate this issue.

We will be using these Unbreakable Coins to prioritize "showing off the enemy animations", as that was our initial design intent.

This does not mean that they will never be used to raise Encounter difficulties going forward;
this means that, when we do so, we will try our best to ensure that their behavior adds difficulty without being infuriating or feeling unfair.

Thank you.

[Difficulty Adjustments]

► Difficulty for certain Encounters in Stage 8-20 will be lowered.

► EXP Luxcavation #8 Encounter difficulty will be lowered.

[Deployment ETA]
- 5.22(THU) 23:00(KST)
- There may be a 10-minute margin of error to the ETA.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

※ The Hotfix will be deployed without a separate client update,
but please note that additional downloads may occur once it is complete.

title: 2025, May 22nd Scheduled Update Notice
content:
--------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on May 22nd, 2024 (KST).

Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.

Please refer below for details about the update.

New Content
-----------

1. New Target Extraction - [Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Adept Faust] (5/22 12:00 ~ 6/5 10:00 (KST))
The following Identity will have increased odds of extraction
- 3★ : Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Adept Faust
※ Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Adept Faust is a Season 6 Identity.

2. New Identity Added
The following Identity is added to the list of extractable Identities.
- 3★ : Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Adept Faust

3. New Packages
2 new limited packages will be added to the game with the 2025. 5. 22 (KST) Scheduled Update.

► Target Extraction Pack
- Contents : Decaextraction Ticket x 4
- Price : ￦33,000 / $21.99 / ¥3,000
- Can be purchased once
- Purchasable Period : 25. 5. 22 12:00 ~ 6. 5 10:00 (KST)

► Identity Growth Pack
- Contents : Takeoff Module - ID Uptie x 1, Identity Training Ticket IV x 60, Identity Training Ticket III x 30
- Price : ￦33,000 / $21.99 / ¥3,000
- Can be purchased once
- Purchasable Period : 25. 5. 22 12:00 ~ 6. 5 10:00 (KST)

About the New Season
--------------------

※ Please refer to the Steam Announcements page for more information regarding Season 6.
- [Posted May 5th, 2025] Guide on Season 6 : Zàng Huā Yīn

Season Update <Part 2> Changes
------------------------------

1. Gradual Main Story & Battle Pass Updates
Main Story Canto 8 - <Part 2>, Season 6 Limbus Pass - Zàng Huā Yīn <Part 2> Unlocked

2. New EXP Luxcavations Added
Clear a certain Stage of Canto 8 - <Part 2> to unlock EXP Luxcavation #8
► EXP Luxcavation #8 Unlock : Clear Main Story Stage 8-20

※ Things to Note
EXP Luxcavation #8 has separate, rotating Slash, Pierce, and Blunt Stages. They each open on the following days:
- Slash : MON, TUE, SUN
- Pierce : WED, THU, SUN
- Blunt : FRI, SAT, SUN

Each Attack Type has first-time clear rewards. Clear the stage to unlock the skip functionality for that specific Attack Type.

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Clearly labeled Paid & Free Lunacy for Packages with Lunacy content

► Adjusted how 'Power Up' works for the E.G.O Gift 'Cigarette Holder'
- Before: applied the 'Power Up' effect directly to the Final Power
- After: gave the 'Power Up' buff a separate buff Icon to clarify that the effect has been activated

► Fixed an issue where attempting to filter by Skill Keywords do not work in the Sinner Loadout E.G.O selection menu

► Fixed an issue where the Panic Type 'Deception' activates unconditionally in Focused Encounters
- Relevant effects: If this unit's Speed is faster than the target's or when using an Unopposed Attack, deal +X% damage against the target

► Fixed an issue where using the "hide UI' function on the top right corner of the screen then unhiding the UI would cause the menu to load in closed

► Fixed an issue where, while viewing the story, the text box could stop loading altogether after a certain cutscene VFX plays

► Fixed an issue where, in Canto 8, certain characters had incorrect Portrait colors

► Fixed an issue where, in Canto 8, certain character sprites were missing

► Fixed an issue where obtaining duplicates of E.G.O gifts in the Mirror Dungeon would show the total amount of Gifts owned

► (JP Only) Fixed an issue where certain characters did not load
- Relevant texts: 蚰蜒殺, 蘅蕪苑

► (JP Only) Fixed typos in Canto 8 story texts

► (EN, JP Only) Fixed an issue where, in Theater - Canto 8, the Unlock Conditions texts would load as UNKNOWN instead

► (EN Only) Adjusted translations for certain lines in Canto 8-7 to reduce the room for misunderstanding

► (EN Only) Fixed an issue where the Canto 8 <Part 1> enemy had an incorrect Passive text
※ Relevant Passive: Jar-haunting Curse
- Before: against all enemies, inflict [Poison] equal to the number of turns that passed this unit joined the battle (max 5)
- After: against all enemies, inflict [Poison] equal to the number of turns that passed "since" this unit joined the battle (max 5)

Known Issues
------------

► An issue where a certain enemy's Skill animation in Canto 8 <Part 2> can get skipped under certain conditions

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 May 29th, 2025 (KST)
- When : After May 22nd, 2025 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until May 29th (Thu) 2025, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.
- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change depending on the status of maintenance. If such a change occurs, we will let you know in a follow-up notice.
- A resource download may be prompted after the build update. If you're using a mobile device, it is recommended to proceed with a Wi-Fi connection.
- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account. Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: [Urgent] Notice: Softlocking Issue Additional Notice
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

We have identified an issue with the May 15th Scheduled Update(Ver.1.76.0) where the final node of Story Dungeons would become un-interactable.

We have identfied the cause of this issue,
and will be deploying the fix with Version 1.76.1 at
2025.05.15 17:00 (KST).

However, as mobile environments require us to submit the update
for review for the fix, we would like to ask for your understanding
that it may take some time for us to release Version 1.76.1 on mobile marketplaes.

We would like to recommend using the Steam version of the game until
Version 1.76.1 passes the reviews on mobile marketplaces.

We will inform you via an additional update once we are able to confirm
that this new version has passed the mobile store reviews.

We sincerely apologize for this softlocking issue.

[Issue]
- An issue where, after the 2025.05.15 Scheduled Update, the final node of Story Dungeons cannot be interacted with

[Cause]
- A side effect of separating the updated logic from the old logic in the process of updating the movement process between stages

[Solution]
- Resolved the logic that was causing the issues

[Future Measures]
- Set up an internal development reminder to separate the necessary logic when updating
- Add an extra test case when making improvements to preexisting functionalities

We once again sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

[5/15 Scheduled Update Error Compensation]
Compensation : Lunacy x1000
- Recipients: all users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 May. 22nd, 2025 (KST)

content:
--------------------------------------

- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account. Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: Guide on Season 6: Zàng Huā Yīn
content:
-------------------------------

Greetings, dear Manager.

[Season 6: Zàng Huā Yīn] will commence on May 15th, 2025, at 12:00 PM (KST).
This notice will provide information on Season 6 and its new or adjusted systems.

Please note that the contents shown here are subject to change. 
We will notify you again as each update is deployed.

Index
-----

1. Season 5 Egoshard Carryover
2. Gradual Main Story & Battle Pass Updates
3. Packages
4. Identity Level Cap Increased & Luxcavations
5. Season 6 Extractions
6. Season 6 Dispenser
7. Mirror Dungeon #6 In Development

1. Season 5 Egoshard Carryover
------------------------------

Guide on Season Changes - Egoshards
-----------------------------------
- When a new Season begins, half of the previous Season’s Egoshards will be carried over (rounded up).
- The carryover rates for unconverted Egoshards from multiple seasons past will be halved for each following Season.
- The remaining Egoshards are converted into Thread.
- Egoshard Crates (both random and nominable) will be carried over in the same way.

As per the information above, half of the currencies listed below will be converted to Season 6’s.

- Season 5 [Sinner]’s Egoshards
- Season 5 Uptie & Threadspinning only Shards (Universal)
- Season 5 Egoshard Crate
- Season 5 Nominable Egoshard Crate

The carryover of currencies to Season 6 will automatically occur the first time you log into the game during Season 6.
A popup will show how much previous Season’s Egoshard relevant currency you owned, and how they have been converted.

※ Previous Season’s Identity Egoshard currencies that are still in the Mailbox or in the Lost & Found will be carried over when they are claimed. Carryover to Season 6 currency will occur as soon as they are claimed, and currencies that were not carried over will be converted to Thread-related currencies.

2. Gradual Main Story & Battle Pass Updates
-------------------------------------------

Chapter 8 of the main story and the Season 6 Pass will be updated in 3 parts.

► 5/15
- Main Story Ch. 8 《Part 1》
- Season 6 Pass Rewards 《Lv. 1 ~ Lv. 20》

► 5/22
- Main Story Ch. 8 《Part 2》
- Season 6 Pass Rewards 《Lv. 21 ~ Lv. 40》

► 5/29
- Main Story Ch. 8 《Part 3》
- Season 6 Pass Rewards 《Lv. 41 ~ Lv. 120 (Max Pass Level)》
- Season 6 Pass Max Pass Level+ Rewards

Accumulated Pass Levels are continuously tracked regardless of the gradual updates. 
When the subsequent updates unlock the rewards for higher Pass Levels, you can immediately claim them up to your accumulated Pass Level.

Max Pass Level rewards earned for leveling up the Pass past the max Pass Level are also kept track of even when they aren’t unlocked, and you can claim the accumulated Season 6 Nominable Egoshard Crates immediately once they are made available.

Chapter 8 stage progression rewards and Max Pass Level rewards will become available to claim with the May 29th update, when 《Part 3》 of this chapter is added.

※ Battle Pass Changes
Unlike in previous Seasons’ Battle Passes, Season 6 Battle Pass contains 4 E.G.O, not 6 E.G.O. To make up for the reduced number of E.G.O in the Battle Pass, more rewards will be added to the Battle Pass, and preexisting rewards will be boosted.

With every new main chapter, we always had a feeling that we could have done more—as E.G.O animation development coincided with development schedule for the new main story development within a limited timeframe, we could not put as much focus on developing the main chapter enemies or cutscenes.

For this reason, given the limited time we have, we decided that a more effective means of expressing the imagery and the interesting parts of the main chapter would be to vary the types of enemies or the qualities present in each of them, while putting more of our focus into raising the bar for the main highlight E.G.O.

Also, considering the reduced number of E.G.O in the Battle Pass, we decided to boost the amount of Extraction Tickets and upgrade resources and add Uptie-related items to maintain the value of the Battle Pass.

We will try our best to make up for the disappointment caused by the reduced number of E.G.O in the Battle Pass by creating an exciting main story chapter.

► Changes (Battle Pass Activated)

[ Contents ] E.G.O
[ Season 5: Oblivion ] x6
[ Season 6: Zàng Huā Yīn ] x4

[ Contents ] Extraction Tickets
[ Season 5: Oblivion ] x20
[ Season 6: Zàng Huā Yīn ] x30

[ Contents ] Season 6 Uptie & Threadspinning only Shards (Universal)
[ Season 5: Oblivion ] None
[ Season 6: Zàng Huā Yīn ] x150

[ Contents ] Training Tickets (EXP)
[ Season 5: Oblivion ] Identity Training Ticket II x150, Identity Training Ticket III x80 (110,000 EXP)
[ Season 6: Zàng Huā Yīn ] Identity Training Ticket III x80, Identity Training Ticket IV x30 (170,000 EXP)

[ Contents ] Takeoff Module - Identity Uptie
[ Season 5: Oblivion ] None
[ Season 6: Zàng Huā Yīn ] x2

3. Packages
-----------

With the Season 6 Update, the following 2 new packages will be added to the game.

- Season 6 Commencement Lunacy Pack
[ Package Title ] Season 6 Commencement Lunacy Pack
[ Contents ] Paid Lunacy 1300
[ Price ] ￦15,000 / $10.99 / ¥1,500

※ We recommend this Package for Managers who seek to purchase only the Battle Pass.
(Battle Pass Price : Paid Lunacy x1300)

- Season 6 Settler Supplies
[ Package Title ] Season 6 Settler Supplies
[ Contents ] Lunacy (Paid) x5040, Decaextraction Ticket x3, Identity Training Ticket IV x60, Thread x80, Season 5 Nominable Egoshard Crate x 40
[ Price ] ￦99,000 / $69.99 / ¥10,000

The following are the prices for the Battle Pass & Battle Pass Package.

- Battle Pass
[ Package Title ] Limbus Pass
[ Contents ] Battle Pass Rewards (maxes out at Lv. 120), Battle Pass Max Pass Level EX Rewards
[ Price ] Paid Lunacy x 1300

[ Package Title ] Limbus Pass Package
[ Contents ] Battle Pass Rewards (maxes out at Lv. 120), Battle Pass Max Pass Level EX Rewards, Special Banner x1, Level Boost Ticket V x1, +10 Battle Pass Level
[ Price ] Paid Lunacy x 2700

[ Package Title ] Limbus Pass Package (when purchased separately)
[ Contents ] Special Banner x1, Level Boost Ticket V x1, +10 Battle Pass Level
[ Price ] Paid Lunacy x 1700

4. Identity Level Cap Increase & Luxcavations
---------------------------------------------

<Identity Level Cap Increase>
If you have cleared the Main Story Chapter 7, the max level of Identities will be increased from 50 to 55 with the Season 6 Update.

- Identity Level Cap Increase Conditions
No Conditions : Identity Level Cap 40
Clear Main Story Chapter 5 : Identity Level Cap 45
Clear main Story Chapter 6 : Identity Level Cap 50
Clear main Story Chapter 7 : Identity Level Cap 55

<New EXP Luxcavation>
Clearing a certain stage in Chapter 8 《Part 2》
will unlock EXP Luxcavation #8

[ Stage ] EXP Luxcavation #8
[ Enkephalin Cost ] 60
[ Rewards ] Identity Training Ticket IV x6, Identity Training Ticket III x2, Identity Training Ticket II x4
[ EXP Conversion ] 20800

[ Stage ] Luxcavation #8 (When skipped)
[ Enkephalin Cost ] 120
[ Rewards ] Identity Training Ticket IV x9, Identity Training Ticket III x3, Identity Training Ticket II x6
[ EXP Conversion ] 31200

Starting from EXP Luxcavation #8, Slash, Pierce, and Blunt Stages will be introduced. They each open on the following days:
- Slash : MON, TUE, SUN
- Pierce : WED, THU, SUN
- Blunt : FRI, SAT, SUN

Each Attack Type Stage has first-time clear rewards, and clearing each Attack Type unlocks the Encounter Skip option for the said Attack Type Stage. For example, clearing Luxcavation #8 [Slash] will unlock the Skip function only for Luxcavation #8 [Slash] and not [Pierce] or [Blunt].

5. Season 6 Extractions
-----------------------

Guide on Season Changes - Extractions
-------------------------------------
- The new Season’s Identities and E.G.O will be added to the list of Extractable items.
- Identities & E.G.O from previous Seasons remain in the pool and are obtainable via Extractions.
- Event Identities & E.G.O from previous Seasons, cannot be obtained from Extractions. However, in Sinner-specific Target Extractions, previous Seasons’ Event and Event Reward Identities & E.G.O will be available from the respective Sinner’s Extractions and their Yisang Exchange cataolog.

[ Remains Extractable ]
Season 4 : [Standard Fare], [Season 1~3]
Season 5 : [Standard Fare], [Season 1~4]
Season 6 : [Standard Fare], [Season 1~5]

[ Event IDs & E.G.O from the immediately preceding Season removed ]
Season 4 : [Season 3 Event]
Season 5 : [Season 4 Event]
Season 6 : [Season 5 Event]

[ IDs & E.G.O added during the ongoing Season ]
Season 4 : [Season 4], [Season 4 Event]
Season 5 : [Season 5], [Season 5 Event]
Season 6 : [Season 6], [Season 6 Event]

[ All Extractables ]
Season 4 : [Standard], [Season 1~3], [Season 4], [Season 4 Event]
Season 5 : [Standard], [Season 1~4], [Season 5], [Season 5 Event]
Season 6 : [Standard], [Season 1~5], [Season 6], [Season 6 Event]

As shown in the image above, the following identities and E.G.O will be removed from all Extractable item lists with the start of Season 6. (※ Except from the following Extractions: [Season 5] Assured Extraction: 3★ Identity, and Sinner-specific Target Extractions)

► [Season 5 Event] Identities • E.G.O
E.G.O [HE] : Christmas Nightmare Ishmael, Christmas Nightmare Gregor, Thoracalgia Ryōshū
3★ : LCE E.G.O::Ardor Blossom Star Faust, Kurokumo Clan Captain Ishmael, Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Ryōshū

※ In Sinner-specific Target Extractions, Previous Seasons’ Event and Event Reward Identities & E.G.O will still be available from the respective Sinner’s Extractions and their Yisang Exchange cataolog.

6. Season 6 Dispenser
---------------------

Guide on Season Changes - Dispenser
-----------------------------------
- Identities and E.G.O from the new Season will be available at the Dispenser.
- You will be able to exchange for Identities and E.G.O from the past Seasons’ Battle Passes.
- Please note that Extraction Identities & E.G.O belonging to the Season immediately before the new Season will be inaccessible from the Dispenser.

[ Remains Dispensable ]
Season 4 : [Standard Fare]
Season 5 : [Standard Fare]
Season 6 : [Standard Fare]

[ New Season IDs & E.G.O Added ]

Season 5 : [Season 5], [Season 5 Event]
Season 6 : [Season 6], [Season 6 Event]

As shown in the image above, the following Identities and E.G.O

title: 2025, May 8th Scheduled Update Notice
content:
-------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on May 8th, 2025 (KST).

Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.

Please refer below for details about the update.

New Content
-----------

1. New Dante's Notes Entries Added

New Entries will be added to Dante's Notes after the May 8th (KST) Scheduled Update.
► Unlock conditions: Clear Main Story 7.5-26

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Fixed an issue where R Corp. 4th Pack Reindeer Ishmael's Skill 3 did not activate certain E.G.O Gift abilities despite meeting relevant conditionals
- Activation Conditional: After Attack with a Skill Attack that consumed 7+ Charge Count on self: if the target is defeated...
- Relevant E.G.O Gifts: Miniature Telepole, Insulator, T-5 Perpetual Motion Machine

► Fixed an issue where certain UI interactions did not work properly under certain circumstances in Main Story Stage 1-8

► Fixed an issue where, in rare cases, the button to enter the Mirror Dungeon does not activate immediately upon clearing Canto 2

► Fixed an issue where enemy guide information does not properly get unlocked when meeting Focused Encounter enemies in Regular Encounters

► Fixed an issue where certain enemies appearing in 'The Heartbreaking' Theme Pack has switched Passives

► (EN Only) Fixed an issue where, in Dante's Notes, 'Cinq Association' text appears as 'UNKNOWN' instead

► (Mobile Only) Fixed an issue where, in certain devices or device settings, the screen-darkening effect to highlight the tutorial areas does not work on intended areas

► Fixed an issue where, in Stage 1-4 Tutorial, attempting to use a Defense or an E.G.O Skill by interacting with the Sinner portraits would not activate

► (EN Only) Fixed an issue where certain CN-EN transliterated terminologies were incorrectly transliterated
- Relevant text: Niaojia-ren, Pao

► (EN, JP Only) Fixed an issue where a certain character's name was shown when it shouldn't be

► (JP Only) Fixed an issue where the description for a certain character was awkwardly described

► (JP Only) Fixed an issue where an incorrect font was applied to the UI Font for Fusion Recipe filters in Mirror Dungeon

► Prevented Announcer voicelines from playing in Tutorial Encounters

► (EN Only) Fixed an issue where the apostrophe text did not load in for the name of an Abnormality, Ebony Queen's Apple

► (EN Only) Fixed an issue where a tutorial image was missing in Stage 1-4 tutorial descriptioin

► (Steam Only) Fixed an issue where delayed purchased items could sometimes not be restored

4/30 Scheduled Update Error Compensation
----------------------------------------

- Compensation : Lunacy x1000

title: Steam) Notice: Critical Custom Language Loading Error
content:
[Steam) Notice: Critical Custom Language Loading Error]

Hello,
this is Project Moon.

We have identified an issue with the Version 1.75.0, deployed Apr. 30th(WED) 12:00 (KST),
where applying Custom Language causes various UI elements to malfunction and load incorrectly.

We would like to ask for your understanding that, as this error directly coincided with our development schedule for Canto 8, it is difficult for us to deploy a new game client version for this issue via a hotfix.

Cause
- This issue was a side effect of an effort to address the issue in which the English font would load in simultaneously next to fonts used for custom languages
- Logic crashes occurred between texts that were loaded via a separate logic for this custom effect and the one for the adjusted system, which caused the fonts to load incorrectly

Solution
- Identified the steps taken to develop this custom effect, and resolved the separate logic used to implement the adjustments

The version with the fix for this issue will be deployed when the May 8th (THU) 12:00 (KST) Scheduled Maintenance ends.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Notice: Game Inaccessibility Issue Fixed & Deployment ETA
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

Of the identified issues that we have shared today, the issue where players using certain devices were unable to access the game has been resolved. With this notice, we would like to inform you of the current situation and our upcoming update.

We additionally confirmed that this inaccessibility issue affects devices with Android OS versions under Version 12.

At first, we intended to resolve this issue via our next Scheduled Update,
as adjustment in logic could have caused issues with the Canto 8 update schedule.

Fortunately, we determined that this issue could go through a client build and be submitted for review without heavily affecting the Canto 8 development schedule.
Also, because the fix to the logic has been completed earlier than we had expected,
the fix for this error will be deployed much sooner than we had informed you with our earlier notice.

We are going to submit this version for store review.
As soon as the review is complete, we will inform you of the deployment ETA via an additional notice.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused by this issue.
