title: Additional Notice: Regarding Game Inaccessibility on Certain Devices
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

We have identified an issue where, after the Apr. 30th Scheduled Update (Ver. 1.75.0), certain devices are unable to access the game.

We have identified the cause of this issue, and we are in the process of fixing it.

However, the fix for the problematic internal logic requires a client build and a submission to the marketplace,
so it cannot be immediately deployed via a hotfix.

Please understand that the fix will be deployed via our next version (Ver. 1.75.1) update.

We would like to ask managers experiencing this issue to access the game via a different device or Steam for now.
We sincerely apologize for this connection issue.

[Issue]
- An issue where, after the 2025.04.30 Update, certain devices are unable to access the game due to instances of additional in-game downloads

[Cause]
- This is a side effect that occurred while deploying optimizations to the localization text download system
- The error occurs when the game attempts to save the localization texts in file directories that are prohibited in certain devices

[Solution]
- Adjusted the file directory to save to a specific Limbus Company app directory

[Future Measures]
- Add more devices to the list of our internal testing devices to identify and prevent device-specific issues from occurring

We once again sincerely apologize for this inconvenience.

title: [Notice: Regarding Sinner Employee Card Images & Walpurgis Night Schedule]
content:
Hello, this is Kim Jihoon, director at Project Moon.

I write to share some information regarding the following subjects:
"Theater - Identity Stories -Sinner employee card resources changed" from the April 17th (THU) Scheduled Update Notice,
and our current "Walpurgis Night schedule".

I would first like to apologize for delivering this delayed response despite recognizing the issue early on. Due to several internal meetings, it took me some time to write and post this announcement in a timely manner. I apologize.

The employee card images applied to the current version of the game, which are reverse sides of the Sinners' employee cards that display their logos, will be replaced with new illustrations as soon as possible(current deadline - by April 30th, Wednesday).

I informed our users long ago that the mugshot illustrations present in the Theater tab will be replaced.
So, given that the mugshot illustrations were going to be changed, I became somewhat overzealous, wondering if there was anything I could express more of or elaborate regarding the Sinners' stories in their pre-employment statuses. Because of this, I wavered on making a judgment call, constantly delaying the finalization of the new mugshots' design directions, and prioritized other urgent upcoming schedules.

The current placeholder versions of the employee cards applied to the game are a result of that hesitation—I began to believe that the image change should be applied as soon as possible, given that we had shared the information that they would be changed long ago, and that the new Season was approaching fast.

However, this decision was problematic for both our players' and my expectations.

Therefore, to prioritize improving the employee card UI image qualities, we intend to produce new mugshot illustrations with minimal changes to the design directions applied in our previous illustrations.

After an impromptu internal discussion, we concluded that our schedule allows for the mugshots to be updated by Apr. 30th (WED).

However, please understand that, in favor of speed, there won't be any significant changes to the characteristics of each Sinner expressed in the previous versions of the mugshots in the re-drawn illustrations. Given that I wavered for such a long time on making any changes to them, we concluded that the lore and design direction of the previous mugshot images were already good.

Also, I regret to inform you that the Walpurgis Night event will be released after Canto 8 is complete, so I beg your forgiveness and patience.
As we are currently all-hands-on-deck for the development of Canto 8, attempting to match the beginning of our Walpurgis Night event with the real-life Walpurgis Night again could cause a significant delay, so I decided to forgo that choice this time.

Once again, I sincerely apologize for causing our managers this inconvenience.

I will try my best to ensure that similar cases do not occur again.

Thank you.

title: 1.74.0) Notice: Custom Language Title & Content Font Setting Function Updated
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

We have added a new function to be able to set different fonts for title vs. content texts when using custom fonts. (ex) Set different fonts for ID Skill names & descriptions)

Please refer to the following link for a tutorial on how to apply the custom languages.
- Custom Language How-to

[Tutorial: Setting different fonts for Title vs. Content]

1. Find the following folder: "LimbusCompany_Data/Lang/(your Custom Language folder name here)/Font".
ex) If your Custom Language folder is called "lang1", find the "LimbusCompany_Data/Lang/lang1/Font" folder.

2. Create two new folders "Title" and "Context" in the above directory.
- Title: For "titles"
- Context: For "content"

3. Add the fonts you want to apply in each respective folder

4. Run the game.

Also, we are planning to deploy the following fix with our next update.

To be fixed:
- An issue where, when implementing Custom Languages, custom fonts and official fonts could load in simultaneously next to each other when alphabets or letters that are shared between one of the official languages(KR, JP, EN) and the applied Custom Language are present

We will bring additional changes and improvements to the Custom Language function to help provide a more accessible gameplay experience.

Thank you.

title: Notice: Additional Elaboration on Custom Language Support
content:
--------------------------------------------------------

Hello, this is Project Moon.

In this notice, we would like to provide some further elaboration on certain aspects of the Custom Language Support function introduced on Mar. 31st (MON).

The Custom Language Support was, as we have explained in our previous notices, implemented in order to facilitate playability in languages that aren't officially supported.

However, we have seen and received reports on cases utilizing this function in ways that may affect the gameplay by deleting certain texts, which was not our intention when we implemented this function.

Such cases may also be considered abnormal gameplay, so please note that continued use or sharing of these modifications could result in account restriction without warning or legal action.

Also, for certain error reports we received after the Custom Language Support was added to the game, it was difficult for us to clearly determine whether the error was due to the Custom Language Support function or something else.

Therefore, in order to facilitate our response to support emails, we intend to add certain distinguishing features when Custom Language Support is enabled such as a watermark or a different UI color.

We will ensure that such changes will not affect your immersion with the game, and we intend to implement it to the game as soon as possible.

We continue to strive toward providing our users with a better, fairer experience while enjoying our game.

Thank you.

title: Notice: Custom Language
content:
Support & Game Security Update
------------------------------

Hello.

In this notice, we would like to provide additional context on why the custom language support, a function announced on Mar. 31st (MON), will be added to the game.

We have identified multiple cases in which Limbus Company's client has been modified for abnormal use.

Such behavior not only compromises the fairness of the game, but may also cause discomfort to players who are enjoying the game properly. Therefore, we have been continuously working on enhancing the game's security systems to prevent such issues.

In this process of enhancing our security measures, we recognized that certain legitimate modifications of our game, such as custom language mods, could also be limited with this change.

Therefore, we decided to implement the custom language support function, which allows our players to play the game in unsupported languages as well without the need to modify the game client.

Please note that, as we proceed with the game security enhancement update, modification of the game client beyond the language text files, such as modification of client images or in-game data, could be met with legal action or account bans without prior warning.

We continue to strive toward providing our users with better, fairer experiences while enjoying our game.

Sincerely, thank you for playing our game.

title: Notice: Custom Language Translation Support
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

Currently, Limbus Company supports a total of three languages: Korean, English, and Japanese.
Unfortunately, as this is a live service game, it is difficult for us to add official support for additional languages while simultaneously working on constant updates.

Therefore, in order to ensure that players can access the game with better convenience, we intend to add support for custom unofficial translation mods.

Please view the steps below for a guide on how to install custom translation mods; we intend to apply gradual improvements to this function as well.
If future updates or improvements for this function are deployed, we will inform you via an additional update.

We wish to express our most sincere gratitude to everyone playing Limbus Company, and we will try our best so that you can have a better experience enjoying our game.

Thank you.

1. Install the newest version of Limbus Company and find the installation folder. (starting from Version 1.73.0)

2. Find "LimbusCompany_Data/Assets/Resources_moved/Localize/" folder.

3. Verify the original folders and files(kr, en, jp), copy the aforementioned files, and apply your translations.

4. Find the "LimbusCompany_Data/Lang" directory. If the 'Lang' folder doesn't exist, make one.

5. Make a new folder and designate a name.

6. Add your translated files to the folder.
- The structure of the folder must be identical to the original files.
- Please remove the prefixes in the json file names.
- (X) KR_MainUIText.json, EN_MainUIText.json, JP_MainUIText.json
- (O) MainUIText.json

7. Within the same folder, create a "Font" folder, and add your prepared fold files into the said folder.

8. Find the "Lang" folder again, and adjust the contents of 'config.json'. If the file does not exist, make one and fill the contents as seen in this screenshot.
- This file looks for the folder with its name written in the file and runs the game with your language of choice.
- The contents of the config file must match the top folder name of your translation files.

9. Run the game and verify that the translations have been applied properly.
- e.g.) Try changing the text in the button at the bottom left corner of the screen.
- Original: Clear all caches
- Changed: Custom Translation

Note) If you have applied 2 or more languages, use the "Select Custom Language" button to choose the language you would like to play the game with.‘

title: [Notice: MD Nocturnal Sweeping Theme Pack Encounter Softlocking Hotfix]
content:
Greetings, Dear Manager.

After the 2025.03.20 Scheduled Update,
we have identified a softlocking issue occurring in the new MD Theme Pack "Nocturnal Sweeping".

A hotfix will be deployed to fix this issue.
The hotfix will be applied upon restarting the game without a separate client update. However, please note that additional in-game downloads may occur.

Hotfix Deployment ETA
- 3.20(THU) 14:30
- There may be a ten minute margin of error to the above estimation.

Issue
- An issue where entering a certain Encounter within the "Nocturnal Sweeping" Mirror Dungeon Theme Pack causes the game to softlock

Cause & Solution
- The Stage was supposed to be a "Focused Encounter", but the Encounter type data was inputted as "Regular Encounter"
- Identified the misinputted data, corrected it to "Focused Encounter"

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Fixed an issue where Kurokumo Clan Wakashu Heathcliff's Passive did not work as intended

► Fixed an issue where Ryōshū E.G.O 'Contempt, Awe' Passive would gain E.G.O resource for Empowered versions of Skills as well

► Fixed a Mirror of the Dreaming Achievements issue where the 'Kill 6+ enemies with a single Attack Skill use in an Encounter (can use E.G.O Skills)' could not be completed if Backup enemies joined the battle after killing 6 enemies at once

► Fixed a Mirror of the Dreaming Achievements issue where the 'Kill 6+ enemies with a single Attack Skill use in an Encounter (can use E.G.O Skills)' could not be completed if they were defeated by any damage sources other than Skill damage

► Adjusted the conditions for a Mirror of the Dreaming Achievement 'Deal X+ damage with a single Skill use (damage against Shield HP counts)'
- Before: Deal X+ damage with a single Skill use (damage against Shield HP counts)
- After: Deal X+ Skill damage against an enemy with a single Skill use (Shield HP dmg & dmg dealt On Hit such as Sinking Deluge or Time Moratorium counts; excludes dmg from Keywords and other sources)

► Adjusted a certain repetitive Mirror Dungeon Choice Event so that the player has a 100% chance to succeed after X number of attempts

► Fixed an issue where, in a Mirror Dungeon Choice Event, choosing to 'Skip' the dialogue and finishing the Event causes the Choice Event music to play over everything

- After: when activating a certain effect, the correct text would appear on the screen instead

- After: ... consume 10 [Breath] Potency and gain 2 Slash DMG Up next turn

► (EN Only) Fixed an incorrectly translated description in 'Echoes of the Manor' effect
- Before: Units with SP: Change Panic Type to Echoes of the Manor. When this unit Panics, inflict 2 Echoes of the Manor to 2 random other allies of this unit
- After: Units with SP: Change Panic Type to Echoes of the Manor. When this unit Panics, inflict 2 Echoes of the Manor to 2 random other allies of this unit next turn

► (JP Only) Fixed an issue where certain fonts did not load

► (JP Only) Fixed an issue where the text fonts in a certain UI did not load properly

► Fixed an issue where the actual icon used for the effect 'Battle Ready' did not match the icon listed in the description pop-up window

► Fixed an issue where certain enemies in Canto 7 had swapped Skill icons

► Fixed an issue where, in the Mirror Dungeon, Choice Event images would disappear when transitioning back to the node selection menu
5/6

Thank you.

title: New Content - Ch. 7.5: Nocturnal Sweeping
content:
-----------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

With the Mar. 20th, 2025 (KST) Update, new content [Ch.7.5: Nocturnal Sweeping] will be added to the game.

- Duration
2025/3/20 12:00 (KST) ~ Before 4/17 (KST) Scheduled Update

- Event Rewards Exchange
2025/3/20 12:00 (KST) ~ Before 4/24 (KST) Scheduled Update

- Requirements
- Event Unlock Conditions: Clear Main Story 0-4
- Event Stage Unlock Conditions: Clear Main Story 7.5-14

Event Description
-----------------

- When the event starts, the [Ch. 7.5 - Nocturnal Sweeping] Event Page will open.
- During the event period, you can earn [Sweeper Fuel Cylinder] by clearing the Nocturnal Sweeping Event Stages & the Mirror Dungeons.
- You can redeem various rewards from the [Reward Exchange] by spending the [Sweeper Fuel Cylinder] that you have collected.

Event Gameplay
--------------

► Combat Encounters of ‘Nocturnal Sweeping’
You can obtain [Sweeper Fuel Cylinder] every time you complete a combat Encounter of ‘Nocturnal Sweeping’.

Each Encounter has a first-time reward, and with it, you can obtain even more [Sweeper Fuel Cylinder].

The final combat Stage of ‘Nocturnal Sweeping’ costs Enkephalin Modules.

That final Stage will have a higher Enkephalin-to-[Sweeper Fuel Cylinder] ratio, so it will be much more effective as a means of collecting [Sweeper Fuel Cylinder].

Event Gameplay
--------------

► Mirror Dungeons

During the Event Period, ‘Nocturnal Sweeping’ Floor Theme Pack will have a fixed appearance on the 5th floor of both Mirror Dungeon Normal & Hard.

The Theme Pack features exclusive choice events and E.G.O Gifts.

※ Once the event is over, your Nocturnal Sweeping Theme Pack will no longer be a fixed appearance, and Nocturnal Sweeping Theme Pack spawn location may be adjusted.

Clearing a Mirror Dungeon run will net you [Sweeper Fuel Cylinder]. Selecting the Nocturnal Sweeping Theme Pack will net you even more [Sweeper Fuel Cylinder].

Mirror Dungeon Hard Difficulty rewards contain much more [Sweeper Fuel Cylinder] than Mirror Dungeon Normal.

※ However, please note that using the Weekly Bonuses does not increase the event currency yield.

※ Please note that, if you have started a Mirror Dungeon run before the event started, you will not gain event currency from that run.

► Main Story
If you have not fulfilled the event unlock requirements, you can obtain [Sweeper Fuel Cylinder] as a first-time reward from Main Story Combat Encounters.

Upon first-time-completion of an Encounter, you can obtain [Sweeper Fuel Cylinder] proportional to the amount of Enkephalin Spent regardless of whether you’ve met the EX Clear Conditions or not.

※ You cannot obtain event currencies from stages that have already been completed.

※ You cannot obtain [Sweeper Fuel Cylinder] from Refraction Railway or Luxcavation.

Event Currency
--------------

If you have cleared the ‘Nocturnal Sweeping’ Stages, Mirror Dungeons, and the Main Story, you have a small chance to obtain [Sweeper Fuel Tank].

[Sweeper Fuel Tank] has the highest chance of dropping from the final Encounter of the event. However, the chance for it to drop is the same across all other Encounters.

[Sweeper Fuel Tank] is automatically converted to 20 [Sweeper Fuel Cylinder] in the Results or the Rewards screen upon acquisition.

Event Bonus Identities
----------------------

Obtain more [Sweeper Fuel Cylinder] by completing Event Encounters or Mirror Dungeons while equipped with Event Bonus Identities.

<Event Bonus Identities & E.G.O>
- 60% Bonus
- 3★ : Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Ryōshū

- 40% Bonus
- 3★ : Heishou Pack - Mao Branch Outis

※ The Event Currency Bonus from each Identity & E.G.O is additive. (Rounded up)

※ Event Currency Bonus maxes out at 100% Bonus.

※ Event Bonus Identities don’t actually have to participate in a battle; you can earn the bonus currency simply by having them in your Team loadout.

※ Event Currency Bonus applies to first-time clear rewards and Mirror Dungeon clear rewards as well.

Event Rewards
-------------

At the [Rewards Exchange], you can spend [Sweeper Fuel Cylinder] you’ve collected to purchase various rewards.

※ You can no longer obtain [Sweeper Fuel Cylinder] after you obtain enough [Sweeper Fuel Cylinder] to purchase every item in the [Reward Exchange].

※ [Sweeper Fuel Cylinder] will no longer be obtainable once the Event closes after the 2025/04/17 (KST) Scheduled Update.

※ [Reward Exchange] will be open for 5 weeks, from 2025/3/20 12:00 (KST) ~ Before 2025/4/24 (KST) Scheduled Update.

※ Even after the event fully ends, you will be able to experience the Nocturnal Sweeping combat Encounters and view its story anytime at the Drive tab and Theater - [Detour Tales].

title: Known issues after 2025. 03. 13 Scheduled Update & Changes
content:
[Known issues after 2025. 03. 13 Scheduled Update & Changes]

Hello, this is Project Moon.

The following are known issues that have been identified after the 2025. 03. 13 Scheduled Update, and upcoming changes.

We will inform you via update notices as soon as each of the following are fixed.
Please refer below for more information.

► An issue where, after using the Skip function in a mid-battle Choice Event, the event BGM does not go away afterward

► Changes to the [Deal X+ damage with a single Skill use (damage against Shield HP counts)] achievement
This Achievement measures the amount of damage dealt by the Skill itself.
We apologize for the incomplete and vague description of the Achievement.
Also, as for damages dealt by "Sinking Deluge" and "Time Moratorium" which activate On Hit, they can count as damage dealt by the Skill itself, which means that we will change the conditions so that they will count towards the completion of this achievement.
We will apply the above changes and change the achievement text to clarify and reflect them.
Text changes
- Before: Deal X+ damage with a single Skill use (damage against Shield HP counts)
- After: Deal X+ Skill damage against an enemy with a single Skill use (damage against Shield HP, and damage dealt On Hit such as Sinking Deluge or Time Moratorium counts; excludes damage from Keywords and other sources)

► An issue where the Mirror Dungeon Achievement [Kill 6+ enemies with a single Attack Skill use in an Encounter (can use E.G.O Skills)] cannot be completed via Encounters where enemies have Backup units

► An issue where the Mirror Dungeon Achievement [Kill 6+ enemies with a single Attack Skill use in an Encounter (can use E.G.O Skills)] cannot be completed when enemies get killed due to reasons other than Skill damage

► An issue where the Firefist Office Survivor Gregor's Uptie 3 animated illustration escapes the borders when displayed on the Window tab

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Notice: Softlocking issue on Mobile Devices with Pending Purchases
content:
[Notice: Softlocking issue on Mobile Devices with Pending Purchases]

Hello, this is Project Moon.

We would like to inform you of the softlocking issue that occured after the Feb. 27th, 2025 Scheduled Update on mobile devices with pending purchases.

A hotfix will be deployed at Feb. 28th, 18:00 (KST) to address this issue.
The hotfix will be deployed upon restarting the game without a separate client update; please note that additional in-game downloads will occur.

[Issue]
An issue where devices with pending purchases cannot proceed from the Window menu

[Cause]
Insufficient logic testing for pending purchases on "resource loading error that occurs when, on mobile, the user enters the Shop for the first time as a new account" error fix

[Solution]
The part of the game with issues has been reverted.
However, the 'resource loading error that occurs when, on mobile, the user enters the Shop for the first time as a new account' error will occur again, and we will attempt another fix for this issue.
We will inform you via a Scheduled Update Notice as soon as this issue is resolved.

[Future Measures]
Include tests for pending purchases as well when changing Shop-related logic

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Notice: Feb. 20th Scheduled Update Additional Error Fix
content:
[Notice: Feb. 20th Scheduled Update Additional Error Fix]

Hello, this is Project Moon.

The following are additional bug fixes for the Feb. 20th Scheduled Update.

※ Our priority in these changes has been to maintain the current difficulty and player experience as much as possible.

►Fixed the 'This Unforgivable Sin...' Skill error for an enemy appearing in Stage 7-36
- Before : '[Clash Lose] Gain +1 Bleed Count' did not activate
- After : '[Clash Lose] Gain +1 Bleed Count' text removed

►Fixed the 'The Deserved Penance...' Skill error for an enemy appearing in Stage 7-36
- Before : '[Clash Lose] Gain +1 Bleed Count' did not activate
- After : '[Clash Lose] Gain +1 Bleed Count' text removed

►Fixed the 'Did you think about blood today?' Skill error for an enemy appearing in Stage 7-36
- Before : '[On Hit] Gain 1 Ailing Heart and Bloodied Hand' gained 2 of each instead
- After : '[On Hit] Gain 2 Ailing Heart and Bloodied Hand' - adjusted the text to match the effects

►Fixed the 'More, more blood...!' Skill error for an enemy appearing in Stage 7-36
- Before : The '[On Use] Consume up to 50 Bloodfeast and gain 1 Bloodied hand for every 10 Bloodfeast consumed' effect consumed and gained an abnormally high amount of resources
- After : Adjusted the effects to match the text, as both values were abnormally high

►Fixed the 'How Bountiful...' Skill error for an enemy appearing in Stage 7-36
- Before : '[On Use] If the target has 6+ Bleed, Coin Power +1' measured the Bleed on self instead
- After : Because this was not the intended effect, the effect was adjusted to match the text

►Fixed the 'How Bountiful...' Skill error for an enemy appearing in Stage 7-36
- Before : The '[On Use] Consume up to 30 Bloodfeast: gain Coin Power +1 for every Bloodfeast consumed' effect expired after the first Coin attack
- After : Adjusted the text to match the current effects

►Fixed the 'Sacrifice for the Family' Skill error for an enemy appearing in Stage 7-36
- Before : The [On Use] effect activated at [Combat Start] instead
- After : Changed the text to [Combat Start]

►Fixed the 'Ailing Heart' Buff error for an enemy appearing in Stage 7-36
- Before : The 'At 10 Stack: On Hit, gain 2 Bloodied Hand' effect description was missing
- After : Added the missing description to the 'Ailing Heart' buff description

►Fixed the 'Bloodied Hand II' Buff error for an enemy appearing in Stage 7-36
- Before : The effects that inflict Rupture and Bleed On Hit activate only at 30 Stack
- After : Adjusted the text to match the current effects

►Fixed the 'Cascading Gloom' Skill error for the 'Peccatulum Morositatis??' enemy
- Before : The '[On Hit] Inflict 5 Sinking and +4 Sinking Count' effect activated against 2 random enemies
- After : Adjusted the effects to match the texts, as it was an unintended error

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Notice: Refraction Railway Line 5 Optimization Issues
content:
[Notice: Refraction Railway Line 5 Optimization Issues]

iOS) We have identified an issue where the game may crash in Section 3 of the Refraction Railway Line 5 when played on a device with 4GB or less RAM.
The same issue may occur on other non-iOS mobile devices with 4GB or less RAM.
We have investigated this issue, and discovered several points where unintentional RAM usage spikes occur. The following are the said points:

- Instances of effect objects for certain Identities or Peccatula Invidiae that has taken the form of certain Identities
- In-game font resource loading duplication
- Certain dead characters' resources lingering in RAM

We are currently working to improve optimization for devices with 4GB or less RAM by resolving the above issues.
Please note this information before entering Refraction Railway Line 5 with devices with the above settings,
and for now, we would like to recommend using devices with more RAM for Line 5.

We will keep you updated on the progress and deployment status of our optimization process with our future update notices.
We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: New Content - Refraction Railway Line 5
content:
---------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

New Content <Refraction Railway Line 5> will be added to the game with the Feb. 20th, 2024 (KST) Scheduled Update.

<Unlock Conditions>
Clear Main Story 7-36

<Event Description>
- Refraction Railway Line 5 is composed of 3 total Sections, and you will face highly difficult encounters in all of them. More rewards can be claimed the further you progress into the Refraction Railway.

- If you have achieved certain conditions before clearing the final Section, you will be rewarded with a Special Decorative Banner.

- Refraction Railway Line 5 will end with the start of Refraction Railway Line 6.

<About Refraction Railway Line 4 Rewards>
Any rewards you have not claimed from Line 4 Lost & Found will be lost with the start of Refraction Railway Line 5. (Unclaimed rewards will not be delivered to your inbox either.)

If you haven't yet claimed your Line 4 rewards, please claim them before the Feb. 20th Scheduled Update.

Content Details
---------------

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

- <Refraction Railway Line 5> will open after completing Main Story 7-36, and can be accessed via the 'Drive' menu.

- As long as Line 5 is active, it can be accessed anytime without spending any resources. Line 5 will close upon the opening of <Refraction Railway Line 6>.

- You can spend a certain number of Modules(only for the first time) at the Lost & Found to claim your Refraction Railway rewards.

Recommended Upgrade Levels
--------------------------

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

- The recommended upgrade levels for Refraction Railway Line 5 are: Identity Uptie Tier 4, Level 50, and E.G.O Threadspin Tier 4. The Refraction Railway presents a very difficult series of battles; we strongly recommend that you enter the Railway after meeting the above conditions.

- Any Level Ups, Upties, or Threadspinnings performed after entry will be reflected in your current loadout within the Refraction Railway as well.

About Line 5
------------

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

- Line 5 is comprised of 3 different 'Sections'. Each Section is composed of 3 or more Stations(waves), and you may freely adjust your loadout before entering each Section. If you are having difficulties with progressing, perhaps changing up your loadout may be an effective choice.

- Clearing the Section will record your Clear Turn Count. With it, the Total Turn Count will also be saved. The Total Turn Count is the sum of all Clear Turn Counts from each Section, from Section 1 to your current Section.

- Below each Section, you can view the rewards for clearing that Section. Claim them at the Lost & Found.

- Any remaining E.G.O Resource after the Section can be used in the subsequent Section.

- Entering a new Section revives all defeated allies, fully heals all wounded Identities, and resets SP to 0.

- During an expedition, you can choose to start over from previously cleared Stages/Sections in order to reduce your Total Turn Count. When you do so, the Stage will start with the Sinners' statuses and E.G.O resources reverted to that point, and any progress you've made since that Section will be reset.

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

- Please note that any Identities that participated in Section 1 cannot participate in Section 2.

- Please note that there are no Identity restrictions in Section 3, however, so you may use any Identities that have been used previously in Section 1 and 2.

Loadouts
--------

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

- Refraction Railway Line 5 uses the 'Chain Battle' system. In Chain Battles, when a Deployed unit is defeated, the Backup units will fill their spots in their own Deployment orders.

- You cannot enter the Encounter until all 6 Deployment units and 6 Backup units have been selected.

- Backup units receive bonus Starting SP. Minus Coin Identities gain negative Starting SP buffs.

► Buffs

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

- When an allied Identity is killed, you will obtain E.G.O resources corresponding to the ranks and Affinities of their Base Attack Skills.

- Select the question-mark shaped [Active Effects] icon to view Buffs and Trials currently active on allies and enemies. This information can also be viewed by checking the buff icon below allies and enemies.

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

- You may select a special buff at the end of each wave. However, each buff comes with Trial effects that buff the enemies.

- Selected Buffs and Trials will be active throughout the Line 5 run.

- Trials attached to each Buffs are all fixed.

Focused Encounters
------------------

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

- Every battle in the Refraction Railway will allow you to directly match ally skills against enemy skills, just like in Focused Encounters.

► Chain Battles

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

- When a Deployed unit is defeated, the Backup unit will fill their spot in the Deployment order.

- When a Backup unit is Deployed into battle, its Combat Passive activates instead of its Support Passive. When a Deployed unit is defeated, its Support Passive will activate instead of its Combat Passive.

- Certain enemies in Line 5 will be affected by their own Deployment orders as well.

Combat Progression
------------------

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

You can choose to forfeit or retry a stage in the middle of an Encounter. Please note that choosing to forfeit or retry the Stage will reset the entire Section and that you will have to start over from the very first wave.

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

If all of your allies are defeated, you can choose between returning to the Team Loadout menu to change your Deployment orders or immediately retrying the battle from wave 1.

Observation Logs
----------------

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

- Save for the Boss enemy of each final wave, all enemy info will be unlocked for viewing from the start. Prepare the appropriate strategy, Identity, and E.G.O loadout based on this information.

- In Line 5, damage bonus based on Observation Levels does not apply in the Refraction Railway.

- In Line 5, the updated Observation Level will be saved even if you give up or retry mid-Encounter.

Clear Info
----------

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

After clearing each Section, you can view statistics such as the obtained Buffs, Trials, and participating Identities in the Clear Info menu.

Claiming Rewards
----------------

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

- After clearing a Station for the first time during the event period, rewards from them will be sent to the "Lost & Found".

- To access the "Lost & Found" for the first time, a certain number of Enkephalin Modules will be required. Rewards that can be claimed afterward are free of charge.

- You can earn various level-up and extraction currencies here. Special rewards include 「Level Boost Ticket V」, 「Season 5 - 3★ Guarantee Decaextraction Ticket」, 「Refraction Railway Line 5 Themed Ticket Deco」.

Special Decorative Banners
--------------------------

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

- Here, you can view the acquisition conditions for Refraction Railway Line 5 Banners. The harder the conditions, the more elaborate your Banner will be.

- Once you obtain a Banner, the Turn Count of your best record for each Section and total turns will be displayed on it. If there are records with the same number of total turns, it will display the more recent record.

- The highest Turn Count that can be recorded in each Section is 100 Turns. If your Turn Count goes beyond 100 Turns in a single Stage, the Encounter will end in defeat.

Records
-------

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

- Your stats will be recorded upon clearing Section 3, which can be viewed from your Travel Collection during the Refraction Railway's runtime.

- Up to 20 records can be saved. If you have more than 20 records, records with the highest Total Turns will be deleted first.

- The date of completion, Total Turns taken, used Identities, and damage output statistics will be displayed in your Logs (Travel Collection).

- You can view only your own records in the Travel Collection

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

More detailed information for each run can be viewed here.

► (JP Only) Fixed an issue where certain letters on Lobotomy E.G.O::Solemn Lament Yi Sang's Passive 'ISeeTheISeeTheDyingButterfly.' did not load properly

► (JP Only) Fixed an issue where translations for Lobotomy E.G.O::Lantern Don Quixote's certain post-uptie voicelines were missing

► Fixed an issue where Kurokumo Clan Captain Ishmael's unique voiceline would play even when the conditions aren't met

► Fixed an issue where, for the Full-Stop Office Fixer Heathcliff Identity's acquisition cutscene, a part of the image appears uncolored

► Fixed an issue where a 5-36 mid-boss enemy's Skill 'Piercing Harpoon' had incorrect Coins listed for certain activation texts
- Before: Coins III, IV
- After: Coins II , III

► Fixed an issue where the 'Spite-driven' Passive from Stage 6-34 enemy does not work properly
(1) Fixed an issue where 'If this unit failed to land a hit on Heathcliff by Skill End, lose 1 Explosive Emotion' effect did not activate
(2) Fixed an issue where 'If this unit is Staggered at Turn Start, lose 3 Explosive Emotion at Turn End' effect did not work properly
※ We have adjusted the text to match its current behavior: "If this unit is Staggered at Turn End, lose 3 Explosive Emotion"

► Fixed an issue where a certain boss in the Mirror Dungeon Theme Pack 'The Heartbreaking' were missing certain passives
※ Relevant Passives: Fathomless Wrath, Moment of Vengeance

► Fixed an issue where the E.G.O Gift 'Smokes and Wires' Upgrade Tier 1 & 2 were missing "Against enemies," text in its description
※ The actual effects were working as intended by the recent Gift renewal.

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Addressed an issue where the description boxes in the E.G.O Gift Enhancement menu in the Mirror Dungeon Shops had slightly different text box sizes

► Fixed an issue where the Mirror Dungeon Theme Pack Compendium for the NORMAL Difficulty featured the Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones BokGak Theme Pack

► Fixed an issue where the Mirror Dungeon Theme Pack Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones BokGak listed an incorrect enemy image for its boss list

► Fixed an issue where, in the Mirror Dungeon 'Portrait of a Certain Day' Choice Event, the "Say that it's too dusty to tell." response listed incorrect Sin Affinity hints

► Fixed an issue where, among the Mirror Dungeon 'The 5th Walpurgis Night' Choice Events, some of them did not apply the appropriate penalty modifiers when using the incorrect Sin Affinity for the Choice Event

► (JP Only) Fixed an issue where the E.G.O Gift Fractured Blade had an incorrect description
- Before: 黒雲回
- After: 黒雲会

► Fixed an issue where a certain Skill used by Jun in Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones Hard Difficulty did not use a special custom animation

► Fixed an issue where certain Sinners used incorrect E.G.O Skill voicelines in the Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones Hard Difficulty Combat Encounters

► Fixed an issue where the description and the example image did not match in the Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones BokGak Event Tutorials

► Fixed an issue where certain CG images in Stage 7.5-5 were incorrectly applied

► Fixed an issue where the end credits CG image in the post Canto 7 Clear was incorrectly applied

► Fixed an issue where having two different LCB Regular Check-up Banner items equipped could cause the in-game notification marker to be hidden

► Fixed an issue where, in certain circumstances, the LCB Regular Check-up and Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones BokGak Bonus icons would load incorrectly

► (KR, EN) Fixed minor typos in the story text

► (EN Only) Adjusted the Japanese-to-English transliteration for '흑운도(Dark Cloud Blade)'
※ Changes: Kokuundō → Kokuuntō

► (EN Only) Improved legibility of the announcer 'Pierre/Jack'

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content; Lunacy x300

title: Issues Fixed & Identified in Feb. 6th Scheduled Update
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

We would like to inform you of the issues that have been fixed and issues that have been identified in the Feb. 6th, 2025 (KST) Scheduled Update.

1. Bug Fixes & Notices
<Bug List>
► An issue where, in the Mirror Dungeon - Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones Theme Pack, the event currency(Bloodied Scabbard) could not be obtained
This issue was corrected with a hotfix at Feb. 6th 2025, 13:55(KST), without needing a separate update or a game restart.
Any event currency you could not obtain due to this error upon clearing the Mirror Dungeon will be sent to your accounts.
However, please note that it will take some time for the event currency to be distributed; we will inform you via a separate notice once it is complete.

► An issue where deploying Blade Lineage/Kurokumo Clan Identities would give increased LCB Regular Check-up Event Currencies(Amassed Data) instead
This issue was corrected with a hotfix at Feb. 6th 2025, 15:15(KST), without needing a separate update or a game restart.
Any event currency obtained due to this error will be withdrawn from your account.
However, please note that it will take some time for the event currency to be withdrawn; we will inform you via a separate notice once it is complete.

► An issue where, in the Yield My Flesh To Claim Their Bones Story Mirror Dungeon, the new E.G.O Gifts could not be obtained or Fused
This issue was corrected with a hotfix at Feb. 6th 2025, 13:55(KST), without needing a separate update or a game restart.

► An issue where, in the Mirror Dungeon, the 'Cloudpattern Gourd Bottle' E.G.O Gift could not be obtained from the 'Perfected Possibility' effect
This issue was corrected with a hotfix at Feb. 6th 2025, 15:15(KST), without needing a separate update or a game restart.

This was due to a side effect caused by adjusting the spawn rates for the E.G.O Gift to appear in the Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones Theme Pack as well; we have removed the rate up bonus for this E.G.O Gift in the said Theme Pack to address this issue.

► An issue where, in the Story Mirror Dungeon, the fusion recipes use previous Mirror Dungeon's recipes
As the Story Mirror Dungeons in these rerun events use the previous Season's Mirror Dungeon structure, they still use the same Fusion recipes for E.G.O Gifts.
This will be maintained for the current existing Story Mirror Dungeons,
but starting from the Ch. 6.5 - Timekilling Time BokGak event, Story Mirror Dungeons going forward will be changed into Story Dungeons like the one featured in Ch. 7.5 - LCB Regular Check-up.

2. Issues currently under investigation
► An issue where, in rare instances, in the Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones Story Mirror Dungeon & the Mirror Dungeon, the E.G.O Gifts Ragged Bamboo Hat, Old Dopo Robe, Fractured Blade, and Broken Blade cannot be obtained from Gift Fusions
We are currently investigating the cause of this issue.
We will deploy a fix as soon as the cause is identified, and when the fix is deployed, we will inform you via an update notice.

3. Known Issues
The following are known issues that will be corrected with the next Scheduled Update.
<Known Issues List>
► An issue where, in the Mirror Dungeon, the Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones BokGak Theme Pack is listed under NORMAL Theme Pack Compendium

► An issue where, in the Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones BokGak Event, the tutorial text does not match the example images

► An issue Jun's certain Skill does not trigger the appropriate animation in the Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones Hard difficulty encounter

► An issue where, under certain circumstances, the LCB Regular Check-up and Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones BokGak Bonus Units' icons do not load properly.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

<Error Compensation>
- Compensation : Lunacy x300
- Recipients: All users whose accounts were created before Feb. 13th 2025, 10:00
- When: After Feb. 6th (Thu) 18:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account
- Compensation can be claimed until Feb. 13th (Thu) 2025, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

title: Intro to Upcoming Feb. 22nd Content - Ch.5.5: Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones
content:
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

With the Feb. 22nd, 2024 (KST) Update, new content [Ch. 5.5 - Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones] will be added to the game.

- Duration : 2024/2/22 12:00 (KST) ~ Before 3/21 Scheduled Update
- Event Rewards Exchange : 2024/2/22 12:00 (KST) ~ Before 3/28 Scheduled Update
- Requirements : Clear Main Story 5.5-12

※ The Event Duration & Rewards Exchange date labeling in the in-game UI is currently displayed with a specific time; it will be corrected to reflect the schedule written here with the Feb. 29th Scheduled Update. We apologize for the inconvenience.

Event Description
-----------------

- When the event starts, the [Ch. 5.5: Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones] Event Page will open.
- During the event period, you can earn [Bloodied Scabbard] by clearing Mirror Dungeons and the event Stages & Dungeon.
- You can redeem various rewards from the [Reward Exchange] by spending the [Bloodied Scabbard] that you have collected.

Event Gameplay
--------------

<Bloodied Scabbard>
► Combat Encounters of ‘Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones’

You can obtain [Bloodied Scabbard] every time you complete a combat Encounter of ‘Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones’. Each Encounter has a first-time reward, and with it you can obtain even more [Bloodied Scabbard].

The final Stage of ‘Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones’ is a repeatable Dungeon, and is similar in progression to a Mirror Dungeon. That final Stage will have a higher Enkephalin-to-[Bloodied Scabbard] ratio, so it will be much more effective as a means of collecting [Bloodied Scabbard].

※ Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones Event Dungeon takes after Mirror Dungeon 3 - Mirror of the Lake.
The Mirror of the Lake Starter Buffs do not apply within the Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones Dungeon, and the following will apply to all runs.

- Starting E.G.O Gifts
- Gift Appearance Rates : The same as unlocking 'A Journey's Start' and all of its secondary Buffs
- Starting E.G.O Gift for each category : 3
- Appearing Gifts : Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones exclusive E.G.O Gifts + All Mirror Dungeon E.G.O Gifts

- Shops
- Gift Appearance Rates : The same as unlocking 'Seize the Opportunity'(Floor 4~5 Rates) and all of its secondary Buffs
- Gifts on Display per Visit : 5 Gifts

These are identical to unlocking [A Journey's Start], [Fruits of Labor], [New Discovery], [Seize the Opportunity(Floor 4~5 Rates)], and [Just In Case] Starter Buffs down to the Secondary Buffs.
In the Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones event Dungeon, the Shop and the Rest Stop will be available immediately before the Boss room, in that order.

Event Gameplay
--------------

► Mirror Dungeons

During the Event Period, 'Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones' combat Encounters and Events will appear in the Mirror Dungeon.
※ You will be able to experience Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones event combat Encounters and Events regardless of your Main Story progress.

Upon clearing the Mirror Dungeon, you can earn [Bloodied Sack] proportional to the number of 'Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones' Encounters and Events you've completed through the run.

On the final floor of a Mirror Dungeon run, you can choose between the previously existing Mirror Dungeon final boss encounters and the Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones final boss encounter. Selecting the Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones final boss encounter will net you even more [Bloodied Scabbard].

Spending the Hard Difficulty Rewards chance for the week will net you much more [Bloodied Scabbard].
※ If you claim the rewards without using the Hard Difficulty reward chance for the week, your Hard Difficulty Rewards will be the same as the Normal Difficulty Rewards, just like the Pass EXP gain.

During the event period, the Shop and the Rest Stop will be available immediately before the Boss room of the Mirror Dungeon Normal Difficulty as well.

► Main Story (Canto 1 ~ Canto 5.5 Miracle in District 20)

If you have not fulfilled the event unlock requirements, you can obtain [Bloodied Scabbard] as a first-time reward from Main Story Combat Encounters.
Upon first-time-completion of an Encounter, you can obtain [Bloodied Scabbard] proportional to the amount of Enkephalin spent regardless of whether you've met the EX Clear conditions or not.
※ You cannot obtain [Bloodied Scabbard] from stages that have already been completed.
※ You cannot obtain [Bloodied Scabbard] from Luxcavations.

Event Currency
--------------

During the event, you can earn [Bloodied Scabbard] by clearing event Stages and Dungeons. You can also obtain [Bloodied Scabbard] by clearing Main Story Stages or Dungeons for the first time, or clearing the Mirror Dungeon.
Rarely, you may obtain [Resentful Scabbard] from clearing Event Stages, Main Story Stages, or Mirror Dungeons, and [Resentful Scabbard] is automatically converted to 20 [Bloodied Scabbard] upon acquisition.
In the [Reward Exchange] window, you can purchase various rewards by spending [Bloodied Scabbard] you have collected.

If you have cleared the ‘Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones’ Stages, Mirror Dungeons, and Main Story (Chapter 1 ~ 5.5), you can start finding [Resentful Scabbard].

[Resentful Scabbard] has the highest chance to drop from the final Encounter of the event. The chance for it to drop in other Encounters is the same across all Encounters.

[Resentful Scabbard] is automatically converted to 20 [Bloodied Scabbard] in the Results or the Rewards screen upon acquisition.

Event Bonus Identities
----------------------

Obtain more [Bloodied Scabbard] by completing Event Encounters or Mirror Dungeons while equipped with Event Bonus Identities.

<Event Bonus Identities>
- 30% Bonus
- 3★ : Blade Lineage Mentor Meursault, Blade Lineage Salsu Faust
- 2★ : Blade Lineage Salsu Don Quixote, Kurokumo Clan Captain Gregor

- 20% Bonus
- 3★ : Blade Lineage Salsu Yi Sang, Blade Lineage Salsu Sinclair, Kurokumo Clan Wakashu Ryōshū, Kurokumo Clan Wakashu Rodion
- 2★ : Blade Lineage Salsu Outis, Kurokumo Clan Wakashu Hong Lu

- The Event Currency Bonus from each Identity is additive. (Rounded up) Event Currency Bonus maxes out at 120% Bonus.
- Event Bonus Identities don't actually have to participate in a battle; you can earn the bonus currency simply by having them in your Team loadout.
- Event Currency Bonus applies to first-time clear rewards as well.

Event Rewards
-------------

- At the [Rewards Exchange], you can spend [Bloodied Scabbard] you've collected to purchase various rewards.
- The highest number of [Bloodied Scabbard] that can be obtained is 4,000. Every reward in the Reward Exchange will be obtainable at that point.
- [Bloodied Scabbard] will no longer be obtainable once the Event closes after the Mar. 21st Scheduled Update.
- [Reward Exchange] will be open for 5 weeks, from Feb. 22nd 12:00 (KST) ~ Mar. 28th Scheduled Update.
- Even after the event fully ends, you will be able to experience Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones combat Encounters and view its story anytime at Driverside and Theater - [Detour Tales].

title: Notice: Additional Bug Fix in Feb. 6th Scheduled Update
content:
-------------------------------------------------------

Hello, this is Project Moon.
The following is an additional bug fix that will be deployed with the Feb. 6th Scheduled Update.

List
----

- Fixed an issue where the max damage modifier cap for LCE E.G.O::Ardor Blossom Star Faust Identity's Skill 'A.B.S Max Attunement [Degraded Corrosion] Skill's effect '[On Use] Deal +12.5% more damage for every 5 Burn on self (max 50%)' did not work

- Before: because the 'max 50%' cap did not work, if the unit had more than 20 Burn Potency, the damage modifier would exceed 50%
- After: the damage modifier cap works properly; even if the unit exceeds 20 Burn Potency, the damage modifier would be capped at 50%

※ Because we have been adjusting the effects to match the descriptions in cases of similar issues, save for certain exceptions, the effects will be adjusted to match the texts this time as well. We are deeply sorry for causing disappointment to managers who have been using LCE E.G.O::Ardor Blossom Star Faust Identity by fixing the error in which A.B.S Max Attunement [Degraded Corrosion] Skill damage modifier cap did not work.

Going forward, we will reinforce our testing procedure by adding a verification step during our testing phase to verify the Minimum, Variable, and Maximum possible damage outputs that may vary depending on a certain stack, and minimize occurrences of similar issues.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

Error Compensation
------------------

- Content: Lunacy x500
- Recipients: All users whose accounts were created before Feb. 6th 2025, 10:00
- When: After Feb. 6th 2025, 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per Account

Error Compensation can be claimed until Feb. 13th (Thu) 2025, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.

- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.

- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

content:
--------------------------------------

Greetings, dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on Feb. 6th, 2025 (KST).

Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.

Please refer below for details about the update.

※ Please note that there won't be a separate maintenance period on Jan. 30, 2025 due to the Seollal/Lunar New Year holidays.

New Content
-----------

1. New Target Extraction [Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones BokGak] (25/02/06 12:00 ~ 02/20 10:00 (KST))
The following Identity will have increased odds of extraction.
- 3★ : Kurokumo Clan Captain Ishmael

※ Kurokumo Clan Captain Ishmael counts as a Season 5 Event Identity.

2. Target Extraction [Blade Lineage & Kurokumo Clan] (25/02/06 12:00 ~ 02/20 10:00 (KST))
The following Identities will have increased odds of extraction.
- 3★ : Kurokumo Clan Captain Ishmael, Blade Lineage Mentor Meursault, Blade Lineage Salsu Faust, Blade Lineage Salsu Yi Sang, Kurokumo Clan Wakashu Ryōshū, Kurokumo Clan Wakashu Rodion, Blade Lineage Salsu Sinclair
- 2★ : Kurokumo Clan Captain Gregor, Blade Lineage Salsu Don Quixote, Kurokumo Clan Wakashu Hong Lu, Blade Lineage Salsu Outis

※ The 2★ Identity, 'Blade Lineage Salsu Don Quixote', can be obtained from the Reward Exchange shop of the upcoming Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones event. While 'Blade Lineage Salsu Don Quixote' is available from Target Extraction: [Blade Lineage & Kurokumo Clan], please note that she is much more easily obtained via the Event Reward Exchange Shop.

3. New Announcer Extractions
The two following Announcers will be added to the list of extractable Announcers from the following Extractions.

► New Announcers
- Aeng-du Announcer
- Jun Announcer

► Featured Target Extractions
- Standard Fare
- New Target Extraction [Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones BokGak]
- Target Extraction [Blade Lineage & Kurokumo Clan]

► Featured Period : 25/02/06 12:00 ~ 02/20 10:00 (KST)

※ These Announcers will no longer appear from Extractions once this Extraction period is over. However, please note that they can be obtained via future Target Extraction Yisang Exchanges. (Not from Standard Fare exhanges, however, as it does not offer Yisang Exchange)

4. New Identity Added
The following Identity is added to the list of extractable Identities & E.G.O.
- 3★ : Kurokumo Clan Captain Ishmael

New Content
-----------

5. New Content [Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones BokGak]
※ Please refer to the Steam Announcements page for more information

6. New Packages
2 new limited packages will be added to the game with the 2025. 2. 6 (KST) Scheduled Update.

► Target Extraction Pack
- Contents: Decaextraction Ticket x 4
- Price: ￦33,000 / $21.99 / ¥3,000
- Purchase: Can be purchased only once
- Purchasable Period: 25. 2. 6 12:00 ~ 2. 20 10:00 (KST)

► Identity Growth Pack
- Contents: Takeoff Module - ID Uptie x 1, Identity Training Ticket IV x 50, Identity Training Ticket III x 20
- Price: ￦33,000 / $21.99 / ¥3,000
- Purchase: Can be purchased twice
- Purchasable Period: 25. 2. 6 12:00 ~ 2. 20 10:00 (KST)

Major Changes
-------------

1. E.G.O Gift Ability Adjustments
Functions of the following E.G.O Gifts will be partially adjusted.

► Gift Capability Adjustments
- Affected Gifts: Broken Greatsword, Dueling Manual Book 3, Book of Vengeance, Sundered Memory, Punctured Memory, Crushed Memory, Bloody Mist, Fragment of Hellfire, Fragment of Allurement, Fragment of Inertia, Fragment of Desire, Fragment of Decay, Fragment of Conceit, Fragment of Friction, Fragment of Impending Wave, Distant Star

► Keyword Adjustments
- Affected Gifts: Cetacean Heart, Manor-shaped Music Box, Refraction Glass Pod, La Manchaland All-day Pass, Token of Victory, Mask of the Parade, Unhatched Embers, Handheld Mirror, Jolly Plushie

► Specified targeting conditionals for certain effects
※ We have added the condition "against enemies" to ensure that certain debuff-inflicting effects don't apply to effects gained by allies.
- Affected Gifts: Smokes and Wires, Filial Love, Bloody Mist, Hot 'n Juicy Drumstick, Dry-to-the-Bone Breast

※ Adjustments for E.G.O Gifts with "Encounter Start: Activates when X or more Identities have Attack Skills that inflict(or gain) [Status Effect or Buff]" conditionals will be deployed with a future update.

We will inform you via a Scheduled Update Notice when this particular round of adjustments is deployed.

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► (EN Only) Fixed an issue where a part of Ryōshū E.G.O - Contempt, Awe Passive 'Mark of the Gaze' was missing a description in the translation
- Before : Whenever this unit uses a base Attack Skill against an enemy, gain 1 additional E.G.O resource for a random, least-owned Affinity that doesn't correspond to the Affinity of the Attack Skill used
- After : Whenever this unit uses a base Attack Skill against an enemy, gain 1 additional E.G.O resource for a random, least-owned Affinity that doesn't correspond to the Affinity of the Attack Skill used ('2 times per turn')
※ We have identified an incorrect translation in Ryōshū's E.G.O Contempt, Awe. In our translation tool, we have added a function to display an alert when the "per turn" conditional text is missing in the target language. With this measure and additional care, we will make sure that no same description error will occur again in the translation process. We sincerely apologize for causing confusion regarding evaluating the E.G.O's abilities with this translation error.

► Fixed an issue where, on the first Turn Start of an Encounter, an abnormal VFX appears on Full-Stop Office Fixer Heathcliff
