title: New Content - Ch.5.5 - Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones BokGak
content:
-----------------------------------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

With the Feb. 6th, 2025 (KST) Update, new content [Ch 5.5 - Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones BokGak] will be added to the game.

- Duration
2025/2/6 12:00 (KST) ~ Before 3/6 (KST) Scheduled Update

- Event Rewards Exchange
2025/2/6 12:00 (KST) ~ Before 3/13 (KST) Scheduled Update

- Requirements
- Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones Event Banner: Clear Main Story 0-4 (Tutorial)
- Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones (Normal Difficulty): Clear Main Story 5.5-12
Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones (Hard Difficulty): Clear Main Story 6-48

Description
-----------

- When the event starts, the [Ch. 5.5 - Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones] Event Page will open.

- During the event period, you can earn [Bloodied Scabbard] by clearing the Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones BokGak Event Stages & the Mirror Dungeons.

- Voices will be added to the Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones story, and you can access the Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones Hard Difficulty Stages during the event period.

- You can redeem various rewards from the [Reward Exchange] by spending the event currency that you have collected.

Event Gameplay
--------------

► Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones Story
Voices will be added to the story of Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones.

► Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones Combat Stages
You can obtain [Bloodied Scabbard] every time you complete a combat Encounter of ‘Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones’. Each Encounter has a first-time reward; with it, you can obtain even more [Bloodied Scabbard]. However, if you had previously cleared the Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones Stages, you cannot obtain additional first-time rewards.

The final Combat Stage of the Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones event costs an Enkephalin Module. That final Stage will have a higher Enkephalin-to-[Bloodied Scabbard] ratio, so it will be much more effective as a means of collecting [Bloodied Scabbard].

► Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones Combat Stages (Hard Difficulty)
Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones Hard Difficulty will become available during the Event period. Clearing Main Story Stage 6-48 will unlock the Hard Difficulty. Earn even more [Bloodied Scabbard] by playing through the Hard Difficulty. You can earn first-time Clear rewards (including the Event currency), EX-Clear rewards, and Chapter Progression by clearing the Hard Difficulty Stages as well.

Event Gameplay
--------------

► Mirror Dungeon

During the Event Period, [Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones BokGak Theme Pack] will have a fixed appearance on Floor 4~5 of the Mirror Dungeon Hard Difficulty. The said Theme Pack features exclusive Choice Events and E.G.O Gifts.

※ The Preexisting [Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones Theme Pack] will not be changed.
※ The same Theme Pack will not appear twice in the same run once completed.
※ Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones Theme Pack will no longer have a fixed appearance once the Event ends, and may appear on different floors.

Clearing a Mirror Dungeon run will net you [Bloodied Scabbard]. Selecting the [Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones] or [Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones BokGak] Theme Packs will net you even more [Bloodied Scabbard]. The Theme Pack in the Hard Difficulty yields much more Event currency than the Normal Difficulty.

※ Please note that the Weekly Bonus does not affect the amount of Event currency gained.
※ Please note that, if you have started a Mirror Dungeon run before the event started, you will not gain event currency from that run.

► Main Story
Managers who have not met the Event unlock conditions can obtain [Bloodied Scabbard] as a first-time reward from Main Story Combat Encounters. Upon your first-time clear of an Encounter, you can obtain [Bloodied Scabbard] proportional to the amount of Enkephalin Spent regardless of whether you’ve met the EX Clear Conditions or not.

※ You cannot obtain the event currency from stages that have already been completed.
※ You cannot obtain [Bloodied Scabbard] from Luxcavations or the Refraction Railway.

Event Currency
--------------

In rare cases, clearing the ‘Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones’ Stages, the Mirror Dungeon, and the Main Story Stages will also yield [Resentful Scabbard].

[Resentful Scabbard] has the highest chance of dropping from the final Stage of the Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones BokGak Event. However, the drop chance is the same across all other Encounters.

[Resentful Scabbard] is automatically converted to 20 [Bloodied Scabbard] in the Results or the Rewards screen upon acquisition.

Event Bonus Units
-----------------

Obtain more [Bloodied Scabbard] by completing Event Encounters or the Mirror Dungeon while equipped with Event Bonus E.G.Os.

<Event Bonus E.G.Os>
- 40% Bonus
- 3★ : Kurokumo Clan Captain Ishmael, Kurokumo Clan Wakashu Heathcliff, Blade Lineage Mentor Meursault, Blade Lineage Salsu Faust

- 20% Bonus
- 3★ : Blade Lineage Salsu Yi Sang, Blade Lineage Salsu Sinclair, Kurokumo Clan Wakashu Ryōshū, Kurokumo Clan Wakashu Rodion
- 2★ : Blade Lineage Salsu Don Quixote, Blade Lineage Salsu Outis, Kurokumo Clan Captain Gregor, Kurokumo Clan Wakashu Hong Lu

※ The Event Currency Bonus from each Unit is additive. (Rounded up)
※ Event Currency Bonus maxes out at 120% Bonus.
※ Event Bonus Units don’t actually have to participate in a battle; you can earn the bonus currency simply by having them in your Team loadout.
※ Event Currency Bonus applies to first-time clear rewards and Mirror Dungeon clear rewards as well.

Event Rewards
-------------

At the [Rewards Exchange], you can spend [Bloodied Scabbard] you’ve collected to purchase various rewards. You may find the rewards from the previous Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones (Ticket Deco, cosmetic Banners, 1 Event Reward Identity) here. In addition, and a new Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones Identity will be added to the list of redeemable rewards.

※ You can no longer obtain [Bloodied Scabbard] after you obtain enough [Bloodied Scabbard] to purchase every item in the [Reward Exchange].
※ You cannot obtain duplicates of special rewards (Ticket Deco, cosmetic Banners, 1 Event Reward Identity) if you already own them.
※ [Bloodied Scabbard] will no longer be obtainable once the Event closes after the 2025/03/06 (KST) Scheduled Update.
※ [Reward Exchange] will be open for 5 weeks, from 2025/02/06 12:00 (KST) ~ 2025/03/13 (KST) Scheduled Update.
※ Even after the event fully ends, you will be able to experience the Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones Combat Encounters or view its story anytime at Drive and Theater - [Detour Tales].

title: July 10th New Content - Mirror of Immortality Hard Difficulty
content:
-------------------------------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The New Content Mirror Dungeon #6 「Mirror of Immortality - Hard Difficulty」 will be added with the July 10th, 2025 (KST) Update.

► When : After 25/7/10 (KST) Scheduled Update
※ Please note for your gameplay plans that the Mirror Dungeon will be closed from 2025. 07. 10 06:00 ~ 10:00 (KST) to process the Mirror of Immortality Hard Difficulty Update.

► Unlock Conditions : Clear Main Story 7-36

► How to enable Hard Difficulty :
Toggle the Hard Difficulty in the Theme Pack selection menu

Notes
-----

1. 「Mirror of Immortality」 Hard Difficulty will be updated.

2. Grace of Stars purchase limit is removed, and players can now enhance Grace of Stars.

3. 3 new Story-related Theme Packs and 1 Refraction Railway Theme Pack will be added.
※ These new Theme Packs appear only on Hard Difficulty runs.

4. 8 new Theme Pack exclusive E.G.O Gifts will be added.

5. 4 new Choice Events will be added.

6. Certain preexisting E.G.O Gifts will be adjusted.

Mirror Dungeon #6 Hard Major Changes
------------------------------------

The following changes will be coming to Mirror Dungeon #6 Hard Difficulty.

► Grace of the Immortal Star

<Major Changes>

1. Grace of Stars purchase cap will be removed.
- Before: Players could purchase up to 120 (Base 60 + Starlight Bonus 60) Starlight worth of Grace of Stars.
- After: In addition to 120(Base 60 + Starlight Bonus 60) Starlight, players can spend the rest of their Starlight reserve as well to purchase Grace of Stars.

※ When purchasing Grace of the Immortal Star, the initial ~120 source of Starlight will be consumed first; it will dip into your Starlight reserve only when spending beyond what is available.

2. Grace of Stars can now be enhanced.
Each Grace now has up to two more enhancement stages.
However, please note that Starlight cost increases based on each Grace's enhancement stage.

※ Selecting every Grace of the Immortal Star and enhancing them up to Stage 2(++) will consume 930 Starlight.

Mirror Dungeon #6 Hard Major Changes
------------------------------------

► Theme Pack Difficulty Selection

Select the Difficulty Toggle button on the top right side of the Theme Pack menu to switch between two difficulties. Hard Difficulty features Theme Packs of greater challenge compared to the Normal Difficulty. Hard Difficulty displays a total of 4 E.G.O Gifts.

<Major Changes>

1. New Theme Packs Added

3 new story-related Theme Packs and 1 new Refraction Railway Theme Pack will be added.
The new Refraction Railway Theme Pack is a “Long Battle” Pack.
Long Battle Packs feature only a single, but lengthy, boss fight.
※ The Shop and Choice Event Encounters still appear in these Packs, separate to the combat Encounter.

Clearing a “Long Battle” Pack increases the level of Identities in your Team by 3.
※ This effect applies only to the Dungeon.

2. New E.G.O Gifts Added

8 new Theme Pack exclusive E.G.O Gifts will be added.
They will be available only from the new Theme Pack.
※ The new E.G.O Gifts are available only from the Hard Difficulty.
2 E.G.O Gifts will be added each for the following categories: Bleed, Poise, Rupture, and Keywordless.

3. New Choice Events Added
4 new Choice Event Encounters are added from which you can find new E.G.O Gifts.
※ The new Choice Event Encounters are available only from the Hard Difficulty.

Mirror Dungeon #6 Hard Major Changes
------------------------------------

► Identity Level Upon Entry
Upon entry, Hard Difficulty reflects your Identities' current levels.

- Mirror Dungeon #6 Hard : Reflects your Identities' current levels. Does not reflect levels beyond 55. (however, in the Mirror Dungeon, there may be ways to raise your Identities' levels beyond that limit)
- Mirror Dungeon #6 Normal : Identity levels fixed to 55.
※ Just like in previous Mirror Dungeons, Uptie & Threadspinning Tiers reflect your Identities & E.G.Os' actual Tiers.

► Encounter Reward Cost
Hard Difficulty Encounters yield much more Cost compared to Normal Difficulty Encounters.
The harder the Encounter, the greater the Cost reward.

► Unpredictable Future

In the Hard difficulty, you can only view up to 2 more nodes from your current position.

► Mounting Trials & Floor Clear Rewards

You can select 2 Reward E.G.O Gifts upon clearing a Hard Difficulty Theme Pack. However, please note that you will be gaining 2 Mounting Trials linked to each E.G.O Gift as well.
Should you refuse to select any E.G.O Gifts, 2 of the given Mounting Trials will be randomly selected.

Mirror Dungeon #6 Hard Major Changes
------------------------------------

► Super Shop

There is a chance for Super Shops to appear in Hard Difficulty Theme Packs.

The more Cost you spend in a Shop, the greater the chance for a Super Shop to spawn on the next Floor.

The following are the benefits provided by Super Shops.
- E.G.O Gift Shop Selection +3
- Skill Replacement Opportunity +1 (cannot replace the Skill of the same Identity again)
- Can fuse up to 5 E.G.O Gifts in Fusion
- Greater chance for higher Tier E.G.O Gifts to appear when Fusing (Fusion Point Modifier)

► Exploration Complete
Mirror Dungeon Hard Difficulty with Weekly Bonuses yields more Battle Pass EXP compared to Mirror Dungeon Normal.
Your reward will be based on the number of your cleared Floors and the Difficulties you selected for each Floor.
※ However, without Weekly Bonuses, the clear reward between Hard and Normal are identical, just as it had been in the previous Mirror Dungeon(Mirror Dungeon #5 - Mirror of the Dreaming).

If you have selected the Hard Difficulty for every floor, you can use two or more Weekly Bonuses at once.
The maximum obtainable Reward per week is identical to the amount obtained from clearing Mirror Dungeon #5 (Mirror of the Dreaming) Hard Difficulty Floor 5.
- Using 3 Weekly Bonuses all at once: Lunacy x750, Battle Pass EXP x225
- Using 3 Weekly Bonuses one by one: Lunacy x750, Battle Pass EXP 250

<Major Changes>

1. Starlight Reward Added
Upon clearing the Mirror Dungeon, based on the number of Theme Packs cleared in the Hard Difficulty, your Starlight reward will be greatly increased. Also, clearing Refraction Railway Theme Packs, which are exclusive to Hard Difficulty runs, will each yield bonus Starlight as well.

E.G.O Gift Adjustments
----------------------

※ E.G.O Gift Adjustments Notes
1) The following adjustment descriptions are all base-level, un-enhanced versions of E.G.O Gifts.
2) We have only noted the parts of the E.G.O Gifts that are changed or added; any unlisted effects have not been adjusted.

► Hot 'n Juicy Drumstick
- Before: When inflicting Burn with skill effects, inflict +3 Burn Count.
- After: When inflicting Burn with Skill effects, inflict +3 Burn Count. (3 times per turn)

► Dry-to-the-Bone Breast
- Before: When inflicting Rupture with skill effects, inflict +3 Burn Count.
- After: When inflicting Rupture with Skill effects, inflict +3 Rupture Count. (3 times per turn)

► Glimpse of Flames
- Before: Turn End: consume half of Burn Count on enemies with Burn to deal (Burn Potency x consumed Burn Count) bonus Wrath damage. Targets lose (Burn Count consumed by Glimpse of Flames)/2 Defense Levels for the next turn. (max 3)
- After : Turn End: consume half of Burn Count on enemies with Burn to deal (Burn Potency x consumed Burn Count) bonus Wrath damage. (can consume up to 5 Burn Count) Targets lose (Burn Count consumed by Glimpse of Flames) Defense Levels for the next turn. (max 3)

► Thrill
- Before: Turn End: Inflict (Rupture Potency x Rupture Count) Gluttony damage to all enemies with 3+ Rupture Count (for Abnormalities, each Part is considered individually) then reduce Rupture Count by 2.
- After: Turn End: Inflict (Rupture Potency x Rupture Count) Gluttony damage to all enemies. (for Abnormalities, all Parts) (counts up to 5 Rupture Count)

► Ruin
- Before: If Rupture cannot be applied due to Skill effects, gain Coin Power +(4 / # of Coins) instead
- After : Coin Power +1 for Plus Coin Skills that inflict Rupture Potency, Count, or 'Unique Burst' Base Power +(4 / # of Coins) (min. 1; rounded down) for Minus Coin Skills that inflict Rupture Potency, Count, or 'Unique Burst'

► Black Sheet Music
- Before: If the Base Attack Skill hits against a target with less than 0 SP (for enemies without SP, if they have 1.2+ Gloom Resist.), inflict (Sinking Potency / 10) Gloom Affinity damage (min 1, 10 times per turn for this effect)
- After: On Hit with a Base Attack Skill: deal (Sinking Potency on target / 10) Gloom damage (min 1 damage; rounded down)
- NEW: On Hit with an Attack Skill: if the target's SP is below 0, Skill deals more damage the further the target's SP is from 0(+1% damage per SP); if the target is Panicked, Skill deals +50% damage instead
If the target does not have SP, Skill deals +1% damage for every 2 Sinking Potency on target; If target has 90+ Sinking Potency, deal +50% damage instead

E.G.O Gift Adjustments
----------------------

► T-1 Perpetual Motion Machine
- Before: Each Identity gains 1 Charge every time they consume 20 Charge Count. (2 times per Identity per Encounter; Unique Charge does not interact with this effect). After Attack of a Skill that consumed Charge Count on self: inflict (Charge - 1) Defense Level Down (5 times for each enemy per turn; can inflict up to 3 Defense Level Down at a time).
- After: Each Identity gains 1 Charge every time they consume 10 Charge Count. (5 times per Identity per Encounter; Unique Charge does not interact with this effect) Turn Start: all allies gain 1 Attack Power Up for every 2 Charge Potency on their respective selves (max 3)

► T-5 Perpetual Motion Machine
- Before: After Attack with a Skill that consumed Charge Count on self: if the target is defeated, gain + (Charge Count consumed by the Skill / 3) Charge Count; next turn, gain 1 Plus Coin Boost. (once per turn per unit) After Attack with a Skill 3 that consumed Charge Count on self: if the target is defeated, or if the ally who used the Skill is at 3+ Charge, they add 1 Skill 3 to the list of Skills for the next upcoming turn. (once per turn for each ally; Unique Charge does not interact with this effect).
- After: After Attack with a Skill 3 that consumes or gains Charge Count on self: if the target is defeated, or if the ally who used the Skill is at 3+ Charge, they add 1 Skill 3 to the list of Skills for the next upcoming turn. (once per turn for each ally)
- NEW: All allies on the field gain Self-Resonance Circuitry at Turn Start.

Self Resonance Circuitry
Total sum of Charge Count currently owned by allies: X
Cumulative Charge Count consumed by allies:
On Hit with a Skill: deal +(sum of charge count on all allies / 3)% damage
All allies gain 1 Offense Level Up for every 100 cumulative Charge Count consumed by allies

► Charge-type Gloves
※ Effects of Charge-type Gloves are untouched, save for the following addition:
NEW: [#1 Deployed Identity Exclusive Effect] Encounter Start: gain 1 Near-light Superbattery

Near-light Superbattery:
- Max Stack: 100
- When consuming Charge Count, add the amount consumed to this buff's Stack
- Max Charge Count Cap +10
- Gain 1 Charge Count when allies gain Charge Potency or Count
- When this unit consumes Charge Count with its Skills, consume the same amount of Charge Count 1 more time (when there isn't enough Charge Count, consume as much as available)
- Deal +10% damage for every 10 Stack
- Enemies gain +0.1 Resistance against this unit's attacks for every 20 Stack (max +0.5 Resist; does not activate against Staggered enemies)

- When the Identity with this effect dies, the buff transfers to the ally who is second earliest to this unit in the Deployment order. The Stack carries over as well.

E.G.O Gift Adjustments
----------------------

► Impending Wave
※ Effects of Impending Wave are untouched, save for the following addition.
- NEW: Turn Start: inflict 1 Reflux against a random enemy
When an enemy with Reflux is killed, at the next Turn Start, transfer the Reflux Stack from the said enemy to an enemy with the highest, but not maxed, Reflux Stack
Coin Power +1 for Plus Coin Skills that inflict Sinking Potency, Count, or 'Unique Sinking'
Base Power +(4 / # of Coins) (min. 1; rounded down) for Minus Coin Skills that inflict Sinking Potency, Count, or 'Unique Sinking'

- Reflux
- Max Stack: 3
When hit, gain Sinking Potency equal to Stack
Turn End: if this unit has -30 or less SP, activate the following effects (for units without SP, activates at 60+ Sinking Potency)
- Take (Sinking Potency on self x Stack) Gloom damage
- Inflict 1 Reflux against 2 other targets with the least SP (for Abnormalities, Parts); then, deal (Sinking Potency x Stack) Gloom damage to both targets, respectively

► A Certain Philosophy
- Before: If the Fusion Probability forecast is 90% or higher, make it a 100%
- After: Fix Fusion Probablility forecast to 100%

► Wholeness
- Before: If the ally is an 'N Corp. Fanatic'., gain 1 Fanatic at Turn Start, and deal +25% damage against targets with Bleed. Activate a special effect when there are 5+ 'N Corp. Fanatic' Identities(only counts Identities on the field at Encounter Start): 'N Corp. Fanatic' Identities gain Final Power +1, Plus Coin Power +1, Minus Coin Power -1, and Attack Skills inflict +1 more Nails. If an 'N Corp. Fanatic' Identity is at max SP at Turn Start, gain 3 Damage Up.
- After : N Corp. Fanatic Identities deal +25% damage against targets with Bleed and gain 1 Fanatic at Turn Start. If the said ally's SP is maxed, also gain 3 Damage Up. N Corp. Fanatic Identities gain Final Power +1, Plus Coin Power +1, Minus Coin Power -1, and their Attack Skills inflict +1 more Nails.

► Thorny Path
- Before: When activating Lust Absolute Resonance, inflict 2 Sinking Potency and +3 Sinking Count to all enemies(for Abnormalities, a random Part) at Combat Start.
- After: When activating Gloom or Lust Absolute Resonance, inflict 2 Sinking Potency and +3 Sinking Count to all enemies (for Abnormalities, a random Part) at Combat Start.

► Red Order
- Before: Allies with Wrath Affinity Attack Skills, upon inflicting Sinking Potency or Count on enemies with Skill Effects, gain 2 'Offense Level' next turn instead. (Max 4)
- After: Allies with Gloom or Wrath Affinity Attack Skills, upon inflicting Sinking Potency or Count on enemies with Skill Effects, gain 2 'Offense Level' next turn instead. (Max 4)

E.G.O Gift Adjustments
----------------------

[Adjusted Certain E.G.O Gifts to count Substituted Identities as well]
E.G.O Gifts with conditionals that require 5+ Identities to share the same Keyword will now check for their conditionals at “Turn Start” instead of “Encounter Start”. Now, Substituting Identities who enter the Encounter because the preceding Identity has either died or Retreated can gain the effects of the following E.G.O Gifts as well.

► Example (Tier IV Burn E.G.O Gift, “Soothe the Dead”)
- Before: Encounter Start: This Gift activates when 5 or more Identities have Attack Skills that apply Burn Potency, Count, or 'Unique Burn' effects. (except E.G.O Skills, only counts Identities on the field at Encounter Start)
- After: Turn Start: This Gift activates when 5 or more Identities have Attack Skills that apply Burn Potency, Count, or 'Unique Burn' effects. (except E.G.O Skills, only counts Identities on the field)

<Affected E.G.O Gifts (39)>
Soothe the Dead, Bloody Mist, Coupled Oscillation, Enrapturing Trance, Black Sheet Music, Lucky Pouch, T-1 Perpetual Motion Machine, Secret Cookbook, Purloined Flame, Devotion, Hemorrhagic Shock, Interlocked Cogs, Epicenter, Omnivibro-octovecti-bell, Thorny Rope Cuffs, Eerie Effigy, Ruin, Tangled Bones, Surging Globe, Impending Wave, Reminiscence, Cask Spirits, T-1B Octagonal Bolt, Insulator, T-5 Perpetual Motion Machine, Pocket Watch : Type L, Pocket Watch : Type E, Pocket Watch : Type Y, Pocket Watch : Type P, Automated Joints, Overcharged Battery, Perpetual Generator Servos, Hearts-powered Jewel, Sublimity, Unbending, Ragged Bamboo Hat, Old Dopo Robe, Everlasting Chains of Bond, Glyph of Glass Shards

title: Known Issues after the 2025.01.23 Scheduled Update & Improvements
content:
[Known Issues after the 2025.01.23 Scheduled Update & Improvements]

Hello, this is Project Moon.

The following are issues that have been identified after the 2025.01.23 Scheduled Update and the list of improvements we intend to deploy later.

We will inform you via a notice when each of these changes are applied to the game.
Please refer below for more information.

1. Known Issues after the 2025.01.23 Scheduled Update

- Mirror Dungeon / An issue where, in Chain Battles, allies would lose SP upon ally death
※ This issue does not occur in the Refraction Railway.
- An issue where choosing to forfeit a fight in Stage 7.5-11 would count it as victory
- An issue where, under certain circumstances, Peccatula Invidiae would have an abnormal Skill Slot location
- An issue where Peccatula Invidiae's Parts would load an UNKNOWN text instead
- Event - LCB Regular Check-up / An issue where, in the Reward Exchange menu, the Event tutorial does not match the Event it's for
- (JP Only) An issue where a section of Ch. 7.5 remains untranslated

2. Upcoming Improvements and Adjustments

1) The activation conditionals of the following E.G.O Gifts will be changed from 'Encounter Start' to 'Turn Start'

[Example]
- Before: Encounter Start: This Gift activates when 5 or more Identities have Attack Skills that apply Burn or Unique Burn (except E.G.O Skills; only counts Identities on the field at Encounter Start)
- After: Turn Start: This Gift activates when 5 or more Identities have Attack Skills that apply Burn or Unique Burn (except E.G.O Skills; only counts Identities that are currently on the field)

[E.G.O Gifts to be Changed]
Soothe the Dead, Bloody Mist, Coupled Oscillation, Enrapturing Trance, Black Sheet Music, T-1 Perpetual Motion Machine, Secret Cookbook, Purloined Flame, Devotion, Hemorrhagic Shock, Interlocked Cogs, Epicenter, Omnivibro-octovecti-bell, Thorny Rope Cuffs, Eerie Effigy, Ruin, Tangled Bones, Surge Gloves, Impending Wave, Reminiscence, Cask Spirits, T-1B Octagonal Bolt, Insulator, T-5 Perpetual Motion Machine, Wholeness, Sublimity, Unbending, Ragged Bamboo Hat, Old Dopo Robe, Pocket Watch: Type L, Pocket Watch: Type E, Pocket Watch: Type Y, Pocket Watch: Type P, Automated Joints, Overcharged Battery, Perpetual Generator Servos, Hearts-powered Jewel

※ With the introduction of Chain Battles, we intend to change the team composition E.G.O Gifts to check its conditional at the start of every turn, instead of only once at the start of the Stage.
Therefore, even when Identities are replaced due to Retreating or death, the new Substituted Identities can gain the benefits of those E.G.O Gifts.

2) The following E.G.O Gifts will no longer apply to effects that gain Bleed, Burn, and Rupture on allies.

[Examples]
- Before: allies inflict double Bleed Potency with Skill effects.
- After: against enemies, allies inflict double Bleed Potency with Skill effects.

[Affected Gifts]
Smokes and Wires, Filial Love, Bloody Mist, Hot'n Juicy Drumstick, Dry-to-the-Bone Breast

※ We have realized that the above Gifts could cause Identities who gain Bleed and Burn to unintentionally get killed, so we intend to address that issue with these changes.

3) The Keywords and effects of the following E.G.O Gifts will be partially adjusted.

We will provide additional detail with a future Scheduled Update Notice.

[Gifts with Keyword Adjustments]
Cetacean Heart, Manor-shaped Music Box, Refraction Glass Pod, La Manchaland All-day Pass, Token of Victory, Mask of the Parade, Unhatched Embers

[Gifts with Planned Adjustments]
Broken Greatsword, Dueling Manual Book 3, The Book of Vengeance, Sundered Memory, Punctured Memory, Bloody Mist, Fragment of Hellfire, Fragment of Allurement, Fragment of Inertia, Fragment of Desire, Fragment of Decay, Fragment of Conceit, Fragment of Friction, Impending Wave, Distant Star

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Notice: Version 1.68.0 Error Hotfix
content:
[Notice: Version 1.68.0 Error Hotfix]

Greetings, dear Manager.

Some of the issues identified in Version 1.68.0 will be corrected via a hotfix.
The hotfix will be applied upon restaring the game without a separate client update. However, please note that additional in-game downloads may occur.

Hotfix ETA
- Jan. 23rd (FRI) 19:00 (KST)
- There may be a 10 minute margin of error.

Hotfixed Issues
- Fixed an issue where a certain Announcer's voiceline plays in Stage 7.5-1
- Fixed an issue where a certain Sinner's Support Passive activates in Stage 7.5-11
- (JP Only) Fixed an issue where certain lines were untranslated in Story Stage 7.5-1

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Additional Changes in 2025.01.23 (KST) Scheduled Update
content:
[Additional Changes in 2025.01.23 (KST) Scheduled Update]

Hello, this is Project Moon.

We would like to inform you of the changes that were missing from our last Scheduled Update notice.

1. Fixed an issue where Outis E.G.O - 'Dimension Shredder' was marked with an incorrect Season
- Before: Labeled as 'Season 5 Event E.G.O'
- After: Labeled as 'Season 4 Event E.G.O'

※ Only managers with this E.G.O have been affected by this issue; this was solely a visual issue in the E.G.O Detailed Information menu, and a filter settings issue in the Identity CG art filter at the Window tab.
She was labeled correctly as a 'Season 4 Event E.G.O' in the Extraction & Dispenser, however, so no issues regarding the Season difference occurred.
This issue occurred when we were adding an Outis E.G.O with the 5th Walpurgis Night Event. (Error Date: 1.67.0 Version Update (Jan. 9th - The 5th Walpurgis Night))

2. Clarified Yi Sang E.G.O - 'Fell Bullet' targeting conditional text
- Before: Targets the ally with the least HP
- After: Prioritizes targets with the least HP (prioritizes allies)
※ This is a text-only change, and the E.G.O will function as is.
Because this E.G.O can still attack enemies with the least HP when there aren't any allies, we have adjusted the conditional text to prevent any issues with identifying the targets.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Notice: Jan. 23rd 2025 (KST) Scheduled Update Server Error Fixed
content:
[Notice: Jan. 23rd 2025 (KST) Scheduled Update Server Error Fixed]

Hello, this is Project Moon.

We have identified a server error after the Jan. 23rd, 2025 (KST) Scheduled Update, and have deployed the fix. It was applied to the game without a separate update or necessary game relaunch.

[Issue]
An issue where, if a player in the final node of the 5.5-1 BokGak event force closed the game, an error would occur in the process of refunding the Stage entry cost.

[Cause]
Cause: The function that returns the consumed Enkephalin(loads when logging in) clashed with the function that disables relevant 5.5-1 BokGak Stages upon Event closure, causing an error in the process of reviewing that particular node

[Solution]
The error has been fixed on Jan. 23rd, 2025 13:00 (KST). The server now functions as normal.

[Subsequent measures]
We have added a specific system logic to prevent this issue from occurring again.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: 2025, Jan. 23rd Scheduled Update Notice
content:
---------------------------------------

Greetings, dear Manager.

title: Full-Stop Office Fixer Heathcliff Skill 2 Text Changes & Error Fixes
content:
--------------------------------------------------------------------

Hello, this is Project Moon.

We would like to inform you of the following errors on Full-Stop Office Fixer Heathcliff: Skill 2 effects and other texts on the same Identity.

The following issues will be corrected today via a hotfix. The hotfix will be applied upon restaring the game without a separate client update. However, please note that additional in-game downloads may occur.

We sincerely apologize for causing these Skill and text errors.

[Hotfix ETA]
- 1.9(THU) 19: 30(KST)
- There may be a ten minute margin of error to the above estimation.

Changes
-------

1. Fixed an issue where Full-Stop Office Fixer Heathcliff's Skill 2 Coin 1's [On Hit] and [On Crit] effects inflicted 'Pierce Fragility' as opposed to 'Pierce Resist Down' as it was written
- Before: The Coin inflicted 'Pierce Fragility', which is not what the text says
- After: Changed the text to 'Inflict Pierce Fragility' to match the actual effect getting inflicted
[On Hit] Inflict 1 Pierce Fragility (2 times per turn)
[On Crit] Inflict 1 Pierce Fragility next turn (once per turn)

※ So far, in previous cases in which Identities and E.G.Os did not work as intended, we tried our best to change their actual functionalities to match the descriptions. This was because the descriptions were usually the basis by which our users evaluated these Identities or E.G.O; if we were to change the text to match the actual functionalities after the fact, we would no longer have a point of reference in case of future errors, which could cause larger issues down the line.

However, in this case, if we were to do the same and change the 'Pierce Fragility' effect to 'Pierce Resist Down' effect, due to the uniqueness of these Keywords, it could mean that the Identity's in-game capabilities could be rather significantly changed.

Therefore, taking into account the uniqueness of Walpurgis Night, a limited Extraction, and in consideration for managers who have proceeded to extract after viewing the Identity's current in-game abilities, we intend to maintain the Identity's current statuses. In order to do so, we would like to make an exception this time to change the text to say 'Inflict Pierce Fragility' to match the actual effects instead.

Pierce Fragility is a more direct and general-use Keyword, and after testing the Identity in its current iteration, we decided that this was within the range of intended power/capability for the Full-Stop Office Fixer Heathcliff Identity.

Also, we understand that Walpurgis Night events, as limited Extractions, are very important matters for the managers; considering that, we intend to make an exception this time to maintain the Identity's current capabilities as-is.

We once again deeply apologize for causing inconvenience to all managers who have been using Full-Stop Office Fixer Heathcliff.

Changes
-------

<Cause>
1. Not enough proofreading on the ID's actual functions and text data
Within the game's internal logic, each effect is defined by Keywords in English. The Keyword here was defined as "Pierce Fragility", but we confused the defined text with the other, intended effect, Pierce Resist Down—meaning that we mistakenly understood that it was inflicted as intended.

2. Not enough in-game testing
In the process of testing the Full-Stop Office Fixer Heathcliff's in-game functionalities, we failed to verify the exact effects of his Skill 2. We did identify that the Skill's texts were applied as intended, but in the process of checking in-game, we did not verify that the effects that were actually inflicted against the enemies were correctly applied as Pierce Resist Down.

<Future Measures>
We confirmed that the cause of Full-Stop Office Fixer Heathcliff's Skill 2 effect error was insufficient testing. In order to prevent similar issues from occurring again, we intend to make a standardized check-list specifically for Identities and E.G.O. When proofreading, by using the standardized check-lists, we will make sure that everyone working on the tasks test them in the same conditions, and try our best to reduce such human errors.

<Detailed Explanation of the Error>
Our initial intent when designing Full-Stop Office Fixer Heathcliff's Skill 2, was to support and raise the damage floor of the Pierce Attack Type by making him inflict Pierce Resist Down. However, due to the error that inflicts Pierce Fragility instead of Pierce Resist Down, his current in-game role is support and increased damage.

If "Pierce Fragility" gets fixed to "Pierce Resist Down", as we initially intended, this will raise the damage floor of the Skill, but end up lowering the damage ceiling. Our concern was that this would be perceived as an indirect nerf of the character via the fix.

In order to prevent that, we adjusted the texts to fit the character's current state. Please refer to the example below for more information.

Example: Difference between Fragility and Resist Down in Damage Calculations
----------------------------------------------------------------------------

Fragility works by applying a Fragility Multiplier on the damage that takes Resistances into account, so it is affected by the target's Resistance.
- The 'lower' the target's Resistance, the 'lower the increased damage' via Fragility
- The 'higher' the target's Resistance, the 'higher the increased damage' via Fragility

However, the damage gain from Resist Down is more stable as it raises the target's Resistance when the target is strong against a certain Attack Type.

- The 'lower' the target's Resistance, the 'higher the increased damage' via Resist Down
- The 'higher' the target's Resistance, the 'lower the increased damage' via Resist Down

Using a Skill that deals 10 damage...

1) Attacking enemies with x0.5 Resistance
- With 3 Fragility
Final Damage 6.5
(10 x 0.5 x 1.3)
- With 3 Resist Down
Final Damage 8
(10 x 0.8)

2) Attacking enemies with x1 Resistance
- With 3 Fragility
Final Damage 13
(10 x 1 x 1.3)
- With 3 Resist Down
Final Damage 13
(10x 1.3)

3) Attacking enemies with x2 Resistance
- With 3 Fragility
Final Damage 26
(10 x 2 x 1.3)
- With 3 Resist Down
Final Damage 23
(10 x 2.3)

Changes
-------

2. (EN Only) Fixed an issue where the activation timing for the second effect of Full-Stop Office Fixer Heathcliff's 'Precision Aim' was written as 'Encounter Start' instead of 'Combat Start'
- Before: 'Encounter Start': if this unit is not set to use any Attack Skills (including E.G.O Skills), apply 3 Poise to 1 ally with the least Poise Potency
- After: 'Combat Start': if this unit is not set to use any Attack Skills (including E.G.O Skills), apply 3 Poise to 1 ally with the least Poise Potency
※ This was a text-only issue; the effect is not changed. Please note that the effect activating on 'Combat Start' means that it will activate more often than it does on 'Encounter Start', by activating every turn as long as the conditions are met.

3. (EN Only) Fixed an issue where one of the Keywords in Full-Stop Office Fixer Heathcliff's Evade Skill was displayed as 'Unknown'

4. (JP Only) Fixed an issue where the word 'Poise' was missing from Full-Stop Office Fixer Heathcliff's 'Headshot' Skill's [On Use] effect
- Before: Gain 3 and +2 Poise Count
- After : Gain 3 Poise and +2 Poise Count

Full-Stop Office Fixer Heathcliff Error Compensation
----------------------------------------------------

- Compensation: Lunacy x500
- Recipients: all users whose accounts were created before Jan. 23rd, 2025 10:00
- When: After Jan. 9th (THU), 2025 19:30 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per Account
- The Compensation can be claimed until Jan 23rd (Thu) 2025, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Notice: Temp. Measure for the Theater Issue after the Jan. 8th Scheduled Update
content:
Notice: Temporary Measure for the Theater Function Issue after the Jan. 8th Scheduled Update

Hello, this is Project Moon.

We have identified an issue where Chapter 9 stories can be accessed through the Theater function even when the corresponding Stages have not been cleared.
Please refer below for the details of the temporary measure we have implemented to address the issue.

[Issue Detail]
- An issue where, if the Theater is accessed after clearing more than one Stage of Chapter 9 between 2025/12/31 12:00 ~ 2026/1/8 10:00, all stories of Chapter 9 become unlocked
- Please note that depending on individual cases, this issue may occur for the other Main Story chapters as well.

[ Causes ]
- After we updated the "Fixed an issue where, if the player used the Skip Combat function in Canto 4, the story remained inaccessible via the "Theater" window" issue, we added a new logic to synchronize the Theater progression with your Stage progression.
- We have identified an issue where, in this logic, if there are any discrepancies between the total number of Canto 9 Stages last saved on our servers & the total number of Canto 9 Stages in each local client, the game would unlock all Canto 9 Stages for viewing in the Theater tab.

[ Measures ]
- We have addressed the issue so that, even if there are discrepancies between the information on our server and the clients, the game would determine the Theater tab unlock progress based on the actual Canto progress data on each respective local client.
- For now, we have prioritized fixing this issue for Canto 9 and deployed a temporary fix; in the next Scheduled Update, this issue will be fixed for all other chapters as well.

[ Temporary Fix Deployment Time ]
- 2026. 01. 08 16:00(KST)
- This fix was deployed without a Hotfix download or a new version update.

[ Additional Gameplay Notes ]
※ Please note that this issue may harm the player's immersion by making the story scenes accessible for stages that haven't been cleared yet.
If this issue has occurred in other main story Stages outside Canto 9, please clear at least one Story Stage of the respective Canto prior to enjoying its Main Story.

We are also investigating the other issues that have been identified after the Jan. 8th Scheduled Update, and will share a list of them in an additional "Known Issues" notice as soon as they are compiled.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: App Store Package Price Increase in JPY and Future Changes
content:
[App Store Package Price Increase in JPY and Future Changes]

Hello, this is Project Moon.

The Package prices when making a purchase in JPY in App Store have been increased.

Currently, the price reference for our in-app purchases is based on USD.
Due to Apple’s policy, the package prices in JPY were automatically raised around December 2nd in order to align with the reference prices in USD.

Please refer to the more detailed information in the App Store notice in the link below.
https://developer.apple.com/jp/news/?id=onjo01rj

We sincerely apologize for failing to inform you of the package price adjustments in time.

The package prices when making purchases in JPY in App Store will be re-adjusted to be in line with when making purchases in Steam and Android versions.
We are currently working to apply this change as fast as possible, and we will inform you again as soon as the change is applied.

In future instances of package price adjustments, we will be sure to inform you as soon as they occur.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.

Please refer below for details about the update.

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► (JP Only) Fixed translation issues and typos for various Identities and E.G.O
(1) Fixed an issue where The One Who Grips Faust's Skill 3 had 'Damage Up' in place of 'Pierce DMG Up'
(2) Fixed an issue where one of Cinq West Section 3 Meursault's Skill 3 Coin effects, 'Reuse this Skill', was written as 'Reuse Skill 1'
(3) Fixed an issue where the effect applied by Hong Lu E.G.O Lasso Corrosion's 3rd Coin was written as 'Poise' instead of 'Rupture'
(4) Fixed an issue where the effect applied by Faust E.G.O Lasso Corrosion's 3rd Coin was written as 'Poise' instead of 'Rupture'
(5) Fixed an issue where the Passive description of Don Quixote E.G.O Yearning-Mircalla used '異常' for '이상(greater than or equal to)' instead of '以上'
(6) Fixed an issue where the activation conditional was written as 'Skill End' instead of 'Turn End' for Don Quixote E.G.O Yearning-Mircalla's Awakening Skill's [After Attack] effect

► (EN Only) Fixed an issue where the Passive description of Don Quixote E.G.O Yearning-Mircalla said 'Every time 10 Bleed damage occurs' instead of 'Every time 10+ Bleed damage occurs'
※ We sincerely apologize for causing confusion regarding Identities and E.G.O abilities due to the above translation issues. We will pay greater care when translating to prevent such mistakes. Also, we will place greater focus on proofreading, particularly regarding Identities and E.G.O, to avoid repeating the same mistakes. We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

► Fixed an issue where the game may softlock when 1) the player owns the E.G.O Gifts 'Snuffed Lantern' or 'Shadow Monster', 2) activates the E.G.O Gift effects due to certain Identities' Skill effects, and 3) raises the Tremor Count further

title: New Content - Ch.5.5 - Miracle in District 20 BokGak
content:
--------------------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

With the Dec. 26th, 2024 (KST) Update, new content
[Ch 5.5 - Miracle in District 20 BokGak] will be added to the game.

► Duration
2024/12/26 12:00 (KST) ~ Before 1/23 (KST) Scheduled Update
► Event Rewards Exchange
2024/12/26 12:00 (KST) ~ Before1/30 (KST) Scheduled Update
► Requirements
- Miracle in District 20 Event Banner: Clear Main Story 0-4 (Tutorial)
- Miracle in District 20 (Normal Difficulty): Clear Main Story 5-36
- Miracle in District 20 (Hard Difficulty): Clear Main Story 6-48

Event Description
-----------------

- When the event starts, the [Ch. 5.5 - Miracle in District 20]
Event Page will open.
- During the event period, you can earn [Trinkets Sack] by clearing
the Miracle in District 20 Event Stages & the Mirror Dungeons.
- Voices will be added to the Miracle in District 20 story,
and you can access the Miracle in District 20 Hard
Difficulty Stages during the event period.
- You can redeem various rewards from the [Reward Exchange]
by spending the event currency that you have collected.

Event Gameplay
--------------

► Miracle in District 20 Story
Voices will be added to the story of Miracle in District 20.

► Miracle in District 20 Combat Stages
You can obtain [Trinkets Sack] every time you complete a combat Encounter of ‘Miracle in District 20’. Each Encounter has a first-time reward; with it, you can obtain even more [Trinkets Sack].
However, if you had previously cleared the Miracle in District 20 Stages, you cannot obtain additional first-time rewards.

The final Combat Stage of the Miracle in District 20 event costs an Enkephalin Module.
That final Stage will have a higher Enkephalin-to-[Trinkets Sack] ratio, so it will be much more effective as a means of collecting [Trinkets Sack].

► Miracle in District 20 Combat Stages (Hard Difficulty)
Miracle in District 20 Hard Difficulty will become available during the Event period. Clearing Main Story Stage 6-48 will unlock the Hard Difficulty.
Earn even more [Trinkets Sack] by playing through the Hard Difficulty.

You can earn first-time Clear rewards (including the Event currency), EX-Clear rewards, and Chapter Progression by clearing the Hard Difficulty Stages as well.

Event Gameplay
--------------

► Mirror Dungeon
During the Event Period, [Miracle in District 20 BokGak Theme Pack] will have a fixed appearance on Floor 4-5 of the Mirror Dungeon Hard Difficulty. [Miracle in District 20 BokGak Theme Pack] is a ‘Long Battle’ Theme Pack and features exclusive Choice Events and E.G.O Gifts.

※ The Preexisting [Miracle in District 20 Theme Pack] will not be changed.
※ The same Theme Pack will not appear twice in the same run once completed.
※ Miracle in District 20 Theme Pack will no longer have a fixed appearance once the Event ends, and may appear on different floors.

During the Event period, clearing the [Miracle in District 20 BokGak Theme Pack] will also yield three relevant E.G.O Gifts (Pom-pom Hat, Huge Gift Sack, and Sad Plushie) from the Miracle in District 20 Theme Pack. (This feature is active only during the Event Period)

Clearing a Mirror Dungeon run will net you [Trinkets Sack]. Selecting the [Miracle in District 20] or [Miracle in District 20 BokGak] Theme Packs will net you even more [Trinkets Sack].
The Theme Pack in the Hard Difficulty yields much more Event currency than the Normal Difficulty.

※ Please note that the Weekly Bonus does not affect the amount of Event currency gained.
※ Please note that, if you have started a Mirror Dungeon run before the event started, you will not gain event currency from that run.

Event Gameplay
--------------

► Main Story
Managers who have not met the Event unlock conditions can obtain [Trinkets Sack] as a first-time reward from Main Story Combat Encounters. Upon your first-time clear of an Encounter, you can obtain [Trinkets Sack] proportional to the amount of Enkephalin Spent regardless of whether you’ve met the EX Clear Conditions or not.

※ You cannot obtain [Trinkets Sack] from stages that have already been completed.
※ You cannot obtain [Trinkets Sack] from Luxcavations or the Refraction Railway.

Event Currency
--------------

In rare cases, clearing the ‘Miracle in District 20’ Stages, the Mirror Dungeon, and the Main Story Stages will also yield [Huge Trinkets Sack]. [Huge Trinkets Sack] has the highest chance of dropping from the final Encounter of the Miracle in District 20 BokGak Event. However, the drop chance is the same across all other Encounters.

[Huge Trinkets Sack] is automatically converted to 20 [Trinkets Sack] in the Results or the Rewards screen upon acquisition.

Event Bonus E.G.O
-----------------

Obtain more [Trinkets Sack] by completing Event Encounters or the Mirror Dungeon while equipped with Event Bonus E.G.Os.

<Event Bonus E.G.Os>

► 40% Bonus
- E.G.O [HE] :
Christmas Nightmare Ishmael,
Christmas Nightmare Gregor, Holiday Outis

► 20% Bonus
- E.G.O [ZAYIN] : Holiday Heathcliff

※ The Event Currency Bonus from each E.G.O is additive. (Rounded up)
※ Event Currency Bonus maxes out at 120% Bonus.
※ Event Bonus E.G.Os don’t actually have to participate in a battle; you can earn the bonus currency simply by having them in your Team loadout.
※ Event Currency Bonus applies to first-time clear rewards and Mirror Dungeon clear rewards as well.

Event Rewards
-------------

At the [Rewards Exchange], you can spend [Trinkets Sack] you’ve collected to purchase various rewards. You may find the rewards from the previous Miracle in District 20 (Ticket Deco, cosmetic Banners, 1 Event Reward E.G.O) here.
In addition, a Miracle in District 20 Announcer will be added to the list of redeemable rewards.

※ You can no longer obtain [Trinkets Sack] after you obtain enough [Trinkets Sack] to purchase every item in the [Reward Exchange].
※ You cannot obtain duplicates of special rewards(Ticket Deco, cosmetic Banners, 1 Event Reward E.G.O) if you already own them.
※ [Trinkets Sack] will no longer be obtainable once the Event closes after the 2024/01/23 (KST) Scheduled Update.
※ [Reward Exchange] will be open for 5 weeks, from 2024/12/26 12:00 (KST) ~ 2025/01/30 (KST) Scheduled Update.
※ Even after the event fully ends, you will be able to experience the Miracle in District 20 Combat Encounters or view its story anytime at Drive and Theater - [Detour Tales].

title: Notice: Mirror Dungeon Error Hotfix
content:
[Notice: Mirror Dungeon Error Hotfix]

Greetings, dear Manager.

We have identified the following issue in the current version 1.65.1.

A hotfix will be deployed without the need for an additional update, download, or client restart.

Deployment ETA
- 12.20(FRI) 18:00(KST)
- There may be a 10 minute margin of error.

Issue
- An issue where obtained Mounting Trials are getting removed in the Mirror Dungeon

Issue Conditions
- Enter a choice event node and obtain the choice effect.
- When you gain a second choice effect, a pop-up appears asking the player to select one of the two.
- After selecting which effect to keep, the unchosen ability and the currently held Mounting Trials effects are both removed.

Cause & Solution
- A flaw was discovered in the logic that allowed only one choice effect to be retained.
- We have identified the problematic logic and corrected it so that the Mounting Trial effects will no longer be removed.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Dec. 19th Scheduled Update Hotfix Notice
content:
[Dec. 19th Scheduled Update Hotfix Notice]

Greetings, dear Manager.

With the Dec. 19th Scheduled Update, a function to add letterboxes in combat encounters to fix the aspect ratio in combat has been added to the game.

We informed you in the Update Notice with the text “Addressed the issue where the “Resolution adjustment in combat gameplay” does not work as intended”, but we failed to word it clearly enough to inform the players what this was referring to, making it seem as though the letterboxes were caused by a glitch.

We sincerely apologize for causing you inconvenience in combat due to this new function.
The following are explanations of our intent, solution, and future improvements regarding this function.

[Intent]
- We added the letterboxes to address the following issues caused by varying aspect ratios: where enemy and ally placements could be misaligned, where Abnormality sprites could appear broken, or where each unit’s Skill Slots may not appear fully on the screen. We sought to solve this issue by making sure that every device runs on the same aspect ratio.

[Issue]
- We realized that adding large letterboxes depending on the aspect ratio could cause the display to appear small, causing inconvenience on the players’ side.
- An additional issue occurred where additional adjustment of resolution after entering a combat scene could cause the screen to appear incorrectly as the letterboxing aspect ratio was not adjusted accordingly.

[Solution]
- We intend to revert this change and remove the letterboxing with an upcoming hotfix today.

[Future Measures]
- We will improve the letterboxing setting logic and add a separate option to enable/disable this function with a future update.
- We will inform you via a scheduled notice before applying the said update.

[Hotfix Deployment]
The hotfix will be applied without a separate client update; restart the game to apply the hotfix. Please note that additional in-game downloads may occur, however.

Content
► Removes the letterboxing functionality in combat scenes when using aspect ratios narrower than 16:9

Deployment ETA
► 12.19(FRI) 18:30(KST) - There may be a 10 minute margin of error to this estimation.

We are currently investigating other issues that have occurred as well, and we are working on fixes for those issues as well.
Further adjustments and fixes will be announced via the 12.23(MON) Scheduled Update Notice.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

[Dec. 19th Scheduled Update Hotfix Compensation]
- Content : Lunacy x 300
- Recipients : All users whose accounts were created before Dec. 26th, 2024 10:00
- When : After Dec. 19th, 2024 (MON) 18:30 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account
The compensation can be claimed from the in-game inbox until Dec. 26th 2024 (THU) 10:00 (KST) (Available for 7 days)

- Purchase: Can be purchased only once
- Purchasable Period: 24. 12. 12 12:00 ~ 12. 26 10:00 (KST)

► Identity Growth Pack
- Contents : Takeoff Module - ID Uptie x1, Identity Training Ticket IV x50, Identity Training Ticket III x20
- Price: ₩33,000 / $21.99 / ¥3,000
- Purchase: Can be purchased only once
- Purchasable Period: 24. 12. 12 12:00 ~ 12. 26 10:00 (KST)

Major Changes
-------------

1. Changes for the Season Identity & E.G.O Dispenser

New Seasonal Identities and E.G.O linked to the current Season can no longer be obtained immediately from the Dispenser; they will become dispensable from the Dispenser 7 days after their respective release date.

Following this change, the new Season 5 Identity, 'The Manager of La Manchaland Don Quixote', will be unlocked for dispensing following the 24. 12. 19 12:00 (KST) Scheduled Update.

Please note this information for your gameplay plans.

2. Changed the FAQ Viewing mechanism accessible by [Settings] → [Misc.] → [Customer Service(FAQ)]
- Before: Loads into an in-game FAQ Menu
- After: Loads into a separate FAQ Website

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► E.G.O Gift - Piece of Relationship can now be sold at Shops

► Fixed an issue where, if the E.G.O Gift - Piece of Relationship was removed from the player due to functions such as Fusions, the changed level display was not updated in the Loadout menu despite the fact that it was functionally applied

► Fixed an issue where, in Mirror Dungeon 5, Cost gain upon Encounter victory did not match our intent

- Issue: Cost gained for [Abnormality Combat Encounter] and [Boss Encounter] were swapped

- Normal Difficulty
Abnormality Combat Encounter:
Was supposed to gain 100, but was gaining 120 instead
Boss Encounter: Was supposed to gain 120 Cost, but was gaining 100 instead

- Normal Difficulty
Abnormality Combat Encounter: Was supposed to gain 150, but was gaining 200 instead
Boss Encounter: Was supposed to gain 200 Cost, but was gaining 150 instead

► Fixed an issue where the 'Confirm' button for Mirror Dungeon 5 - [Active Effects] was visible in other content as well

► Fixed an issue where, under certain circumstances, enemy Skill Slots would linger even after getting defeated in Mirror Dungeon 5 Theme Pack Line 4 Section 4

► Fixed an issue where, in Mirror Dungeon 5 Theme Pack Line 4 Section 3 & 4, the toggling button for Peccatula Invidiae enemy Sin E.G.O Resource & Passive UI was missing

► Fixed an issue where relevant Identities' modifiers did not activate in Mirror Dungeon 5 Theme Pack The Violet Noon Choice Event

► Fixed an issue where the Stagger Threshold upon obtaining the E.G.O Gift - Bridle was not updated naturally

► Fixed an issue where the game may softlock when defeating certain Abnormalities with E.G.O Gift effects in Mirror Dungeon 5

► Fixed an issue where the Attack Skill Sin Affinities of certain enemies were incorrectly applied in Mirror Dungeon 5 Theme Pack Line 2

► Fixed an issue where the Dream-devouring Siltcurrent did not spawn a summoned unit in an Abnormality Encounter

► Fixed an issue where Mirror Dungeon 5 Dongbaek E.G.O::Spicebush's background did not load as intended

► Fixed an issue where the Fusion Forecast value would show incorrectly in Mirror Dungeon 5 - Shops - E.G.O Gift Fusion when the player has obtained all available E.G.O Gifts within the chosen Keyword category

► Adjusted the text color for certain Theme Packs to match their themes
Relevant Theme Packs: Line 1, 2, 3, Line 4 Section 3, and Line 4 Section 4

► Addressed the issue where the BGM in certain Boss Encounters would not play properly in Mirror Dungeon 5

► Fixed an issue where a Boss enemy not featured in the list of featured Boss enemies would appear in Mirror Dungeon 5 - Season of the Flame Theme Pack

► Fixed an issue where the High-tensity Shoes E.G.O Gift would display a dummy text

► Fixed an issue where certain summoned enemies did not behave as intended in Mirror Dungeon 5 - Theme Pack - The Heartbreaking

► Fixed an issue where, in Mirror Dungeon 5 - Theme Pack - Heartbreaking, a certain boss' damage gate function did not work as intended

► Fixed an issue where the auto-scroll function would stop working after interacting with the auto-scroll area in Mirror Dungeon 5 - Grace of the Dreaming Star menu

► Added an animation to Grace of Stars introduction in Mirror Dungeon 5 - Grace of the Dreaming Star menu

► (Mobile Only) Fixed an issue where selecting multiple Graces in Mirror Dungeon 5 - Grace of the Dreaming Star appears as though multiple are selected when they are not

► (EN Only) Fixed an issue where an outdated translation was applied in Stage 6-48 in-game cutscene

► (EN Only) Fixed typos in Mirror Dungeon 5 Hard Difficulty

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Abnormally obtained Rewards due to Mirror Dungeon 5 Reward Error withdrawn

1. Lunacy: Subtracted from the affected account (into negatives when it applies)

2. Battle Pass Rewards
- Training Tickets, Threads, Sinner Shard Crates, Extraction Tickets: subtracted from the affected account (into negatives when it applies)
- Banner & Ticket Deco Items: Unequipped and removed from the affected account
- Lunacy: Subtracted from the affected account (into negatives when it applies)
- E.G.O: Unequipped and removed from the affected account
- Announcers: Unequipped and removed from the affected account
- Enkephalin Modules: Subtracted from the affected account (into negatives when it applies)
- Enkephalin Boxes: Subtracted from the affected account (into negatives when it applies)

3. Manager EXP
- Level: Reverted for the affected account and apply the reverted value to Manager Profiles
- Enkephalin obtained due to Level Up: Converted to Modules and subtracted from the affected account
- Enkephalin obtained naturally due to the passage of time: Untouched, as daily usable amount is unchanged

Known Issues
------------

► An issue where, under certain circumstances, enemy Skill Slots would be generated incorrectly in Mirror Dungeon 5 - Theme Pack - Line 2

► An issue where, in Mirror Dungeon 5 - Grace of the Dreaming Star Menu, interacting with the auto scrolling area makes it scroll automatically, making it difficult to read the text

► An issue where, in rare cases, the Clash result prediction between two same Skills may appear different

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Dec. 19th, 2024 (KST)
- When : After Dec. 12th, 2024 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Dec. 19th (Thu) 2024, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.
- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change depending on the status of maintenance. If such a change occurs, we will let you know in a follow-up notice.
- A resource download may be prompted after the build update. If you're using a mobile device, it is recommended to proceed with a Wi-Fi connection.
- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account. Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: Notice: Canto 4 Combat Stage Composition Adjustment
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

The Combat Stage composition of Canto 4, 'The Unchanging', will be changed via a hotfix on Dec. 6th, 23:00 (KST).
The hotfix will be deployed without a separate update; restart the game to apply the changes. However, please note that additional downloads may occur.

Contents
► Stage composition of Canto 4 'The Unchanging' will be adjusted.

Deployment ETA
► 12.6 23:00(KST) - with about 10 minutes of margin of error.

Because Canto 4 has more repetitive combat stages compared to other Cantos,
it is proving to be a distraction to the players' enjoyment of the story. So, we intend to adjust their composition.

Aside from the Story Dungeon and certain other stages, most stages will have their waves reduced to a single wave,
and each stage will feature less enemies in general.

If you are planning to play through Canto 4, please take note of this change, dear manager.

Thank you.

title: 2024, Dec. 5th Scheduled Update Notice
content:
--------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on Dec. 5th, 2024 (KST).
Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.

Please refer below for details about the update.

New Content
-----------

1. New Content - Mirror of the Dreaming: Hard Difficulty
※ Please refer to the Steam Announcements page for more information.

※ Please note for your gameplay plans that the Mirror Dungeon will be closed from 2024. 12. 05 06:00 ~ 10:00 to process the Mirror of the Dreaming Hard Difficulty Update.

Mirror Dungeon Changes
----------------------

1. Grace of Stars

► Grace of Stars Passives removed

► Added & adjusted Grace of Stars effects

► Now, two or more Grace of Stars can be selected at once
※ Cannot select the same effect twice.

► Guarantees 60 base Rest Bonus value

※ Regardless of the Rest Bonus tally of your loadout, you will have a base of 60 Rest Bonus value at the start of the Mirror Dungeon. If your loadout has a total of 0 Rest Bonus, you will still be guaranteed 60 Rest Bonus value. If your loadout has a maxed-out Rest Bonus value(60), then you can use up to 120 total Rest Bonus.

2. Added 50 New E.G.O Gifts

► Appears from all difficulties
- 12 new E.G.O Gifts between Slash, Pierce, and Blunt Attack Types

► Exclusive to the Hard Difficulty
- 20 new E.G.O Gifts between the 7 Keywords(Burn, Bleed, Tremor, Rupture, Sinking, Poise, Charge)
※ Each Keyword will gain a new Tier 4 Fusion E.G.O Gift.

- 18 new E.G.O Gifts exclusive to Theme Packs
(Story & Refraction Railway Exclusive E.G.O Gifts)

3. Added Slash, Pierce, and Blunt Categories to the list of Starting E.G.O Gifts

※ The list of Starting E.G.O Gifts in each Slash, Pierce, and Blunt categories has been adjusted.

4. Theme Pack E.G.O Gift Pool Adjusted

E.G.O Gift Pool for Theme Packs will be adjusted with the addition of new E.G.O Gifts.

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Adjusted 'T-1 Perpetual Motion Machine' effect

- New Effect : (the text has been paraphrased for the sake of length)
Encounter Start: This Gift activates when 5 or more Identities have Attack Skills that gain Charge Count or 'Unique Charge'. (Not counting E.G.O Skills, only counts Identities on the field at Encounter Start) First Turn Start of a wave: all allies gain 7 Charge Barrier. Turn Start: all allies gain (sum of Charge Count and Unique Charge / 5) + 1) Damage Up Turn Start: each Identity gains (total Charge Count consumed by Attack Skill use during this Encounter / 4) Offense Level Up Each Identity gains 1 Charge Potency when they consume 20 Charge Count. After Attack of a Skill that consumed Charge Count on self: inflict (Charge Potency - 1) Defense Level Down

► Major Story Bosses removed from certain Theme Packs

► Adjusted so that the E.G.O Gift eared upon entering a new Floor from a Grace of Stars effect is unaffected by the selected Theme Pack

► Fixed an issue where certain enemies appeared with incorrect levels

► Removed a Choice Event response that gains the 'Devotion' E.G.O Gift

※ Obtaining a Fusion E.G.O Gift while in possession of an ingredient E.G.O Gift could result in an issue where both the ingredient and the Fusion E.G.O Gift can exist at the same time, so we have decided to remove this Choice Event response.

► (PC) Fixed an issue where, in combat, the shortcut keys would not register properly

► Fixed an issue where getting defeated in the Encounter against Canto 7 Final Boss immediately after progressing in Mirror Dungeon caused the game to skip to the ending cutscene instead of the proper loss sequence

► Adjusted interactivity in the Mirror Dungeon Results screen so that selecting the area outside the tooltip window for the list of Mounting Trials can also close the window

► Adjusted the 'Select E.G.O Gift' button text when selecting the Starting E.G.O Gifts for the Mirror Dungeon

► Adjusted the Theme Pack list UI for the Mirror Dungeon Theme Pack Compendium
- Before: Scrolling through the Theme Pack list moved the packs but not the background(the shelves)
- After: Scrolling through the Theme Pack list moves both the packs and the background(the shelves)

► Fixed an issue where 'La Manchaland' Identities ' Skill VFX did not match their unique Keyword Stacks

► Fixed an issue where, under certain circumstances, Yi Sang E.G.O - Fell Bullet Skill Cutscene would play incorrectly

► (EN, JP Only) Fixed an issue where a certain UI element of the Mirror Dungeon Shop was untranslated

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Dec. 12th, 2024 (KST)
- When : After Dec. 5th, 2024 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Dec. 12th (Thu) 2024, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.
- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change depending on the status of maintenance. If such a change occurs, we will let you know in a follow-up notice.
- A resource download may be prompted after the build update. If you're using a mobile device, it is recommended to proceed with a Wi-Fi connection.
- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account. Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: [Mirror Dungeon Reward Issue]
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

We have identified an issue where, under certain conditions, the reward for Mirror Dungeons(Battle Pass Level & Lunacy) could be additionally obtained.

The cause of the issue has been identified and is being corrected,
and the patch will be deployed without separate maintenance, client updates, or resource downloads.

Please note that, after this patch, additional compensation earned will be withdrawn from your accounts through log inquiry.

※ Accounts with repeated malicious exploitation of this issue may have their game access suspended.

We will inform you via an additional notice when the additional compensation is withdrawn.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Notice: Nov. 28th Scheduled Update Hotfix
content:
We have identified the following issues in our Nov. 28th Scheduled Update.

A hotfix will be deployed at 19:30 today to fix the following issues.

Hotfixes do not require a separate client update, and can be applied upon restarting the game. Please note that additional downloads may occur.

[Issues to be addressed with the Upcoming Hotfix]
- Mirror Dungeon: An issue where, in certain Encounters, a certain effect unique to Ishmael activates

[Mirror Dungeon Changes with the Upcoming Hotfix]

After: Starting Cost upon entry +150

- After : 75

- Before : 200
- After : 120

The following are Known issues that will be fixed with the next Scheduled Update.

[Known Issues]

- Mirror Dungeon: (EN, JP Only) An issue where a certain UI Text is missing the translations
- (PC Only) An issue where the shortcut keys don't activate properly in the Combat Menu
