- An issue where, under certain circumstances, Yi Sang E.G.O - Fell Bullet animation plays incorrectly

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Dec 5th New Content - Mirror of the Dreaming Hard Difficulty
content:
------------------------------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The New Content Mirror Dungeon #5 「Mirror of the Dreaming - Hard Difficulty」 will be added with the Dec. 5th, 2024 (KST) Update.

► When : After 24/12/5 (KST) Scheduled Update

※ Please note for your gameplay plans that the Mirror Dungeon will be closed from 2024. 12. 05 06:00 ~ 10:00 to process the Mirror of the Dreaming Hard Difficulty Update.

► Unlock Conditions : Clear Main Story 6-48

► How to enable Hard Difficulty
- Before: Select the Hard Difficulty upon entry
- After: Toggle the Hard Difficulty in the Theme Pack selection menu

Mirror Dungeon #5 Hard Major Additions
--------------------------------------

The following are major additions to the Mirror Dungeon #5 Hard compared to the Normal difficulty.

► Theme Pack Difficulty Selection

Now, you can select the Difficulty Toggle button on the top right side of the Theme Pack menu to switch between two difficulties.
Hard Difficulty features Theme Packs of greater challenge compared to the Normal Difficulty.
Hard Difficulty displays a total of 4 E.G.O Gifts.

► Identity Level Upon Entry

Upon entry, Hard Difficulty reflects your Identities’ current levels.
- Mirror Dungeon #5 Hard : Reflects your Identities’ current levels.
Does not reflect levels beyond 50. (however, in the Mirror Dungeon, there may be ways to raise your Identities’ levels beyond that limit)

- Mirror Dungeon #5 Normal : Identity levels fixed to 50.

※ Just like in Mirror Dungeon #5 Normal, Uptie & Threadspinning Tiers reflect your Identities & E.G.Os’ actual Tiers.

► Encounter Reward Cost

Hard Difficulty Encounters yield much more Cost compared to Normal Difficulty Encounters.
The harder the Encounter, the greater the Cost reward.

Mirror Dungeon #5 Hard Major Additions
--------------------------------------

► Unpredictable Future

In the Hard difficulty, you can only view up to 2 more nodes from your current position.

(※ It used to be a single node, but with the addition of Abnormality Battle Encounters, we have expanded the number of visible nodes.)

► Mounting Trials & Floor Clear Rewards

You can select 2 Reward E.G.O Gifts upon clearing a Hard Difficulty Theme Pack. However, please note that you will be gaining 2 Mounting Trials linked to each E.G.O Gift as well.
Should you refuse to select any E.G.O Gifts, 2 of the given Mounting Trials will be randomly selected.

Mirror Dungeon #5 Hard Major Additions
--------------------------------------

► Super Shop

There is a chance for Super Shops to appear in Hard Difficulty Theme Packs.
The more Cost you spend in a Shop, the greater the chance for a Super Shop to spawn on the next Floor.

The following are the benefits provided by Super Shops.

- E.G.O Gift Shop Selection +3
- Skill Replacement Opportunity +1
(cannot replace the Skill of the same Identity again)
- Can fuse up to 5 E.G.O Gifts in Fusion
- Greater chance for higher Tier E.G.O gifts to appear when Fusing (Fusion Point Modifier)

※ In the Dec. 5th Scheduled Update, you can gain your second Skill Replacement Opportunity only after spending the first opportunity.

We intend to present two Skill Replacement Opportunities simultaneously in a future update.
We apologize for the inconvenience.

Mirror Dungeon #5 Hard Major Additions
--------------------------------------

► New E.G.O Gifts

A total of 50 E.G.O Gifts will be added to the Mirror Dungeon, some of which are exclusive to the Hard Difficulty Theme Packs.

- Available from all difficulties: 12 new E.G.O Gifts between Slash, Pierce, and Blunt Attack Types
- Exclusive to the Hard Difficulty: 20 new E.G.O Gifts between the 7 Keywords (Burn, Bleed, Tremor, Rupture, Sinking, Poise, Charge), 18 new E.G.O Gifts exclusive to Theme Packs (Story & Refraction Railway Exclusive E.G.O Gifts)

※ Each Keyword will gain a new Tier 4 Fusion E.G.O Gift.

► New Theme Packs

A total of 8 new Theme Packs will be added to the game. 5 of those new Theme Packs, which are Refraction Railway Theme Packs, are “Long Battle” Theme Packs. Long Battle Theme Packs feature only a Boss Encounter, but it lasts much longer than other Encounters.

※ Long Battle Theme Packs still feature Shop & Event Encounters separate from Battle Encounters.

Clearing a Long Battle Theme Pack will raise all Identities’ Levels by 3.

※ The effect lasts only within the said Mirror Dungeon run.

Mirror Dungeon #5 Hard Major Additions
--------------------------------------

► Exploration Complete

Mirror Dungeon Hard Difficulty with Weekly Bonuses yields more Battle Pass EXP compared to Mirror Dungeon Normal.

Your reward will be based on the number of your cleared Floors and the Difficulties you selected for each Floor.

※ However, without Weekly Bonuses, the clear reward between Hard and Normal are identical, just as it had been in the previous Mirror Dungeon (Mirror Dungeon #4 - The Mirror of the Wuthering).

If you have selected the Hard Difficulty for every floor, you can use two or more Weekly Bonuses at once.

The maximum obtainable Reward per week is identical to the amount obtained from clearing Mirror Dungeon #4 (Mirror of the Wuthering) Ritornello Floor 5.

- Using 3 Weekly Bonuses all at once:
Lunacy x750, Battle Pass EXP x225
- Using 3 Weekly Bonuses one by one:
Lunacy x750, Battle Pass EXP 250

Mirror Dungeon Changes
----------------------

1. Grace of Stars

- Grace of Stars Passives removed

- Added & adjusted Grace of Stars effects

- Now, two or more Grace of Stars can be selected at once
※ Cannot select the same effect twice.

- Guarantees 60 base Rest Bonus value

※ Regardless of the Rest Bonus tally of your loadout, you will have a base of 60 Rest Bonus value at the start of the Mirror Dungeon.

If your loadout has a total of 0 Rest Bonus, you will still be guaranteed 60 Rest Bonus value. If your loadout has a maxed-out Rest Bonus value(60), then you can use up to 120 total Rest Bonus.

2. Added Slash, Pierce, and Blunt Categories to the list of Starting E.G.O Gifts

※ The list of Starting E.G.O Gifts in each Slash, Pierce, and Blunt categories has been adjusted.

3. Theme Pack E.G.O Gift Pool Adjusted

E.G.O Gift Pool for Theme Packs will be adjusted with the addition of new E.G.O Gifts.

title: Notice: Upcoming Mirror Dungeon Changes
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.
The following are upcoming changes and improvements to the Mirror Dungeon.
Any of the following that can be adjusted via a Hotfix without going through a client build will be changed as soon as possible.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

<List of Changes Deploying with the Hotfix>
※ The following changes will be applied to the game via the temporary hotfix scheduled to be deployed today.
We will inform you via a notice when the hotfix is deployed.

1. E.G.O Gift Enhancement, Refresh, and Skill Replacement Cost in Shops will be lowered.

2. The number of purchasable E.G.O Gift from Shops will be increased.
- The base number of Gifts sold will be increased from 3 to 4.

3. Adjust the number of enemies in certain Focused Encounters where there are too many enemy Slots compared to ally Slots

4. Add 30 'Starter Buff Cost'(the currency used to purchase the Grace of Stars; temporary name) regardless of the loadout's Rest Bonus value
- The said change is a temporary effect; it will be replaced with the 24.12.05 (KST) Scheduled Update.

5. Adjusted the 30+ Rest Bonus Passive Effect
Before: Upon Floor 2 entry, select a Tier 2 Shop-only E.G.O Gift of your choice
After: Starting Cost upon entry +100
- The said change is a temporary effect; it will be replaced with the 24.12.05 (KST) Scheduled Update.

6. Adjusted the 60+ Rest Bonus Passive Effect
Before: Upon Floor 3 entry, select a Tier 2 Shop-only E.G.O Gift of your choice
After: Starting Cost upon entry +150
- The said change is a temporary effect; it will be replaced with the 24.12.05 (KST) Scheduled Update.

<List of Changes Deploying with the Hard Update>
※ The following changes will be applied to the game with the 24.12.05 (KST) Scheduled Update.

1. Players will now be able to select 2 or more Grace of Stars at once, as long as their Rest Bonus stock allows
- Cannot stack two identical effects over one another.

2. Guarantees 60 'Starter Buff Cost'
- Even without the Rest Bonus from rested Identities, players will have a base value of 60 'Starter Buff Cost' to purchase the Grace of Stars. The sum of 'Starter Buff Cost' and maximized Identity Rest Bonus adds up to 120.

3. Grace of Stars Passive Deleted / Addition and adjustment of new Grace of Stars(Cards) Effects
- In order to alleviate the discomfort of having no Grace of Stars activated due to having 0 Rest Bonus, we are planning to move the Grace of Stars Passives to the Grace of Stars Cards(Starter Buff Cards).
- We are planning to adjust the prices to ensure that players can purchase at least 2 Grace of Stars with the 60 guaranteed 'Starter Buff Cost'.

※ Design Intent
The Rest Bonus system was implemented to encourage the use of multiple loadouts.
However, the system as it is now discourages players from enjoying the Mirror Dungeon
as players with only a single loadout or with few loadouts cannot gain much Passives
or bonuses from the Grace of Stars.
We failed to see this during the early stages of our design, and this issue occurred due to our inadequacies. We will be sure to continue refining ourselves and improving the game.

In order to adjust the current Mirror Dungeon, and to have its issues addressed without deviating from our original intent, we intend to add the base Rest Bonus to purchase the Grace of Stars and adjust the way the system works.
With these changes, we will make it so that players with few loadouts can also gain the benefits of the Grace of Stars
and players with multiple loadouts can gain even further benefits from the system.

<Number of new E.G.O Gifts added with the Hard Difficulty>
50 New E.G.O Gifts
- Appears in all difficulties
► 12 E.G.O Gifts in the Slash/Pierce/Blunt category

- Appears only in the Hard Difficulty
► 20 E.G.O Gifts in the 7 Keyword(Burn, Bleed, Tremor, Rupture, Sinking, Poise, and Charge) Categories
(Each category gains new Tier 4 Fusion E.G.O Gifts)
► 18 new Specific Theme Pack(Story or Refraction Railway) only E.G.O Gifts

title: Nov 28th New Content - Mirror of the Dreaming
content:
---------------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The New Content Mirror Dungeon #5 「Mirror of the Dreaming」 will be added with the Nov. 28th, 2024 (KST) Update.

► Date : After 24/11/28 (KST) Scheduled Update

► Requirements
Clear Main Story 2-19

Progression
-----------

Entering the dungeon, as it has been previously, does not cost any resources. However, you can spend Enkephalin modules at the end of your exploration to receive rewards.

<Major Changes>

1. Some parts of the process of entering the Mirror Dungeon has been changed.

► Before (Mirror of the Wuthering)
(1) Engrave Stars on Starter Buffs prior to entry
(2) Select a Difficulty to enter
(3) Select the starting E.G.O Gifts
(4) Select your Team Loadout
(5) Select a Theme Pack to start your run

► After (Mirror of the Dreaming)
(1) Select your Team Loadout
(2) Select the Grace of Stars
(3) Select the starting E.G.O Gifts
(4) Select the Difficulty & Theme Pack to start your run

※ Please note that only the Normal difficulty will be added to this Scheduled Update.

2. Every Combat Encounter has been converted to Chain Battles in which ally deaths lead to Substitution of Backup Units.

3. Most Combat Encounter Stages will have enemy Backup Units Substituting in as well.
While there will be more enemies for each Stage, each Theme Pack will have fewer Stages overall.

4. Upon clearing a Floor, all Identities will be revived (if defeated) and fully healed. SP of revived allies will reset to 0 SP.

5. The final Floor of Normal Difficulty, and the floor on which the maximum reward can be obtained, will be moved from Floor 4 to Floor 5.
Enemy HP in the Normal Difficulty has been adjusted to accommodate this change.

Notes
-----

1. With the introduction of Mirror Dungeon #5 「Mirror of the Dreaming」, Mirror Dungeon #4 「Mirror of the Wuthering」 will be closed.
- Starter Buffs engraved and Starlight earned in Mirror Dungeon #4 will be reset.
- E.G.O Gift & Theme Pack Compendium recorded from Mirror Dungeon #4 will not be reset.

2. The Normal Difficulty, previously called Simulation, will be added with this update.

3. The Hard Difficulty, previously called Ritornello, will be updated at a later date.
Please note that the difficulty & balancing for certain enemies or E.G.O Gifts may be adjusted in the process.
More detailed information about the Hard Difficulty will be released via a separate notice in the future.

4. 24/11/28 (KST) Scheduled Update Maintenance will last from 10:00 ~ 12:00.
Major changes to Mirror Dungeon systems will be deployed after the Scheduled Update. Therefore, with the end of Scheduled Maintenance at 12:00, your Mirror Dungeon Weekly Bonus eligibilities and your current Mirror Dungeon run progress will be reset.
Rewards for Mirror Dungeon runs that remain incomplete before Nov. 28th, 10:00 will become inaccessible with the progress reset, so please claim your rewards BEFORE the Scheduled Maintenance begins.

5. The Mirror Dungeon structure will be adjusted after the 24/11/28 (KST) Scheduled Update. Please note that, if you are in the middle of a Story Mirror Dungeon, your progress will be reset.
We highly recommend clearing the Story Mirror Dungeons before the Nov. 28th 2024, 10:00 Scheduled Maintenance, as your progress in the following dungeons will be reset.
- Affected Dungeons: Hell’s Chicken Dungeon (3.5-9, 3.5-10), Yield My Flesh to Claim their Bones Dungeon (5.5-24), Timekilling Time Dungeon (6.5-15)

Grace of the Dreaming Star
--------------------------

The 「Starter Buff」 system will be replaced with 「Grace of the Dreaming Star」. From 「Grace of the Dreaming Star」, you can obtain Grace of Stars with special effects by paying with Rest Bonus from your Team Loadout.

<Intent>

In previous Mirror Dungeons, collecting Starlight and activating Starter Buffs significantly lowered the difficulty. Therefore, every time a new Mirror Dungeon was introduced and reset both Starlight and Starter Buffs, the contrast would make it feel as though the new Mirror Dungeon is much more difficult in comparison to the previous one. The 「Grace of the Dreaming Star」 was added to replace the previous system to alleviate the contrast between each new Mirror Dungeon and the pressure to collect Starlight. This method allows us to encourage the use of diverse Keyword Loadouts while reducing the influence of Starter Buffs, to alleviate the sense of deprivation when a new Mirror Dungeon is introduced.

<Major Points>

1. Only a single Grace of Stars can be selected at a time.
Any remaining Rest Bonus will be proportionally converted to Cost.

2. Players can gain 「Grace of Stars Passives」 based on their Team Loadout’s Rest Bonus tally regardless of whether they spent their Rest Bonuses or not.

Starting E.G.O Gifts
--------------------

Upon entering the Mirror Dungeon, the players will be presented with E.G.O Gift Keyword categories to choose from.
Starting E.G.O Gifts are fixed for each Keyword, and you can select as many E.G.O Gifts as you are allowed to select within each category.
Also, the E.G.O Gift of the Keyword category you selected will appear more frequently during the Mirror Dungeon run.

<Major Changes>

1. Now, all seven Keyword Categories will be unlocked from the start.
Slash, Pierce, and Blunt E.G.O Gift Categories will no longer be available.

2. With the retirement of the Starlight system, the ability and the notification for gaining additional Starlight will no longer be available.

Selecting Theme Packs
---------------------

Select a Dungeon Theme to explore upon entering a new floor.
Choose a Theme Pack by selecting the pack of your choice and dragging them downward.

<Major Changes>

1. You can change the Difficulty of your Theme Pack by pressing the Difficulty toggle button.
※ Please note that only the Normal difficulty is being added with this update; selecting the toggle button will not change the difficulty.

2. With the retirement of the Starlight system, the ability and the notification to gain additional Starlight when selecting a new Theme Pack will no longer be available.

3. Choice Events, E.G.O Gifts, enemies, and bosses for each Theme Pack will be adjusted to fit the themes of each pack better.

Encounters
----------

<Major Changes>

1. Abnormality Battle Encounters will be added to the game.
Bosses appearing in the Abnormality Battle Encounters will have the same stats as the ones you can choose to fight via Abnormality Choice Events. And just like those bosses, you can obtain up to 2 E.G.O Gifts by winning the battle.

(※ E.G.O Gift rewards from Abnormality Battle Encounters are fixed, and there are no additional E.G.O Gift rewards or Encounter Reward Cards upon victory.)

Shops
-----

You can spend your Cost at the Shops to purchase E.G.O Gifts or use one of its many useful services for progressing through the Mirror Dungeon.

<Major Changes>

1. Shops and Rest Stops have been combined, and Shops will now appear on the node immediately preceding the Floor Boss Node on every Floor.

2. The 「Revive Sinner」 option has been added to the Sinner Heal options, and now Sinners can be healed as many times as you can afford to.

3. With the retirement of the Starlight System, the Starlight Refresh option will no longer be available.

4. E.G.O Gift Fusion calculation has been changed to a point-based tallying system.
With this change, E.G.O Gifts of Tier 4+ can now be used as ingredients.

※ The new E.G.O Gift Fusion calculation takes into account the fact that a future update will add a special Shop in which up to 5 E.G.O Gifts can be Fused at once. Since Normal Difficulty only supports Fusion of up to 3 E.G.O Gifts, the Fusion formula remains unchanged except that Tier 4+ E.G.O Gifts can now be Fused. More detailed information can be viewed from the Fusion Guide window.

Encounter Reward Cards
----------------------

Each Encounter has a certain chance to provide you with a selection of 「Encounter Reward Cards」.
Higher difficulty Mirror Dungeons, higher Floors, and higher difficulty Encounters will yield higher value rewards.

<Major Changes>

1. With the retirement of the Starlight System, Encounter Reward Cards giving additional Starlight will no longer be available.

Select E.G.O Gifts and Mounting Trials upon Each Floor Completion
-----------------------------------------------------------------

Clear the Floor to gain an E.G.O Gift of your choice.
Selecting an E.G.O Gift will give you its linked 「Mounting Trials」 and Enemy level-up effects.

※ In Hard Difficulty, you will gain 2 E.G.O Gifts at once, but this means that you will also have to select two Mounting Trials and Enemy level-up effects as well.

<Major Changes>

1. Certain Mounting Trials will have their effects adjusted.

E.G.O Gifts
-----------

<Major Changes>

1. You can now gain duplicates of E.G.O Gifts already in your possession.
E.G.O Gift duplicates will be converted to 「Fusion & Sale Only E.G.O Gifts」.
※ However, duplicates will not appear from Shop E.G.O Gifts or Fusion E.G.O Gifts. (It is possible, however, to gain an E.G.O Gift in the Shop catalogue through Fusion.)

2. When selecting an E.G.O Gift, any E.G.O Gift that’s currently in your possession will be marked with 「owned」.

3. 18 new E.G.O Gifts will be added to the game.
※ With the Hard Difficulty Update, the second wave of new E.G.O Gifts will be added to the game.

4. 9 preexisting E.G.O Gifts’ effects will be adjusted or changed.
- Affected Gifts: Tomorrow’s Fortune, Milepost of Survival, Soothe the Dead, Bloody Mist, Coupled Oscillation, Enrapturing Trance, Black Sheet Music, Lucky Pouch, T-1 Perpetual Motion Machine

5. 7 preexisting E.G.O Gifts’ Fusion recipes will be changed.
- Affected Gifts: Soothe the Dead, Bloody Mist, Coupled Oscillation, Enrapturing Trance, Black Sheet Music, Lucky Pouch, T-1 Perpetual Motion Machine

Choice Events
-------------

<Major Changes>

1. 6 preexisting Choice Events will have their content adjusted or added.
※ New Choice Events will be added with the Hard Difficulty update.

Creating your TEAM
------------------

In Normal Difficulty, your Identity Levels will be fixed to 50.
※ In Hard Difficulty, which will arrive at a later update, your actual Identity Levels will be reflected.

※ Your current Uptie & E.G.O Threadspinning Tiers will be reflected in the Mirror Dungeon, just as it was in the previous Mirror Dungeons.

<Major Changes>

1. The Rest Bonus system will be changed.
- Before : Upon clearing Mirror Dungeon, earn more Starlight based on Rest Bonus of the Team
- After : Upon entering Mirror Dungeon, consume Rest Bonus to select Grace of Stars

※ Upon clearing Mirror Dungeon, the Rest Bonus for all Identities slotted in at the start of the Dungeon will be reset to 0; all Identities that were not a part of the Team will gain 1 Rest Bonus.
※ Identities swapped into the Team during the Mirror Dungeon Run will not lose nor gain Rest Bonuses.

2. Starting Cost Bonus based on selected Identities will be deleted.

3. With the elimination of Starlight, the Team Loadout menu will no longer display the amount of obtainable Starlight.

4. With the Mirror Dungeon #5 Update, all Identities will gain maximum Rest Bonus value.
Identities will arrive with max Rest Bonus values upon acquisition.
※ An Identity can have up to 5 Rest Bonuses.

5. The Rest Bonus tally of your current Team Loadout will be displayed on top of the Confirm button.

Exploration Complete
--------------------

<Major Changes>

1. With the retirement of the Starlight system, Starlight-related content will no longer be available from the 「Exploration Complete」 window.

2. You can view the list of Mounting Trials and the sum of enemy levels gained from the 「Exploration Complete」 window. Select each Mounting Trial to view what their effects were.

3. When claiming your rewards, you will receive your rewards based on your Mirror Dungeon progress & Difficulty of each Floor.
※ Only the Normal Difficulty will be supported in this update.

title: Intro to Upcoming Aug. 8th Content - Ch.6.5: Murder on the WARP Express
content:
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

With the Aug. 8th, 2024 (KST) Update, new content [Ch 6.5 - Murder on the WARP Express] will be added to the game.

- Duration : 2024/8/8 12:00 (KST) ~ Before 9/5 (KST) Scheduled Update
- Event Rewards Exchange : 2024/8/8 12:00 (KST) ~ Before 9/12 (KST) Scheduled Update
- Requirements : Clear Main Story 6.5-15

Event Description
-----------------

- When the event starts, the [Ch. 6.5 - Murder on the WARP Express] Event Page will open.
- During the event period, you can earn [Civilian Recov. Pack] by clearing the Murder on the WARP Express Event Stages & the Mirror Dungeons.
- You can redeem various rewards from the [Reward Exchange] by spending the [Civilian Recov. Pack] that you have collected.

Event Gameplay
--------------

► Combat Encounters of ‘Murder on the WARP Express’

You can obtain [Civilian Recov. Pack] every time you complete a combat Encounter of ‘Murder on the WARP Express’. Each Encounter has a first-time reward, and with it, you can obtain even more [Civilian Recov. Pack].

The final Stage of ‘Murder on the WARP Express’ is a repeatable Combat Encounter that costs Enkephalin Modules. That final Stage will have a higher Enkephalin-to-[Civilian Recov. Pack] ratio, so it will be much more effective as a means of collecting [Civilian Recov. Pack].

Event Gameplay
--------------

► Mirror Dungeons

During the Event Period, ‘Murder on the WARP Express’ Floor Theme Pack will appear on the final floor of both Mirror Dungeon Simulation & Ritornello.

During the Event Period, you will be able to experience the Murder on the WARP Express Floor Theme pack regardless of your Main Story progress. Once the event is over, your Murder on the WARP Express Floor Theme unlock condition will be changed, and Murder on the WARP Express Floor Theme Pack spawn location will be adjusted.

Clearing a Mirror Dungeon run will net you [Civilian Recov. Pack]. Selecting the Murder on the WARP Express Floor Theme Pack as the final floor theme will net you even more [Civilian Recov. Pack]. Mirror Dungeon Ritornello Difficulty rewards contain much more [Civilian Recov. Pack] than Mirror Dungeon Simulation.

However, using the Weekly Bonuses does not increase the [Civilian Recov. Pack] yield. Using all three Weekly Bonuses at once does not affect the [Civilian Recov. Pack] yield either.

※ Please note that, if you have started a Mirror Dungeon run before the event started, you will not gain event currency from that run.

► Main Story (Canto I ~ Intervallo IV-1)

If you have not fulfilled the event unlock requirements, you can obtain [Civilian Recov. Pack] as a first-time reward from Main Story Combat Encounters. Upon first-time-completion of an Encounter, you can obtain [Civilian Recov. Pack] proportional to the amount of Enkephalin Spent regardless of whether you’ve met the EX Clear Conditions or not.

※ You cannot obtain [Civilian Recov. Pack] from stages that have already been completed.
※ You cannot obtain [Civilian Recov. Pack] from Luxcavations or the Refraction Railway.

Event Currency
--------------

During the event, you can earn [Civilian Recov. Pack] by clearing event Stages. You can also obtain [Civilian Recov. Pack] by clearing Main Story Stages for the first time, or by clearing the Mirror Dungeon.
Rarely, you may obtain [Fixer Recov. Pack] from clearing Event Stages, Main Story Stages, or Mirror Dungeons, and [Fixer Recov. Pack] is automatically converted to 20 [Civilian Recov. Pack] upon acquisition.
In the [Reward Exchange] window, you can purchase various rewards by spending [Civilian Recov. Pack] you have collected.

If you have cleared the ‘Murder on the WARP Express’ Stages, Mirror Dungeons, and the Main Story (Chapter 1 ~ 6.5), you can start finding [Fixer Recov. Pack].

[Fixer Recov. Pack] has the highest chance of dropping from the final Encounter of the event. However, the chance for it to drop is the same across all other Encounters.

[Fixer Recov. Pack] is automatically converted to 20 [Civilian Recov. Pack] in the Results or the Rewards screen upon acquisition.

Event Bonus Identities & E.G.O
------------------------------

During the event period, deploying the following Identities or E.G.O on your team will boost the amount of [Civilian Recov. Pack] earned.
You can earn a maximum of 120% boost to the amount of event currency earned.

Obtain more [Civilian Recov. Pack] by completing Event Encounters or Mirror Dungeons while equipped with Event Bonus Identities or E.G.O.

<Event Bonus Identities & E.G.O>
► 40% Bonus
- E.G.O [HE] : Dimension Shredder Outis
- 3★ : MultiCrack Office Rep Faust
- 2★ : MultiCrack Office Fixer Heathcliff

► 20% Bonus
- E.G.O [HE] : Dimension Shredder Yi Sang, Dimension Shredder Hong Lu
- 3★ : W Corp. L3 Cleanup Agent Yi Sang, W Corp. L3 Cleanup Agent Don Quixote, W Corp. L3 Cleanup Agent Ryōshū, W Corp. L2 Cleanup Agent Meursault, W Corp. L3 Cleanup Captain Outis
- 2★ : W Corp. L2 Cleanup Agent Faust, W Corp. L2 Cleanup Agent Hong Lu

- The Event Currency Bonus from each Identity & E.G.O is additive. (Rounded up) Event Currency Bonus maxes out at 120% Bonus.
- Event Bonus Identities don’t actually have to participate in a battle; you can earn the bonus currency simply by having them in your Team loadout.
- Event Currency Bonus applies to first-time clear rewards and Mirror Dungeon clear rewards as well.

Event Rewards
-------------

Earn [Civilian Recov. Pack] via the following methods: Event Stage & Dungeon clears, Mirror Dungeon clears, and Main Story Stage & Dungeon first-time clears.
In the [Reward Exchange] window, you can purchase various rewards by spending [Civilian Recov. Pack] you have collected.

- At the [Rewards Exchange], you can spend [Civilian Recov. Pack] you’ve collected to purchase various rewards.
- You can no longer obtain [Civilian Recov. Pack] after you obtain enough [Civilian Recov. Pack] to purchase every item in the [Reward Exchange].
- [Civilian Recov. Pack] will no longer be obtainable once the Event closes after the Sep. 5th (KST) Scheduled Update.
- [Reward Exchange] will be open for 5 weeks, from 2024/8/8 12:00 (KST) ~ 9/12 (KST) Scheduled Update.
- Even after the event fully ends, you will be able to experience the Murder on the WARP Express combat Encounters and view its story anytime at Driverside and Theater - [Detour Tales].

title: Notice: Mirror Dungeon 4 Certain Starter Buff Cost Adjusted to 0 & Additional Adjustments
content:
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Hello, this is Project Moon.
With the next scheduled update, certain Starter Buffs will become free to unlock, and we plan to bring further adjustments to the Mirror Dungeon.

1. Reduced certain Mirror Dungeon 4 Starter Buff unlock cost to 0
With the May 16th Scheduled Update, the Mirror Dungeon 4 Starter Buffs that unlock E.G.O Gifts will now become free to unlock. For Managers who have already unlocked those Starter Buffs in question, the amount of Starlight used to unlock those Buffs will be returned with the May 16th Scheduled Update.

When the E.G.O Gift unlocks were tied to the Mirror Dungeon Starter Buff progression, we noticed that it took too long to get to the enjoyable part of the Mirror Dungeon—making various builds using numerous E.G.O Gifts. To make it easier to access that part of the Mirror Dungeon, and to make sure that everyone can enjoy running the Mirror Dungeon early on, we decided to reduce the Starlight cost of unlocking the following Starter Buffs to '0'.

► Affected Starter Buffs
- Eye of the Storm
- Thunder (Including the linked Sub-Starter Buffs)
- Biting Wind (Including the linked Sub-Starter Buffs)
- Fair Winds (Excluding the linked Sub-Starter Buffs)
- Cascade of Levin
- Gathering Storm

2. Additional Mirror Dungeon 4 Improvements & Adjustments

We plan to make the following adjustments to make sure that each Floor Theme Pack remains unique. The following changes will be gradually applied to the game, starting with the May 16th Scheduled Update. We will inform you via a Notice as soon as these changes are added to the game.

- Increase the chances of encountering Mirror Dungeon Events thematically relevant to each Floor Theme

- Increase the chances of acquiring E.G.O Gifts unique to certain Floor Themes
We plan to increase the appearance rate of E.G.O Gifts unique to each Floor Theme in Shops, Encounter Reward Card Gifts, Encounter Clear Rewards, and Floor Boss Clear Rewards.

- Increase the chances of acquiring higher-tier E.G.O Gifts after clearing harder Floor Boss Encounters
We plan to make harder Theme Packs give out more higher-tier E.G.O Gifts while making easier Theme Packs give out lower-tier E.G.O Gifts.

Certain E.G.O Gifts that are too powerful or too weak for their tier will have their tiers adjusted.

Thank You.

title: Mirror Dungeon Grace of Stars Effects Partially Adjusted & Issues Identified
content:
[Mirror Dungeon Grace of Stars Effects Partially Adjusted & Issues Identified]

Hello, this is Project Moon.

We would like to inform you of the changes brought to the Grace of Stars effects since our last Mirror Dungeon Notice.
We would also like to inform you of issues that will occur after the Nov. 28th, 2024 Scheduled Update.

[Mirror Dungeon Grace of Stars Changes]

1. Players will now be able to select multiple Grace of Stars at once, as long as their Rest Bonus stock allows (to be updated later)
- Cannot stack two identical effects over one another.
- Certain Grace of Stars effects may be adjusted in the process of applying this change.
- This functionality will be applied to the game in a future update. We will post a notice with additional information regarding this change later.

2. Grace of Stars Effect Changed
'Binary Star-Shop', a Grace of Stars that can be purchased with 30 Rest Bonus, will now have a different effect.
- Before
- Number of E.G.O Gifts sold at shops +1
- Upon entering Floor 2, gain a Tier 2 Shop-only E.G.O Gift of your choice
- Upon entering Floor 2, gain a Tier 3 Shop-only E.G.O Gift of your choice

- After
- Number of E.G.O Gifts sold at shops +1
- Cost gained upon winning an Encounter +20%
- Greater chance for high Tier E.G.O Gifts to appear in Shops

3. Grace of Stars Passive Changes
The following Grace of Stars Passives will be changed.

- Rest Bonus 30 Passive Effect
Before: Revive a defeated ally after an Encounter (once per Floor)
After: Upon entering Floor 2, select 1 E.G.O Gift(s) from the list of Tier 2 Shop-only Gifts

- Rest Bonus 40 Passive Effect
Before: Theme Pack Choice +1
After: Theme Pack Choice +1, Shop E.G.O Gift Selection +1

- Rest Bonus 50 Passive Effect
Before: Shop E.G.O Gift Selection +1
After: Upon entering Floor 3, select 1 E.G.O Gift(s) from the list of Tier 3 Shop-only Gifts

[Issues Currently Under Investigation]
1. Mirror Dungeon / An issue where certain boss enemy portraits do not appear in some Theme Packs
- Crushers & Breakers: One of the Featured Bosses
- The Noon of Violet: Grant Us Love

2. Mirror Dungeon / An issue where certain boss enemies behave incorrectly
- Dongbaek E.G.O::Spicebush
- Cassetti
- You Want To Get Beat? Hurtily?
- Clippity-cloppity? Tap Away!

3. Mirror Dungeon / An issue where, if the player has 0 Rest Bonus, the Grace of Stars UI does not appear

4. An issue where losing to the Canto 7 final boss after progressing through the Mirror Dungeon causes the game to skip to the final cutscene immediately

5. Mirror Dungeon / Active Effects / An issue where the Rest Bonus effects are ordered incorrectly

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: 2024, Nov. 28th Scheduled Update Notice
content:
---------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on Nov. 28th, 2024 (KST).
Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.

Please refer below for details about the update.

New Content
-----------

1. New Identity & E.G.O Target Extraction
[Devyat' North Section 3 Sinclair & Asymmetrical Inertia Heathcliff (11/28 12:00 ~ 12/12 10:00 (KST))]
The following Identities & E.G.O will have increased odds of extraction.
- E.G.O [HE] : Asymmetrical Inertia Heathcliff
- 3★ : Devyat' North Section 3 Sinclair

2. Target Extraction [Outis] (11/28 12:00 ~ 12/12 10:00 (KST))
The following Identities & E.G.O will have increased odds of extraction.
- E.G.O [HE] : Dimension Shredder Outis, Holiday Outis
- E.G.O [TETH] : Ya Śūnyatā Tad Rūpam Outis
- 3★ : The Barber of La Manchaland Outis, W Corp. L3 Cleanup Captain Outis, Wuthering Heights Chief Butler Outis, Molar Office Fixer Outis, Seven South Section 6 Director Outis
- 2★ : The Ring Pointillist Student Outis, Cinq South Section 4 Outis, G Corp. Head Manager Outis, Blade Lineage Salsu Outis
- 1★ : LCB Sinner Outis

※ Starting from this Sinner Target Extraction, Event Identities & E.G.O (except Event rewards) from the season immediately preceding this one will be available from the Sinner Target Extraction.

3. New Identity & E.G.O Added
The following Identity & E.G.O are added to the list of extractable Identities & E.G.O.
- E.G.O [HE] : Asymmetrical Inertia Heathcliff
- 3★ : Devyat' North Section 3 Sinclair

4. New Content - Mirror of the Dreaming
※ Please refer to the Steam Announcements page for more information.

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Changed the name of Devyat' North Section 3 Rodion's 'Courier Trunk' effect to 'Courier Trunk - Rodion'
※ This change was made so that it could be differentiated from Devyat' North Section 3 Sinclair's effects.

► Fixed an issue where Clashing against a certain enemy from Stage 5-30 would play incorrectly

► Fixed an issue where certain VFX during Yi Sang E.G.O - Fell Bullet Awakening Skill would not play properly

► Fixed an issue where, after clearing Canto 7, the story spoiler prevention filters for relevant Announcers would not unveil immediately

► (EN Only) Fixed typos and awkward phrasings in Canto 7 story

► Fixed an issue where 'La Manchaland' Identities would not get Skill VFX upgrades based on their buff Stacks

► Fixed an issue where, in Regular Encounters, clashing a Defensive Skill with an AOE E.G.O Skill showed Clash predictions instead of 'Unopposed Attack'

► Addressed the framerate drop issue that occurs when fighting an enemy with numerous Parts in Focused Encounters

► Addressed the framerate drop issue in certain Encounters

► Addressed the issue where Substitution Backup Units in Mirror Dungeons were unaffected by the Mounting Trials effect

► Fixed an issue where, if the player has the E.G.O Gift 'Bell of Truth', and if something other than a Skill Triggers Tremor Burst, the 'Once per Skill' conditional gets reset

► Fixed an issue where a certain effect from the E.G.O Gift 'Pocket Watch: Type I' did not activate properly
※ Relevant Effect: Inflict 5 Defense Level Down next turn (once per turn)
- Before : Could inflict 5 Defense Level Down per turn for each ally
- After : Inflicts 5 Defense Level Down only once per turn

► Fixed an issue where the E.G.O Gift 'Hearts-powered Jewel' consumed Charge Count even if the player did not use a Charge Count-consuming Skill

► Fixed an issue where certain effects of the E.G.O Gift 'Crushed Memory' did not activate properly under certain conditions
※ Relevant Effects: Blunt Attack Skills gain Clash Power +( # of Coins / 3 ); Plus Coins gain additional Coin Power +1, Minus Coins gain additional Coin Power -1. (E.G.O Skills don't count; rounded up)
※ Issue: Upon losing a Clash with a non-Blunt Skill, the above effect would stop working for the duration of the Encounter for Blunt Attack Skills

► Fixed an issue where the E.G.O Gift 'Smoking Gunpowder' would activate on more enemies than it is supposed to

Known Issues
------------

► (STEAM) An issue where, in certain circumstances, the shortcut keys would not work during combat

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Dec. 5th, 2024 (KST)
- When : After Nov. 28th, 2024 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Dec. 5th (Thu) 2024, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.
- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change depending on the status of maintenance. If such a change occurs, we will let you know in a follow-up notice.
- A resource download may be prompted after the build update. If you're using a mobile device, it is recommended to proceed with a Wi-Fi connection.
- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account. Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: ProjectMoon 8th Anniversary Livestream Reward
content:

title: [Notice: Oct. 24th Scheduled Update Error Hotfix]
content:
Greetings, dear Manager.

The following are issues that have been identified in the Oct. 24th Scheduled Update version of the game.

We will deploy a hotfix for the following issues by 21:00 today.
The hotfix will be deployed without having to download a separate client update; restart the game to access the newest version of the game. Please note that additional in-game downloads may occur.

<List>
► Fixed an Issue where The Barber of La Manchaland Outis' 'Blood-tinged Scissorblades III' effect's in-combat description had incorrect numbers
- Before: Turn Start: gain 2 Offense Level Up and 1 Defense Level Down for every 5 Stack
- After: Turn Start: gain 2 Offense Level Up for every 5 Stack
※ We learned that, both in the said effect's description, "At Blood-tinged Scissorblades III, gain 1 Offense Level Up based on the Stack" and "Turn Start: gain 2 Offense Level Up and 1 Defense Level Down for every 5 Stack" were based on different values.
The above text error will be adjusted to match the current in-game values.
The effect where the unit gains 2 Offense Level Up based on Stack was originally designed for boss enemies; correcting the actual effects to match the text will cause the said Identity to gain a disproportionately powerful buff compared to other characters, so we intend to change the text to match its effects.
We sincerely apologize for confusing you with this mistake.

► Fixed an issue where Yearning-Mircalla E.G.O of Meursault's "Lose X Count" was missing the description for which Keyword it was supposed to lose Count for
- Before: [On Hit after Clash Win] Activate Bleed on the target once (target loses 1 Count)
- After : [On Hit after Clash Win] Activate Bleed on the target once (target loses 1 Bleed Count)

► Fixed an issue where, in the first phase of the last Encounter in 7-36 caused 'Unknown' to load in the Passives descriptions for summoned units

► Addressed typos and missing Keyword highlights in the last Encounter of 7-36

► (JP Only) Fixed an issue where a certain Passive in the last Encounter of 7-36 was incorrectly translated

► (EN Only) Improved clarity for a notice description in the Support Unit UI and fixed a typo in story

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Notice: Oct. 24th Progression Blocker Temp. Fix & Hotfix
content:
Hello,
This is Project Moon.

After identifying the issue where some users were experiencing a progression blocker in all Story Dungeons, we decided to implement a temporary measure via a hotfix.

The hotfix will be deployed without having to download a separate client update; restart the game to access the newest version of the game. Please note that additional in-game downloads may occur.

Cause
- Caused by progressing through the dungeon after deploying a Support Identity, which you do not own, from a Friend

Hotfix Date
- After Oct. 24th (THU), 16:30

Temporary Measure
- We have disabled access to Support Identities in all Story Stages.

Solution (Applied with the next Client Update)
- We corrected the logic that was causing this issue.
- We plan to deploy a new client update with the fix on our next update, and Support Identity functions will be enabled again once that fix deploys.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

[Oct. 24th Scheduled Update Error Compensation]
Compensation : Lunacy x1000
Recipients : All users whose accounts were created before Oct. 31th 2024, 10:00
Can be claimed once per Account
When : After Oct. 24th 2024, 17:00

title: Oct. 24th Progression Blocker Temporary Fix
content:
We have identified the cause of the black screen progression blocker issue in all story dungeons that some of our players have been experiencing.

Issue
- Occurs when slotting in a friend Support Unit upon entry to the Story Dungeon Stages for the first time
- Progressing through the Story Dungeon with the said loadout will cause the black screen progression blocker issue

Cause
- In the progress of limiting the deployment of Don Quixote in all Story Dungeons, the logic to implement that interfered with the logic that deploys Friend Support Units, which caused the black screen progression blocker issue.
- Once it occurs, the user's loadout data will be saved in an abnormal state, causing the issue to repeat even upon restarting the game.

In order to play through the dungeon properly, please follow the below procedure.
- Upon first entry to the dungeon: please do not deploy a Friend Support Unit in your loadout.
- In the in-dungeon Checkpoints: please do not deploy a Friend Support Unit in your loadout.

If the issue is already occurring, and if you are already inside the dungeon, please forfeit the dungeon and enter again with a new loadout.

How to forfeit a dungeon
- Select the cogwheel on the top right corner of the Dungeon UI, and select "Forfeit" in the subsequent options menu.
- If there is an issue preventing you from attempting the above fix: attempt to enter a different Story Dungeon, and once the "You're currently exploring (Other Dungeon)'. Forfeit your progress and enter a new dungeon?" popup appears, press "Yes".

We will update you via an additional notice as soon as we resolve this issue.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

We have identified the following issues in our October 17th Scheduled Update.

1. An issue where the game may get softlocked during the battle in Stage 7-26

7-26 We have identified an issue where the game has a chance to softlock in Stage 7-26.
Please refer to the following for more information.

[Conditions]
- May occur in Clashes against a special enemy that appears only in Stage 7-26.
- There is approxiatemly 20% chance that your character will freeze during a Clash, softlocking the game.
- This issue is localized entirely within this single stage.

[Cause]
We created a specialized clash script only for that combat Encounter Stage.
However, there was a logic error in that script tied to a specific animation, which causes the softlocking issue.

You can lower the chance of triggering this issue by minimizing the number of clashes in the Stage(by targeting only a single enemy Skill Slot with all of your Skills, for example)
If the game softlocks, please select the gear wheel icon on the top right corner of the screen and select 'Give Up' to exit the stage. Then, you should be able to either retry the stage or access other content of the game.

[Solution and our future measures]
We identified the problem logic and corrected the issue.
We plan to add additional logic for exception cases so that no soft locking issue may occur due to similar cutscene logic issues(such as the next animation not loading for a certain amount of time).

However, as our current goal is to focus on the stability of the content for the next part of the chapter,
we kindly ask for your understanding that the fix for this issue will be deployed with our next Scheduled Update, Canto 7 (Part 3).

2. Notice: Oct. 17th Scheduled Update Error Hotfix

We will deploy a Hotfix for the following issues by 17:00 today.
Hotfixes can be deployed without a separate client update, and can be applied by restarting the game. However, please note that additional downloads may occur.

<List>
► Fixed an issue where 'The Barber of La Manchaland Outis' Skill 3's "[On Use] If the target has 5+ Bleed, Coin Power +1" works up to "Coin Power +2"
► (EN Only) Fixed an issue where Faust's Lasso E.G.O Corrosion Skill Threadspinning Tier 4 has an issue where "(max 2)" was missing from "Coin Power +1 for ever 7 Rupture on the target (max 2)"
► (KR Only) Fixed typos in 'The Barber of La Manchaland Outis' self-introduction lines & voice lines
► (JP Only) Fixed an issue where a certain character's Skill Keyword was mislabeled as "Poise" instead of "Rupture"
► Updated the BGM for Stage 7-34 with a more recent version of the song

We sincerely apologize for the issues, including the game softlocking issue mentioned above.

[Oct. 17th Scheduled Update Error Compensation]
- Compensation: Lunacy x500
- Recipients: All users whose accounts were created before Oct. 24th 2024, 10:00
- When: After Oct. 17th 2024(THU), 17:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

This error compensation can be claimed until Oct. 24th (Thu) 2024, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

About the New Season
--------------------

※ Please refer to the Steam Announcements page for more information regarding Season 5.
- [Posted Sep. 30th, 2024] Guide on Season 5 : Oblivion

Season Update <Part 2> Changes
------------------------------

1. Gradual Main Story & Battle Pass Updates
Main Story Canto 7-(Part 2) and Season 5 Limbus Pass-Oblivion (Part 2) Unlocked

2. New EXP & Thread Luxcavations Added
Upon clearing certain Stages in Canto 7 <Part 2>, the EXP Luxcavation #7 and Thread Luxcavation #4 will be unlocked.

► EXP Luxcavation #7: Clear Main Story 7-26
► Thread Luxcavation #4: Clear Main Story 7-34

※ Changes of note
Starting from EXP Luxcavation #7, the stages will now be distinguished into three categories: Slash, Pierce, and Blunt. Each is open on different days of the week.
- Slash : MON, TUE, SUN
- Pierce : WED, THU, SUN
- Blunt : FRI, SAT, SUN

Each stage corresponding to each Attack Type has first-time clear bonuses, and clearing it will unlock the Skip option for the said Attack Type Stage.

Major Changes
-------------

1. Skill icon visibility improvements
We have made the following adjustments to provide better visibility and readability for Skills on the Dashboard UI.
(1) Colors adjusted
(2) Skill icon outlines have been further emphasized to distinguish them from one another

2. Stage progression changes for preexisting Stages with 2+ Waves
For Stages with 2+ Waves, we have made one of the following adjustments.
(1) Change the map background when moving to the next Wave
(2) Modified the Stage so that it's no longer Wave-based but enemy Substitution based

※ Intent: We intend to make it so that Wave Stages apply only to Stages where the map changes. We have adjusted some of our previous Stages to match these changes. However, for certain Stages that may have significant in-game experience and difficulty changes upon map-changes, we have maintained their previous formats.

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Fixed an issue where Cinq West Section 3 Meursault's raised 'Base Power' value due to 'Focused Attack - Meursault' was not calculated as a part of the Clash Power predictions
※ This was a visual-only issue, and the Base Power values are applied as intended.

► (EN Only) Fixed various translation issues
(1) Fixed the outdated translation on the 'Lasso' E.G.O
- Before : Snare
- After : Lasso
(2) Fixed an issue where a certain character in Zwei West Section 3 Sinclair's ID Uptie Story had incorrect title & name
(3) Fixed a minor typo in Dante's Notes 'Peccatula' - Record #3
(4) Fixed a minor typo in Main Story - Canto 7 <Part 1>

► (JP Only) Fixed various translation issues
(1) Improved the translation for a character that has appeared before
※ The Character : Jia Huan
- Before : ガファン
- After : ジア・ファン
(2) Fixed an issue where a part of the dialogue in <Part 1> is different from the dialogue in other languages

► Adjusted the systems so that, in Chain Battles, "Fixed Member Needed" Sinners cannot be set as Backup Units

► Fixed an issue where, under certain circumstances, the 'Bloodfeast' UI in Canto 7 <Part 1> combat Stages would load incorrectly

► Fixed an issue where the values for the debuff - Withered were written differently in the descriptions
- Before : "Offense Level -22, Defense Level -22" and "Offense Level -25, Defense Level -25" were both being used
- After : Unified to "Offense Level -25, Defense Level -25"

► Fixed an issue where, under certain circumstances, 'remaining enemies' UI would disappear

► Adjusted the in-game description for the increased max number of selectable Announcers
- Before : 'If you select 2 or more Announcers at once, the dialogue to play will be randomly chosen. (Up to 5)'
- After : 'If you select 2 or more Announcers at once, the dialogue to play will be randomly chosen. (Up to 10)'

※ This change was applied with the 2024, Oct. 10th (KST) Scheduled Update, but we did not inform you via a notice.
We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Oct. 24th, 2024 (KST)
- When : After Oct. 17th, 2024 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Oct. 24th (Thu) 2024, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.
- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change depending on the status of maintenance. If such a change occurs, we will let you know in a follow-up notice.
- A resource download may be prompted after the build update. If you're using a mobile device, it is recommended to proceed with a Wi-Fi connection.
- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account. Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: Notice: Zwei West Section 3 Ishmael's Clashable Guard Error
content:
-----------------------------------------------------------

Hello, this is Project Moon.

We would like to inform you of the following issue that has been identified regarding Oct. 3rd Scheduled Update's Zwei West Section 3 Ishmael's "Clashable Guard" ability. 
Please note the following information if you plan to extract.

Currently, there is an issue with the Clashable Guard where: 'On Clash Lose: does not gain Final Power from the following sources: Resonance and the Level disparity against the Attack Skill' does not activate.

This may cause the Defense Skill's Power to calculate at a higher-than-expected value upon losing a Clash. 
We sincerely apologize for causing you inconvenience in gauging a new Identity's performance due to our incorrect Power calculation formula.

The Final Power calculation issue with the Clashable Guard will be fixed via a future Scheduled Update, and we will inform you via a Scheduled Update Notice in which it is corrected.

We apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Notice: Softlocking Issue Identified after Oct. 2nd Scheduled Update
content:
Hello,
This is Project Moon.

In the Oct. 2nd (WED) 12:00 (KST) Scheduled Update, we have identified an issue where the game may softlock under certain circumstances.

- Issue: An issue where, in Focused Encounters, Clashing against an enemy's Part may cause the game to softlock under certain circumstances
Conditions: Triggered when 1) If the last Clash was a draw, 2) the enemy unit's Part is immobilized due to special conditions(except death, near-death, or Staggered), or 3) Severed.

- Issue: An issue where, in Stages with Peccatula Invidiae, using a Skill sometimes shows 0 Power and softlocks the game
- Conditions: Triggered when 1) the enemy unit has an E.G.O Skill equipped, 2) ended the Clash in a loss, and 3) re-equips the said E.G.O Skill and attempts to use it again

We are currently investigating and addressing the above issues, and the fixes will be deployed via our next Client update.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Guide on Season 5: Oblivion
content:
---------------------------

Greetings, dear Manager.

Season 5: Oblivion will commence on Oct. 10th, 2024, at 12:00 PM (KST).
This notice will provide information on Season 5 and its new or adjusted systems.

Please note that the contents shown above are subject to change.
We will notify you again as each update is deployed.

Index
-----

1. Season 4 Egoshard Carryover
2. Gradual Main Story & Battle Pass Updates
3. New Packages
4. Identity Level Cap Increase & Luxcavations
5. Season 5 Extractions
6. Season 5 Dispenser
7. New Announcer Added
8. Mirror Dungeon #5 Preview

1. Season 4 Egoshard Carryover
------------------------------

Guide on Season Changes - Egoshards
-----------------------------------

- When a new Season begins, half of the previous Season’s Egoshards will be carried over (and rounded up).
- The carryover rates for unconverted Egoshards from multiple seasons past will be halved for each following Season.
- The remaining Egoshards are converted into Thread.
- Egoshard Crates (both random and nominable) will be carried over in the same way.

As per the information above, half of the currencies listed below will be converted to Season 5’s.

- Season 4 [Sinner]’s Egoshards
- Season 4 Uptie & Threadspinning only Shards (Universal)
- Season 4 Egoshard Crate
- Season 4 Nominable Egoshard Crate

The carryover of currencies to Season 5 will automatically occur the first time you log into the game during Season 5.
A popup will show how much previous Season’s Egoshard relevant currency you owned, and how they have been converted.

※ Previous Season’s Identity Egoshard currencies that are still in the Mailbox or in the Lost & Found will be carried over when they are claimed. Carryover to Season 5 currency will occur as soon as they are claimed, and currencies that were not carried over will be converted to Thread-related currencies.

2. Gradual Main Story & Battle Pass Updates
-------------------------------------------

Chapter 7 of the main story and the Season 5 Pass
will be updated in 3 parts.

► 10/10
- Main Story Ch. 7 《Part 1》
- Season 5 Pass Rewards 《Lv. 1 ~ Lv. 20》

► 10/17
- Main Story Ch. 7 《Part 2》
- Season 5 Pass Rewards 《Lv. 21 ~ Lv. 40》

► 10/24
- Main Story Ch. 7 《Part 3》
- Season 5 Pass Rewards 《Lv. 41 ~ Lv. 120 (Max Pass Level)》
- Season 5 Pass Max Pass Level+ Rewards

Accumulated Pass Levels are continuously tracked regardless of the gradual updates.
When the subsequent updates unlock the rewards for higher Pass Levels, you can immediately claim them up to your accumulated Pass Level.

Max Pass Level rewards earned for leveling up the Pass past the max Pass Level are also kept track of even when they aren’t unlocked, and you can claim the accumulated Season 5 Nominable Egoshard Crates immediately once they are made available.

Chapter 7 stage progression rewards and Max Pass Level rewards will become available to claim with the October 24th update, when 《Part 3》 of this chapter is added.

3. New Packages
---------------

With the Season 5 Update, the following 2
new packages will be added to the game.
- Season 5 Commencement Lunacy Pack

[ Contents ] Paid Lunacy 1300
[ Price ] ₩15,000 / $10.99 / ¥1,500

4. Identity Level Cap Increase & Luxcavations
---------------------------------------------

<Identity Level Cap Increase>

If you have cleared the Main Story Chapter 6, the max level of
Identities will be increased from 45 to 50 with the Season 5 Update.

- Identity Level Cap Increase Conditions

No Conditions : Identity Level Cap 40
Clear Main Story Chapter 5 : Identity Level Cap 45
Clear main Story Chapter 6 : Identity Level Cap 50

<Reduced the Required Level-up EXP Growth Curve>

For Levels between 45 and 50, the rate at which level-up EXP requirements grow has been reduced compared to previous levels.
Considering our Identity release schedule and Identities that must be leveled up, we determined that growing their potential will be exponentially difficult the further we expand the Levels.
We would like to adjust the level-up EXP curve as follows past Level 45.

- Required EXP to level up between Level 45~50
will be lower than in the previous level.
- The required EXP for level up will not grow between Level 45~50.

However, when the level cap unlocks further with future Season updates, the new levels in the expanded cap will require increased EXP. Therefore, with future Season Updates, the required EXP for leveling up will continue to increase. However, it will be much less steep compared to the previous EXP curve.

<EXP Luxcavation #4~#6 Rewards Buffed>

Rewards for EXP Luxcavation #4~#6 will be buffed.
With the expansion of the level cap, we wanted to reduce the difficulty of leveling up your Identities.
So, we intend to expand the rewards for EXP Luxcavation #4~#6, as the levels that make use of those Luxcavations require much more EXP than the previous levels.

title: 2024, Oct 2nd/3rd Scheduled Update Notice
content:
-----------------------------------------

Greetings, dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on Oct. 2nd, 3rd of 2024 (KST).
Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.
Please refer below for details about the update.

This Scheduled Maintenance will be deployed over two separate periods: Oct. 2nd Wed, 10:00 (KST) and Oct. 3rd, 10:00 (KST).

The following will be deployed on each Scheduled Maintenance.

<Oct. 2nd 10:00 ~ 12:00 (KST)>
- New Client Version Deployment & Resource Downloads will occur
- After Maintenance, from Oct. 2nd 12:00 ~ Oct. 3rd 10:00 (KST), the previous Extractions (Target Extraction Ryōshū, New Target Extraction Devyat' North Section 3 Rodion & Bygone Days Ishmael) will be available

<Oct. 3rd 10:00 ~ 12:00 (KST)>
- No Client Update
- Resource downloads may occur depending on data updates
- After Maintenance, the new Target Extraction (Zwei West Section 3 Ishmael) will begin

However, please note that the in-game weekly resets will occur on Oct. 3rd Thursday, 06:00 (KST).

New Content
-----------

1. New Target Extraction [Zwei West Section 3 Ishmael] (10/3 12:00 ~ 10/17 10:00 (KST))
Extraction rate increases for the following Identity
- 3★ : Zwei West Section 3 Ishmael

2. New Identity
The following Identity has been added to the list of extractable Identities.
- 3★ : Zwei West Section 3 Ishmael

※ Please note that there is no Sinner Target Extraction between Oct. 3rd 12:00 ~ Oct. 10th 06:00 (KST).

Major Changes
-------------

1. Users can now view their current stock when viewing item tooltips.

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Fixed an error where Blade Lineage Mentor Meursault's "Swordplay of the Homeland" buff applies on unintended targets as well
※ Relevant Effects : When at 7+ Poise, upon Skill Use, Skill 3 deals +(30/# of Coins)% more damage and deals +(50/# of Coins)% damage on Critical Hit
- Before : This effect activated for E.G.O Skills as well
- After : This effect now activates only for Skill 3, as per its description

We have identified an issue where the Skill 3-enhancing effects of 'Swordplay of the Homeland' applies to E.G.O Skills as well. This error occurred as E.G.O Skills were recognized to be at the same level as Skill 3. Our initial intent upon designing 'Swordplay of the Homeland' was to enhance Blade Lineage Identities' Skills 1~3, and E.G.O Skills were not a part of intended buff targets for this effect. And the in-game text also states that it enhances Skill 1, 2, and 3, as intended. Therefore, we intend to fix the issue where Skill 3-enhancing effects of 'Swordplay of the Homeland' applies also to E.G.O Skills. We sincerely apologize to all managers who have been using Blade Lineage Meursault Identity.

Also, when an issue with Identities or E.G.O occurs, we often fix the error to match the in-game text as much as possible in order to keep things more consistent. This will apply to future errors as well; we will likely be making these fixes to match the in-game texts in most cases. We will try our best to develop and test our game to minimize issues with Identities & E.G.O performances. We apologize for causing a disturbance to your enjoyment of our game.

► Fixed an issue where the game may softlock under certain circumstances
※ Relevant Issue : An issue where the game softlocks when Turn End effects that are supposed to activate only against living units activates against dead units as well, causing the game to softlock

► Fixed an issue where certain dates of Dante's Notes don't appear properly

► (EN Only) Adjusted translation for '시작 정신력', which appear in certain Deployment orders in Chain Battles such as Refraction Railway Line 4
- Before : Starting SP
- After : Entry SP

► Adjusted the name of 'Unique Counter' to 'Power Counter'

► Separated the communication logic in order to alleviate the following issue: When attempting to log in, if the game fails to update the Steam Shop currency, he login attempt may fail
※ We changed the Steam Shop currency update timing when entering the Shop. If the game fails to update the currency, it will now display it in USD; however, upon purchase, it will be billed accordingly to your Steam Wallet currency settings.

Known Issues
------------

► An issue where, in the E.G.O Detailed Information window, attempting to consecutively Threadspin while looking at the E.G.O Passives tab will cause the 'Threadspin' button to turn into an Identity 'Uptie' Button.

► An issue where, under certain circumstances, the Thread Luxcavation Daily Bonus count appears incorrectly
※ This is a visual-only issue; the bonuses are applied as intended.

Known Issues after the 24/10/02 (KST) Scheduled Update
------------------------------------------------------

► An issue where certain resources load incorrectly in the Sapling of Light UI

Oct. 2nd Scheduled Update Error Fix, Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- Compensation : Lunacy x 500
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 06:00 Oct. 10th, 2024 (KST)
- When : After Oct. 2nd, 2024 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Oct. 10th (Thu) 2024, 06:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.
- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change depending on the status of maintenance. If such a change occurs, we will let you know in a follow-up notice.
- A resource download may be prompted after the build update. If you're using a mobile device, it is recommended to proceed with a Wi-Fi connection.
- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account. Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: Notice: Issues Identified in Sep. 26th Scheduled Update
content:
[Notice: Issues Identified in Sep. 26th Scheduled Update]

Hello,
This is Project Moon.

We would like to inform you of the issues that have been identified after the Sep. 26th(THU) 12:00(KST) Scheduled Update.

<List>
1. An issue where the game softlocks in combat under certain circumstances
2. Errors in Dante's Notes & Story Timeline

<Details>
1. An issue where the game softlocks in combat under certain circumstances

We have identified a softlocking issue in our latest Client version(1.57.1) where the game would become unresponsive during a combat encounter.
This issue occurs for enemies with certain patterns, and we are currently reviewing, investigating, and fixing content that may be affected by this issue.

Cause: In the process of adding the 'Retreat' function to the game, we made an adjustment to the game logic to fix an issue where a unit defeated at the current Turn Start gets eliminated from the Passives list UI on the left side of the screen.

Issue: The 'Turn End' effects that were supposed to activate only against surviving units were activating on defeated units as well, which meant that the game could softlock under those specific circumstances.

Solution: We have corrected the logic that was causing these issues, and we are currently testing any content that may have been affected by this issue.

2. Errors in Dante's Notes & Story Timeline

After the Sep. 26th(THU), 12:00(KST) Scheduled Update, we identified an issue with the timeline in the newly added Dante's Notes & previously updated stories.

Issue: Stories from 6.5-1 'Timekilling Time' to 'The 4th Walpurgis Night' Mini Episode are labeled as 984.11.

Cause: We misread the timeline of the events in Timekilling Time, which led us to mislabel the months in which the events of the story are taking place.

Solution: We have adjusted the timeline for the following story banners.
* The following story banners visible in the Drive menu have been adjusted to 984-12
6.5 - Timekilling Time
Detour Tales - 'A Familiar Siren'
6.5 - Murder on the WARP Express
Detour Tales - 'The 4th Walpurgis Night'
* The entry dates for Dante's Notes, which were added with the Sep. 26th(THU) 12:00(KST) Scheduled Update, have also been adjusted to match our intentions

Preventative Measure: We will keep better track of the timeline of the City and the order of events that takes place within.

<Error Fix Deployment ETA>
In order to deploy the fix for issue #1 "An issue where the game softlocks in combat under certain circumstances", we must proceed with a client build.
We are currently performing a test on relevant content and developing the upcoming content simultaneously, so it is difficult for us to proceed with a new build and submit an emergency review request to deploy a fix for this issue.
The new version with a fix for this issue will be applied with our next Scheduled Update, alongside our other content and fixes.

The issue #2 "Errors in Dante's Notes & Story Timeline" will be deployed via a hotfix by 20:30.
Hotfixes can be deployed without a client update, and will be applied upon restarting the game. Please note that additional downloads may occur to refresh the in-game data.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused by these issues.

[Sep. 26th Scheduled Update Error Compensation]
- Compensation : Lunacy x500
- Recipients : All users whose accounts were created before Oct. 3rd 2024, 10:00
- When : After Sep. 26th (THU) 2024, 20:30(KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

title: (Android Only) An issue where the Back to Office Pack was unpurchasable
content:
[(Android Only) An issue where the Back to Office Pack was unpurchasable]

Hello,
This is Project Moon.

After the Sep. 26th(THU) Scheduled Update, we identified an issue where the "Back to Office Pack" could not be purchased on the Android platform.

Cause: The package in question was not activated as one of Google's In-app purchase products
Solution: Package activated Sep. 26th(THU), 13:30(KST)

It may take some time for the above fix to be applied to the store. If you still cannot purchase the package after the above-mentioned time, please try again 5~10 minutes later.

We apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Sep. 26th - New User Event & Returning User Event
content:
------------------------------------------------

Greetings, dear Manager.

With the Sep. 26th, 2024 (KST) Scheduled Update, the [New User Event & Returning User Event] will be added to the game.

► Event Description

1. New User Event
- Event Accessible Period : Always accessible after 2024/9/26 12:00 (KST)

- Event Activation Period
(1) Start Date : Date of account creation
(2) End Date : 30 days from the day of account creation (including the creation date)

- Content : For 14 days, new users can receive various rewards by logging in.

- Major Rewards : Nominable S1 Identity Ticket, Takeoff Module - ID Uptie, Nominable S1 Battle Pass E.G.O Ticket

2. Returning User Event
- Event Accessible Period : 2024/9/26 12:00 (KST) ~ 2024/10/31 06:00 (KST)

- Event Activation Period
(1) Start Date : When a user who matches the returning user conditions logs in to the game for the first time during the Event Accessible Period
(2) End Date : 14 days from the above date (including the first day of logging in)

- Returning user conditions : If 60 days have passed since the user’s last login record & if the user has completed Main Story 1 - 11

- Content : Returning users can receive various rewards by logging in or completing returning user missions.

- Major Rewards : Assured Extraction: 3★ Identity, Takeoff Module - ID Uptie, Season 4 Uptie & Threadspinning only Shard (Universal)

New User Event
--------------

► Event Accessible Period
Always accessible after 2024/9/26 12:00 (KST)

► Event Activation Period
- Start Date : Date of account creation
- End Date : 30 days from the day of account creation (including the creation date)

(※ The measurement of days is based on the Server update time, which is 06:00 (KST))

► Description
- All users who create a new account after the 2024/9/26 (KST) Scheduled Update will be presented with the [New User Event] Page.

- A new user can obtain login rewards based on the cumulative number of days they logged in during the event period.

- You can receive up to 14 days of cumulative login rewards.

- You can receive a Nominable S1 Identity Ticket as the 7-day cumulative login reward, Takeoff Module - ID Uptie as the 13-day cumulative login reward, and the Nominable S1 Battle Pass E.G.O Ticket as the 14-day cumulative login reward.

※ The [Nominable S1 Identity Ticket] includes Season 1 Event Identities.

Returning User Event
--------------------

► Event Accessible Period
2024/9/26 12:00 (KST) ~ 2024/10/31 06:00 (KST)

► Event Activation Period
- Start Date : When a user who matches the returning user conditions logs in to the game for the first time during the Event Accessible Period
- End Date : 14 days from the above date (including the first day of logging in)

(※ The measurement of days is based on the Server update time, which is 06:00 (KST))

(※ Even when the ‘Event Accessible Period’ ends, any Returning User Event in progress will not expire until its own end date.)

(※ If a user who matches the returning user conditions logs in to the game for the first time after the Event Accessible Period ends, because the Event Accessible Period is over, they will not be able to participate in the Returning User Event.)

► Returning User Conditions
- If 60 days have passed since the user’s last login record & if the user has completed Main Story 1 - 11

► Description
Any managers who fit the ‘Returning User’ description can access the following content.

1. Upon the first login, receive Workplace Re-adjustment Assistance Resources
2. Returning User Login Event
3. Returning User Missions
4. Luxcavation Bonus Reward Buff Activated
5. Returning User Pack

Returning User Event
--------------------

► Workplace Re-adjustment Assistance Resources
When logging in for the first time, Returning Users will receive ‘Workplace Re-adjustment Assistance Resources’

► Returning User Login Event
A Returning User can obtain login rewards based on the cumulative number of days they logged in during the event period.
You can receive up to 14 days of cumulative login rewards.

- Major Reward : Assured Extraction: 3★ Identity (7-days cumulative login)

► Returning User Missions
During the Event period, Returning Users can complete Returning Manager Missions to receive various rewards.
Completing Missions raises your completion meter, and you can receive Mission progress rewards every time you meet a certain milestone on the meter.

- Major Rewards : Takeoff Module - ID Uptie x1, Season 4 Uptie & Threadspinning only Shard (Universal)

※ 「Season 4 Uptie & Threadspinning only Shard (Universal)」 can be used to Uptie or Threadspin any Identity/E.G.O you wish to upgrade. Unlike the other Sinner Egoshards, these can be used universally for all Sinners. This item counts as a Season 4 Currency, and just like other Seasonal Currencies, its quantity in your inventory will be halved when the new Season begins. However, if you claim this reward during Season 5, you will receive them as Season 5 Uptie & Threadspinning only Shard (Universal), which means that they won’t be halved when Season 5 begins.

Returning User Event
--------------------

► Luxcavation Bonus Reward Buff Activated
Returning Users will have Luxcavation Bonus Rewards Buffs activated during the Event period.

- EXP & Thread Luxcavations receive 3 daily bonuses each.
- Clearing the Luxcavation while the Luxcavation Bonus is active will give you additional base rewards.
- However, any bonus rewards received either by skipping encounters or using daily bonuses will not be affected.

► Returning User Pack
During the Event Period, Returning Users can purchase the [Back to Office Pack] from the Package shop.

- Back to Office Pack
- Description : A limited package for returning managers. Contains the following items:
(※ This item is only visible to returning users, and can be purchased only during the return event period.)
- Contents : Extraction Ticket x5, Identity Training Ticket IV x45, Thread x100
- Price : ₩9,900 / $6.99 / ¥1,000

title: 2024, Sep. 26th Scheduled Update Notice
content:
---------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on Sep. 26th, 2024 (KST).
Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.
Please refer below for details about the update.

New Content
-----------

1. New Dante's Notes entries added
New entries to Dante's Notes will be added after the Sep. 26th (KST) Scheduled Update.
※ Unlock Conditions : Clear Main Story 6.5-30

2. New Users & Returning Users Event
※ Please refer to the Steam Announcements page for more information.

New Content
-----------

1. Added a new UI element to the Dashboard that shows up when Devyat' North Section 3 Rodion can activate the 'Strategic R&R Mode'.

2. Now Luxcavations will display bonus rewards for skipping Luxcavation encounters separately
- Before : Showed the sum of total rewards from both base and bonus rewards
- After : Shows base rewards and bonus rewards separately
※ e.g. If the player received 4 base rewards and 2 rewards for skipping a Luxcavation, it used to show 6 rewards; however, after the update, it will show 4 and 2 rewards separately.

3. Adjusted Identity Uptie & E.G.O Threadspinning upgrade UI with the addition of new items

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------
