title: [Notice: Issues Identified in Sep. 19th Scheduled Update]
content:
[Issues identified in the Sep. 19th Scheduled Update]

Hello,
This is Project Moon.

The following are issues that have been identified in the Sep. 19th Scheduled Update(version 1.57.0)
They will be corrected via a future scheduled update, and we will inform you via a Scheduled Update Notice as soon as they are corrected.

1. An issue where, in a Main Story Chaptter 5 Boss fight, turns would infinitely grow without letting the players or the enemies take any action
Cause: This was a side effect that occurred as we were developing a new system, and it occurred in this update. This occurs when the turn where the ‘Assisted Defense’ was used, but if a certain enemy was defeated by effects such as “Burn” in the same turn.
Solution: We corrected the logic in the corresponding boss pattern.

2. An issue where Lobotomy E.G.O::Lantern Don Quixote’s Coin Reuse for Skill 3 would activate repeatedly
Cause: This was a side effect that occurred due to a new system affecting the Reuse logic, and it occurred in this update.
Solution: We identified the problematic Reuse logic, and we resolved it by correcting the said logic.

3. An issue where, as the player is making inputs to the UI while using an E.G.O, using the shortcut keys would immediately cause the combat phase to begin
Cause: This was caused because the game intercepts both the mouse controls and the shortcut key controls at the same time. It occurred after we implemented the shortcut key system to the game.
Solution: We adjusted the logic so that shortcut keys won’t activate when controlling the game with a mouse.

4. An issue where, after Evading an attack, if 2+ allies would Evade an enemy’s AOE attack, the game would softlock
Cause: There was an error in the preexisting system. We assume that this issue occurred sometime before this current update. It occurs when 2+ allies who can reuse their Evade Skills after successfully evading once are targeted by AOE attacks.
Solution: We identified the problematic Evade Reuse logic, and we resolved it by correcting the said logic.

We will now track our development history and share them to set a more concrete testing perimeter so that developing a new system won’t cause such side effects.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

[Sep. 19th Scheduled Update Error Compensation]
- Compensation : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose accounts were created before Sep. 26th, 2024 10:00
- When : After Sep. 19th (THU), 22:30 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Error Compensation can be claimed until Sep. 26th (Thu) 2024, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

title: Notice : Mirror Dun. Game Crash Upon Skill Replacement
content:
[Notice : Mirror Dun. Game Crash Upon Skill Replacement]

Hello,
this is Project Moon.

We have identified an issue where, in the Mirror Dungeon, replacing a Skill of an Identity causes the game to crash.

※ As an emergency measure, we have temporarily disabled the Skill Replacement function by forcing it to be “SOLD OUT”.
If you are currently within a Skill Replacement UI, any control may cause the game to crash; please restart the game.

Cause
- As per the UI structure adjustment, we made a unilateral adjustment in the code to universally apply the changes universally.
- However, because the Skill Replacement UI in the Mirror Dungeon uses a separate, duplicated version of the UI, the changes did not apply to that specific UI.
Solution
- We have identified the Mirror Dungeon Skill Replacement duplicate UI and made corrections accordingly.
- Because this requires a Client Build, however, a full correction will be deployed with our next Scheduled Update.

Future Measures
- We intend to no longer use any duplicates of UI if they share similar formats so that they won’t slip through universal changes like these.

Also, we are in the process of identifying and analyzing all issues that have occurred after today’s Sep. 19th Scheduled Update.
We will inform you via an additional notice as soon as we identify them.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

When we first wrote the description for 'Curse', we believed that 'Turn End:' conditional implied that it would apply next turn; however, as we were working on our new E.G.O, we realized that the lack of clear activation timing could cause confusion in our users, so we have decided to change the description.

title: Upcoming measures to the softlocking issue after Sep. 12th Scheduled Update
content:
[Upcoming measures to the softlocking issue after Sep. 12th Scheduled Update]

Hello, this is Project Moon.

We would like to inform you the cause and our measure to fix the softlocking issue that occurred after Sep. 12th Scheduled Update.

[Cause]
We added a new combat system logic to the game for a new functionality of our upcoming Identity(Devyat’ North Rodion).
As we were making UI adjustments to the combat view, we neglected to include the specific logic for Panicked characters.
This caused an issue where the dashboard would become unresponsive in the Chaining phase, softlocking the game.

[Solution]
We have identified where the logic error occurred, and we are currently investigating our work history to make a precise fix for its causes.
When preparing for a new combat mechanic in upcoming materials, we will now make sure to separate the new logic from preexisting logic so that no softlocking issues can occur again due to similar causes.

We are preparing to deploy a new Client version(1.56.2) with fixes for the above issues.

The fix will be deployed to the STEAM platform as soon as the build is complete.
Because iOS and Android platforms require a review period, please understand that they will be deployed at a later time than the STEAM platform.

We will inform you via an additional notice as soon as we have a more concrete timeframe for the new version deployment.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

[Sep. 12th Scheduled Update Error Compensation]
- Compensation : Lunacy x1300
- Recipients : All users whose accounts were created before Sep. 19th 10:00
- When : After Sep. 12th 2024(THU), 18:00(KST)

※ This does not change the actual contents of the Package.

► Fixed an issue where healing or losing SP in the middle of a multi-coin E.G.O Skill would not show the relevant number popups

► (JP Only) Fixed various typos

(2) Fixed typos in certain Choice Event texts for the Mirror Dungeon Floor Theme Pack 'The 4th Walpurgis Night'

On Sep. 5th, 2024 (KST), new content 「The 4th Walpurgis Night」 will be added to the game.

-----------

※ Notice: Extraction Rate Changes during the Event Period
During the Walpurgis Night Event, Extractable Announcers will be added to the game.

Due to this addition, the Extraction rates for certain Extractions will be changed while the Walpurgis Night event is active.

In compliance with the 「Voluntary Restraint Guidelines for Probabilistic Items」 of Korea Association of Game Industry, we would like to inform you about the changing Extraction rates via this notice.

Please note this information as you play the game.

Extractions
-----------

「The 4th Walpurgis Night」 Target Extraction will be featured over the Event period.
「The 4th Walpurgis Night」 Target Extraction features increased Extraction rates for the following new Identities, E.G.O, and Announcers.

<Extractable>

Announcers : Hod Announcer, Dawn Office Announcers
E.G.O [HE] : Solemn Lament Gregor
3★ : Lobotomy E.G.O::Solemn Lament Yi Sang, Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Eyes & Penitence Ryōshū

► Identities & E.G.O
During the Event period, all current and previous 「Walpurgis Night」 event Identities and E.G.O will be Extractable from the following Extractions.
The 「The 1st~3rd Walpurgis Night」 Identities and E.G.O do not receive increased Extraction rates.

「The 4th Walpurgis Night」 Identities and E.G.O receive increased Extraction rates for ‘The 4th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction’.
「The 4th Walpurgis Night」 Identities receive increased Extraction rates only for ‘The 4th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction’, and not other Extractions.

<Walpurgis Night ID & E.G.O Extractions>
- The 4th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction
- Target Extraction : Don Quixote
- New Manager’s Welcome Extraction
- Assured Extraction: 3★ Identity Extraction
(※ Does not include E.G.Os)
- Standard Extraction

<Featured Identities & E.G.O>

E.G.O [WAW] : Sanguine Desire Rodion
E.G.O [HE] : <New> Solemn Lament Gregor, Wingbeat Ishmael
E.G.O [TETH] : Regret Meursault
3★ : <New> Lobotomy E.G.O::Solemn Lament Yi Sang, <New> Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Eyes & Penitence Ryōshū, Dawn Office Fixer Sinclair, Lobotomy E.G.O::Magic Bullet Outis, Lobotomy E.G.O::Regret Faust
2★ : Lobotomy E.G.O::Lantern Don Quixote, Hook Office Fixer Hong Lu

► Announcers
During the Event period, all current and previous 「Walpurgis Night」 event Announcers will be Extractable from the following Extractions.

The Announcers’ Extraction rate does not affect the Extraction rates of 3★ Identities. However, 2★ and 1★ units have lower Extraction rates to make room for the Announcers’ Extraction rates.

A duplicate of an already-owned Announcer will be automatically converted to 50 Thread Crates.

In 「The 4th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction」, the 4th Walpurgis Night Announcers receive increased rates.

「The 1st~3rd Walpurgis Night」 Announcers do not receive additionally increased rates for 「The 4th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction」

Pleaes note that the Announcers are featured only in 「The 4th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction」, and will not appear from other Extractions.

<Walpurgis Night Announcer Extractions>
- The 4th Walpurgis Night Target Extraction

<Featured Announcers>

Announcers : <New> Hod Announcer, <New> Dawn Office Announcer, Yesod Announcer, Molar Office Announcer, Malkuth Announcer, Jack/Pierre Announcer, Angela Announcer

Extractions - Yisang Exchange
-----------------------------

Yisang Exchange popup is separated into two categories: Identities/E.G.O and Announcers.
The following Identities & E.G.O will be available from 「The 4th Walpurgis Night」 Target Extraction Yisang Exchange.

<List>

E.G.O [HE] : <New> Solemn Lament Gregor
3★ : <New> Lobotomy E.G.O::Solemn Lament Yi Sang, <New> Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Eyes & Penitence Ryōshū

Announcers from the previous Walpurgis Nights will be added to the Yisang Exchange list.
The following Announcers will be available from 「The 4th Walpurgis Night」 Extraction Yisang Exchange.

<List>

Announcers : <New> Hod Announcer, <New> Dawn Office Announcer, Yesod Announcer, Molar Office Announcer, Malkuth Announcer, Jack/Pierre Announcer, Angela Announcer

Please note that any exchanged duplicates of Identities that have already been obtained will be converted to 50 Egoshards of the respective Sinner.
Please note that any exchanged duplicates of Announcers that have already been obtained will be immediately converted to 50 Thread Crates.

Dispenser
---------

During 「The 4th Walpurgis Night」 Event period, you can purchase all Identities and E.G.Os featured in the previous 「Walpurgis Night」 Events. However, Identities featured in the ongoing 「The 4th Walpurgis Night」 event cannot be purchased from the Dispenser.
Please note that 「Walpurgis Night」 Event Announcers will not be featured in the Dispenser.

<Available from the Dispenser>

E.G.O [WAW] : Sanguine Desire Rodion
E.G.O [HE] : Wingbeat Ishmael
E.G.O [TETH] : Regret Meursault
3★ : Dawn Office Fixer Sinclair, Lobotomy E.G.O::Magic Bullet Outis, Lobotomy E.G.O::Regret Faust
2★ : Lobotomy E.G.O::Lantern Don Quixote, Hook Office Fixer Hong Lu

<Unavailable from the Dispenser>

E.G.O [HE] : <New> Solemn Lament Gregor
3★ : <New> Lobotomy E.G.O::Solemn Lament Yi Sang, <New> Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Eyes & Penitence Ryōshū

9/5 Linked Content - Mini Episode
---------------------------------

With the start of the Event, a new Mini Episode 「The 4th Walpurgis Night」 will be introduced to the game.

- Unlock Conditions : Clear 6.5-30

※ Upon first entry, Managers who have not completed Stage 6.5-30 will be asked to confirm if they want to view the story before proceeding to the “Event Encounter - The Noon of Violet”

9/5 Linked Content - The Noon of Violet
---------------------------------------

During the Event period, linked content 「The Noon of Violet」 will be introduced to the game.

- Event Period : 9/5 12:00 ~ 9/19 10:00 (KST)
- Event Reward Exchange Period : 9/5 12:00 ~ 9/26 10:00 (KST)
- Unlock Conditions : None

<Description>
- With the start of the Event, the 「The Noon of Violet」 Event page will be added to the game.
- Complete special Missions(challenges) in the Normal and Hard difficulty Encounters to receive Mission Rewards.

<Event Progression>
- 「The 4th Walpurgis Night - The Noon of Violet」 Event can be accessed regardless of the Main Story progress.
※ Once the Event closes, however, the unlock condition will change to Clear Stage 6.5-30
- The Noon of Violet has two difficulties: Easy and Hard.
- Completing the Noon of Violet Encounters will consume an Enkephalin Module. Clear the Easy difficulty to unlock the Hard difficulty.
- The following effects will be active in the Easy difficulty:
• If the Identity’s level is lower than 45, raise their level to 45
• If the Identity’s Uptie Tier is lower than Tier 3, raise it to Tier 3
• If an equipped E.G.O’s Threadspinning Tier is lower than Tier 3, raise it to Tier 3
- During the Event Period, fulfill Missions(challenges) in each of the Easy and Hard difficulties to obtain their Rewards from the ‘Missions’ menu.

<Event Team Loadout>
- There will be a special, fixed Announcer for the Noon of Violet Ordeal Encounter. Therefore, you cannot select your own Announcers for this Event Encounter.
- The #1 Sinner in the Deployment Order will be imbued with the 'Training Team Captain' effect, which will grant them various beneficial effects.

<Event Combat Encounter>
- The Noon of Violet Ordeal Encounter requires you to defeat the swarm of Ordeal entities.
- Suppress the Ordeal, complete various missions, and claim your event rewards.
- However, once you go past the 99 turns limit, the Encounter will end in defeat.

<Missions>
- View Missions(challenges) to complete in the [Missions] menu. Every mission provides a reward upon completion.
- There are Easy and Hard Missions, which can be completed in Easy and Hard difficulties, respectively.
- Once the Event closes on 2024/9/19 10:00 (KST), you can no longer complete your Missions.
- [Rewards Claim] will remain open for 3 weeks from 2024/9/5 12:00 ~ 2024/9/26 10:00 (KST).
- Even after the event fully ends, you will be able to experience the 'The 4th Walpurgis Night - The Noon of Violet' combat Encounters and view its story anytime at the Driverside and Theater - [Detour Tales].
- From 2024/9/19 12:00 ~ 2024/9/26 10:00 (KST), you can only revisit the story but not the Encounter. You can revisit the Combat Encounter after 2024/9/26 12:00 (KST) via the Driverside menu.

Mirror Dungeon Floor Theme Pack - The Noon of Violet Pack Added
---------------------------------------------------------------

After the Sep. 5th Scheduled Update, the Noon of Violet Floor Theme Pack will be added to the Mirror Dungeon.
Walpurgis Night Choice Events and E.G.O Gifts will be added to the said floor.

<Spawn Location>
- Mirror Dungeon Simulation Floor 2
- Mirror Dungeon Ritornello Floor 3

※ Please note that this Floor Theme Pack will appear as a fixed spawn during the Walpurgis Night Event Period, and will be added to the randomized pool of the said floor once the Event is over.
Please note that completing the Walpurgis Night Floor Theme Pack will not affect your Event Mission progress.

title: 2024, September 5th Scheduled Update Notice
content:
-------------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on September 5th, 2024 (KST) for system optimizations and content updates. Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or mating in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance beings so that no data is lost. Refer below for details about the update.

New Content
-----------

1. New Target Extraction [The 4th Walpurgis Night] (9/5 12:00 ~ 9/19 10:00 (KST))
Extraction rate increases for the following Identities, E.G.O., and Announcers
- Announcers: Hod Announcer, Dawn Office Announcer
- E.G.O [HE] : Solemn Lament Gregor
- 3★ : Lobotomy E.G.O::Solemn Lament Yi Sang, Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Eyes & Penitence Ryōshū

2. Target Extraction [Don Quixote] (9/5 12:00 ~ 9/19 10:00 (KST))
Extraction rate increases for the following Identities and E.G.O
- E.G.O [HE] : [HE] Telepole Don Quixote
- E.G.O [TETH] : Wishing Cairn Don Quixote, Lifetime Stew Don Quixote
- 3★ : T Corp. Class 3 Collection Staff Don Quixote, The Middle Little Sister Don Quixote, Cinq South Section 5 Director Don Quixote, W Corp. L3 Cleanup Agent Don Quixote
- 2★ : Lobotomy E.G.O::Meat Lantern Don Quixote, N Corp. Mittelhammer Don Quixote, Shi South Section 5 Director Don Quixote
- 1★ : LCB Sinner Don Quixote

3. New Identities & E.G.O Added
The following Identities & E.G.O have been added to the list of extractable Identities & E.G.O.
- E.G.O [HE] : Solemn Lament Gregor
- 3★ : Lobotomy E.G.O::Solemn Lament Yi Sang, Lobotomy E.G.O::Red Eyes & Penitence Ryōshū

4. New Content [The 4th Walpurgis Night]
※ Please refer to the Steam Announcements page for more detailed information.

Major Changes
-------------

1. LCCB Assistant Manager Ryōshū - 'The Lucky Cig' Passive Adjusted

In the previous version of the Passive, the "50% of that Skills damage" added up the damage dealt to every single target of the attack when it came to calculating the 'bonus damage'. However, the 'bonus damage' being 50% of the culmination of damage dealt against every target of the attack, and the culmination of that damage being inflicted against each target, was dealing much more damage than we had intended it to deal. So, we intend to change it so that the bonus damage is calculated separately based on the damage taken by each target. Also, the Passive worked in a way that dealt 'bonus damage After Attack from a Skill that uses the final Ammo' as opposed to our initial intent, which was to have it deal 'bonus damage when using the final Ammo'. So we plan to change it so that the effect applies only to the Coin that uses the final Ammo, not the entire Skill.

► Before
If 1 ally with the least Ammo uses up their last Ammo with a skill, deal 50% of that Skill's damage as bonus damage to that Skill's target at Attack End.

► After
- If 1 ally with the least Ammo uses up their last Ammo with a Coin, after the Coin's attack ends, deal 50% of the damage dealt by that Coin against each target as bonus damage against each individual target. (rounded up)

► Reasoning for the Adjustment
Our initial intent upon designing 'The Lucky Cig' Passive was to add the satisfaction of moderately increased damage via the final bullet. However, as it is now, 'The Lucky Cig' Passive reflects the entire damage output of the Skill that used the final bullet, which is much higher than what we had intended when designing the Passive. This has not been added to the game as per our intentions. Even if we were to try to keep it working as it does now, because the mechanics are not working properly, it poses a risk that it may overly affect certain future characters who use the Ammo keyword. If we were to keep the Passive as it is, all of our upcoming Identities with Skills that use 'Ammo' will be made with this Passive in mind, which means that making an Ammo-using multi-Atk Weight Skill will be off the table. This also limits the possibilities of various interactions with the Ammo mechanic we can add to the game, so we regretfully intend to make this adjustment.

We sincerely apologize for inconveniencing and disappointing all managers who currently own LCCB Assistant Manager Ryōshū. We will be sure to relay our intent with much more detail when adding a passive to the game, and we will be sure to verify that it is working as intended and within the intended range in various circumstances. Also, if we realize that a certain element of the game is not working as intended, we will inform you via a notice as soon as possible.

With this Support Passive adjustment, we intend to reset the Level and the Uptie tiers of all managers and refund any upgrade materials used.

After the September 5th (KST) Scheduled Update, all managers' LCCB Assistant Manager Ryōshū's Level and Uptie Level will be reset. Upon reset, all resources, such as Training Tickets, Threads, and Egoshards, will be refunded via the in-game Inbox. The refunded Egoshards will be [Season 4 Ryōshū Egoshards] regardless of when you Uptied this Identity.

We would like to once again extend our deepest apologies to all managers who currently own LCCB Assistant Manager Ryōshū.

2. Game Engine Version Update as per the (Android) Google Play Store Policies

Internal data changes have occurred on the preexisting in-game resources, which will cause more downloads in addition to the new content. We recommend downloading it using a WiFi connection because it may use a significant amount of data

- Additional Downloads : Including resources for the new content, 3.5GB

Android Version 5.1 and 6.0 will no longer be supported.
Please use Android Version 7 or higher to play the game.

3. Adjusted certain Sinking and Charge E.G.O Gifts to include 'Unique' Keywords as well

► Affected E.G.O Gifts
- Sinking : Red Order, Thorny Path, Black Sheet Music, Eldtree Snare, Rags, Grandeur, Distant Star, Fragment of Decay
- Charge : Employee Card, Portable Battery Socket, Curriculum Vitae, Wrist Guards, T-1 Perpetual Motion Machine, Uncapped Difibrilator, Patrolling Flashlight, Imitative Generator, Fragment of Friction, E-Type Dimensional Dagger, Portable Barrier Battery, Biogenerative Battery, Cardiovascular Reactive Module, Prosthetic Joint Servos, Automated Joints, Overcharged Battery, Perpetual Generator Servos, Hearts-powered Jewel

► Unaffected E.G.O Gifts
- Sinking : Melted Spring, Midwinter Nightmare, Skeletal Crumbs, Artistic Sense, Headless Portrait, Broken Compass, Frozen Cries, Hoarfrost Footprint
- Charge : Nightvision Goggles, Lightning Rod, Material Interference Force Field, UPS System

4. Adjusted the color of the SP damage numbers
- Before : Used the same color as other damage numbers
- After : Changed it so that SP damage would be displayed in red color

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Fixed an issue where a certain activation condition was missing for the E.G.O Gift 'Uncapped Defibrilator'
※ Details: Fixed it so that it activates for E.G.O Skills as well

► Fixed an issue where, if an ally is defeated at Turn Start while under the effects of the E.G.O Gift 'Perpetual Generator Servos', it applies 6 Protection instead of 3 Protection

► Adjusted the E.G.O Gift 'Perpetual Generator Servos' to activate only once per Encounter

► Fixed an issue where the E.G.O Gift 'Hearts-powered Jewel' was working as "lose all remaining Charge Count" instead of "consume all remaining Charge Count", which meant that several effects did not activate properly

► Deleted an unused dummy Skill on Papa Bongy enemy

► Fixed an issue where the Cannoneer Crab's Spine Sprite did not match the Sprite that appears when hovering over them

► Fixed an issue where, under certain conditions, Wild Hunt Heathcliff's MVP line would play in the pre-Canto 6 version instead of the post-Canto 6 version even when the player has already finished Canto 6

► Fixed an issue where Wild Hunt Heathcliff's unique interaction voice lines were playing even inside Mirror Dungeons

► Fixed an issue where certain controls in the Windows UI would cause the main illustration VFX to play alongside the acquisition cutscene

► Fixed an issue where, under certain circumstances, the animated Illustration set as the main illustration on the Window UI partially break

► Fixed an issue where, in the in-combat Choice Events, horizontally long enemy sprites would appear partially cut off

► Added a function to skip the Announcer acquisition cutscene when obtaining them via Extraction or Yisang Exchange

► Improved: Buff description popup window
※ Partially adjusted the size of the Skill Keyword and buff tooltip windows, and added an auto-scroll function to buff tooltips that can be viewed by hovering over unit Sprites in the in-combat UI

► Fixed an issue where Wild Hunt Heathcliff's Support Passive 'Endless Lamentation' did not work as intended
We corrected the effect to match the in-game text.
※ Relevant effect : If the target does not have SP, then the said ally inflicts +1 more Sinking Potency and Count with their Skill and Coin Effects of their Attack Skills (2 times per turn)
- Before : Activated against targets with SP
- After : Activates against targets without SP

► Fixed an issue where the cutscene that plays when using Wild Hunt Heathcliff's Skill 3 'Requiem' and Powered Skill 3 'Lament, Mourn, and Despair' could cause the target's HP bar to disappear even when the target hasn't been defeated yet

► Fixed an issue where the game would softlock if the player tries to enter the combat phase after the Dawn Office Fixer Sinclair gains the Wild Hunt buff after dying in the Volatile E.G.O state

► Fixed an issue where, when an ally dies at -45 SP and gains the Wild Hunt buff, their SP value does not reset to 0 and causes them to Panic or Corrode while under the effects of Wild Hunt

► Fixed an issue where the LCB Sinner Don Quixote's Sprite resource was using an outdated Sprite; fixed to match the Illustrations
- Letters written on the Lance
- Letters written on the Sinner Outfit
- Letters written on Rocinante

► Fixed an issue where Lobotomy E.G.O::Magic Bullet Outis' Skill 3 'Magic Bullet Fire' VFX that is supposed to stack with each 'Magic Bullet' Stack does not increase in intensity

► Fixed an issue where entering Stage 5-18 causes the camera to work incorrectly

► Addressed an issue where the camera does not work properly in the Stage 6-34 Combat Encounter

► Addressed certain issues that may occur with animations that 'grab' the enemy

► Fixed an issue where the activation condition description text was missing from the E.G.O Gift 'Fragment of Hellfire'
※ Relevant Text Content : Activates when using E.G.O Awakening Skills that inflict Burn Potency, Count, or 'Unique Burn' (NOT Corrosion Skills)

Known Issues
------------

► An issue where, under certain circumstances, gaining the Wild Hunt buff would cause its VFX to not load
※ This is a visual-only issue; the effects are working as intended.

Sep. 6th Scheduled Update Error Fix Compensation
------------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x500
- Recipients: All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Sep. 12th, 2024 (KST)
- When : After Sep. 5th, 2024 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Sep. 12th (Thu) 2024, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients: All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Sep. 12th, 2024 (KST)
- When : After Sep. 5th, 2024 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Sep. 12th (Thu) 2024, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.
- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change depending on its status. If such a change occurs, we will let you know in a follow-up notice.
- A resource download may be prompted after the build update. If you're using a mobile device, it is recommended to proceed with a Wi-Fi connection.
- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account. Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: 2024, August 29th Scheduled Update Notice
content:
-----------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on Aug. 29th, 2024 (KST).

Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.

Please refer below for details about the update.

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Adjusted E.G.O Gift ‘Rags’ description / Adjusted the “When using a Minus Coin” conditional to work with Defense Skills as well
- Before : When using a Minus Coin Skill, ...(the effect)... instead.
- After : When the said allies use a Minus Coin Skill(Not E.G.O Skills), ...(the effect)... instead.
※ The effect will activate for Defense Skills as well, as it is written.

► Fixed an issue where the UI loads incorrectly when gaining the Wild Hunt buff while the following are activated at the same time:
Hong Lu E.G.O Dimension Shredder Passive +
Insta death Buff - K Corp. Ampule

► Fixed an issue where the E.G.O Gift - Trash Crab Brain Wine's HP Healing effects weren't working correctly
- Before : When an ally recovers from Stagger, heal 20% of current HP.
- After : When an ally recovers from Stagger, heal 20% of max HP.

► Fixed an issue where getting Staggered at Turn Start or Turn End does not cause the Resistance values to change

► Fixed an issue where certain characters' Clash animations do not work properly
※ e.g. An issue where Zwei South Section 5 Rodion’s corpse is used as the unit’s Clash Sprite

► Addressed an issue where the knockback is greater than intended when rolling the same values in a Clash

► Slightly lessened the screen shake effect in a clash

► Adjusted clash animations so that a dodge animation for the Clash winner does not push their Sprite back

► Fixed an issue where using Unique Counter against [Unclashable] caused the 'Defense' text to show up in the Dashboard
※ This is a visual-only issue; it works as a "One-sided Guard".

► Fixed an issue where using an Identity Takeoff Ticket on an LCB Identity(base Identities) causes the game to softlock

► Fixed an issue where using the Identity Takeoff Ticket to an Identity higher than Level 40 causes the UI elements to not work properly

► Fixed an issue where 1) Setting the Window UI as 'Manager Ticket' 2) Viewing a different menu item such as Inventory and 3) Returning to the Window UI caused the Manager Ticket to disappear

► (Steam) Fixed an issue where the UI elements don't load properly when pressing the ESC Key when loading into the Manager Ticket setting UI with the Manager Ticket set as the Window UI

► (Steam) Fixed an issue where the UI elements don't load properly when pressing the ESC Key when loading into the Battle Pass UI from the Window

► Fixed an issue where Wild Hunt Heathcliff's Identity Illustration hides the subtitles behind its VFX layer

► Fixed an issue where the 'AUTO' setting in story mode causes the shortcut keys to not work

► (KR Only) Fixed a few typos in Wild Hunt Heathcliff's Identity Story

► (JP Only) Addressed the issue where some of the Trait Keywords were not translated

Known Issues
------------

► An issue where Wild Hunt Heathcliff's unique interaction dialogues would play even in the Mirror Dungeon

► An issue where specific UI inputs in the Window menu would cause the Identity acquisition animation and the main illustration VFX to play at the same time

► An issue where a Passive effect that can recover from Stagger in certain situations could recover from forced Staggers as well
※ e.g. : An issue where Wild Hunt Heathcliff can ignore Stagger effects from forced Stagger effects by mounting Dullahan

► An issue where if the Dawn Office Fixer Sinclair dies while in E.G.O Form then gains the Wild Hunt Buff, the game would softlock upon Combat Start

The above issues will be corrected with a future Scheduled Update, and we will inform you via a Scheduled Update Notice as soon as they are corrected.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

Corrections Notice
------------------

We informed you the following via the [Notice: Issues Identified in Aug. 22nd Scheduled Update] as one of the Issues that have been identified.

► An issue where, in Refraction Railway Line 4, the Passive 'Anti-Ovine Grounding Plug' doesn't activate when hitting the Generator unit with a Counter Defense Skill

Upon our subsequent testing, we confirmed that it was working as intended, that the Passive does activate when hitting the Generator with a Counter Defense Skill.

We sincerely apologize for the confusion we caused the managers with the incorrect information.

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Sep. 5th, 2024 (KST)
- When : After Aug. 29th, 2024 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Sep. 5th (Thu) 2024, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.
- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change depending on the status of maintenance. If such a change occurs, we will let you know in a follow-up notice.
- A resource download may be prompted after the build update. If you're using a mobile device, it is recommended to proceed with a Wi-Fi connection.
- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account. Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: 2024, August 22nd Scheduled Update Notice
content:
------------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on Aug. 22nd, 2024 (KST).
Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.

Please refer below for details about the update.

New Content
-----------

1. New Target Extraction [New Target Extraction: Wild Hunt Heathcliff] (8/22 12:00 ~ 9/5 10:00 (KST))
Extraction rate increases for the following Identity.
- 3★ : Wild Hunt Heathcliff

2. Target Extraction [Ishmael] (8/22 12:00 ~ 9/5 10:00 (KST))
Extraction rate increases for the following Identities and E.G.O.
- E.G.O [HE] : Ardor Blossom Star Ishmael
- 3★ : R Corp. 4th Pack Reindeer Ishmael, Liu South Section 4 Ishmael, Molar Boatworks Fixer Ishmael, The Pequod Captain Ishmael
- 2★ : Shi South Section 5 Ishmael, LCCB Assistant Manager Ishmael, Lobotomy E.G.O::Sloshing Ishmael, Edgar Family Butler Ishmael
- 1★ : LCB Sinner Ishmael

3. New Identity Added
The following Identity has been added to the list of extractable Identities.
- 3★ : Wild Hunt Heathcliff

Major Changes
-------------

1. Window UI Improvements: Added a function to swap between set Identity Illustration and Manager Ticket UI

2. Improved Clash Animations
- Added an animation where an ally & an enemy are pushing against each other
- Added Guard & Evade animations to Clash animations
- Adjusted knockback distance equation (Scales based on Clash Power difference & average Coin values)
- Added a maximum cap for the knockback distance
- Consolidated and improved special clash animation scripts for certain enemies

3. 'Unique Counter' System Added

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► (EN Only) Fixed an issue where the 'Offense Level Up' was not properly highlighted for Molar Office Fixer Outis's 'Slice' Skill

► Fixed an issue where closing the Trait Keywords popup with an ESC key in a combat Encounter caused the popup to linger when viewing detailed information of other units

► Fixed an issue where an incorrect E.G.O gained the special VFX for 'Murder on the WARP Express' related combat Encounters

► Fixed an issue where Identities with Unique Charge Keywords were not affected by the 'Murder on the WARP Express' Floor Theme Pack E.G.O Gifts

► Fixed an issue where corpse Sprites would suddenly turn around in the cutscene that plays when moving to the next wave

► Fixed an issue where, when Skills are set to Clash against another in the Combat Encounter, enemy Skills with base 2+ Atk Weight did not display that fact

► Fixed an issue where an incorrect Stagger Threshold visual marker was displayed for enemies with 4+ Stagger Thresholds in Focused Encounters

► Fixed an issue where clear animations did not play properly for certain Stages

► Fixed an issue where players could not fully scroll the description for E.G.O Gifts obtained via Choice Events in Mirror Dungeons or Story Dungeons

► Fixed an issue where the players could not immediately enter 'Murder on the WARP Express' stages after clearing the 'Timekilling Time' Stages

title: Notice : Issues Identified in Aug. 8th Scheduled Update
content:
```[Notice : Issues Identified in Aug. 8th Scheduled Update]

Hello, this is Project Moon.

The following are issues that have been identified in the Aug. 8th Scheduled Update.

<List>
1. An issue where the game softlocks at Stage 5-18
- Cause: A logic error occurred as we were improving the game's functionalities to be able to use multiple kinds of scripts for Stage mechanics and event cutscenes
- Fix: Fixed via correcting the logic error

2. An issue where defeating every enemy at once under a specific condition in a Mirror Dungeon - Chain Battle causes the Encounter to end in a defeat, making it unable to proceed to the next Stage
- Cause: In Chain Battles, defeating an enemy by using an E.G.O Gift that deals damage "At Turn End" caused a logic activation order error
- Fix: Fixed via correcting the logic error

3. An issue where substituted Backup units do not gain additional Skill Slots in Regular Encounters Chain Battles
- Cause: Backup Units were set only to work within "Focused Encounters", so functionalities not present in Focused Encounters did not activate in Regular Encounters
- Fix: Added a logic to make sure that Backup Units gained additional Slots as well

4. An issue where VFX for the Passive of an enemy appearing in 6.5-2 lingers even after the Passive ends
- Cause: The VFX deactivation logic upon Passive End did not exist
- Fix: Added a deactivation logic for the VFX upon Passive End

5. An issue where, in the Nominable Egoshard Crate opening UI, selecting and deselecting the Sinner's shards doesn't actually deselect the Sinner
- Cause: The functionality was made so that they couldn't be deselected, but the UI showed that they were
- Fix: Added the deselect function and deactivated the "Confirm" button when no Sinner is selected

6. An issue where translations for the text in the popup window for 'Clear Selection' option in the Loadout Menu are not applied
- Cause: Localization data was not linked to the build
- Fix: Linked the localization data to the build

Future Measures
- We will maintain a list of content types that could cause side effects in the future when attempting to improve the game systems, and add further proofreading procedures to maintain them properly
- We will separate such game system improvements and adjustments from new content updates so that new content updates won't be affected by possible issues from those changes

A new Client Version(1.54.1) with fixes for the above issues will be deployed.
Please understand that iOS and Android platforms require a platform review, so they will take longer to deploy than the STEAM version of the game.
We will inform you via an additional notice of the ETA for the new version of the game.

[Aug. 8th Scheduled Update Error Compensation]
- Compensation : Lunacy x 300
- Recipients: All users whose accounts were created before Aug. 15th, 2024 10:00
- Can be claimed once per account
- When : Can be claimed after 2024.8.8 (KST) 16:00

► Fixed an issue where one of the Skills present in Stage 6-45 showed multiple Coin effects, despite it being a single Coin effect

(2) Affected Enemy Skills
Golden Fruit / Poison Spray / Pained Writhing / Pained Strugger / Delicious Crab Guts!

► Fixed an issue where incorrect resources would load for certain Mirror Dungeon / Combat Encounter Stages

► Fixed an issue where the Mirror Dungeon Passive - Pallidification did not work as intended
- Before : The Passive activation condition counted self as well
- After : The Passive activation condition no longer counts self, as written in the description text

► Fixed an issue where incorrect values were displayed for failing the second Choice in Mirror Dungeon / Abnormality - Spiral of Contempt / Choice Event
- Before : The Sinner who failed the check takes 25 HP damage and 15 SP damage!
- After : The Sinner who failed the check takes 12 HP damage and 8 SP damage!

► Adjusted names of certain E.G.O Gift activation subjects

- Before : ~ from N Corp.
- After : ~ is an N Corp. Fanatic

► (EN Only) Adjusted the translation for 'N Corp. Fanatic(s)' in several descriptions
- Before : ~an ally from N Corp. / ~if the ally is from N Corp.
- After : N Corp. Fanatic

※ Affected Descriptions

- N Corp. Großhammer Meursault - Support Passive
- N Corp. Kleinhammer Heathcliff - Combat Passive
- N Corp. Mittelhammer Rodion - Skill 3
- The One Who Shall Grip Sinclair - Combat Passive

► Adjusted starting colors of the ring in the scene that plays when obtaining E.G.O for the first time
- Before : Bronze color
- After : Dark blue color

Known Issues
------------

► An issue where the Sprites that have been looking to the left after an Encounter suddenly turn to look toward the right at the end of the Encounter

► Fixed an issue where getting Staggered due to E.G.O Gift - Carmilla effect doesn't change their Damage Type Resistances

content:
----------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

Major Changes
-------------

1. (JP Only) Fixed an issue where Yi Sang E.G.O - Dimension Shredder had incorrect Skill effect descriptions for Threadspinning Tier 1~3
- Before : [攻撃後] 次のターンにクイック 2, 攻撃威力増加 1を得る
- After : [攻撃前] 充電 回数を消耗し、消耗した分ダメージ量を増加(最大N%)

At Threadspinning Tier 1 ~ 2: N = 50 / At Threadspinning Tier 3: N = 75

All Managers' Yi Sang E.G.O - Dimension Shredder Threadspinning Tiers will be reset to Tier 1 after the Aug. 1st (KST) Scheduled Update.
Once the reset is processed, all Threads and Egoshards used to Threadspin that E.G.O will be refunded to your account.
The Egoshards will be refunded as 'Season 4 Yi Sang Egoshards' regardless of when you threadspun the E.G.O.

The incorrect translation text was applied to this E.G.O's description due to the same error that caused the Hong Lu E.G.O - Dimension Shredder description issue in the past.
Because this issue went unfixed for nearly a year, we intend to reset the Threadspinning Tier for this E.G.O and refund all resources used to Threadspin it.
We sincerely apologize for giving the Managers an incorrect description of the E.G.O. We also sincerely apologize for causing you disturbance by letting this issue go unfixed for so long, and for failing to recognize another instance of the same error.
We apologize to all Managers who have been using Yi Sang E.G.O - Dimension Shredder.

► Fixed an issue where Keyword highlights were missing from certain Skills

► Fixed an issue where viewing the Manager Ticket of a friend could cause the assigned Identity's CG art to miss certain VFX

Major Changes
-------------

► Before

(2) Max Value : 1

► After
(1) When Charge Potency reaches a value of 2 or higher during an Encounter, Charge Potency does not expire even when Charge Count drops to 0
(2) Max Value : 99

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Fixed an issue where certain Skill effects gave Charge Potency when gaining Charge Count next turn
※ This issue was corrected with the Jul. 11th, 2024 Scheduled Update but was missing from the update notice changelog.

► (KR Only) Fixed an issue where certain Charge Identities & E.G.O Skill/Passive descriptions were missing the descriptor "Count"
- Hong Lu E.G.O - Dimension Shredder's E.G.O Passive

► (EN Only) Fixed an issue where certain Charge Identities & E.G.O Skill/Passive descriptions were missing the descriptor "Count".
- W Corp. L2 Cleanup Agent Meursaut's Skill 2 and Skill 3
- R Corp. 4th Pack Reindeer Ishmael's Skill 3

- Hong Lu E.G.O - Dimension Shredder's E.G.O Passive
- Yi Sang E.G.O - Dimension Shredder's Awakening & Corrosion Skills before Threadspinning Tier 4

► (JP Only) Fixed an issue where incorrect text would appear on the popup when Threadspinning Yi Sang E.G.O - Sunshower

► Fixed an issue where Sinclair E.G.O - Cavernous Wailing's 'Blubberbubble' VFX appeared at incorrect timings
(1) At Combat Start with the Skill selected, the Blubberbubble VFX would appear even before the Skill was used
(2) The Blubberbubble VFX disappeared upon using the actual Skill
※ This is a visual only issue; the Shield effects worked as intended.

► Fixed an issue where certain enemies with the Charge Keyword were missing the word 'Count' in their Skill, Buff, and Passive descriptions

► Fixed an issue where Abnormality - Skin Prophet encounter might cause an error at Turn End under a specific circumstance

► Fixed an issue where deploying Lobotomy E.G.O::Regret Faust caused the Skill VFX to briefly play when entering a Stage

► Fixed an issue where the combat camera slowly slides to the bottom left corner of the screen on certain device environments

► Addressed the issue where, if the self-introduction text gets too long in the user info -> friends list UI, the text would go outside the UI text box
※ We have changed this to make it so that any text that goes beyond the UI text box cuts off with an ellipses

► STEAM) Fixed an issue where gamepad input was registered as camera movement in combat

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Aug. 1st, 2024 (KST)
- When : After Jul. 25th, 2024 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Aug. 1st (Thu) 2024, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.

- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: 2024, July 18th Scheduled Update Notice
content:
---------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on Jul. 18th, 2024 (KST).

Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.

Please refer below for details about the update.

Major Changes
-------------

1. Adjusted UI design for Buff & Debuff icons on entities with fan-shaped HP Indicators when they have 13 or more effects active
- Before : Fan-shaped icon alignment
- After : Flat icon alignment
(same as it is on entities with bar-shaped HP Indicators)

2. Adjusted currently active Shield HP to be visible in the combat phase
If a unit has Shield HP in the combat phase, the remaining Shield HP value will be visible in blue text.
When the Shield HP is depleted mid-combat due to enemy attacks, the value will then display the remaining HP value in red text instead.

3. Adjusted UI design for each state of destroyed Parts
► Parts that can regenerate now display the number of remaining turns until they regenerate

► Severed Parts are now crossed out with an X symbol

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Fixed an issue where, in Refraction Railway Line 4, the #5 Deployment effect (Max Speed +2) activated starting Turn 2
※ Our approach : We have adjusted the text to fit its current behavior. Also, we have adjusted the buff display that showed as if the effect was activated starting Turn 1
- Before : Max Speed +2. When defeated, gain E.G.O Resources based on the Affinity & Rank of each Attack Skill this unit has.
- After : Starting 2nd turn: Max Speed +2. When defeated, gain E.G.O Resources based on the Affinity & Rank of each Attack Skill this unit has.

※ Because we were concerned that changing this effect to match the original text would cause too big of a change to the Refraction Railway experience for players who have completed it before the change, we have decided to maintain the effect while changing the text. We apologize for causing you inconvenience due to the incorrect activation timing of the Deployment effect.

► Fixed an issue where, in certain circumstances, Absolute Resonance did not work when Backup units were Subsituted in after allies were defeated
- Cause : When checking for Absolute Resonance activation, it counted defeated allies as well in the Resonance sequence
- Solution : When checking for Absolute Resonance activation, the game will now exclude defeated allies from the Resonance sequence

► Fixed an issue where Panic-changing effects such as 'Echoes of the Manor' of Wuthering Heights Chief Butler Outis inflicted incorrect effects(as in, they inflicted effects used against entities with SP value instead) against Abnormalities without an SP value

► Fixed an issue where E.G.O Gifts with 'Bleed' Keyword as conditionals didn't activate for Ryōshū E.G.O - Contempt, Awe

► Added more detailed description for Ryōshū E.G.O - Awe, Contempt's Keyword tooltips
※ We have added the description for 'Contempt of the Gaze' under 'Gaze of Contempt' Keyword description text. (This description won't be added to the description that appears when hovering over Buff icons in-combat, however)

► Fixed an issue where triggering Amplitude Conversion with T Corp. Class 3 Collection Staff Don Quixote's Skill 3 caused the 'Amplitude Entanglement' text to appear instead
※ The actual effects work as written; this is a visual-only issue.

► Fixed an issue where, when a Peccatulum Invidiae uses an E.G.O Skill, and an allied unit uses the same E.G.O Skill, the purple filter for Peccatulum Invidiae would continue to linger for allied E.G.O Skills as well

► Fixed an issue where, when Peccatulum Invidiae units are Staggered by an attack, every additional hit shows the Staggered VFX again

► Fixed an issue where, when transitioning from one wave to another in Refraction Railway Line 4, the Sinners would run in the wrong direction

► Fixed an issue where, in the Mirror Dungeon, combat statistics from previous runs would bleed over to the current combat statistics

► Fixed an issue where certain damage numbers for effects such as SP damage or Stagger Threshold damage appeared as 0 for enemies with the debuff 'Time Moratorium'

► Fixed an issue where, for the Mirror Dungeon Floor Theme Pack 'Insignificant Envy', The Middle Little Brother encounter Stage lacks music

► (KR Only) Fixed an issue where the 'lose X Defense Levels' text was marked as a Keyword for the E.G.O Gift 'Glimpse of Flames'
※ The actual activation mechanic for this Gift directly reduces the enemy's Defense Levels instead of inflicting them with a Defense Level Down effect

► Fixed an issue where, in wave 2 of Refraction Railway Line 4 Section 3, the visual object attached to a unit with a certain boss gimmick buff continues to linger in battle even after they are defeated

► Fixed an issue where attacking a newly spawned entity mid-combat would not show the damage numbers

► Deleted an unused Passive for the Abnormality - Headless Icthys

► Deleted an unused Skill for the Abnormality - Shock Centipede

► Deleted an unused Skill for the Abnormality - Blubbering Toad

► Deleted an unused Skill for the Abnormality - Alleyway Watchdog

► Deleted an unused Passive for Effloresced E.G.O::Farmwatch

► Deleted unused Passives for certain summoned entities of the Abnormality - Sign of Roses
※ Relevant entities : Lust-drenched Rose, Gloom-drenched Rose

► Fixed an issue where Flexing Tieqiu Crewman's Skill 'Insult Barrage' activation conditional did not work as written

► Fixed an issue where some of Stern Little Brother of the Middle's Coin activation conditions did not work as written

► Fixed an issue where some of Sturdy Little Brother of the Middle's Coin activation conditions did not work as written

► Fixed an issue where letting 20 turns pass in the Thread Luxcavation - Lust level 2 Headless Icthys encounter caused the game to softlock

► Fixed an issue where losing your entire team in the first combat encounter node of the first floor of the Mirror Dungeon caused a server error

► Fixed an issue where choosing to heal an identity in a Mirror Dungeon Shop or a Rest Stop did not heal certain identities to the actual values they were supposed to heal to

► Fixed an issue where, for E.G.O Skill cutscenes that use 2+ Coins, flipping the next coin caused the game to hitch briefly

► Fixed an issue where having more than a certain number of E.G.O Gifts unlocked in the Mirror Dungeon E.G.O Gift Compendium caused the UI elements to overlap

► Fixed an issue where certain behaviors(hovering over the sprite, for example) caused Liu South Section 4 Ishmael's Sprite to appear blurry

► Fixed an issue where viewing the Detailed E.G.O info via the Identity Detailed Info UI caused the 'Threadspin' button to appear as 'Uptie' instead

► (EN Only) Fixed an issue where an unnecessary Keyword highlight was present in Dieci South Section 4 Director Meursault's Combat Passive description

► (JP Only) Fixed an issue where a necessary Keyword highlight was missing in Dieci South Section 4 Director Meursault's Combat Passive description

► (JP Only) Fixed an issue where an untranslated string was present in the Öufi South Section 3 Heathcliff's Identity Story

-------------------------------------------------

- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Jul. 25th, 2024 (KST)
- When : After Jul. 18th, 2024 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)

---------------------------------------------

- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Jul. 25th, 2024 (KST)

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Jul. 25th (Thu) 2024, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.

content:

- 3★ : Dieci Association South Section 4 Director Meursault

Major Changes
-------------

1. Chapter 6.5 - 「Timekilling Time」 Event Closure
Chapter 6.5 - Timekilling Time Event will be closed after Jul. 11th, 10:00 (KST).

You cannot gain additional Event Currency after the Jul. 11th Scheduled Update.

However, Event Reward Exchange will be open until Jul. 18th 10:00 (KST), so please redeem your rewards before the Event Reward Exchange closure.

Even after the event fully ends, you will be able to experience the Timekilling Time combat Encounters and view its story anytime at the Driverside - [Deviazione] and Theater - [Detour Tales].

2. Mirror Dungeon Floor Theme Pack [Timekilling Time] Spawn Conditions Changed
With the closure of the Timekilling Time event, the spawn conditions for the [Timekilling Time] Mirror Dungeon Floor Theme Pack will be partially changed.

- Before : None
- After : Clear Stage 6.5-15 of Chapter 6.5 - Timekilling Time

- Before : Fixed spawn on the final floor of both Simulation & Ritornello
- After : Spawns at a certain rate on floor 4 of Simulation, and on floor 4~5 of Ritornello

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Fixed an issue where dealing a certain kind of damage against enemies with 'Time Moratorium' makes it look as though the damage is dealt immediately
※ The actual damages are working as intended for enemies with Time Moratorium

► (EN Only) Fixed an incorrect description for Hong Lu's E.G.O - Land of Illusion / Threadspinning Tier 4 / Coin Effect
- Before : [After Attack] -2 SP Loss Efficiency to all allies; -2 to amount of SP lost from E.G.O use
- After : [After Attack] Next turn: -2 SP Loss Efficiency to all allies; -2 to amount of SP lost from E.G.O use

► (EN Only) Fixed an incorrect description for Outis E.G.O - To Pathos Mathos / Threadspinning Tier 4 / Coin Effect
- Before : [On Kill] Give 1 Damage Up to a random ally next turn
- After : [On Kill] Give 1 Damage Up to a random ally

► (EN Only) Fixed an issue where the descriptions for the Identity Details - Sanity - Base Factors Increasing/Decreasing Sanity had incorrect translations for "~an enemy whose level was higher than this unit's" conditionals
- Before : ~ an enemy whose level was higher than this unit's
- After : ~ an enemy whose level was higher than or equal to this unit's

► (JP Only) Improved the Skill 2 Description of The Pequod Captain Ishmael to be more straightforward
- Before : [使用時] 最も多い共鳴の共鳴数1につき、20%の確率で操作パネルにて自分の右方に位置する味方へ、このターンにて援護攻撃を命令する。
- After : [使用時] 最も多い共鳴の共鳴数1につき、20%の確率で操作パネルにて自分の右側に位置する味方へ、このターンにて援護攻撃を命令する。

► (JP Only) Fixed an incorrect description for Shi South Section 5 Heathcliff / Skill 1 / Skill Effect
- Before : [使用時] 呼吸3を得る
- After : [使用時] 呼吸回数3を得る

► (JP Only) Fixed typos for Abnormality names in Refraction Railway Line 4

► Fixed an issue where the [Mini Episode - A Familiar Alarm] had an incorrect unlock condition in the Drive tab
- Before : Clear 6.5-15
- After : Clear 6-48

► Fixed an issue where, in the Line select menu, the Terminus didn't change color after clearing Refraction Railway Line 4

► Fixed an issue where Refraction Railway Line 4 tutorial text overlapped with the next page arrow button UI

► Adjusted cosmetic items obtainable from Refraction Railway 4 to be under a common category

► Fixed an issue where unnecessary resource was visible in the Refraction Railway Line 4 Stage Select menu

► Fixed an issue where each language had different timezone markers for Refraction Railway Line 4's Clear Turns Records
※ They have all been standardized to KST timezone

► Fixed an issue where 'Peccatulum Gulae?' Skill 'Ravenous Devouring' effect did not activate
※ Relevant effect : [On Use] If the target has 5+ Rupture, inflict 2 Defense Level Down

► Fixed an issue where, in the Extraction tab, quickly moving between Identities & E.G.O details caused the required E.G.O resource UI to disappear

► Fixed an issue where the Mirror Dungeon Abnormality 'Pink Shoes' Encounter Event did not appear

► Fixed an issue where purchasing a [Timekilling Time] Floor Theme Pack exclusive E.G.O Gift from the Shops caused the already-acquired E.G.O Gift or the alternate choice E.G.O Gifts to spawn from future Mirror Dungeon Events

► Fixed an issue where scrolling during the Damage Output statistic animation in the Stage Clear menu caused the top Damage Output values to appear at the bottom instead

► Fixed an issue where the animations for the animated Illustrations from the Window did not match the vfx play speed

► (JP Only) Fixed typos in the Mini Episode - A Familiar Alarm
- Before : 「…い。い。な。し。」
- After : 「…い。い。な。と。」

Issues Identified After the 2024. 07. 11 Scheduled Update
---------------------------------------------------------

► An issue where certain damage numbers (such as SP Damage or Stagger Threshold damage) against enemies with 'Time Moratorium' debuff appear as '0'.
※ This is a visual-only issue. The actual damage values are working as written in the debuff description.

title: [(iOS, Android) Notice: July 4th Scheduled Update Error Fix]
content:
Hello,

You can download the Client updates via each platform store and confirm that the update was successful by checking the bottom right corner of the screen. It should say Version 1.51.1.

title: Notice: Refraction Railway Line 4 Errors & Fixes
content:
------------------------------------------------

Hello,
This is Project Moon.

We have identified the following issues in the new content, "Refraction Railway Line 4," which was added with the July 4th (Thu) 12:00 Scheduled Update.

► Issues Identified

► An issue in Refraction Railway Line 4 where, when an ally is defeated, the E.G.O resource gain doesn't work as written
- Currently, if an allied Identity is defeated, you will gain E.G.O resources based on the Rank of each Attack Skill, not the number of Attack Skills owned.
- Directly addressing this issue by changing its mechanism would change the current Refraction Railway Line 4 experience, which means that we may have to reset the Line 4 Clear Turn records.
- However, as we believe that resetting the Clear Turn records is a greater issue than this issue, and because this issue does not affect the E.G.O resource gain too differently from our original intent, we plan to adjust the in-game description to match the current mechanism as it is in the game.
- We sincerely apologize for disturbing your enjoyment of Refraction Railway Line 4 by making the in-game mechanics not work as written in our notice.
► An issue where, in Refraction Railway Line 4 Section 1 Wave 1, if an enemy spawned mid-Encounter is killed by the "Burn" effect, the game softlocks
► An issue where certain enemies in the Refraction Railway Line 4 plays special Identity voicelines
► An issue where winning the final battle of Canto V Story Dungeon causes the game to softlock
► An issue where Stage 6-44 enemy pattern does not work as intended

We plan to deploy a new Client version(1.51.1) with the above issues corrected. Please understand that, however, as iOS and Android require us to first go through the platform review processes, the said platforms may be receiving these fixes later than the STEAM version of the game. We will inform you of the deployment ETA via an additional notice.

For the "An issue in Refraction Railway Line 4 where, when an ally is defeated, the E.G.O resource gain doesn't work as written", we have changed the text to match the actual in-game effects. This change will be applied to the three platforms STEAM, iOS, and Android with the new Client version(1.51.1).

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

Refraction Railway Line 4 Error Compensation
--------------------------------------------

Compensation : Lunacy x 500
Recipients : All users whose accounts were created before July 11th, 2024 10:00
Can be claimed once per account
When : After 2024.7.4 (KST) 18:30

title: July 4th Scheduled Update Notice
content:
--------------------------------

Greetings, dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on Jul. 4th, 2024 (KST).
Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost. Please refer below for details about the update.

New Content
-----------

1. New Content [Refraction Railway Line 4]
※ Please refer to the Steam Announcements page for more detailed information.

2. New Mini Episode Added
A new Mini Episode will be added to the game with the July 4th (KST) Scheduled Update. If you have met the unlock conditions, you can immediately view the new Mini Episode as soon as you log in to the game for the first time after the update.
※ Unlock Conditions : Clear Main Story Stage 6-48 (the final stage of Canto VI)

Major Changes
-------------

1. Refraction Railway Line 3 Closure

Any rewards you have not claimed from Line 3 Lost & Found will be lost with the start of Refraction Railway Line 4.

(Unclaimed rewards will not be delivered to your inbox either.)

If you haven’t yet claimed your Line 3 rewards, please claim them before the Jul. 4th (KST) Scheduled Update.

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Fixed an issue where damage dealt at Turn Start against targets with Time Moratorium does not show up as a part of the stored damage value
※ This is a visual-only issue; the damage dealt at Turn Start is actually added to the stored damage value.

► Added a relevant SFX when inflicting the Time Moratorium effect

► Adjusted The Pequod Harpooneer Heathcliff's Defense Skill - 'Payback' mechanisms & description
※ We have adjusted the Skill's actual effects to match the in-game description, which has the 'Defense Level Up' keyword, instead of directly raising the unit's Defense Levels.
- Before : [전투 시작시] 자신의 호흡만큼 방어 레벨 증가 (최대 10)
- After : [전투 시작시] 자신의 호흡만큼 방어 레벨 증가를 얻음 (최대 10) - (English description is unchanged as it works for both versions of the Korean text. Descriptions directly affecting a unit's stats will be specified like in the description for Tremor - Decay.)

► Fixed an issue where the effect inflicted by The Middle Little Brother Meursault's Skill 2 - 'Chains of Loyalty' did not match the description
- Before : Inflicts 1 Offense Level Down
- After : Inflicts 1 Bleed, just as written in the Skill description

► Elaborated District 20 Yurodivy Ryōshū's Combat Passive Description
※ We have adjusted the description to describe the Passive activation conditions more specifically. The actual conditions are unchanged.
- Before : When an ally Staggers an enemy with an attack: follow up with a Skill 1 against the Staggered enemy. (once per Turn)
- After : When an other ally Staggers an enemy with an attack: follow up with a Skill 1 against the Staggered enemy. (once per Turn)

► (KR Only) Fixed a typo in one of the Floor Theme Pack titles
- Before : 옭아매는 색욕
- After : 옭아매는 색욕

► Fixed an issue where, under certain circumstances, an additional Skill Slot is displayed when the Blade Lineage Mentor Meursault is defeated.

► Fixed an issue where the Timekilling Time Floor Theme Pack E.G.O Gifts were not appearing in the E.G.O Gift Compendium

► (KR Only) Adjusted T Corp. Class 2 Collection Staff Rodion's Evening Greeting subtitles to match the voice

► Fixed an issue where, under certain circumstances, viewing detailed info about an ally causes the UI resources to load incorrectly

► Fixed an issue where, under certain circumstances, detailed info window of an enemy/Observation Log could not be closed

► (JP Only) Fixed a typo for Refraction Railway Line 3 Banners & Ticket Deco acquisition conditions text

Optimizations
-------------

► Reduced RAM usage in combat
- Adjusted so that appearance change from E.G.O Awakening or Corrosion loads the new appearances only when necessary (Though it may depend on the Encounter Stage and the players' Loadouts, this has reduced about 200MB of RAM usage on mobile)

- Disabled memory allocation for resources not appearing in the Combat Encounter (reduced about 20MB of RAM usage on mobile)

Minimum RAM Requirements Updated
--------------------------------

We would like to inform you that the Minimum RAM Requirements will be changed with this update due to the rising memory usage from constant content updates and the added variety of VFX & Cutscene effects.
- Minimum RAM Requirement Before : 3GB
- Minimum RAM Requirement After : 4GB

Please note that attempting the Refraction Railway Line 4 Combat Encounters with devices below the minimum system requirements may cause the game to crash due to lack of memory.

※ The Minimum and Recommended system requirements may change with the game development conditions.

Known Issues after the Jul. 4th, 2024 (KST) Scheduled Update
------------------------------------------------------------

► An issue regarding the unlock conditions for 'Mini Episode Added after the July 4th (KST) Scheduled Update' from Driverside

※ In order to view the said Mini Episode from Driverside, Stage 6.5-15 must be cleared first. However, the Mini Episode can be viewed at any time from the Theater tab as long as the actual Mini Episode unlock condition (Clear Stage 6-48) is cleared.

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Jul. 11th, 2024 (KST)
- When : After Jul. 4th, 2024 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Jul. 11th (Thu) 2024, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

title: Jul. 4th New Content - Refraction Railway Line 4
content:
------------------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

New Content <Refraction Railway Line 4> will be added to the game with the Jul. 4th, 2024 (KST) Scheduled Update.

<Unlock Conditions>
Clear Main Story 6-48

<Event Description>
- Refraction Railway Line 4 is composed of 4 total Sections, and you will face highly difficult encounters in all of them. More rewards can be claimed the further you progress into the Refraction Railway.

- If you have achieved certain conditions before clearing the final Section, you will be rewarded with a Special Decorative Banner.

- Refraction Railway Line 4 will end with the start of Refraction Railway Line 5.

<About Refraction Railway Line 3 Rewards>
Any rewards you have not claimed from Line 3 Lost & Found will be lost with the start of Refraction Railway Line 4.
(Unclaimed rewards will not be delivered to your inbox either.)

If you haven't yet claimed your Line 3 rewards, please claim them before the Jul. 4th Scheduled Update.

Content Details
---------------

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

- <Refraction Railway Line 4> will open after completing Main Story 6-48, and can be accessed via the ‘Drive’ menu.

- As long as Line 4 is active, it can be accessed anytime without spending any resources. Line 4 will close upon the opening of <Refraction Railway Line 5>.

- You can spend a certain number of Modules(only for the first time) at the Lost & Found to claim your Refraction Railway rewards.

- Upon entering, you will choose your Identities and E.G.O. to begin the expedition with. Any changes made to your Identities and E.G.O’s levels, Uptie Tiers, and Threadspinning Tiers after starting the run will be reflected on your active team in the Railway.

Recommended Upgrade Levels
--------------------------

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

- The recommended upgrade levels for Refraction Railway Line 4 are: Identity Uptie Tier 4, Level 45, and E.G.O Threadspin Tier 4.

The Refraction Railway presents a very difficult series of battles; we strongly recommend that you enter the Railway after meeting the above conditions.

About Line 4
------------

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

- Line 4 is comprised of 4 different ‘Sections’(Stages). Each Section is composed of 2 or more Stations(waves), and there is a Rest Station between every Section.

- Clearing the Section will record your Clear Turn Count. The Total Turn Count is the sum of all Clear Turn Counts from each Section, from Section 1 to your current Section.

- Below each Section, you can view the rewards for clearing that Section. Claim them at the Lost & Found.

- Any remaining E.G.O Resource after the Section can be used in the subsequent Section.

- At Rest Stations, which are located between Sections, your Identities’ HP will be fully healed, and their SP will be reset to 0.

- You can freely change your Team Loadout in Rest Stations. If you are having difficulty clearing a Stage, please note that a different Team may work better against certain enemies.

- During an expedition, you can choose to start over from previously cleared Stages/Sections in order to reduce your Total Turn Count. When you do so, the Stage will start with the Sinners’ statuses and E.G.O resources reverted to that point, and any progress you've made since that Section will be reset.

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

- You can choose to forfeit or retry a stage in the middle of an Encounter. Please note that choosing to forfeit or retry the Stage will reset the entire Section and that you will have to start over from the very first wave.

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

- If all of your allies are defeated, you can choose between returning to the Team Loadout menu to change your Deployment orders or immediately retrying the battle from wave 1.

Deployment Order Effects
------------------------

► Team Loadout Menu

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

- In Line 4, your Identities will each receive special buffs depending on their Deployment order.

- Backup Identities will receive an additional Starting SP buff. Minus Coin Identities will receive a negative Starting SP buff.

► Combat Progression

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

- In Line 4, a defeated ally Identity will give E.G.O resources that correspond with the Sin Affinities of the Attack Skills that the defeated ally has. The amount of E.G.O resources given corresponds with the number of Attack Skills owned. (S1 gives 3, S2 gives 2, S3 gives 1, for example)

- You can view the Deployment Order Effects and the effect mentioned above in the middle of an Encounter as well by hovering over the buff icons below each Identity.

Chain Battles
-------------

► Team Loadout Menu

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

- Refraction Railway Line 4 introduces the 'Chain Battle' system. In Chain Battles, when a Deployed unit is defeated, the Backup units will fill their spots in the Deployment order.

- You can enter the Section only when you have selected both your Deployment units and the Backup units, six in each category.

► Combat Progression

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

- When a Deployed unit is defeated, the Backup unit will fill their spot in the Deployment order.

- When a Backup unit is Deployed into battle, its Combat Passive activates instead of its Support Passive. When a Deployed unit is defeated, its Support Passive will activate instead of its Combat Passive.

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

- Certain enemies in Line 4 will also gain special effects based on their Deployment orders.

Combat Progression
------------------

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

- All encounters will be Focused Encounters where you, the Manager, will manually match your allies’ Skills against the enemies’ Skills.

- In Line 4, due to the Resilient Determination buff, an ally death will not lower the other allies' SP.

Observation Logs
----------------

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

- If you have already unlocked the Abnormalities' Observation Levels through Story or Mirror Dungeon Encounters, their Observation Levels will be reflected in the Refraction Railway, and you can view their information as you would in those Dungeons. However, their Resistance and any information different from their original counterparts will be locked upon your first encounter with them on the Railway.

- The damage bonus based on Observation Levels does not apply in Refraction Railway Line 4.

- In Refraction Railway Line 4, if the Observation Log was updated mid-encounter, the updated Observation Log info will be saved even if you retry or give up mid-encounter.

Stage Info
----------

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

- In Refraction Railway Line 4, you can view Stats and Resistances for Abnormalities’ Parts in the Stage Info menu(If it has been unlocked during the encounter).

Claiming Rewards
----------------

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

- After clearing a Station for the first time during the event period, rewards from them will be sent to the "Lost & Found".

- To access the "Lost & Found" for the first time, a certain number of Enkephalin Modules will be required. Rewards that can be claimed afterward are free of charge.

- You can earn various level-up and extraction currencies here. Special rewards include 「Level Boost Ticket IV」, 「Season 4 - 3★ Guarantee Decaextraction Ticket」, 「Refraction Railway Line 4 Themed Business Card Deco」.

Special Decorative Banners
--------------------------

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

- Here, you can view the acquisition conditions for Refraction Railway Line 4 Banners. The harder the conditions, the more elaborate your Banner will be.

- Once you obtain a Banner, the Turn Count of your best record will be displayed on it.

- The highest Turn Count that can be recorded in each Section is 99 Turns. If your Turn Count goes beyond 99 Turns in a single Section, while you can still continue to play the Stage, it will result in Stage defeat upon completion.

Records
-------

※ The above image is for demonstration purposes only and is subject to change before the official release.

- Your stats will be recorded upon clearing Section 4, which can be viewed from your Travel Collection during the Refraction Railway’s runtime.

- Up to 20 records can be saved. If you have more than 20 records, records with the highest Total Turns will be deleted first.

- The date of completion, Total Turns taken, used Identities, and damage output statistics will be displayed in your Logs (Travel Collection).

- You can view only your own records in the Travel Collection
