title: Notice: Regarding Usage of Unauthorized Programs
content:
-----------------------------------------------

Hello, This is Project Moon.

We have identified the sale and/or use of unauthorized programs related to Limbus Company.
The 'unauthorized programs' in this notice refer to programs that may make in-combat data modifications on elements such as 'damage dealt' or resetting 'HP values'.

There were measures such as program security services, code protection logic, or in-game monitoring, but we have seen cases of certain methods circumventing these protections.
Currently, we are preparing countermeasures to prevent the use of unauthorized programs by recording enhanced game logs, adding security features, and re-establishing the account sanction criteria.

Please note that, if abnormal game usage records are detected, access to your account may be restricted without any prior warning.
We will put a stop to the use of unauthorized programs by meticulously reviewing relevant data values and impose appropriate sanctions.

The use of unauthorized programs is a significant issue that disrupts the equal experience for all players, and we will diligently manage and address any relevant issues.
We will try our best to ensure a satisfying experience for all of our users.

Thank you.

title: Notice: Issues Identified in Aug. 22nd Scheduled Update
content:
[Notice: Issues Identified in Aug. 22nd Scheduled Update]

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The following are issues that have been identified in the August 22 scheduled update.

<Issues>
► An issue where using the Identify Takeoff Ticket on one of the LCB(base) Identities causes the game to soft lock
※ A temporary fix is to close the game and restart. Please note that this is only a softlocking issue, and that the ticket will be consumed to level and uptie your character as intended.

► An issue where Zwei South Section 5 Rodion’s corpse is used as the unit’s Clash Sprite

► An issue where Wild Hunt Heathcliff can ignore Stagger effects from forced Stagger effects by mounting Dullahan

► An issue where the knockback is greater than intended when rolling the same values in a Clash

► An issue where the Passive 'Anti-Ovine Grounding Plug' doesn't activate when hitting the Generator unit with a Counter Defense Skill

<Upcoming Adjustments for Aug. 29th Scheduled Update>
►E.G.O Gift ‘Rags’ Description adjusted / Adjusted the “When using a Minus Coin” conditional to work with Defense Skills as well

※ In the 2024, June 10th Scheduled Update Notice, we notified that we have adjusted the effects of the Rags E.G.O Gift to not activate when using an E.G.O Skill. The Skill description will be adjusted also to reflect this.

- Before : When using a Minus Coin Skill, …(the effect)… instead.

- After : When the said unit uses a Minus Coin Skill(Not E.G.O Skills), …(the effect)… instead.

We also intend to change the effect to match the text, as it did not specify that it does not activate on Defense Skills. Rags will now activate for Minus Coin Defense Skills as well.

The above issues will be corrected via a future Scheduled Update, and we will inform you via a Scheduled Update Notice as soon as they are fixed.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: June 13th Scheduled Update Notice
content:
---------------------------------

Greetings, dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on Jun. 13th, 2024 (KST).
Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.
Please refer below for details about the update.

New Content
-----------

1. New Target Extraction [New Target Extraction: Timekilling Time] (Jun. 13th 12:00 ~ Jun. 27th 10:00 (KST))
Extraction rate increases for the following Identity & E.G.O.
- E.G.O [WAW] : Everlasting Faust
- 3★ : District 20 Yurodivy Hong Lu

2. Target Extraction [Meursault] (Jun. 13th 12:00 ~ Jun. 27th 10:00 (KST))
Extraction rate increases for the following Identities & E.G.O
- E.G.O [HE] : Pursuance Meursault
- 3★ : R Corp. 4th Pack Rhino Meursault, N Corp. Großhammer Meursault, W Corp. L2 Cleanup Agent Meursault
- 2★ : Dead Rabbits Boss Meursault, The Middle Little Brother Meursault, Rosespanner Workshop Fixer Meursault, Liu South Section 6 Meursault
- 1★ : LCB Sinner Meursault

3. New Identity & E.G.O Added
The following Identity & E.G.O have been added to the list of extractable Identities & E.G.O.
- E.G.O [WAW] : Everlasting Faust
- 3★ : District 20 Yurodivy Hong Lu

4. New Content [Ch. 6.5: Timekilling Time]
※ Please refer to the Steam Announcements page for more information.

Faust Voice Adjustments from Intervallo II to Canto VI
------------------------------------------------------

With the June 13th Scheduled Update, re-recorded versions of Faust's vocal performance in Intervallo II, Canto V, and Canto VI will be applied.

Starting from Intervallo II, Faust's voice was recorded at a lower pitch than we had intended.

This change in vocal pitch was unintended and did not match the character's intended personality and the upcoming narrative. Therefore, we have decided to re-record the lines in a tone that we believe is closer to our original intent.

We did recognize during Intervallo II that Faust's vocal pitch was slightly lower than before, but we considered it to be within the expected margin of error; this is why we did not make any adjustments then. However, as we proceeded through Canto V and Canto VI, the gap between the intended vocal pitch and the resulting pitch grew even further. For example, Faust's voice lines from Canto III and Canto VI almost sounded as though they were coming from two different characters. Thus, it was decided that Faust's voice lines needed to be re-recorded and replaced starting from Intervallo II onward.

This happened because we failed to provide clear and detailed vocal directions.
We sincerely apologize for causing confusion to our players. We will review our voice direction with greater care so that no similar incident will occur again.

Major Changes
-------------

1. 4 EXP Packages Contents Adjusted
[Level Boost Tickets] that used to be a part of EXP Packs will be replaced with [Identity Training Tickets] of equivalent value. (※ Their prices are unchanged)

Please note that, in this process, the total amount of EXP given by each Pack may increase slightly due to differences in conversion between Level Boost Tickets and Identity Training Tickets.

The following changes will be applied with the Jun. 13th (KST) Scheduled Update; with it, the affected Packages' Monthly & Weekly purchase opportunities will be reset.

Please note for your gameplay concerns that if you purchase the following items between 6/1 ~ 6/13 (KST), you will receive the Pack content before the changes are applied.

► Weekly EXP Pack
Before (Yields 92,404 EXP) : Level Boost Ticket III x1, Identity Training Ticket IV x12, Identity Training Ticket III x20
After (Yields 93,000 EXP) : Identity Training Ticket IV x25, Identity Training Ticket III x18

► Monthly EXP Pack I
Before (Yields 263,400 EXP) : Level Boost Ticket IV x2, Identity Training Ticket IV x20, Identity Training Ticket III x20
After (Yields 264,000 EXP) : Identity Training Ticket IV x72, Identity Training Ticket III x48

► Monthly EXP Pack II
Before (Yields 446,800 EXP) : Level Boost Ticket IV x4, Identity Training Ticket IV x20, Identity Training Ticket III x20
After (Yields 447,000 EXP) : Identity Training Ticket IV x125, Identity Training Ticket III x72

► Monthly EXP Pack III
Before (Yields 893,600 EXP) : Level Boost Ticket IV x8, Identity Training Ticket IV x40, Identity Training Ticket III x40
After (Yields 894,000 EXP) : Identity Training Ticket IV x250, Identity Training Ticket III x144

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Adjusted [Charge Barrier] Mechanics
- Before : The Charge Barrier buff did not function as written
※ Effect : Gain (Charge Barrier # x 3) Shield / Lose 1 Charge Barrier after losing 3 Shield

- After : Adjusted the actual effects to match the buff description
※ Adjusted Effect : Gain (Charge Barrier # x 3) Shield / Lose 1 Charge Barrier after losing (Charge Barrier # x 3) Shield

(Example 1) When a unit has Shield only via the Charge Barrier
When a unit has 3 stacks of Charge Barrier(3 x 3 Shield): If this unit loses 9 Shield, they will lose 1 Charge Barrier stack, leaving 2 stacks of Charge Barrier active
Because there won't be any Shield left at this point, this unit will not lose any additional Charge Barrier from taking HP damage

(Example 2) When a unit has Shield from Charge Barrier & Shield from other effects When a unit has 3 stacks of Charge Barrier(3 x 3 Shield): If this unit loses 9 Shield, they will lose 1 Charge Barrier stack, leaving 2 stacks of Charge Barrier active
If this unit loses 6 additional Shield, they will lose 1 additional Charge Barrier stack, leaving 1 stack of Charge Barrier active
If this unit loses 3 additional Shield, they will lose 1 additional Charge Barrier stack, leaving 0 stacks of Charge Barrier active

The error was that the effective Charge Barrier loss conditions did not match the description as written. Instead of losing a Charge Barrier stack after losing (Charge Barrier # x 3) Shield, as written, the players lost 1 Charge Barrier stack every time they took 1 Shield damage. We mean to correct this error to match the texts as written. We sincerely apologize for deploying a fix to this issue so long after the Charge Barrier effect was introduced to the game.

► Fixed an issue where Dieci South Section 4 Hong Lu Skill 1's Reuse Coin effect activated even when the enemies successfully evaded this unit's attack

► Fixed an issue where Heathcliff E.G.O - AEDD Threadspinning Tier 4 Corrosion Skill's "Tails Attack End] Lose HP by 10% of Max HP to gain +10 Charge Count" effect gave Charge Count twice

► Fixed an issue where the amount of Stagger Threshold raised by Outis E.G.O - Binds Threadspinning Tier 4 Corrosion Skill did not match the texts as written
※ There was an error where Outis E.G.O - Binds Threadspinning Tier 4 Corrosion Skill gave 100% boost to the Stagger threshold raised by Tremor Burst instead of 50% as written. We intend to correct this error to match the texts as written. We sincerely apologize to all Managers who have used Outis E.G.O - Binds for this error.

► Fixed an issue where using Rodion E.G.O - Effervescent Corrosion Skill would cause a brief visual error immediately before the Skill cutscene starts

► Fixed an issue where certain Mirror Dungeon boss enemies flipped more Coin Heads than they should, even at -45 SP
※ Affected Bosses : Certain Boss enemies from Canto IV

► Adjusted E.G.O Gift - Rags to no longer activate for E.G.O Skills
※ Reasoning : Overclocking a Minus Coin E.G.O Gift while in possession of this E.G.O Gift caused the SP lost value to inflate, which made it impossible to use that ability. This adjustment was made to address that issue.

► Fixed an issue where certain effects of the E.G.O Gift - Coupled Oscillation did not activate under certain conditions
※ Affected Effect : Apply 5 Tremor Potency and 2 Fragile this turn and next turn to enemies affected by Tremor Burst. (activates once per Attack Skill that triggers Tremor Burst)

► Fixed an issue where the E.G.O Gift - Imitative Generator activated under incorrect conditions
※ Affected Effect : If the said Skill has less than 5 Base Power, deal +25% more damage; if it has 5+ Base Power, gain an additional Coin Power +1
- Before : This effect activated for Skills that do not fit the condition "Skill 3 that gains or consumes Charge Count" as well
- After : This effect has been adjusted to activate only for Skills that fit the condition "Skill 3 that gains or consumes Charge Count"

► Fixed an issue where the E.G.O Gift - Finifugality's Clash Power gain effects were displayed on the expected Clash value UI as well

► Fixed an issue where defeating the Abnormality - Shock Centipede did not raise the Observation Levels

► (KR Only) Fixed an issue where the Abnormality - Drenched Gossypium Choice Event displayed broken texts

► Fixed an issue where the VFX for the Buff - [Blubberbubble] rendered on a layer behind the Identity with the effect

► Fixed an issue where, while in Combat, viewing the unit Details -> Summary -> Skill icon would cause a UI issue to occur depending on the status and the location of the said unit's Skill icon

► Fixed an issue where, in the Identity Details menu, selecting a vacant E.G.O Level would cause the UI to react anyway

► Fixed an issue where, within the Mirror Dungeon of the Fathoms, the currently owned E.G.O resources UI and the currently owned E.G.O Gifts UI overlapped with each other

► Fixed an issue where turning off the effects UI from the Settings - Gameplay - Show active effects UI in Combat Phase menu would cause the Tremor Burst VFX to be disabled as well

► Fixed an issue where, upon ending a Turn while Corroded, the Corrosion status ending VFX would play at the next Turn Start

► Fixed an issue where selecting an obtained item in the Mirror Dungeon Clear UI would cause the tooltip to appear incorrectly

► Fixed an issue where a unit would appear in their corroded form in the 6-48 Encounter cutscene

► Corrected spacing issues with the Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones Mirror Dungeon Event texts

► Changed the Manager Info - Customize - "Similar Tickets/Banners" UI text to "Tickets/Banners List"

► Addressed the network issues that occur when attempting to log in to the game from certain regions

► (EN Only) Fixed a typo in the Mirror Dungeon E.G.O Gift - Trash Crab Brain Wine description
- Before : When an ally covers from Stagger, heal 20% of max HP
- After : When an ally recovers from Stagger, heal 20% of max HP

► (EN Only) Fixed a translation error in the Outis E.G.O - Binds Corrosion Skill description
- Before : [On Hit] trigger Tremor Burst
- After : [Tails Hit] trigger Tremor Burst

► (EN Only) Fixed a translation error in the LCB Sinner Yi Sang's Skill 3 description
- Before : [On Hit] If target's SP is below 0, inflict 1 Fragile
- After : [On Hit] If target's SP is below 0, inflict 1 Fragile next turn

► (EN Only) Fixed a translation error in the Meursault E.G.O - Capote Corrosion Skill description
- Before : [On Hit] Inflict Tremor by target's turn Count
- After : [On Hit] Inflict Tremor by Burst on target

► (EN Only) Adjusted Kurokumo Clan Wakashu Ryōshū's Skill 2 description for consistency
- Before : [On Hit] Apply +3 Bleed Count
- After : [On Hit] Inflict +3 Bleed Count

Known Issues
------------

► An issue where, in the Mirror Dungeon Hell's Chicken Floor Theme Pack, Mirror Dungeon Events unique to Hell's Chicken doesn't appear as often as it should

This issue will be corrected via a future scheduled Update, and we will inform you via a Scheduled Update Notice as soon as it is applied. We apologize for the inconvenience.

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Jun. 20th, 2024 (KST)
- When : After Jun. 13th, 2024 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Jun. 20th (Thu) 2024, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.
- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change depending on the status of maintenance. If such a change occurs, we will let you know in a follow-up notice.
- A resource download may be prompted after the build update. If you're using a mobile device, it is recommended to proceed with a Wi-Fi connection.
- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account. Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: Intro to Upcoming Jun. 13th Content - Ch.6.5: Timekilling Time
content:
--------------------------------------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

With the Jun. 13th, 2024 (KST) Update, new content [Ch 6.5 - Timekilling Time] will be added to the game.

- Duration : 2024/6/13 12:00 (KST) ~ Before 7/11 (KST) Scheduled Update
- Event Rewards Exchange : 2024/6/13 12:00 (KST) ~ Before 7/18 (KST) Scheduled Update
- Requirements : Clear Main Story 6-48

Event Description
-----------------

- When the event starts, the [Ch. 6.5 - Timekilling Time] Event Page will open.
- During the event period, you can earn [Pocket Watch] by clearing the Timekilling Time Event Stages & the Mirror Dungeon.
- You can redeem various rewards from the [Reward Exchange] by spending the [Pocket Watch] that you have collected.

Event Gameplay
--------------

► Combat Encounters of ‘Timekilling Time’

You can obtain [Pocket Watch] every time you complete a combat Encounter of ‘Timekilling Time’. Each Encounter has a first-time reward, and with it, you can obtain even more [Pocket Watch].

The final Stage of ‘Timekilling Time’ is a repeatable Dungeon, and is similar in progression to a Mirror Dungeon.
That final Stage will have a higher Enkephalin-to-[Pocket Watch] ratio, so it will be much more effective as a means of collecting [Pocket Watch].

Event Gameplay
--------------

► Combat Encounters of ‘Timekilling Time’

Timekilling Time Dungeon takes after the Mirror Dungeons, but there are a few key differences:

► Starting E.G.O Gift Selection
- There is no Starting E.G.O Gift selection menu. However, you can gain a large quantity of Cost via a Mirror Dungeon Event in the very first node. Then, you can purchase E.G.O Gifts from the immediately following Shop node.

► Shops
- Appears on the second node after the start of the Dungeon & two nodes before the Boss Encounter
- Keyword Refresh available
- E.G.O Gift Rates : The same as unlocking every Shops
- E.G.O Gift rate related Starter Buffs
- Appearing Gifts : All E.G.O Gifts, save for E.G.O Gifts unique to specific Floor Theme Packs
- E.G.O Gifts in stock : 5

► Rest Stops
- Appears on the node immediately before the Boss Encounter
- Can Fuse E.G.O Gifts after selecting a Keyword
- E.G.O Gift Fusion Formulas are identical to those appearing in Mirror of the Wuthering

► Encounter Reward Cards
- Does not appear

► Mirror Dungeon Events
- Mirror Dungeon Events unique to Timekilling Time will always be available. Other Mirror Dungeon Events will be available as well, but only after the Timekilling Time Events are assigned to each node.

Event Gameplay
--------------

► Combat Encounters of ‘Timekilling Time’

With the Timekilling Time update, the majority of the above changes will be applied to the [Hell's Chicken] and [Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones] Dungeons as well.

The following is the list of changes that will not be applied to the [Hell's Chicken] and [Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones] Dungeons.

► Starting E.G.O Gift Selection
- In Hell's Chicken and Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones Dungeons, Season 3 Mirror of the Lake's Starting E.G.O Selection will still be available. (Randomized within a range of Tiers)

► Shops
- In Hell's Chicken and Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones Dungeons, the Shop node doesn't appear on the second node after the start of the Dungeon; it will appear only two nodes before the Boss Encounter.

Event Gameplay
--------------

► Mirror Dungeons

During the Event Period, ‘Timekilling Time’ Floor Theme Pack will appear on the final floor of both Mirror Dungeon Simulation & Ritornello. During the Event Period, you will be able to experience the Timekilling Time Floor Theme pack regardless of your Main Story progress. Once the event is over, your Timekilling Time Floor Theme unlock condition will be changed to “Clear Canto VI”, and its Timekilling Time Floor Theme Pack spawn location will be adjusted.

Clearing a Mirror Dungeon run will net you [Pocket Watch]. Selecting the Timekilling Time Floor Theme Pack as the final floor theme will net you even more [Pocket Watch]. Mirror Dungeon Ritornello Difficulty rewards contain much more [Pocket Watch] than Mirror Dungeon Simulation.

However, using the Weekly Bonuses does not increase the [Pocket Watch] yield. Using all three Weekly Bonuses at once does not affect the [Pocket Watch] yield either.

※ Please note that, if you have started a Mirror Dungeon run before the event started, you will not gain event currency from that run.

► Main Story (Canto I ~ Canto VI)

If you have not fulfilled the event unlock requirements, you can obtain [Pocket Watch] as a first-time reward from Main Story Combat Encounters. Upon first-time-completion of an Encounter, you can obtain [Pocket Watch] proportional to the amount of Enkephalin Spent regardless of whether you’ve met the EX Clear Conditions or not.

※ You cannot obtain [Pocket Watch] from stages that have already been completed.
※ You cannot obtain [Pocket Watch] from Luxcavations.

Event Currency
--------------

During the event, you can earn [Pocket Watch] by clearing event Stages and Dungeons. You can also obtain [Pocket Watch] by clearing Main Story Stages or Dungeons for the first time, or clearing the Mirror Dungeon.
Rarely, you may obtain [Pocket Watch Bundle] from clearing Event Stages, Main Story Stages, or Mirror Dungeons, and [Pocket Watch Bundle] is automatically converted to 20 [Pocket Watch] upon acquisition.
In the [Reward Exchange] window, you can purchase various rewards by spending [Pocket Watch] you have collected.

If you have cleared the ‘Timekilling Time’ Stages, Mirror Dungeons, and the Main Story (Chapter 1 ~ 6), you can start finding [Pocket Watch Bundle].

[Pocket Watch Bundle] has the highest chance to drop from the final Encounter (Timekilling Time Dungeon) of the event. The chance for it to drop in other Encounters is the same across all Encounters.

[Pocket Watch Bundle] is automatically converted to 20 [Pocket Watch] in the Results or the Rewards screen upon acquisition.

Event Bonus Identities & E.G.O
------------------------------

During the event period, deploying the following Identities or E.G.O on your team will boost the amount of [Pocket Watch] earned.
You can earn a maximum of 120% boost to the amount of event currency earned.

Obtain more [Pocket Watch] by completing Event Encounters or Mirror Dungeons while equipped with Event Bonus Identities or E.G.O.

<Event Bonus Identities & E.G.O>
► 40% Bonus
- E.G.O [WAW] : Everlasting Faust
- 3★ : District 20 Yurodivy Hong Lu
- 2★ : District 20 Yurodivy Ryōshū

- The Event Currency Bonus from each Identity & E.G.O is additive. (Rounded up) Event Currency Bonus maxes out at 120% Bonus.
- Event Bonus Identities don’t actually have to participate in a battle; you can earn the bonus currency simply by having them in your Team loadout.
- Event Currency Bonus applies to first-time clear rewards and Mirror Dungeon clear rewards as well.

Event Rewards
-------------

Earn [Pocket Watch] via the following methods: Event Stage & Dungeon clears, Mirror Dungeon clears, and Main Story Stage & Dungeon first-time clears.
In the [Reward Exchange] window, you can purchase various rewards by spending [Pocket Watch] you have collected.

- At the [Rewards Exchange], you can spend [Pocket Watch] you’ve collected to purchase various rewards.
- The highest number of [Pocket Watch] that can be obtained is 4,000. Every reward in the Reward Exchange will be obtainable at that point.
- [Pocket Watch] will no longer be obtainable once the Event closes after the Jul. 11th (KST) Scheduled Update.
- [Reward Exchange] will be open for 5 weeks, from Jun. 13th 12:00 (KST) ~ Jul. 18th Scheduled Update.
- Even after the event fully ends, you will be able to experience the Timekilling Time combat Encounters and view its story anytime at Driverside and Theater - [Detour Tales].

title: June 5th Scheduled Update Notice
content:
--------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on Jun. 5th, 2024 (KST).

Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.

Please refer below for details about the update.

The scheduled maintenance will commence on Jun. 5th, 10AM Wednesday (KST) this week.
However, please note that the in-game weekly resets will occur on Jun. 6th, 6AM Thursday(KST).

Package Shop Changes
--------------------

The contents of 4 EXP-related Packs will be adjusted. (※ Their prices are unchanged)

[Level Boost Tickets] that used to be a part of EXP Packs will be replaced with [Identity Training Tickets] of equivalent value.
Please note that, in this process, the total amount of EXP given by each Pack may increase slightly due to differences in conversion between Level Boost Tickets and Identity Training Tickets.

The following changes will be applied with the Jun. 13th (KST) Scheduled Update, and along with this, the number of monthly and weekly purchases of the four EXP Pack types will be reset.

Please note for your gameplay concerns that, if you are purchasing the following items between 6/1 ~ 6/13 (KST), you will be receiving the Pack content before the changes are applied.

► Weekly EXP Pack
Before (Yields 92,404 EXP) : Level Boost Ticket III x1, Identity Training Ticket IV x12, Identity Training Ticket III x20
After (Yields 93,000 EXP) : Identity Training Ticket IV x25, Identity Training Ticket III x18

► Monthly EXP Pack I
Before (Yields 263,400 EXP) : Level Boost Ticket IV x2, Identity Training Ticket IV x20, Identity Training Ticket III x20
After (Yields 264,000 EXP) : Identity Training Ticket IV x72, Identity Training Ticket III x48

► Monthly EXP Pack II
Before (Yields 446,800 EXP) : Level Boost Ticket IV x4, Identity Training Ticket IV x20, Identity Training Ticket III x20
After (Yields 447,000 EXP) : Identity Training Ticket IV x125, Identity Training Ticket III x72

► Monthly EXP Pack III
Before (Yields 893,600 EXP) : Level Boost Ticket IV x8, Identity Training Ticket IV x40, Identity Training Ticket III x40
After (Yields 894,000 EXP) : Identity Training Ticket IV x250, Identity Training Ticket III x144

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Fixed an issue where some of the Portals for Abnormality - Wayward Passenger had incorrect Defense Skills

► Fixed an issue where Öufi South Section 3 Heathcliff's Skill 3 'Execution Sentencing' description still had additional elaboration for 'Amplitude Conversion' that has been turned into a separate keyword

► (KR Only) Fixed a typo where Identity Archive - Ishmael's Dialogue list 'Commencing Attack' was missing a space between the two words

► (EN Only) Adjusted E.G.O Gift - Kaleidoscope's description to be more straightforward
- Before : Turn Start: if there are other Identities from the same faction as this unit, gain Offense Level Up equal to the number of other Identities from the same faction.
- After : Turn Start: units accompanied by other Identities from the same faction as themselves gain Offense Level Up equal to the number of other Identities from the same faction.

► (EN Only) Fixed an issue where an incorrect translation was applied to the Mirror Dungeon Event Question for the 'Drunkard' Event
- Before : Who will lift the Skull?
- After : Who will step forth?

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Jun. 13th, 2024 (KST)
- When : After Jun. 5th, 2024 (Wed) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Jun. 13th (Thu) 2024, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.
- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change depending on the status of maintenance. If such a change occurs, we will let you know in a follow-up notice.
- A resource download may be prompted after the build update. If you're using a mobile device, it is recommended to proceed with a Wi-Fi connection.
- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account. Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: May 30th Scheduled Update Notice
content:
--------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on May 30th, 2024 (KST).

Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.

Please refer below for details about the update.

Update Contents
---------------

1. New E.G.O Target Extraction [New E.G.O Target Extraction - Cavernous Wailing Hong Lu & Sinclair]
(May 30th 12:00 ~ Jun. 13th 10:00 (KST))
Extraction rate increases for the following E.G.O.
- E.G.O [TETH] : Cavernous Wailing Hong Lu
- E.G.O [ZAYIN] : Cavernous Wailing Sinclair

2. [Target Extraction: Outis]
(May 30th 12:00 ~ Jun. 13th 10:00 (KST))
The following E.G.O and Identities will have increased odds of extraction.
- E.G.O [TETH] Ya Śūnyatā Tad Rūpam Outis
- 3★ : Wuthering Heights Chief Butler Outis, Seven South Section 6 Director Outis
- 2★ : The Ring Pointillist Student Outis, Cinq South Section 4 Outis, G Corp. Head Manager Outis, Blade Lineage Salsu Outis
- 1★ : LCB Sinner Outis

3. New E.G.O Added
The following is added to the list of extractable E.G.O.
- E.G.O [TETH] : Cavernous Wailing Hong Lu
- E.G.O [ZAYIN] : Cavernous Wailing Sinclair

Major Changes
-------------

1. Improved UI elements when selecting the list of E.G.O Gifts displayed on the top left corner of the screen in the Mirror Dungeon nodes screen
Selecting the list of E.G.O Gifts displayed on the top left corner of the screen will now show a popup instead of a tooltip.

2. Adjusted how Shield values are displayed

► Chaining Phase : HP and Shield values will appear one at a time, taking turns to appear
(e.g.) At 100 HP / 50 Shield → HP(Red Number) / Shield(Blue Number) values will take turns to appear, one at a time)

※ Currently, in the Combat Phase, there is only an indicator to the HP value that the unit is currently Shielded.
(ex) At 100 HP / 50 Shield → 100 HP(Blue Number). The HP number turns red when the Shield is fully depleted from taking damage

We plan to implement a feature in a future update so that the Shield value will be visible in Combat Phases as well.

3. Changed the way that the level up resources are listed in the Identity Level Up UI
Now, the items will be displayed in the following order: Identity Training Tickets, Level Boost Tickets, and Identity Takeoff Tickets. Also, Tickets will now be listed in a descending order(so that higher-EXP Tickets will be moved to the top).

4. Reverted any progress made while the May 23rd Refraction Railway error was active
Any progress or clear records made in the Refraction Railway Line 3 between May 23rd, 12:00 ~ 14:30 will be reset.

Please refer to the Steam Announcements page for more information.
- [Posted May 23rd] Notice:
Refraction Railway Line 3 Error & Temporary Closure
- [Posted May 23rd] Notice: Additional Information Regarding Refraction Railway Line 3 Progress Reset

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Fixed an issue where Liu South Section 4 Ishmael's Combat/Support Passive activated on incorrect conditions
※ The condition in question : "... for every N Burn Count"
- Before : Activated for every N Burn Count on self
- After : Activates for every N Burn Count on the target

► Fixed an issue where The E.G.O Threadspinning Tier for E.G.O equipped by Support Identities showed Tier 1 instead of their actual Tiers

► Fixed an issue where viewing Support Identities' equipped E.G.O details showed an activated 'Threadspin' button

► Fixed an issue where viewing the Support Identity details showed E.G.O not equipped by the Support Identity

► Fixed an issue where [Floor Theme Pack - Emotional Seduction] was missing from the Mirror Dungeon - Ritornello Difficulty

► Improved UI interactivity - In Mirror Dungeon - Theme Pack Compendium, switching to a different Difficulty Tab will now reset the scroll position

► Fixed an issue where unused resources appear in the Mirror Dungeon node select screen

► Fixed an issue where reward Cost & E.G.O Gift was displayed for the Final Floor Boss Encounter of a Mirror Dungeon run

► Fixed an issue where unused resources appear in the Mirror Dungeon - E.G.O Gift Fusion confirmation screen

► Fixed an issue where 2 Mirror Dungeon E.G.O Gifts had incorrect descriptions
※ Affected E.G.O Gifts: Made-to-Order, Haunted Shoes
- Before : The description states 'Attack Power Up', but the actual effect was 'Power Up'
- After : Changed the description to match the actual effects, to 'Power Up'.

► Fixed an issue where a part of the E.G.O Gift Patrolling Flashlight's effects does not activate
※ Affected effect : Turn Start: if the affected Identity has a Skill that gains or consumes Charge Count, the Identity's Skill 1 gains Clash Power +1 and deals +N% more damage while the unit has Charge Barrier

► (EN Only) Fixed an issue where the E.G.O Gift Pain of Stifled Rage had an incorrect translation at Enhancement Tier 2
- Before : If the affected unit already has Haste, gain 2 Haste and 2 Damage Up instead.
- After : If the affected unit already has Haste, gain 2 Haste, 2 Offense Level Up, and 2 Damage Up instead.

► (EN Only) Fixed an issue where, in the Mirror Dungeon Event 'Wandering Mind', succeeding the Choice to obtain 'Mirror Tactile Synaesthesia' showed the failure flavor text instead of the success flavor text

► Fixed an issue where, under certain circumstances, the Identity Details CG showed the Sinner's equipped E.G.O CG instead

► Fixed an issue where, under certain circumstances, the fog of war in Mirror Dungeon - Ritornello moved to an incorrect location

► Fixed an issue where the Refraction Railway-related passives remained on the Mirror Dungeon combat encounter [Wayward Passenger]

► Adjusted background color in the cutscene that shows up when obtaining an E.G.O
- Before : Yellow tone
- After : Gray tone

► Fixed an issue where choosing the 'Retry Stage' option in the Refraction Railway caused the current E.G.O resources to be combined with the E.G.O resources at the start of the Stage

► Fixed an issue where, in the combat encounter against the Abnormality - KQE-1j-23, the game would start malfunctioning under a certain circumstance

► Fixed an issue where 4th Match Flame E.G.O for Ryōshū lacked the movement Sprite when corroded

► Fixed an issue where entering a Stage at -45 SP did not Corrode or Panic the Sinner in the first turn

► Fixed an issue where an incorrect text was displayed when selecting 'Clear all Caches' in the login scene

Known Issues
------------

► An issue where a certain unit would show up Corroded to the in-combat cutscene for Stage 6-48

► An issue where, in the Mirror Dungeon Floor Theme Pack - The Unloving, the players are able to act despite getting wiped in the in-combat cutscene due to the boss fight mechanics

► An issue where the text for certain choice event for the Abnormality - Drenched Gossypium appeared broken

※ The above issues will be corrected with a future Scheduled Update, and we will inform you via a Scheduled Notice as soon as they are corrected.

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 Jun. 6th, 2024 (KST)
- When : After May 30th, 2024 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until Jun. 6th (Thu) 2024, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

-----

Thank you.

title: Notice: Additional Information Regarding Refraction Railway Line3 Progress Reset
content:
[Notice: Additional Information Regarding Refraction Railway Line 3 Progress Reset]

Hello,
This is Project Moon.

After the May 23rd(Thu) 12:00 (KST) Scheduled Update, in version 1.47.1, 'an issue where E.G.O resource would be saved upon Retry Stage' has occurred.
Once we realized this, we posted a notice with the details of the issue, line closure, progress reset, and reward withdrawal around 14:30 (KST).
As for the 'Progress Reset' that we informed you about in that notice, we realized in hindsight that a universal progress reset for all users is not a fair measure for users who did not run the Refraction Railway content in the 1.47.1 version and will cause many users to feel disadvantaged due to this issue.
Therefore, we plan to change our measure as follows.

- Before: Reset Refraction Railway Line 3 progress.
- After: If the user has made any progress in the Refraction Railway after the May 23rd(Thu) 12:00 (KST) Scheduled Maintenance, only that progress will be reset, and their progress will be rolled back to where it was before the maintenance.
E.g.) If the user cleared up to Station 3 before the May 23rd (Thu) Scheduled Maintenance but progressed to Station 5 after the Scheduled Maintenance: Progress rolled back to Station 3 Clear
- Rollback Deployment ETA: After the May 30th (Thu) Scheduled Maintenance

※ However, please note that any clear records made or RR3 banners obtained after the May 23rd (Thu) 12:00 (KST) Scheduled Maintenance will still be reset.

We will try our best to make sure that no issue will hurt the integrity of the Refraction Railway Line 3 records,
And if any issue were to occur, we will try to prepare fair and accurate measures for correcting them.

We sincerely apologize for causing a disturbance to your enjoyment of our game.

title: Issues Identified After the May 23rd Scheduled Update
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

Below are issues that have been identified after the May 23rd Scheduled Update.

<List>

1. An issue where choosing the ‘Retry Stage’ option in the Refraction Railway caused the E.G.O resource upon entry and E.G.O resource upon ‘Retry Stage’ to be added together
(Please refer to [Notice: Refraction Railway Line 3 Error & Temporary Closure] announcement for more information)

2. An issue where entering an Encounter with -45 SP does not cause the character to Panic or Corrode

3. An issue where an incorrect text was displayed in the popup for the ‘Clear all Caches’ in the Login Scene

4. An issue where E.G.O equipped by a Support Unit are all displayed at Threadspinning Tier 1

5. An issue where returning to Identity Details after viewing the E.G.O Passive causes the E.G.O CG to linger

The above issues will be addressed with a future Scheduled Update. We will inform you via a Scheduled Update Notice as soon as these issues are corrected.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

title: Notice: Refraction Railway Line 3 Error & Temporary Closure
content:
Hello, this is Project Moon.

After the May 23rd (Thu) Scheduled Update, we have identified an issue where owned E.G.O Resources constantly stacks.

Below is information regarding our planned measures, Line 3 Temporary Closure, and Records Reset.

Please refer below for more information regarding this issue.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

Issue

- An issue where choosing to ‘Retry Stage’ in Refraction Railway Line 3 caused the currently owned E.G.O resources to stack

Cause

- A side effect of reorganizing the in-game combat system logic

Solution

- Identify the problem logic and correct the issue
- Prepare the next build, submit it for review, and deploy the fix with the next Scheduled Update (After May 30th Scheduled Maintenance).
- Reset clear records from May 23rd 14:30~May 30th 12:00 (KST)

[Notice: Refraction Railway Line 3 Temporary Closure & Reverted Clear Records]

Refraction Railway Line 3 Temporary Closure

- When: After May 23rd 14:30 (KST)
- Reopening: After May 30th (KST) Scheduled Update

- Please note that any Refraction Railway Line 3 progress remaining after the Line 3 Temporary Closure will be reset after the reopening with the May 30th Scheduled Update.

Reverted Clear Records

- When: With the May 30th (KST) Scheduled Maintenance
- Who: All users who cleared Refraction Railway Line 3 after the May 23rd 12:00 (KST)
- If your Refraction Railway Banner has been updated with new turns, they will be reverted to their previous records before May 23rd 12:00 (KST)
- If this is your first Refraction Railway Clear, because there are no previous clear records, your User Banner will be withdrawn.
- No other rewards will be withdrawn.

[Refraction Railway Line 3 Error Compensation]

Compensation : Lunacy x300

Recipients : All users whose accounts were created before May 30th 2024 10:00

Can be claimed once per account

When : After May 23rd 2024, 15:00 (KST)

title: May 23rd Scheduled Update Notice
content:
--------------------------------

Greetings Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on May 23rd, 2024 (KST).

Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.

Please refer below for details about the update.

Major Changes
-------------

1. The Ring Pointillist Student Yi Sang & Outis E.G.O Gift Application Adjustments
The Ring Pointillist Student Yi Sang & Outis' interaction with E.G.O Gifts will be adjusted.

► Before
- Skills that randomly inflict Burn, Bleed, Tremor, Rupture, and Sinking count as Skills that inflict all of the above Keywords.
- The Identity counts as an Identity that inflicts all of the above Keywords.

► After
- Skills that randomly inflict Burn, Bleed, Tremor, Rupture, and Sinking no longer count as Skills that inflict all of the above Keywords due to the said effect.
- The Identity counts only as an Identity that inflicts Bleed.
- For E.G.O Gifts that activate on the conditional that this unit inflicts Burn, Bleed, Tremor, Rupture, or Sinking: these E.G.O Gifts' effects activate ONLY when each of those respective status effects are inflicted after a random selection.

Please refer to our previous Announcement on the Steam Announcements page for more information.
- [Posted May 17th, 2024] Notice: The Ring Pointillist Student Yi Sang & Outis E.G.O Gift Application Adjustments

※ The name of the Passive mentioned in the previous Announcement will be changed as follows.

► Before
- Passive Name : Bleed Identity

► After
- Passive Name : Sanguine Pointillist

2. The Ring Pointillist Student Yi Sang & Outis Level & Uptie Reset Information
When you log in after the May 23rd (Thu) Scheduled Update, The Ring Pointillist Student Yi Sang & Outis' Levels and Uptie Tiers will be reset as follows.

- Identity Uptie Tiers: Reset to Uptie Tier 1
- Identity Levels: Reset to Level 1

With this reset, the following resources will be refunded to your account. They will be refunded to your account via the in-game Inbox.

- Threads and Egoshards used to Uptie the Identities
- Identity Training Tickets equal to the amount of Identity EXP gained

If you have already acquired your Identity Uptie Story Lunacy before the reset, then you cannot obtain additional Lunacy when you Uptie them and view the story again after the reset.

Please refer to our previous Announcement on the Steam Announcements page for more information.
- [Posted May 17th, 2024] Notice: The Ring Pointillist Student Yi Sang & Outis E.G.O Gift Application Adjustments

3. Mirror of the Wuthering - Rework Part 2 (2)
► Raised the chances of finding E.G.O Gifts unique to certain Floor Theme Packs
- E.G.O Gifts unique to certain Floor Theme Packs now have higher chances to appear from the following sources in their respective Floor Theme Packs: Shops, Encounter Reward Cards, Combat Encounter Rewards, Floor Boss Encounter Rewards.

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Fixed an issue where The Ring Pointillist Student Outis had an incorrect Defense Skill Base Power at Uptie Tier 4
- Before : 4
- After : 7

► Fixed an incorrect damage boost value with Blade Lineage Mentor Meursault's 'Yield My Flesh' Skill at Uptie Tier 3 and 'Overthrow' Skill at Uptie Tier 4
- Before : 'Deal +0.3% more damage per 1% missing HP on self'
- After : 'Deal +0.5% more damage per 1% missing HP on self'
(Actual values adjusted to match the text)

► Fixed an issue where certain Identities or enemies' "If user/this unit took no damage last turn" conditional activated on the First Turn after entering a Stage
- Identities : LCB Sinner Hong Lu's 'Dual Strike' and Whirlwind', Lobotomy Corp. Remnant Faust's 'Opportunistic Slash'
- Enemies : Headchicken a.k.a. Bongy & Stunned K Corp. Checkpoint Security

► Fixed an issue where Seven South Section 4 Heathcliff's 'Forensics' Skill's Coin 4 effect '[On Kill] Inflict +2 Rupture Count against the enemy with the lowest Rupture Count' applied to Abnormalities's Core Part instead of intended targets in an Abnormality Encounter

► (EN Only) Clarified the translation for Hong Lu E.G.O - Dimension Shredder's Corrosion Skill description

► Fixed an issue where the E.G.O Gift [Stone Tomb], once Enhanced, did not give Poise Count or Potency next turn after defeating an enemy with a non-Sloth Skill

► Fixed the incorrect description for the E.G.O Gift - [Red Order] activation conditions
- Before : Whenever an ally inflicts Sinking Potency on enemies with Skill Effects... / Allies with Wrath Affinity Attack Skills, upon inflicting Sinking Potency on enemies with Skill Effects...
- After : Whenever an ally inflicts Sinking Potency or Count on enemies with Skill Effects... / Allies with Wrath Affinity Attack Skills, upon inflicting Sinking Potency or Count on enemies with Skill Effects...
※ This was a text-only change. This does not change the actual effects of the E.G.O Gift.

► Fixed an issue where the activation text for the E.G.O Gift [Smokes and Wires] appeared at an incorrect timing
- Before : Activation text appeared even when the activation conditions weren't met
- After : Activation text appears only when the activation conditions are met

► Fixed an issue where, under certain conditions, viewing the Identity Uptie Story again caused the already-claimed Lunacy Reward popup to appear again
※ This was a UI-only issue.
No extra Lunacy was added to your account due to this error.

► Fixed an issue where the translations were not applied to the Theater - Main Story/Detour Tales - Enter Story button

► Fixed an issue where, in certain devices, switching to the 'Window' menu caused the screen to turn black

► Adjusted certain Text tags in Identity Details - Sanity tab to adjust font size according to each language
- Relevant Texts
(1) Base factors increasing Sanity
(2) Base factors decreasing Sanity

► Fixed an issue where skipping Thread Luxcavations caused reward item icons to change color

► Fixed an issue where Identity filter UI when switching out Identity loadouts in Shops or Rest Stops showed 'rarity'

► (JP Only) Adjusted Yi Sang's monologues in certain stories from archaic speech to modern speech

The Ring Pointillist Student Yi Sang & Outis E.G.O Gift Application Adjustment Compensation
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x1300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 May 30th, 2024 (KST)
- When : After May 23rd, 2024 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 May 30th, 2024 (KST)
- When : After May 23rd, 2024 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until May. 30th (Thu) 2024, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.
- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change depending on the status of maintenance. If such a change occurs, we will let you know in a follow-up notice.
- A resource download may be prompted after the build update. If you're using a mobile device, it is recommended to proceed with a Wi-Fi connection.
- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account. Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: Notice: MD4 - Additional Free Unlock for 'Tornado' Starter Buff
content:
[Notice: MD4 - Additional Free Unlock for 'Tornado' Starter Buff]

Hello, this is Project Moon.

We would like to inform you that 'Tornado' Starter Buff for Mirror Dungeon #4 has been included in the list of Starter Buffs that have become free to unlock.

► Before

- Thunder (Including the linked Sub-Starter Buffs)

- Fair Winds (Excluding the linked Sub-Starter Buffs)

► After

- Thunder (Including the linked Sub-Starter Buffs)

- Cascade of Levin

title: May 16th Scheduled Update Notice
content:
--------------------------------

Greetings, Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on May 16th, 2024 (KST).
Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.
Please refer below for details about the update.

New Content
-----------

1. New Target Extraction [New Target Extraction The Ring Pointillist Student Yi Sang & Outis]
(May 16th 12:00 ~ May 30th 10:00 (KST))
Extraction rate increases for the following Identities.
- 3★ : The Ring Pointillist Student Yi Sang
- 2★ : The Ring Pointillist Student Outis

2. [Target Extraction: Faust]
(May 16th 12:00 ~ May 30th 10:00 (KST))
Extraction rate increases for the following Identities and E.G.O.
- E.G.O [HE] : Telepole Faust
- E.G.O [TETH] : Hex Nail Faust
- 3★ : Seven South Section 4 Faust, The One Who Grips Faust
- 2★ : Wuthering Heights Butler Faust, Zwei South Section 4 Faust, Lobotomy Corp. Remnant Faust, W Corp. L2 Cleanup Agent Faust
- 1★ : LCB Sinner Faust

3. New Identities Added
The following Identities have been added to the list of Identities.
- 3★ : The Ring Pointillist Student Yi Sang
- 2★ : The Ring Pointillist Student Outis

Major Changes
-------------

1. The 3rd Walpurgis Night - [Into a Certain Library's Book] Event Closure
Walpurgis Night - [Into a Certain Library's Book] Event will end on May 16th, 10:00 (KST). Event rewards can be claimed up to May. 23rd 10:00 (KST), so please make sure to claim your rewards within that time. Even after the event fully ends, you will be able to experience the Event combat Encounters and view its story anytime at the Diverside and Theater - [Detour Tales]. Please note that, however, the Event combat Encounter will become accessible again only after the scheduled update on May 23rd.

2. (JP Only) Fixed translation error for Hong Lu E.G.O - Dimension Shredder Corrosion Skill effect description

- Before
[攻撃後]次のターンにすべての敵へ攻撃威力2、
憤怒脆弱2、打撃脆弱1を付与

- After
[Indiscriminate] Targets the unit with the most HP
[Before Attack] Gain 3 Haste next turn. Spend 10 Charge Count to inflict +2 Fragile and Dimensional Rift with this Skill

Every Manager's Hong Lu E.G.O - Dimension Shredder will be reset to Threadspinning Tier 1 after the May 16th (KST) Scheduled Update. All Thread and Egoshard consumed when Threadspinning the E.G.O will be returned to your account upon reset. Any refunded Egoshards will be refunded as '[Season 4] Hong Lu's Egoshard' regardless of when you Threadspun the E.G.O.

In the process of applying translation to the update, an incorrect translation was applied to Hong Lu E.G.O—Dimension Shredder, a fully tested E.G.O at the time of release. This issue remained unfixed for almost a year; because of how long the error was allowed to go unfixed, we plan to reset all Managers' Threadspinning Tiers for Hong Lu E.G.O - Dimension Shredder and refund all in-game currency spent to Threadspin the E.G.O.

We sincerely apologize for causing confusion regarding the actual effects of the E.G.O, and for letting it go unfixed for so long.
We apologize to all Managers who own Hong Lu E.G.O - Dimension Shredder.

3. Mirror of the Wuthering - Rework Part 2

※ We are constantly working on reworking the Mirror Dungeon and fixing any bugs found within. We will inform you as soon as the changes are applied via a notice.

(1) Free unlocks for certain Starter Buffs
Mirror of the Wuthering Starter Buffs that unlock access to E.G.O Gifts are now free to unlock and activate. With the May 16th (KST) Scheduled Update, Starlight spent to unlock those Starter Buffs will be returned to all Managers who have already unlocked those Starter Buffs.

<List>
- Eye of the Storm
- Thunder (Including the linked Sub-Starter Buffs)
- Biting Wind (Including the linked Sub-Starter Buffs)
- Fair Winds (Excluding the linked Sub-Starter Buffs)
- Cascade of Levin
- Gathering Storm

(2) Increase the chances of encountering Mirror Dungeon Events thematically relevant to each Floor Theme.
Mirror Dungeon Events thematically relevant to each Floor Theme will now have higher chances to appear than the Mirror Dungeon Events that don't.
In this process, we have added (preexisting) Mirror Dungeon Events that give out relevant Affinity & Keyword E.G.O Gifts to certain Floor Theme Packs. (※ Mirror Dungeon Events currently in certain Floor Themes aren't removed; they remain untouched. We have added Mirror Dungeon Events that give out relevant Affinity & Keyword E.G.O Gifts to certain Floor Theme Packs.)

Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones and Hell's Chicken Floor Theme Packs now have greatly increased chances of spawning their respective Mirror Dungeon Events.

※ Until now, a bug has prevented Yield My Flesh to Claim Their Bones and Hell's Chicken Theme Packs from spawning relevant Mirror Dungeon Events. We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience.

- Floor Theme Packs tied to Keywords have an increased chance of spawning Mirror Dungeon Events that give out their respective E.G.O. Gifts.

(3) Changed E.G.O Gift rewards from clearing Floor Boss Encounters to be relative to the Floor & Floor Theme Pack Difficulty.
Floor Theme Packs with Warning symbols and higher Floors have higher chances to drop higher Tier E.G.O Gifts.

(4) Certain E.G.O Gifts Tier adjusted to match its abilities

► Bio-venom Vial
This E.G.O Gift was created to support the Tremor Keyword Teams, which were relatively slow when completing the multi-enemy Encounters in higher Floors. However, it appeared that it was much too powerful compared to other E.G.O Gifts of the same Tier. Instead of nerfing its abilities, we decided to adjust its Tier as follows so that it has less chance to appear early on in the Mirror Dungeon Run.

- Before : Tier 1
- After : Tier 3

※ Purchase Cost will be adjusted to match its Tier.

(5) Moved Hell's Chicken & S.E.A. Floor Theme Pack location in Ritornello

- Before : Floor 1~2
- After : Floor 2

4. Identity Archive UI Adjusted

- 'Mirror Worlds' tab has been deleted.
- Now, you can view the relevant series of Identity stories by selecting the Book-shaped icon on the top left corner of the Identity Details screen. Then, select the Identity Uptie Story you wish to view by selecting the Sinner's Symbol from the list.

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Fixed an issue where the 'deal more damage' part of Mirror Dungeon E.G.O Gift [Fragment of Inertia] was working incorrectly

- Before : Deal (Tremor Potency on target x 150)% more damage
- After : Deal (Tremor Potency on target x 1.5)% more damage

► Fixed an issue where the activation condition for Mirror Dungeon E.G.O Gift [Fragment of Friction] was incorrect

- Before : Activates when using E.G.O Awakening Skills that gain AND consume Charge Count. (NOT Corrosion Skills)
- After : Activates when using E.G.O Awakening Skills that gain OR consume Charge Count. (NOT Corrosion Skills)

► Fixed an issue where an effect of a Mirror Dungeon E.G.O Gift [Coupled Oscillation] did not activate

- Relevant effect: First Turn Start of a wave: Inflict 5 Tremor Potency and +5 Tremor Count to all enemies. (or all Abnormality parts).

► Addressed an issue where the interaction between a certain effect of [Coupled Oscillation] and a certain enemy's Passive caused the game to softlock

► Fixed an issue where Mirror Dungeon E.G.O Gift [Employee Card] did not reset its activation trigger upon exiting and re-entering a Stage, causing it to activate immediately

► Fixed an issue where, if the player has Mirror Dungeon E.G.O Gift [Once, a Blessing], the game would softlock under certain conditions

► Fixed an issue where Mirror Dungeon E.G.O Gift [Harpoon Prosthetic Leg] spawned on all Floor Theme Packs instead of on only the relevant Floor Theme Pack

► Fixed an issue where certain E.G.O Gifts that activate based on Identity Deployment order did not show their icons

- Relevant E.G.O Gifts : Ardent Flower, Awe

► Added a 'Locked' icon to Floor Theme Pack Rate Up E.G.O Gifts that haven't been unlocked yet

► Fixed an issue where Mirror Dungeon Events for E.G.O Gifts that have been consumed as ingredients for Fusion appeared anyway

► Fixed an issue where reselecting the Keyword after already adding the ingredients in the Fusion UI caused the forecast Icon resources to not load

► Fixed an issue where Edgar Family Heir Gregor's Combat Passive activated on the very first Turn when entering an Encounter with its conditions already met

► Fixed an issue where R.B. Sous-chef Gregor's Skill 4 'Butcher Viand' Coin Power gain effect activated on an incorrect conditional

- Before : If the target has 10+ Bleed Potency, Coin Power +1
- After : If the target has 10+ Bleed Count, Coin Power +1

► Adjusted the description for 'SP Heal Efficiency'
We have adjusted the description for 'HP Heal Efficiency' to address the previous description's vagueness.

- Before
SP Heal Efficiency : Amount of SP healed from SP heal conditions
SP Loss Efficiency : Amount of SP lost from SP loss conditions

- After
SP Heal Efficiency : Amount of SP healed due to the Identity's 'Base Factors Increasing Sanity(SP)'
SP Loss Efficiency : Amount of SP lost due to the Identity's 'Base Factors Decreasing Sanity(SP)'

► Adjusted the titles for Identity Details UI - "Factors Increasing/Decreasing Sanity" section
To address the confusion about which effects are affected by 'SP Heal/Loss Efficiency' effect and which are not, we have adjusted the titles for this part of the Identity Details UI.

- Before
Factors Increasing Sanity
Factors Decreasing Sanity

- After
Base Factors Increasing Sanity
Base Factors Decreasing Sanity

► Addressed an issue in which the in-combat sprites don't work properly under the following condition: when starting combat with a keyboard shortcut between a Turn End and next Turn Start in which the character Sprites are supposed to be switched out (due to E.G.O Corrosions, for example)

► Fixed an issue where selecting 'Gain additional Starlight' reward from the Mirror Dungeon Encounter Reward Card caused the current E.G.O Resource & Cost status UI to not load

► Fixed an issue where the notification for failing to gain an E.G.O Gift in a 'X% chance to gain an E.G.O Gift' was hidden behind other UI

► Fixed an issue where, under certain conditions, Keyword Categories that did not have the Starlight Bonus were marked with the Starlight Bonus icon anyway at the start of the Mirror Dungeon run

※ This did not actually give additional Starlight. This was a UI-only issue.

► Fixed an issue where, selecting one of the filters in the Mirror Dungeon Starter Buff Active Effects list caused the game to scroll to top

► Fixed an issue where Theme Packs that have already been experienced did not unveil their silhouettes

► Fixed an issue where zooming in or out after completing a Mirror Dungeon Encounter caused the camera to jump

► Fixed an issue where the list of Buffs gained from Mirror Dungeon Event choice lingered in Combat Encounters & post-Combat Encounter screen

► Fixed an issue where the Abnormality - Wayward Passenger softlocked the game under certain conditions

► Fixed an issue where running the Abnormality - Faelantern with a single Identity caused the Boss gimmick to malfunction

► Fixed an issue where placing the mouse cursor over certain specific areas near the Sinners' Employee Cards in the Identity Archive caused the Employee Cards to tremble violently

► Fixed an issue where Blade Lineage Mentor Meursault's Sprite and Sprite when hovering over his Sprite did not match each other

► Fixed an issue where, in the Refraction Railway, choosing to continue when both the enemy and the allies were completely wiped out caused the game to softlock

► Fixed an issue where certain Identities' Sprites appeared blurry

Maintenance & Application Update Compensation
---------------------------------------------

- Content : Lunacy x300
- Recipients : All users whose game accounts were created before 10:00 May 23rd, 2024 (KST)
- When : After May 16th, 2024 (Thu) 12:00 (KST)
- Can be claimed once per account

Maintenance Compensation can be claimed until May. 23rd (Thu) 2024, 10:00 (KST) via the in-game Mailbox. (Mail available for 7 days)

Notes
-----

- Please update your game client to the newest version on the respective store (Google Play/App Store/Steam).
- Forcibly shutting down the game while it is downloading resources may cause the download to fail, so please be careful not to close the application during the download.
- You will not be able to play <Limbus Company> during maintenance. Please understand.
- The maintenance schedule may suddenly change depending on the status of maintenance. If such a change occurs, we will let you know in a follow-up notice.
- A resource download may be prompted after the build update. If you're using a mobile device, it is recommended to proceed with a Wi-Fi connection.
- If you're playing with a guest account, we recommend that you link your account with other platforms to prevent possible account loss.
- The maintenance compensation will be provided once per account. Please note that the distribution may be slow due to network delays or other causes.
- The update gifts are valid to claim for 7 days. Please redeem them within this timeframe.

Thank you.

title: May 9th Scheduled Update Notice
content:
-------------------------------

Greetings Dear Manager.

The server will enter scheduled maintenance from 10:00 [AM] through 12:00 [PM] on May 9th, 2024 (KST).
Please make note of the maintenance schedule; we recommend that you refrain from entering combat or making in-app purchases and close the application before maintenance begins so that no data is lost.
Please refer below for details about the update.

※ The Mirror Dungeon Improvements will be applied after the May 9th (KST) Scheduled Update.
In this process, the Simulation Difficulty will be lowered from 5 Floors to 4 Floors.
To apply this change, any Simulation Difficulty MD runs from 06:00 to 10:00 (KST) will be closed on May 9th., 12:00.
(You can claim your reward from your last cleared Floor)
Also, please note that any Weekly Bonus consumed between 06:00~10:00 will not be reset after the Maintenance Period.

Major Changes
-------------

1. Dawn Office Fixer Sinclair Additional Buffs

1) SP Consumption reduced for the 'Unstable Shell of Ego' Passive
- Before
Turn Start: at 45 SP, consume 35 SP to enter the Volatile E.G.O::Waxen Pinion state.
Or if 2+ allies are defeated in a single turn, and if this unit’s SP isn’t at -45 at Turn End, reset SP to 10; then, enter the Volatile E.G.O::Waxen Pinion state.

- After
Turn Start: at 40+ SP, consume 20 SP to enter the Volatile E.G.O::Waxen Pinion state.
Or if 2+ allies are defeated in a single turn, and if this unit’s SP isn’t at -45 at Turn End, reset SP to 20; then, enter the Volatile E.G.O::Waxen Pinion state.
If both conditions are met at the same time, whichever condition that results in a higher SP goes into effect.

2) Dawn Office Fixer Sinclair: ‘Stigma Workshop Weaponry/Passion’ Passive activation condition will be adjusted.

- Before
3x Wrath Res.

- After
5x Wrath Owned

2. Mirror Dungeon Improvements
1) A button has been added to the Window tab to immediately enter the Mirror Dungeon

2) The number of floors on the Simulation Difficulty has been reverted from 5 Floors to 4 Floors
► Added a Rest Stop & a Shop immediately before the Floor 4 Boss Node
► Adjusted Mounting Trials upon clearing Floor 2 & Floor 3
- A Rest Stop has been added on Floor 4, as Floor 4 is now the uppermost floor on Simulation difficulty.

3) E.G.O Gifts appearing from Shops, Rest Stops - Fusions, and Encounter Reward Cards are no longer limited by Floor Theme Pack E.G.O Gift pools
► We have adjusted the settings so that the E.G.O Gift appearance (except certain Floor Theme E.G.O Gifts and Fixed Fusion E.G.O Gifts) is no longer limited by Floor Theme Packs in Shops, Rest Stops - Fusions, and Encounter Reward Cards.
► E.G.O Gifts appearing as rewards for clearing Encounters and Floor Boss Encounters are still limited by Floor Theme Pack pools, just as it was before.

4) At least 1 E.G.O Gift from the Keyword Category selected at the start of the Mirror Dungeon is now guaranteed to appear in at least one of the Floor Card Packs' Floor Boss Encounter reward E.G.O Gifts list
► At least 1 of the Card Packs presented before you will have an E.G.O Gift from the Keyword Category you selected at the start of the Mirror Dungeon.
► There is a chance that 2 or more Card Packs will have an E.G.O Gift from the Keyword Category you selected at the start of the Mirror Dungeon.
► However, if you have already acquired every E.G.O Gift in the Tier of the Keyword Category that you have selected, or if they are already assigned to the list of E.G.O Gifts appearing in Mirror Dungeon Event or the Floor Boss Encounter Reward, then there is a chance that you might acquire an E.G.O Gift of the same Tier but in a different Keyword Category.
► If you have acquired every single E.G.O Gift in the said Tier, regardless of what Keyword Category you chose in the beginning, or if you are unable to acquire additional E.G.O Gifts in that category due to the aforementioned reasons, then you may acquire an E.G.O Gift of a different Tier.
► However, even if there are E.G.O Gifts that can appear from the said Keyword Category, if those E.G.O Gifts are unavailable from that Floor Theme pool, then you might acquire an E.G.O Gift of a different Tier or Keyword Category.
► We plan to add a VFX in a future update to more clearly indicate that certain E.G.O Gifts were added due to this effect.

5) Added a function to choose a Keyword Category for the E.G.O Gift Fusion & Fusion Formula changes
► Now, you can give a higher Fusion rate to a certain Keyword Category of your own choice.
► The more E.G.O Gifts you use in this fusion, the greater the chance of obtaining an E.G.O Gift of the Category that you have selected. (This probability is no longer affected by the Keyword categories of E.G.O Gifts you are using as ingredients for that fusion)
► The higher the Tiers of the E.G.O Gifts you use in this fusion, the greater the chance of obtaining an E.G.O Gift of a higher Tier.
► If you have already acquired every single E.G.O Gift that fits the criteria above, or if those E.G.O Gifts have already been assigned to Encounters or Mirror Dungeon events of the said floor, then you might acquire an E.G.O Gift of a different Tier or a Keyword Category.

6) Added a Keyword Refresh function in Shops: using this new function, you can raise the chances of the shop selling an E.G.O Gift in the selected Keyword Category
► Use the 'Keyword Refresh' button, and choose a Keyword Category.
► Keyword Refresh function in Shops: this function consumes more Cost, but using this new function raises the chances of the shop selling an E.G.O Gift in the selected Keyword Category upon Refresh.
► Using 'Keyword Refresh' increases the price of normal Refresh. Using the normal Refresh function also raises the price of 'Keyword Refresh.'
► 'Keyword Refresh' is affected by 'Refresh Cost -X% for Refreshes that consume Cost' Starter Buffs. However, just like the Starlight Refresh function, 'Keyword Refresh' function is unaffected by the 'X% chance for a Cost-free refresh' Starter Buff.
► If you have already acquired most of the E.G.O Gifts that fits the remaining Keyword & Tier criteria, or if those E.G.O Gifts have already been assigned to Encounters or Mirror Dungeon events of the said floor, then there is an increased chance that you might acquire an E.G.O Gift of a different Keyword Category from the one you have selected.

7) Encounter Reward Cards Adjusted
► The amount of Rewards from each of the Encounter Reward Cards has been raised, but the appearance rates for Encounter Reward Cards from Floor 3 or lower have been slightly reduced
- We increased the general amount of Rewards one could get from the Encounter Reward Cards, but have lowered the appearance rates in the earlier floors.
► Raised the amount of Starlight given by Encounter Reward Cards, but reduced the appearance rate of Starlight Encounter Reward Cards
- Now, Starlight Encounter Reward Cards will give out more Starlight, but will appear more rarely.

8) 'Chance to acquire E.G.O Gift' Encounter Reward Cards Adjusted
► These Encounter Reward Cards have been adjusted so that they will always provide E.G.O Gifts from the Keyword Category you selected at the start of the Mirror Dungeon run.
► If you have already acquired every single E.G.O Gift that fits the criteria, or if those E.G.O Gifts have already been assigned to Encounters or Mirror Dungeon events of the said floor, then you might acquire an E.G.O Gift of a different Tier or a Keyword Category.
► Increased the E.G.O Gift acquisition rate & Tiers you could obtain from those Encounter Reward Cards
► Reduced the 'Chance to acquire E.G.O Gift' Encounter Reward Card appearance rate
While we have raised the Fixed Keyword Category E.G.O Gift acquisition rate & Tiers, we have lowered the chance for those Encounter Reward Cards to appear.

9) Reduced the appearance rate of Elite Encounters and raised the appearance rate of Focused Encounters
- To fit the intended combat difficulty, we have reduced the appearance rate of Elite Encounters but raised the appearance rate of easier Focused Encounters.

10) Floor Theme Card Pack appearance rate adjusted by each Floor in Simulation & Ritornello
- We have adjusted Floor Theme Card Pack appearance rates so that no unreasonably difficult Abnormality Boss Encounters will appear too early on in the Mirror Dungeon run where the E.G.O Gift builds haven't been completed yet

11) Starter Buffs - Active Effects - [Summary/Details] function adjusted: Now, if you select the [Summary] option, only the Main Buff descriptions will be visible.

12) Floor Theme E.G.O Gift Pools adjusted
- To address the issue in which Floor Theme E.G.O Gift pools run out of E.G.O Gifts, we have expanded the E.G.O Gift pools of every Floor Theme Pack.

Bug Fixes & Improvements
------------------------

► Fixed an issue where Thread Luxcavation 'Daily Bonuses' showed incorrect values

► Fixed an issue where skipping the Luxcavation Encounter after completing 'The 3rd Walpurgis Night - Fairy Festival' did not properly display the rewards
- This was a visual-only issue, and there were no issues with actual reward acquisition.

► Fixed an issue in Main Story Stage 6-48 where, if Heathcliff is defeated at Turn Start, the game would softlock

► Addressed the issue where playing the game while the device language was set to certain languages such as Turkish would cause the game to softlock upon entering Main Story - Story Dungeon

► Fixed an issue where Starlight Bonus for choosing a different E.G.O Gift Keyword Category did not activate on the correct Keyword Category

► Fixed an issue where a double-click was required to activate the filter for Mirror Dungeon Starter Buff effects list

► Fixed an issue where, if a server error occurred in the screen selecting the Mirror Dungeon Theme Card Pack, the game would softlock

► Fixed an issue where certain enemy texts in the Mirror Dungeon appeared as UNKNOWN

► Fixed an issue where certain enemies in the Mirror Dungeon were appearing in battle backgrounds where they do not belong

► Fixed an issue where enemies in the Mirror Dungeon Encounter were standing in incorrect places

► Addressed the issue where certain Mirror Dungeon stages were missing background music

► Fixed an issue where Mirror Dungeon Event - The 4th Front of the Smoke War showed the incorrect Sin Affinity Advantage Forecast

► Fixed an issue where 'error code : 76401' would randomly appear while running the Mirror Dungeon

► Fixed an issue where incorrect enemies would appear from certain Floor Theme Card Packs

► Reduced the number of enemies in certain Mirror Dungeon Stages where the enemies had too many Slots compared to the Sinners

► Fixed an issue where the Mirror Dungeon Steam Transport Machine did not have a lowered HP

► Reduced the number of enemies appearing per wave in the Mirror Dungeon - Baba Yaga Stage

► Fixed an issue where the image of an incorrect boss was displayed on the 'Emotional Judgment' Floor Theme Pack cover

► Fixed an issue where the images of certain bosses were missing from the 'Tyrannical Pride' Floor Theme Pack cover

► Deleted 'Engraved Hatred and Animosity' Passive from a Stage 5-36 Boss enemy appearing in the Mirror Dungeon

► Fixed an issue where Sign of Roses Skill 'Endless Blooming' did not prioritize certain targets as intended

► Fixed an issue where killing the Stage 4-48 Boss enemy in the Mirror Dungeon before the phase change caused the game to softlock

► Addressed the issue where your Mirror Dungeon node location VFX did not match the camera movements

► Fixed an issue where the effects for E.G.O Gift - Reverberation++ did not activate

► Added a missing description for the E.G.O Gift - Polarization Added Text: (For enemies without SP, their 'SP' counts as 0)

► Fixed an issue where E.G.O Gift - Scalpel activated on units that did not meet the activation conditions as well

► Adjusted the E.G.O Gift - 'Sharp Needle & Thread' Tier(2->3) and Cost(204->271)

► Fixed an issue where 'Fanatic' buff from the E.G.O Gift - Nagel und Hammer Scriptures did not work as intended
- Before: Applied the 'Fanatic' Buff used by enemies in Main Story Canto 3
- After: Applies the 'Fanatic' Buff used by allied N Corp. Fanatic Units

► Fixed an issue where certain E.G.O Gift effect description did not match their previews

► Fixed an issue where certain E.G.O Gifts had outdated descriptions

► Improved notifications & scroll function for the Missions menu in 'The 3rd Walpurgis Night - Fairy Festival'

► Addressed the issue where certain Abnormality units lacked Risk Levels & Classification codes in 'The 3rd Walpurgis Night - Fairy Festival'

► Main Story - Fixed an issue where 'The 3rd Walpurgis Night' post-battle Mini Episode played even after players who did not complete Canto 6 chose to not watch the Mini Episode

► Fixed an issue where color filters did not apply to Dawn Office Fixer Sinclair's Volatile E.G.O::Waxen Pinion State

► Adjusted the highlight color of the Target Extraction - The 3rd Walpurgis Night in the Extraction menu
- Before : Yellow Highlight
- After : Green Highlight

► (KR Only) Addressed the issue where the Manager Ticket - Introductions Phrase's automated postposition function did not work as intended for certain sentences

► (KR Only) Fixed an issue where the text for the E.G.O Gift - Distant Start appeared incorrectly due to a typo

► (EN Only) Fixed an issue where Kurokumo Clan Wakashu Rodion's Skill 1 had an incorrect description
Before: At 4+ Poise, Coin Power +3
After: At 4+ Poise, Coin Power +2

► (EN Only) Fixed various grammar and spelling errors identified in the May 2nd, 2024 Scheduled Update

► (EN Only) Fixed an issue where 'Offense Level' was written as 'Attack Level' in certain Mounting Trials of the Mirror Dungeon 4 - Mirror of the Wuthering

► (EN Only) Fixed various typos found in Mirror Dungeon 4 - Mirror of the Wuthering E.G.O Gifts

► (JP Only) Fixed an issue where Yesod Announcer's name was incorrectly inputted

► (JP Only) Adjusted translations for Queequeg's voicelines to match terminologies from the prior games

► Fixed an issue where Floor 2 Normal, Focused, and Elite Encounters did not yield E.G.O Gift Rewards

Known Issues
------------
